papers.title: "OOPS!": Out-Of-Band Remote Power Side-Channel Attacks on Intel SGX and TDX.
papers.abstract: Prior work shows that remote power attacks on Intel processors are possible through two Model Specific Registers (MSRs): MSR_PKG_Energy_Status and MSR_PPO_Energy_Status. In response, Intel introduced a defense: a bit in MSR IA32_MISC_PACKAGE_CTLS allows users to enable/disable “filtering” mechanism that adds additional noise to energy measurements to harden against power side-channel attacks. In this work, we demonstrate that “filtering” does not cover all possible avenues of measuring power. On Intel server-grade platforms, components like out-of-band management interface (OOB) exist which also expose telemetric information like inband energy consumption. For this, we first reverse engineer the protocol structure over which OOB communicates with in-band components. We then show how OOB allows read-only access to the Package Configuration Space (PCS) and note that energy readings through PCS are outside the scope of filtering. Using this, we establish remote power side-channels on Intel SGX and TDX operational on Intel Sapphire Rapids. We first construct a synchronization mechanism to align in-band execution with out-of-band measurements by leveraging deliberately disabled MSRs. We then use energy readings through OOB PCS to recover 2048-bit RSA keys from MbedTLS operational within in-band Intel SGX (with generic single-stepping assumption). Finally, we also leak AESNI keys from within in-band Intel TDX (without any single-step assumption). Prior to our work, the literature on side-channels has been focused on attacks leveraging in-band interfaces. Our work establishes the importance of evaluating confidential computing architectures against attack vectors that combine abilities of both in-band and out-of-band interfaces to achieve adversarial objectives (that both in-band and out-of-band interfaces cannot independently achieve).
papers.abstract_zh: 先前的工作表明，可以通过两个特定于型号的寄存器 (MSR) 对英特尔处理器进行远程电源攻击：MSR_PKG_Energy_Status 和 MSR_PPO_Energy_Status。作为回应，英特尔推出了一种防御措施：MSR IA32_MISC_PACKAGE_CTLS 中的一个位允许用户启用/禁用“过滤”机制，该机制会在能量测量中添加额外的噪声，以增强对电源侧通道攻击的防御能力。在这项工作中，我们证明“过滤”并没有涵盖所有可能的功率测量途径。在英特尔服务器级平台上，存在带外管理接口 (OOB) 等组件，这些组件还公开带内能耗等遥测信息。为此，我们首先对 OOB 与带内组件通信的协议结构进行逆向工程。然后，我们展示 OOB 如何允许对封装配置空间 (PCS) 进行只读访问，并注意通过 PCS 读取的能量读数超出了过滤范围。利用这一点，我们在英特尔 SGX 上建立了远程电源侧通道，并在英特尔 Sapphire Rapids 上运行的 TDX 上建立了远程电源侧通道。我们首先构建一个同步机制，通过利用故意禁用的 MSR 来使带内执行与带外测量保持一致。然后，我们通过 OOB PCS 使用能量读数，从带内 Intel SGX 内运行的 MbedTLS 恢复 2048 位 RSA 密钥（采用通用单步假设）。最后，我们还从带内 Intel TDX 中泄漏 AESNI 密钥（没有任何单步假设）。在我们的工作之前，有关侧通道的文献一直关注利用带内接口的攻击。我们的工作确立了针对攻击向量评估机密计算架构的重要性，这些攻击向量结合了带内和带外接口的能力以实现对抗性目标（带内和带外接口都无法独立实现）。

papers.title: 333-eDRAM - 3T Embedded DRAM Leveraging Monolithic 3D Integration of 3 Transistor Types: IGZO, Carbon Nanotube and Silicon FETs.
papers.abstract: The memory wall is a major bottleneck for continuing to improve the energy efficiency of computing systems. To overcome this challenge, various nanomaterials, devices, circuits, architectures, and three-dimensional (3D) integration techniques are under development for future memory solutions. However, major trade-offs exist when designing memories to achieve high on-chip memory capacity, high retention time, high endurance, low access times, low access energy, and low static leakage power. We present an energy- and area-efficient embedded DRAM memory architecture (quantified by EADP: the product of total energy consumption, circuit area footprint and application execution time) that leverages monolithic threedimensional (3D) integration of three types of field-effect transistors (FETs): (i) Indium Gallium Zinc Oxide (IGZO) FETs for ultra-low off-state leakage currents enabling high retention time DRAM; (ii) Carbon Nanotube FETs (CNFETs) for high on-state drive currents leading to fast access times; and (iii) Silicon CMOS for its combined energy efficiency and low off-state leakage current (for memory peripheral circuits implemented on the bottom physical circuit layer). Our resulting 333-eDRAM achieves each of the following simultaneously, which we quantify and describe how to co-optimize in this paper: high density, high retention time, high endurance, low access times, low access energy, and low static leakage power. We show full physical layout designs detailing how to implement 333-eDRAM and quantify EADP for an ARM Cortex-M0 processor + on-chip 333-eDRAM implemented at a 7 nm technology node, running applications from the Embench benchmark suite. Using cycleaccurate simulations of applications, SPICE circuit simulations, compact models calibrated to experimental data, and detailed full physical layout designs of 333-eDRAM memories, we show that on average (across 16 Embench benchmarks), ARM CortexM0 + IGZO/CNT/Si 333-eDRAM offers $1.96 \times$ better EDP and $5.15 \times$ better EADP than ARM Cortex-M0 + Silicon eDRAM.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存墙是持续提高计算系统能效的主要瓶颈。为了克服这一挑战，正在开发各种纳米材料、器件、电路、架构和三维 (3D) 集成技术，以用于未来的存储解决方案。然而，在设计存储器以实现高片上存储器容量、高保留时间、高耐用性、低存取时间、低存取能量和低静态泄漏功率时，存在重大权衡。我们提出了一种节能和面积高效的嵌入式 DRAM 内存架构（通过 EADP 量化：总能耗、电路面积和应用程序执行时间的乘积），该架构利用三种类型场效应晶体管 (FET) 的单片三维 (3D) 集成：(i) 铟镓锌氧化物 (IGZO) FET，可实现超低断态漏电流，从而实现高保留时间 DRAM； (ii) 碳纳米管 FET (CNFET)，可实现高通态驱动电流，从而实现快速存取时间； (iii) 硅 CMOS 具有综合能效和低断态漏电流（对于在底部物理电路层实现的存储器外围电路）。我们最终的 333-eDRAM 同时实现了以下各项，我们在本文中量化并描述了如何共同优化：高密度、高保留时间、高耐用性、低访问时间、低访问能量和低静态泄漏功率。我们展示了完整的物理布局设计，详细说明了如何实现 333-eDRAM 并量化 ARM Cortex-M0 处理器 + 在 7 nm 技术节点实现的片上 333-eDRAM 的 EADP，并运行 Embench 基准测试套件中的应用程序。使用应用程序的周期精确仿真、SPICE 电路仿真、根据实验数据校准的紧凑模型以及 333-eDRAM 存储器的详细完整物理布局设计，我们表明，平均而言（在 16 个 Embench 基准测试中），ARM CortexM0 + IGZO/CNT/Si 333-eDRAM 提供比 ARM Cortex-M0 + 芯片高 1.96 美元的 EDP 和高 5.15 美元的 EADP eDRAM。

papers.title: 3D-CIMlet: A Chiplet Co-Design Framework for Heterogeneous In-Memory Acceleration of Edge LLM Inference and Continual Learning.
papers.abstract: The design space for edge AI hardware supporting large language model (LLM) inference and continual learning is underexplored. We present 3D-CIMlet, a thermal-aware modeling and co-design framework for 2.5D/3D edge-LLM engines exploiting heterogeneous computing-in-memory (CIM) chiplets, adaptable for both inference and continual learning. We develop memory-reliability-aware chiplet mapping strategies for a case study of edge LLM system integrating RRAM, capacitor-less eDRAM, and hybrid chiplets in mixed technology nodes. Compared to 2 D baselines, $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ designs improve energy efficiency by up to 9.3 x and 12 x, with up to 90.2% and 92.5% energy-delay product (EDP) reduction respectively, on edge LLM continual learning.
papers.abstract_zh: 支持大语言模型 (LLM) 推理和持续学习的边缘人工智能硬件的设计空间尚未得到充分探索。我们推出了 3D-CIMlet，这是一种热感知建模和协同设计框架，适用于利用异构内存计算 (CIM) 小芯片的 2.5D/3D 边缘 LLM 引擎，适用于推理和持续学习。我们开发了内存可靠性感知芯片映射策略，用于在混合技术节点中集成 RRAM、无电容器 eDRAM 和混合芯片的边缘 LLM 系统案例研究。与 2 D 基线相比，$2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ 设计在边缘 LLM 持续学习下，能效分别提高了 9.3 倍和 12 倍，能量延迟积 (EDP) 分别降低了 90.2% 和 92.5%。

papers.title: 3D-Flow: Flow-based Standard Cell Legalization for 3D ICs.
papers.abstract: The standard-cell placement legalization is a critical step in the physical design. The emerging 3D ICs have brought challenges to traditional legalizers on efficiency and effectiveness. In this work, we present a fast flow-based legalization algorithm, 3D-Flow, that minimizes cell displacement in a 3D solution space. Our legalizer resolves overflowed bins by finding the shortest augmenting path on a 3D grid graph, utilizing an effective branch-and-bound algorithm. Moreover, a post-optimization with a cycle-canceling algorithm is proposed to minimize the maximum displacement. Our approach leverages the global perspective inherent in network flow methods, considering multiple dies in 3D ICs to minimize cell displacement. Experimental results on ICCAD 2022 and 2023 contest benchmarks demonstrate our proposed algorithm achieves up to 13% and 43% less average and maximum cell displacement compared to state-of-the-art legalizers in a similar runtime.
papers.abstract_zh: 标准单元布局合法化是物理设计中的关键步骤。新兴的3D IC给传统合法化者带来了效率和有效性的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于流的快速合法化算法 3D-Flow，它可以最大限度地减少 3D 解空间中的单元位移。我们的合法化器通过利用有效的分支定界算法在 3D 网格图上找到最短的增广路径来解决溢出的容器。此外，提出了一种采用循环取消算法的后优化来最小化最大位移。我们的方法利用网络流方法固有的全局视角，考虑 3D IC 中的多个芯片以最大限度地减少单元位移。 ICCAD 2022 和 2023 竞赛基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的合法器相比，在相似的运行时间内，我们提出的算法的平均和最大单元位移分别减少了 13% 和 43%。

papers.title: 3D-SubG: A 3D Stacked Hybrid Processing Near/In-Memory Accelerator for Subgraph GNNs.
papers.abstract: Subgraph Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are emerging as a promising approach to enhance GNN expressiveness, but their more complex graph structures with numerous independent and irregular subgraphs pose significant hardware deployment challenges. In this work, we propose 3D-SubG, a 3D stacked hybrid processing-near/in-memory accelerator for subgraph GNNs. With hybrid bonding packaging technology, a logic die is 3D stacked with a DRAM die for highly parallel memory accesses. The logic die employs digital SRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM) macros to boost computation density and minimize data transfer. We further propose a bit-level non-zero gathering method to exploit graph sparsity for PIM, a workloadbalanced mapping strategy for subgraph allocation onto different logic-to-DRAM blocks, and a distributed global pooling approach to reduce inter-block data movements. Experimental results show that 3D-SubG achieves average improvements of $146.11 \times$ in performance, $934.18 \times$ in area efficiency, and $1171.80 \times$ in energy efficiency compared to RTX 3090Ti.
papers.abstract_zh: 子图图神经网络 (GNN) 正在成为增强 GNN 表达能力的一种有前途的方法，但其更复杂的图结构以及大量独立和不规则的子图带来了重大的硬件部署挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-SubG，一种用于子图 GNN 的 3D 堆栈混合处理近/内存加速器。利用混合键合封装技术，逻辑芯片与 DRAM 芯片进行 3D 堆叠，以实现高度并行的内存访问。逻辑芯片采用基于数字 SRAM 的内存处理 (PIM) 宏来提高计算密度并最大限度地减少数据传输。我们进一步提出了一种位级非零收集方法来利用 PIM 的图稀疏性，一种用于将子图分配到不同逻辑到 DRAM 块的工作负载平衡映射策略，以及一种减少块间数据移动的分布式全局池方法。实验结果表明，与 RTX 3090Ti 相比，3D-SubG 的性能平均提升了 146.11 倍，面积效率平均提升了 934.18 倍，能效提升了 1171.80 美元。

papers.title: 3D-TokSIM: Stacking 3D Memory with Token-Stationary Compute-in-Memory for Speculative LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: The LLM decoding process poses a significant challenge for memory bandwidth due to its autoregressive nature. Prior 2D memory solutions fail to overcome this memory bottleneck due to limited memory-to-logic bandwidth. In this work, we propose 3D-TokSIM, a cross-stack solution by stacking 3D memory on logic die with a specially designed token-stationary compute-in-memory (CIM) to efficiently accelerate speculative decoding. Our CIM is developed with novel token-stationary dataflow to reduce data movement on logic die to save power and balance computation and memory access. To further reduce the buffer requirements, we perform architecture exploration and allocate notable CIM resources for achieving higher decoding parallelism. Compared to RTX 3090 GPU, 3D-TokSIM achieves 15.1 $\times$ throughput and $324 \times$ energy efficiency improvements on speculative Llama2-7B decoding.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其自回归性质，LLM 解码过程对内存带宽提出了重大挑战。由于内存到逻辑带宽有限，先前的 2D 内存解决方案无法克服此内存瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-TokSIM，这是一种跨堆栈解决方案，通过将 3D 内存堆叠在逻辑芯片上，并使用专门设计的令牌固定计算内存 (CIM) 来有效加速推测解码。我们的 CIM 采用新颖的令牌固定数据流开发，可减少逻辑芯片上的数据移动，从而节省功耗并平衡计算和内存访问。为了进一步减少缓冲区要求，我们进行架构探索并分配显着的 CIM 资源以实现更高的解码并行性。与 RTX 3090 GPU 相比，3D-TokSIM 在推测性 Llama2-7B 解码上实现了 15.1 $\times$ 吞吐量和 324 \times$ 能效改进。

papers.title: A Cross-model Fusion-aware Framework for Optimizing (gather-matmul-scatter)s Workload.
papers.abstract: Modern deep learning models, such as Relation Graph Convolutional Network (RGCN), Sparse Convolutional Networks (SpConv), and Mixture of Experts Networks (MoE), are significantly dependent on the (gather-matmul-scatter) (abbreviated as (g-mm-s) ${ }_{\mathrm{s}}$) workload as their fundamental computational pattern. While existing works have made optimization attempts, several critical challenges remain unsolved, including domain-specific optimization migration, time-consuming exploration, and inefficient dataflow with dynamic inputs.To address these challenges, we introduce Efficient-GMS, a comprehensive framework that enhances ($\mathrm{g}-\mathrm{mm}-\mathrm{s})_{\text {s }}$ workload across diverse input scenarios. Our framework introduces (1) A Fusion-aware framework enabling cross-model optimization migration. We propose a comprehensive dataflow analysis that identifies shared computational patterns across models, enabling the development of four optimized dataflow patterns with vertical and horizontal fusion strategies. (2) Performance model-guided configuration space reduction. We develop a performance model to predict the relative execution efficiency across configurations, thereby reducing the search space and minimizing search time while ensuring optimal configuration selection. (3) Adaptive dataflow selection mechanism. We implement a lightweight heuristic model that dynamically selects optimal dataflow patterns based on the characteristics of the input and the hardware. Experimental results demonstrate that Efficient-GMS achieves significant performance gains, delivering an average end-to-end speedup of $1.46 \times$ in RGCN model, $1.32 \times$ in Sp-Conv-based model, and $1.15 \times$ in MoE model compared to state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代深度学习模型，例如关系图卷积网络 (RGCN)、稀疏卷积网络 (SpConv) 和混合专家网络 (MoE)，很大程度上依赖于 (gather-matmul-scatter)（缩写为 (g-mm-s) ${ }_{\mathrm{s}}$）工作负载作为其基本计算模式。虽然现有的工作已经做出了优化尝试，但仍有一些关键挑战尚未解决，包括特定领域的优化迁移、耗时的探索以及动态输入的低效数据流。为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了 Efficient-GMS，这是一个综合框架，可以增强跨不同输入场景的 ($\mathrm{g}-\mathrm{mm}-\mathrm{s})_{\text {s }}$ 工作负载。我们的框架引入了 (1) 支持跨模型优化迁移的融合感知框架。我们提出了一种全面的数据流分析，可以识别跨模型的共享计算模式，从而能够利用垂直和水平融合策略开发四种优化的数据流模式。 (2)性能模型引导配置空间缩减。我们开发了一个性能模型来预测跨配置的相对执行效率，从而减少搜索空间并最大限度地减少搜索时间，同时确保最佳配置选择。 (3)自适应数据流选择机制。我们实现了一个轻量级启发式模型，该模型根据输入和硬件的特征动态选择最佳数据流模式。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，Efficient-GMS 实现了显着的性能提升，在 RGCN 模型中实现了 1.46 美元的平均端到端加速，在基于 Sp-Conv 的模型中实现了 1.32 美元的端到端加速，在 MoE 模型中实现了 1.15 美元的平均端到端加速。

papers.title: A Cutting-Edge Parallel Solver for Scalable Power Grid Analysis Using Nested Domain Decomposition.
papers.abstract: As transistor scaling approaches sub-5 nm technologies, power distribution networks (PDNs) in integrated circuits have grown increasingly complex, with billions to trillions of nodes. Simultaneously, reduced noise margins and increased power density necessitate more accurate and efficient power grid analysis. Traditional methods for solving large-scale PDNs, especially those requiring the solution of sparse linear systems, face significant challenges due to high computational costs. Although domain decomposition methods (DDM) allow for efficient parallel computation, the size of the dense global Schur complement grows excessively large as the number of partitions increases, limiting scalability and imposing substantial computational burdens. This paper introduces an efficient parallel nested domain decomposition solver that incorporates a parallel Schur complement computation strategy and intermediate Schur complement to address these challenges. Experimental results demonstrate that by introducing an intermediate Schur complement, the size of the global Schur complement is significantly reduced, achieving an average $1.70 \times$ speedup in computation, which results in a $1.30 \times$ speedup for the entire solver compared to the conventional DDM parallel solver.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着晶体管尺寸接近 5 nm 以下技术，集成电路中的配电网络 (PDN) 变得越来越复杂，拥有数十亿到数万亿个节点。同时，噪声容限的降低和功率密度的提高需要更准确、更高效的电网分析。求解大规模 PDN 的传统方法，尤其是那些需要求解稀疏线性系统的方法，由于高计算成本而面临重大挑战。尽管域分解方法 (DDM) 允许高效的并行计算，但随着分区数量的增加，密集全局 Schur 补集的大小会变得过大，从而限制了可扩展性并带来了巨大的计算负担。本文介绍了一种高效的并行嵌套域分解求解器，该求解器结合了并行 Schur 补计算策略和中间 Schur 补来解决这些挑战。实验结果表明，通过引入中间Schur补集，全局Schur补集的大小显着减小，计算速度平均提高了$1.70\times$，与传统的DDM并行求解器相比，整个求解器的速度提高了$1.30\times$。

papers.title: A Data-Centric Hardware Accelerator for Efficient Adaptive Radix Tree.
papers.abstract: Adaptive Radix Tree (ART) is a widely used tree index structure prevalent in various domains such as databases and key-value stores. Despite many solutions have been proposed to improve the performance of ART, they still suffer from significant redundant tree traversals and serious synchronization cost when concurrently performing the operations (e.g., read/write) over ART. In this work, we observe that most operations of realworld workloads tend to target a small subset of ART nodes frequently, exhibiting strong temporal and spatial similarities among the operations. Based on this observation, we propose a data-centric hardware accelerator, called DCART, to efficiently support the operations over ART. Specifically, DCART proposes a novel data-centric processing model into the accelerator design to coalesce the operations associated with the same ART nodes and adaptively cache the frequently traversed ART nodes and their search results, thereby fully exploiting the similarities among the operations for lower tree traversal and synchronization overhead. We implemented DCART on the Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card and compared it with the cutting-edge solutions, DCART achieves $21.1 \times-44.2 \times$ speedups and $71.1 \times-148.9 \times$ energy savings.
papers.abstract_zh: 自适应基数树（ART）是一种广泛使用的树索引结构，普遍存在于数据库和键值存储等各个领域。尽管已经提出了许多解决方案来提高 ART 的性能，但当通过 ART 并发执行操作（例如，读/写）时，它们仍然遭受大量冗余树遍历和严重的同步成本。在这项工作中，我们观察到现实世界工作负载的大多数操作往往经常针对一小部分 ART 节点，在操作之间表现出很强的时间和空间相似性。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种以数据为中心的硬件加速器，称为 DCART，以有效支持 ART 上的操作。具体来说，DCART在加速器设计中提出了一种新颖的以数据为中心的处理模型，以合并与相同ART节点相关的操作，并自适应地缓存频繁遍历的ART节点及其搜索结果，从而充分利用操作之间的相似性来降低树遍历和同步开销。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现了 DCART，并将其与尖端解决方案进行了比较，DCART 实现了 21.1 × 44.2 × 美元的加速和 71.1 × 148.9 × 美元的节能。

papers.title: A Fast, Iterative Clock Skew Scheduling Algorithm with Dynamic Sequential Graph Extraction.
papers.abstract: Clock skew scheduling (CSS) is a well-known technique that improves design timing slack by adjusting clock latency to flipflops. CSS requires obtaining timing path information between sequential elements (including flip-flops and I/O ports), known as sequential graph extraction, which is the most time-consuming part of advanced CSS. In this paper, to quickly identify the potential of clock skew in slack optimization, we propose an iterative CSS algorithm that leverages timing propagation to facilitate sequential graph extraction. Then, we provide a comprehensive skew calculation method that considers multiple clock latency constraints, obtaining the target latency of each flip-flop. Finally, we present slack optimization techniques to achieve the target latencies. Our algorithm achieves a $49.11 \times$ speedup compared to the advanced CSS algorithm based on partial graph extraction, reducing 90.05% of the extracted edges. Compared to a state-of-the-art CSS-based slack optimization methodology, our algorithm delivers a $27.01 \times$ speedup with superior slack improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 时钟偏差调度 (CSS) 是一项众所周知的技术，它通过调整触发器的时钟延迟来改善设计时序裕量。 CSS需要获取顺序元素（包括触发器和I/O端口）之间的时序路径信息，称为顺序图提取，这是高级CSS中最耗时的部分。在本文中，为了快速识别松弛优化中时钟偏差的潜力，我们提出了一种迭代 CSS 算法，该算法利用时序传播来促进顺序图提取。然后，我们提供了一种考虑多个时钟延迟约束的综合偏差计算方法，获得每个触发器的目标延迟。最后，我们提出了松弛优化技术来实现目标延迟。与基于部分图提取的高级 CSS 算法相比，我们的算法实现了 49.11 美元的加速，减少了 90.05% 的提取边缘。与最先进的基于 CSS 的松弛优化方法相比，我们的算法提供了 27.01 美元\times$的加速以及卓越的松弛改进。

papers.title: A Full-system, Programmable, and Extensible In-Memory Computing Simulation Framework for Deep Learning.
papers.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) has established itself as an attractive alternative to hardware accelerators in addressing the memory wall problem for artificial intelligence (AI) workloads. However, designing programmable IMC-based computing platforms for today’s large generative AI models, such as large language models (LLMs) and diffusion transformers (DiTs), is hindered by the absence of a simulator that is able to address the associated scalability challenges while simultaneously incorporating device and circuit-level behaviors intrinsic to IMCs. To address this challenge, we present IMCsim, a versatile fullsystem IMC simulation framework. IMCsim integrates software runtime libraries for AI models, introduces a new set of ISA extensions to express common tensor operators, and provides flexibility in mapping these operators to various IMC architectures. As such, IMCsim enables designers to explore trade-offs between performance, energy, area, and computational accuracy for various IMC design choices. To demonstrate the functionality, efficiency, and versatility of IMCsim, we model three types of IMCs: (1) embedded non-volatile memory (eNVM)-based, (2) SRAM-based, and (3) digital IMCs. We validate IMCsim using measured data from two laboratory-tested IMC prototype ICs—a 22 nm MRAM-based IMC and a 28 nm SRAM-based IMC—and a digital IMC design in 28 nm. Next, we demonstrate the utility of IMCsim by exploring the architectural design space to obtain insights for maximizing utilization of IMC-based processors for diverse workloads—ResNet-18, Llama, and a DiT—using the three IMC types. Finally, we employ IMCsim as a design tool to obtain an efficient chip architecture and layout in 28 nm for a lightweight DiT.
papers.abstract_zh: 在解决人工智能 (AI) 工作负载的内存墙问题方面，内存计算 (IMC) 已成为硬件加速器的有吸引力的替代方案。然而，为当今的大型生成人工智能模型（例如大型语言模型（LLM）和扩散变压器（DiT））设计基于 IMC 的可编程计算平台，由于缺乏能够解决相关可扩展性挑战同时整合 IMC 固有的设备和电路级行为的模拟器而受到阻碍。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 IMCsim，这是一个多功能的全系统 IMC 仿真框架。 IMCsim 集成了 AI 模型的软件运行时库，引入了一组新的 ISA 扩展来表达常见的张量运算符，并提供了将这些运算符映射到各种 IMC 架构的灵活性。因此，IMCsim 使设计人员能够针对各种 IMC 设计选择探索性能、能量、面积和计算精度之间的权衡。为了演示 IMCsim 的功能、效率和多功能性，我们对三种类型的 IMC 进行建模：(1) 基于嵌入式非易失性存储器 (eNVM)、(2) 基于 SRAM 和 (3) 数字 IMC。我们使用两个经过实验室测试的 IMC 原型 IC（基于 22 nm MRAM 的 IMC 和基于 28 nm SRAM 的 IMC）以及 28 nm 数字 IMC 设计的测量数据来验证 IMCsim。接下来，我们通过探索架构设计空间来展示 IMCsim 的实用性，以获得关于使用三种 IMC 类型最大限度地利用基于 IMC 的处理器来处理不同工作负载（ResNet-18、Llama 和 DiT）的见解。最后，我们采用 IMCsim 作为设计工具，为轻量级 DiT 获得高效的 28 nm 芯片架构和布局。

papers.title: A High-Precision and Low-Cost Approximate Transform Accelerator for Video Coding.
papers.abstract: The introduction of multiple transform types in the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard has yielded notable encoding gains but also imposed considerable computational burdens. Existing transform circuits of different types are typically implemented separately due to their independence, leading to substantial hardware overhead. To address this, we explore the relationship between Discrete Cosine Transform Type-2 (DCT2) and Discrete Sine Transform Type-7 (DST7) matrices and reveal a prominent diagonal aggregation phenomenon in their transfer matrix. Based on this insight, the least-squares method is applied to optimize the transfer matrix sparsity, achieving a high-precision, low-cost approximate conversion from DCT2 to DST7. Furthermore, we optimize DCT2 computation by proposing an elaborate matrix decomposition approach that allows a lightweight shift-adder unit to efficiently generate all required product terms across varying sizes. Leveraging these algorithmic optimizations, we implement a highly reusable and area-efficient approximate transform accelerator that supports sizes from 4 to 32 points and accommodates three types in VVC. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed accelerator achieves over 44% reduction in circuit resource consumption with negligible BD-BR performance loss of just $\mathbf{0. 5 3 \%}$, maintaining processing capabilities up to $8 K \text{@} 57 \mathrm{fps}$.
papers.abstract_zh: 通用视频编码 (VVC) 标准中引入的多种变换类型带来了显着的编码增益，但也带来了相当大的计算负担。现有的不同类型的变换电路由于其独立性通常单独实现，导致大量的硬件开销。为了解决这个问题，我们探索了离散余弦变换类型 2 (DCT2) 和离散正弦变换类型 7 (DST7) 矩阵之间的关系，并揭示了它们的传输矩阵中突出的对角聚集现象。基于这一见解，应用最小二乘法来优化传输矩阵的稀疏性，实现了从DCT2到DST7的高精度、低成本的近似转换。此外，我们通过提出一种复杂的矩阵分解方法来优化 DCT2 计算，该方法允许轻量级移位加法器单元有效地生成不同大小的所有所需的乘积项。利用这些算法优化，我们实现了高度可重用且面积高效的近似变换加速器，支持 4 到 32 点的大小，并在 VVC 中容纳三种类型。实验结果表明，所提出的加速器使电路资源消耗减少了 44% 以上，而 BD-BR 性能损失仅为 $\mathbf{0. 5 3 \%}$，保持高达 $8 K \text{@} 57 \mathrm{fps}$ 的处理能力。

papers.title: A Memory-Efficient LLM Accelerator with Q-K Correlation Prediction using Cluster-Based Associative Array for Selective KV Accessing.
papers.abstract: Attention-based LLMs excel in text generation but face redundant computations in autoregressive token generation. While KV cache mitigates this, it introduces increased memory access overhead as sequences grow. We propose Sella, a hardware-software co-design using cluster-based associative arrays to predict Q-K correlations, enabling selective KV cache access and reducing memory access without retraining. Sella includes a specialized accelerator featuring a prediction engine to improve performance and energy efficiency. Experiments show Sella achieves $2.1 \times$, $93.8 \times$, $31.4 \times$, and $53.5 \times$ speedup over SpAtten, Sanger, TITAN RTX GPU, and Xeon CPU, respectively, reducing off-chip memory access by up to $66 \%$ with negligible accuracy loss. -Large Language Models, KV Cache, Accelerator
papers.abstract_zh: 基于注意力的法学硕士在文本生成方面表现出色，但在自回归标记生成方面面临冗余计算。虽然 KV 缓存缓解了这一问题，但随着序列的增长，它会增加内存访问开销。我们提出了 Sella，一种硬件-软件协同设计，使用基于集群的关联数组来预测 Q-K 相关性，从而实现选择性 KV 缓存访问并减少内存访问，而无需重新训练。 Sella 包括一个具有预测引擎的专用加速器，可提高性能和能源效率。实验表明，Sella 比 SpAtten、Sanger、TITAN RTX GPU 和 Xeon CPU 分别实现了 $2.1 \times$、$93.8 \times$、$31.4 \times$ 和 $53.5 \times$ 加速，将片外内存访问减少了高达 $66 \%$，且精度损失可以忽略不计。 -大型语言模型、KV缓存、加速器

papers.title: A Mixed-Signal Photonic SRAM-based High-Speed Energy-Efficient Photonic Tensor Core with Novel Electro-Optic ADC.
papers.abstract: The rapid surge in data generated by Internet of Things (IoT), artificial intelligence (AI), and machine learning (ML) applications demands ultra-fast, scalable, and energy-efficient hardware, as traditional von Neumann architectures face significant latency and power challenges due to data transfer bottlenecks between memory and processing units. Furthermore, conventional electrical memory technologies are increasingly constrained by rising bitline and wordline capacitance, as well as the resistance of compact and long interconnects, as technology scales. In contrast, photonics-based in-memory computing systems offer substantial speed and energy improvements over traditional transistor-based systems, owing to their ultra-fast operating frequencies, low crosstalk, and high data bandwidth. Hence, we present a novel differential photonic SRAM (pSRAM) bitcell-augmented scalable mixed-signal multi-bit photonic tensor core, enabling high-speed, energy-efficient matrix multiplication operations using fabrication-friendly integrated photonic components. Additionally, we propose a novel 1-hot encoding electro-optic analog-to-digital converter (eoADC) architecture to convert the multiplication outputs into digital bitstreams, supporting processing in the electrical domain. Our designed photonic tensor core, utilizing GlobalFoundries’ monolithic 45SPCLO technology node, achieves computation speeds of 4.10 tera-operations per second (TOPS) and a power efficiency of 3.02 TOPS/W.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT)、人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 应用生成的数据迅速激增，需要超快速、可扩展且节能的硬件，因为传统的冯诺依曼架构由于内存和处理单元之间的数据传输瓶颈而面临严重的延迟和功耗挑战。此外，随着技术规模的扩大，传统的电存储器技术越来越受到不断增加的位线和字线电容以及紧凑和长互连的电阻的限制。相比之下，基于光子学的内存计算系统由于其超快的工作频率、低串扰和高数据带宽，比传统的基于晶体管的系统提供了显着的速度和能量改进。因此，我们提出了一种新型差分光子 SRAM (pSRAM) 位单元增强的可扩展混合信号多位光子张量核心，使用易于制造的集成光子组件实现高速、节能的矩阵乘法运算。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 1-hot 编码电光模数转换器 (eoADC) 架构，可将乘法输出转换为数字比特流，支持电气域中的处理。我们设计的光子张量核心采用 GlobalFoundries 的单片 45SPCLO 技术节点，实现了每秒 4.10 万亿次运算 (TOPS) 的计算速度和 3.02 TOPS/W 的功效。

papers.title: A Novel Covert Timing Channel for Cloud FPGAs.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel covert timing channel (CTC) that enables a malicious entity to exfiltrate data from a benign cloud FPGA user without requiring dedicated outgoing messages from the cloud FPGA, minimizing the detection risk by both the victim and the cloud service provider. The proposed CTC exploits the handshake signals of the Advanced eXtensible Interface (AXI) protocol and interpacket delay of the Internet to establish the CTC from a cloud FieldProgrammable Gate Array (FPGA) to an off-cloud computer. This paper analyzes the bit-error rate (BER) of the AXI-based CTC under varying conditions and demonstrates its effectiveness in truly enabling remote power analysis attacks on cloud services, such as Amazon Web Services Elastic Compute Cloud (AWS EC2). The proposed CTC achieves a BER as low as 0.01988%.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的隐蔽定时通道 (CTC)，使恶意实体能够从良性云 FPGA 用户中窃取数据，而无需从云 FPGA 发送专用的传出消息，从而最大限度地降低受害者和云服务提供商的检测风险。所提出的 CTC 利用高级可扩展接口 (AXI) 协议的握手信号和互联网的数据包间延迟来建立从云现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 到云外计算机的 CTC。本文分析了基于 AXI 的 CTC 在不同条件下的误码率 (BER)，并展示了其在真正实现对云服务（例如 Amazon Web Services 弹性计算云 (AWS EC2)）的远程功耗分析攻击方面的有效性。拟议的 CTC 实现了低至 0.01988% 的 BER。

papers.title: A Novel Image-Graph Heterogeneous Fusion Framework for Static IR Drop Prediction.
papers.abstract: IR drop analysis is crucial for ensuring the reliability and performance of integrated circuits (ICs) but poses computational challenges as the IC designs grow larger, especially for ultra deep-submicron VLSI designs. Deep learnings (DL) as the efficiency-promising solutions, mainly employ various CNN-based networks to achieve image-to-image IR drop predictions. However, they neglect and lose the power delivery network (PDN) global spatial features and cell instance topological information. This paper proposes a novel image-graph heterogeneous fusion framework (IGHF), which integrates the effectiveness and complementarity of dual branches (CNN and GNN) for higher prediction performance. In the CNN-based Power ScaleFusion Unet branch, the proposed long-range and local-detail encoder (LLE) integrates seamlessly with the hierarchical and adjacent compensation group (HACG) module. This design facilitates effective multi-scale global-to-local spatial power feature extraction within the PDN and enables adaptive high-to-low-level feature fusion and compensation in the decoder. Moreover, a cell voltage aware (CVA) module in the GNN branch is designed to adaptively aggregate PDN topological features of heterogeneous neighbors of different orders. Comparative experiments demonstrate that the proposed IGHF achieves significant accuracy improvements, outperforming the state-of-the-art MAUNet and widely-used IREDGe methods by considerable margins of 24.6% and 55.0% reduction in prediction error, while the prediction maps possess higher structural fidelity. Transfer experiments indicate that IGHF with transfer learning can improve the accuracy in real circuits with the few-shot real circuit test cases.
papers.abstract_zh: IR 压降分析对于确保集成电路 (IC) 的可靠性和性能至关重要，但随着 IC 设计变得越来越大，尤其是超深亚微米 VLSI 设计，也会带来计算挑战。深度学习（DL）作为有希望提高效率的解决方案，主要采用各种基于 CNN 的网络来实现图像到图像的 IR 降预测。然而，它们忽略并丢失了供电网络（PDN）全局空间特征和小区实例拓扑信息。本文提出了一种新颖的图像图异构融合框架（IGHF），它集成了双分支（CNN 和 GNN）的有效性和互补性，以实现更高的预测性能。在基于 CNN 的 Power ScaleFusion Unet 分支中，所提出的远程和局部细节编码器 (LLE) 与分层和相邻补偿组 (HACG) 模块无缝集成。该设计有利于 PDN 内有效的多尺度全局到局部空间功率特征提取，并在解码器中实现自适应高到低级别特征融合和补偿。此外，GNN 分支中的单元电压感知（CVA）模块旨在自适应聚合不同阶异构邻居的 PDN 拓扑特征。对比实验表明，所提出的 IGHF 实现了显着的精度提升，优于最先进的 MAUNet 和广泛使用的 IREDGe 方法，预测误差分别降低了 24.6% 和 55.0%，同时预测图具有更高的结构保真度。迁移实验表明，具有迁移学习的 IGHF 可以通过少样本真实电路测试用例提高真实电路的准确性。

papers.title: A Post-Implementation Performance Prediction Method with HLS Optimization Directives.
papers.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) offers various optimization directives that enable designers to flexibly adjust hardware microarchitecture. However, existing HLS performance prediction methods typically rely on control data flow graphs generated (CDFG) from original HLS C/C++, which struggle to capture the complex interactions between directives and the resulting hardware resource reuse issues. To address these issues, this paper proposes a post-implementation performance prediction method tailored for directive-optimized circuits design, which utilizes a Graph Builder to integrate directive optimization and resource reuse information into the graph representation. In addition, the performance prediction model, which integrates a TransformerConv-based graph neural network (GNN) and an aggregation pool module, effectively captures key features related to post-implementation performance. Experimental results show that our method can reduce the prediction error of critical path delay (CP), power, and resource utilization to 3.87% $\sim$ 8.08%, significantly outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods. It also demonstrates excellent generalization on unseen kernels, providing a more effective and accurate performance prediction tool for HLS.
papers.abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）提供各种优化指令，使设计人员能够灵活调整硬件微架构。然而，现有的 HLS 性能预测方法通常依赖于从原始 HLS C/C++ 生成的控制数据流图 (CDFG)，这很难捕获指令之间的复杂交互以及由此产生的硬件资源重用问题。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种针对指令优化电路设计量身定制的实现后性能预测方法，该方法利用图形生成器将指令优化和资源重用信息集成到图形表示中。此外，性能预测模型集成了基于 TransformerConv 的图神经网络（GNN）和聚合池模块，可以有效捕获与实现后性能相关的关键特征。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以将关键路径延迟（CP）、功耗和资源利用率的预测误差降低到 3.87% $\sim$ 8.08%，显着优于现有的最先进方法。它还展示了对未见过的内核的出色泛化，为 HLS 提供了更有效、更准确的性能预测工具。

papers.title: A PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-Out Universal Nonlinear Processing Element for Time-Domain In-Memory Computing Systems.
papers.abstract: Time-Domain In-Memory Computing (TD-IMC) has emerged as a promising analog computing architecture for edge AI applications. However, the lack of developed hardware operators, especially general nonlinear operators, necessitates frequent cross-domain data transmission in practical TD-IMC systems, significantly reducing energy efficiency. In this work, we propose a PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-OUT Universal Nonlinear Processing Element (PIPO-UNPE) to address the challenges of nonlinear processing in analog computing. By implementing an RRAM-based two-layer ReLU network, the PIPO-UNPE performs universal nonlinear operations entirely in the time domain. Algorithmically, we introduce Dynamic Loss-Responsive Subset Enhancement (DLRSE) to boost the performance of this low-cost network in function approximation tasks. From a hardware perspective, we design an RRAM-based pulse-driven programmable current source and a low-latency dispersion comparator-based voltage-to-time converter (VTC) to enhance both the energy efficiency and precision of the PIPO-UNPE. Hybrid simulations reveal that the PIPO-UNPE consumes 912 uW of power while delivering a throughput of $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ NOPS (Nonlinear Operations Per Second). Incorporating the PIPO-UNPE into the TD-IMC accelerator can increase energy efficiency by a factor of 9.5 to 25, keeping the accuracy loss below 0.1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 时域内存计算（TD-IMC）已成为边缘人工智能应用的一种有前景的模拟计算架构。然而，由于缺乏成熟的硬件算子，特别是通用非线性算子，在实际的TD-IMC系统中需要频繁的跨域数据传输，从而显着降低了能源效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 PulseWidth-IN-PulseWidth-OUT 通用非线性处理元件（PIPO-UNPE）来解决模拟计算中非线性处理的挑战。通过实现基于 RRAM 的两层 ReLU 网络，PIPO-UNPE 完全在时域中执行通用非线性运算。在算法上，我们引入动态损失响应子集增强（DLRSE）来提高这种低成本网络在函数逼近任务中的性能。从硬件角度来看，我们设计了基于 RRAM 的脉冲驱动可编程电流源和基于低延迟色散比较器的电压时间转换器 (VTC)，以提高 PIPO-UNPE 的能效和精度。混合仿真表明，PIPO-UNPE 消耗 912 uW 的功率，同时提供 $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ NOPS（每秒非线性操作）的吞吐量。将PIPO-UNPE纳入TD-IMC加速器可以将能源效率提高9.5至25倍，并将精度损失保持在0.1%以下。

papers.title: A Scalable and Robust Compilation Framework for Emitter-Photonic Graph State.
papers.abstract: Quantum graph states are critical resources for various quantum algorithms, and also determine essential interconnections in distributed quantum computing. There are two schemes for generating graph states - probabilistic scheme and deterministic scheme. While the all-photonic probabilistic scheme has garnered significant attention, the emitter-photonic deterministic scheme has been proved to be more scalable and feasible across several hardware platforms. This paper studies the GraphState-to-Circuit compilation problem in the context of the deterministic scheme. Previous research has primarily focused on optimizing individual circuit parameters, often neglecting the characteristics of quantum hardware, which results in impractical implementations. Additionally, existing algorithms lack scalability for larger graph sizes. To bridge these gaps, we propose a novel compilation framework that partitions the target graph state into subgraphs, compiles them individually, and subsequently combines and schedules the circuits to maximize emitter resource utilization. Furthermore, we incorporate local complementation to transform graph states and minimize entanglement overhead. Evaluation of our framework on various graph types demonstrates significant reductions in CNOT gates and circuit duration, up to 52% and 56%. Moreover, it enhances the suppression of photon loss, achieving improvements of up to $\times 1.9$.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子图状态是各种量子算法的关键资源，也决定了分布式量子计算中的基本互连。有两种生成图状态的方案——概率方案和确定性方案。虽然全光子概率方案引起了广泛关注，但发射器光子确定性方案已被证明在多个硬件平台上更具可扩展性和可行性。本文研究了确定性方案背景下的 GraphState-to-Circuit 编译问题。先前的研究主要集中于优化单个电路参数，往往忽略了量子硬件的特性，这导致了不切实际的实现。此外，现有算法缺乏针对较大图尺寸的可扩展性。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了一种新颖的编译框架，该框架将目标图状态划分为子图，单独编译它们，然后组合和调度电路以最大化发射器资源利用率。此外，我们结合局部互补来转换图状态并最小化纠缠开销。对各种图类型的框架进行的评估表明 CNOT 门和电路持续时间显着减少，分别高达 52% 和 56%。此外，它还增强了对光子损失的抑制，实现了高达$\times 1.9$的改进。

papers.title: A Systematic Approach for Multi-objective Double-side Clock Tree Synthesis.
papers.abstract: As the scaling of semiconductor devices nears its limits, utilizing the back-side space of silicon has emerged as a new trend for future integrated circuits. With intense interest, several works have hacked existing backend tools to explore the potential of synthesizing double-side clock trees via nano Through-Silicon-Vias (nTSVs). However, these works lack a systematic perspective on design resource allocation and multi-objective optimization. We propose a systematic approach to design clock trees with double-side metal layers, including hierarchical clock routing, concurrent buffers and nTSVs insertion, and skew refinement. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, the widely-used open-source tool, our algorithm outperforms them in latency, skew, wirelength, and the number of buffers and nTSVs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着半导体器件的尺寸缩小接近极限，利用硅的背面空间已成为未来集成电路的新趋势。出于浓厚的兴趣，一些工作已经破解了现有的后端工具，以探索通过纳米硅通孔（nTSV）合成双面时钟树的潜力。然而，这些工作缺乏对设计资源分配和多目标优化的系统视角。我们提出了一种系统方法来设计具有双面金属层的时钟树，包括分层时钟布线、并发缓冲器和 nTSV 插入以及偏差细化。与最先进的 (SOTA) 方法、广泛使用的开源工具相比，我们的算法在延迟、偏斜、线长以及缓冲区和 nTSV 数量方面优于它们。

papers.title: AARC: Automated Affinity-aware Resource Configuration for Serverless Workflows.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing is increasingly adopted for its ability to manage complex, event-driven workloads without the need for infrastructure provisioning. However, traditional resource allocation in serverless platforms couples CPU and memory, which may not be optimal for all functions. Existing decoupling approaches, while offering some flexibility, are not designed to handle the vast configuration space and complexity of serverless workflows. In this paper, we propose AARC, an innovative, automated framework that decouples CPU and memory resources to provide more flexible and efficient provisioning for serverless workloads. AARC is composed of two key components: Graph-Centric Scheduler, which identifies critical paths in workflows, and Priority Configurator, which applies priority scheduling techniques to optimize resource allocation. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that AARC achieves substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods, with total search time reductions of $85.8 \%$ and $89.6 \%$, and cost savings of $49.6 \%$ and $61.7 \%$, respectively, while maintaining SLO compliance.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算因其能够管理复杂的、事件驱动的工作负载而无需配置基础设施而得到越来越多的采用。然而，无服务器平台中的传统资源分配将CPU和内存耦合在一起，这可能并不适合所有功能。现有的解耦方法虽然提供了一定的灵活性，但其设计无法处理无服务器工作流程的巨大配置空间和复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 AARC，这是一种创新的自动化框架，可解耦 CPU 和内存资源，为无服务器工作负载提供更灵活、更高效的配置。 AARC 由两个关键组件组成：以图形为中心的调度程序，用于识别工作流中的关键路径；以及优先级配置器，用于应用优先级调度技术来优化资源分配。我们的实验评估表明，AARC 相对于最先进的方法实现了实质性改进，在保持 SLO 合规性的同时，总搜索时间分别减少了 $85.8 \%$ 和 $89.6 \%$，成本节省了 $49.6 \%$ 和 $61.7 \%$。

papers.title: AASD: Accelerate Inference by Aligning Speculative Decoding in Multimodal Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved notable success in visual instruction tuning, yet their inference is time-consuming due to the auto-regressive decoding of Large Language Model (LLM) backbone. Traditional methods for accelerating inference, including model compression and migration from language model acceleration, often compromise output quality or face challenges in effectively integrating multimodal features. To address these issues, we propose AASD, a novel framework for Accelerating inference with refined KV Cache and Aligning speculative decoding in MLLMs. Our approach leverages the target model’s cached KeyValue (KV) pairs to extract vital information for generating draft tokens, enabling efficient speculative decoding. To reduce the computational burden associated with long multimodal token sequences, we introduce a KV Projector to compress the KV Cache while maintaining representational fidelity. Additionally, we design a Target-Draft Attention mechanism that optimizes the alignment between the draft model and the target model, achieving the benefits of real inference scenarios with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments on mainstream MLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to a $2 \times$ inference speedup without sacrificing accuracy. This study not only provides an effective and lightweight solution for accelerating MLLM inference but also introduces a novel alignment strategy for speculative decoding in multimodal contexts, laying a strong foundation for future research in efficient MLLMs. Code is availiable at https://github.com/transcend-0/ASD
papers.abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉指令调整方面取得了显着的成功，但由于大语言模型（LLM）主干的自回归解码，它们的推理非常耗时。加速推理的传统方法，包括模型压缩和语言模型加速迁移，通常会损害输出质量或在有效集成多模态特征方面面临挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 AASD，这是一种新颖的框架，用于通过改进的 KV 缓存加速推理并调整 MLLM 中的推测解码。我们的方法利用目标模型缓存的 KeyValue (KV) 对来提取生成草稿令牌的重要信息，从而实现高效的推测解码。为了减少与长多模式令牌序列相关的计算负担，我们引入了 KV 投影仪来压缩 KV 缓存，同时保持表示保真度。此外，我们设计了一种目标草稿注意力机制，可以优化草稿模型和目标模型之间的对齐，以最小的计算开销实现真实推理场景的好处。对主流 MLLM 的大量实验表明，我们的方法在不牺牲准确性的情况下实现了高达 2 倍的推理加速。这项研究不仅为加速 MLLM 推理提供了一种有效且轻量级的解决方案，而且还引入了一种用于多模态上下文中推测解码的新颖对齐策略，为未来高效 MLLM 的研究奠定了坚实的基础。代码可在 https://github.com/transcend-0/ASD 获取

papers.title: ABC-FHE: A Resource-Efficient Accelerator Enabling Bootstrappable Parameters for Client-Side Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract: As the demand for privacy-preserving computation continues to grow, fully homomorphic encryption (FHE)—which enables continuous computation on encrypted data—has become a critical solution. However, its adoption is hindered by significant computational overhead, requiring 10000-fold more computation compared to plaintext processing. Recent advancements in FHE accelerators have successfully improved server-side performance, but client-side computations remain a bottleneck, particularly under bootstrappable parameter configurations, which involve combinations of encoding, encrypt, decoding, and decrypt for large-sized parameters. To address this challenge, we propose ABC-FHE, an area- and power-efficient FHE accelerator that supports bootstrappable parameters on the client side. ABCFHE employs a streaming architecture to maximize performance density, minimize area usage, and reduce off-chip memory access. Key innovations include a reconfigurable Fourier engine capable of switching between NTT and FFT modes. Additionally, an onchip pseudo-random number generator and a unified on-the-fly twiddle factor generator significantly reduce memory demands, while optimized task scheduling enhances the CKKS clientside processing, achieving reduced latency. Overall, ABC-FHE occupies a die area of 28.638 mm2 and consumes 5.654 W of power in 28 nm technology. It delivers significant performance improvements, achieving a 1112× speed-up in encoding and encryption execution time compared to a CPU, and 214× over the state-of-the-art client-side accelerator. For decoding and decryption, it achieves a 963× speed-up over the CPU and 82× over the state-of-the-art accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着隐私保护计算的需求不断增长，完全同态加密（FHE）——它能够对加密数据进行连续计算——已经成为一个关键的解决方案。然而，它的采用受到巨大的计算开销的阻碍，与纯文本处理相比，需要多一万倍的计算量。 FHE 加速器的最新进展成功地提高了服务器端性能，但客户端计算仍然是一个瓶颈，特别是在可引导参数配置下，其中涉及大型参数的编码、加密、解码和解密的组合。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 ABC-FHE，这是一种节省面积和功率的 FHE 加速器，支持客户端的可引导参数。 ABCFHE 采用流式架构来最大限度地提高性能密度、最大限度地减少面积使用并减少片外内存访问。主要创新包括能够在 NTT 和 FFT 模式之间切换的可重新配置傅里叶引擎。此外，片上伪随机数生成器和统一的动态旋转因子生成器显着减少了内存需求，而优化的任务调度增强了 CKKS 客户端处理，从而减少了延迟。总体而言，ABC-FHE 在 28 nm 技术中占用的芯片面积为 28.638 mm2，功耗为 5.654 W。它提供了显着的性能改进，与 CPU 相比，编码和加密执行时间加快了 1112 倍，比最先进的客户端加速器加快了 214 倍。对于解码和解密，它比 CPU 加速了 963 倍，比最先进的加速器加速了 82 倍。

papers.title: Accelerating design-technology co-development using neural compact modeling and data-driven SPICE simulation.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a new design-technology cooptimization framework that expedites circuit optimization by utilizing the neural compact modeling (NCM) and a data-driven SPICE simulation. An efficient retargeting strategy of NCM and its improved design capability through a direct data driven SPICE simulation were leveraged at the industry level in response to increasingly challenging current development situations. To facilitate rapid feedback for extensive trial and error in technology optimization, the NCM swiftly fine-tune itself using pre-trained model. Then, the data interpolation and derating techniques are utilized to provide the same design environment as before such as instance binning, process variations, and layout dependent effects. Demonstrating the robustness of our framework, we achieved a 95% reduction in PDK release time while maintaining model consistency and performance at a mid-scale design of $\mathbf{1 5 k}$ transistors, with no SPICE run time and accuracy loss. This solution allows for rapid incorporation of process changes into the design, supporting quick path-finding during a design-technology co-development.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的设计技术协同优化框架，该框架利用神经紧凑建模（NCM）和数据驱动的 SPICE 仿真来加速电路优化。 NCM 的高效重定向策略及其通过直接数据驱动的 SPICE 仿真改进的设计能力在行业层面得到利用，以应对当前日益严峻的开发形势。为了促进技术优化中大量试验和错误的快速反馈，NCM 使用预先训练的模型快速进行自我调整。然后，利用数据插值和降额技术来提供与以前相同的设计环境，例如实例分级、工艺变化和布局相关效果。为了证明我们框架的稳健性，我们将 PDK 发布时间缩短了 95%，同时保持了 $\mathbf{1 5 k}$ 晶体管中型设计的模型一致性和性能，并且没有 SPICE 运行时间和精度损失。该解决方案允许将流程变更快速纳入设计中，支持设计技术联合开发期间的快速路径查找。

papers.title: AcclMT: A Highly Resource-Efficient and Flexible Poseidon Hash-Based Merkle Tree Architecture.
papers.abstract: Merkle Tree is a fundamental cryptographic primitive in Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) protocols, sharing significant computational workloads with the Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) in zkSTARK schemes. Merkle Tree is a tree structure where nodes are primarily generated through hash computations. Among them, Poseidon Hash, as a ZK-friendly hash function, has emerged as one of the most widely adopted choices. Therefore, hardware acceleration of building Merkle Tree based on Poseidon Hash can significantly enhance the performance of ZKP protocols. We propose AcclMT, a highly resourceefficient and flexible Poseidon Hash-based Merkle Tree architecture. Our design employs hardware-software co-design and optimizes the hashing data flow, resulting in an area-efficient Poseidon Hash engine that improves modular multiplication resource utilization. Furthermore, AcclMT uses these engines alongside hierarchical on-chip cache and optimized task scheduling for building large Merkle Trees. It also supports flexible parameter configurations for various requirements. Experimental results show that our proposed Poseidon Hash engine achieves a $14.3 \times$ speedup compared to the latest FPGA-based work. By improving resource utilization, it also reduces area usage by 14.8% compared to unoptimized design. AcclMT achieves up to $1665 \times$ speedup over software implementations in building Merkle tree, with average utilization of 95.9% and 99.2% for the two hash engines.
papers.abstract_zh: Merkle Tree 是零知识证明 (ZKP) 协议中的基本加密原语，与 zkSTARK 方案中的数论变换 (NTT) 共享大量的计算工作负载。 Merkle Tree 是一种树结构，其中节点主要通过哈希计算生成。其中，Poseidon Hash作为ZK友好的哈希函数，已成为最广泛采用的选择之一。因此，基于Poseidon Hash构建Merkle Tree的硬件加速可以显着提升ZKP协议的性能。我们提出了 AcclMT，一种高度资源效率且灵活的基于波塞冬哈希的 Merkle Tree 架构。我们的设计采用硬件-软件协同设计并优化散列数据流，从而形成区域高效的 Poseidon 散列引擎，从而提高模乘资源利用率。此外，AcclMT 使用这些引擎以及分层片上缓存和优化的任务调度来构建大型 Merkle 树。它还支持灵活的参数配置，满足各种需求。实验结果表明，与最新的基于 FPGA 的工作相比，我们提出的 Poseidon 哈希引擎实现了 14.3 美元的加速。通过提高资源利用率，与未优化设计相比，还减少了 14.8% 的面积使用。 AcclMT 在构建 Merkle 树方面比软件实现实现了高达 1665 美元的加速，两个哈希引擎的平均利用率分别为 95.9% 和 99.2%。

papers.title: Accuracy Is Not Always We Need: Precision-Aware Bayesian Yield Optimization.
papers.abstract: Integrated circuit yield optimization plays a vital role in ensuring reliable semiconductor manufacturing, directly impacting both product quality and production costs. Current approaches to yield optimization face two fundamental challenges that limit their practical effectiveness. First, yield estimation requires intensive computational resources. Second, traditional black-box optimization methods inefficiently allocate these resources across design candidates. Most existing approaches compound these issues by performing detailed yield estimations uniformly across all candidates, regardless of their potential quality. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel precision-aware yield optimization framework that intelligently adapts computational resource allocation based on each design candidate’s predicted performance. Our approach moves beyond simple simulation counting by incorporating a Figure of Merit (FoM) as a continuous quality metric. By combining a Continuous AutoRegression model to characterize the relationship between true yield and precision levels with a sophisticated multi-fidelity acquisition strategy, our framework achieves optimal resource distribution. Experimental validation on four industry-standard benchmark circuits demonstrates that our method converges with fewer than 1,000 simulations, reducing simulation costs by over $10 \times$ while achieving better final designs and robustness than state-of-the-art high-fidelity approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 集成电路良率优化对于确保可靠的半导体制造起着至关重要的作用，直接影响产品质量和生产成本。当前的产量优化方法面临着两个限制其实际有效性的基本挑战。首先，产量估计需要大量的计算资源。其次，传统的黑盒优化方法在设计候选之间分配这些资源效率低下。大多数现有方法通过对所有候选者统一执行详细的产量估计而使这些问题变得更加复杂，而不管其潜在质量如何。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的精度感知良率优化框架，该框架根据每个设计候选者的预测性能智能地调整计算资源分配。我们的方法超越了简单的模拟计数，将品质因数 (FoM) 纳入连续质量指标。通过将连续自回归模型与复杂的多保真度采集策略相结合来表征真实产量和精度水平之间的关系，我们的框架实现了最佳资源分配。对四个行业标准基准电路的实验验证表明，我们的方法只需不到 1,000 次仿真即可收敛，将仿真成本降低了 10 多美元，同时实现了比最先进的高保真方法更好的最终设计和鲁棒性。

papers.title: ACIM-QMM: Efficient Analog Computing-in-Memory Accelerator for QC-MDPC McEliece Cryptosystem.
papers.abstract: Quasi-cyclic moderate density parity-check McEliece (QMM) cryptosystem is designed to mitigate the security threat posed by quantum computers, and is considered to be a promising candidate for post-quantum cryptography (PQC). However, the growing requirement of data encryption pose severe challenges for QMM implementation in terms of latency and hardware overhead. In this work, we firstly propose ACIM-QMM, an analog computing-in-memory (CIM) accelerator design for QMM cryptosystem. The use of analog circuits and CIM enables the design to efficiently generate key and encrypt ciphertext while breaking the performance bottleneck constrained by digital computing paradigm in PQC. In the experiment, ACIM-QMM can work in low relative error, and it can achieve $31.4 \times \sim 288.1 \times$ speedup compared with SOTA hardware of QMM cryptosystem. Furthermore, the results indicate that ACIM-QMM can achieve a maximum of $3.12 \times$ area efficiency and $20.32 \times$ energy efficiency compared to other PQC hardware for 256-bit security.
papers.abstract_zh: 准循环中等密度奇偶校验 McEliece (QMM) 密码系统旨在减轻量子计算机带来的安全威胁，被认为是后量子密码学 (PQC) 的有前途的候选者。然而，不断增长的数据加密需求在延迟和硬件开销方面对 QMM 实施提出了严峻的挑战。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了 ACIM-QMM，一种用于 QMM 密码系统的模拟内存计算（CIM）加速器设计。模拟电路和CIM的使用使设计能够高效地生成密钥并加密密文，同时突破PQC中数字计算范式所限制的性能瓶颈。实验中，ACIM-QMM可以在较低的相对误差下工作，与QMM密码系统的SOTA硬件相比，可以实现$31.4 \times \sim 288.1 \times$加速。此外，结果表明，与其他 256 位安全性的 PQC 硬件相比，ACIM-QMM 可以实现最大 3.12 美元的面积效率和 20.32 美元的能源效率。

papers.title: ACRS: Adjacent Computation Resource Sharing among Partitioned GPU Sub-Cores.
papers.abstract: Modern GPUs typically segment Streaming Multiprocessors (SMs) into sub-cores (e.g. 4 sub-cores) to reduce power consumption and chip area. However, this partitioned design prevents potential task distributions across sub-cores, impairing overall execution efficiency. In this paper, we explore the performance benefit of sharing hardware resources among sub-cores and identify functional units (FUs) as critical components for compute-intensive applications. Moreover, our observations reveal that instructions residing in operand collectors can be obstructed by back-end FUs, but there is a high probability that unoccupied FUs are available in adjacent sub-cores during such blockages. In response, we introduce the adjacent computation resource sharing (ACRS) framework to efficiently utilize these unoccupied units among sub-cores. ACRS has two key modules: Shared FU Issue (SF_ISSUE) and Shared FU Write Back (SF_WriteBack). SF_ISSUE monitors the status of operand collectors and functional units, and offloads instructions from blocked sub-cores to unoccupied resources. Meanwhile, SF_WriteBack routes results back to the original sub-core.To minimize wiring overhead, each sub-core is assigned a fixed target core for sharing. We design a series of matching policies and finally filter out the most effective sequential method. Evaluation results show that ACRS improves performance by up to $46.4 \%$, with an average of $14.1 \%$ over the traditional partitioned architecture, while reducing energy consumption by $8.3 \%$. Besides, ACRS achieves an additional 12.3% performance improvement compared with the SOTA method.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 GPU 通常将流式多处理器 (SM) 分割为子核（例如 4 个子核），以减少功耗和芯片面积。然而，这种分区设计阻止了潜在的跨子核心的任务分配，从而损害了整体执行效率。在本文中，我们探讨了在子核之间共享硬件资源的性能优势，并将功能单元（FU）确定为计算密集型应用程序的关键组件。此外，我们的观察表明，驻留在操作数收集器中的指令可能会被后端 FU 阻塞，但在这种阻塞期间，相邻子核中很可能存在未占用的 FU。为此，我们引入了相邻计算资源共享（ACRS）框架，以有效地利用子核之间的这些未占用单元。 ACRS 有两个关键模块：共享 FU 发布 (SF_ISSUE) 和共享 FU 写回 (SF_WriteBack)。 SF_ISSUE 监视操作数收集器和功能单元的状态，并将指令从阻塞的子核卸载到未占用的资源。同时，SF_WriteBack将结果路由回原始子核。为了最小化布线开销，每个子核被分配一个固定的目标核来共享。我们设计了一系列的匹配策略，最终筛选出最有效的顺序方法。评估结果显示，ACRS 性能提升高达 $46.4 \%$，比传统分区架构平均提升 $14.1 \%$，同时降低能耗 $8.3 \%$。此外，与SOTA方法相比，ACRS额外实现了12.3%的性能提升。

papers.title: Adora Compiler: End-to-End Optimization for High-Efficiency Dataflow Acceleration and Task Pipelining on CGRAs.
papers.abstract: To fully harness emerging computing architectures, compilers must provide intuitive input handling alongside powerful code optimization to unlock maximum performance. Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) — highly energy-efficient for nested-loop applications — have lacked a compiler capable of meeting these objectives. This paper introduces the Adora compiler [1], which effectively bridges user-friendly, lightweight coding inputs with high-performance acceleration on the CGRA SoC. Adora utilizes CGRA-target loop transformations to achieve efficient data-flow level execution while optimizing data communication and task pipelining at the task-flow level. Additionally, it incorporates a comprehensive automated algorithm with a thoughtfully designed optimization sequence. A series of comprehensive experiments highlights the exceptional efficiency and scalability of the Adora compiler, demonstrating its transformative impact in leveraging CGRA capabilities for acceleration in edge computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了充分利用新兴的计算架构，编译器必须提供直观的输入处理以及强大的代码优化，以释放最大的性能。粗粒度可重构数组（CGRA）——对于嵌套循环应用程序来说是高能效的——缺乏能够满足这些目标的编译器。本文介绍了 Adora 编译器 [1]，它有效地将用户友好的轻量级编码输入与 CGRA SoC 上的高性能加速连接起来。 Adora 利用 CGRA 目标循环转换来实现高效的数据流级执行，同时优化任务流级的数据通信和任务流水线。此外，它还结合了全面的自动化算法和精心设计的优化序列。一系列全面的实验凸显了 Adora 编译器卓越的效率和可扩展性，展示了其在利用 CGRA 功能加速边缘计算方面的变革性影响。

papers.title: AdreamDCO: AI-Driven Robust and Efficient Design Automation for Digitally Controlled Oscillators.
papers.abstract: This paper presents how we leverage AI-human collaboration to develop an end-to-end, automated design flow for digitally controlled oscillators (DCOs), a key radio-frequency (RF) integrated circuits (ICs) building block that dominates phase noise and jitter performance of RF systems. Specifically, we decompose the DCO design process into two steps and use AI to enhance productivity and optimize performance within each step. Additionally, we demonstrate how AI can assist RF IC designers in creating unconventional circuit components to tackle challenging design specifications. Overall, the proposed flow is capable of synthesizing the DCO design including the schematic and layout in 80 seconds after one-time training, and is frequency agile between 1 and 20 GHz. Moreover, it can select the most robust design under process variations when multiple design parameters meet target specifications under the nominal condition. The proposed automated DCO design flow is demonstrated using two silicon prototypes implemented in the GlobalFoundries $22-\mathrm{nm}$ CMOS SOI process. In the measurements, they achieve $\gt 192.4-\mathrm{dBc} / \mathrm{Hz}$ figure-of-merit (FoM) and $\lt 1.5-\mathrm{kHz}$ frequency resolution at 7.1 to 8.6 GHz and 3.8 to 4.6 GHz, outperforming existing manual designs at similar frequencies.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们如何利用人工智能与人类协作来开发数控振荡器 (DCO) 的端到端自动化设计流程，数控振荡器是一种关键的射频 (RF) 集成电路 (IC) 构建模块，主导着 RF 系统的相位噪声和抖动性能。具体来说，我们将 DCO 设计流程分解为两个步骤，并在每个步骤中使用 AI 来提高生产力并优化性能。此外，我们还演示了人工智能如何帮助射频 IC 设计人员创建非常规电路组件，以应对具有挑战性的设计规范。总体而言，所提出的流程能够在一次性训练后 80 秒内综合 DCO 设计，包括原理图和布局，并且频率在 1 至 20 GHz 之间灵活。此外，当多个设计参数满足标称条件下的目标规格时，它可以在工艺变化下选择最稳健的设计。使用在 GlobalFoundries $22-\mathrm{nm}$ CMOS SOI 工艺中实现的两个硅原型来演示所提出的自动化 DCO 设计流程。在测量中，它们在 7.1 至 8.6 GHz 和 3.8 至 4.6 GHz 下实现了 $\gt 192.4-\mathrm{dBc} / \mathrm{Hz}$ 品质因数 (FoM) 和 $\lt 1.5-\mathrm{kHz}$ 频率分辨率，优于类似频率下的现有手动设计。

papers.title: ADVeRL-ELF: ADVersarial ELF Malware Generation using Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Deep learning models are now pervasive in the malware detection domain owing to their high accuracy and performance efficiency. However, it is critical to analyze the robustness of these models by introducing adversarial attacks that can expose their vulnerabilities. Nevertheless, adversarial malware generation problem for Linux has not been well-investigated. In this work, we propose a novel reinforcement learning framework, ADVeRL-ELF to generate adversarial ELF malware by adding semantic NOPs within the executable region. Experimental results show that ADVeRL-ELF achieved an attack success rate of 59.5%. These adversarial malware can be leveraged to harden the Linux based malware detection systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型由于其高精度和性能效率而在恶意软件检测领域中普遍存在。然而，通过引入可能暴露其漏洞的对抗性攻击来分析这些模型的稳健性至关重要。然而，Linux 的对抗性恶意软件生成问题尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的强化学习框架 ADVeRL-ELF，通过在可执行区域内添加语义 NOP 来生成对抗性 ELF 恶意软件。实验结果表明ADVeRL-ELF取得了59.5%的攻击成功率。这些对抗性恶意软件可用于强化基于 Linux 的恶意软件检测系统。

papers.title: ADVISOR: Approximate Computing-frienDly High-LeVel Synthesis DesIgn Space ExplORer.
papers.abstract: Approximate computing is a relatively new computing paradigm that allows to trade-off area/power with accuracy. Another relatively new VLSI design trend is to raise the level of design abstraction from the Register-Transfer Level (RTL) to the behavioral level and use High-Level Synthesis (HLS) to synthesize these behavioral descriptions. HLS has one unique advantage over RTL design. It completely decouples the functional description from the implementation details. This allows to design and verify the behavioral description once, but then generate a large number of functional equivalent hardware implementations of unique area vs. performance trade-offs. This is typically achieved through synthesis directives in the form of pragmas that the HLS user annotates at the source code to mainly control how to synthesize arrays (RAM, registers), loops (unroll, pipeline) and functions (inline or not).In this work we leverage this uniqueness and build an automated HLS design space explorer to find the hardware circuit most amenable to approximate computing, this is, has the highest potential for area/power savings. We have coined this explorer ADVISOR. The main problem with traditional exploration approaches is their long run time, which is worse in this case because every new implementation needs to be approximated to fully understand the trade-offs in terms of area/power vs. error. Thus, in order to accelerate this exploration process, we propose to evaluate each new designs based on an Approximation Friendliness Index (AFI) that can be computed statically, very fast, and only fully approximate the designs recommended by our flow that have high AFI values. Experimental results show that this approach leads to basically the same results as exhaustively approximating every new design, while being on average 68 × faster.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种相对较新的计算范例，可以在面积/功率与精度之间进行权衡。另一个相对较新的VLSI设计趋势是将设计抽象级别从寄存器传输级（RTL）提升到行为级，并使用高级综合（HLS）来综合这些行为描述。与 RTL 设计相比，HLS 具有一项独特的优势。它将功能描述与实现细节完全解耦。这允许设计和验证一次行为描述，然后生成大量功能等效的硬件实现，以实现独特的面积与性能的权衡。这通常是通过 HLS 用户在源代码中注释的编译指示形式的综合指令来实现的，这些指令主要控制如何综合数组（RAM、寄存器）、循环（展开、管道）和函数（内联或非内联）。在这项工作中，我们利用这种独特性并构建一个自动化 HLS 设计空间浏览器来找到最适合近似计算的硬件电路，即具有最大的面积/功耗节省潜力。我们创造了这个探险家顾问。传统探索方法的主要问题是运行时间长，在这种情况下情况更糟，因为每个新的实现都需要进行近似，以充分理解面积/功率与误差之间的权衡。因此，为了加速这一探索过程，我们建议基于近似友好指数（AFI）来评估每个新设计，该指数可以非常快速地静态计算，并且仅完全近似我们的流程推荐的具有高 AFI 值的设计。实验结果表明，这种方法得到的结果与详尽逼近每个新设计的结果基本相同，同时平均速度提高了 68 倍。

papers.title: Age-of-Information Minimization for Data Aggregation in Energy-Harvesting IoTs.
papers.abstract: Energy Harvesting (EH) technology has emerged to prolong the lifetime of Internet of Things (IoT) devices. However, in EH-IoTs, the reliance on external energy sources introduces challenges in maintaining up-to-date information. To quantify data freshness in such systems, researchers have introduced the Age-of-Information (AoI) metric, which measures the time elapsed since the generation of the most up-to-date information received by the user. Consequently, the problem of AoI minimization has been studied extensively in EH-IoTs to ensure timely data delivery. While data aggregation is a fundamental task for IoTs, existing works on AoI minimization in EH-IoTs have only considered scenarios where sensory data is updated by individual source nodes. The problem has not been investigated for data aggregation, in which the sensory data is aggregated from multiple source nodes. In this paper, we study the problem of AoI minimization for Data Aggregation in EHIoTs. To address this problem, we propose an energy-adaptive node scheduling algorithm consisting of both offline scheduling and online adjustment. Extensive simulations and testbed experiments verify the high performance of our algorithm in terms of AoI minimization and energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 能量收集 (EH) 技术的出现可以延长物联网 (IoT) 设备的使用寿命。然而，在 EH-IoT 中，对外部能源的依赖给维护最新信息带来了挑战。为了量化此类系统中的数据新鲜度，研究人员引入了信息时代（AoI）指标，该指标衡量自用户收到的最新信息生成以来所经过的时间。因此，AoI 最小化问题在 EH-IoT 中得到了广泛研究，以确保及时的数据传输。虽然数据聚合是物联网的一项基本任务，但 EH-IoT 中 AoI 最小化的现有工作仅考虑了传感数据由各个源节点更新的场景。该问题尚未针对数据聚合进行研究，其中传感数据是从多个源节点聚合的。在本文中，我们研究了 EHIoT 中数据聚合的 AoI 最小化问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种由离线调度和在线调整组成的能量自适应节点调度算法。大量的模拟和测试台实验验证了我们的算法在 AoI 最小化和能源效率方面的高性能。

papers.title: All-in-Memory Stochastic Computing using ReRAM.
papers.abstract: As the demand for efficient, low-power computing in embedded and edge devices grows, traditional computing methods are becoming less effective for handling complex tasks. Stochastic computing (SC) offers a promising alternative by approximating complex arithmetic operations, such as addition and multiplication, using simple bitwise operations, like majority or AND, on random bit-streams. While SC operations are inherently fault-tolerant, their accuracy largely depends on the length and quality of the stochastic bit-streams (SBS). These bit-streams are typically generated by CMOS-based stochastic bit-stream generators that consume over 80% of the SC system’s power and area. Current SC solutions focus on optimizing the logic gates but often neglect the high cost of moving the bit-streams between memory and processor. This work leverages the physics of emerging ReRAM devices to implement the entire SC flow in place: ❶ generating low-cost true random numbers and SBSs, ❷ conducting SC operations, and ❸ converting SBSs back to binary. Considering the low reliability of ReRAM cells, we demonstrate how SC’s robustness to errors copes with ReRAM’s variability. Our evaluation shows significant improvements in throughput (1.39 ×, 2.16 ×) and energy consumption (1.15 ×, 2.8 ×) over state-of-the-art (CMOS- and ReRAM-based) solutions, respectively, with an average image quality drop of 5% across multiple SBS lengths and image processing tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着嵌入式和边缘设备对高效、低功耗计算的需求不断增长，传统计算方法在处理复杂任务方面变得越来越无效。随机计算 (SC) 通过在随机比特流上使用简单的按位运算（如多数或 AND）来近似复杂的算术运算（例如加法和乘法），提供了一种有前途的替代方案。虽然 SC 操作本质上是容错的，但其准确性在很大程度上取决于随机比特流 (SBS) 的长度和质量。这些比特流通常由基于 CMOS 的随机比特流生成器生成，该生成器消耗 SC 系统 80% 以上的功率和面积。当前的 SC 解决方案侧重于优化逻辑门，但常常忽略在存储器和处理器之间移动比特流的高成本。这项工作利用新兴 ReRAM 设备的物理原理来实现整个 SC 流程：❶ 生成低成本的真随机数和 SBS，❷ 进行 SC 操作，以及 ❸ 将 SBS 转换回二进制。考虑到 ReRAM 单元的低可靠性，我们演示了 SC 的抗错误鲁棒性如何应对 ReRAM 的可变性。我们的评估显示，与最先进的（基于 CMOS 和 ReRAM 的）解决方案相比，吞吐量（1.39 ×、2.16 ×）和能耗（1.15 ×、2.8 ×）分别显着提高，多个 SBS 长度和图像处理任务的平均图像质量下降了 5%。

papers.title: ALLMod: Exploring Area-Efficiency of LUT-based Large Number Modular Reduction via Hybrid Workloads.
papers.abstract: Modular arithmetic, particularly modular reduction, is widely used in cryptographic applications such as homomorphic encryption (HE) and zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP). High-bit-width operations are crucial for enhancing security; however, they are computationally intensive due to the large number of modular operations required. The lookup-table-based (LUT-based) approach, a “space-for-time” technique, reduces computational load by segmenting the input number into smaller bit groups, pre-computing modular reduction results for each segment, and storing these results in LUTs. While effective, this method incurs significant hardware overhead due to extensive LUT usage. In this paper, we introduce ALLMod, a novel approach that improves the area efficiency of LUT-based largenumber modular reduction by employing hybrid workloads. Inspired by the iterative method, ALLMod splits the bit groups into two distinct workloads, achieving lower area costs without compromising throughput. We first develop a template to facilitate workload splitting and ensure balanced distribution. Then, we conduct design space exploration to evaluate the optimal timing for fusing workload results, enabling us to identify the most efficient design under specific constraints. Extensive evaluations show that ALLMod achieves up to $\lt sup\gt1\lt/sup\gt|.65 \times$ and $3 \times$ improvements in area efficiency over conventional LUT-based methods for bit-widths of 128 and 8,192, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 模运算，特别是模约简，广泛应用于同态加密（HE）和零知识证明（ZKP）等密码学应用中。高位宽操作对于增强安全性至关重要；然而，由于需要大量的模块化操作，它们的计算量很大。基于查找表（基于 LUT）的方法是一种“空间换时间”技术，通过将输入数字分段为更小的位组、预先计算每个分段的模块化缩减结果并将这些结果存储在 LUT 中来减少计算负载。该方法虽然有效，但由于大量使用 LUT，会产生大量硬件开销。在本文中，我们介绍了 ALLMod，这是一种通过采用混合工作负载来提高基于 LUT 的大量模块化缩减的面积效率的新颖方法。受迭代方法的启发，ALLMod 将位组分成两个不同的工作负载，在不影响吞吐量的情况下实现较低的面积成本。我们首先开发一个模板来促进工作负载分配并确保平衡分配。然后，我们进行设计空间探索，以评估融合工作负载结果的最佳时机，使我们能够在特定约束下确定最有效的设计。广泛的评估表明，对于位宽为 128 和 8,192 的情况，ALLMod 与基于 LUT 的传统方法相比，面积效率分别提高了 $\lt support\gt1\lt/sup\gt|.65 \times$ 和 $3 \times$。

papers.title: AmpereBleed: Exploiting On-chip Current Sensors for Circuit-Free Attacks on ARM-FPGA SoCs.
papers.abstract: FPGAs offer superior energy efficiency and performance in parallel computing but are vulnerable to remote power side-channel attacks. Existing attacks rely on assumptions of coresident crafted circuits and shared power delivery networks, limiting their practicality in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we present AmpereBleed, a novel current-based side-channel attack that exploits widely available INA226 sensors in ARMFPGA SoCs, bypassing the aforementioned two assumptions. AmpereBleed achieves $261 \times$ greater variations to victim activities compared to the popular ring oscillator (RO) circuit, fingerprints DNN models on the Xilinx Deep Learning Processor Unit (DPU) with $\mathbf{9 9. 7 \%}$ accuracy, and distinguishes the Hamming weights of RSA-1024 keys.
papers.abstract_zh: FPGA 在并行计算中提供卓越的能源效率和性能，但容易受到远程电源旁道攻击。现有的攻击依赖于共驻设计的电路和共享电力传输网络的假设，限制了它们在现实场景中的实用性。在本文中，我们提出了 AmpereBleed，这是一种新颖的基于电流的旁道攻击，它利用 ARMFPGA SoC 中广泛使用的 INA226 传感器，绕过上述两个假设。与流行的环形振荡器 (RO) 电路相比，AmpereBleed 的受害者活动变化达到了 $261 \times$，在 Xilinx 深度学习处理器单元 (DPU) 上以 $\mathbf{9 9. 7 \%}$ 精度对 DNN 模型进行指纹识别，并区分 RSA-1024 密钥的汉明权重。

papers.title: An Algorithm-Hardware Co-design Based on Revised Microscaling Format Quantization for Accelerating Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: The narrow-bit-width data format is crucial for reducing the computation and storage costs of modern deep learning applications, particularly in large language models (LLMs) based applications. Microscaling (MX) format has been proven as a drop-in replacement for the baseline FP32 in existing inference frameworks, with low user friction. However, deploying such a new format into existing hardware systems is still challenging, and the dominant solution for LLM inference at low precision is still low-bit quantization. This particularly limits the strategic applications of such LLMs in real deployment on a large scale. In this work, we propose an algorithm-hardware co-design that adopts a two-level $Revised MX Format Quantization$ (RMFQ) and a $Revised MX Format Accelerator$ (RMFA) architecture design. RMFQ proposes the $revised M X(R M X)$ format and provides a novel quantization framework with innovative group direction. Also, RMFA provides an RMX adaptive hardware architecture and an RMX encoding scheme. As a result, RMFQ pushes the limit of 4-bit and 6-bit quantization to a new state-of-the-art, and RMFA surpasses the existing outlier-aware accelerator such as OliVe, achieving a $1.28 \times$ speedup and a $1.31 \times$ energy reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 窄位宽数据格式对于降低现代深度学习应用程序的计算和存储成本至关重要，特别是在基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的应用程序中。微缩放 (MX) 格式已被证明可以直接替代现有推理框架中的基线 FP32，并且用户摩擦较小。然而，将这种新格式部署到现有的硬件系统中仍然具有挑战性，低精度LLM推理的主导解决方案仍然是低位量化。这尤其限制了此类法学硕士在实际大规模部署中的战略应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计，采用两级$Revised MX Format Quantization$（RMFQ）和$Revised MX Format Accelerator$（RMFA）架构设计。 RMFQ 提出了$修订版 M X(R M X)$ 格式，并提供了具有创新组方向的新颖量化框架。此外，RMFA还提供了RMX自适应硬件架构和RMX编码方案。结果，RMFQ 将 4 位和 6 位量化的极限推向了新的最先进水平，而 RMFA 超越了 OliVe 等现有的异常值感知加速器，实现了 1.28 美元的加速和 1.31 美元的能源减少。

papers.title: An Efficient Bit-level Sparse MAC-accelerated Architecture with SW/HW Co-design on FPGA.
papers.abstract: Exploring bit-level sparsity in the MAC process has been proven to be an important method for improving the efficiency of neural network feedforward processing. The reconfigurable platform offers possibilities for identifying the bitlevel unstructured redundancy during inference with different DNN models. Researchers noticed significant progress in valueaware accelerators on ASICs, yet we are concerned about the few studies on FPGAs. This paper observed the limitations of implementing bit-level sparsity optimizations using FPGA and proposed a software/architecture co-design solution. Specifically, by introducing LUT-friendly encoding with adaptable granularity and hardware structure supporting multiplication time uncertainty, we achieved a better trade-off between potential redundancy and accuracy with compatibility and scalability. Experiments show that under accurate calculation, PEs are up to $2.2 \times$ smaller than bit-parallel ones, and our design boosts performance by $1.04 \times$ to $1.74 \times$ and $1.40 \times$ to $2.79 \times$ over bitparallel and Booth-based designs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 探索MAC过程中的位级稀疏性已被证明是提高神经网络前馈处理效率的重要方法。可重构平台提供了在使用不同 DNN 模型进行推理期间识别位级非结构化冗余的可能性。研究人员注意到 ASIC 上的价值感知加速器取得了重大进展，但我们对 FPGA 上的研究很少感到担忧。本文观察了使用 FPGA 实现位级稀疏性优化的局限性，并提出了一种软件/架构协同设计解决方案。具体来说，通过引入具有自适应粒度的 LUT 友好编码和支持乘法时间不确定性的硬件结构，我们在潜在冗余和准确性与兼容性和可扩展性之间实现了更好的权衡。实验表明，在精确计算下，PE 比位并行设计小 2.2 美元，而我们的设计比位并行和基于 Booth 的设计分别将性能提高了 1.04 美元到 1.74 美元和 1.40 美元到 2.79 美元。

papers.title: An Efficient Compute-in-Memory based Accelerator for Point-based Point Cloud Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Point-based point cloud neural networks (PNNs) have shown remarkable accuracy in various applications. However, the performance of PNNs is usually limited on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper presents Point-CIM, an efficient Compute-in-Memory (CIM) based accelerator for PNNs, with software and hardware co-optimization. A reconfigurable CIM unit, which exploits the inherent zero-bit-skipping capability of CIM array, is designed to efficiently process Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations on decomposed feature data with high bit sparsity. A Voxel-Morton-sorted Partitioning (VMP) method combined with Channel-wise Minimum (CM) base point selection is proposed to improve the decomposition bit sparsity further and reduce the hardware implementation overhead. Additionally, a detailed Bit-level Truncation Quantization (BTQ) method is proposed to directly compress the bit-width of the offset without incurring any additional hardware overhead. Based on this decomposition method, a Pre-decomposition (PD) data movement strategy is employed to reduce data transfers of intermediate features between the on-chip buffer and CIM array. Extensive evaluation experiments on multiple datasets show that Point-CIM achieves an average speedup of $1.69 \times$ to $9.63 \times$, and $3.11 \times$ to $17.32 \times$ improvement in energy efficiency, compared to state-of-the-art accelerators and general-purpose processors.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于点的点云神经网络 (PNN) 在各种应用中都表现出了卓越的准确性。然而，PNN 的性能通常受限于资源受限的边缘设备。本文介绍了 Point-CIM，这是一种基于内存计算 (CIM) 的高效 PNN 加速器，具有软件和硬件协同优化功能。可重构 CIM 单元利用 CIM 阵列固有的零位跳跃功能，旨在有效地处理高位稀疏性分解特征数据的乘法累加 (MAC) 运算。提出了一种结合通道最小基点选择的体素-莫顿排序划分（VMP）方法，以进一步提高分解位稀疏性并减少硬件实现开销。此外，提出了一种详细的位级截断量化（BTQ）方法来直接压缩偏移的位宽，而不会产生任何额外的硬件开销。基于这种分解方法，采用预分解（PD）数据移动策略来减少片上缓冲区和CIM阵列之间中间特征的数据传输。对多个数据集进行的广泛评估实验表明，与最先进的加速器和通用处理器相比，Point-CIM 的平均加速率为 $1.69 \times$ 至 $9.63 \times$，能源效率提高了 $3.11 \times$ 至 $17.32 \times$。

papers.title: An Energy-Efficient High-Utilization Hardware Architecture for Attention Mechanism in Transformer using Balanced Systolic Array and Multi-Row Interleaved Operation Ordering.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based neural networks have achieved remarkable performance. Designing energy-efficient and high-speed accelerators for the attention mechanism, which dominates the energy and latency in Transformers, has become increasingly significant. Existing attention accelerators commonly use algorithm-hardware co-design to achieve higher energy efficiency and speed. However, deeply customized algorithms make these accelerators dependent on a particular application. Therefore, optimizing hardware architecture is crucial for achieving general-purpose acceleration. We observe two limitations in the hardware architecture of existing attention accelerators. First, the widely used input stationary, weight stationary, and output stationary systolic arrays (SAs) can’t balance data reuse, register saving, and utilization, which hinders to build more energy-efficient and faster SA-based accelerators. Second, layer-by-layer operation ordering introduces high SRAM access overhead of intermediate results. To address the first limitation, we propose the “Balanced Systolic Array”, which improves energy efficiency by 40% compared to conventional systolic arrays and achieves a utilization rate of 99.5%. To address the second limitation, we propose “Multi-Row Interleaved” operation ordering, which reduces the SRAM energy by 31.7% By integrating two techniques, the proposed attention accelerator achieves a 39% improvement in energy efficiency and a 38% enhancement in throughput×energy efficiency compared to previous works.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经网络已经取得了显着的性能。为注意力机制设计节能且高速的加速器已变得越来越重要，注意力机制在变形金刚中主导着能量和延迟。现有的注意力加速器通常使用算法-硬件协同设计来实现更高的能效和速度。然而，深度定制的算法使得这些加速器依赖于特定的应用程序。因此，优化硬件架构对于实现通用加速至关重要。我们观察到现有注意力加速器的硬件架构存在两个局限性。首先，广泛使用的输入固定、重量固定和输出固定脉动阵列（SA）无法平衡数据重用、寄存器节省和利用率，这阻碍了构建更节能、更快的基于 SA 的加速器。其次，逐层操作排序引入了中间结果的高 SRAM 访问开销。为了解决第一个限制，我们提出了“平衡脉动阵列”，与传统脉动阵列相比，其能效提高了40%，利用率达到99.5%。为了解决第二个限制，我们提出了“多行交错”操作排序，这将 SRAM 能耗降低了 31.7% 通过集成两种技术，所提出的注意力加速器与之前的工作相比，实现了 39% 的能源效率提高和 38% 的吞吐量×能源效率提高。

papers.title: An Energy-Efficient Kalman Filter Architecture with Tunable Accuracy for Brain-Computer Interfaces.
papers.abstract: Kalman Filter (KF) is the most prominent algorithm to predict motion from measurements of brain activity. However, little effort has been made to specialize KF hardware for the unique requirements of embedded brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). For this reason, we present the first configurable KF hardware architecture that enables fine-grained tuning of latency and accuracy, thereby facilitating specialization for neural data processing in BCI applications and supporting design-space exploration. Based on our architecture, we design KF hardware accelerators and integrate them into a heterogeneous system-on-chip (SoC). Through FPGA-based experiments, we demonstrate an energy-efficiency improvement of $15.3 x$ and $10^{3} x$ better accuracy compared to state-of-the-art implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 是根据大脑活动测量来预测运动的最著名的算法。然而，在专门化 KF 硬件来满足嵌入式脑机接口 (BCI) 的独特要求方面却做得很少。因此，我们提出了第一个可配置的 KF 硬件架构，该架构能够对延迟和准确性进行细粒度调整，从而促进 BCI 应用中神经数据处理的专业化并支持设计空间探索。基于我们的架构，我们设计了 KF 硬件加速器并将其集成到异构片上系统 (SoC) 中。通过基于 FPGA 的实验，我们证明与最先进的实现相比，能效提高了 15.3 x$，精度提高了 10^{3} x$。

papers.title: An Enhanced Data Packing Method for General Matrix Multiplication in Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren Scheme.
papers.abstract: General Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) stands as the most ubiquitous operation in machine learning applications. However, performing GEMM within Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is inefficient due to high computational demands and significant data migration constrained by limited bandwidth. Additionally, the inherent limitations of FHE schemes restrict the widespread application of machine learning, as standard activation functions are incompatible. This incompatibility necessitates alternative nonlinear functions, which lead to notable accuracy reductions. To address these challenges, we introduce a polynomial encoding methodology for GEMM under the Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren (BFV) scheme and extend the method to inference with packing inputs and weights for different sizes. Furthermore, we design specialized hardware to accelerate the inference process through optimized scheduling between the hardware and the host system. In experiments, we implemented our hardware on an FPGA U250 platform. Compared to existing solutions, our method achieves superior performance, achieving the highest $4.22 \times$ and $3.99 \times$ speedups on MNIST and CIFAR-10.
papers.abstract_zh: 通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 是机器学习应用中最普遍的运算。然而，由于高计算需求和有限带宽限制的大量数据迁移，在完全同态加密 (FHE) 中执行 GEMM 效率低下。此外，FHE 方案的固有局限性限制了机器学习的广泛应用，因为标准激活函数不兼容。这种不兼容性需要替代的非线性函数，这会导致精度显着降低。为了应对这些挑战，我们在 Brakerski/Fan-Vercauteren (BFV) 方案下引入了 GEMM 多项式编码方法，并将该方法扩展到不同大小的打包输入和权重的推理。此外，我们设计了专用硬件，通过硬件和主机系统之间的优化调度来加速推理过程。在实验中，我们在 FPGA U250 平台上实现了我们的硬件。与现有解决方案相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的性能，在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上实现了最高 4.22 美元和 3.99 美元的加速。

papers.title: An Input-Aware Sparse Tensor Compiler Empowered by Vectorized Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Sparsity is widely prevalent in real-world applications, yet existing compiler optimizations and code generation techniques for sparse computations remain underdeveloped. Sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpMM) is a representative operator in sparse computations, whose performance is often limited by the design of sparse formats and the extent of hardware architecture optimization. Most existing solutions achieve highperformance SpMM through two approaches: (1) meticulously designed kernels and specialized sparse formats, which require extensive manual effort, or (2) tensor compilers that support code generation, though these typically offer limited support for sparse patterns, making it challenging to adapt to complex sparsity patterns in practical applications. This paper presents SpMMTC, an input-aware sparse tensor compiler. Given a sparse matrix as input, SpMMTC analyzes its non-zero distribution and generates a vectorized kernel optimized for SpMM on the specific matrix. We evaluated SpMMTC on various workloads.
