It achieves speedups of 1.21 x to 2.97 x over state-of-the-art methods such as TACO, TVM, and ASpT on different multi-core processors. It also provides a speedup of up to $\mathbf{1. 5 2 x}$ for sparse MobileNetV1 inference on the edge device.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏性在现实应用中广泛存在，但现有的稀疏计算编译器优化和代码生成技术仍然不发达。稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是稀疏计算中的代表性算子，其性能往往受到稀疏格式设计和硬件架构优化程度的限制。大多数现有解决方案通过两种方法实现高性能 SpMM：（1）精心设计的内核和专门的稀疏格式，这需要大量的手动工作，或（2）支持代码生成的张量编译器，尽管这些编译器通常对稀疏模式提供有限的支持，使得在实际应用中适应复杂的稀疏模式具有挑战性。本文提出了 SpMMTC，一种输入感知的稀疏张量编译器。给定一个稀疏矩阵作为输入，SpMMTC 分析其非零分布并生成针对特定矩阵上的 SpMM 优化的矢量化内核。我们在各种工作负载上评估了 SpMMTC。它在不同的多核处理器上比 TACO、TVM 和 ASpT 等最先进的方法实现了 1.21 倍到 2.97 倍的加速。它还提供高达 $\mathbf{1. 5 2 x}$ 用于边缘设备上的稀疏 MobileNetV1 推理。

papers.title: Anchor First, Accelerate Next: Revolutionizing GNNs with PIM by Harnessing Stationary Data.
papers.abstract: Substantial data movement caused by irregular graph topologies hinders the efficient processing of graph neural networks (GNNs). Although the emerging near-bank processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture offers a promising solution to reduce data transfer between memory and computing units, cross-bank communication remains a critical challenge, limiting the benefits of PIM architectures. Our findings indicate that only $35.6 \%$ of the data can stay stationary within PIM units on average, with the rest requiring movement due to graph dependencies. This situation worsens as the number of PIM units increases, reducing the ratio to $18.7 \%$. In this paper, we argue that to fully leverage PIM architectures, systems must maximize stationary data and minimize the movement of non-stationary data. Following this principle, we propose Anchor, a scalable PIM architecture that exploits stationary data for GNNs through a hardware-software co-design approach. To maximize stationary data, we introduce the graph partitioning algorithm Mastav, which carefully allocates vertices and edges to preserve data locality. To minimize the movement of non-stationary data, we employ a two-step strategy. First, a customized dataflow ensures that non-stationary data is accessed and distributed exactly once. Second, an optimized communication mechanism reduces redundant data transfers through critical paths. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that Anchor significantly reduces processing latency and data movement compared to representative schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 不规则图拓扑引起的大量数据移动阻碍了图神经网络（GNN）的有效处理。尽管新兴的近银行内存处理 (PIM) 架构为减少内存和计算单元之间的数据传输提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但跨银行通信仍然是一个严峻的挑战，限制了 PIM 架构的优势。我们的研究结果表明，平均只有 35.6 \%$ 的数据可以在 PIM 单位内保持静止，其余数据由于图形依赖性而需要移动。随着 PIM 装置数量的增加，这种情况会变得更糟，比率会降低至 18.7 \%$。在本文中，我们认为，要充分利用 PIM 架构，系统必须最大化固定数据并最小化非固定数据的移动。遵循这一原则，我们提出了 Anchor，这是一种可扩展的 PIM 架构，通过软硬件协同设计方法利用 GNN 的固定数据。为了最大化平稳数据，我们引入了图分区算法 Mastav，该算法仔细分配顶点和边以保留数据局部性。为了最大限度地减少非平稳数据的移动，我们采用了两步策略。首先，定制的数据流确保非静态数据仅被访问和分发一次。其次，优化的通信机制减少了通过关键路径的冗余数据传输。我们广泛的实验表明，与代表性方案相比，Anchor 显着减少了处理延迟和数据移动。

papers.title: ANGraph: A GNN-Based Performance Prediction Framework for Asynchronous Neuromorphic Hardware.
papers.abstract: Design space exploration (DSE) through system-level simulation is essential for designing energy-efficient asynchronous neuromorphic hardware, which is increasingly promising in edge AI applications. However, there are significant mismatches between system-level predictions and gate-level simulations, resulting in low precision when predicting performance during the DSE process for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. To address this issue, we put forward ANGraph, a graph neural network (GNN)-based performance prediction framework for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. In the ANGraph framework, we transform the intermediate representation of systemlevel simulations into graphs, collect gate-level circuit simulation results to build benchmarks with over one million samples, and train a GNN model to predict hardware latency for asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. Additionally, we use a residual network (ResNet)-based method to predict the power consumption of asynchronous neuromorphic hardware. We evaluate these two models on additional datasets without extra training across different scales, process nodes, and traffic patterns of input data. Compared to the latency predictions from the state-of-the-art simulator, we improve the R -square score by 0.69 and reduce root mean square error (RMSE) by 76% on average across all datasets. We also achieve an R-square score of 0.98 and a mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of 0.88% for the power consumption prediction task. The benchmarks and models are available at https://github.com/HuaGuaiGuai/ANGraph.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过系统级仿真进行设计空间探索（DSE）对于设计节能异步神经形态硬件至关重要，这在边缘人工智能应用中越来越有前景。然而，系统级预测和门级模拟之间存在显着的不匹配，导致异步神经形态硬件的 DSE 过程中预测性能时精度较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ANGraph，一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的异步神经形态硬件性能预测框架。在 ANGraph 框架中，我们将系统级仿真的中间表示转换为图形，收集门级电路仿真结果以构建超过一百万个样本的基准，并训练 GNN 模型来预测异步神经形态硬件的硬件延迟。此外，我们使用基于残差网络（ResNet）的方法来预测异步神经形态硬件的功耗。我们在额外的数据集上评估这两个模型，无需跨不同规模、流程节点和输入数据的流量模式进行额外训练。与最先进的模拟器的延迟预测相比，我们在所有数据集中将 R 方得分平均提高了 0.69，并将均方根误差 (RMSE) 降低了 76%。我们还为功耗预测任务实现了 0.98 的 R 平方分数和 0.88% 的平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE)。基准和模型可在 https://github.com/HuaGuaiGuai/ANGraph 获取。

papers.title: Approximate SMT Counting Beyond Discrete Domains.
papers.abstract: Satisfiability Modulo Theory (SMT) solvers have advanced automated reasoning, solving complex formulas across discrete and continuous domains. Recent progress in propositional model counting motivates extending SMT capabilities toward model counting, especially for hybrid SMT formulas. Existing approaches, like bit-blasting, are limited to discrete variables, highlighting the challenge of counting solutions projected onto the discrete domain in hybrid formulas. We introduce pact, an SMT model counter for hybrid formulas that uses hashing-based approximate model counting to estimate solutions with theoretical guarantees. pact makes a logarithmic number of SMT solver calls relative to the projection variables, leveraging optimized hash functions. pact achieves significant performance improvements over baselines on a large suite of benchmarks. In particular, out of $\mathbf{1 4, 2 0 2}$ instances, pact successfully finished on 603 instances, while Baseline could only finish on 13 instances.
papers.abstract_zh: 可满足性模理论 (SMT) 求解器具有先进的自动推理功能，可求解离散和连续域中的复杂公式。命题模型计数的最新进展促使 SMT 功能扩展到模型计数，特别是对于混合 SMT 公式。现有的方法（例如位爆破）仅限于离散变量，这凸显了在混合公式中对投影到离散域的解决方案进行计数的挑战。我们引入了 pact，一种用于混合公式的 SMT 模型计数器，它使用基于散列的近似模型计数来估计具有理论保证的解决方案。 pact 利用优化的哈希函数，相对于投影变量进行对数数量的 SMT 求解器调用。 pact 在大量基准测试中实现了比基线显着的性能改进。特别是，在 $\mathbf{1 4, 2 0 2}$ 实例中，pact 成功完成了 603 个实例，而 Baseline 只能完成 13 个实例。

papers.title: April: Accuracy-Improved Floating-Point Approximation For Neural Network Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Neural Networks (NNs) have achieved breakthroughs in computer vision and natural language processing. However, modern models are computationally expensive, with floating-point operations posing a major bottleneck. Floatingpoint approximation, such as Mitchell’s logarithm, enables floating-point multiplication using simpler integer additions, thereby improving hardware efficiency. However, its practical adoption is hindered by challenges such as precision degradation, efficient hardware integrations, and management of trade-offs between accuracy and resource efficiency. In this paper, we propose a hardware-efficient down-samplingbased compensation method to mitigate precision loss and a flexible bias mechanism to accommodate diverse data distributions in NN models. Building on this foundation, we design configurable systolic arrays optimized for NN accelerators. To further support practical adoption, we introduce April, a co-design framework that balances the accuracy and resource usage of generated synthesizable systolic arrays. Our FPGA-based evaluations demonstrate that April-generated systolic arrays reduce root mean square error (RMSE) by up to $\mathbf{9 6 \%}$ and achieve $\mathbf{3 4 \% -5 2 \%}$ area reduction even compared to INT8-based implementations while maintaining comparable or improved model accuracy. Our design is open-sourced at https://github.com/CLabGit/April
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络（NN）在计算机视觉和自然语言处理方面取得了突破。然而，现代模型的计算成本很高，浮点运算构成了主要瓶颈。浮点近似（例如米切尔对数）可以使用更简单的整数加法进行浮点乘法，从而提高硬件效率。然而，其实际采用受到精度下降、高效硬件集成以及准确性和资源效率之间权衡管理等挑战的阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于硬件高效下采样的补偿方法来减轻精度损失，并提出了一种灵活的偏差机制来适应神经网络模型中的不同数据分布。在此基础上，我们设计了针对神经网络加速器优化的可配置脉动阵列。为了进一步支持实际采用，我们引入了 April，这是一个协同设计框架，可以平衡生成的可合成脉动阵列的准确性和资源使用情况。我们基于 FPGA 的评估表明，与基于 INT8 的实现相比，4 月份生成的脉动阵列可将均方根误差 (RMSE) 降低高达 $\mathbf{9 6 \%}$，并实现 $\mathbf{3 4 \% -5 2 \%}$ 面积减少，同时保持相当或更高的模型精度。我们的设计是开源的 https://github.com/CLabGit/April

papers.title: APSQ: Additive Partial Sum Quantization with Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
papers.abstract: DNN accelerators, significantly advanced by model compression and specialized dataflow techniques, have marked considerable progress. However, the frequent access of highprecision partial sums (PSUMs) leads to excessive memory demands in architectures utilizing input/weight stationary dataflows. Traditional compression strategies have typically overlooked PSUM quantization, which may account for 69% of power consumption. This study introduces a novel Additive Partial Sum Quantization (APSQ) method, seamlessly integrating PSUM accumulation into the quantization framework. A grouping strategy that combines APSQ with PSUM quantization enhanced by a reconfigurable architecture is further proposed. The APSQ performs nearly lossless on NLP and CV tasks across BERT, Segformer, and EfficientViT models while compressing PSUMs to INT8. This leads to a notable reduction in energy costs by $\mathbf{2 8-8 7 \%}$. Extended experiments on LLaMA2-7B demonstrate the potential of APSQ for large language models. Code is available at https://github.com/Yonghao-Tan/APSQ.
papers.abstract_zh: DNN 加速器通过模型压缩和专门的数据流技术显着进步，取得了长足的进步。然而，频繁访问高精度部分和 (PSUM) 会导致使用输入/权重固定数据流的架构中内存需求过多。传统的压缩策略通常忽略了 PSUM 量化，它可能占功耗的 69%。本研究引入了一种新颖的加法部分和量化 (APSQ) 方法，将 PSUM 累加无缝集成到量化框架中。进一步提出了一种将 APSQ 与通过可重构架构增强的 PSUM 量化相结合的分组策略。 APSQ 在跨 BERT、Segformer 和 EfficientViT 模型的 NLP 和 CV 任务上几乎无损地执行，同时将 PSUM 压缩为 INT8。这导致能源成本显着降低 $\mathbf{2 8-8 7 \%}$。 LLaMA2-7B 上的扩展实验证明了 APSQ 对于大型语言模型的潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/Yonghao-Tan/APSQ 获取。

papers.title: ArbiterQ: Improving QNN Convergency and Accuracy by Applying Personalized Model on Heterogeneous Quantum Devices.
papers.abstract: In the current NISQ era, the performance of QNN models is strictly hindered by the limited qubit number and inevitable noise. A natural idea to improve the robustness of QNN is to involve multiple quantum devices. Nevertheless, due to the heterogeneity and instability of quantum devices (e.g., noise, frequent online/offline), training and inference on distributed quantum devices may even destroy the accuracy. In this paper, we propose ArbiterQ, a comprehensive QNN framework designed for efficient and high-accuracy training and inference on heterogeneous QPUs. The main innovation of ArbiterQ is it applies personalized models for each QPU via two uniform QNN representations: model vector and behavioral vector. The model vector specifies the logical-level parameters in the QNN model, while the behavioral vector captures the hardware-level features when implementing the QNN circuit. In this manner, by sharing the gradient among QPUs with similar behavioral vectors, we can effectively leverage parallelism while considering heterogeneity. We also propose shot-oriented inference scheduling, which is a much more fine-grained scheduling that can improve accuracy and balance the workload. The experiments show that ArbiterQ accelerates the training process by $4.03 \times$ with $7.87 \%$ loss reduction, compared with the previous distributed QNN framework EQC [1].
papers.abstract_zh: 在当前的 NISQ 时代，QNN 模型的性能受到有限的量子比特数和不可避免的噪声的严格阻碍。提高 QNN 鲁棒性的一个自然想法是涉及多个量子设备。然而，由于量子设备的异构性和不稳定性（例如噪声、频繁上下线），分布式量子设备上的训练和推理甚至可能会破坏准确性。在本文中，我们提出了 ArbiterQ，这是一个综合 QNN 框架，旨在对异构 QPU 进行高效、高精度的训练和推理。 ArbiterQ 的主要创新在于它通过两个统一的 QNN 表示（模型向量和行为向量）为每个 QPU 应用个性化模型。模型向量指定 QNN 模型中的逻辑级参数，而行为向量在实现 QNN 电路时捕获硬件级特征。通过这种方式，通过在具有相似行为向量的 QPU 之间共享梯度，我们可以在考虑异构性的同时有效地利用并行性。我们还提出了面向镜头的推理调度，这是一种更细粒度的调度，可以提高准确性并平衡工作负载。实验表明，与之前的分布式 QNN 框架 EQC [1] 相比，ArbiterQ 将训练过程加速了 $4.03 \times$，损失减少了 $7.87 \%$。

papers.title: ARCANE: Adaptive RISC-V Cache Architecture for Near-memory Extensions.
papers.abstract: Modern data-driven applications expose limitations of von Neumann architectures-extensive data movement, low throughput, and poor energy efficiency. Accelerators improve performance but lack flexibility and require data transfers. Existing compute in- and nearmemory solutions mitigate these issues but face usability challenges due to data placement constraints. We propose a novel cache architecture that doubles as a tightly-coupled compute-near-memory coprocessor. Our RISC-V cache controller executes custom instructions from the host CPU using vector operations dispatched to near-memory vector processing units within the cache memory subsystem. This architecture abstracts memory synchronization and data mapping from application software while offering software-based Instruction Set Architecture extensibility. Our implementation shows $30 \times$ to $84 \times$ performance improvement when operating on 8-bit data over the same system with a traditional cache when executing a worst-case 32-bit CNN workload, with only 41.3% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据驱动的应用程序暴露了冯·诺依曼架构的局限性——大量的数据移动、低吞吐量和低能源效率。加速器可以提高性能，但缺乏灵活性并且需要数据传输。现有的计算内存和近内存解决方案可以缓解这些问题，但由于数据放置限制而面临可用性挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的缓存架构，它兼作紧密耦合的计算近内存协处理器。我们的 RISC-V 缓存控制器使用分配到缓存子系统内的近内存向量处理单元的向量运算来执行来自主机 CPU 的自定义指令。该架构从应用软件中抽象出内存同步和数据映射，同时提供基于软件的指令集架构可扩展性。我们的实现显示，在执行最坏情况的 32 位 CNN 工作负载时，在具有传统缓存的同一系统上操作 8 位数据时，性能提高了 30 美元到 84 美元，而区域开销仅为 41.3%。

papers.title: Ares: High Performance Near-Storage Accelerator for FHE-based Private Set Intersection.
papers.abstract: Nowadays, the importance of data privacy protection has grown significantly. Privacy Set Intersection (PSI) based on Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is widely applied in various privacy protection scenarios, such as federated learning and password verification. Nevertheless, the substantial computational demands of FHE and the vast scale of databases in PSI result in inefficient processing, thereby necessitating specialized accelerator architectures to enhance usability. Current general-purpose FHE accelerators do not adequately address the unique requirements of PSI applications, leading to suboptimal data handling and underutilization of hardware, which impedes their effective deployment for PSI acceleration. This paper introduces Ares, a practical hardware-software co-designed FHE-based PSI FPGA accelerator. We propose Lazy Relinearization to optimize redundant calculations in PSI and reduce computational complexity without changing the PSI protocol. At the same time, through the analysis and decoupling of the PSI computing pattern, we design an efficient hardware acceleration architecture that fully utilizes the bandwidth and computing resources of the hardware to achieve excellent acceleration performance. We highlight the following result: (1) a $47.99 \times$ speedup relative to CPU; (2) performance improvements of $1.79 \times$ and $1.93 \times$ over the state-of-theart FPGA FHE accelerators, Poseidon and FAB, respectively; (3) achieves $7.96 \times$ and $10.95 \times$ energy efficiency improvement compared to Poseidon and FAB, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，数据隐私保护的重要性显着增长。基于全同态加密（FHE）的隐私集交集（PSI）广泛应用于联邦学习、密码验证等各种隐私保护场景。然而，FHE 的大量计算需求和 PSI 中的庞大数据库导致处理效率低下，因此需要专门的加速器架构来增强可用性。当前的通用 FHE 加速器不能充分满足 PSI 应用的独特要求，导致数据处理不理想和硬件利用率不足，从而阻碍了 PSI 加速的有效部署。本文介绍了Ares，一种实用的软硬件协同设计的基于FHE的PSI FPGA加速器。我们提出惰性重新线性化来优化 PSI 中的冗余计算并在不改变 PSI 协议的情况下降低计算复杂度。同时，通过对PSI计算模式的分析和解耦，我们设计了高效的硬件加速架构，充分利用硬件的带宽和计算资源，实现优异的加速性能。我们强调以下结果：(1) 相对于 CPU 的加速为 $47.99 \times$； (2) 与最先进的 FPGA FHE 加速器 Poseidon 和 FAB 相比，性能分别提高了 1.79 美元和 1.93 美元； (3) 与 Poseidon 和 FAB 相比，分别实现了 7.96 美元和 10.95 美元的能效提升。

papers.title: ASRR-PINN: Adaptive Sub-Regional Random Resampling-Based PINN for Thermal Analysis of 3D-ICs.
papers.abstract: The physics-informed neural network (PINN) is a promising technology to accelerate thermal analysis of integrated circuits (ICs). However, the application of PINN to threedimensional (3D) scenarios is faced with numerous challenges, including the requirement of a vast number of sampling points as well as the high-level fitting capability of the network. This paper introduces an Adaptive Sub-regional Random Resamplingbased PINN (ASRR-PINN) to accelerate the thermal analysis of 3D-ICs. The adaptive sub-regional random resampling (ASRR) algorithm is proposed for efficient sampling in PINN, which divides the solution domain into a series of sub-regions and further adaptively decomposes these sub-regions during the training process. Besides, the sampling points are randomly resampled within each sub-region. By this means, the solution accuracy is enhanced significantly, especially in cases of a limited number of sampling points. To accelerate the convergence of the network, the thermal boundary conditions are incorporated into the ASRRPINN, ensuring that the network outputs automatically satisfy these constraints. Furthermore, the capability of parameterization of ASRR-PINN is achieved by training an additional reduced network. Numerical results show that the ASRR algorithm reduces the maximum absolute error (AE) by more than $56 \%$ compared with other non-uniform sampling methods while the runtime is shortened by at least $28 \%$. Moreover, using the parameterized ASRR-PINN to explore the design space of 3D-ICs achieves speeds over 200 times faster than the original ASRR-PINN.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 是一项很有前途的加速集成电路 (IC) 热分析的技术。然而，PINN在三维（3D）场景中的应用面临着诸多挑战，包括大量采样点的需求以及网络的高水平拟合能力。本文介绍了一种基于自适应子区域随机重采样的 PINN (ASRR-PINN)，以加速 3D-IC 的热分析。为了实现PINN中的高效采样，提出了自适应子区域随机重采样（ASRR）算法，该算法将解域划分为一系列子区域，并在训练过程中进一步自适应地分解这些子区域。此外，采样点在每个子区域内随机重采样。通过这种方式，求解精度显着提高，尤其是在采样点数量有限的情况下。为了加速网络的收敛，热边界条件被纳入 ASRRPINN 中，确保网络输出自动满足这些约束。此外，ASRR-PINN 的参数化能力是通过训练额外的简化网络来实现的。数值结果表明，与其他非均匀采样方法相比，ASRR算法将最大绝对误差（AE）降低了超过$56\%$，同时运行时间缩短了至少$28\%$。此外，使用参数化的 ASRR-PINN 来探索 3D-IC 的设计空间，其速度比原始 ASRR-PINN 快 200 倍以上。

papers.title: Assessing Quantum Layout Synthesis Tools via Known Optimal-SWAP Cost Benchmarks.
papers.abstract: Quantum layout synthesis (QLS) is a critical step in quantum program compilation for superconducting quantum computers, involving the insertion of SWAP gates to satisfy hardware connectivity constraints. While previous works have introduced SWAP-free benchmarks with known-optimal depths for evaluating QLS tools, these benchmarks overlook SWAP count-a key performance metric. Real-world applications often require SWAP gates, making SWAP-free benchmarks insufficient for fully assessing QLS tool performance. To address this limitation, we introduce QUBIKOS, a benchmark set with provableoptimal SWAP counts and non-trivial circuit structures. For the first time, we are able to quantify the optimality gaps of SWAP gate usages of the leading QLS algorithms, which are surprisingly large: LightSabre from IBM delivers the best performance with an optimality gap of $63 x$, followed by ML-QLS with an optimality gap of 117 x. Similarly, QMAP and $\mathrm{t} \mid$ ket $\rangle$ exhibit significantly larger gaps of 250 x and 330 x, respectively. This highlights the need for further advancements in QLS methodologies. Beyond evaluation, QUBIKOS offers valuable insights for guiding the development of future QLS tools, as demonstrated through an analysis of a suboptimal case in LightSABRE. This underscores QUBIKOS’s utility as both an evaluation framework and a tool for advancing QLS research.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子布局综合（QLS）是超导量子计算机量子程序编译的关键步骤，涉及插入交换门以满足硬件连接约束。虽然之前的工作引入了具有已知最佳深度的无 SWAP 基准来评估 QLS 工具，但这些基准忽略了 SWAP 计数——一个关键的性能指标。现实世界的应用程序通常需要 SWAP 门，这使得无 SWAP 基准不足以全面评估 QLS 工具的性能。为了解决这个限制，我们引入了 QUBIKOS，这是一个具有可证明的最佳交换计数和重要电路结构的基准测试集。我们第一次能够量化领先 QLS 算法的 SWAP 门使用的最优性差距，该差距惊人地大：IBM 的 LightSabre 提供了最佳性能，最优性差距为 63 x 美元，其次是 ML-QLS，最优性差距为 117 x。类似地，QMAP 和 $\mathrm{t} \mid$ ket $\rangle$ 分别表现出更大的差距，分别为 250 x 和 330 x。这凸显了 QLS 方法进一步发展的必要性。除了评估之外，QUB​​IKOS 还为指导未来 QLS 工具的开发提供了宝贵的见解，正如通过对 LightSABRE 中次优案例的分析所证明的那样。这强调了 QUBIKOS 作为评估框架和推进 QLS 研究的工具的实用性。

papers.title: Asymmetric Predictive Testing for Aging in SRAMs.
papers.abstract: To avoid corruption of user data, predictive testing methods have been proposed to identify SRAMs likely to fail in the near future due to aging. These methods use aggressive operating conditions, e.g., adjustments to wordline voltages or the power supply voltage, that are calibrated to provide high coverage of SRAMs likely to fail in the near future, but end up with some over-testing, i.e., spuriously identifying some chips as likely to fail. We first present our study which discovered that a large fraction of over-tested chips fail due to read faults triggered during read-1 operations. Our analysis identifies asymmetric aging in SRAM cells, which are more likely to store zeros, as the root cause for this. We build on this discovery to propose an asymmetric predictive testing method which performs writes using normal voltages, read-0 at aggressive voltages, and read-1 at less aggressive voltages. We demonstrate that this method significantly reduces over-testing by over $3 \times$ to $5 \times$, for low limits on under-testing. We also propose and use a new statistical sampling and simulation method to enable fast convergence and accurate evaluation of asymmetric predictive testing.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了避免用户数据损坏，人们提出了预测测试方法来识别 SRAM 在不久的将来可能因老化而发生故障的情况。这些方法使用激进的操作条件，例如对字线电压或电源电压进行调整，这些条件经过校准以提供可能在不久的将来发生故障的 SRAM 的高覆盖率，但最终会导致一些过度测试，即错误地将某些芯片识别为可能发生故障。我们首先介绍我们的研究，发现大部分经过过度测试的芯片由于在读 1 操作期间触发读故障而失败。我们的分析确定 SRAM 单元中的不对称老化（更有可能存储零）是造成这种情况的根本原因。我们在此发现的基础上提出了一种非对称预测测试方法，该方法使用正常电压执行写入操作，在高电压下执行读 0 操作，并在较低电压下执行读 1 操作。我们证明，这种方法可以显着减少过度测试，减少超过 3 美元到 5 美元，而测试不足的限制较低。我们还提出并使用一种新的统计采样和模拟方法来实现非对称预测测试的快速收敛和准确评估。

papers.title: ATLAS: A Self-Supervised and Cross-Stage Netlist Power Model for Fine-Grained Time-Based Layout Power Analysis.
papers.abstract: Accurate power prediction in VLSI design is crucial for effective power optimization, especially as designs get transformed from gate-level netlist to layout stages. However, traditional accurate power simulation requires time-consuming back-end processing and simulation steps, which significantly impede design optimization. To address this, we propose ATLAS, which can predict the ultimate time-based layout power for any new design in the gate-level netlist. To the best of our knowledge, ATLAS is the first work that supports both time-based power simulation and general cross-design power modeling. It achieves such general timebased power modeling by proposing a new pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm customized for circuit power. Targeting golden per-cycle layout power from commercial tools, our ATLAS achieves the mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of only ${0. 5 8 \%, ~} {0. 4 5 \%}$, and ${5. 1 2 \%}$ for the clock tree, register, and combinational power groups, respectively, without any layout information. Overall, the MAPE for the total power of the entire design is $\lt1 \%$, and the inference speed of a workload is significantly faster than the standard flow of commercial tools.
papers.abstract_zh: VLSI 设计中准确的功耗预测对于有效的功耗优化至关重要，尤其是当设计从门级网表转变为布局阶段时。然而，传统的精确功率仿真需要耗时的后端处理和仿真步骤，这极大地阻碍了设计优化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ATLAS，它可以预测门级网表中任何新设计的最终基于时间的布局能力。据我们所知，ATLAS 是第一个同时支持基于时间的功耗仿真和通用交叉设计功耗建模的作品。它通过提出一种针对电路功率定制的新的预训练和微调范例来实现这种基于时间的通用功率建模。我们的 ATLAS 以商业工具的黄金每周期布局能力为目标，实现了仅 ${0.0 美元的平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE)。 5 8 \%, ~} {0. 4 5 \%}$ 和 ${5. 1 2 \%}$ 分别用于时钟树、寄存器和组合电源组，没有任何布局信息。总体而言，整个设计的总算力的MAPE为$\lt1\%$，并且工作负载的推理速度明显快于商业工具的标准流程。

papers.title: AttenPIM: Accelerating LLM Attention with Dual-mode GEMV in Processing-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated unprecedented generative performance across a wide range of applications. While recent heterogeneous architectures attempt to address the memory-bound bottleneck from attention computations by processing-in-memory (PIM) offloading, they overlook two critical characteristics of attention GEMVs that distinguish them from traditional PIM scenarios: (1) dynamic matrix dimensions that scale with token length, and (2) distinct GEMV patterns between score computation ($Q \times K_{t}$) and context computation ($S \times V$). Existing PIM designs, employing either uniform or transposed computing modes, suffer from inefficiencies in newly generated element preparation or distinct GEMV execution. To address these limitations, we propose AttenPIM, a software-hardware co-design for efficient PIM-based attention acceleration. For bank-level execution, we propose dual-mode computing modes tailored for score and context computations with PIM-oriented data layouts and execution flows for KV storage, supported by a low-cost configurable per-bank PIM unit (PU). For system-level execution, we leverage token-level and head-level concurrency to ensure workload balance and maximize bank PU parallelism. Furthermore, dynamic allocation and kernel fusion methods are proposed to further minimize memory overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that AttenPIM achieves $1.13 \times-5.26 \times$ speedup and reduces energy consumption by 17 %-49 % compared to two state-of-the-art PIM baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在广泛的应用程序中展示了前所未有的生成性能。虽然最近的异构架构试图通过内存处理（PIM）卸载来解决注意力计算中的内存限制瓶颈，但它们忽略了注意力 GEMV 与传统 PIM 场景的区别的两个关键特征：（1）随 token 长度缩放的动态矩阵维度，以及（2）得分计算（$Q \times K_{t}$）和上下文计算（$S \times V$）之间不同的 GEMV 模式。现有的 PIM 设计采用统一或转置计算模式，但在新生成的元素准备或不同的 GEMV 执行方面效率低下。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 AttenPIM，这是一种软件-硬件协同设计，用于高效的基于 PIM 的注意力加速。对于银行级执行，我们提出了专为分数和上下文计算而定制的双模式计算模式，具有面向 PIM 的数据布局和 KV 存储的执行流程，并由低成本可配置的每银行 PIM 单元（PU）支持。对于系统级执行，我们利用令牌级和头级并发来确保工作负载平衡并最大化银行 PU 并行性。此外，还提出了动态分配和内核融合方法以进一步最小化内存开销。实验结果表明，与两个最先进的 PIM 基线相比，AttenPIM 实现了 1.13 美元 ×-5.26 美元的加速，并将能耗降低了 17%-49%。

papers.title: AutoClock: Automated Clock Management for Power-Efficient HLS Designs on FPGAs.
papers.abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) tools streamline FPGA design by enabling engineers to implement hardware using $\mathrm{C} / \mathrm{C}++$ languages. However, while clock management serves as a critical stage in the FPGA EDA flow that affects system-level performance, area, and especially power consumption, existing commercial HLS tools lack comprehensive solutions for clock management. Specifically, the diversity of clock resources creates a vast design space for finding the optimal configuration, and the insufficient analysis of multiple clock domain scenarios hinders effective clock-oriented optimizations in HLS. This work introduces AutoClock, an open-source integrated clock management framework that complements AMD Vitis HLS. AutoClock allocates resources for clock generation, assigns modules to appropriate clock domains, addresses metastability and time division multiplexing (TDM) malfunctioning introduced by multiclock domain architectures, and hierarchically gates the clock of modules in a design. Experimental results demonstrate that AutoClock can fully utilize clock resources on FPGAs and help reduce dynamic power consumption by up to 74.38%.
papers.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 工具使工程师能够使用 $\mathrm{C} / \mathrm{C}++$ 语言实现硬件，从而简化 FPGA 设计。然而，虽然时钟管理是 FPGA EDA 流程中的关键阶段，影响系统级性能、面积，尤其是功耗，但现有的商用 HLS 工具缺乏全面的时钟管理解决方案。具体来说，时钟资源的多样性为寻找最佳配置创造了巨大的设计空间，并且对多个时钟域场景的分析不充分阻碍了HLS中有效的面向时钟的优化。这项工作介绍了 AutoClock，这是一个开源集成时钟管理框架，可补充 AMD Vitis HLS。 AutoClock 为时钟生成分配资源，将模块分配到适当的时钟域，解决多时钟域架构引入的亚稳态和时分复用 (TDM) 故障，并分层门控设计中模块的时钟。实验结果表明，AutoClock可以充分利用FPGA上的时钟资源，并有助于降低动态功耗高达74.38%。

papers.title: Automated Generation of Decoders for Irregular Instruction Sets Using Information-Theoretic Decision Tree Construction Algorithms.
papers.abstract: Instruction decoders are indispensable components of the System-on-Chip design flow and major constituents of instruction set simulators and processor toolchains. The complex and lengthy process of manual decoder design can be greatly alleviated by automated decoder generation tools based on high level instruction definitions. Unfortunately, automatic generation is challenged by the rising complexity of instruction sets as well as irregularities such as non-uniform opcodes, logic propositions on bit fields and multiple or nested specializations. The few available state-of-the-art decoder generation tools either cannot handle irregularities altogether or produce inadequate results, either functionally or w.r.t. performance. Moreover, they are largely ad hoc and do not bear on any of the well-established work on decision tree generation. This paper presents a sophisticated decision-tree algorithm for the problem of generating decoders for irregular instruction sets. Our algorithm has produced fully automated, functionally correct and cost-aware decoders for the SPARC, MIPS32 and ARMv7 instruction sets. Our results prove the application of information-theoretic concepts to decoder generation a most promising approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 指令解码器是片上系统设计流程中不可或缺的组件，也是指令集模拟器和处理器工具链的主要组成部分。基于高级指令定义的自动解码器生成工具可以大大减轻手动解码器设计的复杂而漫长的过程。不幸的是，自动生成面临着指令集复杂性不断增加以及不规则性的挑战，例如不一致的操作码、位域上的逻辑命题以及多重或嵌套的专业化。 The few available state-of-the-art decoder generation tools either cannot handle irregularities altogether or produce inadequate results, either functionally or w.r.t.表现。此外，它们很大程度上是临时的，与决策树生成方面的任何成熟工作无关。本文提出了一种复杂的决策树算法，用于解决不规则指令集解码器的生成问题。我们的算法已经为 SPARC、MIPS32 和 ARMv7 指令集生成了全自动、功能正确且具有成本意识的解码器。我们的结果证明，将信息论概念应用于解码器生成是最有前途的方法。

papers.title: AutoPower: Automated Few-Shot Architecture-Level Power Modeling by Power Group Decoupling.
papers.abstract: Power efficiency is a critical design objective in modern CPU design. Architects need a fast yet accurate architecture-level power evaluation tool to perform early-stage power estimation. However, traditional analytical architecture-level power models are inaccurate. The recently proposed machine learning (ML)-based architecture-level power model requires sufficient data from known configurations for training, making it unrealistic. In this work, we propose AutoPower targeting fully automated architecture-level power modeling with limited known design configurations. We have two key observations: (1) The clock and SRAM dominate the power consumption of the processor, and (2) The clock and SRAM power correlate with structural information available at the architecture level. Based on these two observations, we propose the power group decoupling in AutoPower. First, AutoPower decouples across power groups to build individual power models for each group. Second, AutoPower designs power models by further decoupling the model into multiple sub-models within each power group. In our experiments, AutoPower can achieve a low mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of $4.36 \%$ and a high $R^{2}$ of 0.96 even with only two known configurations for training. This is $5 \%$ lower in MAPE and 0.09 higher in $R^{2}$ compared with McPAT-Calib, the representative ML-based power model.
papers.abstract_zh: 功效是现代 CPU 设计中的一个关键设计目标。架构师需要快速而准确的架构级功耗评估工具来执行早期功耗估计。然而，传统的分析架构级功耗模型并不准确。最近提出的基于机器学习（ML）的架构级功耗模型需要来自已知配置的足够数据进行训练，这使其不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出 AutoPower，其目标是使用有限的已知设计配置进行全自动架构级功耗建模。我们有两个关键观察结果：(1) 时钟和 SRAM 主导处理器的功耗，(2) 时钟和 SRAM 功耗与架构级别可用的结构信息相关。基于这两个观察，我们提出了 AutoPower 中的电源组解耦。首先，AutoPower 解耦各个电源组，为每个组构建单独的电源模型。其次，AutoPower 通过将模型进一步解耦为每个电源组内的多个子模型来设计电源模型。在我们的实验中，即使只有两种已知的训练配置，AutoPower 也可以实现 4.36 \%$ 的低平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE) 和 0.96 的高 $R^{2}$。与基于 ML 的代表性功率模型 McPAT-Calib 相比，MAPE 低 $5 \%$，$R^{2}$ 高 0.09。

papers.title: AutoRE: Bayesian-Optimization-based Automatic Reliability Enhancement Tool for Flow-based Microfluidic Biochips.
papers.abstract: As an emerging platform for biochemical experiments, flow-based microfluidic biochips are currently suffering from malfunctions caused by manufacturing defects, thereby having low yield. While many related studies have been conducted and reliability quantification models have been published, layout optimization methods are yet lacking. In this paper, we propose AutoRE, the first tool to automatically enhance reliability by optimizing layouts. AutoRE varies the layout within a certain range without changing its topology, and adopts Bayesian optimization (BO) to identify the most reliable variant. Experimental results demonstrate that AutoRE can efficiently and effectively improve the reliability across all testcases by around 40% on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一种新兴的生化实验平台，基于流的微流控生物芯片目前因制造缺陷而导致故障，导致良率较低。尽管已经进行了许多相关研究并发表了可靠性量化模型，但仍缺乏布局优化方法。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoRE，这是第一个通过优化布局自动增强可靠性的工具。 AutoRE在不改变其拓扑的情况下在一定范围内改变布局，并采用贝叶斯优化（BO）来识别最可靠的变体。实验结果表明，AutoRE 可以高效、有效地将所有测试用例的可靠性平均提高约 40%。

papers.title: AutoSkewBMT: Autonomously Synthesizing Optimized Integrity Authentication Mechanism for DNN Accelerators.
papers.abstract: As domain-specific accelerators for deep neural network (DNN) inference gain popularity due to their performance and flexibility advantages over general-purpose systems, the security of accelerator data in memory has emerged as a significant concern. However, the overhead associated with standard memory security measures, such as encryption and integrity authentication, presents a major challenge for accelerators, particularly given the high throughput demands of typical DNN applications [1]. In this work, we present AutoSkewBMT, a security framework that autonomously generates optimized integrity system configurations to enhance the Bonsai Merkle Tree (BMT)-based integrity authentication workflow for DNN accelerators. The framework leverages a novel and efficient design space generation algorithm to optimally skew the BMT for specific workloads. Configurations generated by AutoSkewBMT outperform recent state-of-the-art solutions by up to 32% on general DNN workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着用于深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理的领域特定加速器因其相对于通用系统的性能和灵活性优势而受到欢迎，内存中加速器数据的安全性已成为一个重要问题。然而，与标准内存安全措施（例如加密和完整性验证）相关的开销给加速器带来了重大挑战，特别是考虑到典型 DNN 应用的高吞吐量需求 [1]。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AutoSkewBMT，这是一个安全框架，可以自动生成优化的完整性系统配置，以增强 DNN 加速器基于 Bonsai Merkle Tree (BMT) 的完整性身份验证工作流程。 The framework leverages a novel and efficient design space generation algorithm to optimally skew the BMT for specific workloads. Configurations generated by AutoSkewBMT outperform recent state-of-the-art solutions by up to 32% on general DNN workloads.

papers.title: BBAL: A Bidirectional Block Floating Point-Based Quantisation Accelerator for Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs), with their billions of parameters, pose substantial challenges for deployment on edge devices, straining both memory capacity and computational resources. Block Floating Point (BFP) quantisation reduces memory and computational overhead by converting high-overhead floating point operations into low-bit fixed point operations. However, BFP requires aligning all data to the maximum exponent, which causes loss of small and moderate values, resulting in quantisation error and degradation in the accuracy of LLMs. To address this issue, we propose a Bidirectional Block Floating Point (BBFP) data format, which reduces the probability of selecting the maximum as shared exponent, thereby reducing quantisation error. By utilizing the features in BBFP, we present a full-stack Bidirectional Block Floating Point-Based Quantisation Accelerator for LLMs (BBAL), primarily comprising a processing element array based on BBFP, paired with proposed cost-effective nonlinear computation unit. Experimental results show BBAL achieves a 22% improvement in accuracy compared to an outlier-aware accelerator at similar efficiency, and a 40% efficiency improvement over a BFP-based accelerator at similar accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 具有数十亿个参数，对边缘设备上的部署提出了巨大的挑战，导致内存容量和计算资源紧张。块浮点 (BFP) 量化通过将高开销浮点运算转换为低位定点运算来减少内存和计算开销。然而，BFP 要求将所有数据对齐到最大指数，这会导致小值和中等值的丢失，从而导致量化误差和 LLM 准确性的下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双向块浮点（BBFP）数据格式，它减少了选择最大值作为共享指数的概率，从而减少了量化误差。通过利用 BBFP 中的功能，我们提出了一种用于 LLM 的全栈双向块基于浮点的量化加速器（BBAL），主要包括基于 BBFP 的处理元件阵列，并与所提出的经济有效的非线性计算单元配对。实验结果表明，与具有相似效率的异常值感知加速器相比，BBAL 的精度提高了 22%；在相似精度下，与基于 BFP 的加速器相比，BBAL 的效率提高了 40%。

papers.title: BEVSA: A Real-Time Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation Accelerator for Multi-Camera System.
papers.abstract: A bird’s-eye-view (BEV) semantic segmentation accelerator (BEVSA) is proposed for real-time 3D space perception in multi-camera system (MCS). The view transformation from multi-camera-view to BEV obstructs the real-time operation on edge devices through 68.3 ms of time consumption during BEV pooling, which requires sorting and irregular memory access over wide searching space. Moreover, the 69.1% high average input activation sparsity of the segmentation process for the transformed BEV features results in excessive meaningless computations. For the real-time implementation of BEV semantic segmentation on edge platforms, this paper proposes two key features: 1) Block-decomposed hierarchical BEV pooling cluster that partitions the searching space in an MCS-suitable way and supports parallel pooling, achieving $43.2 \times$ speedup for BEV pooling over the edge computing platform; 2) Coarse-to-fine-grained zero skipping convolution cluster, which conducts coarse-grained zero skipping for all-zero channels and tile-wise fine-grained zero skipping, improving the convolution throughput by $1.61 \times$. Implemented with 28 nm technology, and evaluated on two representative MCS datasets, BEVSA finally achieves 23.1 frames-per-second of real-time BEV segmentation throughput with $167.4 \times$ higher energy-per-frame over the edge computing platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 提出了一种鸟瞰 (BEV) 语义分割加速器 (BEVSA)，用于多摄像头系统 (MCS) 中的实时 3D 空间感知。从多摄像机视图到 BEV 的视图转换阻碍了边缘设备上的实时操作，BEV 池化期间消耗了 68.3 毫秒的时间，这需要在广泛的搜索空间上进行排序和不规则的内存访问。此外，转换后的 BEV 特征的分割过程的平均输入激活稀疏度高达 69.1%，导致过多的无意义计算。对于边缘平台上 BEV 语义分割的实时实现，本文提出了两个关键特征：1）分块分解的分层 BEV 池化集群，以适合 MCS 的方式划分搜索空间并支持并行池化，在边缘计算平台上实现 BEV 池化 43.2 美元的加速； 2）粗粒度到细粒度的跳零卷积簇，对全零通道进行粗粒度的跳零，并进行tile-wise细粒度的跳零，将卷积吞吐量提高了1.61倍。 BEVSA 采用 28 nm 技术实现，并在两个代表性的 MCS 数据集上进行评估，最终实现了每秒 23.1 帧的实时 BEV 分段吞吐量，每帧能量比边缘计算平台高出 167.4 美元\倍$。

papers.title: BiNeuroRAM: Energy-Efficient ReRAM-Based PIM for Accurate Bipolar Spiking Neural Network Acceleration.
papers.abstract: ReRAM is a promising non-volatile memory for neuromor-phic accelerators, yet it faces challenges such as high sensing power and accuracy degradation. This work proposes BiNeuroRAM, a novel spiking neural network (SNN) accelerator leveraging ReRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM), with three key contributions: (1) It is the first to support higher-accuracy spike-tracing bipolar-integrate-and-fire (ST-BIF) neurons, achieving 80.9% accuracy on ImageNet, 8.4% higher than the previous state-of-the-art; (2) It introduces a low-power voltage sense amplifier (LPVSA) that reduces ReRAM read power by 14.7~58.2×, enhancing energy efficiency; (3) It employs an asynchronous micro-architecture that fully exploits the event-driven nature of SNNs. Experimental results show that BiNeuroRAM improves throughput density and energy efficiency by 2.08× and 2.09× on ImageNet with ResNet-18, compared to traditional integrate-and-fire (IF) neuron-based SNN accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: ReRAM 是一种很有前景的神经形态加速器非易失性存储器，但它面临着高传感功率和精度下降等挑战。这项工作提出了 BiNeuroRAM，一种利用基于 ReRAM 的内存处理（PIM）的新型尖峰神经网络（SNN）加速器，具有三个关键贡献：（1）它是第一个支持更高精度尖峰跟踪双极积分激发（ST-BIF）神经元的技术，在 ImageNet 上实现了 80.9% 的准确率，比之前最先进的技术高出 8.4%； （2）引入低功耗电压感应放大器（LPVSA），将ReRAM读取功耗降低14.7~58.2倍，提高能效； (3)它采用异步微架构，充分利用了SNN的事件驱动特性。实验结果表明，与传统的基于集成和激发 (IF) 神经元的 SNN 加速器相比，BiNeuroRAM 在使用 ResNet-18 的 ImageNet 上将吞吐量密度和能源效率提高了 2.08 倍和 2.09 倍。

papers.title: BirdMoE: Reducing Communication Costs for Mixture-of-Experts Training Using Load-Aware Bi-random Quantization.
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model parallelism is prevalent in training Large Language Models (e.g., ChatGPT). However, the intensive all-to-all collective communication of the MoE layer’s intermediate computing results substantially degrades MoE training efficiency. In this paper, we propose BirdMoE, a novel load-aware communication compression technique with Bi-random quantization for MoE training with two core modules. Specifically, BirdMoE employs a lightweight Random Quantization (RQ) with expectation invariance property to efficiently map the floating-point intermediate computing results into integers while maintaining the MoE training quality. Additionally, BirdMoE utilizes a Mixed Precision (MP) strategy to dynamically balance the communication loads among expert nodes, significantly improving all-to-all communication efficiency for the MoE training system. Experiments on four typical MoE training tasks demonstrate that BirdMoE achieves higher $4.06 \times- 10.44 \times$ total communication compression ratios and $1.18 \times-5.27 \times$ training speedup compared with the state-of-the-art compression techniques while maintaining the MoE training quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合专家 (MoE) 模型并行性在训练大型语言模型（例如 ChatGPT）中很普遍。然而，MoE层中间计算结果的密集的全对所有集体通信极大地降低了MoE的训练效率。在本文中，我们提出了 BirdMoE，一种新颖的负载感知通信压缩技术，具有双随机量化功能，用于具有两个核心模块的 MoE 训练。具体来说，BirdMoE 采用具有期望不变性的轻量级随机量化（RQ）来有效地将浮点中间计算结果映射为整数，同时保持 MoE 训练质量。此外，BirdMoE利用混合精度（MP）策略动态平衡专家节点之间的通信负载，显着提高MoE训练系统的全面通信效率。对四个典型 MoE 训练任务的实验表明，与最先进的压缩技术相比，BirdMoE 在保持 MoE 训练质量的同时，实现了更高的 $4.06 \times- 10.44 \times$ 总通信压缩比和 $1.18 \times-5.27 \times$ 训练加速。

papers.title: BitPattern: Enabling Efficient Bit-Serial Acceleration of Deep Neural Networks through Bit-Pattern Pruning.
papers.abstract: Bit-serial computation shows promise for accelerating deep neural networks (DNNs) by exploiting inherent bit sparsity. However, the original unstructured bit sparsity poses two major challenges for existing bit-serial accelerators (BSA): (1) workload imbalance from irregular bit distribution, and (2) inefficient memory access due to unpredictable non-zero bit locations. To address these issues, this paper proposes BitPattern, an algorithm/hardware co-design to efficiently accelerate bitserial computation through bit-pattern pruning. At the algorithm level, we employ bit-pattern pruning to identify optimal combinations of predefined patterns and apply compression encoding to minimize weight storage. We further devise a pattern-similaritybased merging method to balance the bit-serial workload. At the hardware level, we co-design a bit-serial accelerator with a dedicated bit-pattern decoder and PE to leverage the potential of structured bit-pattern sparsity. The evaluation on several deep learning benchmarks shows that BitPattern can achieve $1.72 \times$ memory reduction with negligible accuracy loss, and up to $2.11 \times$ speedup and $1.86 \times$ energy saving compared to state-of-the-art bit-serial accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 位串行计算有望通过利用固有的位稀疏性来加速深度神经网络 (DNN)。然而，原始的非结构化位稀疏性给现有的位串行加速器（BSA）带来了两个主要挑战：（1）不规则位分布导致的工作负载不平衡，以及（2）由于不可预测的非零位位置导致的低效内存访问。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了 BitPattern，一种算法/硬件协同设计，可通过位模式修剪有效加速位串行计算。在算法层面，我们采用位模式修剪来识别预定义模式的最佳组合，并应用压缩编码来最小化权重存储。我们进一步设计了一种基于模式相似性的合并方法来平衡位串行工作负载。在硬件层面，我们共同设计了一个带有专用位模式解码器和 PE 的位串行加速器，以利用结构化位模式稀疏性的潜力。对多个深度学习基准的评估表明，与最先进的位串行加速器相比，BitPattern 可以减少 1.72 美元的内存，而精度损失可以忽略不计，并实现高达 2.11 美元的加速和 1.86 美元的节能。

papers.title: BlasPart: A Deterministic Parallel Partitioner for Balanced Large-Scale Hypergraph Partitioning.
papers.abstract: Balanced hypergraph partitioning is a fundamental problem in applications like VLSI design, high-performance computing, etc. Nowadays, large-scale hypergraphs become more common due to the increasing complexity of modern systems. Thus, fast and high-quality deterministic partitioning algorithms are largely in demand. Regarding the quality of partitioning, balance is a critical concern when the number of partitions increases. In this paper, we propose BlasPart, a deterministic parallel algorithm for balanced large-scale hypergraph partitioning. BlasPart leverages a recursive multilevel bisection framework to achieve high-quality partitions while ensuring deterministic outcomes. A level-dependent balance constraint is also proposed to further improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed partitioner. Extensive experiments, with comparisons to the state-of-the-art partitioners (hMETIS, BiPart, and Mt-KaHyParSDet), demonstrate that BlasPart achieves better balance and scalability while maintaining competitive partitioning quality and efficiency. BlasPart runs $3.33 \times$ faster than Mt-KaHyPar-SDet on average for a 4096-way partitioning task on six benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 平衡超图划分是超大规模集成电路设计、高性能计算等应用中的一个基本问题。如今，由于现代系统的复杂性不断增加，大规模超图变得更加普遍。因此，迫切需要快速且高质量的确定性划分算法。关于分区的质量，当分区数量增加时，平衡是一个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了 BlasPart，一种用于平衡大规模超图划分的确定性并行算法。 BlasPart 利用递归多级二分框架来实现高质量分区，同时确保确定性结果。还提出了与级别相关的平衡约束，以进一步提高所提出的分区器的效率和有效性。大量实验与最先进的分区器（hMETIS、BiPart 和 Mt-KaHyParSDet）进行比较，表明 BlasPart 实现了更好的平衡和可扩展性，同时保持了具有竞争力的分区质量和效率。对于 6 个基准上的 4096 路分区任务，BlasPart 的平均运行速度比 Mt-KaHyPar-SDet 快 3.33 美元。

papers.title: Blaze: An Efficient Bit-Sparse Attention Architecture With Workload Orchestration Optimization.
papers.abstract: The attention mechanism is a core neural network primitive widely utilized in state-of-the-art models of Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications. However, the high computational complexity and substantial power consumption hinder its deployment and efficient inference. To address these challenges, various methods leveraging sparsity and quantization have been proposed. Compared to these methods, the exploitation of abundant bit-level sparsity in attention-based models presents great potential for the performance enhancement of attention inference. Existing bit-sparsity optimization methods primarily focus on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), which are not ideally suitable for the attention mechanism, and they have not effectively solved the workload imbalance and hardware under-utilization issues caused by the irregular distribution of non-zero bits in tensor data. In this work, we introduce Blaze, an efficient attention architecture that leverages both value and bit-level sparsity in tensor data along with workload orchestration optimization. To mitigate the workload imbalance issues often encountered by sparse bit-serial architecture, we propose an Approximate-Computing-Based (ACB) workload orchestration mechanism. Additionally, to fully exploit the redundancy in the attention mechanism, we propose a Leading-Booth mechanism to further enhance the performance of attention computation. We also design a reconfigurable computing engine to support both mechanisms. Experimental results indicate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, our Blaze can achieve $2.37 \times \sim 6.18 \times$ improvement in performance and $9.69 \times \sim 43.96 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency. Our accelerator can reach up to $1.58 \times$ speedup in attention computing performance compared with the SOTA bit-sparse accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 注意力机制是核心神经网络原语，广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）应用的最先进模型中。 However, the high computational complexity and substantial power consumption hinder its deployment and efficient inference. To address these challenges, various methods leveraging sparsity and quantization have been proposed.与这些方法相比，在基于注意力的模型中利用丰富的位级稀疏性为注意力推理的性能增强提供了巨大的潜力。现有的位稀疏性优化方法主要集中在卷积神经网络（CNN）上，它们不太适合注意力机制，并且没有有效解决张量数据中非零位的不规则分布引起的工作负载不平衡和硬件利用率不足的问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Blaze，这是一种高效的注意力架构，它利用张量数据中的值和位级稀疏性以及工作负载编排优化。为了缓解稀疏位串行架构经常遇到的工作负载不平衡问题，我们提出了一种基于近似计算（ACB）的工作负载编排机制。此外，为了充分利用注意力机制中的冗余，我们提出了一种Leading-Booth机制来进一步增强注意力计算的性能。 We also design a reconfigurable computing engine to support both mechanisms. Experimental results indicate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, our Blaze can achieve $2.37 \times \sim 6.18 \times$ improvement in performance and $9.69 \times \sim 43.96 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency. Our accelerator can reach up to $1.58 \times$ speedup in attention computing performance compared with the SOTA bit-sparse accelerator.

papers.title: BlockPIM: Optimizing Memory Management for PIM-enabled Long-Context LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: Processing-In-Memory (PIM) architectures alleviate the memory bottleneck in the decode phase of large language model (LLM) inference by performing operations like GEMV and Softmax in memory. However, the fragmented data layout in current PIM architectures limits end-to-end acceleration for long-context LLMs. In this paper, we propose BlockPIM, a cross-channel block memory layout strategy that maximizes memory utilization and eliminates the context length constraint. Additionally, we introduce a cross-channel attention computation scheme that is compatible with the current architecture to support distributed attention operations on BlockPIM. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves a 62% average throughput increase compared to existing state-of-the-art PIM solutions, enabling efficient and scalable deployment of large language models on PIM architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构通过在内存中执行 GEMV 和 Softmax 等操作，缓解了大语言模型 (LLM) 推理解码阶段的内存瓶颈。然而，当前 PIM 架构中的碎片数据布局限制了长上下文 LLM 的端到端加速。在本文中，我们提出了 BlockPIM，一种跨通道块内存布局策略，可最大化内存利用率并消除上下文长度限制。此外，我们引入了一种与当前架构兼容的跨通道注意力计算方案，以支持 BlockPIM 上的分布式注意力操作。实验结果表明，与现有最先进的 PIM 解决方案相比，我们的方法平均吞吐量提高了 62%，从而能够在 PIM 架构上高效且可扩展地部署大型语言模型。

papers.title: BLOOM: Bit-Slice Framework for DNN Acceleration with Mixed-Precision.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have revolutionized numerous AI applications, but their vast model sizes and limited hardware resources present significant deployment challenges. Model quantization offers a promising solution to bridge the gap between DNN size and hardware capacity. While INT8 quantization has been widely used, recent research has pushed for even lower precision, such as INT4. However, the presence of outliers-values with unusually large magnitudes-limits the effectiveness of current quantization techniques. Previous compression-based acceleration methods that incorporate outlieraware encoding introduce complex logic. A critical issue we have identified is that serialization and deserialization dominate the encoding/decoding time in these compression workflows, leading to substantial performance penalties during workflow execution. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel computing approach and a compatible architecture design named “BLOOM”. BLOOM leverages the strengths of the “bit-slicing” method, effectively combining structured mixed-precision and bit-level sparsity with adaptive dataflow techniques. The key insight of BLOOM is that outliers require higher precision, while normal values can be processed at lower precision. By interleaving 4-bit values, we efficiently exploit the inherent sparsity in the highprecision components. As a result, the BLOOM-based accelerator outperforms the existing outlier-aware accelerators by an average $1.2 \sim 4.0 \times$ speedup and $24.6 \% \sim 71.3 \%$ energy reduction, respectively, without model accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 彻底改变了众多人工智能应用，但其庞大的模型规模和有限的硬件资源带来了巨大的部署挑战。模型量化提供了一种很有前途的解决方案，可以弥补 DNN 大小和硬件容量之间的差距。虽然 INT8 量化已被广泛使用，但最近的研究推动了更低的精度，例如 INT4。然而，异常值（具有异常大的幅度的值）的存在限制了当前量化技术的有效性。以前基于压缩的加速方法结合了异常值编码，引入了复杂的逻辑。我们发现的一个关键问题是序列化和反序列化主导了这些压缩工作流程中的编码/解码时间，导致工作流程执行期间的性能大幅下降。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的计算方法和名为“BLOOM”的兼容架构设计。 BLOOM 利用“位切片”方法的优势，有效地将结构化混合精度和位级稀疏性与自适应数据流技术相结合。 BLOOM 的关键见解是异常值需要更高的精度，而正常值可以以较低的精度进行处理。通过交织 4 位值，我们有效地利用了高精度组件中固有的稀疏性。因此，基于 BLOOM 的加速器的性能优于现有的异常值感知加速器，分别平均加速 $1.2 \sim 4.0 \times$ 和减少 $24.6 \% \sim 71.3 \%$ 能量，且没有模型精度损失。

papers.title: BoolE: Exact Symbolic Reasoning via Boolean Equality Saturation.
papers.abstract: Boolean symbolic reasoning for gate-level netlists is a critical step in verification, logic and datapath synthesis, and hardware security. Specifically, reasoning datapath and adder tree in bit-blasted Boolean networks is particularly crucial for verification and synthesis, and challenging. Conventional approaches either fail to accurately (exactly) identify the function blocks of the designs in gate-level netlist with structural hashing and symbolic propagation, or their reasoning performance is highly sensitive to structure modifications caused by technology mapping or logic optimization. This paper introduces BoolE, an exact symbolic reasoning framework for Boolean netlists using equality saturation. BoolE optimizes scalability and performance by integrating domain-specific Boolean ruleset for term rewriting. We incorporate a novel extraction algorithm into BoolE to enhance its structural insight and computational efficiency, which adeptly identifies and captures multi-input, multi-output high-level structures (e.g., full adder) in the reconstructed e-graph. Our experiments show that BoolE surpasses state-of-the-art symbolic reasoning baselines, including the conventional functional approach (ABC) and machine learning-based method (Gamora). Specifically, we evaluated its performance on various multiplier architecture with different configurations. Our results show that BoolE identifies $3.53 \times$ and $3.01 \times$ more exact full adders than ABC in carry-save array and Booth-encoded multipliers, respectively. Additionally, we integrated BoolE into multiplier formal verification tasks, where it significantly accelerates the performance of traditional formal verification tools using computer algebra, demonstrated over four orders of magnitude runtime improvements.
papers.abstract_zh: 门级网表的布尔符号推理是验证、逻辑和数据路径综合以及硬件安全的关键步骤。具体来说，位元布尔网络中的推理数据路径和加法器树对于验证和综合尤其重要，并且具有挑战性。传统方法要么无法通过结构散列和符号传播准确地识别门级网表中设计的功能块，要么其推理性能对技术映射或逻辑优化引起的结构修改高度敏感。本文介绍了 BoolE，一种使用等式饱和的布尔网表的精确符号推理框架。 BoolE 通过集成特定领域的布尔规则集进行术语重写来优化可扩展性和性能。我们将一种新颖的提取算法融入到 BoolE 中，以增强其结构洞察力和计算效率，该算法能够熟练地识别和捕获重建电子图中的多输入、多输出高级结构（例如全加器）。我们的实验表明，BoolE 超越了最先进的符号推理基线，包括传统的函数方法 (ABC) 和基于机器学习的方法 (Gamora)。具体来说，我们评估了其在具有不同配置的各种乘法器架构上的性能。我们的结果表明，在进位保存数组和 Booth 编码乘法器中，BoolE 分别比 ABC 识别出更精确的全加器 $3.53 \times$ 和 $3.01 \times$。此外，我们将 BoolE 集成到乘数形式验证任务中，显着提高了使用计算机代数的传统形式验证工具的性能，并证明了运行时改进超过四个数量级。

papers.title: BPUFuzzer: Effective Fuzz Testing for Branching Transient Execution Vulnerabilities of RISC-V CPU.
papers.abstract: This paper presents BPUFuzzer, a fuzz testing tool for detecting branching transient execution vulnerabilities in CPU RTL design. BPUFuzzer addresses two key challenges: generating testcases that capture complex control flows, and extracting essential data from vast hardware states to guide testcase selection. Utilizing a control flow graph-based testcase generation strategy with anomaly detection and employing fitness and coverage metrics, BPUFuzzer works on testcases that cover broader program flows and deliberately selects testcases to discover transient execution vulnerabilities effectively. When applied on RISC-V Boom v3, BPUFuzzer uncovered more Spectre types than the state-of-the-arts, including a previously unidentified variant, named Spectre-LOOP.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BPUFuzzer，这是一种模糊测试工具，用于检测 CPU RTL 设计中的分支瞬态执行漏洞。 BPUFuzzer 解决了两个关键挑战：生成捕获复杂控制流的测试用例，以及从大量硬件状态中提取基本数据以指导测试用例选择。 BPUFuzzer 利用基于控制流图的测试用例生成策略和异常检测，并采用适应度和覆盖率指标，处理覆盖更广泛程序流的测试用例，并故意选择测试用例以有效发现瞬态执行漏洞。当应用于 RISC-V Boom v3 时，BPUFuzzer 发现了比最先进技术更多的 Spectre 类型，包括之前未识别的变体，名为 Spectre-LOOP。

papers.title: BS-PDN-Last: Towards Optimal Power Delivery Network Design With Multifunctional Backside Metal Layers.
papers.abstract: The increasing demand to maximize PPA gains with backside metal layers has driven their function beyond power delivery. This study introduces a novel BS-PDN-last flow, crucial for leveraging multifunctional backside, by deferring power routing to the post-signal routing stage. This approach addresses the IR-drop and performance trade-offs inherent in conventional PDN-first flows. Experimental results show that the BS-PDN-last flow achieves a $90 \%$ reduction in Total Negative Slack and a $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ performance gain with BS-CDN. Additionally, our work presents the first comprehensive comparison of FS-PDN, BSPDN, and multifunctional backside designs, evaluated on both physical design and workload metrics leveraging accurate vector-based analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过背面金属层最大限度地提高 PPA 增益的需求不断增长，这推动了它们的功能超越了电力传输。本研究引入了一种新颖的 BS-PDN-last 流程，通过将电源路由推迟到后信号路由阶段，对于利用多功能背面至关重要。该方法解决了传统 PDN 优先流中固有的 IR 压降和性能权衡问题。实验结果表明，BS-PDN-last 流将总负裕度减少了 $90 \%$，并通过 BS-CDN 实现了 $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ 性能增益。此外，我们的工作首次对 FS-PDN、BSPDN 和多功能背面设计进行了全面比较，并利用基于矢量的精确分析对物理设计和工作负载指标进行了评估。

papers.title: Buffer Prospector: Discovering and Exploiting Untapped Buffer Resources in Many-Core DNN Accelerators.
papers.abstract: In large-scale DNN inference accelerators, the many-core architecture has emerged as a predominant design, with layer-pipeline (LP) mapping being a mainstream mapping approach. However, our experimental findings and theoretical justifications uncover a hardware-independent and prevalent flaw in employing layer-pipeline mapping on many-core accelerators: a significant underutilization of buffer space across numerous cores, indicating substantial potential for optimization. Building on this discovery, we develop a universal and efficient buffer allocation strategy, BufferProspector, which includes a Buffer Requirement Calculator and Buffer Allocator, to capitalize on these unused buffers, addressing the timing mismatch challenge inherent in LP mapping. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) open-source LP mapping framework Tangram, BufferProspector averages a simultaneous increase in energy efficiency and performance by 1.44× and 2.26×, respectively. Moreover, we conduct some case studies on architecture and mapping. BufferProspector will be open-sourced.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大规模DNN推理加速器中，众核架构已成为主流设计，层管道（LP）映射成为主流映射方法。然而，我们的实验结果和理论论证揭示了在多核加速器上使用层管道映射时存在的一个与硬件无关且普遍存在的缺陷：跨多个核心的缓冲区空间利用率明​​显不足，这表明优化的巨大潜力。基于这一发现，我们开发了一种通用且高效的缓冲区分配策略 BufferProspector，其中包括缓冲区需求计算器和缓冲区分配器，以利用这些未使用的缓冲区，解决 LP 映射中固有的时序不匹配挑战。与最先进（SOTA）的开源LP映射框架Tangram相比，BufferProspector平均能效和性能分别同步提高了1.44倍和2.26倍。此外，我们还进行了一些关于建筑和绘图的案例研究。 BufferProspector 将开源。

papers.title: CAE-DFKD: Bridging the Transferability Gap in Data-Free Knowledge Distillation.
papers.abstract: Data-Free Knowledge Distillation (DFKD) enables the knowledge transfer from the given pre-trained teacher network to the target student model without access to the real training data. Existing DFKD methods focus primarily on improving image recognition performance on associated datasets, often neglecting the crucial aspect of the transferability of learned representations. In this paper, we propose Category-Aware Embedding Data-Free Knowledge Distillation (CAE-DFKD), which addresses at the embedding level the limitations of previous rely on image-level methods to improve model generalization but fail when directly applied to DFKD. The superiority and flexibility of CAE-DFKD are extensively evaluated, including: i.) Significant efficiency advantages resulting from altering the generator training paradigm; ii.) Competitive performance with existing DFKD state-of-the-art methods on image recognition tasks; iii.) Remarkable transferability of data-free learned representations demonstrated in downstream tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）可以将知识从给定的预训练教师网络转移到目标学生模型，而无需访问真实的训练数据。现有的 DFKD 方法主要侧重于提高相关数据集上的图像识别性能，通常忽略了学习表示的可迁移性这一关键方面。在本文中，我们提出了类别感知嵌入无数据知识蒸馏（CAE-DFKD），它在嵌入层面解决了先前依赖图像级方法来提高模型泛化能力但直接应用于 DFKD 时失败的局限性。 CAE-DFKD 的优越性和灵活性得到了广泛的评估，包括： i.) 改变生成器训练范式带来的显着效率优势； ii.) 在图像识别任务上与现有 DFKD 最先进方法的竞争性能； iii.) 在下游任务中展示了无数据学习表征的显着可迁移性。

papers.title: CaMDN: Enhancing Cache Efficiency for Multi-tenant DNNs on Integrated NPUs.
papers.abstract: With the rapid development of DNN applications, multi-tenant execution, where multiple DNNs are co-located on a single SoC, is becoming a prevailing trend. Although many methods are proposed in prior works to improve multi-tenant performance, the impact of shared cache is not well studied. This paper proposes CaMDN, an architecture-scheduling co-design to enhance cache efficiency for multi-tenant DNNs on integrated NPUs. Specifically, a lightweight architecture is proposed to support model-exclusive, NPU-controlled regions inside shared cache to eliminate unexpected cache contention. Moreover, a cache scheduling method is proposed to improve shared cache utilization. In particular, it includes a cache-aware mapping method for adaptability to the varying available cache capacity and a dynamic allocation algorithm to adjust the usage among co-located DNNs at runtime. Compared to prior works, CaMDN reduces the memory access by 33.4% on average and achieves a model speedup of up to 2.56 × (1.88 × on average).
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 DNN 应用的快速发展，多租户执行（即多个 DNN 共同位于单个 SoC 上）正在成为流行趋势。尽管先前的工作提出了许多方法来提高多租户性能，但共享缓存的影响尚未得到很好的研究。本文提出了 CaMDN，一种架构调度协同设计，旨在提高集成 NPU 上多租户 DNN 的缓存效率。具体来说，提出了一种轻量级架构来支持共享缓存内模型独占、NPU 控制的区域，以消除意外的缓存争用。此外，提出了一种缓存调度方法来提高共享缓存利用率。特别是，它包括用于适应不同的可用缓存容量的缓存感知映射方法和用于在运行时调整共置 DNN 之间的使用的动态分配算法。与之前的工作相比，CaMDN 平均减少了 33.4% 的内存访问，并实现了高达 2.56 ×（平均 1.88 ×）的模型加速。

papers.title: Can Short Hypervectors Drive Feature-Rich GNNs? Strengthening the Graph Representation of Hyperdimensional Computing for Memory-efficient GNNs.
papers.abstract: Hyperdimensional computing (HDC) based GNNs are significantly advancing the brain-like cognition in terms of mathematical rigorousness and computational tractability. However, the researches in this field seem to have a “long vector consensus” that the length of HDC-hypervectors must be designed to mimic that of cerebellar cortex, i.e., ten thousands of bits, to express human’s feature-rich memory. To system architects, this choice presents a formidable challenge that the combination of numerous nodes and ultra-long hypervectors could create a new memory bottleneck that undermines the operational brevity from HDC. To overcome above problem, in this work, we shift our focus to rebuilding a set of more GNN-friendly HDC-operations, by which, short hypervectors are sufficient to encode rich features via enjoining the strong error tolerance of neural cognition. To achieve that, three behavioral incompatibilities of HDC with general GNNs, i.e., feature distortion, structural bias, and central-node vacancy, are found and successfully resolved for more efficient feature-extraction in graphs. Taken as a whole, a memory-efficient HDC-based GNN framework, called CiliaGraph, is designed to drive one-shot graph classifying tasks with only hundreds of bits in hypervector aggregation, which offers 1 to 2 orders of memory savings. The results show that, compared to the SOTA GNNs, CiliaGraph reduces the memory access and training latency by an average of $292 \times$ (up to $2341 \times$) and $103 \times$ (up to $313 \times$), respectively, while maintaining the competitively accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于超维计算（HDC）的 GNN 在数学严谨性和计算易处理性方面显着提高了类脑认知能力。然而，该领域的研究似乎有一个“长向量共识”，即HDC超向量的长度必须设计成模仿小脑皮层的长度，即一万位，以表达人类特征丰富的记忆。对于系统架构师来说，这种选择提出了一个巨大的挑战，即众多节点和超长超向量的组合可能会产生新的内存瓶颈，从而破坏 HDC 的操作简洁性。为了克服上述问题，在这项工作中，我们将重点转向重建一组更适合 GNN 的 HDC 操作，通过这些操作，短的超向量足以通过要求神经认知的强容错能力来编码丰富的特征。为了实现这一目标，我们发现并成功解决了 HDC 与一般 GNN 的三个行为不兼容性，即特征失真、结构偏差和中心节点空缺，以实现更高效的图中特征提取。总体而言，一种名为 CiliaGraph 的基于 HDC 的内存高效 GNN 框架旨在驱动一次性图形分类任务，在超向量聚合中仅使用数百位，可节省 1 到 2 个数量级的内存。结果表明，与 SOTA GNN 相比，CiliaGraph 分别将内存访问和训练延迟平均减少了 292 美元（高达 2341 美元）和 103 美元（高达 313 美元），同时保持了有竞争力的准确性。

papers.title: Cayman: Custom Accelerator Generation with Control Flow and Data Access Optimization.
papers.abstract: Custom accelerators enhance System-on-Chips’ performance through hardware specialization. High-level synthesis (HLS) can automatically synthesize accelerators for given kernels but requires manual selection and extraction of kernels from applications. This paper proposes Cayman, the first end-to-end framework to synthesize high-performance custom accelerators with both control flow and data access optimization. Cayman automatically selects kernels for hardware acceleration based on a hierarchical program representation, which captures kernel candidates with general control flows. Besides, Cayman optimizes accelerators with specialized processor-accelerator interfaces for data access acceleration. Cayman further introduces a novel accelerator merging mechanism to synthesize reusable accelerators. Experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that Cayman outperforms two state-of-the-art frameworks by $8.0 \times$ and $14.4 \times$.
papers.abstract_zh: 定制加速器通过硬件专业化增强片上系统的性能。高级综合 (HLS) 可以自动综合给定内核的加速器，但需要从应用程序中手动选择和提取内核。本文提出了 Cayman，这是第一个综合具有控制流和数据访问优化的高性能定制加速器的端到端框架。 Cayman 根据分层程序表示自动选择用于硬件加速的内核，该表示捕获具有通用控制流的内核候选者。此外，Cayman 通过专门的处理器加速器接口优化加速器，以实现数据访问加速。开曼进一步引入了一种新颖的加速器合并机制来合成可重复使用的加速器。各种基准的实验表明，Cayman 的性能优于两个最先进的框架 $8.0 \times$ 和 $14.4 \times$。

papers.title: Centralized Training and Decentralized Control through the Actor-Critic Paradigm for Highly Optimized Multicores.
papers.abstract: While distributed, neural-network-based resource controllers represent the state of the art for their ability to cope with the ever-expanding decision space, such approaches suffer from several limitations, like conflicting control decisions and partial observability. These effects can significantly impair the controllers’ learning capabilities and the stability of their control policies, causing substantial performance losses. We are the first to solve this problem employing a centralized training and decentralized control regime to mitigate the aforementioned limitations. Specifically, we design a centralized neural network (critic) that evaluates the behavior of multiple decentralized neural controllers (actors) in a system-wide context. The objective of our proposed technique is to maximize the performance under a temperature constraint through dynamic voltage frequency scaling. The evaluation of our technique shows its superiority over the state of the art, yielding average (peak) performance improvements of 20% (34%), which we consider a breakthrough as the gains are measured on a real-world platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然分布式、基于神经网络的资源控制器代表了其处理不断扩大的决策空间的能力的最新技术，但这种方法受到一些限制，例如冲突的控制决策和部分可观察性。这些影响会严重损害控制器的学习能力及其控制策略的稳定性，从而导致严重的性能损失。我们是第一个通过集中训练和分散控制机制来解决这个问题的人，以减轻上述限制。具体来说，我们设计了一个集中式神经网络（批评家），用于评估系统范围内多个分散式神经控制器（参与者）的行为。我们提出的技术的目标是通过动态电压频率缩放在温度限制下最大化性能。我们的技术的评估显示了它相对于最先进技术的优越性，平均（峰值）性能提高了 20% (34%)，我们认为这是一个突破，因为增益是在现实世界的平台上测量的。

papers.title: Chameleon-SAT: An Adaptive Boolean Satisfiability Accelerator Using Mixed-Signal In-Memory Computing for Versatile SAT Problems.
papers.abstract: Boolean satisfiability (SAT), the first proven nondeterministic polynominal-complete problem, is crucial in dataintensive applications. Different applications have a wide spectrum of SAT problem sets (scale, complexity) and also various solution requirements (algorithm completeness, speed). Current SAT solvers are insufficient for providing ideal solutions under different scenarios. This work presents the Chameleon-SAT, the first ASIC-based SAT accelerator that can support local search, Davis-Putnam- Logemann-Lovel, Conflict-Driven Clause Learning algorithms, while leveraging the efficient mixed-signal inmemory computing architecture to achieve orders-of-magnitude improvements in speed compared to the prior SAT solvers. By judiciously selecting the reconfiguration mode, Chameleon-SAT is able to solve a wide range of the SAT problems to achieve smallscale, high-complexity cases ($\geq 90 \times$ for 20 variables/ 86 clauses, satisfiable problems), medium-scale, structured cases ($\geq 19 \times$ for 50 variables/ 215 clauses, unsatisfiable problems), and largescale, high-complexity cases ($\geq 7 \times$ for 100 variables/ 430 clauses, satisfiable problems).
papers.abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性 (SAT) 是第一个被证明的非确定性多项式完全问题，在数据密集型应用中至关重要。不同的应用程序具有广泛的 SAT 问题集（规模、复杂性）以及不同的解决方案要求（算法完整性、速度）。目前的 SAT 求解器不足以在不同场景下提供理想的解决方案。这项工作提出了 Chameleon-SAT，这是第一个基于 ASIC 的 SAT 加速器，可以支持本地搜索、Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Lovel、冲突驱动子句学习算法，同时利用高效的混合信号内存计算架构，与之前的 SAT 求解器相比，速度实现了数量级的提高。通过明智地选择重新配置模式，Chameleon-SAT 能够解决各种 SAT 问题，以实现小规模、高复杂性情况（$\geq 90 \times$，20 个变量/ 86 个子句，可满足问题）、中等规模、结构化情况（$\geq 19 \times$，50 个变量/ 215 个子句，不可满足问题）和大规模、高复杂度情况（$\geq 7 \times$ 对于 100 个变量/ 430 个子句，可满足的问题）。

papers.title: ChatLS: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Chain-of-Thought for Logic Synthesis Script Customization.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in automating the Electronic Design Automation (EDA) process through effective integration with EDA tools. This paper targets the customization of logic synthesis scripts, which is crucial for accommodating the unique characteristics of each design in the EDA workflow. The proposed framework, called ChatLS, integrates multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, enabling LLMs to collaboratively analyze design features and precisely customize synthesis scripts. Experimental results demonstrate that ChatLS has achieved superior performance in customizing synthesis scripts with a commercial logic synthesis tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过与 EDA 工具的有效集成，在实现电子设计自动化 (EDA) 流程自动化方面展现出了巨大的潜力。本文针对逻辑综合脚本的定制，这对于适应 EDA 工作流程中每个设计的独特特征至关重要。所提出的框架称为 ChatLS，集成了多模态检索增强生成 (RAG) 和思想链 (CoT) 推理，使法学硕士能够协作分析设计特征并精确定制综合脚本。 Experimental results demonstrate that ChatLS has achieved superior performance in customizing synthesis scripts with a commercial logic synthesis tool.

papers.title: ChipAlign: Instruction Alignment in Large Language Models for Chip Design via Geodesic Interpolation.
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have expanded their application across various domains, including chip design, where domain-adapted chip models like ChipNeMo have emerged. However, these models often struggle with instruction alignment, a crucial capability for LLMs that involves following explicit human directives. This limitation impedes the practical application of chip LLMs, including serving as assistant chatbots for hardware design engineers. In this work, we introduce ChipAlign, a novel approach that utilizes a training-free model merging strategy, combining the strengths of a general instruction-aligned LLM with a chip-specific LLM. By considering the underlying manifold in the weight space, ChipAlign employs geodesic interpolation to effectively fuse the weights of input LLMs, producing a merged model that inherits strong instruction alignment and chip expertise from the respective instruction and chip LLMs. Our results demonstrate that ChipAlign significantly enhances instruction-following capabilities of existing chip LLMs, achieving up to a 26.6% improvement on the IFEval benchmark, while maintaining comparable expertise in the chip domain. This improvement in instruction alignment also translates to notable gains in instruction-involved QA tasks, delivering performance enhancements of 3.9% on the OpenROAD QA benchmark and 8.25% on production-level chip QA benchmarks, surpassing state-of-the-art baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 大语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展已将其应用扩展到各个领域，包括芯片设计，其中出现了 ChipNeMo 等适应领域的芯片模型。然而，这些模型经常难以应对指令一致性问题，而指令一致性是法学硕士的一项关键能力，涉及遵循明确的人类指令。这种限制阻碍了芯片法学硕士的实际应用，包括充当硬件设计工程师的助理聊天机器人。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ChipAlign，这是一种利用免训练模型合并策略的新颖方法，将通用指令对齐 LLM 与芯片特定 LLM 的优势结合起来。通过考虑权重空间中的底层流形，ChipAlign 采用测地线插值来有效融合输入 LLM 的权重，生成一个合并模型，该模型继承了各自指令和芯片 LLM 的强大指令对齐和芯片专业知识。我们的结果表明，ChipAlign 显着增强了现有芯片 LLM 的指令跟踪能力，在 IFEval 基准的基础上实现了高达 26.6% 的改进，同时保持了芯片领域的可比专业知识。指令对齐方面的改进还转化为指令涉及的 QA 任务的显着收益，在 OpenROAD QA 基准上实现了 3.9% 的性能增强，在生产级芯片 QA 基准上实现了 8.25% 的性能增强，超越了最先进的基准。

papers.title: ChipletEM: Physics-Based 2.5D and 3D Chiplet Heterogeneous Integration Electromigration Signoff Tool Using Coupled Stress and Thermal Simulation.
papers.abstract: A review of recent studies on up-to-date IC shows that electromigration (EM) has become one of the major challenges for 2.5D and 3D chiplet heterogeneous integration (CHI) systems. However, most existing researches on EM are focusing on 2D power delivery network without taking Through Silicon Via (TSV) and non-uniformly thermal distribution condition between dies into consideration. To address this problem, this article proposes a novel EM simulation tool ChipletEM for 2.5D and 3D CHI systems. A finite volume method (FVM) based electrical-thermal co-simulation model is employed to get initial temperature and current density inside TSV. And a finite difference time domain (FDTD) solver is used for hydrostatic stress simulation for both nucleation and postvoiding phases. Thermal migration (TM) effect is also considered in the solver. An analytical TSV thermal solver is employed for temperature distribution simulation and thermal dependent current simulation. The FDTD EM solver and TSV thermal solver are coupled together at each time step so that the interaction among EM stress, thermal stress, void growth, resistance change, IR drop and Joule heating effects can be simulated within a single simulation framework. Simulation results show that compared with Finite Element Method (FEM) tool, average error is 0.61% in nucleation phase and 2.4% in growth phase. And the error of proposed method is reduced from 22.22% to 5.24% compared with state of art atomic flux divergence (AFD) method.
papers.abstract_zh: 对最新 IC 研究的回顾表明，电迁移 (EM) 已成为 2.5D 和 3D 小芯片异构集成 (CHI) 系统的主要挑战之一。然而，大多数现有的 EM 研究都集中在 2D 电力传输网络上，而没有考虑硅通孔 (TSV) 和芯片之间的不均匀热分布条件。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于 2.5D 和 3D CHI 系统的新型电磁仿真工具 ChipletEM。采用基于有限体积法 (FVM) 的电热联合仿真模型来获得 TSV 内部的初始温度和电流密度。时域有限差分 (FDTD) 求解器用于成核和空洞后阶段的静水应力模拟。求解器中还考虑了热迁移 (TM) 效应。采用分析 TSV 热解算器进行温度分布仿真和热相关电流仿真。 FDTD EM 求解器和 TSV 热求解器在每个时间步耦合在一起，以便可以在单个仿真框架内模拟 EM 应力、热应力、空洞生长、电阻变化、IR 降和焦耳热效应之间的相互作用。仿真结果表明，与有限元法（FEM）工具相比，形核阶段平均误差为0.61%，生长阶段平均误差为2.4%。与现有的原子通量散度（AFD）方法相比，该方法的误差从 22.22% 降低到 5.24%。

papers.title: CHORD: Composable Hybrid Optical Reconfigurable Diffractive Framework For Optical Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Diffractive optical neural networks (DONNs), leveraging freespace light wave propagation for ultra-parallel, high-efficiency computing, have emerged as promising artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators. However, their inherent lack of reconfigurability due to fixed optical structures postfabrication hinders practical deployment in the face of dynamic AI workloads and evolving applications. To overcome this challenge, we introduce, for the first time, a composable hybrid optical reconfigurable diffractive framework (CHORD), a physically composable architecture that unlocks a new degree of freedom and unprecedented versatility in DONNs. By leveraging full-system learnability, CHORD repurposes fixed fabricated optical hardware, achieving exponentially expanded functionality and superior task adaptability through the differentiable learning of system variables. Furthermore, CHORD adopts a hybrid optical/photonic design, combining the reconfigurability of integrated photonics with the ultra-parallelism of free-space diffractive systems. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that CHORD has digital-comparable accuracy on various task adaptations with $74 \times$ faster speed and $194 \times$ lower energy. Compared to prior DONNs, CHORD shows exponentially larger functional space with $5 \times$ faster training speed, paving the way for a new paradigm of versatile, composable, hybrid optical/photonic AI computing. Our code is open-sourced at link<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>github.com/ScopeX-ASU/CHORD
papers.abstract_zh: 衍射光学神经网络 (DONN) 利用自由空间光波传播进行超并行、高效计算，已成为有前景的人工智能 (AI) 加速器。然而，由于制造后的固定光学结构，它们固有地缺乏可重构性，这阻碍了面对动态人工智能工作负载和不断发展的应用程序的实际部署。为了克服这一挑战，我们首次引入了可组合的混合光学可重构衍射框架（CHORD），这是一种物理可组合的架构，可以释放 DONN 的新自由度和前所未有的多功能性。通过利用全系统的可学习性，CHORD 重新利用固定制造的光学硬件，通过系统变量的微分学习实现指数级扩展的功能和卓越的任务适应性。此外，CHORD采用混合光学/光子设计，将集成光子学的可重构性与自由空间衍射系统的超并行性相结合。广泛的评估表明，CHORD 在各种任务适应方面具有与数字相当的准确性，速度提高了 74 美元，能耗降低了 194 美元。与之前的 DONN 相比，CHORD 显示了指数级更大的功能空间和快 5 美元的训练速度，为多功能、可组合、混合光学/光子 AI 计算的新范例铺平了道路。我们的代码是开源的，链接为<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>github.com/ScopeX-ASU/CHORD

papers.title: CIM-BLAS: Computing-in-Memory Accelerator for BLAS.
papers.abstract: Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS) is a foundational software library for linear algebra kernels, which is widely used in scientific and engineering computing. Existing BLAS accelerations mainly rely on CPUs and GPUs. Many operations in BLAS are data intensive, so they are constrained by the limited memory bandwidth of CPUs and GPUs. The computing-in-memory (CIM) technology can effectively alleviate the memory wall bottleneck and is particularly suitable for accelerating BLAS. In this paper, we propose the first CIM accelerator for BLAS, CIM-BLAS, based on non-volatile memory. CIM-BLAS includes a unified floating-point pipeline to support high-precision arithmetics. High efficiency of the accelerator is achieved by developing configurable data flows to support various BLAS functions. Compared with GPU implementations, CIMBLAS demonstrates several orders of magnitude performance and energy efficiency improvements for executing level-1 and level-2 BLAS functions, and can achieve an energy efficiency improvement of 2.6-24.1 $\times$ for executing level-3 BLAS functions. The improvement increases with the size of the matrix, indicating excellent scalability of CIM-BLAS. Application-level evaluations also demonstrate the potential of CIM for accelerating BLAS.
papers.abstract_zh: 基本线性代数子程序 (BLAS) 是线性代数核的基础软件库，广泛应用于科学和工程计算。现有的BLAS加速主要依赖CPU和GPU。 BLAS 中的许多操作都是数据密集型的，因此它们受到 CPU 和 GPU 有限的内存带宽的限制。内存计算（CIM）技术可以有效缓解内存墙瓶颈，特别适合加速BLAS。在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于非易失性存储器的 BLAS CIM 加速器 CIM-BLAS。 CIM-BLAS 包括一个统一的浮点管道来支持高精度算术。通过开发可配置的数据流来支持各种 BLAS 功能，可以实现加速器的高效率。与 GPU 实现相比，CIMBLAS 在执行 1 级和 2 级 BLAS 函数时表现出几个数量级的性能和能效改进，并且在执行 3 级 BLAS 函数时可以实现 2.6-24.1 $\times$ 的能效改进。改进随着矩阵的大小而增加，表明 CIM-BLAS 具有出色的可扩展性。应用程序级评估还证明了 CIM 加速 BLAS 的潜力。

papers.title: CIMFlow: An Integrated Framework for Systematic Design and Evaluation of Digital CIM Architectures.
papers.abstract: Digital Compute-in-Memory (CIM) architectures have shown great promise in Deep Neural Network (DNN) acceleration by effectively addressing the “memory wall” bottleneck. However, the development and optimization of digital CIM accelerators are hindered by the lack of comprehensive tools that encompass both software and hardware design spaces. Moreover, existing design and evaluation frameworks often lack support for the capacity constraints inherent in digital CIM architectures. In this paper, we present CIMFlow, an integrated framework that provides an out-of-the-box workflow for implementing and evaluating DNN workloads on digital CIM architectures. CIMFlow bridges the compilation and simulation infrastructures with a flexible instruction set architecture (ISA) design, and addresses the constraints of digital CIM through advanced partitioning and parallelism strategies in the compilation flow. Our evaluation demonstrates that CIMFlow enables systematic prototyping and optimization of digital CIM architectures across diverse configurations, providing researchers and designers with an accessible platform for extensive design space exploration.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存数字计算 (CIM) 架构通过有效解决“内存墙”瓶颈，在深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速方面展现出了巨大的前景。然而，数字 CIM 加速器的开发和优化因缺乏涵盖软件和硬件设计空间的综合工具而受到阻碍。此外，现有的设计和评估框架通常缺乏对数字 CIM 架构固有的容量限制的支持。在本文中，我们提出了 CIMFlow，这是一个集成框架，它提供了开箱即用的工作流程，用于在数字 CIM 架构上实施和评估 DNN 工作负载。 CIMFlow 通过灵活的指令集架构 (ISA) 设计连接编译和仿真基础设施，并通过编译流程中的高级分区和并行策略解决数字 CIM 的限制。我们的评估表明，CIMFlow 能够跨不同配置对数字 CIM 架构进行系统原型设计和优化，为研究人员和设计人员提供一个可进行广泛设计空间探索的可访问平台。

papers.title: CirSTAG: Circuit Stability Analysis on Graph-based Manifolds.
papers.abstract: Circuit stability (sensitivity) analysis aims to estimate the overall performance impact of variations in underlying design parameters, such as gate sizes and capacitance. This process is challenging because it often requires numerous time-consuming circuit simulations.
