In contrast, graph neural networks (GNNs) have shown remarkable effectiveness and efficiency in tackling several chip design automation issues, including circuit timing predictions, parasitic prediction, gate sizing, and device placement. This paper introduces a novel approach called CirSTAG, which utilizes GNNs to analyze the stability (robustness) of modern integrated circuits (ICs). CirSTAG is grounded in a spectral framework that examines the stability of GNNs by leveraging input/output graph-based manifolds. When two adjacent nodes on the input manifold are mapped (through a GNN model) to two remote nodes (data samples) on the output manifold, this indicates a significant mapping distortion (DMD) and consequently poor GNN stability. CirSTAG calculates a stability score equivalent to the local Lipschitz constant for each node and edge, considering both graph structure and node feature perturbations. This enables the identification of the most critical (sensitive) circuit elements that could significantly impact circuit performance. Our empirical evaluations across various timing prediction tasks with realistic circuit designs demonstrate that CirSTAG can accurately estimate the stability of each circuit element under diverse parameter variations. This offers a scalable method for assessing the stability of large integrated circuit designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 电路稳定性（灵敏度）分析旨在估计基础设计参数（例如栅极尺寸和电容）变化对整体性能的影响。这个过程具有挑战性，因为它通常需要大量耗时的电路模拟。相比之下，图神经网络 (GNN) 在解决多个芯片设计自动化问题（包括电路时序预测、寄生预测、栅极尺寸和器件布局）方面表现出了显着的有效性和效率。本文介绍了一种名为 CirSTAG 的新颖方法，该方法利用 GNN 来分析现代集成电路 (IC) 的稳定性（鲁棒性）。 CirSTAG 基于谱框架，通过利用基于输入/输出图的流形来检查 GNN 的稳定性。当输入流形上的两个相邻节点（通过 GNN 模型）映射到输出流形上的两个远程节点（数据样本）时，这表明存在显着的映射失真（DMD），从而导致 GNN 稳定性较差。 CirSTAG 考虑图结构和节点特征扰动，计算相当于每个节点和边的局部 Lipschitz 常数的稳定性得分。这使得能够识别可能显着影响电路性能的最关键（敏感）电路元件。我们对各种时序预测任务和实际电路设计的实证评估表明，CirSTAG 可以准确估计每个电路元件在不同参数变化下的稳定性。这为评估大型集成电路设计的稳定性提供了一种可扩展的方法。

papers.title: Clearance-Constrained PCB Global Placement with Heterogeneous Components.
papers.abstract: The complexity of design rules and intense time-to-market demands have made auto-placement tools essential for advanced printed circuit board (PCB) designs. This paper presents a novel PCB placement framework to handle pad-to-pad clearance constraints and heterogeneous components to address these challenges. Unlike existing academic placers, our framework focuses on the following key features: a wire-area model to account for various routing resource needs between power and signal nets, a pad-to-pad clearance model to minimize spacing violations, and a two-sided, pad-type-aware density model to reduce component and pad overlap. We further develop a quadratic programming-based legalizer to resolve constraint violations among components of varying shapes. Experimental results show the effectiveness and efficiency of our framework, surpassing two state-of-theart academic placers in post-routing quality on both academic and industrial benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计规则的复杂性和严格的上市时间要求使得自动布局工具对于高级印刷电路板 (PCB) 设计至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的 PCB 布局框架，用于处理焊盘到焊盘间隙限制和异构组件，以应对这些挑战。与现有的学术布局器不同，我们的框架侧重于以下关键功能：用于考虑电源和信号网络之间的各种布线资源需求的布线区域模型、用于最大程度地减少间距违规的焊盘到焊盘间隙模型，以及用于减少组件和焊盘重叠的两侧焊盘类型感知密度模型。我们进一步开发了一种基于二次规划的合法化器，以解决不同形状组件之间的约束违规问题。实验结果表明我们的框架的有效性和效率，在学术和工业基准上的后路由质量方面超过了两个最先进的学术放置者。

papers.title: ClusterKV: Manipulating LLM KV Cache in Semantic Space for Recallable Compression.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely deployed in a variety of applications, and the context length is rapidly increasing to handle tasks such as long-document QA and complex logical reasoning. However, long context poses significant challenges for inference efficiency, including high memory costs of key-value (KV) cache and increased latency due to extensive memory accesses. Recent works have proposed compressing KV cache to approximate computation, but these methods either evict tokens permanently, never recalling them for later inference, or recall previous tokens at the granularity of pages divided by textual positions. Both approaches degrade the model accuracy and output quality. To achieve efficient and accurate recallable KV cache compression, we introduce ClusterKV, which recalls tokens at the granularity of semantic clusters. We design and implement efficient algorithms and systems for clustering, selection, indexing and caching. Experiment results show that ClusterKV attains negligible accuracy loss across various tasks with 32 k context lengths, using only a 1 k to 2 k KV cache budget, and achieves up to a $2 \times$ speedup in latency and a $2.5 \times$ improvement in decoding throughput. Compared to SoTA recallable KV compression methods, ClusterKV demonstrates higher model accuracy and output quality, while maintaining or exceeding inference efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/ClusterKV.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）已广泛部署在各种应用中，并且上下文长度正在迅速增加，以处理长文档 QA 和复杂逻辑推理等任务。然而，长上下文对推理效率提出了重大挑战，包括键值 (KV) 缓存的高内存成本以及由于大量内存访问而导致的延迟增加。最近的工作提出了压缩 KV 缓存以近似计算，但这些方法要么永久地逐出令牌，从不召回它们以供以后的推理，要么以按文本位置划分的页面粒度召回先前的令牌。这两种方法都会降低模型的准确性和输出质量。为了实现高效、准确的可召回 KV 缓存压缩，我们引入了 ClusterKV，它以语义簇的粒度召回 token。我们设计并实现高效的聚类、选择、索引和缓存算法和系统。实验结果表明，ClusterKV 仅使用 1 k 到 2 k KV 缓存预算，在 32 k 上下文长度的各种任务中实现了可忽略不计的精度损失，并实现了高达 2 美元的延迟加速和 2.5 美元的解码吞吐量改进。与 SoTA 可调用 KV 压缩方法相比，ClusterKV 表现出更高的模型精度和输出质量，同时保持或超过推理效率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/ClusterKV 获取。

papers.title: CMFuzz: Parallel Fuzzing of IoT Protocols by Configuration Model Identification and Scheduling.
papers.abstract: IoT protocols are essential for the communication among diverse devices. In real-world scenarios, IoT protocols utilize flexible configurations to meet various use cases. These configurations can significantly impact the protocols’ execution paths, with many bugs emerging only under specific configurations. Fuzzing has become a prominent technique for uncovering vulnerabilities in IoT protocol implementations. However, traditional fuzzing approaches are typically conducted using fixed or default configurations, overlooking potential issues that might arise in different settings. This limitation can lead to missing critical bugs that appear only under alternative configurations.In this paper, we propose CMFuzz, a parallel fuzzing framework designed to improve fuzzing effectiveness of IoT protocols through configuration identification and scheduling. CMFuzz first constructs a generalized protocol configuration model by systematically extracting configuration items from protocol implementations. Then, based on this model, CMFUZZ defines the relations among configuration items and introduces a relation-aware allocation mechanism to distribute them across parallel fuzzing instances. For evaluation, We implement CMFuzz on top of the widely-used protocol fuzzer Peach and conduct experiments on six popular IoT protocols. Compared to the original parallel mode of Peach and state-of-the-art parallel protocol fuzzer SPFuzz, CMFuzz covers an average of 34.4% and 28.5% more branches within 24 hours. Additionally, CMFuzz has detected 14 previously-unknown bugs in these real-world IoT protocols.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网协议对于不同设备之间的通信至关重要。在现实场景中，物联网协议利用灵活的配置来满足各种用例。这些配置可以显着影响协议的执行路径，许多错误仅在特定配置下出现。模糊测试已成为发现物联网协议实施中漏洞的一项重要技术。然而，传统的模糊测试方法通常使用固定或默认配置进行，忽略了不同设置中可能出现的潜在问题。这种限制可能会导致丢失仅在替代配置下出现的关键错误。在本文中，我们提出了 CMFuzz，这是一种并行模糊测试框架，旨在通过配置识别和调度来提高物联网协议的模糊测试有效性。 CMFuzz首先通过从协议实现中系统地提取配置项来构建通用的协议配置模型。然后，基于该模型，CMFUZZ 定义了配置项之间的关系，并引入了关系感知分配机制将它们分布在并行模糊测试实例中。为了进行评估，我们在广泛使用的协议模糊器 Peach 之上实现了 CMFuzz，并对六种流行的 IoT 协议进行了实验。与 Peach 的原始并行模式和最先进的并行协议模糊器 SPFuzz 相比，CMFuzz 在 24 小时内平均多覆盖 34.4% 和 28.5% 的分支。此外，CMFuzz 还在这些现实世界的 IoT 协议中检测到了 14 个以前未知的错误。

papers.title: CND-IDS: Continual Novelty Detection for Intrusion Detection Systems.
papers.abstract: Intrusion detection systems (IDS) play a crucial role in IoT and network security by monitoring system data and alerting to suspicious activities. Machine learning (ML) has emerged as a promising solution for IDS, offering highly accurate intrusion detection. However, ML-IDS solutions often overlook two critical aspects needed to build reliable systems: continually changing data streams and a lack of attack labels. Streaming network traffic and associated cyber attacks are continually changing, which can degrade the performance of deployed ML models. Labeling attack data, such as zero-day attacks, in real-world intrusion scenarios may not be feasible, making the use of ML solutions that do not rely on attack labels necessary. To address both these challenges, we propose CND-IDS, a continual novelty detection IDS framework which consists of (i) a learning-based feature extractor that continuously updates new feature representations of the system data, and (ii) a novelty detector that identifies new cyber attacks by leveraging principal component analysis (PCA) reconstruction. Our results on realistic intrusion datasets show that CND-IDS achieves up to $6.1 \times$ F-score improvement, and up to $6.5 \times$ improved forward transfer over the SOTA unsupervised continual learning algorithm. Our code is available at https://github.com/Sean-Fuhrman/CND-IDS.
papers.abstract_zh: 入侵检测系统 (IDS) 通过监控系统数据并对可疑活动发出警报，在物联网和网络安全中发挥着至关重要的作用。机器学习 (ML) 已成为一种很有前景的 IDS 解决方案，可提供高度准确的入侵检测。然而，ML-IDS 解决方案常常忽视构建可靠系统所需的两个关键方面：不断变化的数据流和缺乏攻击标签。流网络流量和相关的网络攻击不断变化，这可能会降低已部署的机器学习模型的性能。在现实世界的入侵场景中，标记攻击数据（例如零日攻击）可能并不可行，因此有必要使用不依赖攻击标签的机器学习解决方案。为了应对这两个挑战，我们提出了 CND-IDS，这是一种持续新颖性检测 IDS 框架，它由 (i) 一个基于学习的特征提取器，不断更新系统数据的新特征表示，以及 (ii) 一个新颖性检测器，通过利用主成分分析 (PCA) 重建来识别新的网络攻击。我们在真实入侵数据集上的结果表明，与 SOTA 无监督持续学习算法相比，CND-IDS 的 F 分数提高了高达 6.1 美元，前向传输提高了 6.5 美元。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Sean-Fuhrman/CND-IDS 获取。

papers.title: CognitiveArm: Enabling Real-Time EEG-Controlled Prosthetic Arm Using Embodied Machine Learning.
papers.abstract: Efficient control of prosthetic limbs via non-invasive brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) requires advanced EEG processing capabilities-including pre-filtering, feature extraction, and action pre-diction-all performed in real-time on edge AI hardware. Achieving this level of real-time processing on resource-constrained edge devices presents significant challenges in balancing model complexity, computational efficiency, and latency. We present CognitiveArm, an EEG-driven, brain-controlled prosthetic system implemented on edge AI hardware, achieving real-time performance without compromising accuracy. The system integrates BrainFlow-an open-source library for EEG data acquisition and streaming-and optimized deep learning (DL) models for precise brain signal classification. By leveraging evolutionary search, we identify Pareto-optimal DL model configurations through hyper-parameter tuning, optimizer analysis, and window selection, analyzed individually and in ensemble configurations. We further apply model compression techniques like pruning and quantization to optimize these models for embedded deployment, balancing computational efficiency and accuracy. We collected EEG dataset and designed an annotation pipeline, enabling precise labeling of brain signals corresponding to specific intended actions, which forms the foundation for training our optimized deep learning (DL) models. Our CognitiveArm system also supports voice commands for seamless mode switching, enabling control of the prosthetic arm’s 3 degrees of freedom (DoF). Running independently on embedded hardware, CognitiveArm ensures low latency and facilitates real-time interaction. We developed a full-scale prototype of the CognitiveArm, interfaced with the OpenBCI UltraCortex Mark IV EEG headset. Our evaluations demonstrate a significant improvement in accuracy, reaching up to $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$, for classifying three core actions (left, right, and stay idle). The integration of voice commands allows for multiplexed, variable movement, enabling multi-action control for various everyday tasks (e.g., handshake, cup picking). This enhances CognitiveArm’s real-world performance for prosthetic control, demonstrating its potential as a practical solution for individuals requiring advanced prosthetic limb control.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过非侵入性脑机接口 (BCI) 有效控制假肢需要先进的脑电图处理能力，包括预过滤、特征提取和动作预测，所有这些都在边缘人工智能硬件上实时执行。在资源受限的边缘设备上实现这种级别的实时处理在平衡模型复杂性、计算效率和延迟方面提出了重大挑战。我们推出了 CognitiveArm，这是一种在边缘人工智能硬件上实现的脑电图驱动、大脑控制的假肢系统，可在不影响准确性的情况下实现实时性能。该系统集成了 BrainFlow（用于脑电图数据采集和流传输的开源库）和优化的深度学习 (DL) 模型，以实现精确的大脑信号分类。通过利用进化搜索，我们通过超参数调整、优化器分析和窗口选择来识别帕累托最优深度学习模型配置，并单独进行分析和整体配置分析。我们进一步应用剪枝和量化等模型压缩技术来优化这些模型以进行嵌入式部署，平衡计算效率和准确性。我们收集了脑电图数据集并设计了一个注释管道，能够精确标记与特定预期动作相对应的大脑信号，这为训练我们优化的深度学习（DL）模型奠定了基础。我们的 CognitiveArm 系统还支持语音命令以实现无缝模式切换，从而能够控制假肢的 3 个自由度 (DoF)。 CognitiveArm 在嵌入式硬件上独立运行，可确保低延迟并促进实时交互。我们开发了 CognitiveArm 的全尺寸原型，与 OpenBCI UltraCortex Mark IV EEG 耳机连接。我们的评估表明，对三个核心动作（向左、向右和保持空闲）进行分类的准确性显着提高，达到 $\mathbf{9 0 \%}$。语音命令的集成允许进行多重、可变的运动，从而能够对各种日常任务（例如握手、拿起杯子）进行多动作控制。这增强了 CognitiveArm 在假肢控制方面的实际性能，展示了其作为需要先进假肢控制的个人的实用解决方案的潜力。

papers.title: Comparison-Free Bit-Stream Generation for Cost-Efficient Unary Computing.
papers.abstract: Today, unconventional hardware design techniques based on simple data representations are receiving more and more attention. Unary computing is one of these techniques that processes data in the form of uniform bit-streams. The simplicity of implementing complex arithmetic operations and high tolerance to noise are the crucial advantages of unary systems. However, converting data from weighed binary radix to unary representation with existing comparator-based unary number generators is expensive regarding footprint area and power consumption. The problem aggregates when the number of inputs and data precision increase. This work proposes a low-cost, comparison-free, unary number generation mechanism for efficient data conversion from binary radix to unary representation. We introduce a serial and two parallel (an exact and an approximate) unary number generators. Synthesis results show that the proposed method reduces the hardware area, power consumption, and area-delay product for both serial and parallel designs compared to the state-of-the-art converter. We evaluate the efficiency of the proposed converter in four use cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，基于简单数据表示的非常规硬件设计技术正受到越来越多的关注。一元计算是以统一比特流的形式处理数据的技术之一。实现复杂算术运算的简单性和对噪声的高容忍度是一元系统的关键优势。然而，使用现有的基于比较器的一元数字生成器将数据从加权二进制基数转换为一元表示在占地面积和功耗方面是昂贵的。当输入数量和数据精度增加时，问题就会聚集起来。这项工作提出了一种低成本、无比较的一元数生成机制，用于从二进制基数到一元表示的有效数据转换。我们引入一个串行和两个并行（精确的和近似的）一元数生成器。综合结果表明，与最先进的转换器相比，所提出的方法减少了串行和并行设计的硬件面积、功耗和面积延迟积。我们在四个用例中评估了所提出的转换器的效率。

papers.title: Comprehensive Placement and Routing Framework with Guaranteed In-Cell Routability for Synthesizing Complementary-FET Cells.
papers.abstract: As the technology node advances beyond 5 nm, the conventional FinFET architecture encounters substantial scaling issues. ComplementaryFET (CFET) technology, characterized by the vertical stacking of P-FET over N-FET or vice versa, has emerged as a promising solution. However, the inherent characteristics of CFET architecture, particularly the scarcity of routing resources, pose significant obstacles to in-cell routability and layout generation. In this paper, we develop a comprehensive placement and routing framework for synthesizing CFET cells. We first present a partitioning technique followed by a heuristic quality maintenance strategy for large-scale cells to ensure scalability and efficiency. Then, we propose a novel satisfiability modulo theories (SMT)-based placement method that incorporates partial routing to achieve minimum-width placement while ensuring in-cell routability. Particularly, the placement method also determines the pin positions for each net, which simplifies subsequent routing complexity. Finally, we propose a progressive metal routing method to address the challenges of routing resource scarcity and unidirectional routing in CFET technology, which includes a manual-inspired M0 routing followed by an integral linear programming (ILP)-based M1 and M2 routing. Compared with the state-of-the-art CFET cell generators, experimental results show that our algorithm achieves the smallest cell width for all tested cells, with 7 out of 30 cells exhibiting smaller widths. For the remaining 23 cells, which have the same cell width as those in other generators, our algorithm achieves the smallest M2 usage and total metal length.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点发展到 5 nm 以上，传统 FinFET 架构遇到了严重的缩放问题。互补 FET (CFET) 技术的特点是 P-FET 垂直堆叠在 N-FET 上，反之亦然，已成为一种有前景的解决方案。然而，CFET 架构的固有特性，特别是布线资源的稀缺性，对单元内布线和布局生成造成了重大障碍。在本文中，我们开发了一个用于合成 CFET 单元的综合布局和布线框架。我们首先提出一种分区技术，然后是大规模单元的启发式质量维护策略，以确保可扩展性和效率。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于可满足性模理论（SMT）的布局方法，该方法结合部分布线来实现最小宽度布局，同时确保单元内可布线性。特别是，布局方法还确定了每个网络的引脚位置，这简化了后续布线的复杂性。最后，我们提出了一种渐进式金属布线方法，以解决 CFET 技术中布线资源稀缺和单向布线的挑战，其中包括手动启发的 M0 布线以及基于积分线性编程 (ILP) 的 M1 和 M2 布线。与最先进的 CFET 单元生成器相比，实验结果表明，我们的算法实现了所有测试单元的最小单元宽度，30 个单元中有 7 个显示出更小的宽度。对于其余 23 个单元，其单元宽度与其他发电机中的单元宽度相同，我们的算法实现了最小的 M2 使用量和总金属长度。

papers.title: Computational Advantage in Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks: Myth or Reality?
papers.abstract: Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks (HQNNs), under the umbrella of Quantum Machine Learning (QML), have garnered significant attention due to their potential to enhance computational performance by integrating quantum layers within traditional neural network (NN) architectures. Despite numerous state-of-the-art applications, a fundamental question remains: Does the inclusion of quantum layers offer any computational advantage over purely classical models? If yes/no, how and why? In this paper, we analyze how classical and hybrid models adapt their architectural complexity in response to increasing problem complexity. To this end, we select a multiclass classification problem and perform comprehensive benchmarking of classical models for increasing problem complexity, identifying those that optimize both accuracy and computational efficiency to establish a robust baseline for comparison. These baseline models are then systematically compared with HQNNs by evaluating the rate of increase in floating-point operations (FLOPs) and number of parameters, providing insights into how architectural complexity scales with problem complexity in both classical and hybrid networks. We utilize classical machines to simulate the quantum layers in HQNNs, a common practice in Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era. Our analysis reveals that, as problem complexity increases, the architectural complexity of HQNNs, and consequently their FLOPs consumption, despite the simulation overhead associated with quantum layer’s simulation on classical hardware, scales more efficiently $(53.1 \%$ increase in FLOPs from 10 features (low problem complexity) to 110 features (high problem complexity)), compared to classical networks (88.1%). Moreover, as the problem complexity increases, classical networks consistently exhibit a need for a larger number of parameters to accommodate the increasing problem complexity. Additionally, the rate of increase in number of parameters is also slower in HQNNs (81.4%) than classical NNs (88.5%). These findings suggest that HQNNs provide a more scalable and resource-efficient solution, positioning them as a promising alternative for tackling complex computational problems.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习 (QML) 下的混合量子神经网络 (HQNN) 因其通过在传统神经网络 (NN) 架构中集成量子层来增强计算性能的潜力而受到了广泛关注。尽管有许多最先进的应用，但仍然存在一个基本问题：与纯经典模型相比，包含量子层是否具有任何计算优势？如果是/否，如何以及为什么？在本文中，我们分析了经典模型和混合模型如何调整其架构复杂性以应对日益增加的问题复杂性。为此，我们选择一个多类分类问题，并对经典模型进行全面的基准测试，以增加问题的复杂性，识别那些优化准确性和计算效率的模型，以建立稳健的比较基准。然后，通过评估浮点运算 (FLOP) 的增长率和参数数量，将这些基线模型与 HQNN 进行系统比较，从而深入了解经典网络和混合网络中的架构复杂性如何随着问题复杂性而变化。我们利用经典机器来模拟 HQNN 中的量子层，这是噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 时代的常见做法。我们的分析表明，随着问题复杂性的增加，HQNN 的架构复杂性及其 FLOP 消耗（尽管与经典硬件上的量子层模拟相关的模拟开销）与经典网络 (88.1%) 相比，可以更有效地扩展（从 10 个特征（低问题复杂性）到 110 个特征（高问题复杂性），FLOP 增加 53.1 \%$））。此外，随着问题复杂性的增加，经典网络始终表现出对大量参数的需求，以适应不断增加的问题复杂性。此外，HQNN 中参数数量的增加速度 (81.4%) 也比经典神经网络 (88.5%) 慢。这些发现表明，HQNN 提供了一种更具可扩展性和资源效率的解决方案，使它们成为解决复杂计算问题的有前途的替代方案。

papers.title: Configurable DSP-Based CAM Architecture for Data-Intensive Applications on FPGAs.
papers.abstract: Content-addressable memory (CAM) is a type of fast memory unique in its ability to perform parallel searches of stored data based on content rather than specific memory addresses. They have been used in many domains, such as networking, databases, and graph processing. Field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) are an attractive platform for implementing CAMs because of their low latency, reconfigurability, and energy-efficient nature. However, such implementations also face significant challenges, including high resource utilization, limited scalability, and suboptimal performance due to the extensive use of look-up tables (LUTs) and block RAMs (BRAMs). These issues stem from the inherent limitations of FPGA architectures when handling the parallel operations required by CAMs, often leading to inefficient designs that cannot meet the demands of high-speed, data-intensive applications. To address these challenges, we propose a novel configurable CAM architecture that leverages the digital signal processing (DSP) blocks available in modern FPGAs as the core resource. By utilizing DSP blocks’ data storage and logic capabilities, our approach enables configurable CAM architecture with efficient multi-query support while significantly reducing search and update latency for data-intensive applications. The DSP-based CAM architecture offers enhanced scalability, higher operating frequency, and improved performance compared to traditional LUT and BRAM-based designs. In addition, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed CAM architecture with a triangle counting application on real graphs. This innovative use of DSP blocks also opens up new possibilities for highperformance, data-intensive applications on FPGAs. Our proposed design is open-sourced at: https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/DSP_CAM/.
papers.abstract_zh: 内容寻址存储器 (CAM) 是一种快速存储器，其独特之处在于能够根据内容而不是特定的存储器地址对存储的数据执行并行搜索。它们已被用于许多领域，例如网络、数据库和图形处理。现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 因其低延迟、可重配置性和节能特性而成为实施 CAM 的极具吸引力的平台。然而，此类实现也面临重大挑战，包括资源利用率高、可扩展性有限，以及由于大量使用查找表 (LUT) 和块 RAM (BRAM) 而导致性能欠佳。这些问题源于 FPGA 架构在处理 CAM 所需的并行操作时的固有限制，通常会导致设计效率低下，无法满足高速、数据密集型应用的需求。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的可配置 CAM 架构，该架构利用现代 FPGA 中可用的数字信号处理 (DSP) 块作为核心资源。通过利用 DSP 块的数据存储和逻辑功能，我们的方法支持可配置的 CAM 架构，并提供高效的多查询支持，同时显着减少数据密集型应用程序的搜索和更新延迟。与传统的基于 LUT 和 BRAM 的设计相比，基于 DSP 的 CAM 架构提供了增强的可扩展性、更高的工作频率和改进的性能。此外，我们还通过真实图形上的三角形计数应用程序展示了我们提出的 CAM 架构的有效性。 DSP 模块的这种创新使用还为 FPGA 上的高性能、数据密集型应用开辟了新的可能性。我们提出的设计是开源的：https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/DSP_CAM/。

papers.title: Constraint Graph-based PCB Legalization Considering Dense, Heterogeneous, Irregular-Shaped, and Any-oriented Components.
papers.abstract: In modern printed circuit board (PCB) designs, the increasing complexity poses more challenges for automatic placement. Existing PCB placement methods cannot handle complex constraints with heterogeneous, irregular-shaped, and any-oriented components for double-sided PCB designs well. This paper proposes the first constraint graph-based legalization approach for these constraints. We use a slicing technique to model a component more accurately with a set of rectangles instead of resorting to the naive bounding box approximation. Unlike the commonly used linear programming method for macro placement in integrated circuit (IC) designs, we employ a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation to effectively expand the solution space for heterogeneous, irregular-shaped, and any-oriented components, particularly with high-density designs. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and the robustness of our work.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代印刷电路板 (PCB) 设计中，日益增加的复杂性给自动贴装带来了更多挑战。现有的 PCB 贴装方法无法很好地处理双面 PCB 设计中异构、不规则形状和任意方向元件的复杂约束。本文提出了第一个针对这些约束的基于约束图的合法化方法。我们使用切片技术通过一组矩形更准确地对组件进行建模，而不是诉诸简单的边界框近似。与集成电路 (IC) 设计中常用的宏布局线性规划方法不同，我们采用混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式来有效扩展异构、不规则形状和任意方向组件的解决方案空间，特别是高密度设计。实验结果证明了我们工作的有效性和稳健性。

papers.title: Construction of DAG Models for Autonomous Systems.
papers.abstract: Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) are widely deployed as task models in autonomous systems, including vehicles and drones, to capture functional dependency. DAG scheduling has been extensively investigated by various communities to shorten makespan, under the common assumption that the model itself is given a priori. This work studies a rarely touched problem - construction of DAG models - and considers time-triggered blended task chains predominant in autonomous systems. We report representation semantics and a topology optimization method. Experiments show that the average end-to-end response time reduction is 4.8 times of the conventional Floyd algorithm. Our time complexity is $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$, making it suitable for handling dynamic tasks as well.
papers.abstract_zh: 有向无环图 (DAG) 作为任务模型广泛部署在自主系统（包括车辆和无人机）中，以捕获功能依赖性。 DAG 调度已被各个社区广泛研究，以缩短完工时间，普遍假设模型本身是先验的。这项工作研究了一个很少涉及的问题 - DAG 模型的构建 - 并考虑了在自治系统中占主导地位的时间触发的混合任务链。我们报告表示语义和拓扑优化方法。实验表明，平均端到端响应时间降低是传统Floyd算法的4.8倍。我们的时间复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$，使其也适合处理动态任务。

papers.title: Contention-Aware Forecasting of Energy Efficiency through Sequence-Based Models in Modern Heterogeneous Processors.
papers.abstract: We present EffiCast, the first methodology for contentionaware energy efficiency forecasting in clustered heterogeneous processors using sequence-based models. Through extensive experimental analysis of energy efficiency sensitivities across core types, voltage/frequency (V/f) levels, application phases, and resource contention scenarios, EffiCast uncovers key factors driving energy efficiency variability in modern heterogeneous processors. Leveraging structured data generation and advanced LSTM- and Transformer-based models, EffiCast achieves unprecedented accuracy while outperforming state-of-the-art predictive techniques. Deployed on a real heterogenous processor with Intel’s oneDNN acceleration, EffiCast delivers inference latencies as low as 1.82 ms per sequence, enabling seamless integration into proactive resource management frameworks. With the ability to forecast future system states under dynamic workloads, EffiCast sets a new standard for energy efficiency optimization in energy-constrained application domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 EffiCast，这是第一个使用基于序列的模型在集群异构处理器中进行竞争感知能源效率预测的方法。通过对跨核心类型、电压/频率 (V/f) 级别、应用阶段和资源争用场景的能效敏感性进行广泛的实验分析，EffiCast 揭示了现代异构处理器中驱动能效变化的关键因素。利用结构化数据生成以及基于 LSTM 和 Transformer 的先进模型，EffiCast 实现了前所未有的准确性，同时超越了最先进的预测技术。 EffiCast 部署在具有英特尔 oneDNN 加速功能的真正异构处理器上，每个序列的推理延迟低至 1.82 毫秒，从而能够无缝集成到主动资源管理框架中。凭借预测动态工作负载下的未来系统状态的能力，EffiCast 为能源受限应用领域的能效优化设立了新标准。

papers.title: Cost-Distance Steiner Trees for Timing-Constrained Global Routing.
papers.abstract: The cost-distance Steiner tree problem seeks a Steiner tree that minimizes the total congestion cost plus the weighted sum of sourcesink delays. This problem arises as a subroutine in timing-constrained global routing with a linear delay model, used before buffer insertion. Here, the congestion cost and the delay of an edge are essentially uncorrelated, unlike in most other algorithms for timing-driven Steiner trees. We present a fast algorithm for the cost-distance Steiner tree problem. Its running time is $\mathcal{O}(t(n \log n+m))$, where $t, n$, and m are the numbers of terminals, vertices, and edges in the global routing graph. We also prove that our algorithm guarantees an approximation factor of $\mathcal{O}(\log t)$. This matches the best-known approximation factor for this problem, but with a much faster running time. To account for increased capacitance and delays after buffering caused by bifurcations, we incorporate a delay penalty for each bifurcation without compromising the running time or approximation factor. In our experimental results, we show that our algorithm outperforms previous methods that first compute a Steiner topology, e.g. based on shallow-light Steiner trees or the Prim-Dijkstra algorithm, and then embed this into the global routing graph.
papers.abstract_zh: 成本距离斯坦纳树问题寻求一种斯坦纳树，它可以最小化总拥塞成本加上源宿延迟的加权和。这个问题是作为具有线性延迟模型的时序约束全局路由中的子例程而出现的，在缓冲区插入之前使用。与大多数其他时序驱动斯坦纳树算法不同，这里的拥塞成本和边缘延迟本质上是不相关的。我们提出了一种用于成本距离斯坦纳树问题的快速算法。其运行时间为$\mathcal{O}(t(n \log n+m))$，其中$t、n$和m是全局路由图中终端、顶点和边的数量。我们还证明我们的算法保证了 $\mathcal{O}(\log t)$ 的近似因子。这与该问题最著名的近似因子相匹配，但运行时间要快得多。为了解决分叉引起的缓冲后电容增加和延迟的问题，我们在不影响运行时间或近似因子的情况下对每个分叉进行延迟惩罚。在我们的实验结果中，我们表明我们的算法优于之前首先计算斯坦纳拓扑的方法，例如基于浅光 Steiner 树或 Prim-Dijkstra 算法，然后将其嵌入到全局路由图中。

papers.title: CREST-CiM: Cross-Coupling-Enhanced Differential STT-MRAM for Robust Computing-in-Memory in Binary Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: We propose CREST-CiM, an STT-MRAM-based Computing-in-Memory (CiM) technique, targeted for binary neural networks. To circumvent the low-distinguishability issue in standard MRAM-based CiM, CREST-CiM utilizes two magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs) to store +1 and -1 weights in a bitcell and cross-couples the MTJs, achieving a high-to-low current ratio of up to 8100 for a bit-cell. Our analysis for $64 \times 64$ arrays shows up to 3.4 x higher CiM sense-margin, 27.6% higher read-disturb-margin, and resilience to process variations, and other hardware non-idealities, albeit at the cost of just 7.9% overall-area overhead, and $\lt1 \%$ energy and latency overhead compared to a 2T-2MTJ-CiM design. Our system-level analysis for ResNet-18 trained on CIFAR-10 shows near-sofware inference accuracy with CREST-CiM, with 10.7% improvement over 2T2MTJ baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CREST-CiM，一种基于 STT-MRAM 的内存计算 (CiM) 技术，针对二进制神经网络。为了避免基于标准 MRAM 的 CiM 中的低可分辨性问题，CREST-CiM 利用两个磁性隧道结 (MTJ) 在位单元中存储 +1 和 -1 权重，并交叉耦合 MTJ，从而为位单元实现高达 8100 的高低电流比。我们对 64 美元 × 64 美元阵列的分析显示，与 2T-2MTJ-CiM 设计相比，CiM 感知裕度提高了 3.4 倍，读取干扰裕度提高了 27.6%，并且对工艺变化和其他硬件非理想情况的恢复能力也提高了，尽管与 2T-2MTJ-CiM 设计相比，其总体面积开销仅为 7.9%，以及 $\lt1 \%$ 能源和延迟开销。我们对 CIFAR-10 上训练的 ResNet-18 进行的系统级分析显示，CREST-CiM 的推理精度接近软件，比 2T2MTJ 基线提高了 10.7%。

papers.title: Cross-Attention for AES Mode Variation in Side-Channel Analysis.
papers.abstract: Portability poses a significant challenge for Deep Learning (DL)-based profiling Side-Channel Analysis (SCA) on AES encryption, as attackers cannot always ensure that training and target samples use the same encryption mode. To address this, we propose an Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) DL-SCA framework for achieving effective and robust cross-encryption-mode attacks. By incorporating cross-attention and UDA techniques, our framework aligns high-dimensional input samples, reducing interference from encryption mode mismatches. Evaluation across five distinct AES modes demonstrates that our method achieves robust SCA performance without requiring prior knowledge or multiple labeled datasets for analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 可移植性对 AES 加密上基于深度学习 (DL) 的分析侧通道分析 (SCA) 提出了重大挑战，因为攻击者无法始终确保训练样本和目标样本使用相同的加密模式。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种无监督域适应（UDA）DL-SCA 框架，用于实现有效且鲁棒的交叉加密模式攻击。通过结合交叉注意力和 UDA 技术，我们的框架对齐高维输入样本，减少加密模式不匹配的干扰。对五种不同 AES 模式的评估表明，我们的方法无需先验知识或多个标记数据集即可实现强大的 SCA 性能进行分析。

papers.title: Curvilinear Optical Proximity Correction via Cardinal Spline.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel curvilinear optical proximity correction (OPC) framework. The proposed approach involves representing mask patterns with control points, which are interconnected through cardinal splines. Mask optimization is achieved by iteratively adjusting these control points, guided by lithography simulation. To ensure compliance with mask rule checking (MRC) criteria, we develop comprehensive methods for checking width, space, area, and curvature. Additionally, to match the performance of inverse lithography techniques (ILT), we design algorithms to fit ILT results and resolve MRC violations. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our methodology, highlighting its potential as a viable OPC/ILT alternative.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的曲线光学邻近校正（OPC）框架。所提出的方法涉及用控制点表示掩模图案，这些控制点通过基数样条线互连。掩模优化是通过在光刻模拟的指导下迭代调整这些控制点来实现的。为了确保符合掩模规则检查 (MRC) 标准，我们开发了用于检查宽度、空间、面积和曲率的综合方法。此外，为了匹配逆光刻技术 (ILT) 的性能，我们设计了适合 ILT 结果并解决 MRC 违规问题的算法。大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，凸显了其作为可行的 OPC/ILT 替代方案的潜力。

papers.title: CVMAX: Accelerator Architecture with Polar Form Multiplication for Complex-Valued Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Complex-Valued Neural Networks (CVNNs) have demonstrated high performance in applications where complex numbers are essential, but suffer from higher computational and memory overheads. Since their target applications often operate in resource-constrained environments, optimizing CVNNs for energy and area efficiency is important for their acceleration. To resolve these challenges, we present CVMAX, a software-hardware co-design for energy and area-efficient CVNN acceleration. CVMAX introduces a specialized quantization technique based on polar form representation and shift quantization. The technique significantly reduces the bit width of CVNNs and computational complexity compared to conventional quantization with rectangular form. Moreover, shift quantization leverages the computational simplicity of multiplication in polar form, reducing the complexity of complex number multiplication. With the quantization technique, we designed a dedicated hardware accelerator that supports CVMAX data and its associated arithmetic operations. In our evaluation, CVMAX achieves a 75% reduction in energy consumption and achieves a $4.44 \times$ speedup compared to conventional accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 复值神经网络 (CVNN) 在复数必不可少的应用中表现出了高性能，但其计算和内存开销较高。由于它们的目标应用程序通常在资源受限的环境中运行，因此优化 CVNN 的能源和面积效率对于它们的加速非常重要。为了解决这些挑战，我们推出了 CVMAX，这是一种用于节能和面积高效的 CVNN 加速的软硬件协同设计。 CVMAX 引入了一种基于极坐标形式表示和移位量化的专门量化技术。与传统的矩形量化相比，该技术显着降低了 CVNN 的位宽和计算复杂度。此外，移位量化利用了极坐标形式乘法的计算简单性，降低了复数乘法的复杂性。利用量化技术，我们设计了专用的硬件加速器，支持CVMAX数据及其相关算术运算。在我们的评估中，与传统加速器相比，CVMAX 实现了 75% 的能耗降低，并实现了 4.44 美元×$ 的加速。

papers.title: CXL-ECC: an Efficient LRC-based on-CXL-Memory-eXpander-Controller ECC to Enhance Reliability and Performance of DRAM Error Correction.
papers.abstract: Compute eXpress Link (CXL) offers an effective interface for connecting CPUs with external computing and memory devices. CXL Memory eXpander Controller (CXL-MXC) is gaining attention for its ability to boost memory capacity and bandwidth more efficiently than traditional DDR DIMMs. Despite extensive research on MXC performance and adaptation, DRAM reliability in CXL architecture remains underexplored. Traditional fault tolerance mechanisms like replica or RAID-based systems would significantly increase bandwidth overhead in the CXL fabric, adversely affecting system performance. To address this, we propose the on-CXL-Memory-Expander-Controller ECC (CXL-ECC), by using Locally Recoverable Codes (LRC) as the Inter-Channel-ECC (IC-ECC) and offloading its process to the expander, we eliminate extra memory access requests in the CXL fabric. Consequently, we conduct several experiments to demonstrate that our approach enhances DRAM reliability by more than $10^{9}$, compared to state-of-the-art ECC methods. Relative to RAID-enabled CXL switch, it reduces additional bandwidth overhead from 63.5% to 3.4% and improves system performance by 12%.
papers.abstract_zh: Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 提供了一个有效的接口，用于连接 CPU 与外部计算和存储设备。 CXL 内存扩展控制器 (CXL-MXC) 因其比传统 DDR DIMM 更有效地提高内存容量和带宽的能力而受到关注。尽管对 MXC 性能和适应性进行了广泛的研究，但 CXL 架构中的 DRAM 可靠性仍未得到充分探索。传统的容错机制（例如副本或基于 RAID 的系统）会显着增加 CXL 结构中的带宽开销，从而对系统性能产生不利影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CXL 内存扩展器控制器上 ECC (CXL-ECC)，通过使用本地可恢复代码 (LRC) 作为通道间 ECC (IC-ECC) 并将其进程卸载到扩展器，我们消除了 CXL 结构中的额外内存访问请求。因此，我们进行了多项实验来证明，与最先进的 ECC 方法相比，我们的方法将 DRAM 可靠性提高了 10^{9}$ 以上。相对于支持 RAID 的 CXL 交换机，它将额外带宽开销从 63.5% 减少到 3.4%，并将系统性能提高 12%。

papers.title: CXL-INTERPLAY: Unraveling and Characterizing CXL Interference in Modern Computer Systems.
papers.abstract: Compute Express Link (CXL) is a promising technology that addresses memory and storage challenges. Despite its advantages, CXL faces performance threats from external interference when coexisting with current memory and storage systems. This interference is under-explored in existing research. To address this, we develop CXL-Interplay, systematically characterizing and analyzing interference from memory and storage systems. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to characterize CXL interference on real CXL hardware. We also provide reverse-reasoning analysis with performance counters and kernel functions. In the end, we propose and evaluate mitigation solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link (CXL) 是一项很有前途的技术，可以解决内存和存储挑战。尽管有其优势，CXL 在与当前内存和存储系统共存时仍面临来自外部干扰的性能威胁。现有研究尚未充分探讨这种干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 CXL-Interplay，系统地表征和分析内存和存储系统的干扰。据我们所知，我们是第一个在真实 CXL 硬件上描述 CXL 干扰特征的人。我们还提供带有性能计数器和内核函数的逆向推理分析。最后，我们提出并评估缓解解决方案。

papers.title: DANN: Diffractive Acoustic Neural Network for in-sensor computing system target at multi-biomarker diagnosis.
papers.abstract: Analog machine learning hardware platforms, such as those using wave physics, present potential for edge artificial intelligence (AI) applications due to in-sensor computing architecture, offering superior energy efficiency compared to digital circuits. While the diffractive neural network has been implemented in optical systems, its deployment on integrated acoustic systems has not been achieved due to the challenges associated with hardware optimization. In this paper, we propose the Diffractive Acoustic Neural Network (DANN), a novel approach that applies diffractive neural network algorithms to surface acoustic wave (SAW) systems for in-sensor multibiomarker diagnosis. To address optimization challenges, we introduce a novel training methodology that combines Finite Element Analysis (FEA) with gradient descent. We validate our method on Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) and prostate cancer, achieving accuracies of $74.07 \%$ and $86.0 \%$, respectively, nearly reaching the accuracy levels of clinical diagnoses. By comparing the co-training method with the traditional gradient descent training method and direct training on the FEA model, the co-training method demonstrates its advantages in balancing training efficiency and accuracy. Furthermore, a comparison of power consumption is conducted between the traditional method and the in-sensor computing system, indicating $66 \%$ energy savings attributed to its high level of integration.
papers.abstract_zh: 模拟机器学习硬件平台（例如使用波动物理学的硬件平台）由于传感器内计算架构而呈现出边缘人工智能 (AI) 应用的潜力，与数字电路相比，可提供卓越的能源效率。虽然衍射神经网络已在光学系统中实现，但由于与硬件优化相关的挑战，其在集成声学系统上的部署尚未实现。在本文中，我们提出了衍射声学神经网络（DANN），这是一种将衍射神经网络算法应用于表面声波（SAW）系统以进行传感器内多生物标志物诊断的新方法。为了解决优化挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的训练方法，将有限元分析 (FEA) 与梯度下降相结合。我们在重度抑郁症 (MDD) 和前列腺癌上验证了我们的方法，分别达到了 $74.07 \%$ 和 $86.0 \%$ 的准确度，几乎达到了临床诊断的准确度水平。通过将协同训练方法与传统的梯度下降训练方法以及在FEA模型上直接训练进行比较，协同训练方法展示了其在平衡训练效率和准确性方面的优势。此外，对传统方法和传感器内计算系统的功耗进行了比较，表明其高集成度可节省 66 \%$ 的能源。

papers.title: DARIS: An Oversubscribed Spatio-Temporal Scheduler for Real-Time DNN Inference on GPUs.
papers.abstract: The widespread use of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is limited by high computational demands, especially in constrained environments. GPUs, though effective accelerators, often face underutilization and rely on coarse-grained scheduling. This paper introduces DARIS, a priority-based real-time DNN scheduler for GPUs, utilizing NVIDIA’s MPS and CUDA streaming for spatial sharing, and a synchronization-based staging method for temporal partitioning. In particular, DARIS improves GPU utilization and uniquely analyzes GPU concurrency by oversubscribing computing resources. It also supports zero-delay DNN migration between GPU partitions. Experiments show DARIS improves throughput by $15 \%$ and $11.5 \%$ over batching and state-of-the-art schedulers, respectively, even without batching. All high-priority tasks meet deadlines, with low-priority tasks having under 2% deadline miss rate. High-priority response times are 33% better than those of low-priority tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的广泛使用受到高计算需求的限制，尤其是在受限环境中。 GPU 虽然是有效的加速器，但经常面临利用率不足的问题，并且依赖于粗粒度的调度。本文介绍了 DARIS，一种用于 GPU 的基于优先级的实时 DNN 调度程序，利用 NVIDIA 的 MPS 和 CUDA 流进行空间共享，以及基于同步的暂存方法进行时间分区。特别是，DARIS通过超额订阅计算资源来提高GPU利用率并独特地分析GPU并发性。它还支持GPU分区之间的零延迟DNN迁移。实验表明，即使没有批处理，DARIS 也比批处理和最先进的调度程序分别将吞吐量提高了 15 美元和 11.5 美元。所有高优先级任务均按时完成，低优先级任务的截止日期错过率低于 2%。高优先级任务的响应时间比低优先级任务快 33%。

papers.title: Data Oblivious CPU: Microarchitectural Side-channel Leakage-Resilient Processor.
papers.abstract: Mitigating microarchitectural side channels remains a central challenge in hardware security. Despite substantial research efforts, current defenses are often narrowly tailored to specific vulnerabilities, leaving systems exposed to a broader spectrum of microarchitectural side-channel attacks. In this paper, we propose a generic approach to mitigate side-channel attacks with minimal architectural changes. Unlike traditional approaches that focus on mitigating specific side channels, we propose a dynamic strategy that alters the decoding of the instructions into secure (side-channel resilient) or performance versions of the instructions, based on the data it is processing. Specifically, to minimize performance overhead, decoding to a secure version is selectively applied only when sensitive data are being processed, ensuring optimal performance for instructions operating on non-sensitive data.To evaluate our approach, we implement it on the RISC-V out-of-order BOOM processor. Our results demonstrate that the mechanism increases the utilization of FPGA resources by only 2% compared to the original design. Furthermore, it imposes 0% performance overhead for unprotected applications, while maintaining overhead between up to 25% for security-critical workloads. This work represents a scalable and efficient solution for defending against micro-architectural side-channel attacks without compromising system performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 减少微架构侧通道仍然是硬件安全的核心挑战。尽管进行了大量的研究工作，但当前的防御措施通常针对特定的漏洞进行了狭隘的定制，使系统面临更广泛的微架构侧通道攻击。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用方法，以最小的架构更改来减轻侧信道攻击。与专注于减轻特定侧通道的传统方法不同，我们提出了一种动态策略，可根据正在处理的数据将指令的解码更改为指令的安全（侧通道弹性）或性能版本。具体来说，为了最大限度地减少性能开销，仅在处理敏感数据时才选择性地应用解码为安全版本，从而确保对非敏感数据进行操作的指令的最佳性能。为了评估我们的方法，我们在 RISC-V 乱序 BOOM 处理器上实现它。我们的结果表明，与原始设计相比，该机制仅将 FPGA 资源利用率提高了 2%。此外，它对未受保护的应用程序施加 0% 的性能开销，同时将安全关键型工作负载的开销维持在高达 25% 之间。这项工作代表了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案，可在不影响系统性能的情况下防御微架构侧信道攻击。

papers.title: DataMaestro: A Versatile and Efficient Data Streaming Engine Bringing Decoupled Memory Access To Dataflow Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success across various intelligent tasks but encounter performance and energy challenges in inference execution due to data movement bottlenecks. We introduce DataMaestro, a versatile and efficient data streaming unit that brings the decoupled access/execute architecture to DNN dataflow accelerators to address this issue. DataMaestro supports flexible and programmable access patterns to accommodate diverse workload types and dataflows, incorporates fine-grained prefetch and addressing mode switching to mitigate bank conflicts, and enables customizable on-the-fly data manipulation to reduce memory footprints and access counts. We integrate five DataMaestros with a Tensor Core-like GeMM accelerator and a Quantization accelerator into a RISC-V host system for evaluation. The FPGA prototype and VLSI synthesis results demonstrate that DataMaestro helps the GeMM core achieve nearly 100% utilization, which is 1.05 $21.39 \times$ better than state-of-the-art solutions, while minimizing area and energy consumption to merely 6.43% and 15.06% of the total system.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各种智能任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于数据移动瓶颈，在推理执行中遇到了性能和能源挑战。我们引入 DataMaestro，这是一种多功能且高效的数据流单元，它将解耦的访问/执行架构引入 DNN 数据流加速器来解决这个问题。 DataMaestro 支持灵活且可编程的访问模式以适应不同的工作负载类型和数据流，结合细粒度预取和寻址模式切换以减轻存储体冲突，并支持可定制的动态数据操作以减少内存占用和访问计数。我们将五个 DataMaestros 与类似 Tensor Core 的 GeMM 加速器和量化加速器集成到 RISC-V 主机系统中进行评估。 FPGA 原型和 VLSI 综合结果表明，DataMaestro 帮助 GeMM 内核实现了近 100% 的利用率，比最先进的解决方案高出 1.05 美元 21.39 倍，同时将面积和能耗降至仅占整个系统的 6.43% 和 15.06%。

papers.title: DAWN: Accelerating Point Cloud Object Detection via Object-Aware Partitioning and 3D Similarity-Based Filtering.
papers.abstract: As a fundamental perception task, 3D point cloud detection has become essential for applications in autonomous driving and robotics. However, point cloud detection faces significant challenges of high computational cost due to complex point processing operations. To address this issue, we propose DAWN, an acceleration framework for point cloud object detection that identifies partial similarities between adjacent frames and reduces computational cost by filtering redundant points. DAWN uses object-aware partitioning that defines boundaries based on previous detection results for localized similarity analysis. Additionally, it applies axis-sorted point selection to refine partitioning for point clouds with non-uniform distribution. An efficient 3D similarity algorithm then filters redundant points to reduce computational load. DAWN enables flexible latencyaccuracy trade-offs by tuning point filtering ratios. Experimental results show that DAWN achieves a $1.59 \times$ average speedup and up to $1.70 \times$ on state-of-the-art detection networks by filtering more than $50 \%$ of points on average, with negligible impact on accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一项基本的感知任务，3D 点云检测对于自动驾驶和机器人技术的应用至关重要。然而，由于复杂的点处理操作，点云检测面临着计算成本高的重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DAWN，一种用于点云对象检测的加速框架，它可以识别相邻帧之间的部分相似性，并通过过滤冗余点来降低计算成本。 DAWN 使用对象感知分区，根据先前的检测结果定义边界，以进行局部相似性分析。此外，它应用轴排序点选择来细化具有非均匀分布的点云的分区。然后，高效的 3D 相似性算法会过滤冗余点以减少计算负载。 DAWN 通过调整点过滤比率来实现灵活的延迟精度权衡。实验结果表明，DAWN 通过平均过滤超过 $50 \%$ 的点，在最先进的检测网络上实现了 $1.59 \times$ 的平均加速，最高可达 $1.70 \times$，对准确性的影响可以忽略不计。

papers.title: DBC: Drift-aware Binary Code for Drift-tolerant Deep Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated outstanding performance across a wide range of applications. However, their substantial number of weights necessitates scalable and efficient storage solutions. Emerging non-volatile memory technologies, such as phase change memory (PCM) with multi-level cell (MLC) operation, are promising candidates due to their high scalability and non-volatility compared to conventional charge-based storage devices. Despite these advantages, MLC PCM suffers from reliability issues, particularly conductance drift, where the conductance of a PCM cell changes over time. This drift can lead to significant accuracy degradation in DNNs, as their weights are stored in PCM cells. In this paper, we propose Drift-aware Binary Code (DBC), a novel binary code designed to improve the tolerance of DNNs to conductance drift. DBC maps smaller decimal values to less error-prone MLC PCM cell levels and ensures that values shift to smaller magnitudes when conductance drift occurs. This approach helps maintain the accuracy of the DNN over an extended period compared to conventional binary code, as dominant DNN weights are stored at levels less prone to errors and DNNs exhibit better tolerance when weight values decrease rather than increase due to drift. Additionally, DBC requires no additional hardware overhead for auxiliary bits and can be combined with other fault-tolerant approaches, such as error correction code (ECC). Experimental results based on the real PCM device developed by IBM Research demonstrate that DBC improves the drift tolerance of DNNs by up to $55.18 \times$ compared to conventional binary code.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在广泛的应用中表现出了出色的性能。然而，它们的大量权重需要可扩展且高效的存储解决方案。新兴的非易失性存储器技术，例如具有多级单元（MLC）操作的相变存储器（PCM），由于与传统的基于电荷的存储设备相比具有高可扩展性和非易失性，因此是有前途的候选技术。尽管有这些优点，MLC PCM 仍面临可靠性问题，特别是电导漂移，即 PCM 单元的电导随时间变化。这种漂移可能会导致 DNN 的精度显着下降，因为它们的权重存储在 PCM 单元中。在本文中，我们提出了漂移感知二进制代码（DBC），这是一种新颖的二进制代码，旨在提高 DNN 对电导漂移的容忍度。 DBC 将较小的十进制值映射到不易出错的 MLC PCM 单元级别，并确保在发生电导漂移时值转变为较小的幅度。与传统的二进制代码相比，这种方法有助于在较长时间内保持 DNN 的准确性，因为主要的 DNN 权重存储在不易出错的级别，并且当权重值因漂移而减少而不是增加时，DNN 表现出更好的容忍度。此外，DBC 不需要额外的辅助位硬件开销，并且可以与其他容错方法结合使用，例如纠错码 (ECC)。基于 IBM Research 开发的真实 PCM 设备的实验结果表明，与传统二进制代码相比，DBC 将 DNN 的漂移容忍度提高了高达 55.18 美元\times$。

papers.title: DCDiff: Enhancing JPEG Compression via Diffusion-based DC Coefficients Estimation.
papers.abstract: JPEG is the most widely-used image compression method on low-cost cameras which cannot support learning-based compressors. One promising approach to enhance JPEG aims to drop DC coefficients at the cameras’ ends (without extra computation) and reconstruct those DC coefficients after receiving them. They all face the challenge that their DC reconstruction relies on a statistical property, which will cause deviationintroduced errors and propagate. In this paper, we propose DCDiff, a novel end-to-end DC estimation method to tackle the above challenge. Instead of using statistical methods to recover DC coefficients and then fix errors, we directly leverage a generative model to estimate DC coefficients in an end-to-end manner. In the meantime, we generate masks to correct certain image locations that do not satisfy the statistical distribution to suppress error propagation. Extensive experiments show that DCDiff not only outperforms all baselines on compression performance but also introduces a tiny impact on downstream tasks and is fully compatible with 2 typical low-cost processors with JPEG support.
papers.abstract_zh: JPEG 是低成本相机上最广泛使用的图像压缩方法，无法支持基于学习的压缩器。一种有前途的增强 JPEG 的方法旨在丢弃相机末端的 DC 系数（无需额外计算）并在接收到这些 DC 系数后重建它们。他们都面临着这样的挑战：他们的 DC 重建依赖于统计特性，这会导致偏差引入误差并传播。在本文中，我们提出了 DCDiff，一种新颖的端到端 DC 估计方法来应对上述挑战。我们没有使用统计方法来恢复 DC 系数然后修复错误，而是直接利用生成模型以端到端的方式估计 DC 系数。同时，我们生成掩模来纠正某些不满足统计分布的图像位置，以抑制错误传播。大量实验表明，DCDiff 不仅在压缩性能方面优于所有基准，而且对下游任务影响很小，并且与 2 个支持 JPEG 的典型低成本处理器完全兼容。

papers.title: DCO-3D: Differentiable Congestion Optimization in 3D ICs.
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art 3D IC flows fail to consider 3D congestion during earlier stages, leading to excessive use of end-of-flow ECO resources for routability correction that severely degrades full-chip Power, Performance, and Area metrics. We present DCO-3D, a Machine Learning-based routability-aware 3D PD flow that performs early post-route congestion prediction using Siamese Networks and resolves the predicted hotspots using a fully differentiable 3D cell spreading with Graph Neural Network. On 6 industrial designs in a commercial 3nm node, DCO-3D improves Pin-3D, the known best Pin-3D flow, by up to 47.2% in overflow, 86.2% in TNS and 5.1% in power at signoff.
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的 3D IC 流程未能考虑早期阶段的 3D 拥塞，导致过度使用流程末端 ECO 资源进行可布线性校正，从而严重降低全芯片功耗、性能和面积指标。我们提出了 DCO-3D，这是一种基于机器学习的可路由性感知 3D PD 流，它使用 Siamese 网络执行早期路由后拥塞预测，并使用图神经网络的完全可微 3D 单元扩展来解析预测的热点。在商用 3nm 节点的 6 个工业设计中，DCO-3D 将 Pin-3D（已知的最佳 Pin-3D 流程）改进高达 47.2%，在签核时溢出高达 47.2%，TNS 高达 86.2%，功耗高达 5.1%。

papers.title: DDRoute: a Novel Depth-Driven Approach to the Qubit Routing Problem.
papers.abstract: In the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, the topological constraints present in many of the currently available quantum devices pose a physical limit on the feasible interactions between qubits. To comply with such limitations, the compilation of quantum circuits requires solving the Qubit Routing Problem (QRP), by inserting SWAP operations among qubits. The State of the Art provides heuristic algorithms addressing this task, yet the depth of the output circuits is often incompatible with the current limits of quantum hardware. Therefore, we propose DDRoute, a novel heuristic algorithm to solve QRP, designed to reduce the depth overhead introduced by the routing process in the compiled circuits. Our experimental evaluation proves the efficiency of our approach, with a depth reduction of up to 70% with respect to the state-of-the-art routing procedures.
papers.abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）时代，许多当前可用的量子设备中存在的拓扑约束对量子位之间的可行相互作用造成了物理限制。为了遵守这些限制，量子电路的编译需要通过在量子位之间插入交换操作来解决量子位路由问题（QRP）。最先进的技术提供了解决此任务的启发式算法，但输出电路的深度通常与量子硬件的当前限制不兼容。因此，我们提出了 DDRoute，一种解决 QRP 的新颖启发式算法，旨在减少编译电路中路由过程引入的深度开销。我们的实验评估证明了我们方法的效率，与最先进的路由程序相比，深度减少了高达 70%。

papers.title: Decoupling Analog Circuit Representation from Technology for Behavior-Centric Optimization.
papers.abstract: Analog IC design is mainly manual and implemented at the device level. A major reason is circuit behavior-extraction. Unlike its digital counterpart, analog IC design is strongly coupled with technology nodes and is difficult to represent by an abstract behavioral model. The lack of accurate and efficient analog modeling has become a bottleneck in analog design automation. This paper proposes a behavior-centric optimization framework for analog circuits that represents circuit behavior using transistor electrical properties instead of sizes, improving model generalization and reducing optimization complexity. To characterize the process, we propose a method for mapping transistor electrical properties to sizes. Moreover, we developed a radial basis functions-based Kolmogorov-Arnold network (RBF-KAN) to accurately approximate circuit nonlinear behavior with limited simulations. Compared to blackbox modeling, our approach enables constructing surrogate models via KAN under a set specification with just a few hundred simulations. Experiments on the testing suite showed our framework achieved a $1.76 \times$ to $2.64 \times$ improvement in large signal figure of merit (FOM) and $1.73 \times$ to $2.48 \times$ in small signal FOM over state-of-the-art methods, while also enabling $3.5 \times$ to $6.2 \times$ acceleration in design porting.
papers.abstract_zh: 模拟IC设计主要是手动的并且在器件级实现。一个主要原因是电路行为提取。与数字设计不同，模拟 IC 设计与技术节点紧密耦合，很难用抽象的行为模型来表示。缺乏准确、高效的模拟建模已成为模拟设计自动化的瓶颈。本文提出了一种以行为为中心的模拟电路优化框架，该框架使用晶体管电气特性而不是尺寸来表示电路行为，从而提高模型泛化性并降低优化复杂性。为了表征该过程，我们提出了一种将晶体管电特性映射到尺寸的方法。此外，我们开发了基于径向基函数的柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络（RBF-KAN），可以通过有限的模拟准确地近似电路非线性行为。与黑盒建模相比，我们的方法只需几百次模拟就能在设定的规范下通过 KAN 构建代理模型。测试套件上的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的框架在大信号品质因数 (FOM) 方面实现了 1.76 美元到 2.64 美元的改进，在小信号 FOM 方面实现了 1.73 美元到 2.48 美元的改进，同时还在设计移植中实现了 3.5 美元到 6.2 美元的加速。

papers.title: DeepPUFSCA: Deep learning for Physical Unclonable Function attack based on Side Channel Analysis support.
papers.abstract: Physical Unclonable Function (PUF) poses a vulnerability that it could be imitated by machine learning attacks and side channel attacks, which break its physical uniqueness and unpredictable characteristic. Hence, many works are concerned with enhancing PUF design by introducing more nonlinear modules inside to differentiate approximating PUF behavior from the attacker side. However, the safety of these PUFs are still an open area and need to be verified. In this paper, we propose DeepPUFSCA, which is a deep learning-based model that uniquely combines both challenge and side-channel information features during training to attack PUF. To gather the data, we conduct a design of an arbiter PUF on FPGA and measure its power consumption. Our intensive experiments on this dataset demonstrate that DeepPUFSCA outperforms other machine learning-based methods in terms of attacking accuracy, even the novel ensemble algorithms. Moreover, we also show that combined side channel information boosts the model performance compared to attacking with challenge-response only.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆函数（PUF）存在可被机器学习攻击和侧通道攻击模仿的漏洞，破坏了其物理唯一性和不可预测性。因此，许多工作都关注通过在内部引入更多非线性模块来增强 PUF 设计，以区分攻击者方的近似 PUF 行为。然而，这些PUF的安全性仍然是一个开放领域，需要验证。在本文中，我们提出了 DeepPUFSCA，这是一种基于深度学习的模型，在攻击 PUF 的训练过程中独特地结合了挑战和旁道信息特征。为了收集数据，我们在 FPGA 上设计了仲裁器 PUF，并测量了其功耗。我们对该数据集的深入实验表明，DeepPUFSCA 在攻击准确性方面优于其他基于机器学习的方法，甚至优于新颖的集成算法。此外，我们还表明，与仅使用挑战响应进行攻击相比，组合的侧信道信息可以提高模型性能。

papers.title: Delving into Topology Representation for Layout Pattern: A Novel Contrastive Learning Framework for Hotspot Detection.
papers.abstract: Recently, machine learning-based techniques have been applied for layout hotspot detection. However, existing methods encounter challenges in capturing the decision boundary across the entire dataset and ignore the geometric properties and topology of the polygons. In this paper, we introduce CLI-HD, a novel contrastive learning framework on layout sequences and images for hotspot detection. Our framework improves the ability to distinguish between hotspots and non-hotspots by similarity computations instead of a single decision boundary. To effectively incorporate geometric information into the model training process, we propose Layout2Seq, which encodes polygon shapes as vectors within sequences that are subsequently fed into the CLIHD. Furthermore, to better represent topology information, we develop an absolute position embedding, replacing the standard position encoders used in Transformer architectures. Extensive evaluations on various benchmarks demonstrate that CLI-HD outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, with an accuracy improvement ranging from $0.82 \%$ to $4.77 \%$ and a reduction in false alarm rates by $\mathbf{4. 9 \%}$ to $\mathbf{2 3. 1 8 \%}$.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，基于机器学习的技术已应用于布局热点检测。然而，现有方法在捕获整个数据集的决策边界方面遇到了挑战，并且忽略了多边形的几何属性和拓扑。在本文中，我们介绍了 CLI-HD，这是一种用于热点检测的布局序列和图像的新型对比学习框架。我们的框架通过相似性计算而不是单个决策边界提高了区分热点和非热点的能力。为了有效地将几何信息融入到模型训练过程中，我们提出了 Layout2Seq，它将多边形形状编码为序列中的向量，随后将其馈送到 CLIHD 中。此外，为了更好地表示拓扑信息，我们开发了绝对位置嵌入，取代了 Transformer 架构中使用的标准位置编码器。对各种基准的广泛评估表明，CLI-HD 优于当前最先进的方法，准确度提高了从 $0.82 \%$ 到 $4.77 \%$，误报率降低了 $\mathbf{4。 9 \%}$ 到 $\mathbf{2 3. 1 8 \%}$。

papers.title: DenSparSA: A Balanced Systolic Array Approach for Dense and Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Numerous studies have proposed hardware architectures to accelerate sparse matrix multiplication, but these approaches often incur substantial area and power overhead, significantly compromising their usage in dense scenarios. On the other hand, systolic arrays deliver high efficiency for dense matrix operations, but their application to sparse matrices remains challenging. An ideal design should process both dense and sparse matrices with high efficiency to satisfy performance and versatility requirements.In this paper, we introduce DenSparSA, a balanced systolic array centralized architecture that can execute sparse matrix computations with minimal overhead to original dense matrix computations. DenSparSA supports both single-side and dual-side unstructured sparse matrix multiplications with high efficiency. At the same time, the additional hardware required for managing sparsity is compact and decoupled from the conventional systolic array, allowing for minimal power overhead when switched back to dense matrix operations via circuit gating. The proposed design is implemented with Nangate 45 nm. Implementation results show that DenSparSA achieves a speedup ranging from $1.9 \times$ to $22 \times$ compared to the classic systolic array for sparse workloads, while maintaining relatively low area and power overhead. For dense workloads, the power overhead can be reduced to $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$ for BF16 and 5% for FP32. Compared with existing solutions for sparse acceleration, DenSparSA delivers competitive ($0.82 \times-1.32 \times$) efficiency in sparse scenarios and $1.17 \times-2.28 \times$ better efficiency for dense scenarios, indicating a better balance between both situations.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多研究提出了硬件架构来加速稀疏矩阵乘法，但这些方法通常会产生大量的面积和功耗开销，严重影响了它们在密集场景中的使用。另一方面，脉动阵列为密集矩阵运算提供了高效率，但其在稀疏矩阵中的应用仍然具有挑战性。理想的设计应该高效地处理稠密矩阵和稀疏矩阵，以满足性能和多功能性要求。在本文中，我们介绍了 DenSparSA，一种平衡脉动阵列集中式架构，可以以最小的原始稠密矩阵计算开销执行稀疏矩阵计算。 DenSparSA 高效支持单边和双边非结构化稀疏矩阵乘法。同时，管理稀疏性所需的额外硬件非常紧凑，并且与传统脉动阵列分离，从而在通过电路门控切换回密集矩阵操作时可以实现最小的功率开销。所提出的设计是使用 Nangate 45 nm 实现的。实施结果表明，与稀疏工作负载的经典脉动阵列相比，DenSparSA 实现了从 1.9 美元到 22 美元的加速，同时保持相对较低的面积和功耗。对于密集工作负载，BF16 的功耗开销可降低至 $\mathbf{1 2 \%}$，FP32 的功耗开销可降低至 5%。与现有的稀疏加速解决方案相比，DenSparSA 在稀疏场景下提供了具有竞争力的效率（$0.82 \times-1.32 \times$），在密集场景下提供了 $1.17 \times-2.28 \times$ 更高的效率，这表明两种情况之间取得了更好的平衡。

papers.title: Design and Technology Co-optimization Utilizing Flip-FET (FFET) Standard Cells.
papers.abstract: With the continued scaling of VLSI technology beyond 3 nm, a consistent demand for layout reduction in standard cells has been made. CFET (Complementary-FET) has been accepted as a promising device technology, stacking N-FET on P-FET (or vice versa) to achieve this goal while providing metal interconnects on both the front and backside of the wafer through BEOL (back-end-of-line) processing. However, the layout synthesis of CFET based standard cells and its use in physical design implementation are not fully compatible with the effective exploitation of backside interconnects. This is because of a considerable overhead on the allocation of special vias in FEOL (front-end-of-line) referred to as tap-cells, which are essential for the net routes using backside wire. To overcome this drawback of using CFET cells, a new technology called FFET (Flip-FET) has been proposed, which flips the lower FET in CFET to enable direct pin accessibility on both sides of BEOL with no tap cells. In this context, we propose an FFET cell based DTCO methodology to fully utilize backside wires with minimal tap-cells. Precisely, we propose a three-step approach: (1) synthesizing multiple FFET standard cells with diverse styles of pin distribution for each of primitive logic gates, (2) performing a tap-cell avoiding cell replacement during placement optimization by using the cells obtained from Step 1 to prevent tap-cell allocation for net routing, and (3) rebalancing the wire usage between the frontside and backside to mitigate net congestion. Experiments with benchmark circuits show that our FFET cell based DTCO methodology scales up chip size beyond CFET designs with much fewer routing failures.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着超大规模集成电路技术不断微缩至3纳米以上，对减少标准单元布局提出了一致的要求。 CFET（互补 FET）已被认为是一种有前途的器件技术，将 N-FET 堆叠在 P-FET 上（反之亦然）以实现这一目标，同时通过 BEOL（后端生产线）处理在晶圆的正面和背面提供金属互连。然而，基于 CFET 的标准单元的布局综合及其在物理设计实现中的使用与背面互连的有效利用并不完全兼容。这是因为在 FEOL（前端线路）（称为分接单元）中分配特殊过孔的开销相当大，这对于使用背面线路的网络布线至关重要。为了克服使用 CFET 单元的这一缺点，人们提出了一种称为 FFET (Flip-FET) 的新技术，该技术翻转 CFET 中的下部 FET，从而无需抽头单元即可在 BEOL 两侧直接进行引脚访问。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种基于 FFET 单元的 DTCO 方法，以最少的分接单元充分利用背面布线。准确地说，我们提出了一个三步方法：（1）为每个原始逻辑门合成具有不同引脚分布风格的多个 FFET 标准单元，（2）通过使用从步骤 1 获得的单元执行分接单元，避免在布局优化期间更换单元，以防止网络布线的分接单元分配，以及（3）重新平衡正面和背面之间的线路使用，以减轻网络拥塞。基准电路实验表明，我们基于 FFET 单元的 DTCO 方法将芯片尺寸扩大到超出 CFET 设计，同时布线故障更少。

papers.title: Device-Algorithm Co-Design of Ferroelectric Compute-in-Memory In-Situ Annealer for Combinatorial Optimization Problems.
papers.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) are crucial in many applications but are computationally demanding. Traditional Ising annealers address COPs by directly converting them into Ising models (known as direct-E transformation) and solving them through iterative annealing. However, these approaches require vector-matrix-vector (VMV) multiplications with a complexity of $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ for Ising energy computation and complex exponential annealing factor calculations during annealing process, thus significantly increasing hardware costs. In this work, we propose a ferroelectric compute-in-memory (CiM) in-situ annealer to overcome aforementioned challenges. The proposed device-algorithm co-design framework consists of (i) a novel transformation method (first to our known) that converts COPs into an innovative incremental-E form, which reduces the complexity of VMV multiplication from $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ to $O(n)$, and approximates exponential annealing factor with a much simplified fractional form; (ii) a double gate ferroelectric FET (DG FeFET)-based CiM crossbar that efficiently computes the in-situ incremental-E form by leveraging the unique structure of DG FeFETs; (iii) a CiM annealer that approaches the solutions of COPs via iterative incremental-E computations within a tunable back gate-based in-situ annealing flow. Evaluation results show that our proposed CiM annealer significantly reduces hardware overhead, reducing energy consumption by $1503 / 1716 \times$ and time cost by $8.08 / 8.15 \times$ in solving 3000 -node Max-Cut problems compared to two state-of-the-art annealers. It also exhibits high solving efficiency, achieving a remarkable average success rate of $98 \%$, whereas other annealers show only $50 \%$ given the same iteration counts.
papers.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题 (COP) 在许多应用中至关重要，但计算量要求很高。传统的 Ising 退火器通过直接将 COP 转换为 Ising 模型（称为直接 E 变换）并通过迭代退火来解决它们来解决 COP。然而，这些方法在退火过程中需要进行复杂度为$O\left(n^{2}\right)$的向量-矩阵-向量(VMV)乘法来计算Ising能量和计算复杂的指数退火因子，从而显着增加了硬件成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种铁电内存计算（CiM）原位退火器来克服上述挑战。所提出的设备算法协同设计框架包括（i）一种新颖的转换方法（我们已知的第一个），它将 COP 转换为创新的增量 E 形式，从而将 VMV 乘法的复杂性从 $O\left(n^{2}\right)$ 降低到 $O(n)$，并以简化得多的分数形式近似指数退火因子； (ii) 基于双栅铁电 FET (DG FeFET) 的 CiM 交叉开关，可利用 DG FeFET 的独特结构有效计算原位增量 E 形式； (iii) CiM 退火器，通过基于可调背栅的原位退火流程中的迭代增量 E 计算来逼近 COP 的解决方案。评估结果表明，我们提出的 CiM 退火器显着降低了硬件开销，与两种最先进的退火器相比，在解决 3000 节点最大切割问题时，能耗降低了 1503 美元/1716 倍，时间成本降低了 8.08 美元/8.15 倍。它还表现出很高的求解效率，实现了 98 美元 \%$ 的显着平均成功率，而在相同迭代次数下，其他退火器仅显示 50 美元 \%$。

papers.title: Device-Aware Test: A Means to Attack Unmodelled Defects (Invited).
papers.abstract: Structural testing has been very successful in the VLSI manufacturing process to screen out faulty devices and provide high outgoing product quality. However, recent reported data show that existing solutions are not good enough for advanced technology nodes and emerging device technologies. This paper discusses a new manufacturing test approach called DeviceAware Test (DAT), applies it to different flavors of emerging devices, and its potential to be used beyond just manufacturing test.
papers.abstract_zh: 结构测试在 VLSI 制造过程中非常成功，可以筛选出故障器件并提供较高的出厂产品质量。然而，最近报道的数据表明，现有的解决方案对于先进技术节点和新兴设备技术来说还不够好。本文讨论了一种称为 DeviceAware Test (DAT) 的新制造测试方法，将其应用于不同类型的新兴设备，以及其在制造测试之外的应用潜力。

papers.title: DIAS: Distance-based Attention Sparsity for Ultra-Long-Sequence Transformer with Tree-like Processing-in-Memory Architecture.
papers.abstract: Long-context inference has become a central focus in recent self-regressive Transformer research. However, challenges still remain in performing decode stage due to the memory bandwidth bottleneck of attention mechanisms and the substantial memory overhead associated with KV cache. Although attention sparsity has been proposed as a potential solution, conventional sparsity methods that rely on heuristic algorithms often suffer from accuracy degradation when applied to ultra-long sequences. To break through the dilemma between accuracy-performance and bandwidth-capacity, this work proposes DIAS, a distancebased irregular attention sparsity approach with processing-inmemory (PIM) architecture. DIAS employs approximate topK attention (AKAttention) scores through graph-based search to improve inference efficiency while maintaining accuracy. Furthermore, a scalable tree-like PIM (TreePIM) architecture is introduced to achieve both memory capacity and bandwidth improvement by isolating enormous memory access for KV cache into the PIM units. Evaluations on various configurations of DIAS for Longbench with Llama3-405B models with 1 M sequence length show up to 75 times speedup compared with the state-of-the-art LLM accelerator, with accuracy drop of less than $1 \%$. Index Terms-AI and Machine Learning, Architecture & System Design
papers.abstract_zh: 长上下文推理已成为最近自回归 Transformer 研究的中心焦点。然而，由于注意力机制的内存带宽瓶颈以及与 KV 缓存相关的大量内存开销，执行解码阶段仍然存在挑战。尽管注意力稀疏性已被提出作为一种潜在的解决方案，但依赖于启发式算法的传统稀疏性方法在应用于超长序列时常常会出现精度下降的问题。为了突破准确性性能和带宽容量之间的困境，这项工作提出了 DIAS，一种基于内存处理（PIM）架构的基于距离的不规则注意力稀疏方法。 DIAS 通过基于图的搜索采用近似 topK 注意力（AKAttention）分数，在保持准确性的同时提高推理效率。此外，引入了可扩展的树状PIM（TreePIM）架构，通过将KV缓存的大量内存访问隔离到PIM单元中来实现内存容量和带宽的提高。对具有 1 M 序列长度的 Llama3-405B 模型的 Longbench DIAS 的各种配置进行的评估显示，与最先进的 LLM 加速器相比，加速速度高达 75 倍，且精度下降不到 $1 \%$。索引术语-人工智能和机器学习、架构和系统设计

papers.title: Differentiable Net-Moving and Local Congestion Mitigation for Routability-Driven Global Placement.
papers.abstract: Routability-driven global placement is a major challenge in modern VLSI physical design, for which mitigating routing congestion is a critical approach. Cell inflation can effectively address local routing congestion and is widely adopted, but with the issue of over-inflating or moving cells back into congested areas. Minimizing the congestion within a net bounding box is effective for alleviating global routing congestion, but the bounding box may be too large and contain congestion not contributed by the net. To address the first issue, we propose a momentum-based cell inflation technique that considers historical inflation ratios for mitigating local routing congestion. Then, we construct a differentiable global congestion function, developed from Poisson’s equation, and introduce virtual standard cells onto two-pin nets to accurately guide net movements for mitigating global routing congestion. Furthermore, to improve pin accessibility, we adjust placement density around power and ground rails according to the routing congestion in global placement. The proposed techniques are integrated into an electrostatic-based global placement framework. Experiments on the ISPD 2015 contest benchmarks show that our framework achieves better routability results, with an average of 40% DRVs reduction and comparable wirelength and via count, compared to the leading routability-driven placer.
papers.abstract_zh: 可布线性驱动的全局布局是现代 VLSI 物理设计中的一个主要挑战，其中缓解布线拥塞是一个关键方法。小区膨胀可以有效解决本地路由拥塞问题，被广泛采用，但存在过度膨胀或将小区移回拥塞区域的问题。最小化网络边界框内的拥塞对于缓解全局路由拥塞是有效的，但是边界框可能太大并且包含不是由网络造成的拥塞。为了解决第一个问题，我们提出了一种基于动量的单元通胀技术，该技术考虑历史通胀率来缓解本地路由拥塞。然后，我们构建了一个从泊松方程发展而来的可微分全局拥塞函数，并将虚拟标准单元引入到两引脚网络上，以准确引导网络运动，从而缓解全局路由拥塞。此外，为了提高引脚可访问性，我们根据全局布局中的布线拥塞情况调整电源和接地轨周围的布局密度。所提出的技术被集成到基于静电的全局布局框架中。 ISPD 2015 竞赛基准实验表明，与领先的可布线性驱动的布局器相比，我们的框架实现了更好的可布线性结果，平均 DRV 减少了 40%，并且线长和过孔数量相当。

papers.title: DM-Tune: Quantizing Diffusion Models with Mixture-of-Gaussian Guided Noise Tuning.
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have become essential generative tools for tasks such as image generation, video creation, and inpainting, but their high computational and memory demands pose challenges for efficient deployment. Contrary to the traditional belief that full-precision computation ensures optimal image quality, we demonstrate that a fine-grained mixed-precision strategy can surpass full-precision models in terms of image quality, diversity, and text-to-image alignment. However, directly implementing such strategies can lead to increased complexity and reduced runtime performance due to the overheads of managing multiple precision formats and casting operations. To address this, we introduce DM-Tune, which replaces complex mixed-precision quantization with a unified low-precision format, supplemented by noise-tuning, to improve both image generation quality and runtime efficiency. The proposed noise-tuning mechanism is a type of fine-tuning that reconstructs the mixed-precision output by learning adjustable noise through a parameterized nonlinear function consisting of Gaussian and linear components. Key steps in our framework include identifying sensitive layers for quantization, modeling quantization noise, and optimizing runtime with custom low-precision GPU kernels that support efficient noise-tuning. Experimental results across various diffusion models and datasets demonstrate that DM-Tune not only significantly improves runtime but also enhances diversity, quality, and text-to-image alignment compared to FP32, FP8, and state-of-the-art mixed-precision methods. Our approach is broadly applicable and lays a solid foundation for simplifying complex mixed-precision strategies at minimal cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩散模型已成为图像生成、视频创建和修复等任务的重要生成工具，但其高计算和内存需求对高效部署提出了挑战。与全精度计算确保最佳图像质量的传统观念相反，我们证明了细粒度混合精度策略可以在图像质量、多样性和文本到图像对齐方面超越全精度模型。然而，由于管理多种精度格式和转换操作的开销，直接实施此类策略可能会导致复杂性增加并降低运行时性能。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DM-Tune，它用统一的低精度格式取代复杂的混合精度量化，并辅以噪声调整，以提高图像生成质量和运行时效率。所提出的噪声调谐机制是一种微调，通过由高斯和线性分量组成的参数化非线性函数学习可调噪声来重建混合精度输出。我们框架中的关键步骤包括识别量化敏感层、对量化噪声建模以及使用支持高效噪声调整的自定义低精度 GPU 内核优化运行时间。各种扩散模型和数据集的实验结果表明，与 FP32、FP8 和最先进的混合精度方法相比，DM-Tune 不仅显着提高了运行时间，而且还增强了多样性、质量和文本到图像对齐。我们的方法具有广泛的适用性，并为以最低的成本简化复杂的混合精度策略奠定了坚实的基础。

papers.title: DRAFT: Decoupling Backpropagation from Pre-trained Backbone for Efficient Transformer Fine-Tuning on Edge.
papers.abstract: Transformers have demonstrated outstanding performance across diverse applications recently, necessitating finetuning to optimize their performance for downstream tasks. However, fine-tuning remains challenging due to the substantial computational costs and storage overhead of backpropagation (BP). The existing fine-tuning techniques require the BP through the massive pre-trained backbone weights for computing the input gradient, resulting in significant computing overhead and memory footprint for resource-constrained edge devices. To address the challenge, this work proposes an algorithm-hardware co-design framework, DRAFT, for efficient Transformer finetuning by decoupling the BP from the backbone weights, thereby efficiently reducing the BP overhead. The framework employs Feedback Decoupling Approximation (FDA), an efficient finetuning algorithm that decouples BP into two low-complexity pathways: trainable adapter pathway and sparse ternary Bypass Network (BPN) pathway. The two pathways work collaboratively to approximate the conventional BP process. Further, a DRAFT accelerator is proposed, featuring a reconfigurable design with lightweight sparse gather networks and dynamic workflows to fully harness the sparsity and data parallelism inherent to the FDA. Experimental results demonstrate that DRAFT achieves a speedup of $4.9 \times$ and an energy efficiency improvement of $4.2 \times$ on average compared to baseline fine-tuning methods across multiple fine-tuning tasks with negligible accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 最近在不同的应用程序中展示了出色的性能，因此需要进行微调以优化其下游任务的性能。然而，由于反向传播（BP）的巨大计算成本和存储开销，微调仍然具有挑战性。现有的微调技术需要BP通过大量预先训练的主干权重来计算输入梯度，这导致资源受限的边缘设备产生巨大的计算开销和内存占用。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计框架 DRAFT，通过将 BP 与主干权重解耦来实现高效 Transformer 微调，从而有效降低 BP 开销。该框架采用反馈解耦近似 (FDA)，这是一种高效的微调算法，可将 BP 解耦为两个低复杂度路径：可训练适配器路径和稀疏三元旁路网络 (BPN) 路径。这两种途径协同工作以近似传统的 BP 过程。此外，还提出了 DRAFT 加速器，其特点是可重构设计，具有轻量级稀疏收集网络和动态工作流程，以充分利用 FDA 固有的稀疏性和数据并行性。实验结果表明，与跨多个微调任务的基线微调方法相比，DRAFT 平均实现了 4.9 美元的加速和 4.2 美元的能源效率提升，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

papers.title: DROIDFUZZ: Proprietary Driver Fuzzing for Embedded Android Devices.
papers.abstract: Embedded Android Devices have proliferated in many security-critical embedded scenarios, requiring sufficient testing to root out vulnerabilities. Due to Android’s architecture, which uses a Hardware ion Layer (HAL) for vendor-specific driver implementations, traditional kernel testing techniques cannot detect such bugs within the actual driver logic, which are commonly proprietary and vendorspecific. In this paper, we propose DroidFuzz, an embedded Android system fuzzer that targets such vendor-specific driver implementations to find such bugs. Through leveraging pre-testing HAL driver probing, kernel-user relational payload generation, and cross-boundary execution state feedback, we effectively test the proprietary drivers in both the kernel and the HAL layer. We implemented DroidFuzz and evaluated its effectiveness on 7 embedded Android devices, and found 12 security-critical previously unknown bugs, all of which have been confirmed by the respective vendors.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入式 Android 设备在许多安全关键型嵌入式场景中激增，需要充分的测试来根除漏洞。由于 Android 的架构使用硬件离子层 (HAL) 来实现特定于供应商的驱动程序，因此传统的内核测试技术无法检测实际驱动程序逻辑中的此类错误，这些错误通常是专有的和特定于供应商的。在本文中，我们提出了 DroidFuzz，这是一种嵌入式 Android 系统模糊器，它针对此类特定于供应商的驱动程序实现来查找此类错误。通过利用预测试 HAL 驱动程序探测、内核-用户关系有效负载生成和跨边界执行状态反馈，我们有效地测试了内核和 HAL 层中的专有驱动程序。我们实施了 DroidFuzz 并在 7 款嵌入式 Android 设备上评估了其有效性，发现了 12 个以前未知的安全关键漏洞，所有这些漏洞均已得到各自供应商的确认。

papers.title: DSPlacer: DSP Placement for FPGA-based CNN Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Deploying convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on hardware platforms like Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) has garnered significant attention due to their inherent flexibility and parallelism. Achieving optimal timing closure remains a critical challenge, as placement directly impacts clock frequency and throughput. Existing approaches often face scalability issues with large designs or fail to formalize placement rules into automated algorithms. In this paper, we propose DSPlacer, a novel DSP placement framework designed for diverse CNN accelerator architectures in the context of FPGA design. The proposed approach iteratively optimizes the placement of datapath DSPs to enhance timing performance. To achieve this, DSPlacer integrates several advanced techniques, including graph convolutional network-based datapath DSP identification, DSP graph construction, min-cost-flow DSP assignment, and integer linear programming (ILP)-based cascade constraint legalization. These techniques collectively address two key requirements for datapath DSP placement: (1) cascading datapath DSPs to achieve a compact layout, and (2) preserving direct datapath information between the processing system and programmable logic. The framework has been evaluated on multiple academic benchmarks and compared against AMD Xilinx Vivado 2020.2 and AMF-Placer 2.0. Experimental results demonstrate that DSPlacer improves Worst Negative Slack (WNS) by 32% and 65%, respectively, highlighting its efficacy and superiority.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等硬件平台上部署卷积神经网络 (CNN) 由于其固有的灵活性和并行性而引起了广泛关注。实现最佳时序收敛仍然是一个关键挑战，因为布局直接影响时钟频率和吞吐量。现有方法通常面临大型设计的可扩展性问题，或者无法将布局规则形式化为自动化算法。在本文中，我们提出了 DSPlacer，这是一种新颖的 DSP 放置框架，专为 FPGA 设计背景下的各种 CNN 加速器架构而设计。所提出的方法迭代地优化数据路径 DSP 的布局以增强时序性能。为了实现这一目标，DSPlacer 集成了多种先进技术，包括基于图卷积网络的数据路径 DSP 识别、DSP 图构建、最小成本流 DSP 分配以及基于整数线性规划 (ILP) 的级联约束合法化。这些技术共同满足了数据路径 DSP 布局的两个关键要求：(1) 级联数据路径 DSP 以实现紧凑布局，以及 (2) 保留处理系统和可编程逻辑之间的直接数据路径信息。该框架已根据多个学术基准进行评估，并与 AMD Xilinx Vivado 2020.2 和 AMF-Placer 2.0 进行比较。实验结果表明，DSPlacer 将最差负裕度 (WNS) 分别改善了 32% 和 65%，凸显了其功效和优越性。

papers.title: Dual-Issue Execution of Mixed Integer and Floating-Point Workloads on Energy-Efficient In-Order RISC-V Cores.
papers.abstract: To meet the computational requirements of modern workloads under tight energy constraints, general-purpose accelerator architectures have to integrate an ever-increasing number of extremely area- and energy-efficient processing elements (PEs). In this context, single-issue in-order cores are commonplace, but lean dual-issue cores could boost PE IPC, especially for the common case of mixed integer and floating-point workloads. We develop the COPIFT methodology and RISC-V ISA extensions to enable low-cost and flexible dual-issue execution of mixed integer and floating-point instruction sequences. On such kernels, our methodology achieves speedups of $1.47 x$, reaching a peak 1.75 instructions per cycle, and 1.37 x energy improvements on average, over optimized RV32G baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了满足严格能源限制下现代工作负载的计算要求，通用加速器架构必须集成数量不断增加的面积和能源效率极高的处理元件 (PE)。在这种情况下，单问题有序核心很常见，但精益双问题核心可以提高 PE IPC，特别是对于混合整数和浮点工作负载的常见情况。我们开发了 COPIFT 方法和 RISC-V ISA 扩展，以实现混合整数和浮点指令序列的低成本和灵活的双发出执行。在此类内核上，与优化的 RV32G 基准相比，我们的方法实现了 1.47 倍的加速，达到每周期 1.75 条指令的峰值，平均能耗提高了 1.37 倍。

papers.title: DuoQ: A DSP Utilization-aware and Outlier-free Quantization for FPGA-based LLMs Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Quantization enables efficient deployment of large language models (LLMs) on FPGAs, but its presence of outliers affects the accuracy of the quantized model. Existing methods mainly deal with outliers through channel-wise or tokenwise isolation and encoding, which leads to expensive dynamic quantization. To address this problem, we introduce DuoQ, an FPGA-oriented algorithm-hardware co-design framework. DuoQ effectively eliminates outliers through learnable equivalent transformations and low-semantic token awareness in the quantization scheme part, facilitating per-tensor quantization with 4 -bits. We co-design the quantization algorithm and hardware architecture. Specifically, DuoQ accelerates end-to-end LLM through a novel DSP-aware PE unit design and encoder design. In addition, two types of post-processing units assist in the realization of nonlinear functions and dynamic token awareness. Experimental results show that compared with platforms with different architectures, DuoQ’s computational efficiency and energy efficiency are improved by up to $8.8 \times$ and $23.45 \times$. In addition, DuoQ has achieved accuracy improvements compared to other outlieraware software and hardware works.
