papers.abstract_zh: 量化可以在 FPGA 上高效部署大型语言模型 (LLM)，但异常值的存在会影响量化模型的准确性。现有方法主要通过通道或标记隔离和编码来处理异常值，这导致昂贵的动态量化。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了DuoQ，一个面向FPGA的算法硬件协同设计框架。 DuoQ 通过量化方案部分中的可学习等效变换和低语义标记感知有效地消除了异常值，从而促进了 4 位的每张量量化。我们共同设计量化算法和硬件架构。具体来说，DuoQ 通过新颖的 DSP 感知 PE 单元设计和编码器设计加速端到端 LLM。此外，两类后处理单元有助于实现非线性函数和动态令牌感知。实验结果表明，与不同架构的平台相比，DuoQ 的计算效率和能源效率分别提升了高达 8.8 美元和 23.45 美元。此外，与其他异常值软件和硬件作品相比，DuoQ 还实现了准确性的提高。

papers.title: DuQTTA: Dual Quantized Tensor-Train Adaptation with Decoupling Magnitude-Direction for Efficient Fine-Tuning of LLMs.
papers.abstract: Recent parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques have enabled large language models (LLMs) to be efficiently fine-tuned for specific tasks, while maintaining model performance with minimal additional trainable parameters. However, existing PEFT techniques continue to face challenges in balancing both accuracy and efficiency, especially when addressing scalability and the demands of lightweight deployment for LLMs. In this paper, we propose an efficient fine-tuning method of LLMs based on dual quantized Tensor-Train adaptation with decoupling magnitude-direction (DuQTTA). The proposed DuQTTA method employs Tensor-Train decomposition and dual-stage quantization to minimize model size and resource consumption. Additionally, it employs an adaptive optimization strategy and a decoupled update mechanism to improve model performance, thereby minimizing suboptimal outcomes and ensuring alignment with the full-parameter fine-tuning goals. Experimental results indicate that the proposed DuQTTA method outperforms existing PEFT methods, achieving up to a $65 \times$ compression rate compared to the LLaMA2-7B models, meanwhile delivering improvements of $4.44 \%, 3.14 \%$, and 0.97% over LoRA on LLaMA2-7B, LLaMA3-8B, and LLaMA2-13B, respectively. The proposed DuQTTA method is effective in compressing LLMs for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的参数高效微调（PEFT）技术使得大型语言模型（LLM）能够针对特定任务进行高效微调，同时以最少的额外可训练参数保持模型性能。然而，现有的 PEFT 技术在平衡准确性和效率方面继续面临挑战，特别是在解决可扩展性和法学硕士轻量级部署的需求时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于双量化张量训练自适应与幅度方向解耦（DuQTTA）的 LLM 高效微调方法。所提出的 DuQTTA 方法采用 Tensor-Train 分解和双级量化来最小化模型大小和资源消耗。此外，它采用自适应优化策略和解耦更新机制来提高模型性能，从而最大限度地减少次优结果并确保与全参数微调目标保持一致。实验结果表明，所提出的 DuQTTA 方法优于现有的 PEFT 方法，与 LLaMA2-7B 模型相比，压缩率高达 $65 \times$，同时在 LLaMA2-7B、LLaMA3-8B 和 LLaMA2-13B 上分别比 LoRA 提高了 $4.44 \%、3.14 \%$ 和 0.97%。所提出的 DuQTTA 方法可以有效地压缩 LLM 以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。

papers.title: Dynamic Local Usage: An Accurate Model for Usage of Tile-Internal Wiring in Global Routing.
papers.abstract: Traditional global routing simplifies routing as a Steiner Tree packing problem on a grid graph, often neglecting the need to account for tile-internal wiring connections to pin shapes. Local wiring usage is typically pre-estimated, leading to inaccuracies. To address this gap, we introduce the Dynamic Local Usage (DLU) model, which evaluates wiring usage based on exact wire shapes and optimizes routes up to detailed pin shapes. Key innovations include tip-to-tip penalty extensions to accurately model packing density and new algorithms to optimize routes according to the DLU congestion model. We demonstrate the superiority of the Dynamic Local Usage model by comparing results after global and detailed routing to an industrial global router on the 3 nm and 5 nm technology nodes. Our model achieves significant improvements in the number of vias, scenic routes, design rule violations, and timing metrics after detailed routing. Furthermore, the DLU provides a better support for incremental design changes, such as pin movements, by dynamically updating local wiring usage during routing.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的全局布线将布线简化为网格图上的斯坦纳树封装问题，通常忽略了考虑到引脚形状的块内部布线连接的需要。本地布线的使用通常是预先估计的，从而导致不准确。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了动态本地使用 (DLU) 模型，该模型根据精确的电线形状评估布线使用情况，并优化路线直至详细的引脚形状。关键创新包括用于精确建模包装密度的点对点惩罚扩展以及根据 DLU 拥塞模型优化路线的新算法。我们通过比较 3 纳米和 5 纳米技术节点上的工业全局路由器的全局和详细路由后的结果，展示了动态本地使用模型的优越性。我们的模型在详细布线后的过孔数量、风景路线、设计规则违规和时序指标方面取得了显着改进。此外，DLU 通过在布线期间动态更新本地布线使用情况，为渐进式设计变更提供更好的支持，例如引脚移动。

papers.title: DyREM: Dynamically Mitigating Quantum Readout Error with Embedded Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Quantum readout error is the most significant source of error, substantially reducing the measurement fidelity. Tensor-product-based readout error mitigation has been proposed to address this issue by approximating the mitigation matrix. However, this method inevitably encounters the dynamic generation of the mitigation matrix, leading to long latency. In this paper, we propose DyREM, a software-hardware codesign approach that mitigates readout errors with an embedded accelerator. The main innovation lies in leveraging the inherent sparsity in the nonzero probability distribution of quantum states and calculating the tensor product on an embedded accelerator. Specifically, using the output sparsity, our dataflow dynamically downsamples the original mitigation matrix, which dramatically reduces the memory requirement. Then, we design DyREM architecture that can flexibly gate the redundant computation of nonzero quantum states. Experiments demonstrate that DyREM achieves an average speedup of $9.6 \times \sim 2000 \times$ and fidelity improvements of $1.03 \times \sim 1.15 \times$ compared to state-of-the-art readout error mitigation methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子读出误差是最重要的误差源，大大降低了测量保真度。提出了基于张量积的读出错误缓解方法，通过近似缓解矩阵来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法不可避免地会遇到缓解矩阵的动态生成，导致延迟较长。在本文中，我们提出了 DyREM，这是一种软件硬件协同设计方法，可通过嵌入式加速器减少读出错误。主要创新在于利用量子态非零概率分布中固有的稀疏性并在嵌入式加速器上计算张量积。具体来说，使用输出稀疏性，我们的数据流动态地对原始缓解矩阵进行下采样，这大大减少了内存需求。然后，我们设计了 DyREM 架构，可以灵活地门控非零量子态的冗余计算。实验表明，与最先进的读出误差缓解方法相比，DyREM 的平均加速比为 $9.6 \times \sim 2000 \times$，保真度提高为 $1.03 \times \sim 1.15 \times$。

papers.title: E-morphic: Scalable Equality Saturation for Structural Exploration in Logic Synthesis.
papers.abstract: In technology mapping, the quality of the final implementation heavily relies on the circuit structure after technologyindependent optimization. Recent studies have introduced equality saturation as a novel optimization approach. However, its efficiency remains a hurdle against its wide adoption in logic synthesis. This paper proposes a highly scalable and efficient framework named E-morphic. It is the first work that employs equality saturation for resynthesis after conventional technology-independent logic optimizations, enabling structure exploration before technology mapping. Powered by several key enhancements to the equality saturation framework, such as direct e-graph-circuit conversion, solution-space pruning, and simulated annealing for e-graph extraction, this approach not only improves the scalability and extraction efficiency of e-graph rewriting but also addresses the structural bias issue present in conventional logic synthesis flows through parallel structural exploration and resynthesis. Experiments show that, compared to the state-of-the-art delay optimization flow in ABC, E-morphic on average achieves 12.54% area saving and 7.29% delay reduction on the large-scale circuits in the EPFL benchmark.
papers.abstract_zh: 在技​​术映射中，最终实现的质量很大程度上依赖于独立于技术优化后的电路结构。最近的研究引入了等式饱和作为一种新颖的优化方法。然而，其效率仍然是其在逻辑综合中广泛采用的障碍。本文提出了一种高度可扩展且高效的框架，名为 E-morphic。这是第一个在传统的独立于技术的逻辑优化之后采用等式饱和进行重新综合的工作，从而能够在技术映射之前进行结构探索。在等式饱和框架的几个关键增强的支持下，例如直接电子图电路转换、解空间剪枝和用于电子图提取的模拟退火，该方法不仅提高了电子图重写的可扩展性和提取效率，而且还通过并行结构探索和再综合解决了传统逻辑综合流程中存在的结构偏差问题。实验表明，与 ABC 中最先进的延迟优化流程相比，E-morphic 在 EPFL 基准测试中的大规模电路上平均实现了 12.54% 的面积节省和 7.29% 的延迟减少。

papers.title: Easz: An Agile Transformer-based Image Compression Framework for Resource-constrained IoTs.
papers.abstract: Neural image compression, necessary in various machine-to-machine communication scenarios, suffers from its heavy encode-decode structures and inflexibility in switching between different compression levels. Consequently, it raises significant challenges in applying the neural image compression to edge devices that are developed for powerful servers with high computational and storage capacities. We take a step to solve the challenges by proposing a new transformer-based edge-computefree image coding framework called Easz. Easz shifts the computational overhead to the server, and hence avoids the heavy encoding and model switching overhead on the edge. Easz utilizes a patch-erase algorithm to selectively remove image contents using a conditional uniform-based sampler. The erased pixels are reconstructed on the receiver side through a transformer-based framework. To further reduce the computational overhead on the receiver, we then introduce a lightweight transformer-based reconstruction structure to reduce the reconstruction load on the receiver side. Extensive evaluations conducted on a realworld testbed demonstrate multiple advantages of Easz over existing compression approaches, in terms of adaptability to different compression levels, computational efficiency, and image reconstruction quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经图像压缩是各种机器对机器通信场景中必需的，但其编码解码结构繁重且在不同压缩级别之间切换不灵活。因此，将神经图像压缩应用于为具有高计算和存储能力的强大服务器开发的边缘设备提出了重大挑战。我们提出了一种名为 Easz 的新的基于 Transformer 的边缘计算免费图像编码框架来解决这些挑战。 Easz 将计算开销转移到服务器，从而避免了边缘的繁重编码和模型切换开销。 Easz 利用补丁擦除算法，使用基于条件均匀的采样器选择性地删除图像内容。擦除的像素通过基于变压器的框架在接收器侧重建。为了进一步减少接收器的计算开销，我们引入了一种轻量级的基于变压器的重建结构，以减少接收器侧的重建负载。在现实世界的测试平台上进行的广泛评估表明，Easz 相对于现有压缩方法在对不同压缩级别的适应性、计算效率和图像重建质量方面具有多种优势。

papers.title: EDGE: DBMS-Empowered Boolean Decomposition for GIG Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Boolean decomposition is a powerful technique in logic synthesis that breaks down Boolean functions into simpler components. Decomposition-based logic synthesis yields high-quality results and is particularly effective when combined with small-window optimization methods in Gate-Inverter Graphs (GIG). However, the efficiency limitations of current methods have constrained their applicability in handling large and complex logic. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework, called EDGE, which leverages modern database techniques to accelerate Boolean decomposition, thereby achieving improved synthesis results while maintaining high efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate a runtime speedup of up to $21 \times$ and an overall reduction in node count of at least $15 \%$ compared to state-of-the-art synthesis methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 布尔分解是逻辑综合中的一种强大技术，可将布尔函数分解为更简单的组件。基于分解的逻辑综合可产生高质量的结果，并且与门逆变器图 (GIG) 中的小窗口优化方法结合使用时特别有效。然而，当前方法的效率限制限制了它们在处理大型复杂逻辑时的适用性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种名为 EDGE 的新颖框架，它利用现代数据库技术来加速布尔分解，从而在保持高效率的同时实现改进的合成结果。实验结果表明，与最先进的综合方法相比，运行时加速高达 $21 \times$，节点数量总体减少至少 $15 \%$。

papers.title: EdgeMM: Multi-Core CPU with Heterogeneous AI-Extension and Activation-aware Weight Pruning for Multimodal LLMs at Edge.
papers.abstract: Emerging multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) exhibit strong cross-modality perception and reasoning capabilities and hold great potential for various applications at edge. However, MLLMs typically consist of a compute-intensive modality encoder and a memory-bound LLM decoder, leading to distinct bottlenecks for hardware designs. In this work, we present a multi-core CPU solution with heterogeneous AI extensions, which are based on either the compute-centric systolic array or memory-centric digital compute-in-memory (CIM) coprocessors. In addition, dynamic activation-aware weight pruning and bandwidth management are developed to enhance bandwidth efficiency and core utilization, improving overall performance. We implemented our solution using commercial 22nm technology. For representative MLLMs, our evaluations show EdgeMM can achieve $2.84 \times$ performance speedup compared to laptop 3060 GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的多模态法学硕士（MLLM）表现出强大的跨模态感知和推理能力，并在各种边缘应用中具有巨大的潜力。然而，MLLM 通常由计算密集型模态编码器和内存限制的 LLM 解码器组成，导致硬件设计出现明显的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有异构 AI 扩展的多核 CPU 解决方案，该解决方案基于以计算为中心的脉动阵列或以内存为中心的数字内存计算 (CIM) 协处理器。此外，还开发了动态激活感知权重修剪和带宽管理，以提高带宽效率和核心利用率，从而提高整体性能。我们使用商用 22 纳米技术实施我们的解决方案。对于代表性的 MLLM，我们的评估显示，与笔记本电脑 3060 GPU 相比，EdgeMM 可以实现 2.84 美元×$ 的性能加速。

papers.title: Efficient and Scalable Architectures for Multi-level Superconducting Qubit Readout.
papers.abstract: Realizing the full potential of quantum computing requires large-scale quantum computers capable of running quantum error correction (QEC) to mitigate hardware errors and maintain quantum data coherence. While quantum computers operate within a two-level computational subspace, many processor modalities are inherently multi-level systems. This leads to occasional leakage into energy levels outside the computational subspace, complicating error detection and undermining QEC protocols. The problem is particularly severe in engineered qubit devices like superconducting transmons, a leading technology for fault-tolerant quantum computing. Addressing this challenge requires effective multi-level quantum system readout to identify and mitigate leakage errors. We propose a scalable, high-fidelity three-level readout that reduces FPGA resource usage by $60 \times$ compared to the baseline while reducing readout time by $20 \%$, enabling faster leakage detection. By employing matched filters to detect relaxation and excitation error patterns and integrating a modular lightweight neural network to correct crosstalk errors, the protocol significantly reduces hardware complexity, achieving a $100 \times$ reduction in neural network size. Our design supports efficient, real-time implementation on off-the-shelf FPGAs, delivering a $6.6 \%$ relative improvement in readout accuracy over the baseline. This innovation enables faster leakage mitigation, enhances QEC reliability, and accelerates the path toward faulttolerant quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 要充分发挥量子计算的潜力，需要能够运行量子纠错（QEC）的大型量子计算机，以减少硬件错误并保持量子数据的一致性。虽然量子计算机在两级计算子空间内运行，但许多处理器模式本质上是多级系统。这会导致偶尔泄漏到计算子空间之外的能级，从而使错误检测复杂化并破坏 QEC 协议。这个问题在工程量子位设备中尤其严重，例如超导传输器（容错量子计算的领先技术）。应对这一挑战需要有效的多级量子系统读出来识别和减轻泄漏错误。我们提出了一种可扩展、高保真三级读出，与基线相比，可将 FPGA 资源使用量减少 60 美元 \times$，同时将读出时间减少 20 美元 \%$，从而实现更快的泄漏检测。通过采用匹配滤波器来检测松弛和激励错误模式，并集成模块化轻量级神经网络来纠正串扰错误，该协议显着降低了硬件复杂性，实现了神经网络尺寸减少 100 倍的效果。我们的设计支持在现成的 FPGA 上进行高效、实时的实施，与基线相比，读出精度相对提高了 6.6 美元\%$。这项创新可以更快地缓解泄漏，增强 QEC 可靠性，并加速实现容错量子计算的道路。

papers.title: Efficient Continuous Logic Optimization with Diffusion Model.
papers.abstract: The logic synthesis optimization flow is crucial to the quality of results (QoR), which applies a sequence of transformations to a design. Recently, there has been a growing focus on the automatic optimization of synthesis flows to improve QoR, utilizing techniques such as Bayesian optimization and reinforcement learning, which may fall short in efficiency due to the exponentially large search space. In contrast, continuous optimization offers notable efficiency advantages by leveraging the explicit gradient. However, despite its potential, several significant concerns remain to be addressed. On one hand, it is essential to obtain a reliable gradient. On the other hand, a major challenge arises from the fact that searching within a continuous space can yield solutions that deviate from feasible ones. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach to optimize synthesis sequences within a continuous latent space. Specifically, the gradient information is derived from a QoR surrogate model, while the discrepancies between solutions and feasible transformations are minimized by a diffusion model. Experimental results on extensive benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method not only achieves lower area and delay but also improves efficiency by 5 X to 130 X, compared with previous methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑综合优化流程对于结果质量 (QoR) 至关重要，它将一系列转换应用于设计。最近，人们越来越关注综合流程的自动优化以提高 QoR，利用贝叶斯优化和强化学习等技术，但由于搜索空间呈指数级增长，这些技术可能会降低效率。相比之下，连续优化通过利用显式梯度提供了显着的效率优势。然而，尽管其潜力巨大，但仍有几个重大问题有待解决。一方面，获得可靠的梯度至关重要。另一方面，一个主要挑战来自于这样一个事实：在连续空间内搜索可能会产生偏离可行解决方案的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种在连续潜在空间内优化合成序列的有效方法。具体来说，梯度信息源自 QoR 代理模型，而解决方案与可行变换之间的差异则通过扩散模型最小化。大量基准测试的实验结果表明，与之前的方法相比，所提出的方法不仅实现了更低的面积和延迟，而且将效率提高了 5 倍至 130 倍。

papers.title: Efficient Edge Vision Transformer Accelerator with Decoupled Chunk Attention and Hybrid Computing-In-Memory.
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are new foundation models for vision applications. Edge-deploying ViTs to realize energy-saving, low-latency, and high-performance dense predictions have wide applications, such as autonomous driving and surveillance image analysis. However, the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism renders ViTs slow and resource-intensive, particularly for pixel-level dense predictions that involve long contexts. Additionally, the pyramid-like architecture of modern ViT variants leads to an unbalanced workload, further reducing hardware utilization and decreasing the throughput of conventional edge devices. To this end, we propose an algorithm-hardware co-optimized edge ViT accelerator tailored for efficient dense predictions. At the algorithm level, we propose a decoupled chunk attention (DCA) mechanism implemented in a pipelined manner to reduce off-chip memory access, thereby enabling efficient dense predictions within limited on-chip memory. At the architecture level, we introduce a hybrid architecture that combines SRAM-based computing-in-memory (CIM) and nonvolatile RRAM storage to eliminate extensive off-chip memory access, with a fusion scheduling to balance workloads and minimize intermediate on-chip memory access. At the circuit level, a bit/element two-way-reconfigurable CIM macro is proposed to improve hardware utilization across pyramidal ViT blocks with varied matrix sizes. The experimental results on object detection, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation tasks demonstrate that our design can efficiently process patch lengths up to 16384 with a speedup of 18.5×-217.1×, a reduction in memory accesses of 1.7×-7.4×, and an improvement in energy efficiency of 1.8×, under less than 1% performance degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 是视觉应用的新基础模型。边缘部署ViT可实现节能、低延迟和高性能的密集预测，具有广泛的应用，例如自动驾驶和监控图像分析。然而，自注意力机制的二次复杂度使得 ViT 速度缓慢且资源密集，特别是对于涉及长上下文的像素级密集预测。此外，现代 ViT 变体的金字塔式架构会导致工作负载不平衡，进一步降低硬件利用率并降低传统边缘设备的吞吐量。为此，我们提出了一种算法-硬件协同优化的边缘 ViT 加速器，专为高效密集预测而定制。在算法层面，我们提出了一种以流水线方式实现的解耦块注意力（DCA）机制，以减少片外存储器访问，从而在有限的片上存储器内实现高效的密集预测。在架构层面，我们引入了一种混合架构，该架构结合了基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 和非易失性 RRAM 存储，以消除大量的片外内存访问，并通过融合调度来平衡工作负载并最大限度地减少中间片上内存访问。在电路层面，提出了一种位/元素双向可重构 CIM 宏，以提高具有不同矩阵大小的金字塔 ViT 块的硬件利用率。目标检测、语义分割和深度估计任务的实验结果表明，我们的设计可以有效地处理高达16384的补丁长度，加速比为18.5×-217.1×，内存访问减少1.7×-7.4×，能源效率提高1.8×，性能下降不到1％。

papers.title: Efficient Rectification Signal Validation for Optimal Functional ECO Patch Generation.
papers.abstract: Synthesis-based functional Engineering Change Order (ECO) algorithms, as classified in [1], are particularly effective for addressing functional bugs. These algorithms typically involve two primary steps: (1) identifying rectification signals to address functional mismatches, and (2) generating patch circuits based on these signals. While much of the existing research focuses on enhancing step (2), step (1) often remains somewhat ad hoc and inefficient.In this paper, we propose a novel approach for systematically collecting and validating all possible sets of rectification signals from a given set of candidates. Leveraging a heuristic for grouping and ranking rectification signals, our ECO flow efficiently identifies minimal patches while achieving a highly competitive runtime. Our contributions include three key innovations: a heuristic for identifying high-quality rectification candidates, an efficient algorithm for validating all feasible sets of rectification signals, and a signal grouping and ranking technique that ensures minimal patch size. When integrated with an open-source patch generation tool, our method demonstrates an average reduction of 44% in patch sizes compared to a leading commercial ECO tool on benchmark circuits.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于综合的功能工程变更指令 (ECO) 算法（如 [1] 中所分类）对于解决功能错误特别有效。这些算法通常涉及两个主要步骤：(1) 识别整流信号以解决功能不匹配问题，以及 (2) 基于这些信号生成补丁电路。虽然现有的许多研究都集中在增强步骤（2）上，但步骤（1）通常仍然有些临时性和低效。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，用于系统地收集和验证来自给定候选集的所有可能的整改信号集。利用启发式对纠正信号进行分组和排名，我们的 ECO 流程可以有效识别最少的补丁，同时实现高度竞争的运行时间。我们的贡献包括三项关键创新：用于识别高质量校正候选的启发式方法、用于验证所有可行的校正信号集的有效算法，以及确保最小补丁大小的信号分组和排序技术。当与开源补丁生成工具集成时，与基准电路上领先的商业 ECO 工具相比，我们的方法显示补丁大小平均减少了 44%。

papers.title: Efficient Recycling Subspace Truncation Method for Periodic Small-Signal Analysis.
papers.abstract: Periodic small-signal analysis is crucial but timeconsuming in RF simulation, since it may deal with many frequency points. While the Krylov subspace recycling method has greatly accelerated the simulation, the increasing memory cost in large-scale RF simulation has become a new bottleneck. A remedy for memory shortage is to restart the recycling algorithm, but may cause excessive extra iterations. To address this issue, this paper outlines a framework of recycling subspace truncation method for periodic small-signal analysis, provided with an efficient initial guess choice method and a Floquet-based subspace truncation strategy. Numerical results show that compared to the existing methods, the proposed method achieves up to $2.5 \times$ speedup in the same memory cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 定期小信号分析在射频仿真中至关重要，但也很耗时，因为它可能处理许多频率点。虽然Krylov子空间回收方法大大加快了仿真速度，但大规模射频仿真中不断增加的内存成本已成为新的瓶颈。内存不足的补救方法是重新启动回收算法，但可能会导致过多的额外迭代。为了解决这个问题，本文概述了用于周期性小信号分析的循环子空间截断方法的框架，提供了有效的初始猜测选择方法和基于Floquet的子空间截断策略。数值结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法在相同的内存成本下实现了高达 2.5 美元的加速。

papers.title: Efficient Weight Mapping and Resource Scheduling on Crossbar-based Multi-core CIM Systems.
papers.abstract: Crossbar-based computing-in-memory (CIM) systems facilitate large-scale parallel multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operations, while a domain-specific compiler (DSC) plays a pivotal role in optimizing the deployment of neural network algorithms on such systems. With the development of multi-core and large-core architectures, some key compiler problems such as high parallel processing, resource utilization, and crossbar array assignment methods have not been solved. For low-latency application scenarios, we have designed a resource scheduling strategy for our hardware system based on stream data processing to reduce the latency caused by intra-core and intercore communication. Additionally, a weight mapping strategy has been developed to maximize the potential of crossbar arrays in convolutional neural networks (CNNs) deployment. Experimental results on our multi-core eFlash-based CIM system-on-chip (SoC) demonstrate that these two technologies help CNNs achieve a 76% reduction in latency, a 30% improvement in resource utilization, and the use rate of crossbar array that can reach up to 94.7%.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Crossbar 的内存计算 (CIM) 系统有利于大规模并行乘法累加 (MAC) 操作，而特定领域编译器 (DSC) 在优化此类系统上神经网络算法的部署方面发挥着关键作用。随着多核和大核架构的发展，一些关键的编译器问题，如高并行处理、资源利用率、交叉数组分配方法等尚未得到解决。针对低延迟的应用场景，我们为硬件系统设计了基于流数据处理的资源调度策略，以减少核内和核间通信带来的延迟。此外，还开发了权重映射策略，以最大限度地发挥交叉阵列在卷积神经网络 (CNN) 部署中的潜力。在我们基于eFlash的多核CIM片上系统（SoC）上的实验结果表明，这两种技术帮助CNN实现了76%的延迟降低、30%的资源利用率提升，并且Crossbar阵列的使用率可以达到94.7%。

papers.title: ELF: Efficient Logic Synthesis by Pruning Redundancy in Refactoring.
papers.abstract: In electronic design automation, logic optimization operators play a crucial role in minimizing the gate count of logic circuits. However, their computation demands are high. Operators such as refactor conventionally form iterative cuts for each node, striving for a more compact representation - a task which often fails $98 \%$ on average. Prior research has sought to mitigate computational cost through parallelization. In contrast, our approach leverages a classifier to prune unsuccessful cuts preemptively, thus eliminating unnecessary resynthesis operations. Experiments on the refactor operator using the EPFL benchmark suite and 10 large industrial designs demonstrate that this technique can speedup logic optimization by $3.9 \times$ on average compared with the state-of-the-art ABC implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 在电子设计自动化中，逻辑优化算子在最小化逻辑电路的门数方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，他们的计算要求很高。诸如重构之类的运算符通常会为每个节点形成迭代削减，力求更紧凑的表示 - 这项任务通常会平均失败 98 \%$。先前的研究试图通过并行化来降低计算成本。相比之下，我们的方法利用分类器预先修剪不成功的剪切，从而消除不必要的重新合成操作。使用 EPFL 基准套件和 10 个大型工业设计对重构算子进行的实验表明，与最先进的 ABC 实现相比，该技术平均可以将逻辑优化速度加快 3.9 美元。

papers.title: Enabling Data-Deduplication-Assisted Data Relocation for Interlaced Magnetic Recording.
papers.abstract: Interlaced Magnetic Recording (IMR) drives have been regarded as promising hard disk drives (HDDs) to meet the ever-growing storage demand in the post-AI era. Among various technologies, IMR drives achieve increased storage capacity by overlapping tracks in an interlaced fashion; however, updating data on overlapped tracks necessitates rewriting up to two tracks, which can degrade performance. Previous strategies have attempted to reduce track rewrites by either delaying the timing of overlapping based on storage space usage or relocating frequently updated data to non-overlapped tracks through update-frequency-based hot/cold data separation. In contrast, this paper proposes a novel approach that leverages data deduplication as a natural solution to the rewrite challenge in IMR drives. Unlike conventional hot/cold separation, this paper utilizes deduplication metadata, specifically reference counts, as a direct indicator for data relocation. The rationale behind the proposed approach is that deduplicated data, which remains static unless reference counts drop to one, can be stored or migrated to overlapped tracks without inducing future track rewrites. The proposed approach diverges from traditional frequency tracking methods by leveraging data deduplication information to guide data placement and reduce rewriting. Evaluation results show that the proposed scheme effectively reduces the accumulated read/write latency by $37.57 \%$ on average compared with state-of-the-art data management on IMR drives with data deduplication enabled.
papers.abstract_zh: 隔行磁记录（IMR）驱动器被认为是有前途的硬盘驱动器（HDD），可以满足后人工智能时代不断增长的存储需求。在各种技术中，IMR 驱动器通过以交错方式重叠磁道来实现存储容量的增加；然而，更新重叠磁道上的数据需要重写最多两个磁道，这会降低性能。先前的策略试图通过基于存储空间使用情况延迟重叠的时间或通过基于更新频率的热/冷数据分离将频繁更新的数据重新定位到非重叠磁道来减少磁道重写。相比之下，本文提出了一种新颖的方法，利用重复数据删除作为 IMR 驱动器重写挑战的自然解决方案。与传统的热/冷分离不同，本文利用重复数据删除元数据，特别是引用计数，作为数据重定位的直接指标。所提出的方法背后的基本原理是，除非引用计数降至一，否则重复数据删除的数据将保持静态，可以将其存储或迁移到重叠磁道，而不会引起未来的磁道重写。所提出的方法与传统的频率跟踪方法不同，它利用重复数据删除信息来指导数据放置并减少重写。评估结果表明，与启用重复数据删除的 IMR 驱动器上最先进的数据管理相比，所提出的方案有效地将累积读/写延迟平均降低了 $37.57 \%$。

papers.title: Enabling On-Tiny-Device Model Personalization via Gradient Condensing and Alternant Partial Update.
papers.abstract: On-device training enables the model to adapt to user-specific data by fine-tuning a pre-trained model locally. As embedded devices become ubiquitous, on-device training is increasingly essential since users can benefit from the personalized model without transmitting data and model parameters to the server. Despite significant efforts toward efficient training, ondevice training still faces a major challenge: The prohibitive cost of multi-layer backpropagation strains the limited resources of tiny devices. In this paper, we propose an algorithm-system cooptimization framework TinyMP that enables self-adaptive on-tiny-device model personalization. To mitigate backpropagation costs, we introduce Gradient Condensing to condense the gradient map structure, significantly reducing the computational complexity and memory consumption of backpropagation while preserving model performance. To further reduce computation overhead, we propose Alternant Partial Update, a mechanism that locally and alternatively selects essential parameters to update without requiring retraining or offline evolutionary search. Our framework is evaluated through extensive experiments using various CNN models (e.g., MobileNetV2, MCUNet) on embedded devices with minimal resources (e.g., OpenMV-H7 with less than 1MB SRAM and 2 MB Flash). Experimental results show that our framework achieves up to $2.4 \times$ speedup, 80.8% memory saving, and 30.3% accuracy improvement on downstream tasks, outperforming SOTA approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 设备端训练通过在本地微调预训练模型，使模型能够适应用户特定的数据。随着嵌入式设备变得无处不在，设备上的培训变得越来越重要，因为用户可以从个性化模型中受益，而无需将数据和模型参数传输到服务器。尽管在高效训练方面做出了巨大努力，但设备上训练仍然面临着重大挑战：多层反向传播的高昂成本给微型设备的有限资源带来了压力。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法系统协同优化框架TinyMP，该框架能够实现自适应微型设备模型个性化。为了降低反向传播成本，我们引入梯度压缩来压缩梯度图结构，显着降低反向传播的计算复杂度和内存消耗，同时保持模型性能。为了进一步减少计算开销，我们提出了交替部分更新（Alternant Partial Update），这是一种本地选择性地选择基本参数进行更新的机制，无需重新训练或离线进化搜索。我们的框架是通过在资源最少的嵌入式设备（例如，具有小于 1MB SRAM 和 2 MB 闪存的 OpenMV-H7）上使用各种 CNN 模型（例如 MobileNetV2、MCUNet）进行大量实验来评估的。实验结果表明，我们的框架在下游任务上实现了高达 2.4 美元的加速、80.8% 的内存节省和 30.3% 的准确性提高，优于 SOTA 方法。

papers.title: Energy-Efficient Large-Scale Vector Similarity Search in NAND-Flash via Hybrid Matching.
papers.abstract: Vector similarity search (VSS) is crucial in many AI applications, such as few-shot learning (FSL) and approximate nearest-neighbor search (ANNS), but it demands significant memory capacity and incurs substantial energy costs for data transfers during large-scale comparisons. Various in-memory search technologies have been developed to improve energy efficiency, with NAND-based multi-bit content-addressable memory (MCAM) standing out as a promising solution for its high density and large capacity. MCAM can operate in exact-search (ES) mode, supporting only perfect matches with low energy cost, or in approximate-search (AS) mode, enabling flexible VSS. However, AS mode incurs significant energy waste when comparing queries with non-target stored vectors. To address this issue, we propose Hybrid-M, a 3D NAND-based in-memory VSS architecture that integrates both modes into a single hybrid matching process, using ES mode as a filter to reduce redundant searches for AS mode. We apply three techniques to optimize this integration: range encoding for multi-level cells (MLC) to enhance filtering, search voltage shifts to mitigate the impact on AS accuracy and reduce matching currents, and a filtering-aware training method to further improve reliability and energy efficiency. Results show that Hybrid-M achieves comparable accuracy while reducing energy consumption by 67% to 83% compared to MACM-based VSS using only AS mode, across various many-class FSL and ANNS workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 向量相似性搜索（VSS）在许多人工智能应用中至关重要，例如少样本学习（FSL）和近似最近邻搜索（ANNS），但它需要大量的内存容量，并且在大规模比较期间的数据传输会产生大量的能源成本。为了提高能源效率，人们开发了各种内存搜索技术，其中基于 NAND 的多位内容可寻址存储器 (MCAM) 因其高密度和大容量而成为一种有前途的解决方案。 MCAM 可以在精确搜索 (ES) 模式下运行，仅支持低能耗的完美匹配，也可以在近似搜索 (AS) 模式下运行，从而实现灵活的 VSS。然而，当将查询与非目标存储向量进行比较时，AS 模式会导致大量的能源浪费。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Hybrid-M，这是一种基于 3D NAND 的内存 VSS 架构，它将两种模式集成到单个混合匹配过程中，使用 ES 模式作为过滤器来减少 AS 模式的冗余搜索。我们应用三种技术来优化这种集成：用于多级单元 (MLC) 的范围编码以增强滤波、搜索电压偏移以减轻对 AS 精度的影响并减少匹配电流，以及滤波感知训练方法以进一步提高可靠性和能效。结果表明，与仅使用 AS 模式的基于 MACM 的 VSS 相比，Hybrid-M 在各种多类 FSL 和 ANNS 工作负载中实现了相当的精度，同时将能耗降低了 67% 至 83%。

papers.title: Enhancing LLM-based Quantum Code Generation with Multi-Agent Optimization and Quantum Error Correction.
papers.abstract: Multi-agent frameworks with Large Language Models (LLMs) have become promising tools for generating generalpurpose programming languages using test-driven development, allowing developers to create more accurate and robust code. However, their potential has not been fully unleashed for domainspecific programming languages, where specific domain exhibits unique optimization opportunities for customized improvement. In this paper, we take the first step in exploring multi-agent code generation for quantum programs. By identifying the unique optimizations in quantum designs such as quantum error correction, we introduce a novel multi-agent framework tailored to generating accurate, fault-tolerant quantum code. Each agent in the framework focuses on distinct optimizations, iteratively refining the code using a semantic analyzer with multi-pass inference, alongside an error correction code decoder. We also examine the effectiveness of traditional techniques, like Chain-ofThought (CoT) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in the context of quantum programming, uncovering observations that are different from general-purpose code generation. To evaluate our approach, we develop a test suite to measure the impact each optimization has on the accuracy of the generated code. Our findings indicate that techniques such as structured CoT significantly improve the generation of quantum algorithms by up to $50 \%$. In contrast, we have also found that certain techniques such as RAG show limited improvement, yielding an accuracy increase of only $4 \%$. Moreover, we showcase examples of AIassisted quantum error prediction and correction, demonstrating the effectiveness of our multi-agent framework in reducing the errors of generated quantum programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有大型语言模型 (LLM) 的多代理框架已成为使用测试驱动开发生成通用编程语言的有前景的工具，使开发人员能够创建更准确、更健壮的代码。然而，对于特定领域的编程语言，它们的潜力尚未完全释放，其中特定领域展示了定制改进的独特优化机会。在本文中，我们迈出了探索量子程序多智能体代码生成的第一步。通过识别量子设计中的独特优化（例如量子纠错），我们引入了一种新颖的多代理框架，专门用于生成准确的、容错的量子代码。框架中的每个代理都专注于不同的优化，使用具有多通道推理的语义分析器以及纠错代码解码器迭代地完善代码。我们还研究了传统技术的有效性，例如量子编程背景下的思想链（CoT）和检索增强生成（RAG），发现了与通用代码生成不同的观察结果。为了评估我们的方法，我们开发了一个测试套件来衡量每个优化对生成代码的准确性的影响。我们的研究结果表明，结构化 CoT 等技术可显着提高量子算法的生成速度高达 50 \%$。相比之下，我们还发现某些技术（例如 RAG）的改进有限，准确率仅提高了 4 美元\%$。此外，我们展示了人工智能辅助量子错误预测和纠正的示例，证明了我们的多代理框架在减少生成的量子程序错误方面的有效性。

papers.title: EnQode: Fast Amplitude Embedding for Quantum Machine Learning Using Classical Data.
papers.abstract: Amplitude embedding (AE) is essential in quantum machine learning (QML) for encoding classical data onto quantum circuits. However, conventional AE methods suffer from deep, variable-length circuits that introduce high output error due to extensive gate usage and variable error rates across samples, resulting in noise-driven inconsistencies that degrade model accuracy. We introduce EnQode, a fast AE technique based on symbolic representation that addresses these limitations by clustering dataset samples and solving for cluster mean states through a low-depth, machine-specific ansatz. Optimized to reduce physical gates and SWAP operations, EnQode ensures all samples face consistent, low noise levels by standardizing circuit depth and composition. With over 94% fidelity in data mapping, EnQode enables robust, high-performance QML on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. Our opensource solution provides a scalable and efficient alternative for integrating classical data with quantum models.
papers.abstract_zh: 幅度嵌入 (AE) 在量子机器学习 (QML) 中对于将经典数据编码到量子电路中至关重要。然而，传统的 AE 方法受到深度、可变长度电路的困扰，由于广泛的门使用和样本之间的可变错误率，这些电路会引入高输出误差，从而导致噪声驱动的不一致，从而降低模型精度。我们引入了 EnQode，这是一种基于符号表示的快速 AE 技术，它通过对数据集样本进行聚类并通过低深度、特定于机器的 ansatz 求解聚类平均状态来解决这些限制。 EnQode 经过优化，可减少物理门和交换操作，通过标准化电路深度和组成，确保所有样本都具有一致的低噪声水平。 EnQode 的数据映射保真度超过 94%，可在噪声中等规模量子 (NISQ) 设备上实现稳健、高性能的 QML。我们的开源解决方案为将经典数据与量子模型集成提供了可扩展且高效的替代方案。

papers.title: Ensembler: Protect Collaborative Inference Privacy from Model Inversion Attack via Selective Ensemble.
papers.abstract: For collaborative inference through a cloud computing platform, it is sometimes essential for the client to shield its sensitive information from the cloud provider. In this paper, we introduce Ensembler, an extensible framework designed to substantially increase the difficulty of conducting model inversion attacks by adversarial parties. Ensembler leverages selective model ensemble on the adversarial server to obfuscate the reconstruction of the client’s private information. Our experiments demonstrate that Ensembler can effectively shield input images from reconstruction attacks, even when the client only retains one layer of the network locally. Ensembler significantly outperforms baseline methods by up to $\mathbf{4 3. 5 \%}$ in structural similarity while only incurring 4.8% time overhead during inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于通过云计算平台进行协作推理，客户端有时必须向云提供商屏蔽其敏感信息。在本文中，我们介绍了 Ensembler，这是一个可扩展的框架，旨在大幅增加对手进行模型反转攻击的难度。 Ensembler 利用对抗服务器上的选择性模型集成来混淆客户端私人信息的重建。我们的实验表明，即使客户端在本地仅保留一层网络，Ensembler 也可以有效地保护输入图像免受重建攻击。 Ensembler 在结构相似性方面明显优于基线方法高达 $\mathbf{4 3. 5 \%}$，而在推理过程中仅产生 4.8% 的时间开销。

papers.title: EPIC: Error PredIction and Correction for Power-Efficient Voltage Underscaling Multiply-Accumulate Unit.
papers.abstract: Matrix multiplication dominates the power consumption in compute-intensive applications such as deep neural networks (DNNs), spurring intensive investigations into power-efficient multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. Among the mainstream low-power design methodologies, voltage underscaling can achieve effective power savings yet induce timing errors that may lead to catastrophic accuracy loss. In this paper, we propose an error prediction and correction framework (denoted as EPIC) for arbitrary MAC unit under voltage underscaling, which predicts the timing errors and samples the correct output by using a delay-tunable clock. A prediction bits searching algorithm is proposed to enhance the prediction accuracy with low hardware cost, resulting in up to 100% accuracy. While preserving the accuracy, EPIC achieves up to 52% power savings over the corresponding MAC operating at nominal voltage. With transistor-level optimizations, EPIC incurs only 8% area and 1% power overheads, achieving 100% error correction under a voltage underscaling ratio of $\mathbf{0. 7 4}$. Compared to state-of-the-art error resilient circuit designs, EPIC consumes 60%-88% less area. Additionally, to achieve the accuracy performance of EPIC in error-resilient applications, we propose a simulation workflow involving precise timing features, enabling an accurate simulation of voltage underscaling MAC in large-scale applications. The experimental results show that, under voltage-underscaling, the MAC with EPIC consumes 11% less power than the one without EPIC, when a same accuracy as exact implementation is required in multi-layer perceptron (MLP).
papers.abstract_zh: 矩阵乘法在深度神经网络 (DNN) 等计算密集型应用中的功耗占主导地位，这促使人们对节能乘法累加 (MAC) 单元进行深入研究。在主流的低功耗设计方法中，电压降标可以实现有效的节能，但会引起时序错误，从而可能导致灾难性的精度损失。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对电压下缩放下的任意MAC单元的错误预测和校正框架（表示为EPIC），该框架使用延迟可调时钟来预测时序错误并采样正确的输出。提出了一种预测位搜索算法，以较低的硬件成本提高预测精度，准确率高达100%。在保持精度的同时，EPIC 比在标称电压下运行的相应 MAC 节能高达 52%。通过晶体管级优化，EPIC 仅产生 8% 的面积和 1% 的功率开销，在 $\mathbf{0 的电压降标比下实现 100% 的纠错。 7 4}$。与最先进的错误恢复电路设计相比，EPIC 占用的面积减少了 60%-88%。此外，为了在容错应用中实现 EPIC 的精确性能，我们提出了一种涉及精确时序功能的仿真工作流程，从而能够在大规模应用中精确仿真电压下标度 MAC。实验结果表明，在电压降低的情况下，当多层感知器 (MLP) 需要与精确实现相同的精度时，带有 EPIC 的 MAC 比没有 EPIC 的 MAC 消耗的功率减少 11%。

papers.title: EPICS: Efficient Parallel Pattern Fault Simulation for Sequential Circuits via Strongly Connected Components.
papers.abstract: As functional safety of electronic chips gains importance in autonomous vehicles and aerospace, standards like ISO 26262 mandate high diagnostic coverage, requiring extensive gate-level fault simulations. However, for large-scale industrial sequential circuits, these simulations are time-consuming, creating a significant bottleneck in chip development. Prior approaches have focused on reducing computational complexity and optimizing CPU hardware usage by minimizing redundant computations during fault propagation and leveraging bit-level parallel processing capabilities. Techniques like parallel-pattern and event-driven simulations have improved performance in combinational circuits but face limitations in sequential circuits due to timing dependencies within loops. The challenge lies in parallelizing simulations across different cycles without violating these dependencies, which is exacerbated by the complex feedback structures in SCCs. In this work, we propose a novel parallel-pattern fault simulation framework that combines loop fusion with efficient event traversal to accelerate sequential circuit simulations. By compiling simple loops into larger nodes, we reduce the number of feedback events without introducing excessive redundancy. For larger SCCs, we develop specialized algorithms for selecting loop entrance nodes based on indegree analysis and implement the lazy propagation strategy for internal nodes. This approach minimizes simulation events caused by inaccurate predictions and reduces overhead associated with false event propagation. We integrate these techniques into our simulation framework, EPICS, which strategically mixes compiled and event-driven simulations to optimize performance. Experimental results demonstrate that EPICS achieves a $5.94 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art commercial tool while maintaining the same fault coverage.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着电子芯片的功能安全在自动驾驶汽车和航空航天领域变得越来越重要，ISO 26262 等标准要求高诊断覆盖率，需要广泛的门级故障模拟。然而，对于大规模工业时序电路，这些模拟非常耗时，给芯片开发造成了重大瓶颈。先前的方法侧重于通过最大限度地减少故障传播期间的冗余计算并利用位级并行处理功能来降低计算复杂性并优化 CPU 硬件使用。并行模式和事件驱动仿真等技术提高了组合电路的性能，但由于循环内的时序依赖性，在时序电路中面临着限制。挑战在于在不违反这些依赖性的情况下跨不同周期并行模拟，而 SCC 中复杂的反馈结构加剧了这种依赖性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的并行模式故障仿真框架，该框架将循环融合与高效事件遍历相结合，以加速顺序电路仿真。通过将简单的循环编译成更大的节点，我们减少了反馈事件的数量，而不会引入过多的冗余。对于较大的SCC，我们开发了专门的算法来基于入度分析选择循环入口节点，并为内部节点实现惰性传播策略。这种方法最大限度地减少了由不准确的预测引起的模拟事件，并减少了与错误事件传播相关的开销。我们将这些技术集成到我们的模拟框架 EPICS 中，该框架战略性地混合编译模拟和事件驱动模拟以优化性能。实验结果表明，EPICS 比最先进的商业工具实现了 5.94 美元的加速，同时保持相同的故障覆盖率。

papers.title: EPOC: An Efficient Pulse Generation Framework with Advanced Synthesis for Quantum Circuits.
papers.abstract: In this work, we aim to address the computational overhead challenge in quantum optimal control while reducing circuit latency. We propose a novel approach combining ZX-Calculus, circuit partitioning, and circuit synthesis for pulse generation. By implementing finer granularity in pulse generation and exploring equivalent circuit representations, we achieve increased parallelism and decreased latency. Our method demonstrates a 31.74% reduction in latency compared to previous work and a 76.80% reduction compared to gate-based pulse generation methods, while minimizing computational overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决量子最优控制中的计算开销挑战，同时减少电路延迟。我们提出了一种结合 ZX 微积分、电路分区和电路合成来生成脉冲的新颖方法。通过在脉冲生成中实现更精细的粒度并探索等效电路表示，我们实现了更高的并行性和更低的延迟。我们的方法表明，与之前的工作相比，延迟减少了 31.74%，与基于门的脉冲生成方法相比，延迟减少了 76.80%，同时最大限度地减少了计算开销。

papers.title: ESM: A Framework for Building Effective Surrogate Models for Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search.
papers.abstract: Hardware-aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is one of the most promising techniques for designing efficient Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) for resource-constrained devices. Surrogate models play a crucial role in hardware-aware NAS as they enable efficient prediction of performance characteristics (e.g., inference latency and energy consumption) of different candidate models on the target hardware device. In this paper, we focus on building hardware-aware latency prediction models. We study different types of surrogate models and highlight their strengths and weaknesses. We perform a systematic analysis to understand the impact of different factors that can influence the prediction accuracy of these models, aiming to assess the importance of each stage involved in the model designing process and identify methods and policies necessary for designing/training an effective estimation model, specifically for GPU-powered devices. Based on the insights gained from the analysis, we present a holistic framework that enables reliable dataset generation and efficient model generation, considering the overall costs of different stages of the model generation pipeline.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 是为资源受限设备设计高效深度神经网络 (DNN) 的最有前途的技术之一。代理模型在硬件感知 NAS 中发挥着至关重要的作用，因为它们能够有效预测目标硬件设备上不同候选模型的性能特征（例如，推理延迟和能耗）。在本文中，我们专注于构建硬件感知的延迟预测模型。我们研究不同类型的替代模型并强调它们的优点和缺点。我们进行系统分析，以了解影响这些模型预测准确性的不同因素的影响，旨在评估模型设计过程中涉及的每个阶段的重要性，并确定设计/训练有效估计模型（特别是针对 GPU 驱动的设备）所需的方法和策略。基于从分析中获得的见解，我们提出了一个整体框架，可以实现可靠的数据集生成和高效的模型生成，并考虑模型生成管道不同阶段的总体成本。

papers.title: Espresso: Exploiting the Sparsity Property in Event Sensors with Spatiotemporal Ordering.
papers.abstract: Event-based vision sensors are novel cameras inspired by human eyes, capable of capturing the rapid motion of objects with the high-speed sparse event stream. However, it is challenging to efficiently stream process event data without demolishing its sparsity. In this paper, we design Espresso, an architecture for event-based vision processing that can efficiently stream spatiotemporal events while preserving sparsity. We implement Espresso on the FPGA platform and design experiments to compare the performance with embedded GPU and line-buffer-based accelerator. In real-world scenarios, Espresso achieves throughput up to 5000 fps, which is $5.1 \times$ higher than the embedded GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于事件的视觉传感器是受人眼启发的新型相机，能够通过高速稀疏事件流捕捉物体的快速运动。然而，在不破坏事件数据稀疏性的情况下有效地流处理事件数据是一项挑战。在本文中，我们设计了 Espresso，一种基于事件的视觉处理架构，可以有效地传输时空事件，同时保持稀疏性。我们在 FPGA 平台上实现 Espresso 并设计实验，以将其与嵌入式 GPU 和基于行缓冲区的加速器的性能进行比较。在现实场景中，Espresso 的吞吐量高达 5000 fps，比嵌入式 GPU 高 5.1 美元。

papers.title: EVA: An Efficient and Versatile Generative Engine for Targeted Discovery of Novel Analog Circuits.
papers.abstract: Analog circuit design has traditionally depended on manual expertise, slowing the discovery of novel topologies essential for advanced technologies like AI, $5 \mathrm{G} / 6 \mathrm{G}$, and quantum computing. While AI-driven methods have accelerated hardware design workflows, most of them focus on topology synthesis, often reusing known structures to achieve specific goals. The challenge of discovering entirely new, high-performance topologies remains largely underexplored due to its abstract nature. In this work, we introduce EVA, an efficient and versatile generative engine for discovering novel analog circuit topologies. EVA employs a bottom-up generation framework, using a decoder-only transformer to sequentially predict device pin connections and create diverse circuits from scratch. Pretraining on unlabeled circuit topologies builds foundational knowledge about circuit connectivity, achieving baseline discovery efficiency by generating valid circuits and reducing performance-labeled samples needed in fine-tuning. For targeted discovery of highperformance designs, EVA leverages two fine-tuning strate-gies-proximal policy optimization (PPO) and direct preference optimization (DPO)-to further enhance discovery efficiency for relevant, high-performing topologies. Experimental results across various circuit types highlight EVA’s strengths in validity, novelty, versatility, and both training sample and discovery efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统上，模拟电路设计依赖于手工专业知识，从而减缓了人工智能、$5 \mathrm{G} / 6 \mathrm{G}$ 和量子计算等先进技术所必需的新颖拓扑的发现速度。虽然人工智能驱动的方法加速了硬件设计工作流程，但大多数都侧重于拓扑综合，通常重用已知结构来实现特定目标。由于其抽象性质，发现全新的高性能拓扑的挑战在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 EVA，一种高效且多功能的生成引擎，用于发现新颖的模拟电路拓扑。 EVA 采用自下而上的生成框架，使用仅解码器的变压器来顺序预测器件引脚连接并从头开始创建不同的电路。对未标记的电路拓扑进行预训练可以构建有关电路连接的基础知识，通过生成有效电路并减少微调所需的性能标记样本来实现基线发现效率。为了有针对性地发现高性能设计，EVA 利用两种微调策略——邻近策略优化 (PPO) 和直接偏好优化 (DPO)——进一步提高相关高性能拓扑的发现效率。各种电路类型的实验结果凸显了 EVA 在有效性、新颖性、多功能性以及训练样本和发现效率方面的优势。

papers.title: Expanding Logical Space Freely: A Memory-efficient Mapping Table Design for Compressional SSDs.
papers.abstract: Compressional SSDs can be a mixed blessing. While they offer users expanded logical space beyond the physical capacity, they complicate the Flash Translation Layer (FTL) design by requiring a larger Logical-to-Physical (L2P) address mapping, which places a heavier burden on the limited in-SSD memory, leading to a degraded I/O performance. In this paper, we aim to reduce the memory footprint of the L2P mapping table in compressional SSDs by proposing a novel N-to-1 L2P mapping table design that consolidates multiple logical entries into a single entry. This approach eliminates the duplication of physical page numbers when a physical page contains several compressed logical pages. To accommodate the dynamic compression ratios of real-world workloads, we introduce promotion and demotion that enable mapping table entries to migrate between pages with different compression ratios. Additionally, to address the issue of partial invalidation-where some compressed logical pages within a physical page are invalid due to the N-to-1 mapping-we present a compression-aware garbage collection algorithm aimed at minimizing the number of copy operations for partially invalid physical pages. We have implemented our design in MQsim, a widely used SSD simulator, and have conducted a series of experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. The results demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces the mapping table size in compressional SSDs, leading to an improved mapping table cache hit ratio and a reduced I/O latency compared to traditional compressional SSDs.
papers.abstract_zh: 压缩 SSD 可能是好坏参半。虽然它们为用户提供了超出物理容量的扩展逻辑空间，但它们需要更大的逻辑到物理 (L2P) 地址映射，从而使闪存转换层 (FTL) 设计变得复杂，这给有限的 SSD 内存带来了更重的负担，导致 I/O 性能下降。在本文中，我们的目标是通过提出一种新颖的 N 对 1 L2P 映射表设计来减少压缩 SSD 中 L2P 映射表的内存占用，该设计将多个逻辑条目合并为单个条目。当物理页包含多个压缩逻辑页时，此方法消除了物理页号的重复。为了适应实际工作负载的动态压缩比，我们引入了升级和降级，使映射表条目能够在具有不同压缩比的页面之间迁移。此外，为了解决部分无效问题（由于 N 对 1 映射，物理页中的一些压缩逻辑页无效），我们提出了一种压缩感知垃圾收集算法，旨在最大限度地减少部分无效物理页的复制操作数量。我们在广泛使用的 SSD 模拟器 MQsim 中实现了我们的设计，并进行了一系列实验来评估所提出技术的有效性。结果表明，与传统压缩 SSD 相比，我们的方法显着减小了压缩 SSD 中的映射表大小，从而提高了映射表缓存命中率并减少了 I/O 延迟。

papers.title: Exploiting Power Side-Channel Vulnerabilities in XGBoost Accelerator.
papers.abstract: XGBoost (eXtreme Gradient Boosting), a widelyused decision tree algorithm, plays a crucial role in applications such as ransomware and fraud detection. While its performance is well-established, its security against model extraction on hardware platforms like Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) has not been fully explored. In this paper, we demonstrate a significant vulnerability where sensitive model data can be leaked from an XGBoost implementation through side-channel attacks (SCAs). By analyzing variations in power consumption, we show how an attacker can infer node features within the XGBoost model, leading to the extraction of critical data. We conduct an experiment using the XGBoost accelerator FAXID on the Sakura-X platform, demonstrating a method to deduce model decisions by monitoring power consumptions. The results show that on average 367k tests are sufficient to leak sensitive values. Our findings underscore the need for improved hardware and algorithmic protections to safeguard machine learning models from these types of attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: XGBoost（eXtreme Gradient Boosting）是一种广泛使用的决策树算法，在勒索软件和欺诈检测等应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然其性能已得到证实，但其针对现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等硬件平台上模型提取的安全性尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们演示了一个重大漏洞，其中敏感模型数据可能通过旁道攻击 (SCA) 从 XGBoost 实现中泄露。通过分析功耗的变化，我们展示了攻击者如何推断 XGBoost 模型中的节点特征，从而提取关键数据。我们在 Sakura-X 平台上使用 XGBoost 加速器 FAXID 进行了实验，演示了一种通过监控功耗来推断模型决策的方法。结果表明，平均 367k 次测试足以泄漏敏感值。我们的研究结果强调需要改进硬件和算法保护，以保护机器学习模型免受此类攻击。

papers.title: FactorHD: A Hyperdimensional Computing Model for Multi-Object Multi-Class Representation and Factorization.
papers.abstract: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (neurosymbolic AI) excels in logical analysis and reasoning. Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), a promising braininspired computational model, is integral to neuro-symbolic AI. Various HDC models have been proposed to represent class-instance and class-class relations, but when representing the more complex class-subclass relation, where multiple objects associate different levels of classes and subclasses, they face challenges for factorization, a crucial task for neuro-symbolic AI systems. In this article, we propose FactorHD, a novel HDC model capable of representing and factorizing the complex class-subclass relation efficiently. FactorHD features a symbolic encoding method that embeds an extra memorization clause, preserving more information for multiple objects. In addition, it employs an efficient factorization algorithm that selectively eliminates redundant classes by identifying the memorization clause of the target class. Such model significantly enhances computing efficiency and accuracy in representing and factorizing multiple objects with class-subclass relation, overcoming limitations of existing HDC models such as “superposition catastrophe” and “the problem of 2 “. Evaluations show that FactorHD achieves approximately $5667 \times$ speedup at a representation size of $10^{9}$ compared to existing HDC models. When integrated with the ResNet-18 neural network, FactorHD achieves $92.48 \%$ factorization accuracy on the Cifar-10 dataset.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能（neurosymbolic AI）擅长逻辑分析和推理。超维计算 (HDC) 是一种很有前途的受大脑启发的计算模型，是神经符号人工智能不可或缺的一部分。人们已经提出了各种 HDC 模型来表示类-实例和类-类关系，但是当表示更复杂的类-子类关系时，多个对象关联不同级别的类和子类，它们面临因式分解的挑战，这是神经符号人工智能系统的一项关键任务。在本文中，我们提出了 FactorHD，一种新颖的 HDC 模型，能够有效地表示和分解复杂的类-子类关系。 FactorHD 采用符号编码方法，嵌入额外的记忆子句，为多个对象保留更多信息。此外，它采用高效的分解算法，通过识别目标类的记忆子句来选择性地消除冗余类。该模型显着提高了用类-子类关系表示和分解多个对象的计算效率和准确性，克服了现有HDC模型的“叠加灾难”和“2问题”等局限性。评估表明，与现有 HDC 模型相比，FactorHD 在表示大小为 10^{9}$ 时实现了约 5667 美元的加速。当与 ResNet-18 神经网络集成时，FactorHD 在 Cifar-10 数据集上实现了 $92.48 \%$ 分解精度。

papers.title: Fast End-to-End Simulation and Exploration of Many-RISCV-Core Baseband Transceivers for Software-Defined Radio-Access Networks.
papers.abstract: The fast-rising demand for wireless bandwidth [1] requires rapid evolution of high-performance baseband processing infrastructure. Programmable many-core processors for software-defined radio (SDR) have emerged as high-performance baseband processing engines, offering the flexibility required to capture evolving wireless standards and technologies [2]–[4]. This trend must be supported by a design framework enabling functional validation and end-to-end performance analysis of SDR hardware within realistic radio environment models. We propose a static binary translation based simulator augmented with a fast, approximate timing model of the hardware and coupled to wireless channel models to simulate the most performancecritical physical layer functions implemented in software on a many (1024) RISC-V cores cluster customized for SDR. Our framework simulates the detection of a 5 G OFDM-symbol on a server-class processor in $9.5 \mathrm{~s}-3 \mathrm{~min}$, on a single thread, depending on the input MIMO size (three orders of magnitude faster than RTL simulation). The simulation is easily parallelized to 128 threads with $73-121 \times$ speedup compared to a single thread.
papers.abstract_zh: 对无线带宽[1]快速增长的需求需要高性能基带处理基础设施的快速发展。用于软件定义无线电 (SDR) 的可编程多核处理器已成为高性能基带处理引擎，提供捕获不断发展的无线标准和技术所需的灵活性 [2]–[4]。这一趋势必须得到设计框架的支持，该设计框架能够在现实无线电环境模型中对 SDR 硬件进行功能验证和端到端性能分析。我们提出了一种基于静态二进制翻译的模拟器，增强了快速、近似的硬件时序模型，并与无线通道模型耦合，以模拟在为 SDR 定制的许多（1024）RISC-V 核心集群上的软件中实现的对性能最关键的物理层功能。我们的框架在单个线程上以 9.5 \mathrm{~s}-3 \mathrm{~min}$ 的成本模拟服务器级处理器上 5 G OFDM 符号的检测，具体取决于输入 MIMO 大小（比 RTL 模拟快三个数量级）。模拟很容易并行化为 128 个线程，与单线程相比，速度提高了 73-121 倍。

papers.title: FastPath: A Hybrid Approach for Efficient Hardware Security Verification.
papers.abstract: Many verification methods have been proposed to detect microarchitectural information leakage in response to the surge of security breaches in hardware designs. These sophisticated efforts have gone a long way toward preventing attackers from breaking the system’s confidentiality. However, each approach has its own set of weaknesses: it may not be scalable enough, exhaustive enough, flexible enough to meet changing requirements or fit well into existing verification flows. We propose FastPath, a hybrid verification methodology that combines the efficiency of simulation with the exhaustive nature of formal verification. FastPath employs a structural analysis framework to automate the method further. Our experimental results compare FastPath to a state-of-the-art formal approach, showing a significant reduction in manual effort while achieving the same level of exhaustive confidence. We also discovered and contributed a fix for a previously unknown leak of internal operands in cv32e40s, a RISC-V processor intended for security applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了应对硬件设计中安全漏洞的激增，人们提出了许多验证方法来检测微架构信息泄漏。这些复杂的努力在防止攻击者破坏系统机密性方面发挥了很大作用。然而，每种方法都有其自身的弱点：它可能不够可扩展、不够详尽、不够灵活，无法满足不断变化的需求或很好地适应现有的验证流程。我们提出了 FastPath，一种混合​​验证方法，它将模拟的效率与形式验证的详尽性结合起来。 FastPath 采用结构分析框架来进一步自动化该方法。我们的实验结果将 FastPath 与最先进的形式方法进行了比较，表明在达到相同水平的详尽置信度的同时，手动工作量显着减少。我们还发现并修复了 cv32e40s 中先前未知的内部操作数泄漏问题，cv32e40s 是一款用于安全应用的 RISC-V 处理器。

papers.title: FedEDA: Federated Learning Framework for Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in EDA.
papers.abstract: In advanced nodes, the optimization of Power, Performance, and Area (PPA) is becoming increasingly complex, requiring significant resources and time for circuit design and optimization using Electronic Design Automation (EDA). As a key approach to overcome these challenges, Machine Learning (ML) techniques have been widely studied in the field of EDA. However, security concerns around Intellectual Property (IP) limit access to real-world circuit data, making it difficult to gather sufficient data for training ML models. This lack of available circuit benchmarks restricts progress in ML research. In this study, we propose FedEDA, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the first Federated Learning (FL) aggregation algorithm specifically designed for EDA. FedEDA addresses concerns about IP security by exchanging model weights among FL participants instead of sharing raw data. Furthermore, FedEDA leverages Rent’s Rule and circuit size to capture the hierarchical structure of circuits, mitigating issues related to data imbalance among participants and improving the quality of weight aggregation on EDA data. We demonstrate the applicability of FedEDA across various EDA tasks, including routability, parasitic RC, and wirelength prediction. FedEDA outperforms existing FL algorithms in EDA tasks, demonstrating superior performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 在先进节点中，功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 的优化变得越来越复杂，需要大量资源和时间使用电子设计自动化 (EDA) 进行电路设计和优化。作为克服这些挑战的关键方法，机器学习（ML）技术在 EDA 领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，围绕知识产权 (IP) 的安全问题限制了对现实世界电路数据的访问，导致难以收集足够的数据来训练 ML 模型。缺乏可用的电路基准限制了机器学习研究的进展。在本研究中，我们提出了 FedEDA，据我们所知，这是第一个专门为 EDA 设计的联邦学习 (FL) 聚合算法。 FedEDA 通过在 FL 参与者之间交换模型权重而不是共享原始数据来解决对 IP 安全的担忧。此外，FedEDA 利用 Rent 规则和电路大小来捕获电路的层次结构，缓解与参与者之间的数据不平衡相关的问题，并提高 EDA 数据权重聚合的质量。 We demonstrate the applicability of FedEDA across various EDA tasks, including routability, parasitic RC, and wirelength prediction. FedEDA 在 EDA 任务中优于现有的 FL 算法，展现出卓越的性能。

papers.title: FeKAN: Efficient Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks Accelerator Using FeFET-based CAM and LUT.
papers.abstract: Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (KANs) have emerged as a promising alternative to MLP due to their adaptive learning capabilities for complex dependencies through B-spline basis activations (BBA). However, existing in-memory accelerators optimized for MLP-based DNNs are primarily designed for vector-matrix multiplication (VMM), making them inefficient for the dynamic and recursive B-spline interpolation (BSI) operations required by KANs. In this work, we propose FeKAN, an FeFET-based architecture designed to accelerate BBA operations. First, we develop a software-hardware co-optimized framework for mapping B-spline basis functions (BBF), leveraging a two-stage design space exploration (DSE) algorithm in combination with FeFET-based Look-Up Tables (LUT) and Content-Addressable Memory (CAM). This framework translated dynamic BSI operations into static codebook lookups, achieving a balanced trade-off between memory and computational efficiency. Second, we propose compress-sparsity-column (CSC) based encoding for B-spline basis function and grouped-computation strategy for memory and energy reduction. Third, we propose a groupedpipeline optimization strategy to mitigate data dependencies, significantly enhancing computation efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that FeKAN achieves up to $150.68 \mathrm{~K} \times$ and $4664 \times$ higher throughput and up to $606.87 \times$ and $11196 \times$ greater energy efficiency over Intel Xeon Silver 4310 CPU and NVIDIA A6000 GPU, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络 (KAN) 因其通过 B 样条基础激活 (BBA) 实现复杂依赖关系的自适应学习能力而成为 MLP 的有前景的替代方案。然而，针对基于 MLP 的 DNN 优化的现有内存加速器主要是为向量矩阵乘法 (VMM) 设计的，这使得它们对于 KAN 所需的动态和递归 B 样条插值 (BSI) 操作效率低下。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FeKAN，一种基于 FeFET 的架构，旨在加速 BBA 操作。首先，我们开发了一个用于映射 B 样条基函数 (BBF) 的软件-硬件协同优化框架，利用两阶段设计空间探索 (DSE) 算法并结合基于 FeFET 的查找表 (LUT) 和内容可寻址内存 (CAM)。该框架将动态 BSI 操作转换为静态码本查找，实现了内存和计算效率之间的平衡权衡。其次，我们提出了基于压缩稀疏列（CSC）的 B 样条基函数编码以及用于减少内存和能量的分组计算策略。第三，我们提出了一种分组管道优化策略来减轻数据依赖性，从而显着提高计算效率。实验结果表明，与 Intel Xeon Silver 4310 CPU 和 NVIDIA A6000 GPU 相比，FeKAN 的吞吐量分别提高了 150.68 \mathrm{~K} \times$ 和 4664 \times$，能效分别提高了 606.87 \times$ 和 11196 \times$。

papers.title: Few-shot Learning on AMS Circuits and Its Application to Parasitic Capacitance Prediction.
papers.abstract: Graph representation learning is a powerful method to extract features from graph-structured data, such as analog/mixed-signal (AMS) circuits. However, training deep learning models for AMS designs is severely limited by the scarcity of integrated circuit design data. In this work, we present CircuitGPS, a few-shot learning method for parasitic effect prediction in AMS circuits. The circuit netlist is represented as a heterogeneous graph, with the coupling capacitance modeled as a link. CircuitGPS is pre-trained on link prediction and fine-tuned on edge regression. The proposed method starts with a small-hop sampling technique that converts a link or a node into a subgraph. Then, the subgraph embeddings are learned with a hybrid graph Transformer. Additionally, CircuitGPS integrates a low-cost positional encoding that summarizes the positional and structural information of the sampled subgraph. CircuitGPS improves the accuracy of coupling existence by at least 20% and reduces the MAE of capacitance estimation by at least 0.067 compared to existing methods. Our method demonstrates strong inherent scalability, enabling direct application to diverse AMS circuit designs through zero-shot learning. Furthermore, the ablation studies provide valuable insights into graph models for representation learning.
papers.abstract_zh: 图表示学习是从图结构数据（例如模拟/混合信号（AMS）电路）中提取特征的强大方法。然而，由于集成电路设计数据的稀缺，AMS 设计的深度学习模型训练受到严重限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CircuitGPS，这是一种用于 AMS 电路中寄生效应预测的几次学习方法。电路网表表示为异构图，耦合电容建模为链路。 CircuitGPS 针对链路预测进行了预训练，并针对边缘回归进行了微调。所提出的方法从小跳采样技术开始，将链接或节点转换为子图。然后，使用混合图 Transformer 学习子图嵌入。此外，CircuitGPS 还集成了一种低成本位置编码，可总结采样子图的位置和结构信息。与现有方法相比，CircuitGPS将耦合存在的精度提高了至少20%，并将电容估计的MAE降低了至少0.067。我们的方法展示了强大的固有可扩展性，能够通过零样本学习直接应用于各种 AMS 电路设计。此外，消融研究为表示学习的图模型提供了有价值的见解。

papers.title: FF-INT8: Efficient Forward-Forward DNN Training on Edge Devices with INT8 Precision.
papers.abstract: Backpropagation has been the cornerstone of neural network training for decades, yet its inefficiencies in time and energy consumption limit its suitability for resource-constrained edge devices. While low-precision neural network quantization has been extensively researched to speed up model inference, its application in training has been less explored. Recently, the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm has emerged as a promising alternative to backpropagation, replacing the backward pass with an additional forward pass. By avoiding the need to store intermediate activations for backpropagation, FF can reduce memory footprint, making it well-suited for embedded devices. This paper presents an INT8 quantized training approach that leverages FF’s layer-by-layer strategy to stabilize gradient quantization. Furthermore, we propose a novel “look-ahead” scheme to address limitations of FF and improve model accuracy. Experiments conducted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano board demonstrate 4.6% faster training, 8.3% energy savings, and $\mathbf{2 7. 0 \%}$ reduction in memory usage, while maintaining competitive accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 几十年来，反向传播一直是神经网络训练的基石，但其时间和能耗效率低下限制了其对资源受限的边缘设备的适用性。虽然低精度神经网络量化已被广泛研究以加速模型推理，但其在训练中的应用却很少被探索。最近，前向-前向 (FF) 算法已成为反向传播的一种有前景的替代方案，用额外的前向传播代替后向传播。通过避免存储反向传播的中间激活，FF 可以减少内存占用，使其非常适合嵌入式设备。本文提出了一种 INT8 量化训练方法，利用 FF 的逐层策略来稳定梯度量化。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的“前瞻”方案来解决 FF 的局限性并提高模型准确性。在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 板上进行的实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，训练速度提高了 4.6%，节能 8.3%，内存使用量减少 $\mathbf{2 7. 0 \%}$，同时保持具有竞争力的准确性。

papers.title: Finding the Pareto Frontier of Low-Precision Data Formats and MAC Architecture for LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: To accelerate AI applications, numerous data formats and physical implementations of matrix multiplication have been proposed, creating a complex design space. This paper studies the efficient MAC implementation of the integer, floating-point, posit, and logarithmic number system (LNS) data formats and Microscaling (MX) and VectorScaled Quantization (VSQ) block data formats. We evaluate the area, power, and numerical accuracy (evaluated as signal-to-quantization noise ratio) of $\mathbf{3 5, 0 0 0}$ MAC designs spanning each data format and several key design parameters such as the inner product size and accumulation width. We find that for the same numerical accuracy, pareto optimal MAC designs with emerging data formats (LNS16, MXINT8, VSQINT4) achieve $1.8 \times 2.2 \times$, and $1.9 \times$ TOPs/W improvement compared to FP16, FP8, and FP4 dot product implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了加速人工智能应用，人们提出了多种数据格式和矩阵乘法的物理实现，从而创建了复杂的设计空间。本文研究了整数、浮点、正数和对数系统 (LNS) 数据格式以及微缩放 (MX) 和矢量缩放量化 (VSQ) 块数据格式的高效 MAC 实现。我们评估了涵盖每种数据格式的 $\mathbf{3 5, 0 0 0}$ MAC 设计的面积、功率和数值精度（以信号与量化噪声比来评估）以及几个关键设计参数，例如内积大小和累积宽度。我们发现，对于相同的数值精度，与 FP16、FP8 和 FP4 点积实现相比，采用新兴数据格式（LNS16、MXINT8、VSQINT4）的帕累托最优 MAC 设计可实现 $1.8 \times 2.2 \times$ 和 $1.9 \times$ TOPs/W 改进。

papers.title: FineRR-ZNS: Enabling Fine-Granularity Read Refreshing for ZNS SSDs.
papers.abstract: Zoned namespace (ZNS) SSDs are emerging storage devices offering low cost, high performance, and software definability. By adopting host-managed zone-based sequential programming, ZNS SSDs effectively eliminate the space overhead associated with on-board DRAM memory and garbage collection. However, while background read refreshing serves as a data protection mechanism in conventional block-interface SSDs, state-of-the-art ZNS SSDs lack read refreshing functionality to guarantee data reliability. Moreover, implementing zonelevel read refreshing in ZNS SSDs incurs significant overhead due to the large volume of valid data movements in a zone, leading to degraded I/O performance. To efficiently enable read refreshing for ZNS SSDs, this paper proposes FineRR-ZNS, a fine-granularity read refreshing mechanism for ZNS SSDs. FineRR-ZNS employs a host-controlled fine-granularity read refreshing scheme that selectively determines block-level read refreshing via metadata remapping. A zone reconstruction method is also designed to retrieve remapped data forming complete data during zone-level RR. Specifically, the remapped data after zone reconstruction are still available and prioritized for read access until their respective blocks need the next RR. Evaluation results show that FineRR-ZNS significantly enhances read refreshing efficiency and I/O throughput compared to zone-level read refreshing implemented in the state-of-the-art ZenFS file system.
papers.abstract_zh: 分区命名空间 (ZNS) SSD 是新兴的存储设备，具有低成本、高性能和软件可定义性。通过采用主机管理的基于区域的顺序编程，ZNS SSD 有效地消除了与板载 DRAM 内存和垃圾收集相关的空间开销。然而，虽然后台读刷新作为传统块接口SSD中的数据保护机制，但最先进的ZNS SSD缺乏读刷新功能来保证数据可靠性。此外，由于区域中存在大量有效数据移动，在 ZNS SSD 中实施区域级读取刷新会产生大量开销，从而导致 I/O 性能下降。为了有效地实现ZNS SSD的读刷新，本文提出了FineRR-ZNS，一种针对ZNS SSD的细粒度读刷新机制。 FineRR-ZNS 采用主机控制的细粒度读取刷新方案，通过元数据重新映射选择性地确定块级读取刷新。还设计了区域重建方法来检索在区域级RR期间形成完整数据的重新映射的数据。具体来说，区域重建后的重新映射数据仍然可用，并优先进行读访问，直到它们各自的块需要下一个 RR。评估结果表明，与最先进的 ZenFS 文件系统中实现的区域级读取刷新相比，FineRR-ZNS 显着提高了读取刷新效率和 I/O 吞吐量。

papers.title: FireGuard: A Generalized Microarchitecture for Fine-Grained Security Analysis on OoO Superscalar Cores.
papers.abstract: High-performance security guarantees rely on hardware support. Generic programmable support for fine-grained instruction analysis has gained broad interest in the literature as a fundamental building block for the security of future processors. Yet, implementation in real out-of-order (OoO) superscalar processors presents tough challenges that cannot be explored in highly abstract simulators. We detail the challenges of implementing complex programmable pathways without critical paths or contention. We then introduce FireGuard, the first implementation of fine-grained instruction analysis on a real $\mathbf{O o O}$ superscalar processor. We establish an end-to-end system, including microarchitecture, SoC, ISA and programming model. Experiments show that our solution simultaneously ensures both security and performance of the system, with parallel scalability. We examine the feasibility of building FireGuard into modern SoCs: Apple’s M1-Pro, Huawei’s Kirin-960, and Intel’s i7-12700F, where less than 1% silicon area is introduced. The Repo. of FireGuard’s source code: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-FireGuard-DAC-25.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能的安全保障依赖于硬件的支持。作为未来处理器安全性的基本构建块，对细粒度指令分析的通用可编程支持已在文献中引起了广泛的兴趣。然而，真正的无序 (OoO) 超标量处理器的实现提出了高度抽象模拟器无法探索的严峻挑战。我们详细介绍了在没有关键路径或争用的情况下实现复杂的可编程路径的挑战。然后我们介绍 FireGuard，它是第一个在真正的 $\mathbf{O o O}$ 超标量处理器上实现细粒度指令分析的方法。我们建立了一个端到端的系统，包括微架构、SoC、ISA和编程模型。实验表明，我们的解决方案同时保证了系统的安全性和性能，并具有并行的可扩展性。我们研究了将 FireGuard 构建到现代 SoC 中的可行性：苹果的 M1-Pro、华为的 Kirin-960 和英特尔的 i7-12700F，其中引入的硅面积不到 1%。回购协议。 FireGuard 源代码：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-FireGuard-DAC-25。

papers.title: FLAG: An FPGA-Based System for Low-Latency GNN Inference Service Using Vector Quantization.
papers.abstract: Enabling real-time GNN inference services requires low end-to-end latency to meet service level agreements. However, intensive preparation steps and the neighborhood explosion problem pose significant challenges to efficient GNN inference serving. In this paper, we propose FLAG, an FPGA-based GNN inference serving system using vector quantization. To reduce preparation overhead, we introduce offline preprocessing to precompute and compress hidden embeddings for serving. A dedicated FPGA accelerator leverages the precomputed data to enable lightweight aggregation. As a result, FLAG achieves average speedups of $154 \times 176 \times$, and $333 \times$ on three GNN models compared to the baseline system.
papers.abstract_zh: 启用实时 GNN 推理服务需要较低的端到端延迟来满足服务级别协议。然而，密集的准备步骤和邻域爆炸问题对高效的 GNN 推理服务提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 FLAG，一种使用矢量量化的基于 FPGA 的 GNN 推理服务系统。为了减少准备开销，我们引入离线预处理来预计算和压缩隐藏嵌入以供服务。专用 FPGA 加速器利用预先计算的数据来实现轻量级聚合。结果，与基线系统相比，FLAG 在三个 GNN 模型上的平均加速分别为 154 美元 × 176 倍和 333 美元。

papers.title: FlexStep: Enabling Flexible Error Detection in Multi/Many-core Real-time Systems.
papers.abstract: Reliability and real-time responsiveness in safety-critical systems have traditionally been achieved using error detection mechanisms, such as LockStep, which require pre-configured checker cores, strict synchronisation, static error detection regions, or limited preemptions. However, these core-bound hardware mechanisms often lead to significant resource over-provisioning and diminished real-time performance in modern systems where tasks with varying reliability requirements are consolidated on shared processors for efficiency and cost reduction. To address these challenges, this work presents FlexStep, a systematic solution that integrates hardware and software across the SoC, ISA, and OS scheduling layers. FlexStep features a novel microarchitecture that supports dynamic core configuration and asynchronous, preemptive error detection. The FlexStep architecture naturally allows for flexible task scheduling and error detection, enabling new scheduling algorithms that enhance both resource efficiency and real-time schedulability.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全关键系统中的可靠性和实时响应传统上是通过错误检测机制来实现的，例如 LockStep，它需要预先配置的检查器核心、严格同步、静态错误检测区域或有限的抢占。然而，这些受核心限制的硬件机制通常会导致现代系统中严重的资源过度配置和实时性能下降，在现代系统中，具有不同可靠性要求的任务被整合到共享处理器上，以提高效率并降低成本。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作提出了 FlexStep，这是一种跨 SoC、ISA 和操作系统调度层集成硬件和软件的系统解决方案。 FlexStep 采用新颖的微架构，支持动态核心配置和异步、抢占式错误检测。 FlexStep架构自然地允许灵活的任务调度和错误检测，从而实现新的调度算法，从而提高资源效率和实时可调度性。

papers.title: FPGA-TrustZone: Security Extension of TrustZone to FPGA for SoC-FPGA Heterogeneous Architecture.
papers.abstract: To address the growing security issues faced by ARM-based mobile devices today, TrustZone was adopted to provide a trusted execution environment (TEE) to protect sensitive data. Such TrustZone-based models have been proven to be effective, but they target CPU architectures and do not work for the security of widely used heterogeneous computing platforms such as FPGAs. To solve this issue, we propose a comprehensive SoC-FPGA security framework, FPGA-TrustZone, to support FPGA TEE by extending the security of ARM TrustZone. Experiments on real SoC-FPGA hardware development boards show that FPGA-TrustZone provides high security with low performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了解决当今基于 ARM 的移动设备面临的日益严重的安全问题，采用 TrustZone 来提供可信执行环境 (TEE) 来保护敏感数据。这种基于 TrustZone 的模型已被证明是有效的，但它们针对的是 CPU 架构，不适用于广泛使用的异构计算平台（例如 FPGA）的安全性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个全面的SoC-FPGA安全框架FPGA-TrustZone，通过扩展ARM TrustZone的安全性来支持FPGA TEE。在真实 SoC-FPGA 硬件开发板上的实验表明，FPGA-TrustZone 提供了高安全性和低性能开销。

papers.title: Free and Fair Hardware: A Pathway to Copyright Infringement-Free Verilog Generation using LLMs.
papers.abstract: Limitations in Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities for hardware design tasks, such as generating functional Verilog codes, have motivated various fine-tuning optimizations utilizing curated hardware datasets from open-source repositories. However, these datasets remain limited in size and contain minimal checks on licensing for reuse, resulting in potential copyright violations by fine-tuned LLMs. Therefore, we propose an evaluation benchmark to estimate the risk of Verilog-trained LLMs to generate copyright-protected codes. To minimize this risk, we present an open-source Verilog dataset, FreeSet, containing over 220k files, along with the automated dataset curation framework utilized to provide additional guarantees of fair-use Verilog data. We then execute an LLM fine-tuning framework consisting of continual pre-training, resulting in a fine-tuned Llama model for Verilog, FreeV. Our results indicate that FreeV demonstrates the smallest risk of copyright-infringement among prior works, with only a 3% violation rate. Furthermore, experimental results demonstrate improvements in Verilog generation functionality over its baseline model, improving VerilogEval pass@10 rates by over 10%.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件设计任务（例如生成功能性 Verilog 代码）的大型语言模型 (LLM) 功能的局限性促使人们利用开源存储库中精选的硬件数据集进行各种微调优化。然而，这些数据集的大小仍然有限，并且对重复使用的许可进行了最少的检查，导致经过微调的法学硕士可能会侵犯版权。因此，我们提出了一个评估基准来估计经过 Verilog 训练的法学硕士生成受版权保护的代码的风险。为了最大限度地降低这种风险，我们提供了一个开源 Verilog 数据集 FreeSet，其中包含超过 22 万个文件，以及用于为合理使用 Verilog 数据提供额外保证的自动数据集管理框架。然后，我们执行由持续预训练组成的 LLM 微调框架，从而生成针对 Verilog、FreeV 的微调 Llama 模型。我们的结果表明，在之前的作品中，FreeV 的版权侵权风险最小，侵权率仅为 3%。此外，实验结果表明，Verilog 生成功能相对于其基准模型有所改进，将 VerilogEval pass@10 率提高了 10% 以上。

papers.title: From Flatland to Forest: Exploring Pareto-optimal Design through RTL Hierarchy Trees.
papers.abstract: The growing complexity of modern hardware has created vast design spaces that are difficult to explore efficiently. Current design space exploration (DSE) methods treat designs as flat parameter vectors, failing to leverage the rich structural information inherent in hardware architectures. This paper presents a novel RTL hierarchy aware approach to microarchitecture DSE that exploits the natural structure of hardware designs. We propose an RTL hierarchy aware kernel that enables direct comparison of RTL hierarchies, preserving their structural characteristics. Our method incorporates module importance derived from hierarchical synthesis reports through a weighted kernel extension. Additionally, we introduce a clustering method that leverages the proposed kernel to identify distinct architectural patterns, enabling efficient parallel evaluation. Experimental results and ablation studies on a Gemmini-based RISC-V SoC demonstrate the superiority of our approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代硬件日益复杂，创造了巨大的设计空间，难以有效探索。当前的设计空间探索（DSE）方法将设计视为平面参数向量，未能利用硬件架构中固有的丰富结构信息。本文提出了一种新颖的 RTL 层次结构感知微体系结构 DSE 方法，该方法利用了硬件设计的自然结构。我们提出了一个 RTL 层次结构感知内核，可以直接比较 RTL 层次结构，保留其结构特征。我们的方法结合了通过加权内核扩展从分层综合报告中导出的模块重要性。此外，我们引入了一种聚类方法，利用所提出的内核来识别不同的架构模式，从而实现高效的并行评估。基于 Gemmini 的 RISC-V SoC 的实验结果和消融研究证明了我们方法的优越性。

papers.title: FT-MUX: A Fault-Tolerant Microfluidic Multiplexer Design.
papers.abstract: Continuous-flow microfluidic chips are multilayered miniaturized platforms to manipulate small volumes of fluids with valves. There are two types of channels on a chip: flow channels for the reaction of fluids, and control channels for the actuation of valves. Multiplexers (MUXes) are essential microfluidic components for individually addressing many flow channels with few control channels. As the integration scale of microfluidic chips increases, the reliability of MUXes becomes a critical concern, as a single defective control channel in a MUX will affect a large part of the flow channels addressed by the MUX. This paper formally analyzes and identifies the design rules for a MUX to tolerate n defective control channels, and model the fault-tolerant MUX (FT-MUX) design problem as a binary constant weight code problem to minimize resource overheads. We demonstrate that FT-MUX improves resource efficiency by up to hundreds of times compared to the conventional fault-tolerant design method. Besides, given no less than 10 control channels, FT-MUX tolerates at least one defective control channel and addresses even more flow channels with equal or fewer resources than a standard MUX. The advantages become more significant as the integration scale increases.
papers.abstract_zh: 连续流微流控芯片是多层微型平台，可通过阀门操纵少量流体。芯片上有两种类型的通道：用于流体反应的流动通道和用于阀门驱动的控制通道。多路复用器 (MUX) 是重要的微流体组件，可通过少量控制通道单独处理多个流道。随着微流控芯片集成规模的增加，MUX的可靠性成为一个关键问题，因为MUX中的单个有缺陷的控制通道将影响MUX所处理的大部分流道。本文正式分析并确定了 MUX 的设计规则，以容忍 n 个有缺陷的控制通道，并将容错 MUX (FT-MUX) 设计问题建模为二进制恒权码问题，以最大限度地减少资源开销。我们证明，与传统的容错设计方法相比，FT-MUX 将资源效率提高了数百倍。此外，在给定不少于 10 个控制通道的情况下，FT-MUX 可以容忍至少一个有缺陷的控制通道，并且可以使用与标准 MUX 相同或更少的资源来处理更多的流通道。随着集成规模的增大，优势变得更加显着。

papers.title: G-SpNN: GPU-Accelerated Passivity Enforcement for S-Parameter Modeling with Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of high-frequency circuits calls for efficient and accurate passive macromodeling techniques. Existing passivity enforcement methods, including those in commercial tools, often encounter convergence issues or compromise accuracy. The Domain-Alternated Optimization (DAO) framework seeks to restore accuracy through an additional optimization step but is hampered by high memory consumption and slow convergence, particularly for large-scale problems. This paper presents G-SpNN, a novel GPU-accelerated framework that recasts the passivity-enforced macromodeling problem as a neural network training task. This approach significantly enhances both the speed and scalability of passivity enforcement. Experimental results show that G-SpNN achieves an average speedup of $7.63 \times$ in convergence compared to DAO, while reducing memory usage by two orders of magnitude. This enables G-SpNN to handle complex, high-port-count circuits with greater accuracy and efficiency, paving the way for robust high-frequency circuit simulations.
papers.abstract_zh: 高频电路日益复杂，需要高效、准确的无源宏建模技术。现有的被动性执行方法，包括商业工具中的方法，经常会遇到收敛问题或损害准确性。域交替优化 (DAO) 框架试图通过额外的优化步骤来恢复准确性，但受到高内存消耗和缓慢收敛的阻碍，特别是对于大规模问题。本文提出了 G-SpNN，这是一种新颖的 GPU 加速框架，它将被动性强制宏观建模问题重塑为神经网络训练任务。这种方法显着提高了被动执行的速度和可扩展性。实验结果表明，与 DAO 相比，G-SpNN 的平均收敛速度提高了 7.63 倍，同时内存使用量减少了两个数量级。这使得 G-SpNN 能够以更高的精度和效率处理复杂的高端口数电路，为稳健的高频电路仿真铺平了道路。

papers.title: GauRast: Enhancing GPU Triangle Rasterizers to Accelerate 3D Gaussian Splatting.
papers.abstract: 3D intelligence leverages rich 3D features and stands as a promising frontier in AI, with 3D rendering fundamental to many downstream applications. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), an emerging high-quality 3D rendering method, requires significant computation, making real-time execution on existing GPU-equipped edge devices infeasible. Previous efforts to accelerate 3DGS rely on dedicated accelerators that require substantial integration overhead and hardware costs. This work proposes an acceleration strategy that leverages the similarities between the 3DGS pipeline and the highly optimized conventional graphics pipeline in modern GPUs. Instead of developing a dedicated accelerator, we enhance existing GPU rasterizer hardware to efficiently support 3DGS operations. Our results demonstrate a 23× increase in processing speed and a 24 × reduction in energy consumption, with improvements yielding 6× faster end-to-end runtime for the original 3DGS algorithm and 4× for the latest efficiency-improved pipeline, achieving 24 FPS and 46 FPS respectively.
