These enhancements incur only a minimal area overhead of 0.2% relative to the entire SoC chip area, underscoring the practicality and efficiency of our approach for enabling 3DGS rendering on resource-constrained platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 智能利用丰富的 3D 功能，是人工智能领域前景广阔的前沿领域，其中 3D 渲染是许多下游应用的基础。 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 是一种新兴的高质量 3D 渲染方法，需要大量计算，使得在现有配备 GPU 的边缘设备上实时执行不可行。以前加速 3DGS 的努力依赖于需要大量集成开销和硬件成本的专用加速器。这项工作提出了一种加速策略，利用 3DGS 管道和现代 GPU 中高度优化的传统图形管道之间的相似性。我们没有开发专用加速器，而是增强现有的 GPU 光栅器硬件以有效支持 3DGS 操作。我们的结果表明，处理速度提高了 23 倍，能耗降低了 24 倍，原始 3DGS 算法的端到端运行时间提高了 6 倍，而最新效率改进的管道则提高了 4 倍，分别实现了 24 FPS 和 46 FPS。相对于整个 SoC 芯片面积，这些增强功能仅产生 0.2% 的最小面积开销，凸显了我们在资源受限平台上实现 3DGS 渲染的方法的实用性和效率。

papers.title: Gem5-AcceSys: Enabling System-Level Exploration of Standard Interconnects for Novel Accelerators.
papers.abstract: The growing demand for efficient, high-performance processing in machine learning (ML) and image processing has made hardware accelerators, such as GPUs and Data Streaming Accelerators (DSAs), increasingly essential. These accelerators enhance ML and image processing tasks by offloading computation from the CPU to dedicated hardware. These accelerators rely on interconnects for efficient data transfer, making interconnect design crucial for system-level performance. This paper introduces Gem5-AcceSys, an innovative framework for system-level exploration of standard interconnects and configurable memory hierarchies. Using a matrix multiplication accelerator tailored for transformer workloads as a case study, we evaluate PCIe performance across diverse memory types (DDR4, DDR5, GDDR6, HBM2) and configurations, including host-side and device-side memory. Our findings demonstrate that optimized interconnects can achieve up to $80 \%$ of device-side memory performance and, in some scenarios, even surpass it. These results offer actionable insights for system architects, enabling a balanced approach to performance and cost in next-generation accelerator design.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 和图像处理领域对高效、高性能处理的需求不断增长，使得 GPU 和数据流加速器 (DSA) 等硬件加速器变得越来越重要。这些加速器通过将计算从 CPU 卸载到专用硬件来增强机器学习和图像处理任务。这些加速器依靠互连来实现高效的数据传输，因此互连设计对于系统级性能至关重要。本文介绍了 Gem5-AcceSys，这是一种用于系统级探索标准互连和可配置内存层次结构的创新框架。我们以专为变压器工作负载定制的矩阵乘法加速器作为案例研究，评估了不同内存类型（DDR4、DDR5、GDDR6、HBM2）和配置（包括主机端和设备端内存）的 PCIe 性能。我们的研究结果表明，优化的互连可以实现高达 80 \%$ 的设备端内存性能，在某些情况下，甚至超过它。这些结果为系统架构师提供了可行的见解，从而在下一代加速器设计中实现性能和成本的平衡方法。

papers.title: GEM: GPU-Accelerated Emulator-Inspired RTL Simulation.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present a GPU-accelerated RTL simulator addressing critical challenges in high-speed circuit verification. Traditional CPU-based RTL simulators struggle with scalability and performance, and while FPGA-based emulators offer acceleration, they are costly and less accessible. Previous GPU-based attempts have failed to speed up RTL simulation due to the heterogeneous nature of circuit partitions, which conflicts with the SIMT (Single Instruction, Multiple Thread) paradigm of GPUs. Inspired by the design of emulators, our approach introduces a novel virtual Very Long Instruction Word (VLIW) architecture, designed for efficient CUDA execution. We also design a flow that maps circuit logic to the architecture in a process analogous to the FPGA CAD flow. This architecture mitigates issues of irregular memory access and thread divergence, unlocking GPU potential for RTL simulation. Our solution achieves up to $64 \times$ speed-up over the best CPU simulators, democratizing high-speed RTL simulation with accessible hardware and establishing a new frontier for GPUaccelerated circuit verification.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种 GPU 加速的 RTL 模拟器，可解决高速电路验证中的关键挑战。传统的基于 CPU 的 RTL 模拟器在可扩展性和性能方面遇到困难，虽然基于 FPGA 的模拟器提供加速，但它们成本高昂且不易访问。由于电路分区的异构性质，之前基于 GPU 的尝试未能加速 RTL 仿真，这与 GPU 的 SIMT（单指令、多线程）范式相冲突。受模拟器设计的启发，我们的方法引入了一种新颖的虚拟超长指令字 (VLIW) 架构，专为高效 CUDA 执行而设计。我们还设计了一个流程，将电路逻辑映射到架构，其流程类似于 FPGA CAD 流程。该架构缓解了不规则内存访问和线程发散的问题，释放了 GPU 进行 RTL 模拟的潜力。我们的解决方案比最好的 CPU 模拟器实现了高达 64 美元的加速，通过可访问的硬件实现高速 RTL 模拟的大众化，并为 GPU 加速电路验证开辟了新领域。

papers.title: Generalizable Lithographic Hotspot Detection Using Asynchronous Meta-Learning with Only One Shot.
papers.abstract: With integrated circuits shrinking in feature size, layout printability has become increasingly challenging, making lithographic hotspot detection ever-crucial in computer-aided design (CAD) flows. In recent years, numerous studies have explored deep learning to detect lithographic hotspots, offering promising results. However, neural networks can easily be biased and overfit when lacking sufficient training data, especially in the CAD domain. A generalizable DL-based hotspot detector should learn the genuine lithography principle and ensure consistent accuracy across layouts from various designs at the same technology node, regardless of their varying design styles. However, we find that existing convolutional neural network (CNN)-based hotspot detectors fail to generalize to different circuit layouts other than the design it has been trained for. To this end, we propose a few-shot learning-based framework for generalizable CNN-based hotspot detection. We develop a meta-learning scheme that asynchronously updates the CNN feature extraction and classification component to obtain a metainitialized model that can quickly adapt to new designs using as few as one training layout clip. We propose a layout topologybased sampling strategy for few-shot adaptation to enhance generalization stability. Experimental results on ICCAD 2012 and 2019 datasets show that our framework enables superior generalization capabilities than prior arts on unseen new designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着集成电路特征尺寸的缩小，布局的可印刷性变得越来越具有挑战性，使得光刻热点检测在计算机辅助设计（CAD）流程中变得至关重要。近年来，大量研究探索了深度学习来检测光刻热点，并提供了有希望的结果。然而，当缺乏足够的训练数据时，神经网络很容易出现偏差和过度拟合，尤其是在 CAD 领域。基于深度学习的通用热点检测器应该学习真正的光刻原理，并确保同一技术节点上的各种设计的布局保持一致的精度，无论其设计风格如何不同。然而，我们发现现有的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的热点检测器无法推广到除其训练设计之外的不同电路布局。为此，我们提出了一种基于几次学习的框架，用于可泛化的基于 CNN 的热点检测。我们开发了一种元学习方案，该方案异步更新 CNN 特征提取和分类组件，以获得元初始化模型，该模型可以使用少至一个训练布局剪辑快速适应新设计。我们提出了一种基于布局拓扑的采样策略，用于少样本自适应，以增强泛化稳定性。 ICCAD 2012 和 2019 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的框架在未见过的新设计上比现有技术具有更出色的泛化能力。

papers.title: Generative Model Based Standard Cell Timing Library Characterization.
papers.abstract: Accurate cell timing characterization is essential, on which static timing analysis relies to verify timing performance and ensure design robustness across various PVT conditions (corners). The corner explosion in modern design amplifies the efficiency and scalability challenge for accurate characterization. However, the conventional characterization approach of SPICE simulation alone becomes prohibitively expensive due to the increasing computational complexity and the amount of characterized data. In this paper, we view the characterization problem from a generative modeling perspective to tackle the efficiency and scalability challenge. With a hybrid of generative adversarial network (GAN) and autoencoder, our generative model learns and generalizes among various timing arcs and corners. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves high accuracy and extensibility while reducing the runtime significantly.
papers.abstract_zh: 准确的单元时序表征至关重要，静态时序分析依靠它来验证时序性能并确保跨各种 PVT 条件（角点）的设计稳健性。现代设计中的角点爆炸加剧了精确表征的效率和可扩展性挑战。然而，由于计算复杂性和表征数据量的增加，仅采用 SPICE 仿真的传统表征方法就变得极其昂贵。在本文中，我们从生成建模的角度看待表征问题，以解决效率和可扩展性挑战。通过生成对抗网络（GAN）和自动编码器的混合，我们的生成模型可以在各种时序弧和角之间进行学习和泛化。实验结果表明，所提出的框架实现了高精度和可扩展性，同时显着减少了运行时间。

papers.title: GLiTCH: GLiTCH induced Transitions for Secure Crypto-Hardware.
papers.abstract: Conventionally, glitch reduction is well-studied in digital design to improve power, efficiency, and security. In contrast, this paper combines the addition and removal of glitches to minimize the power side-channel leakage. Glitch Manipulation is achieved through gate sizing-based arrival time control, which is cast as a Geometric Programming formulation. We develop a framework, GLiTCH, for glitch manipulation that is guided by functional and timing simulations. The framework is evaluated on popular cipher designs like AES, CLEFIA, and SM4. Our findings illustrate up to 52.82% improvement in the Guessing Entropy for a 38.74% area overhead on average across the evaluated ciphers.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统上，数字设计中对减少故障进行了深入研究，以提高功耗、效率和安全性。相比之下，本文结合了毛刺的添加和消除，以最大限度地减少电源侧通道泄漏。毛刺操纵是通过基于门尺寸的到达时间控制来实现的，该控制被铸造为几何规划公式。我们开发了一个框架 GLiTCH，用于以功能和时序模拟为指导的故障处理。该框架在流行的密码设计（如 AES、CLEFIA 和 SM4）上进行评估。我们的研究结果表明，在评估的密码中，平均面积开销提高了 38.74%，猜测熵提高了 52.82%。

papers.title: GLOVA: Global and Local Variation-Aware Analog Circuit Design with Risk-Sensitive Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Analog/mixed-signal circuit design encounters significant challenges due to performance degradation from process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations. To achieve commercial-grade reliability, iterative manual design revisions and extensive statistical simulations are required. While several studies have aimed to automate variation-aware analog design to reduce time-to-market, the substantial mismatches in real-world wafers have not been thoroughly addressed. In this paper, we present GLOVA, an analog circuit sizing framework that effectively manages the impact of diverse random mismatches to improve robustness against PVT variations. In the proposed approach, risk-sensitive reinforcement learning is leveraged to account for the reliability bound affected by PVT variations, and ensemble-based critic is introduced to achieve sample-efficient learning. For design verification, we also propose μ-σ evaluation and simulation reordering method to reduce simulation costs of identifying failed designs. GLOVA supports verification through industrial-level PVT variation evaluation methods, including corner simulation as well as global and local Monte Carlo (MC) simulations. Compared to previous state-of-the-art variation-aware analog sizing frameworks, GLOVA achieves up to $80.5 \times$ improvement in sample efficiency and $76.0 \times$ reduction in time.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于工艺、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化导致性能下降，模拟/混合信号电路设计面临重大挑战。为了实现商业级可靠性，需要迭代的手动设计修改和广泛的统计模拟。虽然一些研究旨在自动化变化感知模拟设计以缩短上市时间，但现实世界中晶圆的严重不匹配尚未得到彻底解决。在本文中，我们提出了 GLOVA，一种模拟电路尺寸调整框架，可有效管理各种随机失配的影响，以提高针对 PVT 变化的鲁棒性。在所提出的方法中，利用风险敏感的强化学习来解释PVT变化影响的可靠性界限，并引入基于集成的批评家来实现样本高效学习。对于设计验证，我们还提出了 μ-σ 评估和仿真重新排序方法，以降低识别失败设计的仿真成本。 GLOVA 支持通过工业级 PVT 变化评估方法进行验证，包括角点模拟以及全局和局部蒙特卡罗 (MC) 模拟。与之前最先进的变化感知模拟大小调整框架相比，GLOVA 的样本效率提高了 80.5 美元，时间缩短了 76.0 美元。

papers.title: GNN-MLS: Signal Routing in Mixed-Node 3D ICs through GNN-Assisted Metal Layer Sharing.
papers.abstract: Native 3D Integrated Circuit (3D IC) design offers enhanced performance and density but faces challenges in signal routing due to limited true 3D EDA tool support. Pseudo-3D flows bridge this gap but lack cross-tier optimization, critical for both mixed-node and homogeneous designs. Metal Layer Sharing (MLS) addresses this by enabling cross-tier routing co-optimization but risks timing degradation if not applied strategically. Additionally, MLS creates open connections in hybrid-bonded 3D ICs, making chips untestable. We propose GNN-MLS, a Graph Neural Network-based framework for precise MLS net selection, combined with a tailored DFT solution for robust testability. Experiments show GNN-MLS reduces timing violations by 79% and improves WNS and TNS by 81% and 94%, and moves designs closer to true 3D ICs.
papers.abstract_zh: 原生 3D 集成电路 (3D IC) 设计可提供增强的性能和密度，但由于真正的 3D EDA 工具支持有限，因此在信号路由方面面临挑战。伪 3D 流程弥补了这一差距，但缺乏跨层优化，这对于混合节点和同构设计至关重要。金属层共享（MLS）通过启用跨层路由协同优化来解决这个问题，但如果没有策略性地应用，则存在时序退化的风险。此外，MLS 在混合键合 3D IC 中创建开放连接，使芯片无法测试。我们提出了 GNN-MLS，这是一种基于图神经网络的框架，用于精确的 MLS 网络选择，并与定制的 DFT 解决方案相结合，以实现稳健的可测试性。实验表明，GNN-MLS 将时序违规减少了 79%，并将 WNS 和 TNS 分别提高了 81% 和 94%，并使设计更接近真正的 3D IC。

papers.title: GoPTX: Fine-grained GPU Kernel Fusion by PTX-level Instruction Flow Weaving.
papers.abstract: GPUs have been heavily utilized in diverse applications, and numerous approaches, including kernel fusion, have been proposed to boost GPU efficiency through concurrent kernel execution. However, these approaches generally overlook the opportunities to mitigate warp stalls and improve instruction level parallelism (ILP) in inter-kernel resource sharing. To address this issue, we introduce GOPTX, a novel design for kernel fusion that improves ILP through deliberate weaving instructions at the PTX level. GOPTX establishes a merged control flow graph (CFG) from original kernels, enabling to interleaving of instructions that were sequentially executed by default and minimizing pipeline stalls on data hazards. We further propose a latency-aware instruction weaving algorithm for more efficient instruction scheduling and an adaptive code slicing method to enlarge the scheduling space. Experimental evaluation demonstrates that GOPTX achieves an average speedup of $\mathbf{1 1. 2 \%}$ over the baseline concurrent execution, with a maximum improvement of 23%. The hardware resource utilization statistics show significant enhancements in eligible warps per cycle and resource use.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 已在各种应用中得到大量使用，并且已经提出了包括内核融合在内的多种方法来通过并发内核执行来提高 GPU 效率。然而，这些方法通常忽视了在内核间资源共享中减轻扭曲停顿和提高指令级并行性 (ILP) 的机会。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 GOPTX，这是一种新颖的内核融合设计，通过在 PTX 级别精心编织指令来改进 ILP。 GOPTX 从原始内核建立了一个合并的控制流图 (CFG)，从而能够交错默认顺序执行的指令，并最大限度地减少数据危险造成的管道停顿。我们进一步提出了一种用于更有效指令调度的延迟感知指令编织算法和一种用于扩大调度空间的自适应代码切片方法。实验评估表明，GOPTX 比基线并发执行平均加速 $\mathbf{1 1. 2 \%}$，最大提升 23%。硬件资源利用率统计数据显示每个周期的合格扭曲和资源使用显着增强。

papers.title: GPart: A GNN-Enabled Multilevel Graph Partitioner.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces GPart, a scalable multilevel framework for graph partitioning that integrates GNN embeddings with efficient coarsening and refinement techniques. On the Titan23 benchmarks, GPart achieves a cut size reduction of 34.13% to 42.92% over METIS and improves cut size by 9.30% on selected DIMACS benchmarks compared to G-kway. Furthermore, experiments on the Titan23 benchmarks show that GPart reduces normalized memory usage by 24.6x compared to GAP and 12.4x compared to GenPart. Unlike existing GNN-based methods, which require large hidden layers and substantial memory, GPart’s multilevel architecture reduces hidden layer sizes, significantly optimizing memory efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 GPart，这是一种用于图划分的可扩展多级框架，它将 GNN 嵌入与高效的粗化和细化技术集成在一起。在 Titan23 基准上，与 METIS 相比，GPart 的切割尺寸减少了 34.13% 至 42.92%，与 G-kway 相比，在选定的 DIMACS 基准上，切割尺寸提高了 9.30%。此外，Titan23 基准测试的实验表明，与 GAP 相比，GPart 将标准化内存使用量减少了 24.6 倍，与 GenPart 相比，减少了 12.4 倍。与现有的基于 GNN 的方法需要大量隐藏层和大量内存不同，GPart 的多级架构减少了隐藏层大小，显着优化了内存效率。

papers.title: GPS: GNN-Based Two-Stage Pre-Scheduling Loop Mapping Method on CGRAs.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture (CGRA) has emerged as a promising solution for accelerating computationally intensive applications, particularly in the field of artificial intelligence. One of the primary challenges for CGRA compilers is generating effective mapping results for complex applications within a limited time-frame. This paper presents an enhanced pre-scheduling method that integrates Integer Linear Programming (ILP) and Graph Neural Networks (GNN), along with a corresponding two-stage mapping approach. This combination significantly reduces the search space and accelerates the solution process for mapping problems. Experimental results demonstrate performance improvements ranging from $29.4 \%$ to $406.7 \%$, along with compilation time reductions of up to $1106.8 \times$ compared to existing compilation techniques, as well as excellent scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA）已成为加速计算密集型应用程序的有前途的解决方案，特别是在人工智能领域。 CGRA 编译器面临的主要挑战之一是在有限的时间范围内为复杂的应用程序生成有效的映射结果。本文提出了一种集成整数线性规划（ILP）和图神经网络（GNN）的增强预调度方法，以及相应的两阶段映射方法。这种组合显着减少了搜索空间并加速了映射问题的解决过程。实验结果表明，与现有编译技术相比，性能提升了从 $29.4 \%$ 到 $406.7 \%$，编译时间减少了高达 $1106.8 \times$，并且具有出色的可扩展性。

papers.title: Graph in the Vault: Protecting Edge GNN Inference with Trusted Execution Environment.
papers.abstract: Wide deployment of machine learning models on edge devices has rendered the model intellectual property (IP) and data privacy vulnerable. We propose GNNVault, the first secure Graph Neural Network (GNN) deployment strategy based on Trusted Execution Environment (TEE). GNNVault follows the design of “partition-before-training” and includes a private GNN rectifier to complement with a public backbone model. This way, both critical GNN model parameters and the private graph used during inference are protected within secure TEE compartments. Real-world implementations with Intel SGX demonstrate that GNNVault safeguards GNN inference against state-of-the-art link stealing attacks with a negligible accuracy degradation ($\lt 2 \%$).
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在边缘设备上的广泛部署使得模型知识产权 (IP) 和数据隐私容易受到攻击。我们提出了 GNNVault，这是第一个基于可信执行环境（TEE）的安全图神经网络（GNN）部署策略。 GNNVault 遵循“训练前分区”的设计，并包含一个私有 GNN 整流器来补充公共主干模型。这样，关键的 GNN 模型参数和推理过程中使用的私有图都受到安全 TEE 隔间的保护。英特尔 SGX 的实际实施表明，GNNVault 可以保护 GNN 推理免受最先进的链接窃取攻击，且精度下降可以忽略不计 ($\lt 2 \%$)。

papers.title: Graph-Guided Transfer Learning to Boost the Efficiency of System-Level Optimization of Analog/Mixed-Signal Circuits.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a novel graph-guided transfer learning approach to boost the efficiency of system-level optimization of analog/mixed-signal circuits. The system-level optimization is based on Reinforcement Learning (RL) in combination with Graph Attention Networks (GAT). The results surpass state-of-the-art in efficiency and optimality. The key innovation is a graph similarity detection method that leverages embedded design knowledge to identify electrical similarities and trade-offs, enhancing knowledge transferability, even between dissimilar circuit architectures. Applied to the case study of 4th-order continuoustime Delta-Sigma analog-to-digital converters, the graph-based transfer learning framework enhances the RL sampling efficiency, reducing the amount of simulations by up to 11x, and improves the optimization results by 12.4% compared to optimization from scratch. As the framework accelerates knowledge transfer across different architectures, it can boost the optimization efficiency and improve the performance towards a broad range of analog/mixed-signal systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的图形引导迁移学习方法，以提高模拟/混合信号电路的系统级优化的效率。系统级优化基于强化学习（RL）与图注意网络（GAT）的结合。结果在效率和优化方面超越了最先进的水平。关键的创新是图形相似性检测方法，该方法利用嵌入式设计知识来识别电气相似性和权衡，从而增强知识的可转移性，甚至在不同的电路架构之间也是如此。基于图的迁移学习框架应用于4阶连续时间Delta-Sigma模数转换器的案例研究，提高了RL采样效率，将模拟量减少了11倍，与从头优化相比，优化结果提高了12.4%。由于该框架加速了不同架构之间的知识转移，因此可以提高优化效率并提高各种模拟/混合信号系统的性能。

papers.title: GraphAccel: An In-Storage Accelerator for Efficient Graph-Based Vector Similarity Search Using Page Packing and Speculative Search Optimization.
papers.abstract: Graph-based search for approximate vector similarity is essential in AI applications, such as retrieval-augmented generation. To support large-scale searches, vector search graphs are often stored on storage devices like SSDs. In this paper, we introduce GraphAccel, an in-storage accelerator optimized for efficient graph-based vector similarity search. Our architecture incorporates an optimized page packing mechanism to reduce SSD page accesses per query, alongside a speculative search scheme that maximizes utilization of idle SSD chips and channels. Through these optimizations, GraphAccel achieves notable performance improvements over existing SSD-based graph search solutions, including DiskANN and DiskANN++.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似向量相似度搜索在人工智能应用中至关重要，例如检索增强生成。为了支持大规模搜索，矢量搜索图通常存储在 SSD 等存储设备上。在本文中，我们介绍了 GraphAccel，这是一种针对高效的基于图的向量相似性搜索而优化的存储内加速器。我们的架构采用了优化的页面打包机制，以减少每次查询的 SSD 页面访问量，同时采用推测搜索方案，最大限度地利用空闲 SSD 芯片和通道。通过这些优化，GraphAccel 比现有基于 SSD 的图搜索解决方案（包括 DiskANN 和 DiskANN++）实现了显着的性能改进。

papers.title: GraphFI: An Efficient Fault Injection Framework for Graph Processing on GPGPUs.
papers.abstract: As graph tasks become pervasive in real-time and safetycritical domains (e.g., financial fraud detection and electrical power systems), it is also essential to guarantee their reliable execution beyond pursuing extraordinary performance. However, due to the neglect of consideration for graph-specific execution paradigm, existing Fault Injection (FI) reliability analysis methods typically incur inaccurate system error resilience characterization, making it challenging to provide helpful guidance for efficient and reliable graph processing paradigm design. This paper proposes GraphFI, an efficient Graph Fault Injection framework on the universal parallel tasks acceleration platform (i.e., GPGPUs). Our key insight is progressively excavating the graph-specific error propagation and effect mechanisms, thereby avoiding blind FI trials. Firstly, observing that iterations with similar active vertex set exhibit similar error behavior, we propose iteration-driven GraphFI (ID-GraphFI) to solely select representative iterations for fast error resilience profile assessment. Secondly, by detecting resilience-similarity communities in graph topology, we propose topology-driven GraphFI (TD-GraphFI) that only selects representative vertices for community overall reliability evaluation. Thirdly, by exploring the graph-specific fault monotonic property, we propose the monotonicity-driven GraphFI (MD-GraphFI) to granularly draw system severe error boundaries for predictable/unnecessary fault injection avoidance. Merging them all, GraphFI can reduce system fault site space by up to two orders of magnitude, which achieves $2.1 \sim 15.2 \times$ speedup compared to SOTA methods while providing better reliability assessment accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着图任务在实时和安全关键领域（例如金融欺诈检测和电力系统）中变得普遍，除了追求卓越的性能之外，保证其可靠执行也至关重要。然而，由于忽视了图特定执行范式的考虑，现有的故障注入（FI）可靠性分析方法通常会导致系统错误恢复表征不准确，这使得为高效可靠的图处理范式设计提供有用的指导变得具有挑战性。本文提出了 GraphFI，这是一种在通用并行任务加速平台（即 GPGPU）上的高效图故障注入框架。我们的主要见解是逐步挖掘图特定的错误传播和影响机制，从而避免盲目的 FI 试验。首先，观察到具有相似活动顶点集的迭代表现出相似的错误行为，我们提出迭代驱动的 GraphFI (ID-GraphFI) 来仅选择代表性迭代来进行快速错误弹性概况评估。其次，通过检测图拓扑中的弹性相似性社区，我们提出了拓扑驱动的 GraphFI（TD-GraphFI），仅选择代表性顶点进行社区整体可靠性评估。第三，通过探索图特定的故障单调性，我们提出了单调性驱动的 GraphFI (MD-GraphFI) 来精细地绘制系统严重错误边界，以避免可预测/不必要的故障注入。将它们全部合并，GraphFI 可以将系统故障站点空间减少多达两个数量级，与 SOTA 方法相比，实现 $2.1 \sim 15.2 \times$ 加速，同时提供更好的可靠性评估精度。

papers.title: Grasp: Group-based Prediction of Activation Sparsity for Fast LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: Optimizing LLM inference has become increasingly important as the demand for efficient on-device deployments grows. To reduce the computational overhead in the MLP components, which account for a significant portion of LLM inference, ReLU-fied LLMs have been introduced to maximize activation sparsity. Several sparsity prediction methods have been developed to efficiently skip unnecessary memory accesses and computations by predicting activation sparsity. In this paper, we propose a novel magnitude-based, training-free sparsity prediction technique called Grasp that builds on the existing sign bitbased method for ReLU-fied LLMs. The proposed method enhances prediction accuracy by grouping values considering the distribution within vectors and explicitly accounting for statistical outliers. This allows us to estimate the impact of each element more accurately yet in an efficient way, improving both activation sparsity prediction accuracy and computational efficiency. Compared to the-state-of-the-art technique, Grasp achieves higher sparsity prediction accuracy and $11 \%$ higher skipping efficiency, which corresponds to $1.85 \times$ speedup against the dense inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着对高效设备上部署的需求不断增长，优化 LLM 推理变得越来越重要。为了减少 MLP 组件（占 LLM 推理的很大一部分）的计算开销，引入了 ReLU 化的 LLM 来最大化激活稀疏性。已经开发了几种稀疏性预测方法，通过预测激活稀疏性来有效地跳过不必要的内存访问和计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Grasp 的新颖的基于幅度、免训练的稀疏性预测技术，该技术建立在现有的基于符号位的 ReLU-fied LLM 方法的基础上。所提出的方法通过考虑向量内的分布对值进行分组并明确考虑统计异常值来提高预测准确性。这使我们能够更准确、更有效地估计每个元素的影响，从而提高激活稀疏性预测的准确性和计算效率。与最先进的技术相比，Grasp 实现了更高的稀疏性预测精度和 $11 \%$ 高的跳跃效率，相当于针对密集推理的 $1.85 \times$ 加速。

papers.title: GS-TG: 3D Gaussian Splatting Accelerator with Tile Grouping for Reducing Redundant Sorting while Preserving Rasterization Efficiency.
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) has emerged as a promising alternative to neural radiance fields (NeRF) as it offers high speed as well as high image quality in novel view synthesis. Despite these advancements, 3D-GS still struggles to meet the frames per second (FPS) demands of real-time applications. In this paper, we introduce GS-TG, a tile-grouping-based accelerator that enhances 3D-GS rendering speed by reducing redundant sorting operations and preserving rasterization efficiency. GS-TG addresses a critical trade-off issue in 3D-GS rendering: increasing the tile size effectively reduces redundant sorting operations, but it concurrently increases unnecessary rasterization computations. So, during sorting of the proposed approach, GS-TG groups small tiles (for making large tiles) to share sorting operations across tiles within each group, significantly reducing redundant computations. During rasterization, a bitmask assigned to each Gaussian identifies relevant small tiles, to enable efficient sharing of sorting results. Consequently, GS-TG enables sorting to be performed as if a large tile size is used by grouping tiles during the sorting stage, while allowing rasterization to proceed with the original small tiles by using bitmasks in the rasterization stage. GS-TG is a lossless method requiring no retraining or fine-tuning and it can be seamlessly integrated with previous 3D-GS optimization techniques. Experimental results show that GS-TG achieves an average speed-up of 1.54 times over state-of-the-art 3D-GS accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯溅射 (3D-GS) 已成为神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的一种有前途的替代方案，因为它在新颖的视图合成中提供高速和高图像质量。尽管取得了这些进步，3D-GS 仍然难以满足实时应用程序的每秒帧数 (FPS) 需求。在本文中，我们介绍了 GS-TG，这是一种基于图块分组的加速器，它通过减少冗余排序操作并保持光栅化效率来提高 3D-GS 渲染速度。 GS-TG 解决了 3D-GS 渲染中的一个关键权衡问题：增加图块大小可以有效减少冗余排序操作，但同时会增加不必要的光栅化计算。因此，在对所提出的方法进行排序期间，GS-TG 将小图块分组（用于制作大图块），以在每个组内的图块之间共享排序操作，从而显着减少冗余计算。在光栅化过程中，分配给每个高斯的位掩码会识别相关的小图块，以实现排序结果的有效共享。因此，GS-TG 使得能够执行排序，就像在排序阶段通过对图块进行分组来使用大图块大小一样，同时允许通过在光栅化阶段使用位掩码对原始小图块进行光栅化。 GS-TG 是一种无损方法，无需重新训练或微调，并且可以与之前的 3D-GS 优化技术无缝集成。实验结果表明，GS-TG 的平均加速比最先进的 3D-GS 加速器高出 1.54 倍。

papers.title: GSAcc: Accelerate 3D Gaussian Splatting via Depth Speculation and Gaussian-centric Rasterization.
papers.abstract: D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising real-time photorealistic radiance field rendering technique. Existing GPU and hardware accelerators face limitations due to insufficient parallelism in sequential rendering pipeline stages and the memory overhead associated with interim results. This paper presents GSAcc, a hardware accelerator co-designed with dataflow to render compressed 3DGS models on edge platforms efficiently. GSAcc enhances 3DGS rendering performance through several key innovations. First, it introduces Gaussian depth speculation, parallelizing preprocessing and sorting tasks. Second, GSAcc adopts a Gaussian-centric dataflow that interleaves preprocessing and rasterization, allowing all rendering steps to execute concurrently without storing intermediate results. Finally, it employs dedicated hardware acceleration to address sorting and rasterization bottlenecks within the optimized dataflow. We implemented and synthesized GSAcc using Intel16 PDK and evaluated its performance on real-world 3DGS scenes. Compared with desktop GPUs, GSAcc achieves up to $1.66 \times 10^{4} \mathrm{x}$ Power-Performance-Area (PPA) improvement as well as 48.7 x energy savings. Additionally, GSAcc outperforms the state-of-the-art hardware accelerator GSCore with up to 2.3x PPA improvement and 2.9x energy savings.
papers.abstract_zh: D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 已成为一种有前途的实时真实辐射场渲染技术。由于顺序渲染管线阶段的并行性不足以及与中间结果相关的内存开销，现有的 GPU 和硬件加速器面临着限制。本文介绍了 GSAcc，这是一种与数据流共同设计的硬件加速器，可在边缘平台上高效渲染压缩的 3DGS 模型。 GSAcc 通过多项关键创新增强了 3DGS 渲染性能。首先，它引入了高斯深度推测、并行化预处理和排序任务。其次，GSAcc 采用以高斯为中心的数据流，将预处理和光栅化交错进行，允许所有渲染步骤同时执行，而无需存储中间结果。最后，它采用专用硬件加速来解决优化数据流中的排序和光栅化瓶颈。我们使用 Intel16 PDK 实现并综合了 GSAcc，并评估了其在真实 3DGS 场景中的性能。与桌面 GPU 相比，GSAcc 实现了高达 $1.66 \times 10^{4} \mathrm{x}$ 功耗性能面积 (PPA) 改进以及 48.7 倍的节能。此外，GSAcc 的性能优于最先进的硬件加速器 GSCore，PPA 提升高达 2.3 倍，节能高达 2.9 倍。

papers.title: GSIM: Accelerating RTL Simulation for Large-Scale Designs.
papers.abstract: Register Transfer Level (RTL) simulation is widely used in design space exploration, verification, debugging, and preliminary performance evaluation for hardware design. Among various RTL simulation approaches, software simulation is the most commonly used due to its flexibility, low cost, and ease of debugging. However, the slow simulation of complex designs has become the bottleneck in design flow. In this work, we explore the sources of computation overhead of RTL simulation and conclude them into four factors. To optimize these factors, we propose several techniques at the supernode level, node level, and bit level. Finally, we implement these techniques in a novel RTL simulator GSIM. GSIM succeeds in simulating XiangShan, the state-of-the-art open-source RISC-V processor. Besides, compared to Verilator, GSIM can achieve speedup of 7.34x for booting Linux on XiangShan, and 19.94x for running CoreMark on Rocket.
papers.abstract_zh: 寄存器传输级 (RTL) 仿真广泛应用于硬件设计的设计空间探索、验证、调试和初步性能评估。在各种RTL仿真方法中，软件仿真因其灵活性、低成本和易于调试而最常用。然而，复杂设计的仿真速度缓慢已成为设计流程的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探讨了 RTL 仿真计算开销的来源，并将其归纳为四个因素。为了优化这些因素，我们提出了超级节点级别、节点级别和比特级别的几种技术。最后，我们在新型 RTL 模拟器 GSIM 中实现了这些技术。 GSIM 成功模拟了最先进的开源 RISC-V 处理器香山。此外，与Verilator相比，GSIM在象山上启动Linux可实现7.34倍的加速，在Rocket上运行CoreMark可实现19.94倍的加速。

papers.title: GTN-Path: Efficient Path Timing Prediction through Waveform Propagation with Graph Transformer.
papers.abstract: As technology nodes shrink, static timing analysis (STA) must balance accuracy and efficiency to ensure circuit functionality. Graph-based analysis (GBA) is fast but pessimistic, while path-based analysis (PBA) offers higher accuracy with an expensive runtime cost. However, GBA and PBA rely on lookup table (LUT)-based standard cell libraries, introducing accuracy losses compared to accurate SPICE simulations at advanced technology nodes. This work presents GTN-Path, an efficient post-layout path timing prediction method based on waveform propagation and graph transformer network (GTN). GTN-Path captures structural information to accurately predict waveforms by modeling standard cells and interconnects as graphs. Compared to HSPICE simulations, GTN-Path predicts waveforms with $2.98 \%$ error and delay with $2.96 \%$ error, achieving a speedup of $3510 \times$. Additionally, compared with the sign-off STA tool, the GTN-Path achieves a speedup of $12 \times$.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点的缩小，静态时序分析 (STA) 必须平衡精度和效率，以确保电路功能。基于图形的分析 (GBA) 速度快但比较悲观，而基于路径的分析 (PBA) 提供更高的准确性，但运行时间成本昂贵。然而，GBA 和 PBA 依赖于基于查找表 (LUT) 的标准单元库，与先进技术节点上的精确 SPICE 模拟相比，会带来精度损失。这项工作提出了 GTN-Path，一种基于波形传播和图变换网络 (GTN) 的高效布局后路径时序预测方法。 GTN-Path 通过将标准单元和互连建模为图形来捕获结构信息，以准确预测波形。与 HSPICE 仿真相比，GTN-Path 预测波形的误差为 $2.98 \%$，延迟的误差为 $2.96 \%$，实现了 $3510 \times$ 的加速。此外，与 Sign-off STA 工具相比，GTN-Path 实现了 12 美元\times$的加速。

papers.title: Guarder: A Stable and Lightweight Reconfigurable RRAM-based PIM Accelerator for DNN IP Protection.
papers.abstract: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) on conventional digital edge devices faces significant challenges due to high energy consumption. A promising solution is the processing-inmemory (PIM) architecture with resistive random-access memory (RRAM), but RRAM-based systems suffer from imprecise weights due to programming stochasticity and cannot effectively utilize conventional weight encryption/decryption intellectual property (IP) protection schemes. To address these issues, we propose a novel software-hardware co-design Guarder. On the hardware side, we introduce 3T2R cells to achieve reliable multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations and use reconfigurable inverter operating voltages to encode keys for encrypting DNNs on RRAM. On the software side, we implement a contrastive training method that ensures high model accuracy on authorized chips while degrading performance on unauthorized ones. This approach protects DNN IP with minimal hardware overhead while significantly mitigating the effects of RRAM programming stochasticity. Extensive experiments on tasks such as image classification (using MLP, ResNet, and ViT), segmentation (using SegFormer), and image generation (using DiT) validate the effectiveness of our method. The proposed contrastive training ensures negligible performance degradation on authorized chips, while performance on unauthorized chips drops to random guessing or generation. Compared to traditional RRAM accelerators, the 3T2R-based accelerator achieves a $1.41 \times$ reduction in area overhead and a $2.28 \times$ reduction in energy consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于高能耗，在传统数字边缘设备上部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 面临着重大挑战。一种有前景的解决方案是采用电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构，但基于 RRAM 的系统由于编程随机性而存在权重不精确的问题，并且无法有效利用传统的权重加密/解密知识产权 (IP) 保护方案。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的软硬件协同设计 Guarder。在硬件方面，我们引入 3T2R 单元来实现可靠的乘法累加 (MAC) 运算，并使用可重新配置的逆变器工作电压来编码密钥，以加密 RRAM 上的 DNN。在软件方面，我们实施了一种对比训练方法，可确保授权芯片上的高模型准确性，同时降低未授权芯片上的性能。这种方法以最小的硬件开销保护 DNN IP，同时显着减轻 RRAM 编程随机性的影响。对图像分类（使用 MLP、ResNet 和 ViT）、分割（使用 SegFormer）和图像生成（使用 DiT）等任务进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。所提出的对比训练确保授权芯片上的性能下降可以忽略不计，而未经授权的芯片上的性能下降到随机猜测或生成。与传统的 RRAM 加速器相比，基于 3T2R 的加速器面积开销减少了 1.41 美元，能耗减少了 2.28 美元。

papers.title: H3Match: A Hybrid Heterogeneous Hypergraph Matching Method for Subcircuit Identification.
papers.abstract: Subcircuit matching is widely applied in logic synthesis, design verification, hardware security, etc. Previous works employ redundant circuit representations, coupled with timeconsuming enumerative search methods. Subsequent works use a hybrid “approximate filtering - exact verification” framework, but the numerous false negatives predicted by the graph neural network (GNN) based filtering lead to severe matching failure. In this paper, an improved hybrid method named H3Match is proposed to achieve a better tradeoff between runtime, accuracy, and false negative rate. First, we model the circuits as hypergraphs to fully capture the topology and construct diverse heterogeneous hyperedge features to facilitate the learning of circuit topologies. Second, to reduce the false negatives, we reformulate the subgraph matching problem as matching directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with embedded circular structure information and develop a directed GNN-based approximate matching approach to identify potential matching subcircuits. Finally, we propose a general mixed integer nonlinear programming (MINLP) formulation for exact verification, with convergency speed accelerated by extracting the initial solution from the results in approximate matching. Experimental results show that our approximate method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by 4.31% in accuracy while achieving virtually zero false negatives. Our exact verification is on average $4.16 \times$ faster than SOTA exact methods. Overall, the end-to-end flow achieves a $7.08 \times$ speedup compared to existing approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 子电路匹配广泛应用于逻辑综合、设计验证、硬件安全等领域。以前的工作采用冗余电路表示，加上耗时的枚举搜索方法。后续工作使用了混合的“近似过滤-精确验证”框架，但基于图神经网络（GNN）的过滤预测的大量漏报导致严重的匹配失败。本文提出了一种名为 H3Match 的改进混合方法，以实现运行时间、准确性和漏报率之间的更好权衡。首先，我们将电路建模为超图，以充分捕获拓扑并构造不同的异构超边特征，以促进电路拓扑的学习。其次，为了减少漏报，我们将子图匹配问题重新表述为将有向无环图（DAG）与嵌入的循环结构信息进行匹配，并开发了一种基于有向 GNN 的近似匹配方法来识别潜在的匹配子电路。最后，我们提出了一种用于精确验证的通用混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）公式，通过从近似匹配结果中提取初始解来加速收敛速度。实验结果表明，我们的近似方法在准确度上比最先进的 (SOTA) 方法高出 4.31%，同时几乎实现了零假阴性。我们的精确验证平均比 SOTA 精确方法快 4.16 美元\倍$。总体而言，与现有方法相比，端到端流程实现了 7.08 美元的加速。

papers.title: Hardware Generation with High Flexibility using Reinforcement Learning Enhanced LLMs.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of integrated circuit design requires customizing Power, Performance, and Area (PPA) metrics according to different application demands. However, most engineers cannot anticipate requirements early in the design process, often discovering mismatches only after synthesis, necessitating iterative optimization or redesign. Some works have shown the promising capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in hardware design generation tasks, but they fail to tackle the PPA trade-off problem. In this work, we propose an LLM-based reinforcement learning framework, PPA-RTL, aiming to introduce LLMs as a cutting-edge automation tool by directly incorporating post-synthesis metrics PPA into the hardware design generation phase. We design PPA metrics as reward feedback to guide the model in producing designs aligned with specific optimization objectives across various scenarios. The experimental results demonstrate that PPARTL models, optimized for Power, Performance, Area, or their various combinations, significantly improve in achieving the desired trade-offs, making PPA-RTL applicable to a variety of application scenarios and project constraints.
papers.abstract_zh: 集成电路设计的复杂性日益增加，需要根据不同的应用需求定制功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 指标。然而，大多数工程师无法在设计过程的早期预测需求，通常只有在综合后才发现不匹配，从而需要迭代优化或重新设计。一些工作已经展示了大型语言模型（LLM）在硬件设计生成任务中的有前景的能力，但它们未能解决 PPA 权衡问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 LLM 的强化学习框架 PPA-RTL，旨在通过将综合后指标 PPA 直接纳入硬件设计生成阶段，将 LLM 作为尖端自动化工具引入。我们将 PPA 指标设计为奖励反馈，以指导模型生成与各种场景中的特定优化目标相一致的设计。实验结果表明，针对功耗、性能、面积或其各种组合进行优化的 PPARTL 模型在实现所需权衡方面显着改进，使得 PPA-RTL 适用于各种应用场景和项目约束。

papers.title: Hardware-Software Co-design for Distributed Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract: Distributed quantum computing (DQC) offers a pathway for scaling up quantum computing architectures beyond the confines of a single chip. Entanglement is a crucial resource for implementing nonlocal operations in DQC, and it is required to allow teleportation of quantum states and gates. Remote entanglement generation in practical systems is probabilistic, has longer duration than that of local operations, and is nondeterministic. Therefore, optimizing the performance of probabilistic remote entanglement generation is critically important for the performance of DQC architectures. In this paper we propose and study a new DQC architecture that combines (1) buffering of successfully generated entanglement, (2) asynchronously attempted entanglement generation, and (3) adaptive scheduling of remote gates based on the entanglement generation pattern. We show that our hardware-software co-design improves both the runtime and the output fidelity under a realistic model of DQC.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式量子计算 (DQC) 提供了一种突破单芯片限制的量子计算架构扩展途径。纠缠是在 DQC 中实现非定域操作的重要资源，并且需要它来允许量子态和门的隐形传输。实际系统中的远程纠缠生成是概率性的，比本地操作的持续时间更长，并且是不确定的。因此，优化概率远程纠缠生成的性能对于 DQC 架构的性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出并研究了一种新的 DQC 架构，该架构结合了（1）成功生成纠缠的缓冲，（2）异步尝试纠缠生成，以及（3）基于纠缠生成模式的远程门的自适应调度。我们展示了我们的硬件-软件协同设计在 DQC 的现实模型下提高了运行时间和输出保真度。

papers.title: Harnessing Conventional Video Processing Insights for Emerging 3D Video Generation Models: A Comprehensive Attention-aware Way.
papers.abstract: Video Generation Models based on 3D full attention (3D-VGMs) have significantly enhanced video quality. However, their inference overhead remains substantial, primarily due to the high computational cost of the attention mechanism, which accounts for over 75% of computations. Inspired by the success of conventional video processing, where video compression exploits similarities among patches, we point out that the attention mechanism can also harness the benefits from similarities among tokens. Nonetheless, two critical problems arise: (1) How can similarities be efficiently acquired in real-time? (2) How can workload balance be maintained when similar tokens are randomly distributed? To address these problems and leverage similarities for 3DVGMs, we propose Simpicker, a comprehensive attentionaware algorithm-hardware co-design for 3D-VGMs. Our core methodology is to fully utilize similarities in attention through both coarse-grained and fine-grained approaches while adopting dynamic adaptive strategies to leverage them. From the algorithm perspective, we propose a speculation-based similarity exploitation algorithm, allowing real-time importance speculation on the frame level, which is coarse-grained, and the token level, which is fine-grained. From the micro-architecture perspective, we propose a buffered lookup table-based (LUT-based) multiplication architecture for FP-INT multiplication and further eliminate potential bank conflicts to accelerate unimportant attention computation. From the mapping perspective, SimPicker proposes an adaptive grouping strategy in speculation to tame workload imbalance caused by randomly distributed similar tokens and allow seamless integration of our algorithms. Extensive experiments show that Simpicker achieves an average of $5.21 \times 1.45 \times$ speedup and $17.92 \times 1.63 \times$ energy efficiency compared to the NVIDIA A100 GPU and the state-of-the-art accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 3D 全注意力 (3D-VGM) 的视频生成模型显着提高了视频质量。然而，它们的推理开销仍然很大，主要是由于注意力机制的计算成本很高，占计算量的 75% 以上。受到传统视频处理成功的启发，视频压缩利用了补丁之间的相似性，我们指出注意力机制也可以利用令牌之间相似性的好处。尽管如此，还是出现了两个关键问题：（1）如何实时有效地获取相似性？ （2）当类似的代币随机分布时，如何保持工作量平衡？为了解决这些问题并利用 3DVGM 的相似性，我们提出了 Simpicker，这是一种针对 3D-VGM 的全面注意力感知算法-硬件协同设计。 Our core methodology is to fully utilize similarities in attention through both coarse-grained and fine-grained approaches while adopting dynamic adaptive strategies to leverage them.从算法的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于推测的相似性利用算法，允许在粗粒度的帧级别和细粒度的令牌级别进行实时重要性推测。从微架构的角度来看，我们提出了一种用于 FP-INT 乘法的基于缓冲查找表（基于 LUT）的乘法架构，并进一步消除潜在的存储体冲突，以加速不重要的注意力计算。从映射的角度来看，SimPicker 在推测中提出了一种自适应分组策略，以克服随机分布的相似令牌造成的工作负载不平衡，并允许我们的算法无缝集成。大量实验表明，与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 和最先进的加速器相比，Simpicker 平均实现了 5.21 美元 × 1.45 美元的加速和 17.92 美元 × 1.63 美元的能源效率。

papers.title: Harrow: Synthesis of Optical Logic Circuits via Harmonic Mean and Integer Partition.
papers.abstract: With the advancement of high-speed and energyefficient optical interconnect and computation, photonic integrated circuits (PICs) have become a promising alternative to traditional CMOS circuits. A PIC can be synthesized by mapping the binary decision diagram (BDD) of target functions to optical switches and combiners. However, excessive signal attenuation along the light propagation may require extra optical-electrical signal conversion, thus introducing unwanted delays. In this paper, we aim to overcome this deficiency during logic synthesis: First, we optimize the signal efficiency factor by applying the concept of harmonic means to optimize DC combiners. Second, we eliminate redundant combiners by integer partition. Moreover, we properly arrange these proposed techniques in an optimal sequence of operations to form our main framework. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state of the art in terms of efficiency factor.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着高速、节能光学互连和计算的进步，光子集成电路（PIC）已成为传统 CMOS 电路的有前途的替代品。可以通过将目标功能的二元决策图（BDD）映射到光开关和组合器来合成PIC。然而，沿光传播的过度信号衰减可能需要额外的光电信号转换，从而引入不需要的延迟。在本文中，我们的目标是克服逻辑综合过程中的这一缺陷：首先，我们通过应用谐波手段的概念来优化直流组合器来优化信号效率因子。其次，我们通过整数划分消除冗余组合器。此外，我们以最佳操作顺序正确排列这些提出的技术，以形成我们的主要框架。实验结果表明，我们的框架在效率因素方面优于现有技术。

papers.title: HeteroSVD: Efficient SVD Accelerator on Versal ACAP with Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
papers.abstract: Singular value decomposition (SVD) is a matrix factorization technique widely used in signal processing and recommendation systems, etc. In general, the time complexity of SVD algorithms is cubic to the problem size, making SVD algorithms difficult to meet stringent performance requirements in real-time. However, existing FPGA and GPU solutions fall short of jointly optimizing latency, throughput, and power consumption. To settle this issue, this paper proposes HeteroSVD, a heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerator for SVD computation on the Versal ACAP platform. HeteroSVD introduces a system-level SVD decomposition mechanism and proposes an algorithm-hardware co-design method to optimize SVD ordering jointly and AI engine (AIE)-centric dataflow and placement with Versal. Furthermore, in order to improve the quality of results (QoR) and facilitate micro-architecture selection, we introduce an automatic optimization framework that performs accurate performance modeling and fast design space exploration. Experiment results demonstrate that HeteroSVD reduces the latency by $1.98 \times$ over existing FPGA accelerators and outperforms GPU solutions with an improvement of up to $7.22 \times$ in latency, $1.77 \times$ in throughput, and $13.18 \times$ in energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 奇异值分解（SVD）是一种广泛应用于信号处理、推荐系统等领域的矩阵分解技术。一般来说，SVD算法的时间复杂度与问题规模成三次方，使得SVD算法难以实时满足严格的性能要求。然而，现有的 FPGA 和 GPU 解决方案无法联合优化延迟、吞吐量和功耗。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 HeteroSVD，一种在 Versal ACAP 平台上用于 ​​SVD 计算的异构可重构加速器。 HeteroSVD 引入了系统级 SVD 分解机制，并提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计方法，以与 Versal 联合优化 SVD 排序以及以 AI 引擎 (AIE) 为中心的数据流和布局。此外，为了提高结果质量（QoR）并促进微架构选择，我们引入了自动优化框架，可以执行准确的性能建模和快速设计空间探索。实验结果表明，HeteroSVD 比现有 FPGA 加速器减少了 1.98 美元的延迟，并且优于 GPU 解决方案，延迟提高了 7.22 美元，吞吐量提高了 1.77 美元，能效提高了 13.18 美元。

papers.title: HH-PIM: Dynamic Optimization of Power and Performance with Heterogeneous-Hybrid PIM for Edge AI Devices.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-Memory (PIM) architectures offer promising solutions for efficiently handling AI applications in energy-constrained edge environments. While traditional PIM designs enhance performance and energy efficiency by reducing data movement between memory and processing units, they are limited in edge devices due to continuous power demands and the storage requirements of large neural network weights in SRAM and DRAM. Hybrid PIM architectures, incorporating nonvolatile memories like MRAM and ReRAM, mitigate these limitations but struggle with a mismatch between fixed computing resources and dynamically changing inference workloads. To address these challenges, this study introduces a Heterogeneous-Hybrid PIM (HH-PIM) architecture, comprising high-performance MRAM-SRAM PIM modules and low-power MRAM-SRAM PIM modules. We further propose a data placement optimization algorithm that dynamically allocates data based on computational demand, maximizing energy efficiency. FPGA prototyping and power simulations with processors featuring HH-PIM and other PIM types demonstrate that the proposed HH-PIM achieves up to 60.43% average energy savings over conventional PIMs while meeting application latency requirements. These results confirm HH-PIM’s suitability for adaptive, energy-efficient AI processing in edge devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构提供了有前景的解决方案，可在能源受限的边缘环境中有效处理 AI 应用。虽然传统的 PIM 设计通过减少内存和处理单元之间的数据移动来提高性能和能源效率，但由于持续的电力需求以及 SRAM 和 DRAM 中大型神经网络权重的存储要求，它们在边缘设备中受到限制。混合 PIM 架构结合了 MRAM 和 ReRAM 等非易失性存储器，缓解了这些限制，但面临着固定计算资源和动态变化的推理工作负载之间不匹配的问题。为了应对这些挑战，本研究引入了异构混合 PIM (HH-PIM) 架构，包括高性能 MRAM-SRAM PIM 模块和低功耗 MRAM-SRAM PIM 模块。我们进一步提出了一种数据放置优化算法，该算法根据计算需求动态分配数据，最大限度地提高能源效率。使用具有 HH-PIM 和其他 PIM 类型的处理器进行的 FPGA 原型设计和功率仿真表明，所提出的 HH-PIM 比传统 PIM 平均节能高达 60.43%，同时满足应用延迟要求。这些结果证实了 HH-PIM 适用于边缘设备中的自适应、节能的 AI 处理。

papers.title: High Energy-efficiency and Low latency In-Memory Computing using Analog Accumulator and In-Memory ADC with shared References.
papers.abstract: This article proposes a $256 \times 128$ in-memory computing array using reconfigurable in-memory analog-to-digital conversion with shared references for high area efficiency (area overhead of 3% is $9 X$ better than traditional). A dual-8T SRAM bitcell is used to achieve read-write decoupling and store ternary weights. Read World Line Under Drive enabled Cascode helps to minimize current variations producing high linearity. Multi-bit input is handled with low latency and high energyefficiency by using bit-slicing (BS) with near-memory chargesharing based binary weighted accumulator (CHA). Using noise resilient training, we show software comparable performance for a MLP on MNIST, VGG-8 on CIFAR-10, and graph attention network on Cora, with respective accuracy reductions of only $0.1 \%, 0.8 \%$ and 0.5% due to non-idealities. The proposed macro demonstrates high energy/area efficiency (1146 TOPS/W, 27 TOPS $/ \mathbf{m m}^{\mathbf{2}}$ at $\mathbf{1} \boldsymbol{/} \mathbf{2} \boldsymbol{/} \mathbf{1 b}$) in $\mathbf{6 5 ~ n m}$ CMOS. It increases throughput (by $1.9 X$) and linearity (by $23 X$) compared to input pulse-width modulation by using BS and CHA. Compared to conventional BS with digital accumulation after ADC, this method has $1.7 X / 6.6 X$ better energy-efficiency/throughput by reducing ADC operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个 256 × 128 美元的内存计算阵列，使用可重新配置的内存中模数转换和共享引用来实现高面积效率（3% 的面积开销比传统的要好 9 美元）。采用双8T SRAM位单元实现读写解耦并存储三进制权重。 Read World Line Under Drive 启用的 Cascode 有助于最大限度地减少电流变化，从而产生高线性度。通过使用位切片 (BS) 和基于近内存电荷共享的二进制加权累加器 (CHA)，可以以低延迟和高能效处理多位输入。使用噪声弹性训练，我们展示了 MNIST 上的 MLP、CIFAR-10 上的 VGG-8 和 Cora 上的图注意网络的软件性能相当，由于非理想性，各自的准确度仅降低了 0.1%、0.8%$ 和 0.5%。所提出的宏在 $\mathbf{6 5 ~ n m}$ CMOS 中表现出高能量/面积效率（1146 TOPS/W、27 TOPS $/ \mathbf{m m}^{\mathbf{2}}$ at $\mathbf{1} \boldsymbol{/} \mathbf{2} \boldsymbol{/} \mathbf{1 b}$）。与使用 BS 和 CHA 的输入脉宽调制相比，它提高了吞吐量（增加 1.9 美元）和线性度（增加 23 美元）。与在 ADC 之后进行数字累加的传统 BS 相比，该方法通过减少 ADC 操作，能效/吞吐量提高了 1.7 X / 6.6 X$。

papers.title: High-Performance Computing Architecture Exploration with Stage-Enhanced Bayesian Optimization.
papers.abstract: The emergence of new applications in high-performance computing is driving the need for more efficient computing machines. As supercomputer architectures become increasingly complex, the combinatorial explosion of design spaces and the time-consuming nature of design simulations lead to challenging design space exploration problems. This work introduces an automated search framework to achieve power-performance-area efficient Arm Neoverse V1 processor designs. Based on multi-objective Bayesian optimization, we propose a new exploration algorithm named SEBO by enhancing the three main stages of the optimization. Experimental results show that SEBO can not only compete with the top state-of-the-art baseline algorithms, but also outperforms them in terms of the quality and diversity of the returned Pareto-optimal designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算领域新应用的出现推动了对更高效计算机器的需求。随着超级计算机架构变得越来越复杂，设计空间的组合爆炸和设计模拟的耗时性质导致了具有挑战性的设计空间探索问题。这项工作引入了一个自动搜索框架，以实现功耗性能面积高效的 Arm Neoverse V1 处理器设计。基于多目标贝叶斯优化，我们通过增强优化的三个主要阶段，提出了一种名为SEBO的新探索算法。实验结果表明，SEBO 不仅可以与最先进的基线算法竞争，而且在返回的帕累托最优设计的质量和多样性方面也优于它们。

papers.title: High-throughput Point-Cloud Accelerator with Sparsity-aware Hierarchical Neighbor Voxel Search and Skipping.
papers.abstract: Point cloud-based 3D sparse convolution networks are widely employed to process voxel features efficiently. However, the irregularity of voxel sparsity poses significant challenges, leading to increased hardware complexity and inefficiencies. We propose an algorithm-hardware co-design for sparse 3D convolution. At the algorithm level, an on-the-fly thresholdbased voxel skipping is adopted, enhancing efficiency. At the hardware level, a hierarchical 3-stage Voxel Search and Skipping is developed to systematically narrow down the non-zero search space, enhancing both performance and hardware utilization. We implemented the proposed accelerator in a 65 nm process to demonstrate a 77.7% reduction in delay compared to a baseline design, which does not support the proposed sparsity adaptations. The proposed system also achieved the $1.34 \times$ and $2.22 \times$ higher energy efficiency and throughput as compared to the state-ofarts.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于点云的 3D 稀疏卷积网络被广泛用于有效处理体素特征。然而，体素稀疏性的不规则性带来了重大挑战，导致硬件复杂性增加和效率低下。我们提出了一种稀疏 3D 卷积的算法-硬件协同设计。在算法层面，采用基于动态阈值的体素跳跃，提高了效率。在硬件层面，开发了分层的三阶段体素搜索和跳跃，以系统地缩小非零搜索空间，从而提高性能和硬件利用率。我们在 65 nm 工艺中实现了所提出的加速器，与不支持所提出的稀疏性调整的基线设计相比，延迟减少了 77.7%。与现有技术相比，所提议的系统还实现了分别提高 1.34 美元和 2.22 美元的能源效率和吞吐量。

papers.title: HiSpTRSV: Exploring Tile-Level Parallelism for SpTRSV Acceleration on FPGAs.
papers.abstract: Sparse Triangular Solve (SpTRSV) is a critical level2 kernel in sparse Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS). While Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) accelerators for SpTRSV focus on optimizing individual tiles, they overlook intertile parallelism. Designing an inter-tile parallelism accelerator poses challenges, including constructing fine-grained dependency graph, handling communication overhead, and balancing workloads. HiSpTRSV addresses these challenges through dependency graph parsing, tile-based highly parallel algorithm, filtering mechanisms, and bidirectional matching with modular indexing. Experiments show that HiSpTRSV outperforms the state-of-the-art SpTRSV accelerator in terms of a 34.3% performance improvement. HiSpTRSV achieves a $3.58 \times$ speedup and $9.59 \times$ higher energy efficiency compared to GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏三角求解 (SpTRSV) 是稀疏基本线性代数子程序 (BLAS) 中的关键 2 级内核。虽然 SpTRSV 的现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 加速器专注于优化各个图块，但它们忽略了图块间的并行性。设计瓦片间并行加速器提出了挑战，包括构建细粒度依赖图、处理通信开销和平衡工作负载。 HiSpTRSV 通过依赖图解析、基于图块的高度并行算法、过滤机制以及模块化索引的双向匹配来解决这些挑战。实验表明，HiSpTRSV 的性能优于最先进的 SpTRSV 加速器，性能提升了 34.3%。与 GPU 相比，HiSpTRSV 实现了 3.58 美元的加速和 9.59 美元的能源效率。

papers.title: HIVE: A High-Priority Victim Cache for Accelerating GPU Memory Accesses.
papers.abstract: The victim cache was originally designed as a secondary cache to handle misses in the L1 data (L1D) cache in CPUs. However, this design is often sub-optimal for GPUs. Accessing the high-latency L1D cache and its victim cache can lead to significant latency overhead, severely degrading the performance of certain applications. We introduce HIVE, a high-priority victim cache designed to accelerate GPU memory accesses. HIVE handles memory requests first, before they reach the L1D cache. Our experimental results show that HIVE achieves an average performance improvement of $\mathbf{7 7. 1 \%}$ and $\mathbf{2 1. 7 \%}$ compared to the baseline and the state-of-the-art architecture, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 受害者缓存最初被设计为二级缓存，用于处理 CPU 中 L1 数据 (L1D) 缓存中的未命中情况。然而，这种设计对于 GPU 来说通常不是最佳的。访问高延迟 L1D 缓存及其受害者缓存可能会导致显着的延迟开销，从而严重降低某些应用程序的性能。我们引入 HIVE，这是一种高优先级受害者缓存，旨在加速 GPU 内存访问。 HIVE 首先处理内存请求，然后再到达 L1D 缓存。我们的实验结果表明，与基线和最先进的架构相比，HIVE 的平均性能分别提高了 $\mathbf{7 7. 1 \%}$ 和 $\mathbf{2 1. 7 \%}$。

papers.title: HoBBy: Hardening Unbalanced Branches against Control Flow Attacks on Intel SGX and AMD SEV.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces HoBBy, a compiler-based tool that hardens unbalanced branches at the instruction level, making parallel control flows indistinguishable to state-of-theart attacks that bypass the source-code level balancing. To achieve this, we propose a single-step analysis method to identify unbalanced instructions in secret-dependent branches, and implement instruction shadowing, cogging, and spiraling techniques to protect them. We evaluate HoBBy by hardening secret-dependent branches in four real-world applications, validating its resilience against three state-of-the-art attacks targeting Intel SGX and AMD SEV. HoBBy achieves a runtime overhead of 2.8% for cryptographic libraries and a binary size overhead of $\mathbf{0. 6 \%}$.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 HoBBy，这是一种基于编译器的工具，可在指令级别强化不平衡分支，使并行控制流与绕过源代码级别平衡的最新攻击无法区分。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种单步分析方法来识别秘密相关分支中的不平衡指令，并实施指令阴影、齿槽和螺旋技术来保护它们。我们通过强化四个实际应用程序中的秘密相关分支来评估 HoBBy，验证其针对针对 Intel SGX 和 AMD SEV 的三种最先进攻击的弹性。 HoBBy 的加密库运行时开销为 2.8%，二进制大小开销为 $\mathbf{0. 6\%}$。

papers.title: Holistic Design towards Resource-Stringent Binary Vector Symbolic Architecture.
papers.abstract: Classification tasks on ultra-lightweight devices demand devices that are resource-constrained and deliver swift responses. Binary Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) is a promising approach due to its minimal memory requirements and fast execution times compared to traditional machine learning (ML) methods. Nonetheless, binary VSA’s practicality is limited by its inferior inference performance and a design that prioritizes algorithmic over hardware optimization. This paper introduces UniVSA, a co-optimized binary VSA framework for both algorithm and hardware. UniVSA not only significantly enhances inference accuracy beyond current state-of-the-art binary VSA models but also reduces memory footprints. It incorporates novel, lightweight modules and design flow tailored for optimal hardware performance. Experimental results show that UniVSA surpasses traditional ML methods in terms of performance on resource-limited devices, achieving smaller memory usage, lower latency, reduced resource demand, and decreased power consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 超轻量级设备上的分类任务需要资源有限且能够快速响应的设备。与传统机器学习 (ML) 方法相比，二进制向量符号架构 (VSA) 具有最小的内存需求和较快的执行时间，因此是一种很有前景的方法。尽管如此，二进制 VSA 的实用性受到其较差的推理性能和优先考虑算法而非硬件优化的设计的限制。本文介绍了 UniVSA，一种算法和硬件协同优化的二进制 VSA 框架。 UniVSA 不仅显着提高了推理精度，超越了当前最先进的二进制 VSA 模型，而且还减少了内存占用。它采用了新颖、轻量级的模块和专为最佳硬件性能而定制的设计流程。实验结果表明，UniVSA 在资源有限设备上的性能超越了传统的 ML 方法，实现了更小的内存占用、更低的延迟、更少的资源需求和更低的功耗。

papers.title: HPIM-NoC: A Priori-Knowledge-Based Optimization Framework for Heterogeneous PIM-Based NoCs.
papers.abstract: Network-on-Chip (NoC) accelerators with heterogeneous Processing-in-Memory (PIM) cores achieve superior performance than homogeneous ones for neural networks. Dedicated simulators and architecture search frameworks are pivotal for obtaining performance, power, and area (PPA) metrics, as well as guiding the design process. However, existing simulators are primarily designed for homogeneous NoC and lack support for simulating heterogeneous PIM-based NoC architectures. Besides, current search frameworks for heterogeneous NoC architectures only focus on workload allocation and mapping strategies, failing to explore heterogeneous PIM configurations in a larger design space. In this work, we propose HPIM-NoC, a joint simulation and search framework for heterogeneous PIM-based NoC architectures. HPIM-NoC not only supports the simulation of heterogeneous PIM cores, but also provides more accurate latency results by introducing NoC transmission delays and pipelines in co-simulation. HPIM-NoC implements a three-stage heterogeneous search process based on priori knowledge and employs a specific simulated annealing algorithm tailored for heterogeneous architecture search. The search process is accelerated by precomputing core PPA metrics and reducing NoC simulation frequency. In addition, the framework integrates a customized layout algorithm to optimize the placement of heterogeneous NoC, minimizing communication latency and overall area. Experimental results on various neural networks demonstrate that HPIM-NoC can quickly find near-optimal configurations within a limited time. The proposed acceleration method reduces the search time of HPIM-NoC by $2.12 \times$, $2.17 \times$, and $2.96 \times$, respectively. Compared to homogeneous architectures, the Fusions of Metrics (FoMs) of heterogeneous PIM-based NoC architectures found by HPIM-NoC are reduced by $\mathbf{1. 1 8 \%, ~} \mathbf{1 6. 9 4 \%}$, and $\mathbf{3 7. 4 1 \%}$ for ResNet-18 under three settings, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有异构内存处理 (PIM) 内核的片上网络 (NoC) 加速器比神经网络的同构加速器具有更优越的性能。专用模拟器和架构搜索框架对于获取性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 指标以及指导设计过程至关重要。然而，现有的模拟器主要是为同构NoC设计的，缺乏对模拟基于PIM的异构NoC架构的支持。此外，当前异构NoC架构的搜索框架仅关注工作负载分配和映射策略，未能在更大的设计空间中探索异构PIM配置。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HPIM-NoC，这是一种针对基于 PIM 的异构 NoC 架构的联合仿真和搜索框架。 HPIM-NoC不仅支持异构PIM核的仿真，而且通过在联合仿真中引入NoC传输延迟和管道，可以提供更准确的延迟结果。 HPIM-NoC实现了基于先验知识的三阶段异构搜索过程，并采用了专为异构架构搜索而定制的特定模拟退火算法。通过预先计算核心 PPA 指标并降低 NoC 仿真频率来加速搜索过程。此外，该框架还集成了定制布局算法，以优化异构NoC的布局，最大限度地减少通信延迟和整体面积。各种神经网络的实验结果表明，HPIM-NoC可以在有限的时间内快速找到接近最优的配置。所提出的加速方法将 HPIM-NoC 的搜索时间分别减少了 $2.12 \times$、$2.17 \times$ 和 $2.96 \times$。与同构架构相比，HPIM-NoC 发现的基于 PIM 的异构 NoC 架构的指标融合 (FoM) 减少了 $\mathbf{1.三种设置下的 ResNet-18 分别为 1 8 \%, ~} \mathbf{1 6. 9 4 \%}$ 和 $\mathbf{3 7. 4 1 \%}$。

papers.title: Hybrid Embedding Framework for Memory-Efficient Recommendation Systems.
papers.abstract: This study introduces a memory-efficient mixed representation for deep learning recommendation models (DLRM), addressing the embedding table memory bottleneck from growing data scale. By distinguishing between frequently accessed (hot) and infrequently accessed (cold) embeddings, we store hot embeddings in a compact table while representing cold embeddings using a deep hash embedding (DHE) network, significantly reducing memory usage. This hybrid approach performs table lookups for hot embeddings and parallelized computations for cold embeddings, minimizing training time while maintaining accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other embedding reduction techniques in memory efficiency, accuracy, and training speed in CPU-GPU hybrid environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究为深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）引入了一种内存高效的混合表示，解决了数据规模不断增长带来的嵌入表内存瓶颈。通过区分频繁访问（热）和不频繁访问（冷）嵌入，我们将热嵌入存储在紧凑的表中，同时使用深度哈希嵌入（DHE）网络表示冷嵌入，从而显着减少内存使用。这种混合方法对热嵌入执行表查找，对冷嵌入执行并行计算，从而在保持准确性的同时最大限度地减少训练时间。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 CPU-GPU 混合环境中的内存效率、准确性和训练速度方面优于其他嵌入减少技术。

papers.title: HybriMoE: Hybrid CPU-GPU Scheduling and Cache Management for Efficient MoE Inference.
papers.abstract: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has demonstrated significant advantages as it enables to increase the model capacity without a proportional increase in computation. However, the large MoE model size still introduces substantial memory demands, which usually requires expert offloading on resource-constrained platforms and incurs significant overhead. Hybrid CPU-GPU inference has been proposed to leverage CPU computation to reduce expert loading overhead but faces major challenges: on one hand, the expert activation patterns of MoE models are highly unstable, rendering the fixed mapping strategies in existing works inefficient; on the other hand, the hybrid CPU-GPU schedule for MoE is inherently complex due to the diverse expert sizes, structures, uneven workload distribution, etc. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose HybriMoE, a hybrid CPU-GPU inference framework that improves resource utilization through a novel CPU-GPU scheduling and cache management system. HybriMoE introduces (i) a dynamic intra-layer scheduling strategy to balance workloads across CPU and GPU, (ii) an impact-driven inter-layer prefetching algorithm, and (iii) a score-based caching algorithm to mitigate expert activation instability. We implement HybriMoE on top of the kTransformers framework and evaluate it on three widely used MoE-based LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that HybriMoE achieves an average speedup of $\mathbf{1. 3 3} \times$ in the prefill stage and $1.70 \times$ in the decode stage compared to state-of-the-art hybrid MoE inference framework. Our code is available at: https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/HybriMoE.
papers.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 架构已展现出显着的优势，因为它能够在不成比例增加计算量的情况下增加模型容量。然而，大的 MoE 模型尺寸仍然会带来大量的内存需求，这通常需要在资源受限的平台上进行专家卸载，并产生大量开销。混合CPU-GPU推理已经被提出来利用CPU计算来减少专家加载开销，但面临着重大挑战：一方面，MoE模型的专家激活模式高度不稳定，导致现有工作中的固定映射策略效率低下；另一方面，由于专家规模、结构不同、工作负载分布不均匀等原因，MoE 的混合 CPU-GPU 调度本质上很复杂。为了解决这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了 HybriMoE，一种混合​​ CPU-GPU 推理框架，通过新颖的 CPU-GPU 调度和缓存管理系统提高资源利用率。 HybriMoE 引入了 (i) 动态层内调度策略来平衡 CPU 和 GPU 之间的工作负载，(ii) 影响驱动的层间预取算法，以及 (iii) 基于分数的缓存算法以减轻专家激活的不稳定性。我们在 kTransformers 框架之上实现 HybriMoE，并在三个广泛使用的基于 MoE 的法学硕士上对其进行评估。实验结果表明 HybriMoE 实现了 $\mathbf{1 的平均加速。与最先进的混合 MoE 推理框架相比，预填充阶段的成本为 3 3} \times$，解码阶段的成本为 $1.70 \times$。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/HybriMoE。

papers.title: Hydra: Harnessing Expert Popularity for Efficient Mixture-of-Expert Inference on Chiplet System.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of model sizes in advanced artificial intelligence algorithms, particularly in Transformerbased large language models (LLMs), has led to significant computational overhead. Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) models offer a solution through their sparsely gating mechanism but introduce new challenges of extensive all-to-all communication and model computational inefficiencies. This paper presents Hydra, a software/hardware co-design aimed at accelerating MoE inference on chiplet-based architectures. In software, Hydra employs a popularity-aware expert mapping strategy to optimize interchiplet communication. In hardware, it incorporates Content Addressable Memory (CAM) to eliminate expensive explicit token (un)-permutation based on sparse matrix multiplications and a redundant-calculation-skipping softmax engine to bypass unnecessary division and exponential operations. Evaluated in 22 nm technology, Hydra achieves latency reductions of $14.2 \times$ and $3.5 \times$ and power reductions of $169.1 \times$ and $18.9 \times$ over GPU and state-of-the-art MoE accelerator, respectively, thereby offering a scalable and efficient solution for MoE model deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 先进人工智能算法中模型大小的快速增长，特别是基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM)，导致了巨大的计算开销。专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过其稀疏门控机制提供了解决方案，但引入了广泛的全对全通信和模型计算效率低下的新挑战。本文介绍了 Hydra，这是一种软件/硬件协同设计，旨在加速基于小芯片的架构上的 MoE 推理。在软件方面，Hydra 采用流行感知专家映射策略来优化芯片间通信。在硬件中，它结合了内容可寻址内存（CAM）来消除基于稀疏矩阵乘法的昂贵的显式令牌（un）排列，并采用冗余计算跳过softmax引擎来绕过不必要的除法和指数运算。在 22 nm 技术中进行评估，与 GPU 和最先进的 MoE 加速器相比，Hydra 的延迟分别降低了 14.2 美元和 3.5 美元，功耗降低了 169.1 美元和 18.9 美元，从而为 MoE 模型部署提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案。

papers.title: Hypnos: Memory Efficient Homomorphic Processing Unit.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) introduces a novel paradigm in privacy-preserving computation, extending its applicability to various scenarios. However, Operating on encrypted data imposes significant computational challenges, particularly elevating data transmission and memory access demands. Consequently, developing an efficient system storage architecture becomes vital for FHE-specific architectures. Traditional FHE accelerators use a Host+ACC topology, often focusing on enhancing computational performance and efficient using of on-chip caches, with the assumption that very large volumes of encrypted data are already present in the accelerator’s memory while neglecting the inefficiencies of the unavoidable PCIe bus. In this paper, we propose Hypnos—a memory-efficient homomorphic encryption processing unit. In Hypnos, we abstract operators from FHE schemes into commands suitable for memory-efficient processing units and combine them with a homomorphic encryption paged memory management system designed for memory access, significantly reducing the memory access and execution time of homomorphic encryption applications. We implement Hypnos on the QianKun FPGA Card and highlight the following results: (1) outperforms SOTA ASIC and FPGA solutions by 2.58× and 4.43× (2) the communication overhead is reduced by 3.78 × compared to traditional architectures; (3) up to 27.6× and 19.06× energy efficiency improvement compared to ASIC-based CraterLake and FPGA-based Poseidon for ResNet-20 respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 全同态加密（FHE）在隐私保护计算中引入了一种新颖的范式，将其适用性扩展到各种场景。然而，对加密数据进行操作带来了巨大的计算挑战，特别是提高了数据传输和内存访问需求。因此，开发高效的系统存储架构对于 FHE 特定架构至关重要。传统的FHE加速器采用Host+ACC拓扑，通常专注于增强计算性能和片上缓存的高效使用，假设加速器内存中已经存在大量加密数据，而忽略了不可避免的PCIe总线的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 Hypnos——一种内存高效的同态加密处理单元。在Hypnos中，我们将FHE方案中的运算符抽象为适合内存高效处理单元的命令，并将它们与专为内存访问而设计的同态加密分页内存管理系统相结合，显着减少了同态加密应用程序的内存访问和执行时间。我们在QianKun FPGA卡上实现了Hypnos，并强调了以下结果：（1）性能优于SOTA ASIC和FPGA解决方案2.58倍和4.43倍（2）与传统架构相比，通信开销减少了3.78倍； (3) 与 ResNet-20 的基于 ASIC 的 CraterLake 和基于 FPGA 的 Poseidon 相比，能效分别提高了 27.6 倍和 19.06 倍。

papers.title: Identifying System-on-Chip Security Assets with Structure-Based Analysis.
papers.abstract: In the evolving field of hardware design, ensuring the security of System-on-Chips (SoCs) has become increasingly vital. As SoCs grow in complexity, integrating components from various sources, the identification and protection of security assets are crucial to prevent vulnerabilities. Traditional methods of identifying these assets are manual and time-intensive. To address this challenge, automated tools for security asset identification are essential, enabling faster and more accurate detection of critical assets early in the design process. In this paper, we propose a framework for the automated identification of security assets within SoCs. By transforming register-transfer level (RTL) code into graphs and leveraging deep neural networks (DNNs) to classify assets based on their structural patterns, our approach can effectively differentiate between security and non-security assets. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves high classification accuracy, with the model reaching up to 99% accuracy in identifying security assets, significantly reducing the need for manual intervention.
papers.abstract_zh: 在不断发展的硬件设计领域，确保片上系统 (SoC) 的安全性变得越来越重要。随着 SoC 的复杂性不断增加，集成来自不同来源的组件，安全资产的识别和保护对于防止漏洞至关重要。识别这些资产的传统方法是手动且耗时的。为了应对这一挑战，用于安全资产识别的自动化工具至关重要，可以在设计过程的早期更快、更准确地检测关键资产。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于自动识别 SoC 内安全资产的框架。通过将寄存器传输级（RTL）代码转换为图形，并利用深度神经网络（DNN）根据资产的结构模式对资产进行分类，我们的方法可以有效地区分安全资产和非安全资产。实验结果表明，该方法实现了较高的分类准确率，模型识别安全资产的准确率高达99%，显着减少了人工干预的需要。

papers.title: iG-kway: Incremental k-way Graph Partitioning on GPU.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in GPU-accelerated graph partitioning have achieved significant performance gains but remain limited to full graph partitioning, lacking support for incremental updates. This limitation is critical in CAD applications, where circuit graphs undergo iterative, incremental modifications during optimization. We present iG-kway, the first GPU-based incremental k-way graph partitioner. iG-kway features an incrementality-aware data structure and a refinement kernel that efficiently updates only affected vertices with minimal quality loss. Experiments show that iG-kway delivers up to $84 \times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art G-kway with comparable partitioning quality.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 加速图分区的最新进展取得了显着的性能提升，但仍仅限于完整图分区，缺乏对增量更新的支持。这种限制在 CAD 应用中至关重要，因为电路图在优化过程中会经历迭代、增量修改。我们推出了 iG-kway，第一个基于 GPU 的增量 k-way 图分区器。 iG-kway 具有增量感知数据结构和细化内核，可以有效地仅更新受影响的顶点，同时将质量损失降至最低。实验表明，在具有相当的分区质量的情况下，iG-kway 比最先进的 G-kway 提供高达 84 倍的加速。

papers.title: In-Memory Arithmetic: Enabling Division with Stochastic Logic.
papers.abstract: Designing an efficient arithmetic division circuit has long been a major challenge. Traditional binary computation methods rely on complex algorithms that require multiple cycles, complex control logic, and substantial hardware resources. Implementing division with emerging in-memory computing technologies is even more challenging due to susceptibility to noise, process variation, and the complexity of binary division. In this work, we propose an in-memory division architecture leveraging stochastic computing (SC), an emerging technology known for its high fault tolerance and low-cost design. Our approach utilizes a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ)-based memory architecture to efficiently execute logic-in-memory operations. Experimental results across various process variation conditions demonstrate the robustness of our method against hardware variations. To assess its practical effectiveness, we apply our approach to the Retinex Algorithm for image enhancement, demonstrating its viability in real-world applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计高效的算术除法电路长期以来一直是一个重大挑战。传统的二进制计算方法依赖于复杂的算法，需要多个周期、复杂的控制逻辑和大量的硬件资源。由于对噪声、过程变化和二进制除法的复杂性的敏感性，使用新兴内存计算技术实现除法更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用随机计算（SC）的内存划分架构，这是一种以其高容错性和低成本设计而闻名的新兴技术。我们的方法利用基于磁隧道结 (MTJ) 的内存架构来高效执行内存中逻辑操作。各种过程变化条件下的实验结果证明了我们的方法针对硬件变化的鲁棒性。为了评估其实际有效性，我们将我们的方法应用于 Retinex 算法进行图像增强，展示了其在实际应用中的可行性。

papers.title: InfScaler: Enabling Efficient ML Inference Serving on Multi-Accelerator Edge Devices via Asymmetric Auto-Scaling.
papers.abstract: Nowadays, there is a growing trend to deploy machine learning (ML) models on edge devices. To cope with the increasing resource requirements of current ML models, multi-accelerator edge devices that integrate CPU, GPU, NPU, or TPU in a single SoC gain popularity. However, we observe that existing ML inference serving frameworks are poor in utilizing the unique hardware architecture of these edge devices. In this paper, we present InFSCALER, an efficient ML inference serving framework tailored for multi-accelerator edge devices. InfSCALER discovers the architectural bottleneck of ML models and designs a bottleneck-aware asymmetric auto-scaling technique to facilitate efficient resource allocation for ML models on the edge. Furthermore, InfScaler capitalizes on the hardware’s unified memory feature inherent to edge devices, ensuring efficient data sharing between the asymmetrically scaled model partitions. Our experimental results show that InfScaler achieves up to $\mathbf{1 2 6. 5 9 \%}$ throughput improvement and $\mathbf{2 7. 3 2 \%}$ resource reduction while satisfying the latency requirements compared with the state-of-the-art inference serving approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，在边缘设备上部署机器学习（ML）模型的趋势日益明显。为了应对当前机器学习模型不断增长的资源需求，在单个 SoC 中集成 CPU、GPU、NPU 或 TPU 的多加速器边缘设备越来越受欢迎。然而，我们观察到现有的机器学习推理服务框架在利用这些边缘设备的独特硬件架构方面表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了 InFSCALER，这是一种专为多加速器边缘设备量身定制的高效机器学习推理服务框架。 InfSCALER 发现了 ML 模型的架构瓶颈，并设计了一种瓶颈感知的非对称自动缩放技术，以促进边缘 ML 模型的高效资源分配。此外，InfScaler 利用边缘设备固有的硬件统一内存功能，确保非对称缩放模型分区之间的高效数据共享。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的推理服务方法相比，InfScaler 可实现高达 $\mathbf{1 2 6. 5 9 \%}$ 的吞吐量提升和 $\mathbf{2 7. 3 2 \%}$ 资源减少，同时满足延迟要求。

papers.title: INSIGHT: A Universal Neural Simulator Framework for Analog Circuits with Autoregressive Transformers.
papers.abstract: The compute-intensive nature of SPICE simulations hinders effective analog design automation. This paper introduces INSIGHT, a data-efficient, adaptive, high-fidelity, technologyagnostic universal neural simulator framework that formulates analog performance prediction as an autoregressive sequence generation task to accurately predict performance across diverse circuits. INSIGHT achieves test $\mathbf{R}^{\mathbf{2}}$ scores $\geq \mathbf{0. 9 5}$, outperforming existing neural surrogates. Cross-technology transfer learning experiments show that INSIGHT can preserve model performance with $\sim \mathbf{6 0 \%}$ less training data. Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) integration further reduces memory footprint by $\sim 42 \%$ and training time by $\sim 25 \%$, maintaining high performance. Our experiments show that INSIGHT-based RL sizing framework achieves $100-1000 \times$ lower simulation costs over existing sizing methods for identical benchmarks and target specifications.
papers.abstract_zh: SPICE 仿真的计算密集型特性阻碍了有效的模拟设计自动化。本文介绍了 INSIGHT，这是一种数据高效、自适应、高保真、技术无关的通用神经模拟器框架，它将模拟性能预测制定为自回归序列生成任务，以准确预测不同电路的性能。 INSIGHT 测试 $\mathbf{R}^{\mathbf{2}}$ 得分为 $\geq \mathbf{0。 9 5}$，优于现有的神经替代品。跨技术迁移学习实验表明，INSIGHT 可以在训练数据减少 $\sim \mathbf{6 0 \%}$ 的情况下保持模型性能。低秩适应 (LoRA) 集成进一步将内存占用量减少 $\sim 42 \%$，将训练时间减少 $\sim 25 \%$，从而保持高性能。我们的实验表明，对于相同的基准和目标规格，与现有的规模调整方法相比，基于 INSIGHT 的 RL 规模调整框架的模拟成本降低了 100-1000 倍。

papers.title: InsightAlign: A Transferable Physical Design Recipe Recommender Based on Design Insights.
papers.abstract: Physical design tools have complex workflows with many different ways of optimizing power, performance, and area (PPA) out of a large number of options and hyperparameters in different engines and functionalities. Black-box optimization techniques are widely adopted to automate quality-of-result (QoR) exploration. Such exploration often proves impractical in real-world customer environments due to high computational demands, lengthy exploration cycles, and the need for large parallel jobs. To reduce the exploration space for viable compute resource requirements, we propose a novel design methodology to enable transferable learning by incorporating design insights crafted on top of physical design experts’ experience and streamlining QoR exploration as a sequence generation task for best recipe selection. We apply language model-inspired alignment techniques to learn the ranking of different recipe sets, enabling our model to generalize beyond known-good manually tuned expert design recipes. Extensive evaluations demonstrate our method’s superior QoRs and runtime performance on unseen industrial designs and rigorous benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理设计工具具有复杂的工作流程，具有多种不同的方法来优化不同引擎和功能中的大量选项和超参数中的功耗、性能和面积 (PPA)。黑盒优化技术被广泛采用来自动化结果质量 (QoR) 探索。由于计算需求高、探索周期长以及需要大型并行作业，这种探索在现实客户环境中通常被证明是不切实际的。为了减少可行计算资源需求的探索空间，我们提出了一种新颖的设计方法，通过结合基于物理设计专家经验的设计见解，并将 QoR 探索简化为最佳配方选择的序列生成任务，从而实现可迁移学习。我们应用受语言模型启发的对齐技术来学习不同配方集的排名，使我们的模型能够推广到已知良好的手动调整的专家设计配方之外。广泛的评估证明了我们的方法在未见过的工业设计和严格的基准测试中具有卓越的 QoR 和运行时性能。

papers.title: Insights from Rights and Wrongs: A Large Language Model for Solving Assertion Failures in RTL Design.
papers.abstract: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are essential for verifying Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, as they can be embedded into key functional paths to detect unintended behaviours. During simulation, assertion failures occur when the design’s behaviour deviates from expectations. Solving these failures, i.e., identifying and fixing the issues causing the deviation, requires analysing complex logical and timing relationships between multiple signals. This process heavily relies on human expertise, and there is currently no automatic tool available to assist with it. Here, we present AssertSolver, an opensource Large Language Model (LLM) specifically designed for solving assertion failures. By leveraging synthetic training data and learning from error responses to challenging cases, AssertSolver achieves a bug-fixing pass@1 metric of $88.54 \%$ on our testbench, significantly outperforming OpenAI’s o1-preview by up to $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$. We release our model and testbench for public access to encourage further research: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-AssertSolver-DAC-25.
papers.abstract_zh: SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 对于验证寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计至关重要，因为它们可以嵌入到关键功能路径中以检测意外行为。在仿真过程中，当设计的行为偏离预期时，就会发生断言失败。解决这些故障，即识别并修复导致偏差的问题，需要分析多个信号之间复杂的逻辑和时序关系。这个过程在很大程度上依赖于人类的专业知识，目前没有可用的自动工具来协助它。在这里，我们介绍 AssertSolver，这是一种专为解决断言失败问题而设计的开源大型语言模型 (LLM)。通过利用合成训练数据并从对挑战性案例的错误响应中学习，AssertSolver 在我们的测试平台上实现了 88.54 \%$ 的错误修复 pass@1 指标，显着优于 OpenAI 的 o1-preview，高达 $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$。我们发布了我们的模型和测试平台以供公众访问，以鼓励进一步的研究：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-AssertSolver-DAC-25。

papers.title: Insights from Rights and Wrongs: A Large Language Model for Solving Assertion Failures in RTL Design.
papers.abstract: SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are essential for verifying Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs, as they can be embedded into key functional paths to detect unintended behaviours. During simulation, assertion failures occur when the design’s behaviour deviates from expectations. Solving these failures, i.e., identifying and fixing the issues causing the deviation, requires analysing complex logical and timing relationships between multiple signals. This process heavily relies on human expertise, and there is currently no automatic tool available to assist with it. Here, we present AssertSolver, an opensource Large Language Model (LLM) specifically designed for solving assertion failures. By leveraging synthetic training data and learning from error responses to challenging cases, AssertSolver achieves a bug-fixing pass@1 metric of $88.54 \%$ on our testbench, significantly outperforming OpenAI’s o1-preview by up to $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$. We release our model and testbench for public access to encourage further research: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-AssertSolver-DAC-25.
papers.abstract_zh: SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 对于验证寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计至关重要，因为它们可以嵌入到关键功能路径中以检测意外行为。在仿真过程中，当设计的行为偏离预期时，就会发生断言失败。解决这些故障，即识别并修复导致偏差的问题，需要分析多个信号之间复杂的逻辑和时序关系。这个过程在很大程度上依赖于人类的专业知识，目前没有可用的自动工具来协助它。在这里，我们介绍 AssertSolver，这是一种专为解决断言失败问题而设计的开源大型语言模型 (LLM)。通过利用合成训练数据并从对挑战性案例的错误响应中学习，AssertSolver 在我们的测试平台上实现了 88.54 \%$ 的错误修复 pass@1 指标，显着优于 OpenAI 的 o1-preview，高达 $\mathbf{1 1. 9 7 \%}$。我们发布了我们的模型和测试平台以供公众访问，以鼓励进一步的研究：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-AssertSolver-DAC-25。

papers.title: INSTA: An Ultra-Fast, Differentiable, Statistical Static Timing Analysis Engine for Industrial Physical Design Applications.
papers.abstract: Prior GPU-accelerated Static Timing Analysis (GPU-STA) works all struggle to find industrial adoption, primarily because they aim to build standalone timing engines that can never emulate the proprietary delay models used in commercial tools. In this paper, we adopt a different philosophy by presenting INSTA, the first-ever differentiable, statistical GPU-STA engine that achieves unprecedented accuracy and scalability by a one-time initialization from any reference tool, bringing two transformative capabilities to Physical Design (PD): (1) rapid, high-fidelity timing analysis for incremental netlist update, and (2) gradient-based truly-global timing optimization at scale. Notably, INSTA demonstrates a near-perfect 0.999 correlation with an industryleading signoff tool on a 15 -million-pin design in a commercial 3 nm node with runtime under 0.1 seconds.
