Experimental results showcase INSTA’s capability through three PD applications: (1) serving as a fast evaluator in an industrial gate sizing flow, achieving $\mathbf{2 5 x}$ faster incremental update_timing runtime with almost no accuracy loss; (2) INSTA-Size, a gradient-based gate sizer that achieves up to $\mathbf{1 5 \%}$ better Total Negative Slack (TNS) than the reference signoff engine by sizing $68 \%$ fewer amount of cells; and (3) INSTA-Place, a differentiable timingdriven global placer that outperforms the state-of-the-art net-weighting placer by up to 16% in Half-Perimeter Wirelegnth (HPWL) and 59.4% in TNS on the ICCAD’15 benchmark [15].
papers.abstract_zh: 之前的 GPU 加速静态时序分析 (GPU-STA) 都很难找到工业应用，主要是因为它们的目标是构建独立的时序引擎，而这些引擎永远无法模拟商业工具中使用的专有延迟模型。在本文中，我们采用了不同的理念，提出了 INSTA，这是第一个可微分的统计 GPU-STA 引擎，它通过任何参考工具的一次性初始化实现了前所未有的准确性和可扩展性，为物理设计 (PD) 带来了两种变革性功能：(1) 用于增量网表更新的快速、高保真时序分析，以及 (2) 基于梯度的真正大规模时序优化。值得注意的是，INSTA 在商业 3 nm 节点的 1500 万引脚设计上与行业领先的签核工具显示了近乎完美的 0.999 相关性，运行时间低于 0.1 秒。实验结果通过三个 PD 应用展示了 INSTA 的功能：(1) 在工业门选型流程中充当快速评估器，实现 $\mathbf{2 5 x}$ 更快的增量 update_timing 运行时间，几乎没有精度损失； (2) INSTA-Size，一种基于梯度的门调整器，通过减少 $68 \%$ 的单元数量，比参考签核引擎实现高达 $\mathbf{1 5 \%}$ 的总负裕度 (TNS)； (3) INSTA-Place，一种可微分时序驱动的全局布局器，在 ICCAD’15 基准上，其半周长线 (HPWL) 性能优于最先进的净加权布局器高达 16%，TNS 性能优于最先进的净加权布局器 59.4% [15]。

papers.title: InterConFuzz: A Fuzzing-based Comprehensive NoC Verification Framework.
papers.abstract: Security verification of Network-on-Chip (NoC) systems is essential due to their intricate and high-concurrency structures. Traditional methods often fail to cover all scenarios or scale effectively, leading to prolonged verification and overlooked vulnerabilities. Our proposed solution, InterConFuzz, a hybrid hardware fuzzing technique, uses symbolic execution for extensive coverage. Developed on Universal Verification Methodology (UVM), InterConFuzz discovered five security flaws in the NoC architecture of the OpenTitan SoC-surpassing existing techniques by three-while reducing memory and computational needs by 24.4% and 29.5%, respectively. Furthermore, InterConFuzz furnished comparable functional coverage compared to existing NoC fuzzing approaches, proving its efficiency and robustness.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于片上网络（NoC）系统复杂且高并发的结构，其安全验证至关重要。传统方法往往无法覆盖所有场景或有效扩展，导致验证时间延长和漏洞被忽视。我们提出的解决方案 InterConFuzz 是一种混合硬件模糊技术，使用符号执行来实现广泛的覆盖范围。 InterConFuzz 基于通用验证方法 (UVM) 开发，在 OpenTitan SoC 的 NoC 架构中发现了 5 个安全缺陷，比现有技术高出 3 个，同时将内存和计算需求分别减少了 24.4% 和 29.5%。此外，与现有的 NoC 模糊方法相比，InterConFuzz 提供了可比的功能覆盖范围，证明了其效率和稳健性。

papers.title: Intermittent Systems at Small Scale: Execution Model and Design Guidelines.
papers.abstract: Intermittent systems require software support to execute tasks amid frequent power failures. In designing such techniques, software designers rely on execution models that abstract hardware-level operations. In this paper, we propose an execution model that more accurately describes emerging intermittent systems with small energy storage. Our evaluation shows show that systems designed based on the traditional models can be up to 5.62 x less power-efficient than expected and may result in unsafe checkpoint operations. Our design guidelines enhance the performance of existing static and dynamic checkpoint techniques by 3.04 x and 2.85 x on average, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 间歇性系统需要软件支持才能在频繁断电的情况下执行任务。 In designing such techniques, software designers rely on execution models that abstract hardware-level operations.在本文中，我们提出了一种执行模型，可以更准确地描述具有小能量存储的新兴间歇性系统。我们的评估表明，基于传统模型设计的系统的能效可能比预期低 5.62 倍，并可能导致检查点操作不安全。我们的设计指南将现有静态和动态检查点技术的性能平均分别提高了 3.04 倍和 2.85 倍。

papers.title: IntraFuzz: Coverage-Guided Intra-Enclave Fuzzing for Intel SGX Applications.
papers.abstract: Intel SGX is susceptible to intra-enclave software vulnerabilities. Existing automated bug-finding methods primarily focus on fuzzing enclave boundaries for SGX applications in simulated, rather than actual hardware-protected enclaves. This limits the ability to identify potential security violations originating from within SGX application code. This paper presents IntraFuzz, the first system that enables efficient fuzzing of SGX applications inside actual hardware enclaves. We evaluated IntraFUZZ with 21 real-world SGX applications, running on Intel Xeon scalable processors with up to 256 GB of enclave page cache. IntraFuzz successfully detected all vulnerabilities in SGX application code previously identified by the state-of-the-art tool EnclaveFuzz, as well as 6 previously undiscovered vulnerabilities. These results highlight the importance of hardware-based fuzzing in securing SGX applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 英特尔 SGX 容易受到飞地内软件漏洞的影响。现有的自动错误查找方法主要侧重于模糊模拟中 SGX 应用程序的飞地边界，而不是实际的受硬件保护的飞地。这限制了识别源自 SGX 应用程序代码内部的潜在安全违规的能力。本文介绍了 IntraFuzz，这是第一个能够在实际硬件飞地内对 SGX 应用程序进行高效模糊测试的系统。我们使用 21 个真实的 SGX 应用程序评估了 IntraFUZZ，这些应用程序在 Intel Xeon 可扩展处理器上运行，具有高达 256 GB 的 enclave 页缓存。 IntraFuzz 成功检测到 SGX 应用程序代码中先前由最先进的工具 EnclaveFuzz 识别的所有漏洞，以及 6 个先前未发现的漏洞。这些结果凸显了基于硬件的模糊测试在保护 SGX 应用程序安全方面的重要性。

papers.title: Introducing Instruction-Accurate Simulators for Performance Estimation of Autotuning Workloads.
papers.abstract: Accelerating Machine Learning (ML) workloads requires efficient methods due to their large optimization space. Autotuning has emerged as an effective approach for systematically evaluating variations of implementations. Traditionally, autotuning requires the workloads to be executed on the target hardware (HW). We present an interface that allows executing autotuning workloads on simulators. This approach offers high scalability when the availability of the target HW is limited, as many simulations can be run in parallel on any accessible HW.Additionally, we evaluate the feasibility of using fast instruction-accurate simulators for autotuning. We train various predictors to forecast the performance of ML workload implementations on the target HW based on simulation statistics.Our results demonstrate that the tuned predictors are highly effective. The best workload implementation in terms of actual run time on the target HW is always within the top 3% of predictions for the tested x86, ARM, and RISC-V-based architectures. In the best case, this approach outperforms native execution on the target HW for embedded architectures when running as few as three samples on three simulators in parallel.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于机器学习 (ML) 工作负载的优化空间很大，因此需要有效的方法来加速。自动调整已成为系统评估实施变化的有效方法。传统上，自动调整需要在目标硬件 (HW) 上执行工作负载。我们提供了一个允许在模拟器上执行自动调整工作负载的界面。当目标硬件的可用性有限时，这种方法提供了高可扩展性，因为许多仿真可以在任何可访问的硬件上并行运行。此外，我们评估了使用快速指令精确模拟器进行自动调整的可行性。我们训练各种预测器，以根据模拟统计数据预测目标硬件上的 ML 工作负载实现的性能。我们的结果表明，调整后的预测器非常有效。对于经过测试的基于 x86、ARM 和 RISC-V 的架构，就目标硬件上的实际运行时间而言，最佳工作负载实现始终位于预测的前 3% 之内。在最好的情况下，当在三个模拟器上并行运行三个样本时，这种方法的性能优于嵌入式架构目标硬件上的本机执行。

papers.title: Invited paper: Enhancing Design Automation with Quantum Algorithms for Chip Design.
authors: João Marcus Epifânio Morais de Assunção
papers.abstract: The design of resource-efficient chips has become a critical priority for the semiconductor industry. A key challenge in this process is the placement of cells on the chip’s physical layout to optimize performance and manufacturability. The present work proposes a novel optimization strategy to determine cell placements that minimize the Half-Perimeter Wire Length (HPWL), a metric strongly correlated with chip area and power consumption. The presented approach is designed for flexibility, enabling integration with diverse optimization methods, and demonstrates implementations using both a custom Simulated Annealing (SA) algorithm and a D-Wave Constrained Quadratic Model (CQM) solver. The resulting placements were validated through integration with the OpenROAD flow, bridging the gap between classical, quantum, and hybrid optimization algorithms and industry standard tools for chip design and routing with a real-world case using the ASAP7 7nm PDK. Preliminary results indicate that the proposed approach provides better area usage and considerable speedup / performance improvement showing a path towards the usage of quantum computer for chip design EDA workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 资源高效型芯片的设计已成为半导体行业的首要任务。此过程中的一个关键挑战是在芯片的物理布局上放置单元以优化性能和可制造性。目前的工作提出了一种新颖的优化策略来确定单元布局，从而最大限度地减少半周线长度（HPWL），这是与芯片面积和功耗密切相关的指标。所提出的方法旨在实现灵活性，能够与多种优化方法集成，并演示使用自定义模拟退火 (SA) 算法和 D-Wave 约束二次模型 (CQM) 求解器的实现。最终的布局通过与 OpenROAD 流程集成进行了验证，弥合了经典、量子和混合优化算法与用于芯片设计和布线的行业标准工具与使用 ASAP7 7nm PDK 的实际案例之间的差距。初步结果表明，所提出的方法提供了更好的面积利用率和相当大的加速/性能改进，展示了使用量子计算机进行芯片设计 EDA 工作负载的路径。

papers.title: Invited: EDA for Heterogeneous Integration.
papers.abstract: The advent of heterogeneous integration (HI) places new demands on EDA tooling. Building large systems requires (1) methods for chiplet disaggregation that map the system to smaller chiplets, working in conjunction with system-technology co-optimization to determine the right design decisions that optimize computation and communication, together with the choice of substrate and chiplet technologies; (2) multiphysics and multiscale analyses that incorporate thermomechanical aspects into performance analysis, ranging from fast machine-learningdriven analyses in early stages to signoff-quality multiphysics-based analysis; (3) physical design techniques for placing and routing chiplets and embedded active/passive elements on and within the substrate, including the design of thermal and power delivery solutions; and (4) underlying infrastructure required to facilitate HI-based design, including the design and characterization of chiplet libraries and the establishment of data formats and standards. This paper overviews these issues and lays out a set of EDA needs for HI designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构集成 (HI) 的出现对 EDA 工具提出了新的要求。构建大型系统需要 (1) 小芯片分解方法，将系统映射到较小的小芯片，与系统技术协同优化结合起来，确定优化计算和通信的正确设计决策，以及基板和小芯片技术的选择； (2) 多物理场和多尺度分析，将热机械方面纳入性能分析，范围从早期阶段的快速机器学习驱动分析到基于签核质量的多物理场分析； (3) 在基板上和基板内放置和布线小芯片和嵌入式有源/无源元件的物理设计技术，包括热和电力传输解决方案的设计； (4) 促进基于 HI 的设计所需的底层基础设施，包括小芯片库的设计和表征以及数据格式和标准的建立。本文概述了这些问题并列出了 HI 设计的一系列 EDA 需求。

papers.title: Invited: Enhancing Test Quality by Targeting Timing Marginalities Due to Process Variations.
papers.abstract: IC test methodologies all generate scan tests based on logical stuck-at and timing fault models that assume only a single passive physical defect localized at some circuit node. However, transistors fabricated in advanced technologies are subject to increasing random process variations that can significantly impact multiple devices, and result in highly nonlinear circuit behavior under specific circuit operating conditions. These changes can cause failures missed by current test methods that mostly target passive defects. We make the case for “variation aware” testing of high-performance digital circuits that prioritizes targeting changes in the most performance sensitive device parameters. Our specific focus in this paper is on developing reliable tests for timing failures caused by random variations in transistor threshold voltages.
papers.abstract_zh: IC 测试方法均基于逻辑固定和时序故障模型生成扫描测试，这些模型假设仅存在位于某个电路节点的单个无源物理缺陷。然而，采用先进技术制造的晶体管会受到越来越多的随机工艺变化的影响，这些变化可能会严重影响多个器件，并导致特定电路工作条件下的高度非线性电路行为。 These changes can cause failures missed by current test methods that mostly target passive defects.我们提出了对高性能数字电路进行“变化感知”测试的理由，该测试优先考虑对性能最敏感的设备参数的变化。我们在本文中的具体重点是针对晶体管阈值电压随机变化引起的时序故障开发可靠的测试。

papers.title: Invited: SambaNova SN40L: Unleashing Agentic AI with Dataflow.
papers.abstract: AI inference clouds are increasingly being tasked with running a diverse set of models to support interactive, agentic workloads such as LLM-powered assistants, chatbots, and autonomous agents. Efficient AI cloud inference requires producing tokens during the memory-bound decode phase at peak performance, as well as economically hosting and rapidly switching between a vast array of models. We describe the SambaNova SN40L Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) that combines dataflow with a three-tier memory system with SRAM, HBM, and DDR. Dataflow enables peak token generation performance with aggressive fusion of large compute graphs into a single kernel. HBM and high-capacity DDR drastically lower hardware footprint to host and serve trillions of parameters at scale. The SN40L RDU produce tokens over $\mathbf{3} \times$ faster, consume $3 \times$ less energy, and lower model hosting costs by up to $19 \times$ over a DGX H100.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能推理云越来越多地承担运行各种模型的任务，以支持交互式代理工作负载，例如法学硕士驱动的助手、聊天机器人和自主代理。高效的人工智能云推理需要在峰值性能的内存限制解码阶段生成令牌，以及经济地托管和在大量模型之间快速切换。我们描述了 SambaNova SN40L 可重配置数据流单元 (RDU)，它将数据流与具有 SRAM、HBM 和 DDR 的三层内存系统相结合。 Dataflow 通过将大型计算图积极融合到单个内核中，实现峰值令牌生成性能。 HBM 和高容量 DDR 大大降低了大规模托管和服务数万亿参数的硬件占用空间。与 DGX H100 相比，SN40L RDU 生成代币的速度快了 $\mathbf{3} \times$，消耗的能源减少了 $3 \time$，并且模型托管成本降低了高达 $\times$19 \times$。

papers.title: IRGNN: A Graph-based Framework Integrating Numerical Solution and Point Cloud for Static IR Drop Prediction.
papers.abstract: With the continued scaling of integrated circuits (ICs), IR drop analysis for on-chip power grids (PGs) is crucial but increasingly computationally demanding. Traditional numerical methods deliver high accuracy but are prohibitively time-intensive, while various machine learning (ML) methods have been introduced to alleviate these computational burdens. However, most CNN-based methods ignore the fine structure and topological information of PGs, and face interpretability or scalability issues. In this work, we propose a novel graphbased framework, IRGNN, leveraging the PG topology with the integration of numerical solutions and point clouds. Our framework applies a numerical solver, AMG-PCG, to generate rough numerical solutions as a reliable interpretability foundation for ML. Then, to capture PG topology, we regard nodes of PG as point clouds and extract point cloud features, and we introduce a novel graph structure, IRGraph. Furthermore, a novel graph-based model IRGNN is designed, incorporating a designed neighbor distance attention (NDA) layer for distanceaware PG features aggregation and graph transformer (GT) layer to capture global information. It should be noted that our framework can analyze the IR drop of each node in PG, which CNN-based methods cannot do. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our framework achieves significantly higher accuracy than previous CNN-based approaches and numerical solvers while substantially reducing computation time.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着集成电路 (IC) 尺寸的不断缩小，片上电网 (PG) 的压降分析至关重要，但对计算的要求也越来越高。传统的数值方法精度很高，但时间密集程度过高，而各种机器学习 (ML) 方法已经被引入来减轻这些计算负担。然而，大多数基于 CNN 的方法忽略了 PG 的精细结构和拓扑信息，并面临可解释性或可扩展性问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图的框架 IRGNN，利用 PG 拓扑与数值解和点云的集成。我们的框架应用数值求解器 AMG-PCG 来生成粗略的数值解，作为 ML 的可靠可解释性基础。然后，为了捕获PG拓扑，我们将PG的节点视为点云并提取点云特征，并引入一种新颖的图结构IRGraph。此外，设计了一种新颖的基于图的模型 IRGNN，结合了用于距离感知 PG 特征聚合的设计邻居距离注意（NDA）层和用于捕获全局信息的图变换器（GT）层。值得注意的是，我们的框架可以分析PG中每个节点的IR drop，这是基于CNN的方法无法做到的。实验评估表明，我们的框架比以前基于 CNN 的方法和数值求解器实现了显着更高的精度，同时大大减少了计算时间。

papers.title: iTaskSense: Task-Oriented Object Detection in Resource-Constrained Environments.
papers.abstract: Task-oriented object detection is increasingly essential for intelligent sensing applications, enabling AI systems to operate autonomously in complex, real-world environments such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and industrial automation. Conventional models often struggle with generalization, requiring vast datasets to accurately detect objects within diverse contexts. In this work, we introduce iTask, a taskoriented object detection framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) to generalize efficiently from limited samples by generating an abstract knowledge graph. This graph encapsulates essential task attributes, allowing iTask to identify objects based on high-level characteristics rather than extensive data, making it possible to adapt to complex mission requirements with minimal samples. iTask addresses the challenges of high computational cost and resource limitations in vision-language models by offering two configuration models: a distilled, task-specific vision transformer optimized for high accuracy in defined tasks, and a quantized version of the model for broader applicability across multiple tasks. Additionally, we designed a hardware acceleration circuit to support real-time processing, essential for edge devices that require low latency and efficient task execution. Our evaluations show that the task-specific configuration achieves a 15% higher accuracy over the quantized configuration in specific scenarios, while the quantized model provides robust multi-task performance. The hardware-accelerated iTask system achieves a $3.5 x$ speedup and a 40% reduction in energy consumption compared to GPU-based implementations. These results demonstrate that iTask’s dual-configuration approach and situational adaptability offer a scalable solution for task-specific object detection, providing robust and efficient performance in resourceconstrained environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 面向任务的物体检测对于智能传感应用越来越重要，使人工智能系统能够在自动驾驶、医疗保健和工业自动化等复杂的现实环境中自主运行。传统模型通常难以泛化，需要大量数据集才能准确检测不同上下文中的对象。在这项工作中，我们引入了 iTask，这是一种面向任务的对象检测框架，它利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过生成抽象知识图来从有限的样本中高效地进行泛化。该图封装了基本的任务属性，使 iTask 能够根据高级特征而不是大量数据来识别对象，从而能够以最少的样本适应复杂的任务需求。 iTask 通过提供两种配置模型来解决视觉语言模型中高计算成本和资源限制的挑战：一个针对定义任务的高精度而优化的精炼、特定于任务的视觉转换器，以及一个跨多个任务更广泛适用性的模型的量化版本。此外，我们还设计了硬件加速电路来支持实时处理，这对于需要低延迟和高效任务执行的边缘设备至关重要。我们的评估表明，在特定场景下，特定于任务的配置比量化配置的准确率提高了 15%，而量化模型提供了强大的多任务性能。与基于 GPU 的实现相比，硬件加速的 iTask 系统实现了 3.5 x 美元的加速，能耗降低了 40%。这些结果表明，iTask 的双配置方法和情境适应性为特定任务的对象检测提供了可扩展的解决方案，在资源受限的环境中提供稳健且高效的性能。

papers.title: Joint Cutting for Hybrid Schrödinger-Feynman Simulation of Quantum Circuits.
papers.abstract: Despite the continuous advancements in size and robustness of real quantum devices, reliable large-scale quantum computers are not yet available. Hence, classical simulation of quantum algorithms remains crucial for testing new methods and estimating quantum advantage. Pushing classical simulation methods to their limit is essential, particularly due to their inherent exponential complexity. Besides the established Schrödinger-style full statevector simulation, so-called Hybrid Schrödinger-Feynman (HSF) approaches have shown promise to make simulations more efficient. HSF simulation employs the idea of “cutting” the circuit into smaller parts, reducing their execution times. This, however, comes at the cost of an exponential overhead in the number of cuts. Inspired by the domain of Quantum Circuit Cutting, we propose an HSF simulation method based on the idea of “joint cutting” to significantly reduce the aforementioned overhead. This means that, prior to the cutting procedure, gates are collected into “blocks” and all gates in a block are jointly cut instead of individually. We investigate how the proposed refinement can help decrease simulation times and highlight the remaining challenges. Experimental evaluations show that “joint cutting” can outperform the standard HSF simulation by up to a factor $\approx 4000 \times$ and the Schrödinger-style simulation by a factor $\approx 200 \times$ for suitable instances. The implementation is available at https://github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qsim-joint-cutting.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管真实量子设备的尺寸和鲁棒性不断进步，但可靠的大规模量子计算机尚未可用。因此，量子算法的经典模拟对于测试新方法和估计量子优势仍然至关重要。将经典模拟方法推向极限至关重要，特别是由于其固有的指数复杂性。除了已建立的薛定谔式全状态向量仿真之外，所谓的混合薛定谔-费曼（HSF）方法也有望提高仿真效率。 HSF 仿真采用了将电路“切割”成更小的部分的思想，从而减少了它们的执行时间。然而，这是以削减次数呈指数级开销为代价的。受量子电路切割领域的启发，我们提出了一种基于“联合切割”思想的HSF模拟方法，以显着减少上述开销。这意味着，在切割过程之前，浇口被收集成“块”，并且块中的所有浇口被联合切割而不是单独切割。我们研究了所提出的改进如何帮助减少模拟时间并强调剩余的挑战。实验评估表明，在合适的实例中，“联合切割”的性能比标准 HSF 模拟高出 $\约 4000 \times$，比薛定谔式模拟高出 $\approx \times$。该实现可在 https://github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qsim-joint-cutting 获取。

papers.title: KLiNQ: Knowledge Distillation-Assisted Lightweight Neural Network for Qubit Readout on FPGA.
papers.abstract: Superconducting qubits are among the most promising candidates for building quantum information processors. Yet, they are often limited by slow and error-prone qubit readout-a critical factor in achieving high-fidelity operations. While current methods, including deep neural networks, enhance readout accuracy, they typically lack support for mid-circuit measurements essential for quantum error correction, and they usually rely on large, resource-intensive network models. This paper presents KLiNQ, a novel qubit readout architecture leveraging lightweight neural networks optimized via knowledge distillation. Our approach achieves around a $99 \%$ reduction in model size compared to the baseline while maintaining a qubitstate discrimination accuracy of $91 \%$. KLiNQ facilitates rapid, independent qubit-state readouts that enable mid-circuit measurements by assigning a dedicated, compact neural network for each qubit. Implemented on the Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA, our design can perform the discrimination within 32 ns. The results demonstrate that compressed neural networks can maintain highfidelity independent readout while enabling efficient hardware implementation, advancing practical quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 超导量子位是构建量子信息处理器最有希望的候选者之一。然而，它们通常受到缓慢且容易出错的量子位读出的限制——这是实现高保真操作的关键因素。虽然包括深度神经网络在内的当前方法可以提高读出精度，但它们通常缺乏对量子纠错所必需的中电路测量的支持，并且通常依赖于大型资源密集型网络模型。本文提出了 KLiNQ，一种新颖的量子位读出架构，利用通过知识蒸馏优化的轻量级神经网络。与基线相比，我们的方法实现了模型大小约 $99 \%$ 的减少，同时保持了 $91 \%$ 的量子位状态辨别精度。 KLiNQ 有助于快速、独立的量子位状态读出，通过为每个量子位分配专用、紧凑的神经网络来实现中间电路测量。我们的设计在 Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA 上实现，可以在 32 ns 内执行区分。结果表明，压缩神经网络可以保持高保真独立读出，同时实现高效的硬件实现，从而推进实用的量子计算。

papers.title: KVO-LLM: Boosting Long-Context Generation Throughput for Batched LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: With the widespread deployment of long-context large language models (LLMs), efficient and high-quality generation is becoming increasingly important. Modern LLMs employ batching and key-value (KV) cache to improve generation throughput and quality. However, as the context length and batch size rise drastically, the KV cache incurs extreme external memory access (EMA) issues. Recent LLM accelerators face substantial processing element (PE) under-utilization due to the low arithmetic intensity of attention with KV cache, while existing KV cache compression algorithms struggle with hardware inefficiency or significant accuracy degradation. To address these issues, an algorithm-architecture co-optimization, KVO-LLM, is proposed for long-context batched LLM generation. At the algorithm level, we propose a KV cache quantization-aware pruning method that first adopts salient-token-aware quantization and then prunes KV channels and tokens by attention guided pruning based on salient tokens identified during quantization. Achieving substantial savings on hardware overhead, our algorithm reduces the EMA of KV cache over 91% with significant accuracy advantages compared to previous KV cache compression algorithms. At the architecture level, we propose a multi-core jointly optimized accelerator that adopts operator fusion and cross-batch interleaving strategy, maximizing PE and DRAM bandwidth utilization. Compared to the state-of-the-art LLM accelerators, KVO-LLM improves generation throughput by up to $7.32 \times$, and attains $5.52 \sim 8.38 \times$ better energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着长上下文大语言模型（LLM）的广泛部署，高效、高质量的生成变得越来越重要。现代法学硕士采用批处理和键值 (KV) 缓存来提高生成吞吐量和质量。然而，随着上下文长度和批量大小急剧增加，KV 缓存会引发极端的外部内存访问 (EMA) 问题。由于 KV 缓存的算术强度较低，最近的 LLM 加速器面临着严重的处理元素 (PE) 利用率不足的问题，而现有的 KV 缓存压缩算法则面临着硬件效率低下或精度显着下降的问题。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种算法架构协同优化 KVO-LLM，用于长上下文批量 LLM 生成。在算法层面，我们提出了一种 KV 缓存量化感知剪枝方法，该方法首先采用显着令牌感知量化，然后根据量化过程中识别的显着令牌通过注意力引导剪枝来剪枝 KV 通道和令牌。我们的算法大大节省了硬件开销，将 KV 缓存的 EMA 降低了 91% 以上，与之前的 KV 缓存压缩算法相比，具有显着的准确性优势。在架构层面，我们提出了一种多核联合优化的加速器，采用算子融合和跨批次交错策略，最大限度地提高PE和DRAM带宽利用率。与最先进的 LLM 加速器相比，KVO-LLM 将发电吞吐量提高了高达 7.32 美元\times$，并实现了 5.52 美元\sim 8.38 \times$ 更高的能源效率。

papers.title: LA-MTL: Latency-Aware Automated Multi-Task Learning.
papers.abstract: Multi-Task Learning (MTL) aims to unify a variety of tasks into a single network for improved training and inference efficiency. This is particularly attractive for real-time applications that require simultaneous execution of multiple workloads in resource-constrained embedded environments. However, most MTL approaches focus on enhancing parameters efficiency and overall tasks metrics, often lacking explicit inference latency awareness in the optimization loop. The design space exploration should not compromise on the parameters efficiency or task accuracy objectives in order to meet latency requirements. To address this, we propose LA-MTL, an automated layer-level MTL policy search that incorporates a novel analytical latency factor (ALF). By accounting for local and global latencies during the MTL policy search, we derive solutions that balance task metrics, parameters efficiency and latency constraints. LA-MTL search on ResNet34 yields solutions with up to 50% lower latency on the Jetson AGX Orin while maintaining competitive metrics in semantic segmentation and depth estimation tasks with a +/-2 p.p., on the CityScapes dataset. Additionally, we achieve a superior parameters efficiency, surpassing the state-of-theart MTL parameters reduction by over 20 p.p. Experiments on benchmark datasets (CityScapes, NYUv2) demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various backbones including ResNet34, MobileNetV2, and MobileOne in its expanded form. Code is available at https://github.com/shamvbs/LA-MTL.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>
papers.abstract_zh: 多任务学习（MTL）旨在将各种任务统一到单个网络中，以提高训练和推理效率。这对于需要在资源受限的嵌入式环境中同时执行多个工作负载的实时应用程序尤其有吸引力。然而，大多数 MTL 方法专注于提高参数效率和总体任务指标，通常在优化循环中缺乏明确的推理延迟感知。设计空间探索不应为了满足延迟要求而牺牲参数效率或任务准确性目标。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LA-MTL，这是一种自动化的层级 MTL 策略搜索，其中包含一种新颖的分析延迟因子（ALF）。通过在 MTL 策略搜索过程中考虑本地和全局延迟，我们得出了平衡任务指标、参数效率和延迟约束的解决方案。 ResNet34 上的 LA-MTL 搜索产生的解决方案在 Jetson AGX Orin 上的延迟降低了 50%，同时在 CityScapes 数据集上以 +/-2 p.p. 保持语义分割和深度估计任务中的竞争指标。此外，我们还实现了卓越的参数效率，比最先进的 MTL 参数减少了 20 个百分点以上。对基准数据集（CityScapes、NYUv2）的实验证明了我们的方法在各种主干网络上的有效性，包括 ResNet34、MobileNetV2 和 MobileOne 的扩展形式。代码可在 https://github.com/shamvbs/LA-MTL 获取。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: A Diffusion-Based Framework for Configurable and Realistic Multi-Storage Trace Generation.
papers.abstract: We propose DiTTO, a novel diffusion-based framework for generating realistic, precisely configurable, and diverse multi-device storage traces. Leveraging advanced diffusion techniques, DiTTO enables the synthesis of high-fidelity continuous traces that capture temporal dynamics and inter-device dependencies with user-defined configurations. Our experimental results demonstrate that DiTTO can generate traces with high fidelity and diversity while aligning closely with guided configurations with only 8% errors.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DiTTO，一种新颖的基于扩散的框架，用于生成真实的、精确可配置的和多样化的多设备存储轨迹。利用先进的扩散技术，DiTTO 能够合成高保真连续轨迹，通过用户定义的配置捕获时间动态和设备间依赖性。我们的实验结果表明，DiTTO 可以生成具有高保真度和多样性的轨迹，同时与引导配置紧密对齐，误差仅为 8%。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: A Fast Nearest Neighbor Search Acceleration for 3D Point Cloud.
papers.abstract: This paper presents FastNN, a novel accelerator architecture for efficient K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) search in point clouds. FastNN leverages a locality-sensitive E2LSH partitioning method and a precomparator module to significantly reduce the candidate search space and minimize the number of Euclidean distance calculations. Compared to octree-based partitioning methods, our approach reduces candidate points by 58.57% to 86.17% and achieves a $10.04 \times$ acceleration in processing throughput relative to the BitNN comparator subsystem. The proposed design effectively enhances search throughput, resource utilization, and precision, highlighting its potential for accelerating KNN search on FPGA platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 FastNN，这是一种新颖的加速器架构，用于在点云中进行高效的 K 最近邻 (KNN) 搜索。 FastNN 利用局部敏感的 E2LSH 划分方法和预比较器模块来显着减少候选搜索空间并最大限度地减少欧几里德距离计算的数量。与基于八叉树的划分方法相比，我们的方法将候选点减少了 58.57% 至 86.17%，并且相对于 BitNN 比较器子系统，处理吞吐量实现了 10.04 美元的加速。所提出的设计有效地提高了搜索吞吐量、资源利用率和精度，凸显了其在 FPGA 平台上加速 KNN 搜索的潜力。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: A Geometric Diffusion Model for Macro Placement Generation.
papers.abstract: Macro placement is crucial in VLSI design, directly impacting circuit performance. We introduce MacroDiff, a diffusion-based macro placement generative model that captures wirelength relationships instead of directly predicting macro coordinates. By leveraging wirelength as an intermediate representation, MacroDiff naturally preserves circuit connectivity, reduces placement constraints, and enhances solution flexibility while inherently handling rotational and translational invariances. Experiments on ISPD2005 benchmarks show that MacroDiff reduces macro overlap by 91.6%, lowers macro legalization displacement by 74.4%, and improves half-perimeter wirelength (HPWL) by 7.0%. While maintaining the efficiency of generative approaches, MacroDiff generates high-quality placements more reliably, narrowing the gap with state-of-the-art methods. The source code for this work is available at https://github.com/jhy00n/MacroDiff.
papers.abstract_zh: 宏布局在 VLSI 设计中至关重要，直接影响电路性能。我们引入了 MacroDiff，一种基于扩散的宏布局生成模型，它捕获线长关系而不是直接预测宏坐标。通过利用线长作为中间表示，MacroDiff 自然地保留了电路连接性，减少了布局限制，并增强了解决方案的灵活性，同时固有地处理旋转和平移不变性。 ISPD2005基准测试表明，MacroDiff将宏重叠减少了91.6%，将宏合法化位移降低了74.4%，并将半周长线长（HPWL）提高了7.0%。在保持生成方法效率的同时，MacroDiff 更可靠地生成高质量的展示位置，缩小了与最先进方法的差距。这项工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/jhy00n/MacroDiff 获取。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Advanced PCB Placement with Irregular Components for Efficient Collision Detection and Routability Optimization.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces an automated placement framework to optimize component positioning on modern printed circuit boards (PCBs), addressing challenges posed by heterogeneous components, irregular geometries, and complex design rules. The framework employs three key techniques to enhance placement quality and efficiency: (1) a global placement approach integrating collision detection via the Separating Axis Theorem to handle exact component contours and board shapes, (2) a multi-stage force-directed method that dynamically adjusts attractive and repulsive forces to meet clearance and routability constraints, and (3) a scanline-based legalization technique to resolve overlaps and enforce spacing requirements. Our methodology effectively adapts to diverse design limitations and accelerates the process while preserving placement quality. Experimental results demonstrate that our placer significantly improves routability over state-of-the-art solutions, demonstrating robust performance on industrial PCB designs with complex and irregular constraints.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种自动布局框架，用于优化现代印刷电路板 (PCB) 上的组件定位，解决异构组件、不规则几何形状和复杂设计规则带来的挑战。该框架采用三种关键技术来提高贴装质量和效率：(1) 通过分离轴定理集成碰撞检测的全局贴装方法，以处理精确的元件轮廓和电路板形状；(2) 动态调整吸引力和排斥力以满足间隙和可布线性约束的多级力导向方法；(3) 基于扫描线的合法化技术，以解决重叠并强制执行间距要求。我们的方法有效地适应不同的设计限制并加速流程，同时保持贴装质量。实验结果表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，我们的布局器显着提高了可布线性，在具有复杂和不规则约束的工业 PCB 设计中展示了强大的性能。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: An Efficient and Scalable Track Assignment with GPU Parallelism.
papers.abstract: The track assignment has been introduced between global routing and detail routing. Based on the independence and divisibility of track assignment, we propose a GPU-accelerated parallel track assignment algorithm. To estimate routability more accurately, the proposed algorithm simultaneously considers global and local nets, and incorporates several strategies for optimization. Moreover, an asynchronous parallelism strategy is proposed to divide the computation of routing resources and the track assignment into fine-grained tasks. Experimental results show that, compared to related work, our algorithm achieves a significant speedup with a better routability estimation.
papers.abstract_zh: 在全局布线和详细布线之间引入了轨道分配。基于轨道分配的独立性和可分性，我们提出了一种GPU加速的并行轨道分配算法。为了更准确地估计可路由性，所提出的算法同时考虑全局和局部网络，并结合多种优化策略。此外，提出了一种异步并行策略，将路由资源的计算和轨道分配划分为细粒度的任务。实验结果表明，与相关工作相比，我们的算法实现了显着的加速和更好的可路由性估计。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Automated Topology Generation for Power Amplifier Designs through BiLSTM-based DNN and Multi-objective Optimizations.
papers.abstract: This work presents an automated, intelligent methodology for optimizing power amplifier (PA) design by predicting the most suitable circuit topology-specifically, the input and output matching networks-for a given high electron mobility transistor (HEMT). A classification-based bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) deep neural network (DNN) is trained to determine the optimal PA topology, while multi-objective Pareto front-based optimization techniques refine the network’s hyperparameters, including the number of hidden layers and neurons. The proposed approach is adaptable to various HEMT models and is validated through the design and optimization of high-performance PAs using lumped elements and transmission lines, operating within the $1-2 \mathrm{GHz}$ frequency range. The method is demonstrated using the Cree CGH40010 GaN HEMT on a Rogers RO4350B substrate, achieving a power output of approximately 40 dBm, a power-added efficiency (PAE) of at least 50%, and a power gain exceeding 10dB.
papers.abstract_zh: This work presents an automated, intelligent methodology for optimizing power amplifier (PA) design by predicting the most suitable circuit topology-specifically, the input and output matching networks-for a given high electron mobility transistor (HEMT).基于分类的双向长短期记忆 (BiLSTM) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 经过训练以确定最佳 PA 拓扑，同时基于多目标帕累托前沿的优化技术细化网络的超参数，包括隐藏层和神经元的数量。所提出的方法适用于各种 HEMT 模型，并通过使用集总元件和传输线的高性能 PA 的设计和优化进行了验证，在 1-2 \mathrm{GHz}$ 频率范围内运行。该方法在 Rogers RO4350B 基板上使用 Cree CGH40010 GaN HEMT 进行了演示，实现了约 40 dBm 的功率输出、至少 50% 的功率附加效率 (PAE) 以及超过 10dB 的功率增益。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: BLAST: Bisection-Free Learning Approach for Statistical Timing Characterization.
papers.abstract: Statistical timing characterization for standard cells faces significant computational challenges due to the laborious bisection analysis for setup/hold constraint of sequential cells. To address this issue, we propose a Bisection-Free Learning Approach for Statistical Timing Characterization (BLAST) by extracting inherent delay for data path and clock path in sequential cells as specific features. Multi-task learning is implemented with a multi-gate mixture-of-experts (MMoE) model to exploit the profound interdependency between setup and hold constraint for different timing arcs, where the active learning strategy is incorporated to improve learning efficiency. Experimental results under 135 PVT corners with TSMC 12nm process demonstrate that the proposed BLAST achieves considerable acceleration by avoiding the iterative bisection search for statistical constraint prediction with 76.9% runtime reduction compared to the commercial tool. Excellent prediction accuracy is achieved for various flip-flops by BLAST with the relative root mean square error (rRMSE) of $\mathbf{2. 2 1 \%}$ and worst-case absolute error (WCAE) of 0.82 ps.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于对时序单元的建立/保持约束进行费力的二分分析，标准单元的统计时序表征面临着巨大的计算挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于统计时序表征（BLAST）的无二分学习方法，通过提取时序单元中数据路径和时钟路径的固有延迟作为特定特征。多任务学习是通过多门专家混合（MMoE）模型来实现的，以利用不同时序弧的建立和保持约束之间的深刻相互依赖性，其中结合主动学习策略来提高学习效率。采用 TSMC 12nm 工艺的 135 个 PVT 角下的实验结果表明，所提出的 BLAST 通过避免统计约束预测的迭代二分搜索实现了相当大的加速，与商业工具相比，运行时间减少了 76.9%。通过 BLAST，相对均方根误差 (rRMSE) 为 $\mathbf{2.2，可以对各种触发器实现出色的预测精度。 2 1 \%}$ 和最坏情况绝对误差 (WCAE) 为 0.82 ps。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Breaking Symmetry - Unconventional Placement of Analog Circuits using Multi-Level Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Layout-dependent effects (LDEs) significantly impact analog circuit performance. Traditionally, designers have relied on symmetric placement of circuit components to mitigate variations caused by LDEs. However, due to non-linear nature of these effects, conventional methods often fall short. We propose an objective-driven, multi-level, multi-agent Q-learning framework to explore unconventional design space of analog layout, opening new avenues for optimizing analog circuit performance. Our approach achieves better variation performance than the state-of-the-art layout techniques. Notably, this is the first application of multiagent RL in analog layout automation. The proposed approach is compared with non-ML approach based on simulated annealing.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局相关效应 (LDE) 会显着影响模拟电路性能。传统上，设计人员依靠电路元件的对称放置来减轻 LDE 引起的变化。然而，由于这些效应的非线性性质，传统方法常常达不到要求。我们提出了一种目标驱动、多层次、多智能体 Q 学习框架，以探索模拟布局的非常规设计空间，为优化模拟电路性能开辟新途径。我们的方法比最先进的布局技术实现了更好的变化性能。值得注意的是，这是多智能体强化学习在模拟布局自动化中的首次应用。所提出的方法与基于模拟退火的非机器学习方法进行了比较。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Customized Diffusion Model Empowered by Heterogeneous Graph Network for Effective Floorplanning.
papers.abstract: Floorplanning is a critical phase in VLSI physical design, focusing on determining block positions while optimizing wirelength under specified area constraints. However, classical analytical-based floorplanners are highly sensitive to the quality of initial solutions and existing learningbased methods often suffer from high computational inefficiency and complexity. In this paper, we propose a customized diffusion model to directly generate high-quality initial floorplans. By leveraging a classical analytical-based floorplanner on top of this initial floorplan, the final floorplanning results are significantly improved. To enhance feature extraction, a heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) is developed to explicitly incorporate block-to-block and pin-to-block relationships from the netlist during the diffusion process. Additionally, a novel guidance sampling function is introduced to optimize both wirelength and overlap, effectively reducing the required sampling steps while maintaining competitive initial solutions. Experimental results demonstrate that integrating our proposed diffusion model with an advanced analytical-based floorplanner achieves at least 4.8% reduction in runtime and 3.0% reduction in HPWL compared to the original floorplanner and other diffusion-based methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局规划是 VLSI 物理设计的关键阶段，重点是确定块位置，同时在指定面积约束下优化线长。然而，经典的基于分析的布局规划器对初始解决方案的质量高度敏感，而现有的基于学习的方法常常面临计算效率低下和复杂性高的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种定制的扩散模型来直接生成高质量的初始平面图。通过在此初始布局之上利用经典的基于分析的布局规划器，最终的布局规划结果得到显着改善。为了增强特征提取，开发了异构图神经网络（HGNN），以在扩散过程中明确合并网表中的块到块和引脚到块关系。此外，还引入了新颖的引导采样功能来优化线长和重叠，有效减少所需的采样步骤，同时保持具有竞争力的初始解决方案。实验结果表明，与原始布局规划器和其他基于扩散的方法相比，将我们提出的扩散模型与基于分析的先进布局规划器相集成，可实现运行时间至少减少 4.8%，HPWL 减少 3.0%。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Decentralized Voting-Based Attestation for IoT Devices.
papers.abstract: Remote Attestation (RA) has become a valuable security service for Internet of Things (IoT) devices, as the security of these devices is often not prioritized during the manufacturing process. However, traditional RA schemes suffer from a single point of failure because they rely on a trusted verifier. To address this issue, we propose a voting-based blockchain attestation protocol that provides a reliable solution by eliminating the single point of failure through distributed verification across all nodes. In addition, it offers a traceable and immutable public history of the attestation results, which can be verified by external auditors at any time. Finally, we verify our proposed protocol on three NVIDIA Jetson embedded devices hosting up to 15 attestation nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: 远程认证 (RA) 已成为物联网 (IoT) 设备的一项有价值的安全服务，因为这些设备的安全性在制造过程中通常并未得到优先考虑。然而，传统的 RA 方案由于依赖于可信验证者而存在单点故障。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于投票的区块链证明协议，该协议通过跨所有节点的分布式验证消除单点故障，提供可靠的解决方案。此外，它还提供了认证结果的可追溯且不可变的公共历史记录，可供外部审计员随时验证。最后，我们在三个托管多达 15 个证明节点的 NVIDIA Jetson 嵌入式设备上验证了我们提出的协议。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Encoder-Decoder Generative Diffusion Transformer Towards Push-Button Analog IC Sizing.
papers.abstract: In this paper, disruptive research using generative diffusion models (DMs) with an attention-based encoder-decoder backbone is conducted to automate the sizing of analog integrated circuits (ICs). Unlike time-consuming optimization-based methods, the encoder-decoder DM is able to sample accurate solutions at push-button speed by solving the inverse sizing problem. Experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms the most recent deep learningbased techniques, presenting higher generalization capabilities to performance targets not seen during training.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，使用具有基于注意力的编码器-解码器主干的生成扩散模型（DM）进行颠覆性研究，以自动调整模拟集成电路（IC）的规模。与耗时的基于优化的方法不同，编码器-解码器 DM 能够通过解决逆尺寸问题以按键速度采样准确的解决方案。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于最新的基于深度学习的技术，对训练期间未见的性能目标呈现出更高的泛化能力。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Test Stimuli Generation.
papers.abstract: The understanding and reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) with text data have made them widely used for test stimuli generation. Existing studies have primarily focused on methods such as prompt engineering or providing feedback to the LLMs’ generated outputs to improve test stimuli generation. However, these approaches have not been successful in enhancing the LLMs’ domain-specific performance in generating test stimuli. In this paper, we introduce a framework for finetuning LLMs for test stimuli generation through dataset generation and reinforcement learning (RL). Our dataset generation approach creates a table-shaped test stimuli dataset, which helps ensure that the LLM produces consistent outputs. Additionally, our two-stage fine-tuning process involves training the LLMs on domain-specific data and using RL to provide feedback on the generated outputs, further enhancing the LLMs’ performance in test stimuli generation. Experimental results confirm that our framework improves syntax correctness and code coverage of test stimuli, outperforming commercial models.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有文本数据的大型语言模型（LLM）的理解和推理能力使其广泛用于测试刺激生成。现有的研究主要集中在诸如即时工程或向法学硕士生成的输出提供反馈以改进测试刺激生成等方法。然而，这些方法并没有成功地提高法学硕士在生成测试刺激方面的特定领域表现。在本文中，我们介绍了一个通过数据集生成和强化学习（RL）微调LLM以生成测试刺激的框架。我们的数据集生成方法创建了一个表格状的测试刺激数据集，这有助于确保法学硕士产生一致的输出。此外，我们的两阶段微调过程包括在特定领域的数据上训练法学硕士，并使用强化学习为生成的输出提供反馈，进一步增强法学硕士在测试刺激生成方面的性能。实验结果证实，我们的框架提高了测试刺激的语法正确性和代码覆盖率，优于商业模型。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: FPGen-3D: Automated Framework for 3D-FPGA Architecture Generation and Exploration.
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose FPGen-3D, an automated framework for 3D field-programmable gate arrays (FPGA) architecture generation and exploration. FPGen-3D generates custom 3D FPGA fabrics based on user-defined architectural parameters, producing synthesizable register-transfer level (RTL) code, routing results, and programming bitstreams, enabling efficient navigation of the 3D FPGA design space. We demonstrate its capabilities through a case study of generating and exploring various vertical connection strategies via 3D switch blocks (SB) and 3D configurable logic block (CLB). Results show that 3D FPGAs can achieve lower wire length than traditional 2D FPGAs with a decrease of up to $\mathbf{1 8. 5 \%}$.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 FPGen-3D，这是一种用于 3D 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 架构生成和探索的自动化框架。 FPGen-3D 根据用户定义的架构参数生成定制 3D FPGA 结构，生成可综合的寄存器传输级 (RTL) 代码、布线结果和编程比特流，从而实现 3D FPGA 设计空间的高效导航。我们通过通过 3D 开关块 (SB) 和 3D 可配置逻辑块 (CLB) 生成和探索各种垂直连接策略的案例研究来展示其功能。结果表明，3D FPGA 可以实现比传统 2D FPGA 更短的线长，减少幅度高达 $\mathbf{1 8. 5 \%}$。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Hybrid Logic Optimization with Predictive Self-Supervision.
papers.abstract: Hybrid optimization is an emerging approach in logic synthesis, focusing on applying diverse optimization methods to different parts of a logic circuit. This paper analyzes the relationship between each vertex and its corresponding optimization method. We extract a subgraph centered on each vertex and quantify the logic optimization results of these subgraphs as vertex features. Based on these features, we propose a circuit partitioning method to cluster the logic circuit, enabling the final optimized circuit to be constructed by merging clusters optimized with their respective methods. Additionally, we introduce a self-supervised prediction model to efficiently obtain vertex features. The experimental results targeting LUT mapping demonstrate that our method achieves improvements of $8.48 \%$ in area and 9.81% in delay compared to the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合优化是逻辑综合中的一种新兴方法，侧重于将多种优化方法应用于逻辑电路的不同部分。本文分析了各个顶点之间的关系及其相应的优化方法。我们提取以每个顶点为中心的子图，并将这些子图的逻辑优化结果量化为顶点特征。基于这些特征，我们提出了一种电路划分方法来对逻辑电路进行聚类，从而能够通过合并用各自的方法优化的簇来构建最终的优化电路。此外，我们引入了自监督预测模型来有效地获取顶点特征。针对 LUT 映射的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在面积上实现了 $8.48 \%$ 的改进，在延迟上实现了 9.81% 的改进。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Less Sense Makes More Sense: In-Sensor Compressive Learning for Efficient Machine Vision.
papers.abstract: Integrating deep learning and image sensors has significantly transformed machine vision applications. Yet, conventional highresolution image acquisition schemes enabled by imagers are energyinefficient for deep learning, as they involve excessive data quantization and transmission overhead. To address this challenge, we propose a lightweight in-sensor compressive learning framework that integrates a compressive learning-based encoder within image sensors for taskspecific feature extraction. Our framework encodes raw images into adaptive low-dimensional representations using only a 1-bit encoder by joint optimization with downstream machine vision tasks. It achieves $10 \times$ data compression, a minimum of 1.6% accuracy loss in the task, and $3.93 \times$ energy savings at the sensor-end, outperforming prior arts.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习和图像传感器的集成极大地改变了机器视觉应用。然而，由成像仪实现的传统高分辨率图像采集方案对于深度学习而言能源效率低下，因为它们涉及过多的数据量化和传输开销。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种轻量级传感器内压缩学习框架，该框架在图像传感器中集成了基于压缩学习的编码器，用于特定任务的特征提取。我们的框架通过与下游机器视觉任务的联合优化，仅使用 1 位编码器将原始图像编码为自适应低维表示。 It achieves $10 \times$ data compression, a minimum of 1.6% accuracy loss in the task, and $3.93 \times$ energy savings at the sensor-end, outperforming prior arts.

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Multi-Objective Multi-Bit Flip-Flop Placement Considering Pre-Placed Cells.
papers.abstract: Clustering single-bit flip-flops (SBFFs) into multi-bit flip-flops (MBFFs) effectively reduces power and area. However, excessive displacement during the clustering and legalization process may incur significant timing degradation. To address this issue, we propose the first comprehensive MBFF placement methodology that addresses excessive displacement caused by pre-placed cells during clustering and legalization while simultaneously optimizing timing, power, area, and bin utilization. Our methodology includes three main features: (1) a force model to relocate flip-flops and reduce timing violations, (2) a clustering and legalization process to reduce timing degradation caused by displacement, and (3) a multi-objective function to identify flip-flop candidates suitable for MBFF clustering. Our methodology outperforms all participating teams in the 2024 CAD Contest at ICCAD on Power and Timing Optimization Using Multi-Bit Flip-Flops, based on exactly the same settings.
papers.abstract_zh: 将单位触发器 (SBFF) 聚集为多位触发器 (MBFF) 可有效降低功耗和面积。然而，集群和合法化过程中的过度位移可能会导致严重的时间退化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个全面的 MBFF 放置方法，该方法解决了集群和合法化过程中预先放置的单元引起的过度位移，同时优化时序、功耗、面积和箱利用率。我们的方法包括三个主要特征：（1）用于重新定位触发器并减少时序违规的力模型，（2）用于减少位移引起的时序退化的聚类和合法化过程，以及（3）用于识别适合MBFF聚类的触发器候选者的多目标函数。基于完全相同的设置，我们的方法优于 ICCAD 2024 年 CAD 竞赛中使用多位触发器进行功耗和时序优化的所有参赛团队。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Novel Design of MTJ-Based Unified LIF Spiking Neuron and PUF.
papers.abstract: Due to the higher energy and hardware efficiency of spiking neural networks (SNNs) compared to deep neural networks, they have attracted a lot of attention. However, their security must be investigated, given that they have access to private and confidential data. Physically unclonable functions (PUFs) are a class of circuits with security applications like device authentication, embedded licensing, device-specific cryptographic key generation, and anti-counterfeiting. Therefore, PUFs can be used to enhance the security of SNN. Accordingly, in this paper, an MTJ-based LIF Neuron/PUF has been proposed. The proposed design can function as both a LIF neuron and PUF. The results of the Monte Carlo simulation show that the proposed design has better uniqueness and uniformity values compared to its counterparts. These values for the proposed design are $50.07 \%$ and $49.66 \%$, which are close to their ideal value of $50 \%$. Also, the mean value of Shannon entropy for the 128-bit PUF response of the proposed design is 0.9974, which is close to its ideal value of 1.
papers.abstract_zh: Due to the higher energy and hardware efficiency of spiking neural networks (SNNs) compared to deep neural networks, they have attracted a lot of attention.然而，鉴于他们可以访问私人和机密数据，因此必须对其安全性进行调查。物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 是一类具有设备身份验证、嵌入式许可、设备特定加密密钥生成和防伪等安全应用的电路。因此，PUF可以用来增强SNN的安全性。因此，本文提出了一种基于 MTJ 的 LIF Neuron/PUF。所提出的设计可以同时充当 LIF 神经元和 PUF 神经元。蒙特卡罗模拟的结果表明，与同类设计相比，所提出的设计具有更好的独特性和均匀性值。拟议设计的这些值为 $50.07 \%$ 和 $49.66 \%$，接近其理想值 $50 \%$。此外，所提出设计的 128 位 PUF 响应的香农熵平均值为 0.9974，接近其理想值 1。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: On-the-Fly Hadamard Hypervector Processing for Efficient Hyperdimensional Computing.
papers.abstract: Inspired by the human brain, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) processes information efficiently by operating in high-dimensional space using hypervectors. While previous works focus on optimizing pregenerated hypervectors in software, this study introduces a novel on-the-fly vector generation method in hardware with $O(1)$ complexity, compared to the $O(N)$ iterative search used in conventional approaches to find the best orthogonal hypervectors. Our approach leverages Hadamard binary coefficients and unary computing to simplify encoding into addition-only operations after the generation stage in ASIC, implemented using inmemory computing. The proposed design significantly improves accuracy and computational efficiency across multiple benchmark datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 受人脑的启发，超维计算 (HDC) 通过使用超向量在高维空间中运行来有效地处理信息。虽然之前的工作重点是在软件中优化预生成的超向量，但本研究引入了一种新颖的硬件即时向量生成方法，与传统方法中用于寻找最佳正交超向量的 $O(N)$ 迭代搜索相比，其复杂度为 $O(1)$。我们的方法利用 Hadamard 二进制系数和一元计算，在 ASIC 生成阶段之后将编码简化为仅加法运算，并使用内存计算实现。所提出的设计显着提高了多个基准数据集的准确性和计算效率。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Opera: An Open and Efficient Platform for Data-driven Synthesis of Analog Circuits.
papers.abstract: The front-end synthesis of analog circuits has been a long-standing challenge since the advent of integrated circuits. Many methods, ranging from conventional optimization-based techniques to emerging learning-based approaches, have been extensively explored to address this challenge. Yet, these methods are data-driven and often suffer from low design efficiency, due to their heavy reliance on time-consuming circuit simulators, which are frequently used in the synthesis loop for real-time evaluation of the evolving circuit design. In addition, benchmarking these methods is also largely unachievable due to their exclusive use of commercial semiconductor technology for evaluation. This “Late Breaking Results” introduces Opera, an open and efficient platform for the data-driven synthesis of analog circuits. Specifically, Opera develops efficient surrogate models for various circuits and integrates them into open-source OpenAI Gym-like environments to enable efficient synthesis. Case studies on exemplary circuits show that this platform can accelerate the conventional data-driven synthesis flow by up to $40 \times$. It also enables the benchmarking of various synthesis methods with standardized environments built upon an open-source semiconductor process.
papers.abstract_zh: 自集成电路出现以来，模拟电路的前端综合一直是一个长期存在的挑战。人们已经广泛探索了许多方法来应对这一挑战，从传统的基于优化的技术到新兴的基于学习的方法。然而，这些方法是数据驱动的，并且由于严重依赖耗时的电路模拟器而常常面临设计效率低的问题，而电路模拟器经常在综合循环中用于实时评估不断发展的电路设计。此外，由于这些方法仅使用商业半导体技术进行评估，因此对这些方法进行基准测试在很大程度上也是无法实现的。这一“最新成果”介绍了 Opera，这是一个开放且高效的平台，用于数据驱动的模拟电路综合。具体来说，Opera 为各种电路开发了高效的代理模型，并将它们集成到类似开源 OpenAI Gym 的环境中，以实现高效的合成。对示例电路的案例研究表明，该平台可以将传统的数据驱动综合流程加速高达 40 倍。它还可以使用基于开源半导体工艺的标准化环境对各种合成方法进行基准测试。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Scalable GPU-Friendly Parallelization for Sweep-Based Maze Routing.
papers.abstract: Global routing is a critical stage in the VLSI design flow, aiming to provide a robust guide for detailed routing and serve as early design feedback for placement. Many approaches have leveraged GPU parallelization to achieve significant acceleration. However, with the fast-growing complexity of modern large-scale designs, recent GPU-accelerated maze routing algorithms, driven by the sweep operation, struggle to find solutions efficiently with limited GPU memory resources. In order to address this issue, this paper proposes a scalable, GPU-friendly sweep-based maze routing that requires significantly less memory and fewer kernel function calls while accelerating overall runtime. We introduce a sweep-sharing technique that allows multiple nets to be routed simultaneously within a single sweeping process, substantially reducing memory consumption and kernel launching overhead. We further propose an edge-level rip-up-andreroute technique that selectively reroutes only overflowed segments, preserving feasible parts of the solution to reduce runtime substantially. Experimental results on the latest ISPD’24 Contest benchmarks demonstrate that our GPUfriendly maze routing with sweep sharing can significantly improve the efficiency of the state-of-the-art GPU-accelerated maze router.
papers.abstract_zh: 全局布线是 VLSI 设计流程中的关键阶段，旨在为详细布线提供可靠的指南，并作为布局的早期设计反馈。许多方法都利用 GPU 并行化来实现显着的加速。然而，随着现代大规模设计复杂性的快速增长，最近由扫描操作驱动的 GPU 加速迷宫路由算法很难在有限的 GPU 内存资源下有效地找到解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种可扩展、GPU 友好的基于扫描的迷宫路由，它需要显着更少的内存和更少的内核函数调用，同时加速整体运行时间。我们引入了一种扫描共享技术，允许在单个扫描过程中同时路由多个网络，从而大大减少内存消耗和内核启动开销。我们进一步提出了一种边缘级撕裂和重新路由技术，该技术有选择地仅重新路由溢出的段，保留解决方案的可行部分以大幅减少运行时间。最新 ISPD’24 竞赛基准测试的实验结果表明，我们具有扫描共享的 GPU 友好迷宫路由可以显着提高最先进的 GPU 加速迷宫路由器的效率。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Source-Aware Adaptive Cache Management for CXL-enabled Disaggregated Memory Sharing.
papers.abstract: Dynamic workloads running on multiple hosts will bring changing access patterns on CXL-enabled shared disaggregated memory. Existing works often un-traceably cache multi-source accesses, making it hard to exploit each host’s access behavior and assure service quality. Our solution Alchemy jointly optimizes cache replacement and bypassing and runs as an online reinforcement learning agent with source-aware adaptivity. It gives rewards derived from sampling-based action effectiveness and per-host macro performance. The multi-host prototype-based results on FPGAs show $8.71 \%-14.56 \%$ reduction in average access latency over LRU policy and 44x faster than the hardware-efficient ICGMM method in decision-making with comparable overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: Dynamic workloads running on multiple hosts will bring changing access patterns on CXL-enabled shared disaggregated memory.现有的工作往往无法追踪地缓存多源访问，从而难以利用每个主机的访问行为并保证服务质量。我们的解决方案 Alchemy 联合优化缓存替换和绕过，并作为具有源感知适应性的在线强化学习代理运行。它提供从基于采样的操作有效性和每个主机的宏观性能中获得的奖励。 FPGA 上基于多主机原型的结果显示，与 LRU 策略相比，平均访问延迟减少了 8.71 \%-14.56 \%$，并且在决策方面比硬件高效的 ICGMM 方法快 44 倍，且开销相当。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Statistical Timing Graph Scheduling Algorithm for GPU Computation.
papers.abstract: Statistical Static Timing Analysis (SSTA) is a crucial technique in digital circuit design because it addresses on-chip variations (OCV) by propagating timing distributions instead of fixed delays. However, the computational complexity of SSTA demands significant memory and long runtimes. While GPUs offer opportunities to accelerate SSTA, their limited memory capacity makes it challenging to handle large-scale SSTA workloads. To address this challenge, we propose a statistical timing graph (STG) scheduling algorithm combined with a GPU memory management strategy. We have shown up to $4.9 \times$ speedup on a GPU with 16 GB memory compared to a 20-thread CPU baseline when solving an 18.2 GB STG.
papers.abstract_zh: 统计静态时序分析 (SSTA) 是数字电路设计中的一项关键技术，因为它通过传播时序分布而不是固定延迟来解决片上变化 (OCV)。然而，SSTA 的计算复杂性需要大量的内存和较长的运行时间。虽然 GPU 提供了加速 SSTA 的机会，但其有限的内存容量使得处理大规模 SSTA 工作负载具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种结合 GPU 内存管理策略的统计时序图 (STG) 调度算法。在求解 18.2 GB STG 时，与 20 线程 CPU 基准相比，我们在具有 16 GB 内存的 GPU 上显示出高达 4.9 美元的加速速度。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: The Hidden Risks of Activation Duration in PLPUFs.
papers.abstract: The security of Internet of Things (IoT) devices is crucial to protect the vast amounts of data exposed due to their widespread adoption. Authentication is one of the key aspects of IoT security, but it becomes increasingly challenging, especially for resource-constrained devices that require lightweight and efficient solutions. Physical Unclonable Functions (PUFs) have emerged as a promising lightweight solution by using the unique physical properties of Integrated Circuits (ICs). Pseudo Liner Feedback Shift Register PUF (PLPUF) is one of the state-of-the-art implementations known for its flexibility in altering the challenge-response space by changing the activation duration. In this work, we demonstrate that selecting an appropriate activation duration for PLPUF is critical, as improper choices can compromise security. By analyzing the linear dependency between the responses of different PLPUF pairs, our results reveal that predictability can reach up to $96 \%$ when an unsuitable activation duration is chosen.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备的安全性对于保护因其广泛采用而暴露的大量数据至关重要。身份验证是物联网安全的关键方面之一，但它变得越来越具有挑战性，特别是对于需要轻量级高效解决方案的资源有限的设备。通过利用集成电路 (IC) 独特的物理特性，物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 已成为一种有前途的轻量级解决方案。伪线性反馈移位寄存器 PUF (PLPUF) 是最先进的实现之一，以其通过改变激活持续时间来灵活改变挑战-响应空间而闻名。在这项工作中，我们证明为 PLPUF 选择适当的激活持续时间至关重要，因为不正确的选择可能会损害安全性。通过分析不同 PLPUF 对响应之间的线性相关性，我们的结果表明，当选择不合适的激活持续时间时，可预测性最高可达 $96 \%$。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Utilization of Hybrid Threshold-Voltage Flip-flops for Power Recovery.
papers.abstract: As the process technology advances, reducing the leakage power as much as possible is one of the utmost challenging tasks in chip implementation. Utilizing cells with multi-VT (threshold voltage) is known to be a very effective method for optimizing leakage power under timing constraints. However, for the sequential cells on the timing critical paths in circuits, there is no easy way for the multi-VT method to reduce the leakage power unless timing is not sacrificed. To overcome this barrier, we introduce a set of new standard cells called hybrid-VT flipflop cells, each of which is implemented with two different VT types, one implanted onto its master latch while the other onto its slave latch, by which the setup time and clock-to-Q delay can be controlled individually and independently. We confirm that applying our power recovery method utilizing hybrid-VT flipflop cells to the benchmark circuits, which have already been optimized by the conventional multi-VT cells, is able to further reduce the leakage power by 8.97% with no timing degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着工艺技术的进步，尽可能降低泄漏功率是芯片实现中最具挑战性的任务之一。众所周知，利用具有多 VT（阈值电压）的单元是在时序限制下优化泄漏功率的非常有效的方法。然而，对于电路中时序关键路径上的时序单元，除非不牺牲时序，否则多VT方法没有简单的方法来降低泄漏功率。为了克服这一障碍，我们引入了一组称为混合 VT 触发器单元的新标准单元，每个单元都采用两种不同的 VT 类型来实现，一个植入到其主锁存器上，另一个植入到其从锁存器上，通过这些单元可以单独且独立地控制建立时间和时钟到 Q 延迟。我们确认，将我们利用混合 VT 触发器单元的功率恢复方法应用到已通过传统多 VT 单元优化的基准电路中，能够进一步将泄漏功率降低 8.97%，且不会造成时序劣化。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Versatile 4:1 Multiplexer Using 1T1R RRAM Crossbar for High Speed In-Memory Computing.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a high speed NAND based 4:1 Multiplexer (MUX) for various logic operations in a ResistiveRandom access memory crossbar structure. Compared to existing 4:1 MUX designs that require 10 steps, our proposed method completes execution in 3 steps. Additionally, proposed $4: 1$ MUX based Full adder, Full subtractor and 1-bit Comparator reduce clock cycles by 75% compared to state-of-the-art. Despite an increase in memristor count, the reduction in computational delay makes this approach promising for fast in-memory computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 NAND 的高速 4:1 多路复用器 (MUX)，用于电阻式随机存取存储器交叉开关结构中的各种逻辑操作。与需要 10 个步骤的现有 4:1 MUX 设计相比，我们提出的方法只需 3 个步骤即可完成执行。此外，与最先进的技术相比，提议的基于 4:1$ MUX 的全加器、全减器和 1 位比较器将时钟周期减少了 75%。尽管忆阻器数量增加，但计算延迟的减少使得这种方法有望用于快速内存计算。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Warpage-Aware Generative Floorplanning for Reliable Advanced Packaging.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the first warpage-aware generative learningbased floorplanning algorithm to effectively model the warpage effect and optimize the die floorplan on a fixed outlined substrate. With more heterogeneous materials and dense interconnects in advanced packaging, warpage is a main reliability concern and may degrade system performance. We present a novel transformer-based encoding scheme to learn node and edge representations, followed by parallel decoding and warpage-aware legalization to jointly minimize die displacement and warpage. Experimental results show that our algorithm improves warpage by 9.9% and wirelength by 8.3% on average, compared with the state-of-the-art work.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了第一个基于翘曲感知生成学习的布局规划算法，可以有效地模拟翘曲效应并优化固定轮廓基板上的芯片布局。随着先进封装中异质材料和密集互连的增多，翘曲成为主要的可靠性问题，并可能降低系统性能。我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的编码方案来学习节点和边缘表示，然后进行并行解码和翘曲感知合法化，以共同最小化芯片位移和翘曲。实验结果表明，与最先进的工作相比，我们的算法平均将翘曲改善了 9.9%，线长平均改善了 8.3%。

papers.title: LeakyDSP: Exploiting Digital Signal Processing Blocks to Sense Voltage Fluctuations in FPGAs.
papers.abstract: In recent years, cloud providers are dedicated to enabling FPGA multi-tenancy to improve resource utilization, but this new sharing model introduces power side-channel threats, where attackers detect voltage fluctuations from colocated circuits. This paper proposes LeakyDSP, a novel onchip sensor that maliciously configures DSP blocks to sense fine-grained voltage fluctuations but is overlooked by existing studies. Our experimental results show that LeakyDSP achieves high sensitivity to voltage fluctuations and strong robustness to different placements. Besides, we apply LeakyDSP to extract full AES keys with $25 \mathrm{k}-78 \mathrm{k}$ traces and build covert channels with a high transmission rate of 247.94 bit/s.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，云提供商致力于实现 FPGA 多租户以提高资源利用率，但这种新的共享模型引入了电源侧通道威胁，攻击者可以检测到同一位置电路的电压波动。本文提出了 LeakyDSP，这是一种新型片上传感器，可恶意配置 DSP 模块来感测细粒度电压波动，但现有研究忽视了这一点。我们的实验结果表明，LeakyDSP 实现了对电压波动的高灵敏度和对不同放置的强鲁棒性。此外，我们应用 LeakyDSP 来提取具有 $25 \mathrm{k}-78 \mathrm{k}$ 迹线的完整 AES 密钥，并构建具有 247.94 bit/s 高传输速率的隐蔽通道。

papers.title: LearnGraph: A Learning-Based Architecture for Dynamic Graph Processing.
papers.abstract: Dynamic graph processing systems using conventional array-based architectures face significant throughput limitations due to inefficient memory access and index management. While learned indexes improve data structure access, they struggle with interconnected graph data. We present LearnGraph, a novel architecture with an adaptive tree-based memory manager that dynamically optimizes for graph topology and access patterns. Our design integrates two key components: a hierarchical learned index optimized for graph topology to predict vertex and edge locations, and an adaptive tree structure that automatically reorganizes memory regions based on access patterns. Evaluation results demonstrate that LearnGraph outperforms state-of-theart dynamic graph systems, achieving $3.4 \times$ higher throughput on average and reducing processing time by $1.7 \times$ to $11 \times$ across standard graph workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于内存访问和索引管理效率低下，使用传统的基于阵列的架构的动态图形处理系统面临着巨大的吞吐量限制。虽然学习索引改善了数据结构访问，但它们在处理互连的图形数据时遇到了困难。我们提出了 LearnGraph，这是一种新颖的架构，具有基于树的自适应内存管理器，可以动态优化图形拓扑和访问模式。我们的设计集成了两个关键组件：针对图拓扑优化的分层学习索引以预测顶点和边缘位置，以及根据访问模式自动重新组织内存区域的自适应树结构。评估结果表明，LearnGraph 的性能优于最先进的动态图形系统，在标准图形工作负载中平均吞吐量提高了 3.4 美元，并将处理时间减少了 1.7 美元到 11 美元。

papers.title: Learning-Aided Safe Controller Synthesis with Formal Guarantees via Vector Barrier Certificates.
papers.abstract: The design of controllers for safety-critical systems is an important research issue. Especially, the generation of controllers with formal safety guarantees is a challenging problem. Recently, for safety objectives of various system control tasks, machine learning technologies have been used to achieve ideal training and simulation performance, but formal guarantees are still lacking. This paper takes advantages of learning technology to assist safe controller synthesis with formal guarantees. On the one hand, the generation of verifiable safe controllers is aided by reinforcement learning; on the other hand, a set of barrier certificates (BC), i.e. a vector BC, is synthesized with the aid of deep learning to certify the safety of synthesized controllers. Vector BCs are more expressive than the conventional single BCs for safety verification. Compared with the existing work on vector BC generation, our method has two advantages: first, our method verifies a learned candidate vector BC, rather than directly generating a verified one, and thus has low computational complexity; second, the existing method has made relaxations to the non-convex vector BC constraints, which reduced the feasible region of solutions, while our method can deal with the original constraints. Furthermore, experiments fully demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a series of benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全关键系统的控制器设计是一个重要的研究问题。特别是，具有正式安全保证的控制器的生成是一个具有挑战性的问题。近年来，针对各种系统控制任务的安全目标，机器学习技术已被用来实现理想的训练和仿真性能，但仍缺乏正式的保证。本文利用学习技术来辅助具有形式保证的安全控制器综合。一方面，强化学习有助于生成可验证的安全控制器；另一方面，借助深度学习合成一组屏障证书（BC），即矢量BC，以证明合成控制器的安全性。矢量 BC 比传统的单个 BC 更具表现力，可用于安全验证。与现有的向量 BC 生成工作相比，我们的方法有两个优点：第一，我们的方法验证学习的候选向量 BC，而不是直接生成经过验证的向量，因此计算复杂度较低；其次，现有方法对非凸向量BC约束进行了松弛，减少了解的可行域，而我们的方法可以处理原始约束。此外，实验充分证明了我们的方法在一系列基准测试上的有效性。

papers.title: LEMOE: LLM-Enhanced Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization for Microarchitecture Exploration.
papers.abstract: Designing processor microarchitectures is increasingly challenging due to a vast design space and the need to balance multiple metrics. Traditional algorithm-driven design space exploration (DSE) approaches often struggle to incorporate the extensive domain knowledge of expert architects. To address this, we introduce LEMOE, a multi-objective microarchitecture optimization framework that leverages large language model (LLM) to enhance an implicit Bayesian model. LEMOE features a program-aware warm-up phase utilizing LLM and LLVM to produce an initial design set with rich prior knowledge. By harnessing LLM’s contextual learning, our approach improves surrogate modeling and sampling under sparse data conditions. Experiment results show that LEMOE achieves a $22.8 \%$ improvement in energy efficiency with the same number of iterations and a $2.9 \times$ runtime speedup for the same target compared to prior works.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于巨大的设计空间和平衡多个指标的需要，设计处理器微架构变得越来越具有挑战性。传统的算法驱动的设计空间探索 (DSE) 方法通常难以整合专家架构师的广泛领域知识。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 LEMOE，这是一种多目标微架构优化框架，它利用大语言模型 (LLM) 来增强隐式贝叶斯模型。 LEMOE 具有程序感知预热阶段，利用 LLM 和 LLVM 生成具有丰富先验知识的初始设计集。通过利用法学硕士的情境学习，我们的方法改进了稀疏数据条件下的代理建模和采样。实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，LEMOE 在相同迭代次数下实现了 $22.8 \%$ 的能源效率改进，并且针对相同目标实现了 $2.9 \times$ 的运行加速。

papers.title: Leopard: Hardware Pass-Through Remote Storage Access with Queue Concurrency for Edge Intelligent Workstations.
papers.abstract: Edge intelligent workstations load (store) massive empirical data from (to) remote cloud storage due to limited local storage. However, current remote storage access frameworks are complex. They use expensive computing resources to manipulate multiple concurrent request queues in modern high-speed storage devices for saturating performance. Complex software stacks and limited CPUs on edge intelligent workstations hinder saturating concurrent request queues, thus resulting in up to $75 \%$ performance degradation for remote storage. We propose Leopard, a hardware pass-through remote storage access framework with queue concurrency, which provides lossless remote storage access for edge intelligence. Leopard proposes a custom NVMe controller using SmartNIC’s FPGA core to emulate it as an NVMe device, which eliminates complex remote storage stacks for edge workstations. Operations for remote storage access are implemented as hardware circuits inside the controller to eliminate CPU cycles. Parallelized and pipelined workflows are proposed for hardware circuits to accelerate remote storage access operations. Our evaluation presents that Leopard exhibits $1.09 \times \sim 6.04 \times$ lower remote storage access latency than SOTA solutions for realistic workloads in edge intelligent workstations.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于本地存储有限，边缘智能工作站从远程云存储加载（存储）大量经验数据。然而，当前的远程存储访问框架很复杂。他们使用昂贵的计算资源来操纵现代高速存储设备中的多个并发请求队列，以达到饱和性能。边缘智能工作站上复杂的软件堆栈和有限的 CPU 阻碍了并发请求队列的饱和，从而导致远程存储性能下降高达 $75 \%$。我们提出Leopard，一种具有队列并发性的硬件直通远程存储访问框架，它为边缘智能提供无损远程存储访问。 Leopard 提出了一种定制 NVMe 控制器，使用 SmartNIC 的 FPGA 内核将其模拟为 NVMe 设备，从而消除了边缘工作站的复杂远程存储堆栈。远程存储访问操作作为控制器内部的硬件电路实现，以消除 CPU 周期。为硬件电路提出了并行和流水线工作流程，以加速远程存储访问操作。我们的评估表明，对于边缘智能工作站中的实际工作负载，Leopard 的远程存储访问延迟比 SOTA 解决方案低 1.09 美元\times \sim 6.04 \times$。

papers.title: Leveraging Critical Proof Obligations for Efficient IC3 Verification.
papers.abstract: IC3 and its variants are SAT-based model-checking methods that play a critical role in hardware verification. Efficient management of proof obligations, which track states that need to be proven unreachable, is essential for improving verification performance. This paper presents a novel approach that utilizes Critical Proof Obligations (CPOs) to improve proof obligation management. We propose two techniques, CPO-Driven UNSAT Core Generation and CPO-Driven Proof Obligation Propagation, to promote lemma propagation and frame refinement. Experimental results on HWMCC benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements in CPO discovery and lemma propagation, resulting in notable performance gains.
papers.abstract_zh: IC3 及其变体是基于 SAT 的模型检查方法，在硬件验证中发挥着关键作用。证明义务的有效管理（跟踪需要证明无法到达的状态）对于提高验证性能至关重要。本文提出了一种利用关键证明义务 (CPO) 来改进证明义务管理的新方法。我们提出了两种技术，即 CPO 驱动的 UNSAT 核心生成和 CPO 驱动的证明义务传播，以促进引理传播和框架细化。 HWMCC 基准测试的实验结果表明，CPO 发现和引理传播方面有了显着改进，从而带来了显着的性能提升。

papers.title: Libra: A Hybrid-Sparse Attention Accelerator Featuring Multi-Level Workload Balance.
papers.abstract: Transformers have delivered exceptional performance and are widely used across various natural language processing (NLP) tasks, owing to their powerful attention mechanism. However, the high computational complexity and substantial memory usage pose significant challenges to inference efficiency. Numerous quantization and value-level sparsification methods have been proposed to overcome these challenges. Since higher sparsity leads to greater acceleration efficiency, leveraging both value-level and bit-level sparsity (hybrid sparsity) can effectively exploit the acceleration potential of the attention mechanism. However, increased sparsity exacerbates load imbalance across compute units, potentially limiting the extent of acceleration benefits. To fully exploit the acceleration potential of hybrid sparsity, we propose Libra, an attention accelerator developed through algorithm-hardware co-design. At the algorithm level, we design the bit-group-based algorithm consisting of filtered bit-group sparsification (FBS) and dynamic bit-group quantization (DBQ) to maximize the utilization of sparsity in attention. FBS imposes structured sparsity on weights, while DBQ introduces dynamic sparsification during the computation of activations. At the hardware level, we design task pool to achieve multi-level workload balance, effectively mitigating the load imbalance among compute units induced by hybrid sparsity. Additionally, different stages in DBQ can be executed in parallel, with each stage operating at distinct bit-widths. To support this, we design an adaptive bit-width architecture that enables simultaneous computations at varying bitwidths. Our experiments demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) attention accelerators, Libra achieves up to $1.49 \times \sim 5.89 \times$ speedup and $2.65 \times \sim 10.82 \times$ enhancement in energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其强大的注意力机制，Transformer 具有卓越的性能，并广泛应用于各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务。然而，高计算复杂度和大量内存使用对推理效率提出了重大挑战。人们提出了许多量化和值级稀疏方法来克服这些挑战。由于更高的稀疏性会带来更高的加速效率，因此利用值级和比特级稀疏性（混合稀疏性）可以有效地挖掘注意力机制的加速潜力。然而，稀疏性的增加会加剧计算单元之间的负载不平衡，从而可能限制加速优势的程度。为了充分利用混合稀疏性的加速潜力，我们提出了 Libra，这是一种通过算法-硬件协同设计开发的注意力加速器。在算法层面，我们设计了基于位组的算法，包括过滤位组稀疏化（FBS）和动态位组量化（DBQ），以最大限度地利用注意力中的稀疏性。 FBS 对权重施加结构化稀疏性，而 DBQ 在激活计算过程中引入动态稀疏性。在硬件层面，我们设计任务池来实现多级工作负载平衡，有效缓解混合稀疏引起的计算单元之间的负载不平衡。此外，DBQ 中的不同阶段可以并行执行，每个阶段以不同的位宽运行。为了支持这一点，我们设计了一种自适应位宽架构，能够以不同的位宽同时进行计算。我们的实验表明，与最先进（SOTA）的注意力加速器相比，Libra 实现了高达 $1.49 \times \sim 5.89 \times$ 的加速，以及 $2.65 \times \sim 10.82 \times$ 的能源效率提升。

papers.title: LightRIM: Light Runtime Integrity Measurement for Linux Kernels in Embedded Applications.
papers.abstract: Linux kernels are being widely deployed in embedded applications, such as increasingly automated vehicles and robots, due to their robust ecosystem. Security modules have been developed to enhance the integrity of Linux kernels, a critical system component. However, these modules consume substantial computational resources, making them unsuitable for embedded domains. We introduce LightRIM, a lightweight method to measure the Linux kernel’s integrity during runtime, ideal for resource-limited embedded applications. We focus on major attack types and extract objects for monitoring. Our approach includes a two-stage hashing process and an event-triggered measurement algorithm tied to the security value. To mitigate Time-of-Check-to-Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) attacks, we introduce a heuristic algorithm that maximizes the attack detection rate within CPU usage constraint and randomizes the measurement intervals. Experimental results indicate that LightRIM incurs less than 0.7% performance overhead while providing extensive attack coverage.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其强大的生态系统，Linux 内核被广泛部署在嵌入式应用中，例如日益自动化的车辆和机器人。安全模块的开发是为了增强关键系统组件 Linux 内核的完整性。然而，这些模块消耗大量的计算资源，使得它们不适合嵌入式领域。我们推出 LightRIM，这是一种在运行时测量 Linux 内核完整性的轻量级方法，非常适合资源有限的嵌入式应用程序。我们关注主要的攻击类型并提取监控对象。我们的方法包括两阶段哈希过程和与安全值相关的事件触发测量算法。为了减轻检查时间到使用时间 (TOCTOU) 攻击，我们引入了一种启发式算法，可在 CPU 使用限制内最大化攻击检测率并随机化测量间隔。实验结果表明，LightRIM 在提供广泛的攻击覆盖范围的同时，产生的性能开销不到 0.7%。

papers.title: LIO-DPC: Accurate and Fast LiDAR-Inertial Odometry with Dynamic Pose Chain.
papers.abstract: LiDAR-inertial odometry is widely used in robotics navigation, autonomous driving, and drone operation to provide precise, low-latency motion estimation. Filter-based methods are fast but suffer from significant cumulative errors. Graph optimization methods reduce cumulative errors through loop closure detection but are computationally expensive. In this work, we propose LIO-DPC, a framework that combines the benefits of the filter-based approach and graph-based approach. First, we propose a dynamic pose chain optimization method. It generates an initial pose chain using the fast filter. This is followed by applying computationally efficient local graph optimization to a set of local pose chains to generate refined relative poses, which are then used to update the motion estimation. Second, we propose a loop sparsification approach to select representative loops that are both temporally and spatially proximate, to reduce the computational complexity in graph optimization and minimize loop errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LIO-DPC achieves real-time performance and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: LiDAR 惯性里程计广泛应用于机器人导航、自动驾驶和无人机操作，以提供精确、低延迟的运动估计。基于过滤器的方法速度很快，但会出现显着的累积误差。图优化方法通过闭环检测减少累积误差，但计算成本较高。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LIO-DPC，这是一个结合了基于过滤器的方法和基于图的方法的优点的框架。首先，我们提出了一种动态位姿链优化方法。它使用快速滤波器生成初始姿势链。接下来，将计算高效的局部图优化应用于一组局部姿势链，以生成精细的相对姿势，然后将其用于更新运动估计。其次，我们提出了一种循环稀疏化方法来选择时间和空间上接近的代表性循环，以降低图优化中的计算复杂性并最小化循环错误。大量实验表明，LIO-DPC 实现了实时性能，并且在准确性方面优于最先进的方法。

papers.title: Live Region Mutation Testing for Commercial Cyber-Physical System Development Tool Chain.
papers.abstract: MathWorks Simulink, a commercial CPS development tool chain, is widely used as an industry standard for designing and analyzing system behavior and generating embedded code for deployment. However, bugs in Simulink can cause unexpected behaviors during model compilation, making their elimination critical. Existing methods face two key challenges: generating equivalent models with varied data flows (data flow equivalence) and creating diverse block types to comprehensively test the compiler (mutation diversity). To address these, we propose LION, a differential testing approach. LION ensures data flow equivalence by inserting “store-revert” block pairs between existing blocks and tackles mutation diversity by employing Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling to generate diverse new blocks. Differential testing is then used to identify bugs. Experiments show LION outperforms state-of-the-art approaches like SLforge, SLEMI, and COMBAT, detecting 610 additional compiler bugs in two weeks. Over two months, LION uncovered and reported 16 valid bugs in the widely used stable version of Simulink.
papers.abstract_zh: MathWorks Simulink 是一个商业 CPS 开发工具链，被广泛用作设计和分析系统行为以及生成用于部署的嵌入式代码的行业标准。然而，Simulink 中的错误可能会在模型编译期间导致意外行为，因此消除这些错误至关重要。现有方法面临两个关键挑战：生成具有不同数据流的等效模型（数据流等效性）和创建不同的块类型以全面测试编译器（突变多样性）。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 LION，一种差异测试方法。 LION 通过在现有块之间插入“存储-恢复”块对来确保数据流等效性，并通过采用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 采样来生成不同的新块来解决突变多样性。然后使用差异测试来识别错误。实验表明，LION 的性能优于 SLforge、SLEMI 和 COMBAT 等最先进的方法，在两周内检测到 610 个额外的编译器错误。两个多月以来，LION 在广泛使用的 Simulink 稳定版本中发现并报告了 16 个有效错误。

papers.title: LLMs Meet Post-Silicon Test Engineering: A New Era (Invited).
papers.abstract: The transformative power of Large Language Models (LLMs) is reshaping the role of AI in post-silicon test engineering. This paper summarizes our experience in leveraging LLMs to develop AI agents specifically tailored for this domain. Central to our approach is a two-stage process: first, we utilize the reasoning capabilities of LLMs to systematically interpret user queries; second, we invoke a grounding process to execute tasks as directed by these queries. This grounding ensures seamless integration of the LLM with existing test engineering infrastructure, enabling the AI agent to autonomously perform tasks within an established framework. Using the Intelligent Engineering Assistant (IEA) as a case study, we demonstrate how domain-specific, LLM-powered AI agents can automate critical aspects of test engineering, and highlight the potential of LLMs to revolutionize post-silicon test engineering through intelligent, context-aware automation.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的变革力量正在重塑人工智能在硅后测试工程中的作用。本文总结了我们利用法学硕士开发专门针对该领域的人工智能代理的经验。我们方法的核心是一个两阶段的过程：首先，我们利用法学硕士的推理能力来系统地解释用户查询；其次，我们调用一个基础过程来执行这些查询指示的任务。这种基础确保了法学硕士与现有测试工程基础设施的无缝集成，使人工智能代理能够在既定框架内自主执行任务。我们以智能工程助理 (IEA) 作为案例研究，展示了特定领域、由 LLM 驱动的 AI 代理如何实现测试工程关键方面的自动化，并强调了 LLM 通过智能、上下文感知自动化彻底改变投片后测试工程的潜力。

papers.title: LLMs: A Driving Force in Next Generation Digital Design Automation.
papers.abstract: Innovations in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI), particularly large language models (LLMs), are poised to revolutionize silicon design automation. This paper explores the transformative potential of LLMs in automating and enhancing various tasks within the silicon design process. It reviews the current applications of LLMs and their potential to automate silicon design tasks, proposing applications, providing a qualitative analysis of the readiness of the technology to support these applications and setting directions for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成人工智能 (GenAI) 的创新，特别是大型语言模型 (LLM)，有望彻底改变芯片设计自动化。本文探讨了法学硕士在自动化和增强芯片设计过程中各种任务方面的变革潜力。它回顾了法学硕士的当前应用及其自动化芯片设计任务的潜力，提出应用，对支持这些应用的技术准备情况进行定性分析，并为未来的研究设定方向。

papers.title: LLMShare: Optimizing LLM Inference Serving with Hardware Architecture Exploration.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized language tasks but pose significant deployment challenges due to their substantial computational demands during inference. The hardware configurations of existing LLM serving systems do not optimize for the different computational and bandwidth needs of the prefill and decoding phases in LLM inference, leading to inefficient resource use and increased costs. In this paper, we systematically investigate promising hardware configurations for LLM inference serving.
