We develop a simulator that models the performance and cost across different hardware solutions and introduce a customized design space exploration framework to identify optimal setups efficiently. By aligning hardware capabilities with the specific demands of the prefill and decoding phases, we achieve $13 \%$ cost savings and over $4 \times$ throughput improvements compared to conventional serving system setups.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 彻底改变了语言任务，但由于推理过程中的大量计算需求，带来了重大的部署挑战。现有LLM服务系统的硬件配置并未针对LLM推理中预填充和解码阶段的不同计算和带宽需求进行优化，导致资源使用效率低下并增加成本。在本文中，我们系统地研究了用于 LLM 推理服务的有前途的硬件配置。我们开发了一个模拟器，可以对不同硬件解决方案的性能和成本进行建模，并引入定制的设计空间探索框架来有效地识别最佳设置。通过将硬件功能与预填充和解码阶段的特定需求相结合，与传统的服务系统设置相比，我们节省了 13 \%$ 的成本，并提高了超过 4 \times$ 的吞吐量。

papers.title: LMM-IR: Large-Scale Netlist-Aware Multimodal Framework for Static IR-Drop Prediction.
papers.abstract: Static IR drop analysis is a fundamental and critical task in the field of chip design. Nevertheless, this process can be quite time-consuming, potentially requiring several hours. Moreover, addressing IR drop violations frequently demands iterative analysis, thereby causing the computational burden. Therefore, fast and accurate IR drop prediction is vital for reducing the overall time invested in chip design. In this paper, we firstly propose a novel multimodal approach that efficiently processes SPICE files through large-scale netlist transformer (LNT). Our key innovation is representing and processing netlist topology as 3D point cloud representations, enabling efficient handling of netlist with up to hundreds of thousands to millions nodes. All types of data, including netlist files and image data, are encoded into latent space as features and fed into the model for static voltage drop prediction. This enables the integration of data from multiple modalities for complementary predictions. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve the best F1 score and the lowest MAE among the winning teams of the ICCAD 2023 contest and the state-of-theart algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 静态压降分析是芯片设计领域的一项基础且关键的任务。然而，这个过程可能非常耗时，可能需要几个小时。此外，解决 IR drop 违规问题经常需要迭代分析，从而造成计算负担。因此，快速、准确的 IR 压降预测对于减少芯片设计的总体时间投入至关重要。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的多模式方法，通过大规模网表转换器（LNT）有效地处理 SPICE 文件。我们的关键创新是将网表拓扑表示和处理为 3D 点云表示，从而能够有效处理多达数十万到数百万个节点的网表。所有类型的数据，包括网表文件和图像数据，都作为特征编码到潜在空间中，并输入到模型中以进行静态电压降预测。这使得能够整合来自多种模式的数据以进行补充预测。实验结果表明，我们提出的算法可以在 ICCAD 2023 竞赛的获胜团队和最先进的算法中获得最好的 F1 分数和最低的 MAE。

papers.title: Local-GS: An Order-Independent Gaussian Splatting Training Accelerator Exploiting Splat Locality.
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting has emerged as the SOTA approach for 3D representation and view synthesis. While Gaussian Splatting has demonstrated impressive capability and rendering quality on desktop GPUs, achieving on-demand training on resource-constrained edge devices is still challenging. In this work, we identified the training bottleneck from a few perspectives including algorithm splat locality and the limited memory and hardware under-utilization. To address these problems, we present Local-GS, a 3D Gaussian Splatting training accelerator with order-independent rendering to break the depth-wise data dependency between overlapping Gaussians. We further incorporate a parallel pixel intersection test unit to schedule thread workload based on Gaussian splat locality and improve hardware utilization. A set of unified training-rendering cores are designed to achieve efficient splat-level parallel rendering and gradient propagation. Our Local-GS is implemented in 7 nm and is evaluated by several real-world 3D scenes. Compared to edge Jetson NX GPU, Local-GS achieve 26.9-53 $\times$ training speedup and three orders of magnitude efficiency boost.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯分布已成为 3D 表示和视图合成的 SOTA 方法。虽然 Gaussian Splatting 在桌面 GPU 上展示了令人印象深刻的功能和渲染质量，但在资源受限的边缘设备上实现按需训练仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们从几个角度确定了训练瓶颈，包括算法局部性以及有限的内存和硬件利用率不足。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Local-GS，这是一种 3D 高斯泼溅训练加速器，具有与顺序无关的渲染功能，可以打破重叠高斯之间的深度数据依赖性。我们进一步结合了并行像素交叉测试单元，以基于高斯分布局部性来调度线程工作负载并提高硬件利用率。设计了一组统一的训练渲染核心来实现高效的splat级并行渲染和梯度传播。我们的 Local-GS 在 7 nm 中实现，并通过几个真实的 3D 场景进行评估。与边缘 Jetson NX GPU 相比，Local-GS 实现了 26.9-53 $\times$ 的训练加速和三个数量级的效率提升。

papers.title: Location is Key: Leveraging LLM for Functional Bug Localization in Verilog Design.
papers.abstract: In Verilog code design, identifying and locating functional bugs is an important yet challenging task. Existing automatic bug localization methods have limited capabilities; they only suggest a set of potential buggy lines rather than precisely identifying the bug. Moreover, they depend on verification tools like testbenches and reference models, which require expert input and are time-consuming to develop. This paper introduces LiK (Location is Key), an open-source Large Language Model (LLM) to precisely locate functional bugs in Verilog code without the need for expert-written verification tools. LiK is developed from the open-source coding LLM Deepseek-Coder-Lite-Base-16B through a threestep training process: continuous pre-training to enhance foundational knowledge, supervised fine-tuning to learn how to output localization results, and reinforcement learning to reduce output errors. Experiment results demonstrate that LiK achieves superior functional bug localization accuracy, outperforming both the SOTA traditional method Strider, and SOTA closed-source LLMs like GPT-o1-preview and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. Moreover, integrating LiK into the SOTA LLM-based Verilog debugging tool significantly boosts its functional bug fixing success rate from $76.47 \%$ to $90.54 \%$. This underscores LiK’s potential to enhance the performance of end-to-end automatic Verilog debugging tools.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 Verilog 代码设计中，识别和定位功能错误是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。现有的自动缺陷定位方法能力有限；他们只是建议一组潜在的错误线，而不是精确地识别错误。此外，它们依赖于测试平台和参考模型等验证工具，这些工具需要专家的输入并且开发起来非常耗时。本文介绍了LiK（Location is Key），这是一种开源大型语言模型（LLM），可以精确定位Verilog代码中的功能错误，而无需专家编写的验证工具。 LiK由开源编码LLM Deepseek-Coder-Lite-Base-16B发展而来，经过三步训练过程：持续预训练以增强基础知识，有监督微调以学习如何输出定位结果，以及强化学习以减少输出错误。实验结果表明，LiK 实现了卓越的功能错误定位精度，优于 SOTA 传统方法 Strider 和 SOTA 闭源 LLM（如 GPT-o1-preview 和 Claude-3.5-Sonnet）。此外，将 LiK 集成到基于 SOTA LLM 的 Verilog 调试工具中，可显着提高其功能错误修复成功率，从 76.47 美元\%$ 提高到 90.54 美元\%$。这凸显了 LiK 增强端到端自动 Verilog 调试工具性能的潜力。

papers.title: Logic Optimization Meets SAT: A Novel Framework for Circuit-SAT Solving.
papers.abstract: The Circuit Satisfiability (CSAT) problem, a variant of the Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) problem, plays a critical role in integrated circuit design and verification. However, existing SAT solvers, optimized for Conjunctive Normal Form (CNF), often struggle with the intrinsic complexity of circuit structures when directly applied to CSAT instances. To address this challenge, we propose a novel preprocessing framework that leverages advanced logic synthesis techniques and a reinforcement learning (RL) agent to optimize CSAT problem instances. The framework introduces a cost-customized Look-Up Table (LUT) mapping strategy that prioritizes solving efficiency, effectively transforming circuits into simplified forms tailored for SAT solvers. Our method achieves significant runtime reductions across diverse industrial-scale CSAT benchmarks, seamlessly integrating with state-of-the-art SAT solvers. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate up to $63 \%$ reduction in solving time compared to conventional approaches, highlighting the potential of EDAdriven innovations to advance SAT-solving capabilities.
papers.abstract_zh: 电路可满足性（CSAT）问题是布尔可满足性（SAT）问题的变体，在集成电路设计和验证中起着至关重要的作用。然而，针对合取范式 (CNF) 进行优化的现有 SAT 求解器在直接应用于 CSAT 实例时，常常会遇到电路结构固有的复杂性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的预处理框架，该框架利用先进的逻辑综合技术和强化学习（RL）代理来优化 CSAT 问题实例。该框架引入了成本定制的查找表（LUT）映射策略，优先考虑求解效率，有效地将电路转换为为 SAT 求解器量身定制的简化形式。我们的方法在各种工业规模的 CSAT 基准测试中显着缩短了运行时间，并与最先进的 SAT 求解器无缝集成。广泛的实验评估表明，与传统方法相比，求解时间最多可减少 63 \%$，凸显了 EDA 驱动的创新在提高 SAT 求解能力方面的潜力。

papers.title: Logic Restructuring with Preserved Logic Blocks.
papers.abstract: During technology mapping, complex cells such as adders and multiplexers are often available in the standard cell library, which helps improve the final PPA results. However, technology-independent optimization tends to over-optimize towards the cost metrics measurable with technology-independent representations (e.g., AIG size) by decomposing blocks of logic that could have been mapped into complex cells. Besides, it is also of practical interest to model and preserve some special logic components, such as the enable logic of flops, during optimization. This paper studies “boxing” logic blocks before technology-independent optimization and preserving them during optimization. A wire-based resubstitution is proposed to optimize boxed networks. Experiments with academic and industrial benchmarks show that transparent-boxing, i.e., preserving boxes while utilizing the information on their logic, achieves better results than black-boxing, i.e., completely ignoring the logic in boxes. Specifically, in the technology-independent evaluation, transparentboxing reduces the mapped network size by 4% more than blackboxing; in the full-flow evaluation, transparent-boxing achieves 1.8% more improvement on timing and similar improvements in area, power, and wire length compared to black-boxing.
papers.abstract_zh: 在技​​术映射过程中，标准单元库中通常提供加法器和多路复用器等复杂单元，这有助于改善最终的 PPA 结果。然而，与技术无关的优化往往会通过分解可能映射到复杂单元的逻辑块，对可通过与技术无关的表示（例如 AIG 大小）测量的成本指标进行过度优化。此外，在优化过程中建模和保留一些特殊的逻辑组件（例如触发器的使能逻辑）也具有实际意义。本文研究了在与技术无关的优化之前“装箱”逻辑块并在优化过程中保留它们。提出了基于线路的重新替换来优化盒装网络。学术和工业基准的实验表明，透明装箱（即在利用其逻辑信息的同时保留盒子）比黑盒（即完全忽略盒子中的逻辑）取得更好的结果。具体来说，在与技术无关的评估中，透明盒化比黑盒化减少了映射网络大小4%；在全流程评估中，与黑盒相比，透明盒在时序上实现了 1.8% 的改进，并且在面积、功率和线长度方面实现了类似的改进。

papers.title: Look Before You Leap: A Self-Review Bayesian Optimization Method for Constrained High-Dimensional Design Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: The parameterizable and synthesizable RISC-V processors enable the automatic generation of customized CPU cores through EDA tools. However, current methods often explore the extensive design space with significant model errors while neglecting design constraints, which are critical for practical implementations. To address these limitations, we propose a Self-Review Bayesian Optimization method (SRBO). This method integrates a teacher-student paradigm within a local Bayesian optimization framework to reduce model errors and enhance exploration efficiency. Additionally, it employs deep ensembles for effective constraint handling. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods within a limited time budget, significantly enhancing exploration efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 可参数化和可综合的RISC-V处理器可以通过EDA工具自动生成定制的CPU内核。然而，当前的方法经常探索具有重大模型误差的广泛设计空间，而忽略设计约束，这对于实际实现至关重要。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种自我审查贝叶斯优化方法（SRBO）。该方法将师生范式集成到局部贝叶斯优化框架中，以减少模型错误并提高探索效率。此外，它还采用深度集成来进行有效的约束处理。实验结果表明，我们的方法在有限的时间预算内优于最先进的方法，显着提高了勘探效率。

papers.title: Lookup Table-based Multiplication-free All-digital DNN Accelerator Featuring Self-Synchronous Pipeline Accumulation.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely applied in our society, yet reducing power consumption due to large-scale matrix computations remains a critical challenge. MADDNESS is a known approach to improving energy efficiency by substituting matrix multiplication with table lookup operations. Previous research has employed large analog computing circuits to convert inputs into LUT addresses, which presents challenges to area efficiency and computational accuracy. This paper proposes a novel MADDNESS-based all-digital accelerator featuring a self-synchronous pipeline accumulator, resulting in a compact, energy-efficient, and PVT-invariant computation. Post-layout simulation using a commercial 22nm process showed that 2.5 × higher energy efficiency (174 TOPS/W) and 5× higher area efficiency (2.01 TOPS/mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>) can be achieved compared to the conventional accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已在我们的社会中广泛应用，但降低大规模矩阵计算带来的功耗仍然是一个严峻的挑战。 MADDNESS 是一种通过用查表操作代替矩阵乘法来提高能源效率的已知方法。先前的研究采用大型模拟计算电路将输入转换为 LUT 地址，这对面积效率和计算精度提出了挑战。本文提出了一种新型的基于 MADDNESS 的全数字加速器，具有自同步流水线累加器，从而实现紧凑、节能和 PVT 不变的计算。使用商用 22nm 工艺进行的布局后仿真表明，与传统工艺相比，可以实现 2.5 倍高的能源效率 (174 TOPS/W) 和 5 倍高的面积效率 (2.01 TOPS/mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>)加速器。

papers.title: LVM-MO: A Large Vision Model Pioneer on Full-Chip Mask Optimization.
papers.abstract: Moving toward the post-Moore era, full-chip mask optimization (MO) has become a pivotal step for semiconductor designers and manufacturers in extending current resolution enhancement techniques. The majority of recent research efforts have focused on clip-level restoration, employing a divide-and-conquer approach to mitigate the impacts of optical proximity and process bias across entire chips. Nevertheless, when confronted with industrial full-chip mask optimization challenges, these works exhibit limited correction capabilities, struggle with generalization, and are time-inefficient. In this paper, we propose a novel full-chip mask optimization paradigm based on a massive lithography data-driven large vision model. Our approach features a foundation layout feature extractor, which is aware of the mutual influence of polygons in long-range pattern perception as well as optical physics and chemical characteristics of lithography, matters. Compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) works, our work demonstrates significant advantages in terms of resolution fidelity, correction speed, and the ability to handle full-chip scale layouts.
papers.abstract_zh: 迈向后摩尔时代，全芯片掩模优化（MO）已成为半导体设计人员和制造商扩展当前分辨率增强技术的关键一步。最近的大多数研究工作都集中在剪辑级恢复上，采用分而治之的方法来减轻整个芯片上光学邻近度和工艺偏差的影响。然而，当面临工业全芯片掩模优化挑战时，这些工作表现出有限的校正能力，难以泛化，并且时间效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于海量光刻数据驱动的大视觉模型的新型全芯片掩模优化范例。我们的方法具有基础布局特征提取器，它能够意识到多边形在远程图案感知中的相互影响以及光刻的光学物理和化学特性。与最先进的（SOTA）工作相比，我们的工作在分辨率保真度、校正速度和处理全芯片规模布局的能力方面表现出显着的优势。

papers.title: Machine Learning-Driven STL Generation for Enhancing Functional Safety of E/E Systems.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of safety-critical hardware systems demands advanced methods for ensuring functional safety (FuSa). Traditional techniques like ATPG and BIST are intrusive, requiring additional hardware and disrupting operations, making them unsuitable for in-field testing. To address this, for the first time, we propose a machine learning (ML)-driven automated Self-Test Library (STL) generation for seamless in-field testing during idle periods, ensuring uninterrupted fault detection and high system performance. Utilizing reinforcement learning, the STL generates design-specific test patterns, achieving up to $57.57 \%$ improvement in fault coverage and up to $85 \%$ efficiency compared to existing pattern-based testing, enhancing FuSa in mission-critical applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全关键硬件系统日益复杂，需要先进的方法来确保功能安全 (FuSa)。 ATPG 和 BIST 等传统技术具有侵入性，需要额外的硬件并会中断操作，因此不适合现场测试。为了解决这个问题，我们首次提出了一种由机器学习 (ML) 驱动的自动自检库 (STL) 生成方法，可在空闲期间进行无缝现场测试，确保不间断的故障检测和高系统性能。利用强化学习，STL 生成特定于设计的测试模式，与现有基于模式的测试相比，故障覆盖率提高高达 $57.57 \%$，效率高达 $85 \%$，从而增强了任务关键型应用中的 FuSa。

papers.title: MAGE: A Multi-Agent Engine for Automated RTL Code Generation.
papers.abstract: The automatic generation of RTL code (e.g., Verilog) through natural language instructions has emerged as a promising direction with the advancement of large language models (LLMs). However, producing RTL code that is both syntactically and functionally correct remains a significant challenge. Existing single-LLM-agent approaches face substantial limitations because they must navigate between various programming languages and handle intricate generation, verification, and modification tasks. To address these challenges, this paper introduces MAGE, the first open-source<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> multi-agent AI system designed for robust and accurate Verilog RTL code generation. We propose a novel high-temperature RTL candidate sampling and debugging system that effectively explores the space of code candidates and significantly improves the quality of the candidates. Furthermore, we design a novel Verilog-state checkpoint checking mechanism that enables early detection of functional errors and delivers precise feedback for targeted fixes, significantly enhancing the functional correctness of the generated RTL code. MAGE achieves a 95.7% rate of syntactic and functional correctness code generation on VerilogEval-Human v2 benchmark, surpassing the state-of-the-art Claude-3.5-sonnet by 23.3%, demonstrating a robust and reliable approach for AIdriven RTL design workflows.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>MAGE is open-sourced at https://github.com/stable-lab/ MAGE-A-Multi-Agent-Engine-for-Automated-RTL-Code-Generation
papers.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的进步，通过自然语言指令自动生成 RTL 代码（例如 Verilog）已成为一个有前途的方向。然而，生成语法和功能正确的 RTL 代码仍然是一个重大挑战。现有的单 LLM 代理方法面临很大的限制，因为它们必须在各种编程语言之间导航并处理复杂的生成、验证和修改任务。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 MAGE，这是第一个开源<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 多代理 AI 系统，专为稳健且准确的 Verilog RTL 代码生成而设计。我们提出了一种新颖的高温 RTL 候选采样和调试系统，可以有效地探索代码候选空间并显着提高候选代码的质量。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的 Verilog 状态检查点检查机制，能够及早检测功能错误并为有针对性的修复提供精确的反馈，从而显着增强生成的 RTL 代码的功能正确性。 MAGE 在 VerilogEval-Human v2 基准上实现了 95.7% 的语法和功能正确性代码生成率，比最先进的 Claude-3.5-sonnet 提高了 23.3%，展示了 AI 驱动的 RTL 设计工作流程的稳健可靠的方法。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>MAGE 在 https://github.com/stable-lab/MAGE-A-Multi-Agent-Engine-for-Automated-RTL-Code-Generation 上开源

papers.title: MambaOPU: An FPGA Overlay Processor for State-space-duality-based Mamba Models.
papers.abstract: State-space models (SSMs), such as Mamba, have emerged as a promising alternative to Transformers. However, the recently developed Mamba2, based on state space duality (SSD), is highly memorybound and suffers from limited computation efficiency. This inefficiency arises from its irregular broadcast element-wise multiplications and structured sparse computations. In this work, we propose MambaOPU, an FPGA overlay processor, to accelerate SSD. First, to reduce memory overhead, we introduce a software-hardware co-optimized operator fusion framework. Specifically, operator merging combines adjacent broadcast multiplication and summation operations into a single descriptor, while operator backward shifting embeds segment multiplication into subsequent operations. Both techniques shorten the computation path and improve computation efficiency. Second, to enhance sparse computation efficiency, we skip zero-region computations using a tensor-reorder-and-group algorithm combined with a sparse-predefined data fetcher. Additionally, since Mamba integrates linear operations with SSD, we develop a reconfigurable systolic array to improve data reuse across different computation modes. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that MambaOPU achieves up to $1812 \times$ and $880.79 \times$ higher normalized throughput and up to $12908 \times$ and $24.27 \times$ higher energy efficiency over Intel Xeon Gold 6348 CPU and NVIDIA A100 GPU, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 状态空间模型 (SSM)，例如 Mamba，已成为 Transformer 的有前途的替代品。然而，最近开发的基于状态空间对偶性（SSD）的 Mamba2 受到高度内存限制，并且计算效率有限。这种低效率源于其不规则的广播逐元素乘法和结构化稀疏计算。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MambaOPU（一种 FPGA 叠加处理器）来加速 SSD。首先，为了减少内存开销，我们引入了软件-硬件协同优化的算子融合框架。具体来说，运算符合并将相邻的广播乘法和求和运算合并到单个描述符中，而运算符向后移位将段乘法嵌入到后续运算中。这两种技术都缩短了计算路径并提高了计算效率。其次，为了提高稀疏计算效率，我们使用张量重新排序和分组算法与稀疏预定义数据获取器相结合来跳过零区域计算。此外，由于 Mamba 将线性运算与 SSD 集成，我们开发了可重新配置的脉动阵列，以提高不同计算模式之间的数据重用。大量实验结果表明，与 Intel Xeon Gold 6348 CPU 和 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，MambaOPU 的归一化吞吐量分别提高了 1812 美元和 880.79 美元，能源效率分别提高了 12908 美元和 24.27 美元。

papers.title: MARIO: A Superadditive Multi-Algorithm Interworking Optimization Framework for Analog Circuit Sizing.
papers.abstract: Numeric optimization methods are widely utilized to tackle complex analog circuit sizing problems, where the challenges include expensive simulations, non-linearity, and high parameter dimensionality. However, the diverse characteristics exhibited by different circuits result in varied optimization landscapes, making it difficult to identify a single algorithm that consistently outperforms others across all problems. In this paper, we introduce a multi-algorithm interworking optimization framework, which achieves optimization superadditivity based on a pool of member algorithms and a powerful algorithm-interworking protocol. We propose a computing resource reallocation method, which employs multitask Gaussian process regression and portfolio optimization techniques, leading to flexible and prudent online adaption of member algorithms. To efficiently utilize the computing resources for local exploitation, an evaluation data broadcast strategy enables cooperativeness across member algorithms. Besides, algorithms with different modeling overheads are integrated time-adaptively via an asynchronous parallelization mechanism. Comparative experiments against state-of-the-art algorithmcombining tools and optimization algorithms demonstrate the superiority of the proposed optimization framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 数值优化方法被广泛用于解决复杂的模拟电路尺寸问题，其中的挑战包括昂贵的模拟、非线性和高参数维数。然而，不同电路表现出的不同特征导致了不同的优化环境，因此很难确定在所有问题上始终优于其他算法的单一算法。在本文中，我们介绍了一种多算法互通优化框架，该框架基于成员算法池和强大的算法互通协议实现了优化超可加性。我们提出了一种计算资源重新分配方法，该方法采用多任务高斯过程回归和投资组合优化技术，从而实现成员算法灵活谨慎的在线适应。为了有效地利用计算资源进行本地开发，评估数据广播策略可以实现成员算法之间的协作。此外，具有不同建模开销的算法通过异步并行机制进行时间自适应集成。与最先进的算法结合工具和优化算法的比较实验证明了所提出的优化框架的优越性。

papers.title: MAS-ISP: A Proxy-Free Online Hyperparameter Optimization Framework for ISP Hardware System.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of visual autonomous systems, especially in autonomous driving, underscores the critical role of Image Signal Processors (ISPs) as they convert RAW sensor data into RGB images suited for visual interpretation. Traditional ISPs rely on tuning hyperparameters to adapt to varying imaging conditions; however, the vast parameter space and intricate tuning process pose significant challenges for realtime autonomous applications. Existing autonomous ISP hyperparameter optimization methods rely largely on offline or proxybased online tuning, limiting their accuracy and responsiveness to real-time environmental changes. In response, we propose an online ISP hyperparameter optimization framework based on Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), marking the first proxyfree, real-time optimization approach. Our design exhibits a master-slave Multi-Agent System (MAS), enabling rapid and cooperative parameter optimization with improved inter-frame consistency. Furthermore, we design the MAS-ISP automated visual system, incorporating innovative hardware designs such as Strip Convolution Kernel and Stride-Aware Dual-Buffer Memory, which drastically reduce resource consumption in CNN hardware. MAS-ISP achieves 1080P@75FPS/240FPS on FPGA/ASIC platforms, supporting real-time and reliable visual systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉自主系统的快速发展，尤其是在自动驾驶领域，凸显了图像信号处理器 (ISP) 的关键作用，因为它们将原始传感器数据转换为适合视觉解释的 RGB 图像。传统的 ISP 依靠调整超参数来适应不同的成像条件；然而，巨大的参数空间和复杂的调整过程给实时自主应用带来了重大挑战。现有的自主 ISP 超参数优化方法很大程度上依赖于离线或基于代理的在线调整，限制了其准确性和对实时环境变化的响应能力。为此，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的在线 ISP 超参数优化框架，这标志着第一个无代理的实时优化方法。我们的设计展示了主从多代理系统（MAS），可实现快速、协作的参数优化，并提高帧间一致性。此外，我们设计了MAS-ISP自动化视觉系统，结合了Strip Convolution Kernel和Stride-Aware Dual-Buffer Memory等创新硬件设计，大大减少了CNN硬件的资源消耗。 MAS-ISP在FPGA/ASIC平台上实现1080P@75FPS/240FPS，支持实时可靠的视觉系统。

papers.title: Maximizing Energy Efficiency in Spiking Neural Networks: A Dynamic Joint Pruning Framework.
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) face increasing challenges for efficient deployment as architectures grow in complexity, necessitating network pruning to improve energy and computational efficiency. Existing pruning methods primarily focus on a single form of sparsity, overlooking the importance of joint pruning, which is critical for minimizing synaptic operations (SOPs) and enhancing energy efficiency. This paper presents a novel dynamic joint pruning framework that leverages both spatiotemporal spike sparsity and weight sparsity to minimize SOPs in SNN inference. Based on a comprehensive analysis of the SOPs model, we introduce an integrated solution that combines a multi-stage masking mechanism for fine-grained neuron firing threshold control, a temporal attention batch normalization (TABN) module with learnable time scaling factors, and a dynamic sparse strategy that adjusts importance coefficients based on real-time computational impact. Experimental results on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet validate the effectiveness of proposed framework. Our method achieves up to $126.38 \times$ compression ratio of SOPs on CIFAR-10 with minimal accuracy loss, establishing a new state-of-the-art in energy-efficient SNN pruning.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着架构变得越来越复杂，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 面临着越来越多的高效部署挑战，需要进行网络修剪以提高能源和计算效率。现有的剪枝方法主要关注单一形式的稀疏性，忽视了联合剪枝的重要性，而联合剪枝对于最小化突触操作（SOP）和提高能量效率至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的动态联合剪枝框架，该框架利用时空尖峰稀疏性和权重稀疏性来最小化 SNN 推理中的 SOP。基于对SOP模型的全面分析，我们引入了一种集成解决方案，该解决方案结合了用于细粒度神经元放电阈值控制的多级掩蔽机制、具有可学习时间缩放因子的时间注意批量归一化（TABN）模块以及基于实时计算影响调整重要性系数的动态稀疏策略。 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验结果验证了所提出框架的有效性。我们的方法在 CIFAR-10 上实现了高达 $126.38 \times$ 的 SOP 压缩比，同时精度损失最小，在节能 SNN 剪枝方面建立了新的最先进技术。

papers.title: McPAL: Scaling Unstructured Sparse Inference with Multi-Chiplet HBM-PIM Architecture for LLMs.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have gained significant attention recently. However, executing LLM is memory-bound due to the extensive memory accesses. Process-in-memory (PIM) emerges as an energy-efficient solution for LLMs, delivering high memory bandwidth and compute parallelism. Nevertheless, the trend towards larger LLMs introduces escalating memory footprint challenges for monolithic PIM chips. This paper proposes McPAL, which tackles this challenge by emphasizing unstructured sparse compute within PIM and hierarchical multi-chiplet scaling. McPAL decomposes arbitrary sparse weight matrix into multiple irregular sparse vectors. The non-skipped computations in each vector are then routed via an in-memory butterfly network to the standard PIM array, enhancing the PIM utilization. In addition, we scale McPAL vertically by strategically organizing the 3D-HBM hierarchy to minimize the internal long-distance data travel. Meanwhile, a 2.5D IO chiplet scales McPAL horizontally, reducing die-to-die (D2D) data transfer and ensuring sparse workload balance. We conducted extensive experiments from Llama-7B to Llama-70B. The results show that McPAL achieves $1.57 \times$ to $3.12 \times$ speedup and $10.43 \times$ to $35.66 \times$ energy efficiency over Nvidia A100 GPU. Compared to SOTAs, McPAL also achieves $1.08 \times$ to $2.15 \times$ speedup and $1.65 \times$ to $5.14 \times$ energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）最近引起了极大的关注。然而，由于大量的内存访问，执行 LLM 是受内存限制的。内存中进程 (PIM) 作为法学硕士的节能解决方案而出现，可提供高内存带宽和计算并行性。然而，LLM 规模增大的趋势给单片 PIM 芯片带来了不断升级的内存占用挑战。本文提出了 McPAL，它通过强调 PIM 内的非结构化稀疏计算和分层多芯片扩展来应对这一挑战。 McPAL 将任意稀疏权重矩阵分解为多个不规则稀疏向量。然后，每个向量中的非跳过计算通过内存中蝶形网络路由到标准 PIM 阵列，从而提高 PIM 利用率。此外，我们通过战略性地组织 3D-HBM 层次结构来垂直扩展 McPAL，以最大程度地减少内部长距离数据传输。同时，2.5D IO 小芯片可水平扩展 McPAL，减少芯片间 (D2D) 数据传输并确保稀疏工作负载平衡。我们进行了从 Llama-7B 到 Llama-70B 的广泛实验。结果表明，与 Nvidia A100 GPU 相比，McPAL 实现了 1.57 美元到 3.12 美元的加速和 10.43 美元到 35.66 美元的能源效率。与 SOTA 相比，McPAL 还实现了 1.08 美元到 2.15 美元的加速和 1.65 美元到 5.14 美元的能源效率。

papers.title: Me-MPK: Accelerating Krylov Subspace Solvers via Memory-efficient Matrix-Power Kernel.
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on optimizing the Matrix-Power Kernel (MPK), which relies on a series of Sparse Matrix-Vector multiplications (SpMVs) using the same sparse matrix. MPK is a crucial component of Krylov subspace methods for solving large sparse linear systems in various fields, including circuit simulations. MPK offers a potential for matrix reuse in cache, which can accelerate memory-bound sparse solvers. Additionally, many sparse matrices encountered in applications are symmetric, allowing us to reduce the memory footprint for SpMVs by half. However, reusing the matrix introduces data dependencies between subsequent SpMVs, and symmetric SpMVs can result in data conflicts during shared-memory parallelization. Previous research has often focused on either matrix reuse or symmetry, failing to leverage both aspects effectively. This paper proposes a unified, memory-efficient approach called Me-MPK that takes advantage of both cache reuse and matrix symmetry for MPK on shared-memory multi-core systems. We first introduce a unified dependency graph for a sparse matrix, which represents all potential data dependencies and conflicts. Next, we perform architecture-aware recursive partitioning on this graph to create subgraphs and formulate a separating subgraph that decouples all dependencies and conflicts among the subgraphs. These independent subgraphs are then scheduled for parallel execution of SpMV or symmetric SpMV in a specified order to optimize cache reuse. We apply Me-MPK in two s-Step Krylov subspace solvers, and our evaluations show that Me-MPK significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art solutions, delivering an average speedup of up to 2.00X and 1.86X on X86 and ARM CPUs, respectively. As a result, we achieve overall speedup in the sparse solvers of up to $\mathbf{1. 6 5 X}$ and $\mathbf{1. 5 8 X}$.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文重点关注优化矩阵幂核 (MPK)，该核依赖于使用相同稀疏矩阵的一系列稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV)。 MPK 是 Krylov 子空间方法的重要组成部分，用于求解各个领域（包括电路仿真）中的大型稀疏线性系统。 MPK 提供了缓存中矩阵重用的潜力，这可以加速内存限制的稀疏求解器。此外，应用程序中遇到的许多稀疏矩阵都是对称的，这使我们能够将 SpMV 的内存占用量减少一半。然而，重用矩阵会引入后续 SpMV 之间的数据依赖性，并且对称 SpMV 可能会导致共享内存并行化期间的数据冲突。以前的研究通常集中在矩阵重用或对称性上，未能有效地利用这两个方面。本文提出了一种称为 Me-MPK 的统一、内存高效方法，该方法利用共享内存多核系统上 MPK 的缓存重用和矩阵对称性。我们首先引入稀疏矩阵的统一依赖图，它表示所有潜在的数据依赖关系和冲突。接下来，我们对该图执行架构感知递归分区以创建子图并制定一个分离子图，以解耦子图之间的所有依赖关系和冲突。然后将这些独立的子图安排为按指定顺序并行执行 SpMV 或对称 SpMV，以优化缓存重用。我们在两个 s-Step Krylov 子空间求解器中应用 Me-MPK，我们的评估表明 Me-MPK 显着优于当前最先进的解决方案，在 X86 和 ARM CPU 上分别实现高达 2.00 倍和 1.86 倍的平均加速。因此，我们在稀疏求解器中实现了高达 $\mathbf{1 的整体加速。 6 5 X}$ 和 $\mathbf{1. 5 8 X}$。

papers.title: Measurement-based uncomputation of quantum circuits for modular arithmetic.
papers.abstract: Measurement-based uncomputation (MBU) is a technique used to perform probabilistic uncomputation of quantum circuits. We formalize this technique for the case of single-qubit registers, and we show applications to modular arithmetic. Using MBU, we reduce Toffoli count and depth by 10% to 15% for modular adders based on the architecture of [1], and by almost 25% for modular adders based on the architecture of [2]. Our results have the potential to improve other circuits for modular arithmetic, such as modular multiplication and modular exponentiation, and can find applications in quantum cryptanalysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于测量的未计算（MBU）是一种用于执行量子电路概率未计算的技术。我们针对单量子位寄存器的情况形式化了这种技术，并展示了在模块化算术中的应用。使用 MBU，我们将基于 [1] 架构的模块化加法器的 Toffoli 数量和深度减少了 10% 到 15%，并且将基于 [2] 架构的模块化加法器的 Toffoli 数量和深度减少了近 25%。我们的结果有可能改进其他模运算电路，例如模乘和模幂，并且可以在量子密码分析中找到应用。

papers.title: MEEK: Re-thinking Heterogeneous Parallel Error Detection Architecture for Real-World OoO Superscalar Processors.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous parallel error detection is an approach to achieving fault-tolerant processors, leveraging multiple power-efficient cores to re-execute software originally run on a high-performance core. Yet, its complex components, gathering data cross-chip from many parts of the core, raise questions of how to build it into commodity cores without heavy design invasion and extensive re-engineering. We build the first full-RTL design, MEEK, into an open-source SoC, from microarchitecture and ISA to the OS and programming model. We identify and solve bottlenecks and bugs overlooked in previous work, and demonstrate that MEEK offers microsecond-level detection capacity with affordable overheads. By trading off architectural functionalities across codesigned hardware-software layers, MEEK features only light changes to a mature out-of-order superscalar core, simple coordinating software layers, and a few lines of operating-system code. The Repo. of MEEK’s source code: https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduce-MEEK-DAC-25
papers.abstract_zh: 异构并行错误检测是一种实现容错处理器的方法，利用多个节能内核重新执行最初在高性能内核上运行的软件。然而，其复杂的组件从核心的许多部分收集跨芯片的数据，引发了如何将其构建到商品核心中而不需要大量设计入侵和广泛的重新设计的问题。我们将第一个完整的 RTL 设计 MEEK 构建到开源 SoC 中，从微架构和 ISA 到操作系统和编程模型。我们识别并解决了之前工作中忽视的瓶颈和错误，并证明 MEEK 以可承受的开销提供微秒级的检测能力。通过跨协同设计的硬件-软件层权衡架构功能，MEEK 仅对成熟的无序超标量核心、简单的协调软件层和几行操作系统代码进行了少量更改。回购协议。 MEEK 源代码：https://github.com/SEU-ACAL/reproduct-MEEK-DAC-25

papers.title: Megabits Down to Kilobits: Memory-Efficient Time-Aware Shaping for TSN.
papers.abstract: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) provides bounded latency and low jitter for cyber-physical systems, such as industrial control. As a key component of TSN, the Time-Aware Shaper (TAS) applies gate control rules to control the transmission time of frames in critical flows. TAS stores the gate control rules for each frame in the gate control table. However, in typical industrial setups, the memory usage of the table could reach over tens of megabits and even exceed the total memory capacity of TSN switches.To address this issue, we propose a memory-efficient TAS design named METAS. It transitions from a per-frame to a per-flow approach. METAS stores one persistent rule for a flow and dynamically generates a temporary rule for a frame only when the frame arrives. We prototyped METAS on an FPGA, and experimental results show that METAS reduces memory usage from 14.34 Mbits to 288 Kbits when supporting 1,024 flows, using just 1.56% of the FPGA’s logic resources while maintaining microsecondlevel latency and nanosecond-level jitter for critical flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 时间敏感网络 (TSN) 为网络物理系统（例如工业控制）提供有限的延迟和低抖动。作为 TSN 的关键组件，时间感知整形器 (TAS) 应用门控规则来控制关键流中帧的传输时间。 TAS在门控表中存储每个帧的门控规则。然而，在典型的工业设置中，表的内存使用量可能会达到数十兆位，甚至超过 TSN 交换机的总内存容量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 METAS 的内存高效 TAS 设计。它从每帧方法过渡到每流方法。 METAS 为流存储一条持久规则，并仅在帧到达时动态为该帧生成临时规则。我们在 FPGA 上进行了 METAS 原型设计，实验结果表明，当支持 1,024 个流时，METAS 将内存使用量从 14.34 Mbits 减少到 288 Kbits，仅使用 1.56% 的 FPGA 逻辑资源，同时保持关键流的微秒级延迟和纳秒级抖动。

papers.title: MemSeer: Leverage Memory Failure Distinctions and Multi-Grained Prediction in Ultra-Scale Heterogeneous X86/ARM Clusters.
papers.abstract: In high-performance ultra-scale cloud computing, heterogeneous clusters consisting of x86 and ARM architecture platforms have become increasingly common to boost performance and energy efficiency. Ensuring high availability in these environments is crucial for meeting service-level agreements. However, DRAM failures, a primary cause of server downtimes, present significant challenges to reliability, availability, and serviceability. This paper provides an in-depth analysis of memory failure characteristics across cross-architecture platforms in large-scale heterogeneous clusters. We introduce MemSeer, an AIOps-integrated tool that utilizes a multi-grained memory failure prediction approach for x86/ARM heterogeneous clusters. MemSeer improves the F1-score by 17.3% and increases recall by an average of $27 \%$ across different lead times compared to state-of-the-art methods. These advancements show great promise in reducing memory failures in cluster environments, decreasing VM interruptions by up to 42.7% and averaging 24.2% in real-world implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 在高性能超大规模云计算中，由x86和ARM架构平台组成的异构集群越来越普遍，以提高性能和能源效率。确保这些环境中的高可用性对于满足服务级别协议至关重要。然而，DRAM 故障是服务器停机的主要原因，对可靠性、可用性和可维护性提出了重大挑战。本文深入分析了大规模异构集群中跨架构平台的内存故障特征。我们推出 MemSeer，这是一款 AIOps 集成工具，它利用 x86/ARM 异构集群的多粒度内存故障预测方法。与最先进的方法相比，MemSeer 在不同的交付周期内将 F1 分数提高了 17.3%，召回率平均提高了 27 $%$。这些进步在减少集群环境中的内存故障方面展现了巨大的前景，将虚拟机中断减少高达 42.7%，在实际实施中平均减少 24.2%。

papers.title: MemSens: Significantly Reducing Memory Overhead in Adjoint Sensitivity Analysis Using Novel Error-Bounded Lossy Compression.
papers.abstract: Adjoint sensitivity analysis is an exceptionally efficient method for computing the gradient of an objective function with respect to given parameters, playing a crucial role in modern circuit design and verification. According to the principles of the adjoint method, it is necessary to store all essential system state information, such as state vectors and Jacobian matrices, at each time step during the forward integration process in order to construct the adjoint equations during the backward integration. Therefore, the memory overhead of the adjoint method is proportional to the system size and the number of time steps, resulting in prohibitive memory costs for solving large-scale dynamic systems.In this paper, we propose a novel, memory-efficient adjoint sensitivity analysis method that significantly reduces the memory overhead of storing system state information by employing error-bounded lossy compression techniques. Our compression algorithm effectively utilizes the spatiotemporal characteristics of data in circuit simulations and incorporates stringent error control mechanisms. This approach achieves a two-order-ofmagnitude reduction in memory overhead during simulation while ensuring that the accuracy of the adjoint solution remains unaffected.
papers.abstract_zh: 伴随灵敏度分析是一种非常有效的方法，用于计算目标函数相对于给定参数的梯度，在现代电路设计和验证中发挥着至关重要的作用。根据伴随方法的原理，需要在前向积分过程中的每个时间步存储所有必要的系统状态信息，例如状态向量和雅可比矩阵，以便在后向积分过程中构造伴随方程。因此，伴随方法的内存开销与系统规模和时间步数成正比，导致求解大规模动态系统的内存成本过高。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的、内存高效的伴随灵敏度分析方法，该方法通过采用误差有界有损压缩技术显着降低了存储系统状态信息的内存开销。我们的压缩算法有效地利用了电路仿真中数据的时空特性，并结合了严格的错误控制机制。这种方法在模拟过程中将内存开销减少了两个数量级，同时确保伴随解的准确性不受影响。

papers.title: MetaDSE: A Few-shot Meta-learning Framework for Cross-workload CPU Design Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: Cross-workload design space exploration (DSE) is crucial in CPU architecture design. Existing DSE methods typically employ the transfer learning technique to leverage knowledge from source workloads, aiming to minimize the requirement of target workload simulation. However, these methods struggle with overfitting, data ambiguity, and workload dissimilarity. To address these challenges, we reframe the cross-workload CPU DSE task as a few-shot meta-learning problem and further introduce MetaDSE. By leveraging model agnostic meta-learning, MetaDSE swiftly adapts to new target workloads, greatly enhancing the efficiency of cross-workload CPU DSE. Additionally, MetaDSE introduces a novel knowledge transfer method called the workload-adaptive architectural mask algorithm, which uncovers the inherent properties of the architecture. Experiments on SPEC CPU 2017 demonstrate that MetaDSE significantly reduces prediction error by 44.3% compared to the state-of-theart. MetaDSE is open-sourced and available at this anonymous GitHub.
papers.abstract_zh: 跨工作负载设计空间探索 (DSE) 在 CPU 架构设计中至关重要。现有的 DSE 方法通常采用迁移学习技术来利用源工作负载中的知识，旨在最大限度地减少目标工作负载模拟的要求。然而，这些方法都面临着过度拟合、数据模糊和工作负载差异的问题。 To address these challenges, we reframe the cross-workload CPU DSE task as a few-shot meta-learning problem and further introduce MetaDSE.通过利用与模型无关的元学习，MetaDSE 可以快速适应新的目标工作负载，从而大大提高跨工作负载 CPU DSE 的效率。此外，MetaDSE 引入了一种称为工作负载自适应架构掩码算法的新颖知识转移方法，该方法揭示了架构的固有属性。 SPEC CPU 2017 上的实验表明，与最新技术相比，MetaDSE 显着降低了 44.3% 的预测误差。 MetaDSE 是开源的，可以在这个匿名 GitHub 上获取。

papers.title: MHDiff: Memory- and Hardware-Efficient Diffusion Acceleration via Focal Pixel Aware Quantization.
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have demonstrated superior performance in image generation tasks, thus becoming the mainstream model for generative visual tasks. Diffusion models need to execute multiple timesteps sequentially, resulting in a dramatic increase in workload. Existing accelerators leverage the data similarity between adjacent timesteps and perform mixed-precision differential quantization to accelerate diffusion models. However, merging differential values with raw inputs in each layer of each timestep to ensure computational correctness requires significant memory access for loading raw inputs, which creates a heavy memory burden. Moreover, mixed-precision computations may lead to low hardware utilization if not well designed. Unlike these works, we propose MHDiff, a tailored framework that identifies the focal pixels at the first layer and finetunes them to fit all layers, then represents focal pixels with high-precision while using low-precision for others, thereby accelerating diffusion models while minimizing memory burden. To improve hardware utilization, MHDiff employs a packing module that merges low-precision values into high-precision values to create full high-precision matrices and designs a processing element (PE) array to efficiently process the packed matrices. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that MHDiff can achieve satisfactory performance with negligible quality loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩散模型在图像生成任务中表现出了优越的性能，从而成为生成视觉任务的主流模型。扩散模型需要顺序执行多个时间步，导致工作量急剧增加。现有的加速器利用相邻时间步之间的数据相似性并执行混合精度差分量化来加速扩散模型。然而，将每个时间步的每一层中的差分值与原始输入合并以确保计算正确性需要大量的内存访问来加载原始输入，这会造成沉重的内存负担。此外，如果设计不当，混合精度计算可能会导致硬件利用率低。与这些工作不同的是，我们提出了 MHDiff，这是一个定制的框架，可以识别第一层的焦点像素并对其进行微调以适应所有层，然后以高精度表示焦点像素，同时对其他层使用低精度，从而加速扩散模型，同时最大限度地减少内存负担。为了提高硬件利用率，MHDiff 采用打包模块，将低精度值合并为高精度值，以创建完整的高精度矩阵，并设计处理元素 (PE) 阵列来高效处理打包矩阵。大量的实验结果表明，MHDiff 可以在质量损失可忽略不计的情况下实现令人满意的性能。

papers.title: MIA-aware FinFlex Cell Legalization with Power-Driven Cell Version Substitution.
papers.abstract: FinFlex standard cells have been proposed in sub-3 nm process nodes by TSMC to offer great design flexibility and a good trade-off between performance, power, and area efficiency. In the FinFlex technology, each cell type has a number of versions, varying in cell heights and threshold voltages, enabling flexible cell substitution for placement optimization. This paper presents the first work in the literature on standard cell legalization for the FinFlex technology, addressing cell version substitution, power efficiency, and minimum implant area (MIA) constraints. Our proposed algorithm comprises three stages: intra-row violationaware pre-processing considering timing and power levels, directed acyclic graph-based initial legalization with cell version substitution, and dynamic programming-based inter-row violation removal. Experimental results show the superior performance of our approach over a baseline using state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: TSMC 在 3 nm 以下工艺节点中提出了 FinFlex 标准单元，以提供极大的设计灵活性以及性能、功耗和面积效率之间的良好权衡。在 FinFlex 技术中，每种单元类型都有多个版本，单元高度和阈值电压各不相同，从而可以灵活地替换单元以实现布局优化。本文介绍了 FinFlex 技术标准单元合法化文献中的第一项工作，解决了单元版本替换、功率效率和最小植入面积 (MIA) 限制的问题。我们提出的算法包括三个阶段：考虑时序和功率级别的行内违规感知预处理、具有单元版本替换的基于有向非循环图的初始合法化以及基于动态编程的行间违规去除。实验结果表明，我们的方法比使用最先进技术的基线具有优越的性能。

papers.title: MILLION: MasterIng Long-Context LLM Inference Via Outlier-Immunized KV Product QuaNtization.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized for complex tasks requiring longer context lengths, with some models supporting up to 128 K or 1 M tokens. This trend, however, presents significant challenges in inference speed and memory management. The primary bottleneck in long-context LLM inference is the quadratic computational complexity of attention mechanisms, causing substantial slowdowns as sequence length increases. KV cache mechanism alleviates this issue by storing pre-computed data, but introduces memory requirements that scale linearly with context length, hindering efficient LLM deployment. Quantization emerges as a promising approach to address the widening gap between LLM size and memory capacity. However, traditional quantization schemes often yield suboptimal compression results for KV caches due to two key factors: i) On-the-fly quantization and de-quantization, causing significant performance overhead; ii) Prevalence of outliers in KV values, challenging low-bitwidth uniform quantization. To this end, we propose MILLION, a novel quantization framework achieving low-bitwidth KV cache through product quantization. First, we conduct a thorough analysis of KV cache distribution, revealing the limitations of existing quantization schemes. Second, we introduce a non-uniform quantization algorithm based on product quantization, which efficiently compresses data while preserving accuracy. Third, we develop a high-performance GPU inference framework with efficient attention kernel and pipeline design for MILLION that leverages sparse computation and asynchronous quantization, significantly enhancing inference speed. Comprehensive evaluation results demonstrate that MILLION can achieve 4 bits quantization with trivial perplexity and accuracy loss, and achieve 2.09 x end-to-end performance gains at 32 K context length. Code is released at https://github.com/ZongwuWang/MILLION.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地用于需要更长上下文长度的复杂任务，某些模型支持多达 128 K 或 1 M 令牌。然而，这种趋势在推理速度和内存管理方面提出了重大挑战。长上下文 LLM 推理的主要瓶颈是注意力机制的二次计算复杂性，随着序列长度的增加，导致速度大幅减慢。 KV 缓存机制通过存储预先计算的数据缓解了这个问题，但引入了随上下文长度线性扩展的内存需求，阻碍了高效的 LLM 部署。量化成为解决 LLM 大小和内存容量之间不断扩大的差距的一种有前景的方法。然而，由于两个关键因素，传统的量化方案通常会为 KV 缓存产生次优的压缩结果： i) 动态量化和反量化，导致显着的性能开销； ii) KV 值中异常值的普遍存在，对低位宽均匀量化提出了挑战。为此，我们提出了 MILLION，一种新颖的量化框架，通过乘积量化实现低位宽 KV 缓存。首先，我们对 KV 缓存分布进行彻底分析，揭示现有量化方案的局限性。其次，我们引入了一种基于乘积量化的非均匀量化算法，该算法可以在保持准确性的同时有效地压缩数据。第三，我们为 MILLION 开发了一个高性能 GPU 推理框架，具有高效的注意力内核和管道设计，利用稀疏计算和异步量化，显着提高推理速度。综合评估结果表明，MILLION 可以实现 4 位量化，且困惑度和精度损失很小，并在 32 K 上下文长度下实现 2.09 倍的端到端性能增益。代码发布于https://github.com/ZongwuWang/MILLION。

papers.title: MiniWear: Minimizing Flash Wear via Hybrid Persistent Cache for Extended EF-SMR Lifetime.
papers.abstract: As the huge discrepancy between traffic and capacity persists, the lifetime of flash in EF-SMR systems faces a grave issue. EF-SMR systems combine NAND flash with Shingled Magnetic Recording (SMR) disks to achieve both low cost and high performance. However, previous research has primarily focused on issues such as write amplification and tail-latency in EF-SMR disks, overlooking the critical issue of flash lifetime. Studying the durability of EF-SMR systems is essential for developing future high-performance, low-cost storage solutions.This paper presents MiniWear, a hybrid persistent cache (PC) design aimed at extending the lifetime of EF-SMR systems. MiniWear adopts a hybrid medium persistent cache and proposes a customized scheduling strategy to reduce flash wear without impacting the EF-SMR system performance. At the hardware level, the hybrid PC of EF-SMR, composed of flash and SMR disk, is organized into Flash-PC and SMR-PC. At the software level, a fine-grained scheduling strategy is proposed to better manage PC resources. Additionally, we introduce a proactive balancing strategy to address PC resource idleness. Experimental results show that, compared to existing methods, MiniWear can reduce flash wear by up to 66.67%.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于流量和容量之间的巨大差异持续存在，EF-SMR系统中闪存的寿命面临着严重的问题。 EF-SMR 系统将 NAND 闪存与叠瓦式磁​​记录 (SMR) 磁盘相结合，实现低成本和高性能。然而，之前的研究主要集中在EF-SMR磁盘的写放大和尾延迟等问题上，而忽略了闪存寿命的关键问题。研究 EF-SMR 系统的耐用性对于开发未来的高性能、低成本存储解决方案至关重要。本文介绍了 MiniWear，这是一种混合持久性缓存 (PC) 设计，旨在延长 EF-SMR 系统的使用寿命。 MiniWear采用混合介质持久缓存，并提出定制的调度策略，以在不影响EF-SMR系统性能的情况下减少闪存磨损。在硬件层面，EF-SMR的混合PC由闪存和SMR磁盘组成，分为Flash-PC和SMR-PC。在软件层面，提出了细粒度的调度策略，以更好地管理PC资源。此外，我们引入了主动平衡策略来解决 PC 资源闲置问题。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，MiniWear可以减少飞边磨损高达66.67%。

papers.title: MIRACLE: Multimodal Information Retrieval via a Combined In-Memory Processing and Content Addressable Memory Approach.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of information technology has brought multimodal information retrieval into the research spotlight. Neural networks, particularly Transformers, have emerged as the dominant solution for extracting multimodal feature vectors. While neural network acceleration has been extensively explored, the subsequent retrieval stage in multimodal scenarios remains under-optimized. Conventional retrieval approaches, such as cosine similarity sorting on von Neumann architectures, suffer from significant data migration and computational inefficiencies. Hashing methods enhance storage and computation efficiency but encounter challenges in energy-efficient implementation and mitigating accuracy losses due to modal heterogeneity. This paper presents a hybrid architecture that integrates in-memory processing (PIM) and content-addressable memory (CAM) to address these challenges. Transformer-extracted features are processed via in-memory random hashing leveraging device-intrinsic properties, with CAM facilitating parallel search space reduction. A final cosine similarity reranking stage refines the results while balancing accuracy with energy efficiency. Experimental evaluations validate that the proposed method, when compared to the baseline traditional CPU-based cosine similarity retrieval, 1) achieves almost identical level of accuracy, dramatically outperforming other pure CAMbased Hamming distance retrieval approaches; and 2) reduces latency by $9.45 \times$ and energy consumption by $30.20 \times$.
papers.abstract_zh: 信息技术的快速进步使多模态信息检索成为研究热点。神经网络，特别是 Transformer，已成为提取多模态特征向量的主要解决方案。虽然神经网络加速已被广泛探索，但多模态场景中的后续检索阶段仍然没有得到优化。传统的检索方法（例如冯·诺依曼架构上的余弦相似度排序）存在严重的数据迁移和计算效率低下的问题。哈希方法提高了存储和计算效率，但在节能实施和减轻模态异构性造成的精度损失方面遇到了挑战。本文提出了一种集成内存处理（PIM）和内容寻址存储器（CAM）的混合架构来应对这些挑战。 Transformer 提取的特征通过内存中的随机散列处理，利用设备固有的属性，并且 CAM 有助于减少并行搜索空间。最终的余弦相似度重新排序阶段会细化结果，同时平衡准确性和能源效率。实验评估验证了所提出的方法与传统的基于 CPU 的余弦相似性检索的基线相比，1）达到了几乎相同的精度水平，显着优于其他纯基于 CAM 的汉明距离检索方法； 2) 将延迟减少 9.45 美元，能耗减少 30.20 美元。

papers.title: Mitigating Routability Problems in Complementary-FET-based VLSI Designs.
papers.abstract: As semiconductor technology scales beyond 5 nm, complementary FET (CFET) that stacks P-FET and N-FET enables extreme cell area scaling. However, reduced standard cell height with CFET presents routability challenges due to limited back-end-of-line (BEOL) routing resources. In this paper, we address two key routability problems, i.e., pin accessibility and routing congestion, by employing various pin-extended cells on demand. Moreover, we introduce an end-to-end VLSI design framework that further alleviates routing congestion using partial placement blockages. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework eliminates most design rule violations (DRVs) related to routability while maintaining the area advantages of CFET technology.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术扩展到 5 nm 以上，堆叠 P-FET 和 N-FET 的互补 FET (CFET) 可实现极大的单元面积缩放。然而，由于后端 (BEOL) 布线资源有限，使用 CFET 降低标准单元高度会带来布线能力方面的挑战。在本文中，我们通过按需采用各种引脚扩展单元来解决两个关键的可布线性问题，即引脚可访问性和布线拥塞。此外，我们引入了端到端 VLSI 设计框架，该框架使用部分布局阻塞进一步缓解布线拥塞。实验结果表明，我们的框架消除了大多数与可布线性相关的设计规则违规 (DRV)，同时保持了 CFET 技术的面积优势。

papers.title: Mixed Structural Choice Operator: Enhancing Technology Mapping with Heterogeneous Representations.
papers.abstract: The independence of logic optimization and technology mapping poses a significant challenge in achieving high-quality synthesis results. Recent studies have improved optimization outcomes through collaborative optimization of multiple logic representations and have improved structural bias through structural choices. However, these methods still rely on technology-independent optimization and fail to truly resolve structural bias issues. This paper proposes a scalable and efficient framework based on Mixed Structural Choices (MCH). This is a novel heterogeneous mapping method that combines multiple logic representations with technology-aware optimization. MCH flexibly integrates different logic representations and stores candidates for various optimization strategies. By comprehensively evaluating the technology costs of these candidates, it enhances technology mapping and addresses structural bias issues in logic synthesis. Notably, the MCH-based lookup table (LUT) mapping algorithm set new records in the EPFL Best Results Challenge by combining the structural strengths of both And-Inverter Graph (AIG) and XOR-Majority Graph (XMG) logic representations. Additionally, MCH-based ASIC technology mapping achieves a $3.73 \%$ area and $8.94 \%$ delay reduction (balanced), 20.35% delay reduction (delay-oriented), and $\mathbf{2 1. 0 2 \%}$ area reduction (area-oriented), outperforming traditional structural choice methods. Furthermore, MCH-based logic optimization utilizes diverse structures to surpass local optima and achieve better results.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑优化和技术映射的独立性对实现高质量综合结果提出了重大挑战。最近的研究通过多种逻辑表示的协作优化改善了优化结果，并通过结构选择改善了结构偏差。然而，这些方法仍然依赖于技术无关的优化，未能真正解决结构偏差问题。本文提出了一种基于混合结构选择（MCH）的可扩展且高效的框架。这是一种新颖的异构映射方法，它将多种逻辑表示与技术感知优化相结合。 MCH灵活地集成不同的逻辑表示并存储各种优化策略的候选者。通过综合评估这些候选技术的技术成本，它增强了技术映射并解决了逻辑综合中的结构偏差问题。值得注意的是，基于 MCH 的查找表 (LUT) 映射算法通过结合与反转图 (AIG) 和异或多数图 (XMG) 逻辑表示的结构优势，在 EPFL 最佳结果挑战赛中创造了新记录。此外，基于MCH的ASIC技术映射实现了$3.73 \%$面积和$8.94 \%$延迟减少（平衡）、20.35%延迟减少（面向延迟）和$\mathbf{2 1. 0 2 \%}$面积减少（面向面积），优于传统的结构选择方法。此外，基于MCH的逻辑优化利用多种结构来超越局部最优并取得更好的结果。

papers.title: Mixed-Precision Quantization for Deep Vision Models with Integer Quadratic Programming.
papers.abstract: Quantization is a widely used technique to compress neural networks. Assigning uniform bit-widths across all layers can result in significant accuracy degradation at low precision and inefficiency at high precision. Mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) addresses this by assigning varied bit-widths to layers, optimizing the accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Existing sensitivity-based methods for MPQ assume that quantization errors across layers are independent, which leads to suboptimal choices. We introduce CLADO, a practical sensitivity-based MPQ algorithm that captures cross-layer dependency of quantization error. CLADO approximates pairwise cross-layer errors using linear equations on a small data subset. Layerwise bit-widths are assigned by optimizing a new MPQ formulation based on cross-layer quantization errors using an Integer Quadratic Program. Experiments with CNN and vision transformer models on ImageNet demonstrate that CLADO achieves state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization performance. Code repository available here.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup><sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>https://github.com/JamesTuna/CLADOMPQ
papers.abstract_zh: 量化是一种广泛使用的压缩神经网络技术。在所有层上分配统一的位宽可能会导致低精度时精度显着下降，而高精度时效率低下。混合精度量化（MPQ）通过为层分配不同的位宽来解决这个问题，优化精度与效率的权衡。现有的基于灵敏度的 MPQ 方法假设跨层的量化误差是独立的，这会导致次优选择。我们引入了 CLADO，一种实用的基于灵敏度的 MPQ 算法，可以捕获量化误差的跨层依赖性。 CLADO 在小数据子集上使用线性方程来近似成对跨层误差。通过使用整数二次规划基于跨层量化误差优化新的 MPQ 公式来分配分层位宽。在 ImageNet 上使用 CNN 和视觉转换器模型进行的实验表明，CLADO 实现了最先进的混合精度量化性能。代码存储库位于此处。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup><sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>https://github.com/JamesTuna/CLADOMPQ

papers.title: MMDFL: Multi-Model-based Decentralized Federated Learning for Resource-Constrained AIoT Systems.
papers.abstract: Along with the prosperity of Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques, more and more Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) applications adopt Federated Learning (FL) to enable collaborative learning without compromising the privacy of devices. Since existing centralized FL methods suffer from the problems of single-point-offailure and communication bottleneck caused by the parameter server, we are witnessing an increasing use of Decentralized Federated Learning (DFL), which is based on Peer-to-Peer (P2P) communication without using a global model. However, DFL still faces three major challenges, i.e., limited computing power and network bandwidth of resource-constrained devices, non-Independent and Identically Distributed (non-IID) device data, and all-neighbor-dependent knowledge aggregation operations, all of which greatly suppress the learning potential of existing DFL methods. To address these problems, this paper presents an efficient DFL framework named MMDFL based on our proposed multi-model-based learning and knowledge aggregation mechanism. Specifically, MMDFL adopts multiple traveler models, which perform local training individually along their traversed devices, accelerating and maximizing knowledge learning and sharing among devices. Moreover, based on our proposed device selection strategy, MMDFL enables each traveler to adaptively explore its next best neighboring device to further enhance the DFL training performance, taking into account issues of data heterogeneity, limited resources and catastrophic forgetting phenomenon. Experimental results from simulation and a real testbed show that, compared with state-of-the-art DFL methods, MMDFL can not only significantly reduce the communication overhead but also achieve better overall classification performance for both IID and non-IID scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）技术的繁荣，越来越多的人工智能物联网（AIoT）应用采用联邦学习（FL）来实现协作学习，同时又不损害设备的隐私。由于现有的集中式FL方法存在单点故障和参数服务器引起的通信瓶颈问题，我们看到越来越多的去中心化联邦学习（DFL）的使用，它基于点对点（P2P）通信而不使用全局模型。然而，DFL仍然面临三大挑战，即资源受限设备的有限计算能力和网络带宽、非独立同分布（non-IID）设备数据以及全邻居依赖的知识聚合操作，所有这些都极大地抑制了现有DFL方法的学习潜力。为了解决这些问题，本文基于我们提出的基于多模型的学习和知识聚合机制，提出了一种名为 MMDFL 的高效 DFL 框架。具体来说，MMDFL采用多个旅行者模型，沿着其遍历的设备单独进行本地训练，加速并最大化设备之间的知识学习和共享。此外，基于我们提出的设备选择策略，考虑到数据异构性、有限资源和灾难性遗忘现象等问题，MMDFL 使每个旅行者能够自适应地探索其下一个最佳相邻设备，以进一步提高 DFL 训练性能。仿真和真实测试台的实验结果表明，与最先进的 DFL 方法相比，MMDFL 不仅可以显着降低通信开销，而且对于 IID 和非 IID 场景都能实现更好的整体分类性能。

papers.title: Monolithic 3D FPGA Design and Synthesis with Back-End-of-Line Configuration Memories.
papers.abstract: This work presents a novel monolithic 3D (M3D) FPGA architecture that leverages stackable back-end-of-line (BEOL) transistors to implement configuration memory and pass gates, significantly improving area, latency, and power efficiency. By integrating n-type (W -doped In<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf>) and p-type (SnO) amorphous oxide semiconductor (AOS) transistors in the BEOL, Si SRAM configuration bits are substituted with a less leaky equivalent that can be programmed at logic-compatible voltages. BEOL-compatible AOS transistors are currently under extensive research and development in the device community, with investment by leading foundries, from which reported data is used to develop robust physics-based models in TCAD that enable circuit design. The use of AOS pass gates reduces the overhead of reconfigurable circuits by mapping FPGA switch block (SB) and connection block (CB) matrices above configurable logic blocks (CLBs), thereby increasing the proximity of logic elements and reducing latency. By interfacing with the latest Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) suite, an AOS-based M3D FPGA implemented in 7 nm technology is demonstrated with $3.4 \times$ lower area-time squared product ($\mathbf{A T}^{2}$), 27% lower critical path latency, and 26% lower reconfigurable routing block power on benchmarks including hyperdimensional computing and large language models (LLMs).
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的单片 3D (M3D) FPGA 架构，该架构利用可堆叠后端 (BEOL) 晶体管来实现配置存储器和传输门，从而显着改善面积、延迟和功率效率。通过集成 n 型 (W 掺杂 In<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" BEOL、Si SRAM 配置位中的 xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf>）和 p 型 (SnO) 非晶氧化物半导体 (AOS) 晶体管被替换为可在逻辑兼容电压下编程的泄漏较少的等效器件。与 BEOL 兼容的 AOS 晶体管目前正在器件界进行广泛的研究和开发，并得到了领先代工厂的投资，其中报告的数据用于在 TCAD 中开发基于物理的强大模型，从而实现电路设计。 AOS 传输门的使用通过将 FPGA 开关块 (SB) 和连接块 (CB) 矩阵映射到可配置逻辑块 (CLB) 上方来减少可重构电路的开销，从而增加逻辑元件的接近度并减少延迟。通过与最新的 Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) 套件接口，采用 7 nm 技术实现的基于 AOS 的 M3D FPGA 在包括超维计算和大语言模型 (LLM) 在内的基准测试中，面积时间平方乘积 ($\mathbf{A T}^{2}$) 降低了 3.4 美元，关键路径延迟降低了 27%，可重构路由模块功耗降低了 26%。

papers.title: MOSS: Multi-Modal Representation Learning on Sequential Circuits.
papers.abstract: Deep learning has significantly advanced Electronic Design Automation (EDA), with circuit representation learning emerging as a key area for modeling the relationship between a circuit’s structure and functionality. Existing methods primarily use either Large Language Models (LLMs) for Register Transfer Level (RTL) code analysis or Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for netlist modeling. While LLMs excel at high-level functional understanding, they struggle with detailed netlist behavior. GNNs, however, face challenges when scaling to larger sequential circuits due to long-range information dependencies and insufficient functional supervision, leading to decreased accuracy and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose MOSS, a multimodal framework that integrates GNNs with LLMs for sequential circuit modeling. By enhancing D-type Flip-Flop (DFF) node features with embeddings from fine-tuned LLMs on RTL code, we focus the GNN on critical anchor points, reducing reliance on long-range dependencies. The LLM also provides global circuit embeddings, offering efficient supervision for functionality-related tasks. Additionally, MOSS introduces an adaptive aggregation method and a two-phase propagation mechanism in the GNN to better model signal propagation and sequential feedback within the circuit. Experimental results demonstrate that MOSS significantly improves the accuracy of functionality and performance predictions for sequential circuits compared to existing methods, particularly in larger circuits where previous models struggle. Specifically, MOSS achieves a $\mathbf{9 5. 2 \%}$ accuracy in arrival time prediction.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习显着推进了电子设计自动化 (EDA)，电路表示学习成为对电路结构和功能之间关系进行建模的关键领域。现有方法主要使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 进行寄存器传输级 (RTL) 代码分析，或使用图神经网络 (GNN) 进行网表建模。虽然法学硕士擅长高级功能理解，但他们在详细的网表行为方面遇到了困难。然而，由于长程信息依赖性和功能监督不足，GNN 在扩展到更大的时序电路时面临挑战，导致准确性下降和泛化能力有限。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 MOSS，这是一种将 GNN 与 LLM 集成以进行时序电路建模的多模态框架。通过使用 RTL 代码上经过微调的 LLM 的嵌入来增强 D 型触发器 (DFF) 节点功能，我们将 GNN 集中在关键锚点上，减少对远程依赖性的依赖。法学硕士还提供全局电路嵌入，为功能相关任务提供有效的监督。此外，MOSS 在 GNN 中引入了自适应聚合方法和两阶段传播机制，以更好地对电路内的信号传播和顺序反馈进行建模。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，MOSS 显着提高了时序电路的功能和性能预测的准确性，特别是在以前的模型难以实现的较大电路中。具体来说，MOSS 在到达时间预测方面实现了 $\mathbf{9 5. 2 \%}$ 准确度。

papers.title: Move Less, Retrieve Fast: A Retrieval-in-Memory Architecture for Language Models.
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented language models (RALMs) have attracted widespread attention for addressing the limitations of traditional large language models. However, challenges involved in retrieval, including substantial data movement and irregular access patterns, seriously impact the efficiency and deployment of RALMs. The emerging 3D-stacked processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture, characterized by its high memory bandwidth and near-data computing capabilities, presents a promising solution for efficient retrieval. To support large-scale retrieval in RALMs, the PIM architecture should be carefully designed with joint software and hardware optimization. This paper presents Rimast, a retrieval-in-memory architecture for fast retrieval in RALMs. The objective is to minimize data movement and improve overall performance through hardwaresoftware co-design. At the hardware level, a hierarchical PIM architecture with a retrieval-in-memory dataflow is designed to reduce unnecessary data transfer. At the software level, skew-free data mapping and adaptive offloading strategies are proposed to address the irregular access patterns associated with retrieval in RALMs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed Rimast using extensive experiments. The experimental results demonstrate that Rimast effectively reduces data movement, achieving average speedups of $273 \times 55 \times$, and $2.41 \times$ over CPUs, GPUs, and prior art accelerators, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 检索增强语言模型（RALM）因解决传统大型语言模型的局限性而受到广泛关注。然而，检索中涉及的挑战，包括大量数据移动和不规则访问模式，严重影响了 RALM 的效率和部署。新兴的 3D 堆栈内存处理 (PIM) 架构以其高内存带宽和近数据计算能力为特点，为高效检索提供了一种有前景的解决方案。为了支持 RALM 中的大规模检索，PIM 架构应经过精心设计，并进行软硬件联合优化。本文介绍了 Rimast，一种用于在 RALM 中快速检索的内存检索架构。目标是通过硬件软件协同设计最大限度地减少数据移动并提高整体性能。在硬件层面，采用内存检索数据流的分层 PIM 架构旨在减少不必要的数据传输。在软件层面，提出了无偏斜数据映射和自适应卸载策略，以解决与 RALM 中的检索相关的不规则访问模式。我们通过大量实验证明了所提出的 Rimast 的有效性。实验结果表明，Rimat 有效减少了数据移动，与 CPU、GPU 和现有技术加速器相比，平均加速分别为 273 美元 × 55 美元和 2.41 美元 × 2.41 美元。

papers.title: Mr.TPL: A Method for Multi-Pin Net Router in Triple Patterning Lithography.
papers.abstract: Triple patterning lithography (TPL) has been recognized as one of the most promising solutions to print critical features in advanced technology nodes. A critical challenge within TPL is the effective assignment of the layout to masks. Recently, various layout decomposition methods and TPL-aware routing methods have been proposed to consider TPL. However, these methods typically result in numerous conflicts and stitches, and are mainly designed for 2-pin nets. This paper proposes a multipin net routing method in triple patterning lithography, called Mr.TPL. Experimental results demonstrate that Mr.TPL reduces color conflicts by 81.17%, decreases stitches by 76.89%, and achieves up to $5.4 \times$ speed improvement compared to the state-of-the-art TPL-aware routing method.
papers.abstract_zh: 三重图案光刻 (TPL) 已被公认为是在先进技术节点打印关键特征的最有前途的解决方案之一。 TPL 中的一个关键挑战是将布局有效分配给掩模。最近，已经提出了各种布局分解方法和TPL感知布线方法来考虑TPL。然而，这些方法通常会导致大量冲突和缝合，并且主要是为 2 引脚网络设计的。本文提出了一种三重图案光刻中的多引脚网络布线方法，称为Mr.TPL。实验结果表明，与最先进的 TPL 感知路由方法相比，Mr.TPL 减少了 81.17% 的颜色冲突，减少了 76.89% 的针迹，并实现了高达 5.4 美元的速度提升。

papers.title: Multi-Agent Yield Analysis For Circuit Design.
papers.abstract: Semiconductor yield estimation presents a critical challenge in modern manufacturing, directly impacting production costs and market competitiveness. Traditional estimation methods, particularly Monte Carlo simulation, while reliable, become computationally prohibitive for complex modern circuits. Contemporary approaches, including importance sampling and machine learning techniques, face fundamental limitations in consistency across circuit topologies and practical validation. This work introduces YieldAgent, a novel Large Language Model (LLM)-powered framework that revolutionizes yield estimation through dynamic integration of multiple analytical strategies. YieldAgent employs a three-layer agent architecture to analyze circuit characteristics and historical data, optimizing estimation methods while balancing computational efficiency and precision. The framework incorporates Retrieval-Augmented Generation for domain knowledge integration and Tree-structured Parzen Estimators for dynamic hyperparameter optimization. Experimental validation across 12nm and 40nm technology nodes demonstrates that YieldAgent reduces computational overhead by up to $2.9 \times$ while maintaining or exceeding state-of-the-art accuracy. The system’s ability to adapt across different circuit topologies and technology nodes establishes a new paradigm for scalable, intelligent yield estimation in electronic design automation.
papers.abstract_zh: 半导体良率估算对现代制造业提出了严峻的挑战，直接影响生产成本和市场竞争力。传统的估计方法，特别是蒙特卡罗模拟，虽然可靠，但对于复杂的现代电路来说，计算量却太大了。现代方法，包括重要性采样和机器学习技术，在电路拓扑和实际验证的一致性方面面临着根本限制。这项工作介绍了 YieldAgent，这是一种新型大型语言模型 (LLM) 支持的框架，它通过动态集成多种分析策略彻底改变了产量估计。 YieldAgent采用三层代理架构来分析电路特性和历史数据，优化估计方法，同时平衡计算效率和精度。该框架结合了用于领域知识集成的检索增强生成和用于动态超参数优化的树结构 Parzen 估计器。跨 12 纳米和 40 纳米技术节点的实验验证表明，YieldAgent 可将计算开销降低高达 2.9 美元\倍$，同时保持或超过最先进的精度。该系统能够适应不同的电路拓扑和技术节点，为电子设计自动化中的可扩展、智能良率估算建立了新的范例。

papers.title: Multicore Environment State Representation for Agent-Directed Test Generation.
papers.abstract: A crucial step in the design of multicore systems is to validate the interaction between cores. This involves test program generation and runtime analysis. We propose a novel reinforcement learning approach to directed test generation, where an agent induces a suite of programs, which are executed in a simulation environment for a multicore. It focuses on how to recover state information from raw observations of the environment such that the agent can learn from interaction how to improve coverage for any verification task. We evaluated our state representation for different verification tasks involving 16 and 32-core ARMv8 2-level MOESI designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 多核系统设计中的一个关键步骤是验证内核之间的交互。这涉及到测试程序生成和运行时分析。我们提出了一种新颖的强化学习方法来生成定向测试，其中代理诱导一套程序，这些程序在多核模拟环境中执行。它侧重于如何从环境的原始观察中恢复状态信息，以便代理可以从交互中学习如何提高任何验证任务的覆盖范围。我们评估了涉及 16 核和 32 核 ARMv8 2 级 MOESI 设计的不同验证任务的状态表示。

papers.title: NDFT: Accelerating Density Functional Theory Calculations via Hardware/Software Co-Design on Near-Data Computing System.
papers.abstract: Linear-response time-dependent Density Functional Theory (LR-TDDFT) is a widely used method for accurately predicting the excited-state properties of physical systems. Previous works have attempted to accelerate LR-TDDFT using heterogeneous systems such as GPUs, FPGAs, and the Sunway architecture. However, a major drawback of these approaches is the constant data movement between host memory and the memory of the heterogeneous systems, which results in substantial data movement overhead. Moreover, these works focus primarily on optimizing the compute-intensive portions of LR-TDDFT, despite the fact that the calculation steps are fundamentally memory-bound.To address these challenges, we propose NDFT, a Near-Data Density Functional Theory framework. Specifically, we design a novel task partitioning and scheduling mechanism to offload each part of LR-TDDFT to the most suitable computing units within a CPU-NDP system. Additionally, we implement a hardware/software co-optimization of a critical kernel in LR-TDDFT to further enhance performance on the CPU-NDP system. Our results show that NDFT achieves performance improvements of 5.2x and 2.5x over CPU and GPU baselines, respectively, on a large physical system.
papers.abstract_zh: 线性响应时间相关密度泛函理论 (LR-TDDFT) 是一种广泛使用的方法，用于准确预测物理系统的激发态特性。之前的工作尝试使用 GPU、FPGA 和 Sunway 架构等异构系统来加速 LR-TDDFT。然而，这些方法的一个主要缺点是主机存储器和异构系统的存储器之间的持续数据移动，这导致大量的数据移动开销。此外，这些工作主要集中在优化 LR-TDDFT 的计算密集型部分，尽管计算步骤基本上是内存限制的。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 NDFT，一种近数据密度泛函理论框架。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的任务划分和调度机制，将 LR-TDDFT 的每个部分卸载到 CPU-NDP 系统中最合适的计算单元。此外，我们对 LR-TDDFT 中的关键内核进行了硬件/软件协同优化，以进一步增强 CPU-NDP 系统的性能。我们的结果表明，在大型物理系统上，NDFT 的性能分别比 CPU 和 GPU 基线提高了 5.2 倍和 2.5 倍。

papers.title: Near-Memory LLM Inference Processor based on 3D DRAM-to-logic Hybrid Bonding.
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference poses dual challenges, demanding substantial memory bandwidth and computing resources. Recent advancements in near-memory accelerators leveraging 3D DRAM-to-logic hybrid-bonding (HB) interconnects have gained attention due to their highly parallel data transfer capabilities. We address limitations in previous HB-DRAM accelerators, such as those stemming from distributed controller designs, by introducing an architecture with a centralized controller and dual-IO scheme. This approach not only reduces the chip area overhead but also enables reconfigurable GEMV/GEMM operations, boosting the performance. Simulations for the OPT 66B model show that our proposed accelerator achieves 2.9X, 3.5X, and 2.5X higher performance compared to NPU, DRAM-PIM, and heterogeneous designs (DRAM-PIM + NPU), respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理带来双重挑战，需要大量的内存带宽和计算资源。利用 3D DRAM 到逻辑混合键合 (HB) 互连的近内存加速器的最新进展因其高度并行的数据传输能力而受到关注。我们通过引入具有集中控制器和双 IO 方案的架构来解决以前 HB-DRAM 加速器中的限制，例如源自分布式控制器设计的限制。这种方法不仅减少了芯片面积开销，而且还实现了可重新配置的 GEMV/GEMM 操作，从而提高了性能。 OPT 66B 模型的仿真表明，与 NPU、DRAM-PIM 和异构设计 (DRAM-PIM + NPU) 相比，我们提出的加速器的性能分别提高了 2.9 倍、3.5 倍和 2.5 倍。

papers.title: NetTAG: A Multimodal RTL-and-Layout-Aligned Netlist Foundation Model via Text-Attributed Graph.
papers.abstract: Circuit representation learning has shown promise in advancing Electronic Design Automation (EDA) by capturing structural and functional circuit properties for various tasks. Existing pre-trained solutions rely on graph learning with complex functional supervision, such as truth table simulation. However, they only handle simple andinverter graphs (AIGs), struggling to fully encode other complex gate functionalities. While large language models (LLMs) excel at functional understanding, they lack the structural awareness for flattened netlists. To advance netlist representation learning, we present NetTAG, a netlist foundation model that fuses gate semantics with graph structure, handling diverse gate types and supporting a variety of functional and physical tasks. Moving beyond existing graph-only methods, NetTAG formulates netlists as text-attributed graphs, with gates annotated by symbolic logic expressions and physical characteristics as text attributes. Its multimodal architecture combines an LLM-based text encoder for gate semantics and a graph transformer for global structure. Pre-trained with gate and graph self-supervised objectives and aligned with RTL and layout stages, NetTAG captures comprehensive circuit intrinsics. Experimental results show that NetTAG consistently outperforms each task-specific method on four largely different functional and physical tasks and surpasses state-of-the-art AIG encoders, demonstrating its versatility.
papers.abstract_zh: 电路表示学习通过捕获各种任务的结构和功能电路属性，在推进电子设计自动化 (EDA) 方面显示出了前景。现有的预训练解决方案依赖于具有复杂功能监督的图学习，例如真值表模拟。然而，它们只处理简单的反相图（AIG），难以完全编码其他复杂的门功能。虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 擅长功能理解，但它们缺乏扁平化网表的结构意识。为了推进网表表示学习，我们提出了 NetTAG，这是一种网表基础模型，它将门语义与图形结构融合在一起，处理不同的门类型并支持各种功能和物理任务。 NetTAG 超越了现有的纯图方法，将网表制定为文本属性图，其中门由符号逻辑表达式注释，物理特性作为文本属性。其多模态架构结合了用于门语义的基于 LLM 的文本编码器和用于全局结构的图转换器。 NetTAG 通过门和图形自监督目标进行预训练，并与 RTL 和布局阶段保持一致，可捕获全面的电路内在特性。实验结果表明，NetTAG 在四种截然不同的功能和物理任务上始终优于每种特定任务的方法，并超越了最先进的 AIG 编码器，展示了其多功能性。

papers.title: NeuralMesh: Neural Network For FEM Mesh Generation in 2.5D/3D Chiplet Thermal Simulation.
papers.abstract: Advanced integrated circuit (IC) systems increasingly utilize chiplet-based packaging with complex $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ structures and dense Through-Silicon Via (TSV) arrays. While the Finite Element Method (FEM) provides high-fidelity thermal simulation for these systems, its computational efficiency degrades significantly when generating and optimizing meshes for intricate geometries. To address these performance limitations while preserving simulation accuracy, we present NeuralMesh, a novel framework that accelerates thermal analysis of chiplet-based ICs. Our approach integrates deep learning and geometric analysis to optimize mesh generation without the need for iterative refinement steps. NeuralMesh first employs an enhanced segmentation model to predict thermal distributions based on geometric, material, and power parameters. These predictions, combined with key geometric features, guide the optimization of an initial coarse FEM mesh. By eliminating traditional iterative mesh refinement, our framework achieves up to $45.00 \times$ mesh generation speedup while maintaining thermal accuracy within 0.8% of commercial COMSOL simulations. It reduces the number of mesh elements in unimportant areas, which represents a speed improvement of the subsequent thermal simulation. This advancement enables rapid yet precise thermal analysis essential for modern IC package design.
papers.abstract_zh: 先进的集成电路 (IC) 系统越来越多地利用基于小芯片的封装，该封装具有复杂的 2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ 结构和密集的硅通孔 (TSV) 阵列。虽然有限元法 (FEM) 为这些系统提供高保真热模拟，但在生成和优化复杂几何形状的网格时，其计算效率会显着降低。为了解决这些性能限制，同时保持仿真精度，我们推出了 NeuralMesh，这是一种新型框架，可加速基于小芯片的 IC 的热分析。我们的方法集成了深度学习和几何分析来优化网格生成，而无需迭代细化步骤。 NeuralMesh 首先采用增强的分割模型来根据几何、材料和功率参数预测热分布。这些预测与关键几何特征相结合，指导初始粗略有限元网格的优化。通过消除传统的迭代网格细化，我们的框架实现了高达 45.00 美元 × 的网格生成加速，同时将商业 COMSOL 模拟的热精度保持在 0.8% 以内。减少了不重要区域的网格单元数量，这代表了后续热模拟的速度提升。这一进步使得快速而精确的热分析成为现代 IC 封装设计所必需的。

papers.title: New Time-Domain Preconditioners for HB Jacobian of RF Circuits.
papers.abstract: Harmonic balance (HB) method is a powerful frequency-domain method used in RF circuit simulations. The key point of HB method is efficiently solving the Jacobian system in Newton’s method. In this paper, we first introduce a new time-domain preconditioner for HB Jacobian. Unlike existing time-domain preconditioners, which cannot balance the efficiency of solving the linear system corresponding to the preconditioner with the reduction in iteration step for strongly nonlinear circuit, the proposed preconditioner successfully addresses both aspects. We also present a new preconditioning method that extends time-domain preconditioners to circuit with distributed devices, which was previously unattainable. Finally, a matrix norm-based metric is proposed to measure the strength of circuit nonlinearity, which can help us a priori choose the appropriate preconditioner.
papers.abstract_zh: 谐波平衡 (HB) 方法是射频电路仿真中使用的一种强大的频域方法。 HB方法的关键在于高效求解牛顿法中的雅可比系统。在本文中，我们首先介绍一种新的 HB 雅可比行列式时域预处理器。现有的时域预处理器无法平衡求解与该预处理器相对应的线性系统的效率与减少强非线性电路迭代步数，而与此不同的是，所提出的预处理器成功地解决了这两方面问题。我们还提出了一种新的预处理方法，将时域预处理器扩展到具有分布式设备的电路，这在以前是无法实现的。最后，提出了一种基于矩阵范数的度量来衡量电路非线性的强度，这可以帮助我们先验地选择合适的预处理器。

papers.title: NN-AdderNet: Nonnegative and Sparse Weight Optimization Towards Ultra-Low Bitwidth AdderNet Quantization and Compression.
papers.abstract: Emerging efficient deep neural network (DNN) models, such as AdderNet, have shown great promise in significantly improving hardware efficiency compared to traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, achieving low bitwidth quantization and effective model compression remains a major challenge. To this end, we introduce Nonnegative AdderNet (NNAdderNet), a quantization- and compression-friendly AdderNet variant that enables model compression down to 4 bits or even lower. We begin by proposing an equivalent transformation of the sum-of-absolute-difference (SAD) kernel in AdderNet, which allows for the formulation of nonnegative weights. This transformation effectively eliminates the need for a sign bit, thus saving 1 bit per weight. Next, we propose to exploit the dual-sparsity pattern in the weights of the activation-oriented NN-AdderNet quantized model. This inherent sparsity enhances the lossless compression performance over NN-AdderNet. Experimental results show that NN-AdderNet can achieve an average compressed weight bitwidth down to 4 bits or even lower, while achieving negligible accuracy loss as compared to full-precision AdderNet models. Such benefits are further illustrated with hardware-level energy and latency improvements in designing DNN inference accelerators. Consequently, the NN-AdderNet model exhibits both algorithmic and hardware efficiency, thus making it a promising candidate for resource-limited applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 与传统的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相比，新兴的高效深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型（例如 AdderNet）在显着提高硬件效率方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，实现低位宽量化和有效的模型压缩仍然是一个重大挑战。为此，我们引入了非负 AdderNet (NNAdderNet)，这是一种量化和压缩友好的 AdderNet 变体，可将模型压缩至 4 位甚至更低。我们首先提出了 AdderNet 中绝对差和 (SAD) 内核的等效变换，它允许制定非负权重。这种转换有效地消除了对符号位的需要，从而每个权重节省了 1 位。接下来，我们建议在面向激活的 NN-AdderNet 量化模型的权重中利用双稀疏模式。这种固有的稀疏性增强了 NN-AdderNet 的无损压缩性能。 Experimental results show that NN-AdderNet can achieve an average compressed weight bitwidth down to 4 bits or even lower, while achieving negligible accuracy loss as compared to full-precision AdderNet models.设计 DNN 推理加速器时的硬件级能耗和延迟改进进一步说明了这些优势。因此，NN-AdderNet 模型表现出算法和硬件效率，从而使其成为资源有限应用程序的有希望的候选者。

papers.title: NoiseZO: RRAM Noise-Driven Zeroth-Order Optimization for Efficient Forward-Only Training.
papers.abstract: Compute-in-memory using emerging resistive random-access memory (RRAM) demonstrates significant potential for building energy-efficient deep neural networks. However, RRAM-based network training faces challenges from computational noise and gradient calculation overhead. In this study, we introduce NoiseZO, a forward-only training framework that leverages intrinsic RRAM noise to estimate gradients via zeroth-order (ZO) optimization. The framework maps neural networks onto dual RRAM arrays, utilizing their inherent write noise as $\mathbf{Z O}$ perturbations for training. This enables network updates through only two forward computations. A fine-grained perturbation control strategy is further developed to enhance training accuracy. Extensive experiments on vowel and image datasets, implemented with typical networks, showcase the effectiveness of our framework. Compared to conventional complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) implementations, our approach achieves a 21-fold reduction in energy consumption.
