papers.abstract_zh: 使用新兴电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的内存计算展示了构建节能深度神经网络的巨大潜力。然而，基于 RRAM 的网络训练面临着计算噪声和梯度计算开销的挑战。在本研究中，我们引入了 NoiseZO，这是一种仅前向训练框架，它利用固有的 RRAM 噪声通过零阶 (ZO) 优化来估计梯度。该框架将神经网络映射到双 RRAM 阵列上，利用其固有的写入噪声作为 $\mathbf{Z O}$ 扰动进行训练。这使得网络更新只需两次前向计算即可。进一步开发了细粒度扰动控制策略以提高训练精度。使用典型网络实现的对元音和图像数据集的广泛实验展示了我们框架的有效性。与传统的互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 实现相比，我们的方法实现了 21 倍的能耗降低。

papers.title: NSFlow: An End-to-End FPGA Framework with Scalable Dataflow Architecture for Neuro-Symbolic AI.
papers.abstract: Neuro-Symbolic AI (NSAI) is an emerging paradigm that integrates neural networks with symbolic reasoning to enhance the transparency, reasoning capabilities, and data efficiency of AI systems. Recent NSAI systems have gained traction due to their exceptional performance in reasoning tasks and human-AI collaborative scenarios. Despite these algorithmic advancements, executing NSAI tasks on existing hardware (e.g., CPUs, GPUs, TPUs) remains challenging, due to their heterogeneous computing kernels, high memory intensity, and unique memory access patterns. Moreover, current NSAI algorithms exhibit significant variation in operation types and scales, making them incompatible with existing ML accelerators. These challenges highlight the need for a versatile and flexible acceleration framework tailored to NSAI workloads. In this paper, we propose NSFlow, an FPGA-based acceleration framework designed to achieve high efficiency, scalability, and versatility across NSAI systems. NSFlow features a design architecture generator that identifies workload data dependencies and creates optimized dataflow architectures, as well as a reconfigurable array with flexible compute units, re-organizable memory, and mixed-precision capabilities. Evaluating across NSAI workloads, NSFlow achieves $31 \times$ speedup over Jetson TX2, more than $2 \times$ over GPU, $8 \times$ speedup over TPU-like systolic array, and more than $3 \times$ over Xilinx DPU. NSFlow also demonstrates enhanced scalability, with only $4 \times$ runtime increase when symbolic workloads scale by $150 \times$. To the best of our knowledge, NSFlow is the first framework to enable real-time generalizable NSAI algorithms acceleration, demonstrating a promising solution for next-generation cognitive systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能（NSAI）是一种新兴范式，它将神经网络与符号推理相结合，以增强人工智能系统的透明度、推理能力和数据效率。最近的 NSAI 系统因其在推理任务和人机协作场景中的卓越性能而受到关注。尽管算法取得了这些进步，但由于现有硬件（例如 CPU、GPU、TPU）的异构计算内核、高内存强度和独特的内存访问模式，在现有硬件（例如 CPU、GPU、TPU）上执行 NSAI 任务仍然具有挑战性。此外，当前的 NSAI 算法在操作类型和规模上表现出显着变化，使得它们与现有的 ML 加速器不兼容。这些挑战凸显了对针对 NSAI 工作负载量身定制的多功能且灵活的加速框架的需求。在本文中，我们提出了 NSFlow，这是一种基于 FPGA 的加速框架，旨在实现跨 NSAI 系统的高效率、可扩展性和多功能性。 NSFlow 具有设计架构生成器，可识别工作负载数据依赖性并创建优化的数据流架构，以及具有灵活计算单元、可重新组织内存和混合精度功能的可重新配置阵列。通过对 NSAI 工作负载进行评估，NSFlow 比 Jetson TX2 实现了 31 美元的加速，比 GPU 实现了 2 美元以上的加速，比类似 TPU 的脉动阵列实现了 8 美元的加速，比 Xilinx DPU 实现了 3 美元以上的加速。 NSFlow 还展示了增强的可扩展性，当符号工作负载扩展 150 美元时，运行时间仅增加 4 美元。据我们所知，NSFlow 是第一个能够实现实时通用 NSAI 算法加速的框架，为下一代认知系统展示了一种有前景的解决方案。

papers.title: NVR: Vector Runahead on NPUs for Sparse Memory Access.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks are increasingly leveraging sparsity to reduce the scaling up of model parameter size. However, reducing wall-clock time through sparsity and pruning remains challenging due to irregular memory access patterns, leading to frequent cache misses. In this paper, we present NPU Vector Runahead (NVR), a prefetching mechanism tailored for NPUs to address cache miss problems in sparse DNN workloads. Rather than optimising memory patterns with high overhead and poor portability, NVR adapts runahead execution to the unique architecture of NPUs. NVR provides a general micro-architectural solution for sparse DNN workloads without requiring compiler or algorithmic support, operating as a decoupled, speculative, lightweight hardware sub-thread alongside the NPU, with minimal hardware overhead (under 5%). NVR achieves an average 90% reduction in cache misses compared to SOTA prefetching in general-purpose processors, delivering 4 x average speedup on sparse workloads versus NPUs without prefetching. Moreover, we investigate the advantages of incorporating a small cache (16 KB) into the NPU combined with NVR. Our evaluation shows that expanding this modest cache delivers 5x higher performance benefits than increasing the $\mathbf{L 2}$ cache size by the same amount.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络越来越多地利用稀疏性来减少模型参数大小的扩大。然而，由于不规则的内存访问模式，导致频繁的缓存未命中，通过稀疏性和修剪来减少挂钟时间仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 NPU Vector Runahead (NVR)，这是一种专为 NPU 定制的预取机制，用于解决稀疏 DNN 工作负载中的缓存未命中问题。 NVR 不是以高开销和较差的可移植性来优化内存模式，而是根据 NPU 的独特架构调整超前执行。 NVR 为稀疏 DNN 工作负载提供通用微架构解决方案，无需编译器或算法支持，与 NPU 一起作为解耦、推测、轻量级硬件子线程运行，硬件开销极低（低于 5%）。与通用处理器中的 SOTA 预取相比，NVR 的缓存缺失平均减少了 90%，与不使用预取的 NPU 相比，稀疏工作负载的平均加速速度提高了 4 倍。此外，我们还研究了将小型缓存 (16 KB) 合并到 NPU 中并与 NVR 结合的优势。我们的评估表明，与增加相同数量的 $\mathbf{L 2}$ 缓存大小相比，扩展这种适度的缓存可带来 5 倍的性能优势。

papers.title: On Bit-level Reverse Engineering of Vehicular CAN Bus.
papers.abstract: The Controller Area Network (CAN) bus is a cornerstone of modern vehicles, orchestrating functions from engine control to auxiliary systems. However, its lack of inherent security measures makes it vulnerable to cyberattacks. Accurately mapping CAN signals with car-control actions is critical for detecting security breaches, as it allows pinpointing potential vulnerabilities exploited to compromise vehicular functions. Despite this, existing CAN reverse engineering methods struggle to achieve bit-level resolution due to the huge search space of unique IDs and payload combinations. To address this challenge, we propose a systematic framework for reverse engineering CAN bus messages, achieving precise mapping of control bits in CAN frames to car-control actions. The framework was validated on Tesla Model 3, Leapmotor C10 and C11, demonstrating its versatility across different vehicle platforms. In particular, it successfully identified 43 car-control actions on the Tesla Model 3, showcasing its extensive coverage. Furthermore, its low resource consumption enables seamless integration into compact platforms like the Raspberry Pi, supporting practical deployment in real-world automotive systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 控制器局域网 (CAN) 总线是现代车辆的基石，协调从发动机控制到辅助系统的功能。然而，其缺乏固有的安全措施使其容易受到网络攻击。将 CAN 信号与汽车控制操作准确映射对于检测安全漏洞至关重要，因为它可以查明被利用来危害车辆功能的潜在漏洞。尽管如此，由于唯一 ID 和有效负载组合的搜索空间巨大，现有的 CAN 逆向工程方法很难实现位级分辨率。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个用于逆向工程 CAN 总线消息的系统框架，实现 CAN 帧中的控制位到汽车控制操作的精确映射。该框架在特斯拉 Model 3、零跑 C10 和 C11 上进行了验证，展示了其在不同车辆平台上的多功能性。特别是，它成功识别了特斯拉 Model 3 上的 43 个汽车控制动作，展示了其广泛的覆盖范围。此外，其资源消耗低，可以无缝集成到 Raspberry Pi 等紧凑型平台中，支持实际汽车系统中的实际部署。

papers.title: On Design Space Exploration of Cache System in Multi-Chiplet Systems.
papers.abstract: While multi-chiplet based many-core systems have emerged as a viable solution for heterogeneous integration and addressing manufacturing and technological challenges in the post-Moore’s Law era, their design and optimization remain highly complex and challenging. Among the various subsystems, the cache hierarchy has significant implications for overall system performance, yet its vast design space presents substantial optimization challenges. This complexity arises from factors such as the large number of chiplets in the system, the number of cores per chiplet, memory hierarchy variations, cache size variability, caching strategies, and inter-chiplet interconnection networks. Existing design space exploration methods, such as NN-Baton and IntLP, fail to optimize cache subsystem performance or thoroughly explore the design space. To address these limitations, we propose a novel design space exploration method for cache subsystem optimization. Our approach models cache miss rates and network latency as functions of cache hierarchy and inter-/intra-chiplet interconnection network parameters. We then define an optimization problem to minimize the concurrent average memory access time (C-AMAT) under cost and power consumption constraints. This problem is addressed using a bilevel optimization algorithm, which iteratively solves two independent subproblems: (1) cache subsystem optimization, and (2) inter-chiplet interconnection network optimization. Experimental results show that our method reduces the application execution time by 39.7% and 39.2%, on average, compared to architectures similar to AMD Zen 4 and Intel Sapphire Rapids, respectively, and by $\mathbf{2 5 . 9 1 \%}$ over IntLP. These results underscore the potential of the proposed method for optimizing cache subsystems in future multi-chiplet based many-core systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然基于多芯片的众核系统已成为异构集成的可行解决方案，并解决后摩尔定律时代的制造和技术挑战，但其设计和优化仍然高度复杂和具有挑战性。在各种子系统中，缓存层次结构对整体系统性能具有重大影响，但其巨大的设计空间带来了巨大的优化挑战。这种复杂性源于系统中大量小芯片、每个小芯片的内核数量、内存层次结构变化、缓存大小变化、缓存策略和小芯片间互连网络等因素。现有的设计空间探索方法，例如NN-Baton和IntLP，无法优化缓存子系统性能或彻底探索设计空间。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种用于缓存子系统优化的新颖的设计空间探索方法。我们的方法将缓存未命中率和网络延迟建模为缓存层次结构和小芯片间/小芯片内互连网络参数的函数。然后，我们定义一个优化问题，以在成本和功耗限制下最小化并发平均内存访问时间（C-AMAT）。该问题使用双层优化算法来解决，该算法迭代地解决两个独立的子问题：(1) 缓存子系统优化，以及 (2) 小芯片间互连网络优化。实验结果表明，与 AMD Zen 4 和 Intel Sapphire Rapids 类似的架构相比，我们的方法平均将应用程序执行时间分别减少了 39.7% 和 39.2%，以及 $\mathbf{2 5 。 9 1 \%}$ 超过 IntLP。这些结果强调了所提出的方法在未来基于多芯片的众核系统中优化缓存子系统的潜力。

papers.title: Optimizing Recovery Logic in Speculative High-Level Synthesis.
papers.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) excels at handling compute-intensive loops with straightforward control but struggles to identify parallelism in kernels with complex and irregular control-flow. To address this, novel scheduling techniques based on speculation have been introduced. While these methods outperform traditional static scheduling, they also introduce significant area overhead, particularly in the rollback control logic. Optimizing the cost of this rollback control logic remains an open challenge. In this work, we show how it is possible to simplify and/or eliminate rollback logic using a combination of static analysis and linear programming. Our results show improvements in both execution throughput and area cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 擅长通过简单的控制来处理计算密集型循环，但难以识别具有复杂和不规则控制流的内核中的并行性。为了解决这个问题，引入了基于推测的新颖的调度技术。虽然这些方法优于传统的静态调度，但它们也引入了显着的区域开销，特别是在回滚控制逻辑中。优化回滚控制逻辑的成本仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用静态分析和线性编程的组合来简化和/或消除回滚逻辑。我们的结果显示执行吞吐量和面积成本均有所改善。

papers.title: Optimizing windowed arithmetic for quantum attacks against RSA-2048.
papers.abstract: Windowed arithmetic is a technique for reducing the cost of quantum arithmetic circuits with space-time trade-offs using memory queries to precomputed tables. It can reduce the asymptotic cost of modular exponentiation from $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$ to $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2} / \log ^{2} n\right)$ operations, resulting in the current state-of-the-art compilations of quantum attacks against modern cryptography. We introduce several optimizations to windowed arithmetic. Notably, we effect an approximate $50 \%$ reduction in the costs of uncomputing memory lookups in quantum factoring applications. We validate our optimizations by improving the gate count of quantum attacks against public-key cryptography by $1.5 \%$ to $3.4 \%$, depending on the key size. We also enable a $16 \%$ runtime reduction at the cost of a $12 \%$ increase in qubit count. Our techniques can be used to reduce the complexity of not only factoring algorithms but also a wide range of quantum algorithms that rely on windowed arithmetic.
papers.abstract_zh: 窗口算术是一种通过使用内存查询预先计算表来进行时空权衡来降低量子算术电路成本的技术。它可以将模幂运算的渐近成本从 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2}\right)$ 降低到 $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{2} / \log ^{2} n\right)$ 运算，从而产生针对现代密码学的当前最先进的量子攻击汇编。我们引入了对窗口算术的几种优化。值得注意的是，我们在量子因子分解应用程序中将不计算内存查找的成本降低了大约 50 \%$。我们通过将针对公钥加密的量子攻击的门数提高 1.5 美元到 3.4 美元来验证我们的优化，具体取决于密钥大小。我们还以量子比特数增加 12 \%$ 为代价，实现了 16 \%$ 运行时间减少。我们的技术不仅可用于降低因式分解算法的复杂性，还可用于降低依赖于窗口算术的各种量子算法的复杂性。

papers.title: OutlierCIM: Outlier-Aware Digital CIM-Based LLM Accelerator with Hybrid-Strategy Quantization and Unified FP-INT Computation.
papers.abstract: Activation outliers in Large Language Models (LLMs), which exhibit large magnitudes but small quantities, significantly affect model performance and pose challenges for the acceleration of LLMs. To address this bottleneck, researchers have proposed several co-design frameworks with outlier-aware algorithms and dedicated hardware. However, they face challenges balancing model accuracy with hardware efficiency when accelerating LLMs in a low bit-width manner. To this end, we propose OutlierCIM, the first algorithm and hardware codesign framework for the compute-in-memory (CIM) accelerator with outlier-aware quantization algorithm. The key contributions of OutlierCIM are 1) an outlier-clustered tiling strategy that regulates memory access and reduces inefficient workloads which are both introduced by outliers, 2) a hybrid-strategy quantization and a reconfigurable double-bit CIM macro array that overcome the low storage utilization and high latency of outlier-based LLM quantization, and 3) a quantization factor post-processing strategy and a dedicated quantizer that efficiently unify the multiplication and accumulation of outlier-caused FP-INT workloads. Implemented in a 28 nm CMOS technology, OutlierCIM occupies an area of $2.25 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$. When evaluated at comprehensive benchmarks, OutlierCIM achieves up to $4.54 \times$ energy efficiency improvement and $3.91 \times$ speedup compared to the state-of-the-art outlier-aware accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 中的激活异常值数量级大但数量小，会显着影响模型性能，并对 LLM 的加速提出挑战。为了解决这个瓶颈，研究人员提出了几种具有异常值感知算法和专用硬件的协同设计框架。然而，当以低位宽方式加速 LLM 时，他们面临着平衡模型准确性和硬件效率的挑战。为此，我们提出了 OutlierCIM，这是第一个用于具有异常值感知量化算法的内存计算 (CIM) 加速器的算法和硬件协同设计框架。 OutlierCIM 的主要贡献是 1) 异常值聚类平铺策略，可调节内存访问并减少由异常值引入的低效工作负载；2) 混合策略量化和可重新配置的双位 CIM 宏阵列，克服基于异常值的 LLM 量化的低存储利用率和高延迟；3) 量化因子后处理策略和专用量化器，可有效统一乘法和累加异常值导致的 FP-INT 工作负载。 OutlierCIM 采用 28 nm CMOS 技术实现，占用面积为 $2.25 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$。在综合基准评估中，与最先进的异常值感知加速器相比，OutlierCIM 实现了高达 4.54 美元 × 美元的能源效率提升和 3.91 美元 × 美元的加速。

papers.title: P-DAC: Power-Efficient Photonic Accelerators for LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: As traditional electronic hardware encounters the limitations of Moore’s Law, optical computing is emerging as a promising alternative, delivering high data transmission rates, especially beneficial for big data and AI applications. Photonic accelerators, such as the LighteningTransformer, utilize optical analog signals to accelerate Transformerbased models, achieving exceptional speed and low energy consumption. However, controlling modern optical intensity modulators (e.g., MachZehnder Modulators) requires using electrical analog signals (e.g., voltage values) to adjust the optical signal intensity for realizing optical-based vector inner product calculations. Managing this modulation consumes significant power, as it involves selecting optimal electrical values through an electrical controller and converting digital signals to analog using digital-to-analog converters (DACs). In this work, we introduce P-DAC, a solution designed to reduce DAC power consumption, significantly enhancing the energy efficiency of optical accelerators for Transformer models.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着传统电子硬件遇到摩尔定律的限制，光计算正在成为一种有前景的替代方案，提供高数据传输速率，特别有利于大数据和人工智能应用。光子加速器（例如 LighteningTransformer）利用光学模拟信号来加速基于 Transformer 的模型，从而实现卓越的速度和低能耗。然而，控制现代光强度调制器（例如MachZehnder调制器）需要使用电模拟信号（例如电压值）来调整光信号强度，以实现基于光学的矢量内积计算。管理这种调制会消耗大量功率，因为​​它涉及通过电气控制器选择最佳电气值并使用数模转换器 (DAC) 将数字信号转换为模拟信号。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 P-DAC，这是一种旨在降低 DAC 功耗的解决方案，可显着提高 Transformer 模型的光学加速器的能效。

papers.title: PacQ: A SIMT Microarchitecture for Efficient Dataflow in Hyper-asymmetric GEMMs.
papers.abstract: Weight-only quantization has been widely explored in large language models (LLMs) to reduce memory storage and data loading overhead. During deployment on single-instruction-multiple-threads (SIMT) architectures, weights are stored in low-precision integer (INT) format, while activations remain in full-precision floating-point (FP) format to preserve inference accuracy. Although memory footprint and data loading requirements for weight matrices are reduced, computation performance gains remain limited due to the need to convert weights back to FP format through unpacking and dequantization before GEMM operations. In this work, we investigate methods to accelerate GEMM operations involving packed low-precision INT weights and high-precision FP activations, defining this as the hyper-asymmetric GEMM problem. Our approach co-optimizes tile-level packing and dataflow strategies for INT weight matrices. We further design a specialized FP-INT multiplier unit tailored to our packing and dataflow strategies, enabling parallel processing of multiple INT weights. Finally, we integrate the packing, dataflow, and multiplier unit into PacQ, a SIMT microarchitecture designed to efficiently accelerate hyper-asymmetric GEMMs. We show that PacQ can achieve up to $1.99 \times$ speedup and $81.4 \%$ reduction in EDP compared to weight-only quantized LLM workloads running on conventional SIMT baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 仅权重量化已在大型语言模型 (LLM) 中得到广泛探索，以减少内存存储和数据加载开销。在单指令多线程 (SIMT) 架构上部署期间，权重以低精度整数 (INT) 格式存储，而激活仍以全精度浮点 (FP) 格式存储，以保持推理准确性。尽管权重矩阵的内存占用和数据加载要求减少，但由于需要在 GEMM 操作之前通过解包和反量化将权重转换回 FP 格式，因此计算性能的提升仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们研究了加速 GEMM 操作的方法，涉及打包低精度 INT 权重和高精度 FP 激活，将其定义为超不对称 GEMM 问题。我们的方法共同优化 INT 权重矩阵的瓦片级打包和数据流策略。我们进一步设计了一个专门针对我们的打包和数据流策略定制的 FP-INT 乘法器单元，从而实现多个 INT 权重的并行处理。最后，我们将打包、数据流和乘法器单元集成到 PacQ 中，PacQ 是一种 SIMT 微架构，旨在有效加速超不对称 GEMM。我们表明，与在传统 SIMT 基线上运行的仅权重量化 LLM 工作负载相比，PacQ 可以实现高达 1.99 美元的加速和 81.4 美元的 EDP 减少。

papers.title: PacTrain: Pruning and Adaptive Sparse Gradient Compression for Efficient Collective Communication in Distributed Deep Learning.
papers.abstract: Large-scale deep neural networks (DNN) exhibit excellent performance for various tasks. As DNNs and datasets grow, distributed training becomes extremely time-consuming and demands larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting gradient aggregation overhead. While gradient compression and sparse collective communication techniques are commonly employed to alleviate network load, many gradient compression schemes do not achieve acceleration of the training process while also preserving accuracy. This paper introduces PacTrain, a novel framework that accelerates distributed training by combining pruning with sparse gradient compression. Active pruning of the neural network makes the model weights and gradients sparse. By ensuring the global knowledge of the gradient sparsity among all distributed training workers, we can perform lightweight compression communication without harming accuracy. We show that the PacTrain compression scheme achieves a near-optimal compression strategy while remaining compatible with the allreduce primitive. Experimental evaluations show that PacTrain improves training throughput by 1.25 to $8.72 \times$ compared to state-of-the-art compression-enabled systems for representative vision and language models training tasks under bandwidth-constrained conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模深度神经网络（DNN）在各种任务中表现出出色的性能。随着 DNN 和数据集的增长，分布式训练变得极其耗时并且需要更大的集群。主要瓶颈是由此产生的梯度聚合开销。虽然梯度压缩和稀疏集体通信技术通常用于减轻网络负载，但许多梯度压缩方案无法在保持准确性的同时实现训练过程的加速。本文介绍了 PacTrain，这是一种新颖的框架，它通过将剪枝与稀疏梯度压缩相结合来加速分布式训练。神经网络的主动剪枝使得模型权重和梯度稀疏。通过确保所有分布式训练工作者对梯度稀疏性的全局了解，我们可以在不损害准确性的情况下执行轻量级压缩通信。我们表明，PacTrain 压缩方案实现了接近最优的压缩策略，同时保持与 allreduce 原语兼容。实验评估表明，对于带宽受限条件下的代表性视觉和语言模型训练任务，与最先进的压缩系统相比，PacTrain 将训练吞吐量提高了 1.25 至 8.72 倍。

papers.title: PairGraph: An Efficient Search-space-aware Accelerator for High-performance Concurrent Pairwise Queries.
papers.abstract: Pairwise queries have been widely used in many applications. Although several approaches have been recently proposed to accelerate a single query, they still suffer from irregular memory access and fragmented data sharing when processing Concurrent Pairwise Queries (CPQ) because of the poor temporal and spatial locality of traversal overlaps (i.e., graph structure data traversed by several queries). To address these challenges, this paper presents an accelerator named PairGraph to effectively support CPQ based on a novel Search-spaceaware Processing Model (SPM). The key insight is the strong similarity of queries’ search spaces, which are primarily concentrated on the graph topology between source and destination vertices. Consequently, our approach identifies the graph structure data traversed by most of the queries according to the graph topology between multiple pairs of vertices, and then fully reuses the data worth sharing to reduce off-chip communications. The experimental results indicate that PairGraph gains speedups of $5.59 \times \sim 14.25 \times$ and $3.76 \times \sim 7.58 \times$ compared with the state-of-the-art CPU-based system Gemini and the GPU-based system Gunrock, respectively. Compared with three cutting-edge accelerators, i.e., LCCG, ScalaGraph, and ReGraph, it gains speedups of $1.67 \times \sim 2.72 \times$, $1.93 \times \sim 4.26 \times$, and $2.66 \times \sim 4.28 \times$, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 成对查询已广泛应用于许多应用程序中。尽管最近提出了几种加速单个查询的方法，但在处理并发成对查询（CPQ）时，由于遍历重叠（即多个查询遍历的图结构数据）的时空局部性较差，它们仍然面临着不规则的内存访问和碎片数据共享的问题。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种名为 PairGraph 的加速器，以基于新颖的搜索空间感知处理模型（SPM）有效支持 CPQ。关键的见解是查询搜索空间的强烈相似性，这些空间主要集中在源顶点和目标顶点之间的图拓扑上。因此，我们的方法根据多对顶点之间的图拓扑来识别大多数查询遍历的图结构数据，然后充分重用值得共享的数据以减少片外通信。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于 CPU 的系统 Gemini 和基于 GPU 的系统 Gunrock 相比，PairGraph 分别获得了 $5.59 \times \sim 14.25 \times$ 和 $3.76 \times \sim 7.58 \times$ 的加速。与LCCG、ScalaGraph和ReGraph这三种前沿加速器相比，其加速分别为$1.67 \times \sim 2.72 \times$、$1.93 \times \sim 4.26 \times$和$2.66 \times \sim 4.28 \times$。

papers.title: Parallel Dynamic Partitioning for Datapath Combinational Equivalence Checking.
papers.abstract: Combinational Equivalence Checking (CEC) is a crucial technique in electronic design automation for verifying the functional equivalence of combinational circuits. Recently, combinational circuit design increasingly incorporates more complex arithmetic structures, commonly known as datapath circuits. However, existing state-of-the-art tools often exhibit subpar performance in solving datapath CEC problems. To further advance the exploration on datapath CEC process, this study introduces PDP-CEC (Parallel Dynamic Partitioning Combinational Equivalence Checking), a novel parallel CEC approach integrating circuit partitioning and dynamic task scheduling into the CEC process, enhancing the efficiency of CEC for datapath circuits. PDP-CEC introduces an innovative method for selecting critical nodes to split the search space of the CEC problem, facilitating the efficient generation of numerous independent subproblems. Meanwhile, a dynamic task scheduling strategy is implemented in PDP-CEC to ensure load balancing and prevent hard-to-solve subproblems from stalling the entire process. Compared to the most advanced tools such as ABC and HybridCEC, PDP-CEC significantly accelerates CEC process, achieving speedups ranging from $5.11 x$ to $125.27 x$, while effectively solving approximately three times more datapath CEC problems. With excellent scalability, PDP-CEC shows substantial improvements in combinational equivalence checking for datapath circuits, offering an efficient parallel approach to meet the demands of large-scale datapath CEC tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 组合等效检查（CEC）是电子设计自动化中验证组合电路功能等效性的一项关键技术。最近，组合电路设计越来越多地采用更复杂的算术结构，通常称为数据路径电路。然而，现有最先进的工具在解决数据路径 CEC 问题时常常表现出低于标准的性能。为了进一步推进数据路径CEC过程的探索，本研究引入了PDP-CEC（并行动态分区组合等价检查），这是一种新颖的并行CEC方法，将电路分区和动态任务调度集成到CEC过程中，提高了数据路径电路的CEC效率。 PDP-CEC引入了一种创新的选择关键节点的方法来分割CEC问题的搜索空间，促进大量独立子问题的高效生成。同时，PDP-CEC中实现了动态任务调度策略，以确保负载平衡并防止难以解决的子问题导致整个过程停滞。与 ABC 和 HybridCEC 等最先进的工具相比，PDP-CEC 显着加速了 CEC 流程，实现了从 5.11 x$ 到 125.27 x$ 的加速，同时有效解决了大约三倍的数据路径 CEC 问题。凭借出色的可扩展性，PDP-CEC 在数据路径电路的组合等价检查方面显示出显着的改进，提供了一种高效的并行方法来满足大规模数据路径 CEC 任务的需求。

papers.title: ParGNN: A Scalable Graph Neural Network Training Framework on multi-GPUs.
papers.abstract: Full-batch Graph Neural Network (GNN) training is indispensable for interdisciplinary applications. Although fullbatch training has advantages in convergence accuracy and speed, it still faces challenges such as severe load imbalance and high communication traffic overhead. In order to address these challenges, we propose ParGNN, an efficient full-batch training system for GNNs, which adopts a profiler-guided adaptive load balancing method along with graph over-partition to alleviate load imbalance. Based on the over-partition results, we present a subgraph pipeline algorithm to overlap communication and computation while maintaining the accuracy of GNN training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ParGNN can not only obtain the highest accuracy but also reach the preset accuracy in the shortest time. In the end-to-end experiments performed on the four datasets, ParGNN outperforms the two state-of-theart full-batch GNN systems, PipeGCN and DGL, achieving the highest speedup of $2.7 \times$ and $21.8 \times$ times respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 全批量图神经网络（GNN）训练对于跨学科应用是必不可少的。虽然fullbatch训练在收敛精度和速度上具有优势，但仍然面临负载不平衡严重、通信流量开销高等挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 ParGNN，一种高效的 GNN 全批量训练系统，它采用分析器引导的自适应负载平衡方法以及图过度分区来缓解负载不平衡。基于过度划分的结果，我们提出了一种子图管道算法来重叠通信和计算，同时保持 GNN 训练的准确性。大量的实验表明，ParGNN不仅可以获得最高的精度，而且可以在最短的时间内达到预设的精度。在四个数据集上进行的端到端实验中，ParGNN 的性能优于两个最先进的全批量 GNN 系统 PipeGCN 和 DGL，分别实现了最高加速 2.7 倍和 21.8 倍。

papers.title: PARO: Hardware-Software Co-design with Pattern-aware Reorder-based Attention Quantization in Video Generation Models.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based video generation models have demonstrated significant potential in content creation. However, the current state-of-the-art model employing “ 3 D full attention” encounters substantial computation and storage challenges. For instance, the attention map size for $\operatorname{Cog}$ VideoX-5B requires 56.50 GB, and generating a video of 49 frames takes approximately 1 minute on an NVIDIA A100 GPU under FP16. Although model quantization has proven effective in reducing both memory and computational costs, applying it to video generation models still faces challenges in preserving algorithm performance while ensuring efficient hardware processing. To address these issues, we introduce PARO, a video generation accelerator with patternaware reorder-based attention quantization. PARO investigates the diverse attention patterns of 3D full attention and proposes a novel reorder technique to unify these patterns into a unified “block diagonal” structure. Block-wise mixed precision quantization is further applied to achieve lossless compression under an average bitwidth of 4.80 bits. In terms of hardware, to overcome the limitation of existing mixed-precision computing units could not fully utilize the attention map bitwidth to accelerate $Q K$ multiplication, PARO designs an output-bitwidth aware mixedprecision processing element (PE) array through hardwaresoftware co-design. This approach ensures that the mixedprecision characteristics are fully utilized to enhance hardware efficiency in the bottleneck attention computation. Experiments demonstrate that PARO delivers up to $2.71 \times$ improvement in end-to-end performance compared to an NVIDIA A100 GPU and achieves up to $6.38 \sim 7.05 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art ASICbased accelerators on the CogVideoX-2B and 5B models.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的视频生成模型在内容创建方面展现出了巨大的潜力。然而，当前采用“3D 全注意力”的最先进模型遇到了巨大的计算和存储挑战。例如，$\operatorname{Cog}$ VideoX-5B 的注意力图大小需要 56.50 GB，在 FP16 下的 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上生成 49 帧的视频大约需要 1 分钟。尽管模型量化已被证明可以有效降低内存和计算成本，但将其应用于视频生成模型仍然面临着保持算法性能同时确保高效硬件处理的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 PARO，这是一种视频生成加速器，具有基于模式感知重排序的注意力量化功能。 PARO 研究了 3D 全注意力的多样化注意力模式，并提出了一种新颖的重新排序技术，将这些模式统一为统一的“块对角线”结构。进一步应用分块混合精度量化，实现平均位宽4.80位下的无损压缩。在硬件方面，为了克服现有混合精度计算单元无法充分利用注意力图位宽来加速$Q K$乘法的限制，PARO通过硬件软件协同设计设计了输出位宽感知的混合精度处理元件（PE）阵列。这种方法确保充分利用混合精度特性来提高瓶颈注意力计算中的硬件效率。实验表明，与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，PARO 的端到端性能提升高达 2.71 美元\times$，并且与 CogVideoX-2B 和 5B 型号上最先进的基于 ASIC 的加速器相比，速度提升高达 6.38 美元\sim 7.05\times$。

papers.title: PASK: Cold Start Mitigation for Inference with Proactive and Selective Kernel Loading on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Today, DNN inference is widely adopted, with numerous inference services being spawned from scratch across instances in scenarios such as spot serving, serverless scaling and edge computing, where frequent start-stops are required. In this work, we first delve into the inference workflow and uncover the origins of cold start when invoking a DNN model. Specifically, DNN execution is blocked by the kernel loading process to prepare the code object executing on GPU at the DL primitive library (e.g., cuDNN and MIOpen). To tackle this, we propose PASK, a kernel loading and reusing middleware to mitigate the widespread cold start issue. Unlike the reactive kernel scheduling policy used by existing frameworks, PASK adopts a proactive strategy to interleave code loading, kernel issuing and GPU computation to achieve higher hardware utilization. To further reduce the loading overhead, PASK recycles existing loaded kernels to accomplish the DNN operator, rather than introducing new kernels for every layer. Meanwhile, PASK categorically organizes the cached kernels to efficiently find the applicable kernel for reuse and thus minimize incurred runtime overhead. We implement and evaluate PASK atop of open source DNN inference engine and primitive library on off-the-shelf GPUs. Experiments demonstrate PASK is capable of alleviating the cold start overhead of popular DNN models with $5.62 \times$ speedup on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，DNN 推理已被广泛采用，在现场服务、无服务器扩展和边缘计算等需要频繁启停的场景中，跨实例从头开始生成大量推理服务。在这项工作中，我们首先深入研究推理工作流程并揭示调用 DNN 模型时冷启动的起源。具体来说，DNN 执行被内核加载过程阻止，以准备在 DL 原语库（例如 cuDNN 和 MIOpen）上在 GPU 上执行的代码对象。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 PASK，这是一种加载和重用中间件的内核，以缓解普遍存在的冷启动问题。与现有框架使用的反应式内核调度策略不同，PASK 采用主动策略将代码加载、内核发布和 GPU 计算交错，以实现更高的硬件利用率。为了进一步减少加载开销，PASK 回收现有加载的内核来完成 DNN 算子，而不是为每一层引入新的内核。同时，PASK 对缓存的内核进行分类组织，以有效地找到可重用的适用内核，从而最大限度地减少运行时开销。我们在开源 DNN 推理引擎和现成 GPU 上的原语库之上实现和评估 PASK。实验证明 PASK 能够减轻流行 DNN 模型的冷启动开销，平均加速速度为 5.62 美元 × 美元。

papers.title: PastATPG: A Hybrid ATPG Framework for Better Test Compaction with Partial Assignment SAT.
papers.abstract: In automatic test pattern generation (ATPG), SAT-based methods are typically used to complement structural approaches, especially for addressing hard-to-detect faults. However, as the size and complexity of circuits grow, SAT-based ATPG faces challenges like pattern inflation and excessive runtime, limiting its overall performance. The key problem lies in the fact that current mainstream SAT solvers perform complete assignments for all primary inputs of the fault’s transitive fanin cone without considering the detection of other faults, making test compaction extremely difficult and time consuming. In this paper, a novel SAT solver PA-MiniSat is proposed, which is capable of generating partial assignments for solving variables and significantly reduces the number of specified bits in test cubes. As an extension of MiniSat, it employs a full-literal watching technique and a circuit-adapted heuristic branching strategy, achieving overall improved performance in ATPG. Based on PA-MiniSat, a hybrid ATPG framework PastATPG is proposed for better test compaction, which tightly integrates structural algorithms with the SAT solver into the unified test compaction flow. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other SAT solvers in pattern compaction and, in some cases, even surpasses commercial ATPG tools in terms of speed. The code is available at https://github.com/sklp-eda-lab/PastATPG.
papers.abstract_zh: 在自动测试模式生成 (ATPG) 中，基于 SAT 的方法通常用于补充结构方法，特别是用于解决难以检测的故障。然而，随着电路规模和复杂性的增长，基于 SAT 的 ATPG 面临着模式膨胀和运行时间过长等挑战，限制了其整体性能。关键问题在于，当前主流的 SAT 求解器对故障传递扇锥体的所有主要输入进行完整分配，而不考虑其他故障的检测，使得测试压缩极其困难且耗时。本文提出了一种新型 SAT 求解器 PA-MiniSat，它能够生成求解变量的部分赋值，并显着减少测试立方体中指定位数。作为 MiniSat 的扩展，它采用了全文字观察技术和电路自适应启发式分支策略，实现了 ATPG 整体性能的提高。基于PA-MiniSat，为了更好的测试压缩，提出了一种混合ATPG框架PastATPG，它将结构算法与SAT求解器紧密集成到统一的测试压缩流程中。实验结果表明，我们的方法在模式压缩方面优于其他 SAT 求解器，在某些情况下，甚至在速度方面超过了商业 ATPG 工具。代码可在 https://github.com/sklp-eda-lab/PastATPG 获取。

papers.title: PatLabor: Pareto Optimization of Timing-Driven Routing Trees.
papers.abstract: Wirelength is the fundamental metric for VLSI routing. With the advancement of new technologies, wire delay has also become a significant factor for timing performances. It is thus necessary to consider both wirelength and delay in routing tree construction, i.e., timing-driven routing trees. Prior methods propose various heuristics to balance wirelength and delay with a tunable parameter, which cannot compute the full Pareto frontier. In this work, we propose PatLabor, a practical method for timing-driven routing. PatLabor directly optimizes the Pareto set, which obtains tighter Pareto curves than prior methods and does not require parameter tuning. PatLabor obtains all Paretooptimal solutions on small-degree nets up to 9 pins and is theoretically guaranteed by provable time complexity and approximation bounds. Experimental results verify our theoretical findings and show that PatLabor obtains tighter Pareto curves than state-of-the-art methods on ICCAD-15 benchmarks. For example, PatLabor obtains up to 58.5% more Pareto-optimal solutions than prior methods for degree-9 nets.
papers.abstract_zh: 线长是 VLSI 布线的基本指标。随着新技术的进步，线路延迟也成为影响时序性能的重要因素。因此，在构建路由树（即时序驱动的路由树）时需要同时考虑线长和延迟。现有方法提出了各种启发式方法来通过可调参数来平衡线长和延迟，但这些方法无法计算完整的帕累托前沿。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PatLabor，一种用于时序驱动路由的实用方法。 PatLabor 直接优化 Pareto 集，获得比现有方法更紧的 Pareto 曲线，并且不需要参数调整。 PatLabor 在最多 9 个引脚的小度网络上获得所有 Paretooptimal 解决方案，并且理论上由可证明的时间复杂度和近似界限保证。实验结果验证了我们的理论发现，并表明 PatLabor 在 ICCAD-15 基准上获得了比最先进的方法更严格的帕累托曲线。例如，PatLabor 比之前的 9 阶网络方法获得的帕累托最优解多出 58.5%。

papers.title: PatternPaint: Practical Layout Pattern Generation Using Diffusion-Based Inpainting.
papers.abstract: Generating diverse VLSI layout patterns is essential for various downstream tasks in design for manufacturing, as design rules continually evolve during the development of new technology nodes. However, existing training-based methods for layout pattern generation rely on large datasets. In practical scenarios, especially when developing a new technology node, obtaining such extensive layout data is challenging. Consequently, training models with large datasets becomes impractical, limiting the scalability and adaptability of prior approaches. To this end, we propose PatternPaint, a diffusion-based framework capable of generating legal patterns with limited design-rule-compliant training samples. PatternPaint simplifies complex layout pattern generation into a series of inpainting processes with a template-based denoising scheme. Furthermore, we perform few-shot finetuning on a pretrained image foundation model with only 20 design-rule-compliant samples. Experimental results show that using a sub-3nm technology node (Intel 18A), our model is the only one that can generate legal patterns in complex 2D metal interconnect design rule settings among all previous works and achieves a high diversity score. Additionally, our few-shot finetuning can boost the legality rate by 1.87 X compared to the original pretrained model. As a result, we demonstrate a production-ready approach for layout pattern generation in developing new technology nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成不同的 VLSI 布局模式对于制造设计中的各种下游任务至关重要，因为设计规则在新技术节点的开发过程中不断发展。然而，现有的基于训练的布局图案生成方法依赖于大型数据集。在实际场景中，尤其是在开发新技术节点时，获取如此广泛的布局数据具有挑战性。因此，使用大型数据集训练模型变得不切实际，限制了先前方法的可扩展性和适应性。为此，我们提出了 PatternPaint，这是一种基于扩散的框架，能够通过有限的符合设计规则的训练样本生成合法模式。 PatternPaint 使用基于模板的去噪方案将复杂的布局图案生成简化为一系列修复过程。此外，我们仅使用 20 个符合设计规则的样本对预训练的图像基础模型进行少量镜头微调。实验结果表明，使用sub-3nm技术节点（Intel 18A），我们的模型是之前所有工作中唯一能够在复杂的2D金属互连设计规则设置中生成合法模式的模型，并取得了很高的多样性分数。此外，与原始预训练模型相比，我们的小样本微调可以将合法率提高 1.87 倍。因此，我们展示了一种在开发新技术节点时生成布局图案的生产就绪方法。

papers.title: PHOENIX: Pauli-Based High-Level Optimization Engine for Instruction Execution on NISQ Devices.
papers.abstract: Variational quantum algorithms (VQA) based on Hamiltonian simulation represent a specialized class of quantum programs well-suited for near-term quantum computing applications due to its modest resource requirements in terms of qubits and circuit depth. Unlike the conventional single-qubit (1 Q) and two-qubit (2 Q) gate sequence representation, Hamiltonian simulation programs are essentially composed of disciplined subroutines known as Pauli exponentiations (Pauli strings with coefficients) that are variably arranged. To capitalize on these distinct program features, this study introduces PHOENIX, a highly effective compilation framework that primarily operates at the high-level Pauli-based intermediate representation (IR) for generic Hamiltonian simulation programs. PHOENIX exploits global program optimization opportunities to the greatest extent, compared to existing SOTA methods despite some of them also utilizing similar IRs. PHOENIX employs the binary symplectic form (BSF) to formally describe Pauli strings and reformulates IR synthesis as reducing the column weights of BSF by appropriate Clifford transformations. It comes with a heuristic BSF simplification algorithm that searches for the most appropriate 2Q Clifford operators in sequence to maximally simplify the BSF at each step, until the BSF can be directly synthesized by basic 1 Q and 2Q gates. PHOENIX further performs a global ordering strategy in a TETRIS-like fashion for these simplified IR groups, carefully balancing optimization opportunities for gate cancellation, minimizing circuit depth, and managing qubit routing overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that PHOENIX outperforms SOTA VQA compilers across diverse program categories, backend ISAs, and hardware topologies.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于哈密顿模拟的变分量子算法 (VQA) 代表了一类专门的量子程序，由于其在量子位和电路深度方面的资源要求适中，因此非常适合近期量子计算应用。与传统的单量子位 (1 Q) 和双量子位 (2 Q) 门序列表示不同，哈密顿模拟程序本质上是由可变排列的称为泡利指数（带有系数的泡利串）的严格子程序组成。为了利用这些独特的程序功能，本研究引入了 PHOENIX，这是一种高效的编译框架，主要在通用哈密顿模拟程序的高级基于泡利的中间表示 (IR) 上运行。与现有的 SOTA 方法相比，PHOENIX 最大限度地利用了全局程序优化机会，尽管其中一些方法也利用了类似的 IR。 PHOENIX 采用二元辛形式 (BSF) 来正式描述泡利弦，并通过适当的 Clifford 变换将 IR 合成重新表述为减少 BSF 的列权重。它带有启发式 BSF 简化算法，可以依次搜索最合适的 2Q Clifford 算子，在每一步最大限度地简化 BSF，直到 BSF 可以由基本的 1 Q 和 2Q 门直接合成。 PHOENIX 进一步以类似俄罗斯方块的方式为这些简化的 IR 组执行全局排序策略，仔细平衡门取消的优化机会、最小化电路深度以及管理量子位路由开销。实验结果表明，PHOENIX 在不同的程序类别、后端 ISA 和硬件拓扑方面均优于 SOTA VQA 编译器。

papers.title: PICK: An SRAM-based Processing-in-Memory Accelerator for K-Nearest-Neighbor Search in Point Clouds.
papers.abstract: K-nearest neighbor (kNN) search is a fundamental operation in various point cloud applications, such as autonomous driving. However, the heavy computational intensity and memory demands of kNN search pose significant challenges for efficient implementation, especially in resource-constrained scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PICK, a processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture designed to accelerate kNN search in point cloud applications. PICK leverages bit-serial-based PIM (BS-PIM) and customized circuits to efficiently handle key operations of kNN search: distance calculation and top-k selection. The run-time off-chip access is eliminated thanks to the large on-chip memory. For distance calculation, we introduce a bit-width clipping technique to reduce the latency of bit-serial execution with negligible accuracy degradation, providing flexible trade-offs between performance and precision. Besides, we propose a filtering-and-selection strategy that realizes approximately constant time complexity for arbitrary values of k. Furthermore, a two-stage pipeline is implemented to parallelize distance calculation and top-k search, effectively hiding latency and improving throughput. According to our experiments, PICK achieves $4.17 \times$ speedup and a $4.42 \times$ energy saving over the state-of-the-art design.
papers.abstract_zh: K 最近邻 (kNN) 搜索是各种点云应用（例如自动驾驶）中的基本操作。然而，kNN 搜索的繁重计算强度和内存需求对高效实现提出了重大挑战，特别是在资源受限的场景中。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PICK，这是一种内存处理 (PIM) 架构，旨在加速点云应用中的 kNN 搜索。 PICK 利用基于位串行的 PIM (BS-PIM) 和定制电路来有效处理 kNN 搜索的关键操作：距离计算和 top-k 选择。由于具有大片上存储器，消除了运行时片外访问。对于距离计算，我们引入了位宽裁剪技术，以减少位串行执行的延迟，同时精度下降可以忽略不计，从而在性能和精度之间提供灵活的权衡。此外，我们提出了一种过滤和选择策略，可以实现任意 k 值的近似恒定的时间复杂度。此外，还实现了两级流水线来并行化距离计算和top-k搜索，有效隐藏延迟并提高吞吐量。根据我们的实验，与最先进的设计相比，PICK 实现了 4.17 美元的加速和 4.42 美元的节能。

papers.title: PIMDup: An Optimized Deduplication Design on a Real Processing-in-Memory System.
papers.abstract: Data deduplication enhances storage efficiency through non-destructive compression but is often hindered by the chunking process, which requires scanning the entire dataset. While traditional methods leveraging conventional architectures and hardware accelerators (e.g., GPUs and FPGAs) have been developed to address this issue, they continue to face challenges related to excessive data movement and associated performance degradation. These limitations stem from the von Neumann architecture, where computation and storage are separated in a processor-centric design, necessitating multiple memory hierarchy traversals and causing inefficiencies. To overcome these challenges, we explore UPMEM’s DPU, a processing-in-memory (PIM) technology that reduces data movement by performing computations directly within memory. However, designing a deduplication system for DPUs presents unique obstacles, including restricted inter-DPU data sharing, the absence of native multiplication support, and significant DPU-CPU communication overhead. In response, we propose PIMDup, a DPU-optimized deduplication system that addresses these constraints through efficient parallelization, DPU-friendly chunking techniques, and reduced data transfer volumes. Experimental results demonstrate that PIMDup improves chunking performance without compromising deduplication accuracy, achieving a $1.67 \times$ speedup over CPU-based systems while maintaining 100% result consistency.
papers.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除通过无损压缩提高了存储效率，但常常受到分块过程的阻碍，分块过程需要扫描整个数据集。虽然已经开发出利用传统架构和硬件加速器（例如 GPU 和 FPGA）的传统方法来解决此问题，但它们仍然面临与过度数据移动和相关性能下降相关的挑战。这些限制源于冯·诺依曼架构，其中计算和存储在以处理器为中心的设计中是分离的，需要多次内存层次结构遍历并导致效率低下。为了克服这些挑战，我们探索了 UPMEM 的 DPU，这是一种内存处理 (PIM) 技术，可通过直接在内存中执行计算来减少数据移动。然而，为 DPU 设计重复数据删除系统存在独特的障碍，包括 DPU 间数据共享受限、缺乏本机乘法支持以及显着的 DPU-CPU 通信开销。作为回应，我们提出了 PIMDup，这是一种 DPU 优化的重复数据删除系统，它通过高效的并行化、DPU 友好的分块技术和减少的数据传输量来解决这些限制。实验结果表明，PIMDup 在不影响重复数据删除准确性的情况下提高了分块性能，与基于 CPU 的系统相比，实现了 1.67 美元的加速，同时保持了 100% 的结果一致性。

papers.title: PIMoE: Towards Efficient MoE Transformer Deployment on NPU-PIM System through Throttle-Aware Task Offloading.
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) technique holds significant promise for scaling up Transformer models. However, the data transfer overhead and imbalanced workload hinder efficient deployment. This work presents PIMoE, a heterogeneous system combining processing-in-memory (PIM) and neural-processing-unit (NPU) to facilitate efficient MoE Transformer inference. We propose a throttle-aware task offloading method that addresses workload imbalance between NPU and PIM, achieving optimal task distribution. Furthermore, we design a near-memory-controller data condenser to address the mismatch of sparse data layout between NPU and PIM, enhancing data transfer efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that PIMoE achieves $4.5 \times$ speedup and $13.7 \times$ greater energy efficiency compared to the A 100, and $1.4 \times$ speedup over a state-of-the-art MoE platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 技术对于扩展 Transformer 模型具有重大前景。然而，数据传输开销和工作负载不平衡阻碍了高效部署。这项工作提出了 PIMoE，这是一种结合内存处理 (PIM) 和神经处理单元 (NPU) 的异构系统，以促进高效的 MoE Transformer 推理。我们提出了一种节流感知任务卸载方法，解决 NPU 和 PIM 之间的工作负载不平衡问题，实现最佳任务分配。此外，我们设计了一种近内存控制器数据冷凝器来解决 NPU 和 PIM 之间稀疏数据布局的不匹配问题，从而提高数据传输效率。实验结果表明，与 A 100 相比，PIMoE 实现了 4.5 美元的加速和 13.7 美元的能源效率，比最先进的 MoE 平台实现了 1.4 美元的加速。

papers.title: PIMPAL: Accelerating LLM Inference on Edge Devices via In-DRAM Arithmetic Lookup.
papers.abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices poses significant challenges due to their high computational and memory demands. In particular, General MatrixVector Multiplication (GEMV), a key operation in LLM inference, is highly memory-intensive, making it difficult to accelerate using conventional edge computing systems. While Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have emerged as a promising solution to this challenge, they often suffer from high area overhead or restricted computational precision. This paper proposes PIMPAL (Processing-In-Memory architecture with Parallel Arithmetic Lookup), a cost-effective PIM architecture leveraging LookUp Table (LUT)-based computation for GEMV acceleration in sLLMs (small LLMs). By replacing traditional arithmetic operations with parallel in-DRAM LUT lookups, PIMPAL significantly reduces area overhead while maintaining high performance. PIMPAL introduces three key innovations: (1) it divides DRAM bank subarrays into compute blocks for parallel LUT processing; (2) it employs Localityaware Compute Mapping (LCM) to reduce row activations by maximizing LUT access locality; and (3) it enables multi-precision computations through a LUT Aggregation (LAG) mechanism that combines results from multiple small LUTs. Experimental results show that PIMPAL achieves up to $17.8 x$ higher performance than previous LUT-based PIM designs and reduces area overhead by $40 \%$ compared to conventional processing unit-based PIM designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于计算和内存需求较高，在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 带来了重大挑战。特别是，LLM 推理中的关键操作通用矩阵向量乘法 (GEMV) 是高度内存密集型的，因此很难使用传统的边缘计算系统进行加速。虽然内存处理 (PIM) 架构已成为应对这一挑战的有前途的解决方案，但它们经常遭受高面积开销或有限的计算精度的困扰。本文提出了 PIMPAL（具有并行算术查找的内存处理架构），这是一种经济高效的 PIM 架构，利用基于查找表 (LUT) 的计算在 sLLM（小型 LLM）中实现 GEMV 加速。通过用并行的 DRAM 内 LUT 查找取代传统的算术运算，PIMPAL 显着减少了面积开销，同时保持了高性能。 PIMPAL 引入了三项关键创新：(1) 将 DRAM Bank 子阵列划分为计算块以进行并行 LUT 处理； (2) 它采用局部感知计算映射 (LCM)，通过最大化 LUT 访问局部性来减少行激活； (3) 它通过 LUT 聚合 (LAG) 机制实现多精度计算，该机制组合了多个小型 LUT 的结果。实验结果表明，与之前基于 LUT 的 PIM 设计相比，PIMPAL 的性能提高了 17.8 美元 x 美元，并且与传统的基于处理单元的 PIM 设计相比，面积开销减少了 40 美元\%$。

papers.title: PipeLink: A Pipelined Resource Sharing System for Dataflow High-Level Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Dynamically scheduled high-level synthesis (HLS) is an approach to HLS that maps programs into dataflow circuits. These circuits use distributed control for communication and therefore can be automatically pipelined. However, pipelined function call is challenging due to the absence of centralized control, thus general software programs cannot be well-supported by the HLS tools. Traditional solutions to this problem impose restrictions on pipelining when accessing the shared functions. We present PipeLink, a modular synthesis method that decomposes the synthesis into compilation stage and linking stage, which enables the fully-pipelined access to shared functions in dataflow circuits. We develop a complete HLS engine using this approach and use asynchronous circuits as the target implementation. Our engine supports pipelined access to shared function units, as well as pipelined memory access in a unified fashion. Compared to existing HLS tools, PipeLink results in 20X reduction in energy and 1.56 X improvement in throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态调度高级综合 (HLS) 是一种将程序映射到数据流电路的 HLS 方法。这些电路使用分布式控制进行通信，因此可以自动流水线化。然而，由于缺乏集中控制，流水线函数调用具有挑战性，因此HLS工具无法很好地支持通用软件程序。该问题的传统解决方案在访问共享函数时对流水线施加了限制。我们提出了 PipeLink，一种模块化综合方法，将综合分解为编译阶段和链接阶段，从而实现对数据流电路中共享函数的全流水线访问。我们使用这种方法开发了一个完整的 HLS 引擎，并使用异步电路作为目标实现。我们的引擎支持对共享功能单元的流水线访问，以及统一方式的流水线内存访问。与现有的 HLS 工具相比，PipeLink 的能耗降低了 20 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.56 倍。

papers.title: Pipirima: Predicting Patterns in Sparsity to Accelerate Matrix Algebra.
papers.abstract: While sparsity, a feature of data in many applications, provides optimization opportunities such as reducing unnecessary computations, data transfers, and storage, it causes several challenges, too. For instance, even in state-of-the-art sparse accelerators, sparsity can result in load imbalance; a performance bottleneck. To solve such challenges, our key insight is that if while reading/streaming compressed sparse matrices we can quickly anticipate the locations of the non-zero values in a sparse matrix, we can leverage this knowledge to accelerate processing sparse matrices. To enable this, we propose Pipirima, a lightweight prediction-based sparse accelerator. Inspired by traditional branch predictors, Pipirima uses resource-friendly simple counters to predict the patterns of non-zero values in the sparse matrices. We evaluate Pipirima based on sparse matrix vector multiplication (SpMV) and sparse matrix-dense matrix multiplication (SpMM) kernels on CSR compressed matrices derived from both scientific computing and transformer models. On average, our experiments show $6 \times$ and $4 \times$ speed up over Tensaurus for SpMM and SpMV, respectively on SuiteSparse workload. Pipirima also shows $40 \times$ speed up over ExTensor for SpMM. We achieve $8.3 \times$, $48.2 \times$ over Tensaurus and Extensor in lesser sparse transformer workloads. Piprima consumes $5.621 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$ area and 544.93 mW power using 45 nm technology with predictor related components as the least expensive ones.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然稀疏性是许多应用程序中数据的一个特征，它提供了优化机会，例如减少不必要的计算、数据传输和存储，但它也带来了一些挑战。例如，即使在最先进的稀疏加速器中，稀疏性也会导致负载不平衡；性能瓶颈。为了解决这些挑战，我们的主要见解是，如果在读取/流式传输压缩稀疏矩阵时我们可以快速预测稀疏矩阵中非零值的位置，我们可以利用这些知识来加速稀疏矩阵的处理。为了实现这一点，我们提出了 Pipirima，一种基于预测的轻量级稀疏加速器。受传统分支预测器的启发，Pipirima 使用资源友好型简单计数器来预测稀疏矩阵中非零值的模式。我们基于稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和稀疏矩阵-密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 内核对源自科学计算和 Transformer 模型的 CSR 压缩矩阵评估 Pipirima。平均而言，我们的实验表明，在 SuiteSparse 工作负载上，SpMM 和 SpMV 的速度分别比 Tensaurus 提高了 6 美元和 4 美元。 Pipirima 还显示 SpMM 的速度比 ExTensor 提高了 40 倍。在稀疏的 Transformer 工作负载中，我们比 Tensaurus 和 Extensor 实现了 8.3 美元、48.2 美元。 Piprima 使用 45 nm 技术，消耗 5.621 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$ 面积和 544.93 mW 功率，预测器相关组件是最便宜的。

papers.title: PISA: Efficient Precision-Slice Framework for LLMs with Adaptive Numerical Type.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed numerous AI applications, with on-device deployment becoming increasingly important for reducing cloud computing costs and protecting user privacy. However, the astronomical model size and limited hardware resources pose significant deployment challenges. Model quantization is a promising approach to mitigate this gap, but the presence of outliers in LLMs reduces its effectiveness. Previous efforts addressed this issue by employing compression-based encoding for mixed-precision quantization. These approaches struggle to balance model accuracy with hardware efficiency due to their value-wise outlier granularity and complex encoding/decoding hardware logic. To address this, we propose PISA (Precision-Slice Framework), an acceleration framework that exploits massive sparsity in the higher-order part of LLMs by splitting 16-bit values into a 4-bit/12-bit format. Crucially, PISA introduces an early bird mechanism that leverages the high-order 4-bit computation to predict the importance of the full calculation result. This mechanism enables efficient computational skips by continuing execution only for important computations and using preset values for less significant ones. This scheme can be efficiently integrated with existing hardware accelerators like systolic arrays without complex encoding/decoding. As a result, PISA outperforms state-of-the-art precision-aware accelerators, achieving a $1.3-4.3 \times$ performance boost and $14.3-66.7 \%$ greater energy efficiency, with minimal model accuracy loss. This approach enables more efficient ondevice LLM deployment, effectively balancing computational efficiency and model accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已经改变了众多人工智能应用程序，设备上部署对于降低云计算成本和保护用户隐私变得越来越重要。然而，天文数字的模型大小和有限的硬件资源带来了巨大的部署挑战。模型量化是缩小这一差距的一种有前景的方法，但法学硕士中异常值的存在降低了其有效性。之前的努力通过采用基于压缩的编码进行混合精度量化来解决这个问题。由于其价值方面的离群值粒度和复杂的编码/解码硬件逻辑，这些方法很难平衡模型准确性和硬件效率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 PISA（精确切片框架），这是一种加速框架，通过将 16 位值拆分为 4 位/12 位格式来利用 LLM 高阶部分的大量稀疏性。至关重要的是，PISA引入了早鸟机制，利用高阶4位计算来预测完整计算结果的重要性。该机制通过仅继续执行重要的计算并使用预设值来执行不太重要的计算，从而实现高效的计算跳过。该方案可以有效地与现有的硬件加速器（如脉动阵列）集成，而无需复杂的编码/解码。因此，PISA 的性能优于最先进的精度感知加速器，实现了 1.3-4.3 美元的性能提升和 14.3-66.7 美元的能效提升，同时模型精度损失最小。这种方法可以实现更高效的设备上 LLM 部署，有效平衡计算效率和模型准确性。

papers.title: PiSPICE: Accelerating Post-Layout SPICE Simulation via Essential Parasitic Identification.
papers.abstract: As process nodes scale to more advanced technologies, post-layout simulations for integrated circuits have become increasingly complex, involving billions to trillions of nodes. The growing design complexity and transistor integration require more accurate and efficient post-layout SPICE simulations. However, existing methods for solving large-scale post-layout circuits face significant challenges due to high computational costs. In this paper, we propose a new approach, PiSPICE, which utilizes adjoint sensitivity analysis to identify critical parasitics and eliminate non-critical ones, effectively reducing the simulation scale and improving speed. By modeling parasitics and performing sensitivity analysis on pre-layout circuits, we significantly reduce the computational burden and avoid the overhead of directly analyzing sensitivities in large-scale postlayout circuits. By retaining only the critical parasitics and applying model order reduction to minimize their impact, while eliminating non-critical parasitics, PiSPICE achieves a speedup of up to 17.27 x in simulation with an error margin of less than 0.78% compared to the commercial simulator Spectre.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着工艺节点扩展到更先进的技术，集成电路的布局后仿真变得越来越复杂，涉及数十亿到数万亿个节点。不断增长的设计复杂性和晶体管集成度需要更准确、更高效的布局后 SPICE 仿真。然而，由于高计算成本，解决大规模布局后电路的现有方法面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法PiSPICE，它利用伴随灵敏度分析来识别关键寄生参数并消除非关键寄生参数，有效减小仿真规模并提高速度。通过对寄生效应进行建模并对布局前电路进行灵敏度分析，我们显着减少了计算负担，并避免了直接分析大规模布局后电路中的灵敏度的开销。通过仅保留关键寄生参数并应用模型降阶以最大程度地减少其影响，同时消除非关键寄生参数，与商业模拟器 Spectre 相比，PiSPICE 的仿真速度提高了 17.27 倍，误差范围小于 0.78%。

papers.title: POLARIS: Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Mitigating Power Side-Channel Leakage.
papers.abstract: Microelectronic systems are widely used in many sensitive applications (e.g., manufacturing, energy, defense). These systems increasingly handle sensitive data (e.g., encryption key) and are vulnerable to diverse threats, such as, power sidechannel attacks, which infer sensitive data through dynamic power profile. In this paper, we present a novel framework, POLARIS for mitigating power side channel leakage using an Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) guided masking approach. POLARIS uses an unsupervised process to automatically build a tailored training dataset and utilize it to train a masking model. The POLARIS framework outperforms state-of-the-art mitigation solutions (e.g., VALIANT) in terms of leakage reduction, execution time, and overhead across large designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 微电子系统广泛应用于许多敏感应用（例如制造、能源、国防）。这些系统越来越多地处理敏感数据（例如加密密钥），并且容易受到各种威胁，例如电源侧信道攻击，这种攻击通过动态电源配置文件推断敏感数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 POLARIS，用于使用可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 引导屏蔽方法来减轻电源侧通道泄漏。 POLARIS 使用无监督流程自动构建定制的训练数据集，并利用它来训练掩蔽模型。 POLARIS 框架在减少泄漏、执行时间和大型设计的开销方面优于最先进的缓解解决方案（例如 VALIANT）。

papers.title: PoP-ECC: Robust and Flexible Error Correction against Multi-Bit Upsets in DNN Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in safety-critical systems require high reliability. Many systems deploy Error Correction Codes (ECCs) to protect DNNs from memory errors. However, continuous process scaling increases memory errors in severity and frequency, necessitating strong protection against Multi-Bit Upsets (MBUs). This paper proposes Parities of Parities ECC (PoP-ECC), a novel two-tier memory protection scheme designed to provide robust, efficient, and flexible protection against MBUs. PoP-ECC generates Virtual Parities (VPs), which are used to compute secondlevel parities called Parities of Parities (PPs). This two-level ECC structure allows for dynamic error correction tailored to varying error patterns, ensuring system reliability with minimal memory overhead. Our evaluation demonstrates that PoP-ECC can tolerate significantly higher MBU ratios compared to state-of-the-art solutions, with negligible delay, area, and power overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全关键系统中的深度神经网络 (DNN) 需要高可靠性。许多系统部署纠错码 (ECC) 来保护 DNN 免受内存错误的影响。然而，持续的进程扩展会增加内存错误的严重性和频率，因此需要针对多位翻转 (MBU) 提供强有力的保护。本文提出了奇偶校验 ECC (PoP-ECC)，这是一种新颖的两层内存保护方案，旨在针对 MBU 提供强大、高效且灵活的保护。 PoP-ECC 生成虚拟奇偶校验 (VP)，用于计算称为奇偶校验 (PP) 的二级奇偶校验。这种两级 ECC 结构允许根据不同的错误模式进行动态纠错，从而以最小的内存开销确保系统可靠性。我们的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，PoP-ECC 可以承受明显更高的 MBU 比率，并且延迟、面积和功率开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Power-Constrained Printed Neuromorphic Hardware Training.
papers.abstract: With the rising demand for ultra-low-cost and flexible electronics in applications like smart packaging and wearable health monitoring, printed electronics provide an affordable, adaptable, and customizable alternative to conventional silicon. However, these systems often rely on printed batteries or energy harvesters with limited power capacity, making strict power budgets critical. Printed neuromorphic circuits (pNCs) are promising for their analog signal processing, reduced circuit complexity, and energy efficiency in low-power environments. Nonetheless, maintaining robust performance under strict power constraints remains challenging, necessitating advanced optimization techniques. In this work, we propose an augmented Lagrangian approach to enforce task-specific power constraints in pNCs, validated across 13 benchmark datasets. Our method preserves accuracy within strict power budgets while achieving Pareto-optimal power-accuracy trade-offs in a single training run. In contrast, the penalty-based method, which serves as the baseline, requires up to 150 runs per dataset to generate the Pareto front. For low-power scenarios ($\approx 20 \%$ of the original power), our method demonstrates a $52 \times$ improvement in accuracy-to-power ratio over the baseline. At higher power budgets $(\approx 80 \%$ of the original power), it achieves a $59 \times$ improvement, maintaining competitive performance. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves $\mathbf{8 1. 8 2 \%}$ accuracy with p-tanh activation function (AF) at high power budgets and excels with p-Clipped_ReLU AF under low power constraints. This highlights the computational efficiency and effectiveness of our approach for power-constrained circuit design.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着智能包装和可穿戴健康监测等应用对超低成本和柔性电子产品的需求不断增长，印刷电子产品为传统硅提供了一种经济实惠、适应性强且可定制的替代品。然而，这些系统通常依赖于功率容量有限的印刷电池或能量采集器，因此严格的功率预算至关重要。印刷神经形态电路 (pNC) 因其模拟信号处理、降低电路复杂性以及低功耗环境中的能源效率而前景广阔。尽管如此，在严格的功耗限制下保持稳健的性能仍然具有挑战性，需要先进的优化技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种增强拉格朗日方法来强制 pNC 中特定于任务的功率约束，并在 13 个基准数据集上进行了验证。我们的方法在严格的功率预算内保持准确性，同时在单次训练运行中实现帕累托最优功率精度权衡。相比之下，作为基线的基于惩罚的方法需要每个数据集最多运行 150 次才能生成帕累托前沿。对于低功耗场景（原始功率的 $\大约 20 \%$），我们的方法显示精度与功率比比基线提高了 $52 \times$。在较高的功率预算 $（原始功率的约 80 \%$）下，它实现了 $59 \times$ 的改进，保持了具有竞争力的性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法在高功率预算下使用 p-tanh 激活函数 (AF) 实现了 $\mathbf{8 1. 8 2 \%}$ 精度，并且在低功率约束下使用 p-Clipped_ReLU AF 表现出色。这凸显了我们的功率受限电路设计方法的计算效率和有效性。

papers.title: Power-Grid Structure Exploration with Unified Sequence-based Learning Framework.
papers.abstract: As increasing gap of the shrinking ratio between device and metal pitches under advanced nodes, power-grid (PG) structure plays a critical role in circuit performance considering power integrity. Initial PG structures, as initiating implementation fundamentals, dominate optimization space. To address initial structures on industrial flow, we propose the first unified framework fueled by novel sequence-based structure generator and Transformer-based predictor, providing accurate static voltage-drop estimation. Learned embeddings are then adopted to determine promising candidates with Pareto frontier during structure optimization. The predictor is demonstrated in different scenarios under 3 nm and 2 nm technology with average 0.011% maximum absolute error of drop percentage while the optimized structures reduce 15% PG utilization with 34% worst timing-slack improvement on industrial designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着先进节点下器件和金属节距之间缩小比率的差距不断增大，考虑到电源完整性，电网（PG）结构在电路性能中起着至关重要的作用。初始 PG 结构作为启动实现的基础，主导着优化空间。为了解决工业流程的初始结构，我们提出了第一个由新颖的基于序列的结构生成器和基于变压器的预测器推动的统一框架，提供准确的静态压降估计。然后，在结构优化过程中，采用学习嵌入来确定具有帕累托前沿的有前途的候选者。该预测器在 3 nm 和 2 nm 技术的不同场景中进行了演示，平均最大绝对误差下降百分比为 0.011%，而优化结构降低了 15% PG 利用率，工业设计的最差时序裕度改善了 34%。

papers.title: PracMHBench: Re-evaluating Model-Heterogeneous Federated Learning Based on Practical Edge Device Constraints.
papers.abstract: Federating heterogeneous models on edge devices with diverse resource constraints has been a notable trend in recent years. Compared to traditional federated learning (FL) that assumes an identical model architecture to cooperate, model-heterogeneous FL is more practical and flexible since the model can be customized to satisfy the deployment requirement. Unfortunately, no prior work ever dives into the existing model-heterogeneous FL algorithms under the practical edge device constraints and provides quantitative analysis on various data scenarios and metrics, which motivates us to rethink and re-evaluate this paradigm. In our work, we construct the first system platform PracMHBench to evaluate model-heterogeneous FL on practical constraints of edge devices, where diverse model heterogeneity algorithms are classified and tested on multiple data tasks and metrics. Based on the platform, we perform extensive experiments on these algorithms under the different edge constraints to observe their applicability and the corresponding heterogeneity pattern.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，在具有不同资源限制的边缘设备上联合异构模型已成为一个显着趋势。与采用相同模型架构进行协作的传统联邦学习（FL）相比，模型异构 FL 更加实用和灵活，因为模型可以定制以满足部署要求。不幸的是，之前没有任何工作深入研究实际边缘设备限制下的现有模型异构 FL 算法，并提供对各种数据场景和指标的定量分析，这促使我们重新思考和重新评估这种范式。在我们的工作中，我们构建了第一个系统平台 PracMHBench，用于在边缘设备的实际约束下评估模型异构 FL，其中在多个数据任务和指标上对不同的模型异构算法进行分类和测试。基于该平台，我们在不同的边缘约束下对这些算法进行了广泛的实验，以观察它们的适用性和相应的异质性模式。

papers.title: Precon: A Precision-Convertible Architecture for Accelerating Quantized Deep Learning Models across Various Domains Including LLMs.
papers.abstract: The sensitivity of LLMs to quantization has driven the development of hardware accelerators tailored for specific low-precision configurations such as weight-only quantization and mixed-precision, which can introduce inefficiencies in dedicated hardware architecture. In this work, we propose Precon, a precision-convertible architecture designed to accelerate various quantized deep learning models, particularly LLMs, through a unified processing unit. By enabling on-the-fly switching between half-float (FP16) decoding and integer (INT) decomposition, the design effectively supports INT4-FP16, INT4-INT4, and INT4INT8 arithmetic within shared logic. Precon achieves up to $4.1 \times$ speedup and 81.4% reduction in energy consumption compared to the baseline across various domains, including the support of both accurate and efficient acceleration of quantized LLMs.
papers.abstract_zh: LLM 对量化的敏感性推动了针对特定低精度配置（例如仅权重量化和混合精度）定制的硬件加速器的开发，这可能会导致专用硬件架构效率低下。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Precon，一种精度可转换的架构，旨在通过统一的处理单元加速各种量化深度学习模型，特别是法学硕士。通过在半浮点 (FP16) 解码和整数 (INT) 分解之间实现动态切换，该设计可有效支持共享逻辑内的 INT4-FP16、INT4-INT4 和 INT4INT8 算术。与各个领域的基准相比，Precon 实现了高达 4.1 美元的加速和 81.4% 的能耗降低，包括支持量化 LLM 的准确和高效加速。

papers.title: PreDAC: An Efficient Framework of Pre-Refining Enhanced Design Space Exploration for Approximate Computing.
papers.abstract: Approximate computing has emerged as a promising solution in energy-efficiency applications. Recently, attention has shifted from approximate components to Design Space Exploration (DSE) algorithms. However, traditional DSE algorithms face challenges in efficiently obtaining optimal solutions within large and complex design spaces. This paper introduces a prerefining enhanced design space exploration framework that provides customized design space and cost-performance formula for applications. Experimental results demonstrate that integrating this pre-refining step into various DSE algorithms leads to substantial performance gains, including up to $87 \times$ speedup and a 23% improvement in hardware overhead. Moreover, the innovative cost-performance-based DSE algorithm attains a $7.7 \times$ acceleration and further optimizes hardware metrics by an additional 8.8% compared to advanced frameworks employing the same pre-refinement.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似计算已成为能源效率应用中一种有前景的解决方案。最近，注意力已经从近似组件转移到设计空间探索（DSE）算法。然而，传统的 DSE 算法面临着在大型复杂设计空间中高效获得最优解决方案的挑战。本文介绍了一种预精炼增强型设计空间探索框架，为应用程序提供定制设计空间和性价比公式。实验结果表明，将此预精炼步骤集成到各种 DSE 算法中可带来显着的性能提升，包括高达 87 美元的加速和 23% 的硬件开销改进。此外，与采用相同预优化的高级框架相比，创新的基于性价比的 DSE 算法实现了 7.7 美元的加速，并进一步优化了硬件指标 8.8%。

papers.title: Principle-based Dataflow Optimization for Communication Lower Bound in Operator-Fused Tensor Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Although design space exploration (DSE) is good at finding dataflow for optimal memory access in tensor accelerators, it is very timing-consuming and lacks architecture insight. In this study, we for the first time propose several principles for dataflow optimization that provides lower bound of memory communication for tensor operators such as matrix multiplication. Through these principles we can calculate the best tiling, scheduling and mapping for both intra- and inter-operator dataflow. In addition, we can identify all the tensor-wise opertor fusion that are profitable in memory communication, so we propose FuseCU, a new architecture that supports these profitable fusion which can be applied to existing spatial architectures for data movement saving. Experimental results show that FuseCU delivers 63.6%, 62.4% and 38.7% data movement saving and $1.33 \times, 1.25 \times$ and $1.14 \times$ speedup compared to the TPUv4i, Gemmini and Planaria designs without increasing buffer size or bandwidth. Additionally, FuseCU is open-sourced.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管设计空间探索（DSE）擅长在张量加速器中寻找最佳内存访问的数据流，但它非常耗时且缺乏架构洞察力。在这项研究中，我们首次提出了数据流优化的几个原则，为矩阵乘法等张量运算符提供了内存通信的下限。通过这些原则，我们可以计算运营商内部和运营商之间数据流的最佳切片、调度和映射。此外，我们可以识别所有在内存通信中有利可图的张量算子融合，因此我们提出了 FuseCU，一种支持这些有利可图的融合的新架构，可以应用于现有的空间架构以节省数据移动。实验结果表明，与 TPUv4i、Gemmini 和 Planaria 设计相比，在不增加缓冲区大小或带宽的情况下，FuseCU 可节省 63.6%、62.4% 和 38.7% 的数据移动，并实现 1.33 美元、1.25 美元和 1.14 美元的加速。此外，FuseCU 是开源的。

papers.title: Process-Variation-Aware Design Optimization for Wavelength-Routed Optical Networks-on-Chip.
papers.abstract: With low latency and collision-free communication, wavelength-routed optical networks-on-chip (WRONoC) become an effective solution to the growing demands for multi-core communications. Microring resonators (MRRs), the primary optical components in WRONoC, are susceptible to process variation. Under process variation, the MRR’s transmission spectrum shifts, results reduced signal power and increased crosstalk. However, the impacts caused by process variation have not yet been considered in WRONoC designs. In this work, we propose a methodology to optimize the MRR radii and signal wavelengths to counter process variation. Specifically, we construct analytical models of expected signal power under MRR process variation and develop optimization methods to maximize the expected signal transmission power in WRONoC. Results show up to 7.51 dB improvement in worst-case expected signal transmission power compared to designs that do not consider process variation.
papers.abstract_zh: 凭借低延迟和无冲突通信，波长路由片上光网络 (WRONoC) 成为满足不断增长的多核通信需求的有效解决方案。微环谐振器 (MRR) 是 WRONoC 中的主要光学元件，很容易受到工艺变化的影响。在工艺变化的情况下，MRR 的传输频谱会发生变化，导致信号功率降低并串扰增加。然而，WRONoC 设计中尚未考虑工艺变化造成的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种优化 MRR 半径和信号波长以应对过程变化的方法。具体来说，我们构建了 MRR 过程变化下预期信号功率的分析模型，并开发了优化方法以最大化 WRONoC 中的预期信号传输功率。结果显示，与不考虑工艺变化的设计相比，最坏情况下的预期信号传输功率提高了 7.51 dB。

papers.title: Property-driven Parallel Symbolic Model Checking of LTL.
papers.abstract: Model checking is an automated method used to formally verify systems by checking them against properties. However, a major problem in model checking is the state explosion. To overcome this challenge, one approach is to utilize parallel processing capabilities to either speed up computations or handle larger-scale problems. Explicit model checking has lower computational complexity and can be easily parallelized. There are numerous parallel explicit model checking algorithms available in the literature. Symbolic model checking offers significant advantages over explicit model checking in terms of problem scalability and verification speed. However, treating states encountered during the search as sets poses a challenge in devising efficient parallel algorithms. As a result, current research on parallelizing symbolic model checking has primarily focused on reachability analysis or safety properties, rather than attempting to parallelize the nested fixpoint calculations. In this paper, we propose a novel property-driven approach for parallel symbolic model checking of full LTL. Our algorithm introduces a fair model state labelling function that forms a partition of the nested fixpoint across the product combining the model and the property Büchi automaton. The experimental results demonstrate significant speedup, ranging from 2.81 to 17.19 times compared to sequential approaches on a 32-core machine. Moreover, in comparison to existing parallel model checking methods, our approach not only surpasses those relying on BDD libraries with a maximum improvement of up to 134% and an average improvement of 33.1% but also demonstrates significant superiority over the state-of-theart parallel explicit model checker.
papers.abstract_zh: 模型检查是一种自动化方法，用于通过根据属性检查系统来正式验证系统。然而，模型检查的一个主要问题是状态爆炸。为了克服这一挑战，一种方法是利用并行处理能力来加速计算或处理更大规模的问题。显式模型检查计算复杂度较低，并且可以轻松并行化。文献中有许多并行显式模型检查算法。就问题可扩展性和验证速度而言，符号模型检查比显式模型检查具有显着优势。然而，将搜索过程中遇到的状态视为集合对设计高效的并行算法提出了挑战。因此，当前关于并行化符号模型检查的研究主要集中在可达性分析或安全属性上，而不是尝试并行化嵌套固定点计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的属性驱动方法，用于完整 LTL 的并行符号模型检查。我们的算法引入了公平模型状态标记函数，该函数形成了产品中嵌套固定点的划分，结合了模型和属性 Büchi 自动机。实验结果表明，与 32 核机器上的顺序方法相比，速度显着提高，范围为 2.81 至 17.19 倍。此外，与现有的并行模型检查方法相比，我们的方法不仅超越了依赖 BDD 库的方法，最大改进高达 134％，平均改进为 33.1％，而且还表现出优于最先进的并行显式模型检查器的显着优势。

papers.title: PUFiM: A Robust and Efficient FeFET-Based Security Solution Merging Physical Unclonable Function with Compute-in-Memory for Edge AI.
papers.abstract: Compute-in-memory (CiM) has become a promising candidate for edge AI by reducing data movements through insitu operations. However, this emerging computational paradigm also poses the vulnerability of model leakage as the weights are stored in plaintext for computing. While prior works have explored lightweight encryption methods, CiM is usually considered a separate module instead of a system component, leaving the origin of keys unclear and unprotected. Physical unclonable functions (PUFs) offer a potential origin of keys, but a comprehensive framework for securing key generation and delivery remains lacking. Besides, the complementary ciphertext storage incurs substantial costs and degrades the performance. This work proposes PUFiM, a robust and efficient security solution for edge computing based on ferroelectric FETs (FeFETs). For the first time, a strong PUF is synergized with CiM to enable authentication, key generation, and encrypted computations within a unified array for comprehensive protection. To achieve this synergization, a high-density hybrid storage and computation approach combining PUF and weight bits via multi-level cell (MLC) FeFETs is proposed. Besides, two PUF enhancement techniques and a novel mapping scheme are developed to improve security and efficiency further. Results show that PUFiM withstands PUF modeling attacks with up to $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ samples. Moreover, PUFiM reduces the inference accuracy by $\gt 60 \%$ under 95% key leakage and achieves $\gt 9.7 \times$ compute density and $\gt 1.2 \times$ energy efficiency improvement compared with the state-of-the-art SRAM/NVM secure CiMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算（CiM）通过原位操作减少数据移动，已成为边缘人工智能的一个有前途的候选者。然而，这种新兴的计算范式也带来了模型泄漏的漏洞，因为权重以明文形式存储以进行计算。虽然之前的工作已经探索了轻量级加密方法，但 CiM 通常被认为是一个单独的模块而不是系统组件，导致密钥的来源不清楚且不受保护。物理不可克隆函数 (PUF) 提供了潜在的密钥来源，但仍然缺乏用于保护密钥生成和传递的综合框架。此外，互补的密文存储会产生大量成本并降低性能。这项工作提出了 PUFiM，这是一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的强大且高效的边缘计算安全解决方案。强大的 PUF 首次与 CiM 协同作用，在统一阵列内实现身份验证、密钥生成和加密计算，从而实现全面保护。为了实现这种协同作用，提出了一种通过多级单元 (MLC) FeFET 将 PUF 和权重位相结合的高密度混合存储和计算方法。此外，还开发了两种 PUF 增强技术和一种新颖的映射方案，以进一步提高安全性和效率。结果表明，PUFiM 可抵御高达 $\mathbf{1 0 M}$ 样本的 PUF 建模攻击。此外，与最先进的 SRAM/NVM 安全 CiM 相比，PUFiM 在 95% 密钥泄漏的情况下将推理精度降低 $\gt 60 \%$，并实现 $\gt 9.7 \times$ 计算密度和 $\gt 1.2 \times$ 能效提升。

papers.title: PyraNet: A Multi-Layered Hierarchical Dataset for Verilog.
papers.abstract: Recently, there has been a growing interest in leveraging Large Language Models for Verilog code generation. However, the current quality of the generated Verilog code remains suboptimal. This is largely due to the absence of well-defined, well-organized datasets with high-quality samples, as well as a lack of innovative fine-tuning methods and models specifically trained on Verilog. In this paper, we introduce a novel open-source dataset and a corresponding fine-tuning technique, which utilizes a multi-layered structure that we refer to as PyraNet. Our experiments demonstrate that employing the proposed dataset and fine-tuning approach leads to a more accurate fine-tuned model, producing syntactically and functionally correct Verilog code. The evaluation results show improvements by up-to 32.6% in comparison to the CodeLlama-7B baseline model and upto 16.7% in comparison to the state-of-the-art models using VerilogEval evaluation platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，人们对利用大型语言模型来生成 Verilog 代码越来越感兴趣。然而，当前生成的 Verilog 代码的质量仍然不够理想。这主要是由于缺乏定义明确、组织良好的高质量样本数据集，以及缺乏专门针对 Verilog 训练的创新微调方法和模型。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的开源数据集和相应的微调技术，该技术利用了我们称为 PyraNet 的多层结构。我们的实验表明，采用所提出的数据集和微调方法可以产生更准确的微调模型，从而生成语法和功能正确的 Verilog 代码。评估结果显示，与 CodeLlama-7B 基线模型相比，性能提升高达 32.6%，与使用 VerilogEval 评估平台的最先进模型相比，性能提升高达 16.7%。

papers.title: Quantum-Resistant Security: PQC Readiness and Research Challenges (Invited).
papers.abstract: What is your PQC-readiness” - in this paper, we have explored this problem, some of the key challenges to address it and how ciphersuite dependency graphs alongwith observability plays a vital role in addressing some of those challenges. Quantum computing capabilities are evolving fast and on course to develop a cryptographically relevant quantum computer (CRQC). With that several widely used classical cryptography protocols such as RSA are poised to be broken in the next few years. NIST has announced three cryptography protocols as part of the first batch of post-quantum cryptography standards. However, implementation and adoption of quantum-resistant cryptography is a hard problem given the complexities of today’s internet and computing stack. Our work has led to development of algorithms and a system Quartz (Quantum Risk and Threat Analyzer) for observability for quantum vulnerabilities for cryptography suites, where they are used, and analyzing their risks. In that context, we used observability, and the concept of ciphersuite dependency graphs in order to determine use of quantum-unsafe cryptography, and its influence on cryptography supply chain, and generation of cryptography bill of materials (CBOM).
papers.abstract_zh: 你的 PQC 准备情况如何”——在本文中，我们探讨了这个问题、解决该问题的一些关键挑战，以及密码套件依赖图和可观测性如何在解决其中一些挑战中发挥至关重要的作用。量子计算能力正在快速发展，并正在开发与密码相关的量子计算机 (CRQC)。因此，几种广泛使用的经典密码协议（例如 RSA）将在未来几年内被破解。NIST 已宣布三种密码协议作为第一批的一部分然而，考虑到当今互联网和计算堆栈的复杂性，抗量子密码学的实施和采用是一个难题，我们的工作导致了算法和 Quartz 系统（量子风险和威胁分析器）的开发，用于观察密码学套件的量子漏洞，并分析其风险。在这种情况下，我们使用可观察性和密码套件依赖图的概念来确定量子不安全密码学的使用。及其对密码学供应链和密码学物料清单（CBOM）生成的影响。

papers.title: Query-Based Black-Box Stealthy Sensor Attacks on Cyber-Physical Systems.
papers.abstract: We study the vulnerability of Cyber-physical systems (CPS) under stealthy sensor attacks in black-box scenarios. “Black-box” refers to scenarios where the attacker has minimal knowledge of the target system. Designing a stealthy sensor attack sequence under this scenario has two main challenges. The first one lies in ensuring the stealthiness of the sensor attack, meaning does not trigger an alert when applying the generated sensor attack sequence to the CPS. The second one is maintaining stealthiness throughout the attack generation process, indicating the limitation on the alarm frequency when generating the attack sequence. To address the above challenges, we develop a querybased black-box stealthy attack framework to violate the safety of the CPS. To maintain stealthiness during training, an active learning method has been introduced to extract the detector’s information to a time series model. The stealthy attack sequence is then generated from that model. Experiments on four numerical simulations and a high-fidelity simulator demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究黑盒场景中信息物理系统（CPS）在隐形传感器攻击下的脆弱性。 “黑盒”是指攻击者对目标系统知之甚少的情况。在这种情况下设计隐形传感器攻击序列有两个主要挑战。第一个在于确保传感器攻击的隐秘性，这意味着将生成的传感器攻击序列应用于 CPS 时不会触发警报。第二个是在整个攻击生成过程中保持隐秘性，即生成攻击序列时对报警频率的限制。为了解决上述挑战，我们开发了一种基于查询的黑盒隐形攻击框架来侵犯 CPS 的安全性。为了在训练过程中保持隐秘性，引入了主动学习方法来将探测器的信息提取到时间序列模型中。然后从该模型生成隐形攻击序列。四个数值模拟和一个高保真模拟器的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。

papers.title: Quorum: Zero-Training Unsupervised Anomaly Detection using Quantum Autoencoders.
papers.abstract: Detecting mission-critical anomalous events and data is a crucial challenge across various industries, including finance, healthcare, and energy. Quantum computing has recently emerged as a powerful tool for tackling several machine learning tasks, but training quantum machine learning models remains challenging, particularly due to the difficulty of gradient calculation. The challenge is even greater for anomaly detection, where unsupervised learning methods are essential to ensure practical applicability. To address these issues, we propose Quorum, the first quantum anomaly detection framework designed for unsupervised learning that operates without requiring any training.
papers.abstract_zh: 检测任务关键型异常事件和数据是各个行业（包括金融、医疗保健和能源）面临的重大挑战。量子计算最近已成为解决多种机器学习任务的强大工具，但训练量子机器学习模型仍然具有挑战性，特别是由于梯度计算的困难。异常检测面临的挑战更大，无监督学习方法对于确保实际适用性至关重要。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Quorum，这是第一个专为无监督学习而设计的量子异常检测框架，无需任何训练即可运行。

papers.title: RADiT: Redundancy-Aware Diffusion Transformer Acceleration Leveraging Timestep Similarity.
papers.abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have demonstrated unprecedented performance across various generative tasks including image and video generation. However, a large amount of computations on the inference process and iterative sampling steps in the DiT models result in high computational costs, leading to substantial latency and energy consumption challenges. To address these issues, we propose a redundancy-aware DiT (RADiT), a novel software-hardware co-optimization accelerator for DiTs that minimizes redundant operations in the iterative sampling stages. We identify data redundancy by evaluating blockwise input features and skip redundant computations by reusing results from consecutive timesteps. Furthermore, to minimize accuracy degradation and maximize computational efficiency, the Dynamic Threshold Scaling Module (DTSM) and Compress and Compare Unit (CCU) are employed in the redundancy detection process. This approach enables DiTs to achieve up to $1.8 \times$ and $1.7 \times$ faster speeds for image and video generation, respectively, without compromising quality, along with 41% and 45.5% reductions in energy consumption. Our RADiT scheme improves throughput by $1.67 \times$ and $1.76 \times$ for image and video generation tasks, respectively, while maintaining output quality and significantly reducing energy consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩散变压器 (DiT) 在各种生成任务（包括图像和视频生成）中表现出了前所未有的性能。然而，DiT 模型中推理过程和迭代采样步骤的大量计算导致计算成本高昂，从而带来巨大的延迟和能耗挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种冗余感知 DiT (RADiT)，这是一种新颖的 DiT 软硬件协同优化加速器，可最大限度地减少迭代采样阶段的冗余操作。我们通过评估分块输入特征来识别数据冗余，并通过重用连续时间步的结果来跳过冗余计算。此外，为了最大限度地减少精度下降并最大限度地提高计算效率，在冗余检测过程中采用了动态阈值缩放模块（DTSM）和压缩和比较单元（CCU）。这种方法使 DiT 的图像和视频生成速度分别提高了 1.8 美元和 1.7 美元，且不影响质量，同时能耗降低了 41% 和 45.5%。我们的 RADiT 方案将图像和视频生成任务的吞吐量分别提高了 1.67 美元和 1.76 美元，同时保持输出质量并显着降低能耗。

papers.title: Ragnar: Exploring Volatile-Channel Vulnerabilities on RDMA NIC.
papers.abstract: With the surge in data computation, Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) becomes crucial to offering low-latency and highthroughput communication for data centers, but it faces new security threats. This paper presents RAGNAR, a comprehensive suite of hardware-contention-based volatile-channel attacks leveraging the underexplored security vulnerabilities in RDMA hardware. Through comprehensive microbenchmark reverse engineering, we analyze RDMA NICs at multiple granularity levels and then construct covert-channel attacks, achieving 3.2x the bandwidth of state-of-the-art RDMA-targeted attacks on CX-5.
