Experimental results show that while maintaining nearly identical accuracy, STREAM outperforms the SOTA approximate methods DDSketch (up to $10 \times 4.7 \times$ on average) and KLL (up to $71.2 \times 10.1 \times$ on average).
papers.abstract_zh: 中位数（MED）是衡量集中趋势的重要统计量。然而，精确的 MED 计算仍然成本高昂，即使是最先进的 (SOTA) 算法也无法满足（近）实时处理需求。虽然近似 MED 算法已成为一种有前途的候选算法，但现有方法忽略了应用程序内时空相似性的潜在机会，并且无法提供执行时间和准确性之间的特定于应用程序的权衡。我们的目标是设计一种增强的近似MED算法STREAM，它能够利用时空相似性来实现桶的重用，并建立可调粒度的桶机制来满足特定应用程序的精度要求。实验结果表明，在保持几乎相同的精度的同时，STREAM 的性能优于 SOTA 近似方法 DDSketch（平均高达 $10 × 4.7 ×$）和 KLL（平均高达 $71.2 × 10.1 ×$）。

papers.title: StreamCSD: SSD-Autonomous Stream Management via In-Storage Content Learning.
papers.abstract: Write amplification (WA) from migrating valid pages during garbage collection (GC) degrades SSD performance and lifespan. Although stream management based on high-level software semantics reduces WA, existing solutions require host modifications, hindering their adoption. We introduce StreamCSD, an SSD-autonomous stream management approach using in-storage content learning, eliminating host-side changes. Leveraging compression ratios from embedded compressors in computational storage drives (CSDs), StreamCSD employs a streaming Kmeans algorithm to cost-efficiently cluster data into streams. Evaluations show that StreamCSD reduces WA from 1.7 to 1.06 under multimodal generative AI workloads, matching state-of-the-art methods with minimal impact on bandwidth. StreamCSD operates without host modifications, promoting broader adoption of multi-stream SSDs.
papers.abstract_zh: 垃圾收集 (GC) 期间迁移有效页面产生的写放大 (WA) 会降低 SSD 性能和使用寿命。虽然基于高级软件语义的流管理减少了WA，但现有解决方案需要主机修改，阻碍了其采用。我们引入了 StreamCSD，这是一种使用存储内内容学习的 SSD 自主流管理方法，消除了主机端更改。 StreamCSD 利用计算存储驱动器 (CSD) 中嵌入式压缩机的压缩比，采用流式 Kmeans 算法以经济高效的方式将数据聚类到流中。评估表明，StreamCSD 在多模式生成 AI 工作负载下将 WA 从 1.7 降低到 1.06，匹配最先进的方法，同时对带宽的影响最小。 StreamCSD 无需修改主机即可运行，从而促进了多流 SSD 的更广泛采用。

papers.title: STREAMINGGS: Voxel-Based Streaming 3D Gaussian Splatting with Memory Optimization and Architectural Support.
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has gained popularity for its efficiency and sparse Gaussian-based representation. However, 3DGS struggles to meet the real-time requirement of 90 frames per second (FPS) on resource-constrained mobile devices, achieving only 2 to 9 FPS. Existing accelerators focus on compute efficiency but overlook memory efficiency, leading to redundant DRAM traffic. We introduce STREAMINGGS, a fully streaming 3DGS algorithm-architecture co-design that achieves fine-grained pipelining and reduces DRAM traffic by transforming from a tile-centric rendering to a memory-centric rendering. Results show that our design achieves up to 45.7 × speedup and 62.9 × energy savings over mobile Ampere GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯分布 (3DGS) 因其高效和基于稀疏高斯的表示而广受欢迎。然而，3DGS 很难满足资源有限的移动设备上每秒 90 帧 (FPS) 的实时要求，仅达到 2 至 9 FPS。现有的加速器注重计算效率，但忽视内存效率，导致 DRAM 流量冗余。我们推出了 STREAMINGGS，这是一种完全流式处理的 3DGS 算法架构协同设计，可通过从以图块为中心的渲染转变为以内存为中心的渲染来实现细粒度流水线并减少 DRAM 流量。结果表明，与移动 Ampere GPU 相比，我们的设计实现了高达 45.7 倍的加速和 62.9 倍的节能。

papers.title: SuperCopyback: Revisiting Copyback on Modern High-Performance NAND Flash-based SSDs.
papers.abstract: NAND flash-based SSDs have emerged as a critical storage solution due to their exceptional performance and cost-effectiveness. However, the sequential write limitation of NAND flash blocks necessitates garbage collection (GC) to reclaim space occupied by stale data. Nevertheless, the extensive data migration involved in GC significantly impacts performance and Quality of Service (QoS) of SSDs. To mitigate this issue, copyback has been proposed as a means to accelerate GC by eliminating off-chip data movements. Specifically, copyback reads data into on-plane latches and immidiately re-writes it into another page on the same plane. However, in the case of modern high-performance SSDs, copyback is rarely utilized due to the following challenges: (1) Copyback operates at the page-level and thus fails to effectively reclaim invalid data within the context of subpage-level mapping; (2) Copyback eliminates off-chip data movements, preventing data pages from being read out for Redundant Array of Independent NAND (RAIN) parity computation, thereby compromising SSD reliability. In this study, we introduce SuperCopyback as a solution that efficiently addresses these issues for modern SSDs. Firstly, we propose a Multiple-Read-One-Write (MROW) copyback approach through lightweight latch circuit modifications to enable subpage-level copyback implementation; additionally, we propose an orchestrated GC method to effectively utilize MROW copyback. Furthermore, we present a novel copyback-based RAIN scheme that conceals data pages readout latency in write operations and relocates parities to support efficient copyback. The experimental results on both synthetic and real traces demonstrate that SuperCopyback achieves a performance comparable to an ideal scenario where data movement of $\mathbf{4 K B}$ takes only 1ns.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 NAND 闪存的 SSD 因其卓越的性能和成本效益而成为关键的存储解决方案。然而，NAND 闪存块的顺序写入限制需要垃圾收集 (GC) 来回收陈旧数据占用的空间。然而，GC 中涉及的大量数据迁移会严重影响 SSD 的性能和服务质量 (QoS)。为了缓解这个问题，人们提出了回拷作为一种通过消除片外数据移动来加速 GC 的方法。具体来说，回拷将数据读取到平面上锁存器中，并立即将其重新写入同一平面上的另一个页面中。然而，在现代高性能SSD的情况下，由于以下挑战，回写很少被使用：（1）回写在页面级别操作，因此无法在子页面级别映射的上下文中有效回收无效数据； (2) 回写消除了片外数据移动，防止数据页被读出以进行独立 NAND 冗余阵列 (RAIN) 奇偶校验计算，从而损害 SSD 的可靠性。在本研究中，我们引入 SuperCopyback 作为有效解决现代 SSD 的这些问题的解决方案。首先，我们提出了一种多读一写（MROW）回拷方法，通过轻量级锁存电路修改来实现子页面级回拷实现；此外，我们提出了一种精心策划的 GC 方法来有效利用 MROW 回拷。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的基于回拷的 RAIN 方案，该方案隐藏写入操作中的数据页读出延迟并重新定位奇偶校验以支持高效的回拷。合成迹线和真实迹线的实验结果表明，SuperCopyback 的性能可与 $\mathbf{4 K B}$ 的数据移动仅需 1 ns 的理想场景相媲美。

papers.title: SuperFast: Fast Supernet Training Using Initial Knowledge.
papers.abstract: Once-for-all based neural architecture search (NAS) proposes to train a supernet once and extract specialized subnets from it for efficient deployment. This decoupling between training and search enables easy multi-target deployment without retraining. Nevertheless, the initial training cost has remained extremely high, with SOTA approaches like ElasticViT and NASViT taking more than 72 and 83 GPU days respectively. While other approaches have tried to accelerate the training by warming up the largest model in the search space, we argue that this is suboptimal, and knowledge is easier scaled upward than downward. Hence, we propose SuperFast, a simple, plug and play workflow, that (I.) pretrains a subnet of the supernet search space, and (II.) distributes its knowledge within the supernet before the training. SuperFast offers a substantial acceleration in the supernet training, resulting in a significantly better accuracy vs. training-cost trade-off. Using SuperFast on both ElasticViT and NASViT supernets achieves the baseline’s accuracy $1.4 \times$ and $\mathbf{1. 8} \times$ faster on the ImageNet dataset. Moreover, for a given time budget, SuperFast improves accuracy vs. latency trade-offs for subnets, gaining 4.0 p.p. for the $20-50 \mathrm{~ms}$ range on Pixel 6. Code available in https://github.com/MoritzTho/SuperFast.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于一劳永逸的神经架构搜索（NAS）提出一次性训练超级网络并从中提取专门的子网以实现高效部署。训练和搜索之间的这种解耦可以轻松实现多目标部署，而无需重新训练。尽管如此，初始训练成本仍然非常高，ElasticViT 和 NASViT 等 SOTA 方法分别需要超过 72 和 83 个 GPU 天。虽然其他方法试图通过预热搜索空间中最大的模型来加速训练，但我们认为这是次优的，并且知识向上扩展比向下扩展更容易。因此，我们提出了 SuperFast，一种简单的即插即用工作流程，它 (I.) 预训练超网搜索空间的子网，并且 (II.) 在训练之前在超网内分发其知识。 SuperFast 显着加速了超网训练，从而实现了显着更好的准确性与训练成本权衡。在 ElasticViT 和 NASViT 超网上使用 SuperFast 可实现基线精度 $1.4 \times$ 和 $\mathbf{1。 8} 在 ImageNet 数据集上速度快了 8 倍。此外，对于给定的时间预算，SuperFast 提高了子网的准确性与延迟权衡，获得了 4.0 个百分点。 Pixel 6 上的 $20-50 \mathrm{~ms}$ 范围。代码可在 https://github.com/MoritzTho/SuperFast 中找到。

papers.title: Supporting Register-based Addressing Modes for in-DRAM PIM ISAs.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-Memory architecture presents a promising solution to alleviate the data movement bottleneck that arises from transferring data between memory and compute units in traditional processor-centric systems, particularly for DNN applications. However, this architecture introduces two inherent overheads: PIM code offloading and data transferring between CPU and memory. To address these issues, we propose two register-based addressing modes, indexed and base-offset addressing, for DMA descriptor-based in-DRAM PIM ISAs. Our full-system performance evaluation demonstrates that the approach significantly reduces the overheads, resulting in up to 1.94x speedup compared to the baseline PIM, additionally only with $4.65 \%$ area and $8.61 \%$ power consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理架构提供了一种很有前途的解决方案，可以缓解传统以处理器为中心的系统中内存和计算单元之间传输数据所产生的数据移动瓶颈，特别是对于 DNN 应用程序。然而，这种架构引入了两个固有的开销：PIM 代码卸载以及 CPU 和内存之间的数据传输。为了解决这些问题，我们针对基于 DMA 描述符的 DRAM 内 PIM ISA 提出了两种基于寄存器的寻址模式：索引寻址和基址偏移寻址。我们的全系统性能评估表明，该方法显着降低了开销，与基准 PIM 相比，速度提高了 1.94 倍，此外仅占用 4.65 美元的面积和 8.61 美元的功耗。

papers.title: Swift or Exact? Boosting Efficient Microarchitecture DSE via Multi-fidelity Partial Order Prediction.
papers.abstract: A significant challenge in microarchitecture design space exploration (DSE) lies in the time-intensive synthesis and simulation process, making rapid design exploration infeasible. While the simulation tools offer reports on performance, power, and area (PPA) in the different stages, the PPA reports at early stages may fail to reflect the true relative qualities for various designs, i.e., with low fidelities. To address these limitations, we propose a novel multi-fidelity optimization algorithm tailored for multi-stage optimization problems. The proposed method employs a non-linear Gaussian process model to effectively fuse data from different stages with different fidelities, minimizing the need for expensive high-fidelity data while maximizing accuracy. Furthermore, a logical regression function and a multi-objective partial order relation are introduced to evaluate the reliability of low-fidelity data, mitigating their potential inaccuracies. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed multi-fidelity optimization algorithm can approximate the Pareto front of the direct design space in a shorter time with better performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 微架构设计空间探索（DSE）的一个重大挑战在于耗时的综合和模拟过程，使得快速设计探索变得不可行。虽然仿真工具提供了不同阶段的性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 报告，但早期阶段的 PPA 报告可能无法反映各种设计的真实相对质量，即保真度较低。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种针对多阶段优化问题量身定制的新颖的多保真度优化算法。该方法采用非线性高斯过程模型来有效地融合来自不同阶段、不同保真度的数据，最大限度地减少对昂贵的高保真数据的需求，同时最大限度地提高准确性。此外，引入逻辑回归函数和多目标偏序关系来评估低保真度数据的可靠性，减少其潜在的不准确性。实验表明，我们提出的多保真度优化算法可以在更短的时间内逼近直接设计空间的Pareto前沿，并且性能更好。

papers.title: SynCircuit: Automated Generation of New Synthetic RTL Circuits Can Enable Big Data in Circuits.
papers.abstract: In recent years, AI-assisted IC design methods have demonstrated great potential, but the availability of circuit design data is extremely limited, especially in the public domain. The lack of circuit data has become the primary bottleneck in developing AI-assisted IC design methods. In this work, we make the first attempt, SynCircuit, to generate new synthetic circuits with valid functionalities in the HDL format.SynCircuit automatically generates synthetic data using a framework with three innovative steps: 1) We propose a customized diffusion-based generative model to resolve the Directed Cyclic Graph (DCG) generation task, which has not been well explored in the AI community. 2) To ensure our circuit is valid, we enforce the circuit constraints by refining the initial graph generation outputs. 3) The Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) method further optimizes the logic redundancy in the generated graph. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SynCircuit can generate more realistic synthetic circuits and enhance ML model performance in downstream circuit design tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能辅助IC设计方法展现出了巨大的潜力，但电路设计数据的可用性极其有限，尤其是在公共领域。电路数据的缺乏已成为开发人工智能辅助IC设计方法的主要瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试 SynCircuit，以 HDL 格式生成具有有效功能的新合成电路。SynCircuit 使用具有三个创新步骤的框架自动生成合成数据：1）我们提出了一种定制的基于扩散的生成模型来解决有向循环图（DCG）生成任务，该任务在 AI 社区中尚未得到很好的探索。 2）为了确保我们的电路有效，我们通过细化初始图生成输出来强制电路约束。 3）蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）方法进一步优化了生成图中的逻辑冗余。实验结果表明，我们提出的 SynCircuit 可以生成更真实的合成电路，并增强下游电路设计任务中的 ML 模型性能。

papers.title: Synergistic Die-Level Router for Multi-FPGA System with Time-Division Multiplexing Optimization.
papers.abstract: Modern multi-FPGA systems featuring multi-die devices connected through time-division multiplexing (TDM) techniques have become increasingly common as the scale of designs increases rapidly. FPGA designs are meticulously partitioned at die-level for prototyping in modern emulation systems. Conventional FPGA-level routers often result in a large critical connection delay that impacts the whole design’s frequency. Additionally, the excessive use of super long lines (SLLs) between neighboring dies leads to substantial routing congestion, causing the failure of the routing progress. To tackle these issues, we propose an effective and efficient die-level router for multi-FPGA systems, optimizing routing topology and the TDM ratio. Experimental results on the benchmarks from the die-level routing contest 2023 demonstrate 7.6% better critical connection delay with a $5.761 \times$ speed-up compared to the state-of-the-art router.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着设计规模的迅速增加，采用时分复用 (TDM) 技术连接的多芯片器件的现代多 FPGA 系统已变得越来越普遍。 FPGA 设计在芯片级进行了精心划分，以便在现代仿真系统中进行原型设计。传统的 FPGA 级路由器通常会导致严重的关键连接延迟，从而影响整个设计的频率。此外，相邻芯片之间过度使用超长线（SLL）会导致严重的布线拥塞，从而导致布线进度失败。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种适用于多 FPGA 系统的有效且高效的芯片级路由器，优化了路由拓扑和 TDM 比率。 2023 年裸片级路由竞赛基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的路由器相比，关键连接延迟提高了 7.6%，速度提升了 5.761 美元。

papers.title: SynGPU: Synergizing CUDA and Bit-Serial Tensor Cores for Vision Transformer Acceleration on GPU.
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in computer vision tasks by effectively extracting global features. However, their self-attention mechanism suffers from quadratic time and memory complexity as image resolution or video duration increases, leading to inefficiency on GPUs. To accelerate ViTs, existing works mainly focus on pruning tokens based on value-level sparsity. However, they miss the chance to achieve peak performance as they overlook the bit-level sparsity. Instead, we propose Inter-token Bit-sparsity Awareness (IBA) algorithm to accelerate ViTs by exploring bit-sparsity from similar tokens. Next, we implement IBA on GPUs that synergize CUDA and Tensor Cores by addressing two issues: firstly, the bandwidth congestion of the Register File hinders the parallel ability of CUDA and Tensor Cores. Secondly, due to the varying exponent of floating-point vectors, it is hard to accelerate bitsparse matrix multiplication and accumulation (MMA) in Tensor Core through fixed-point-based bit-level circuits. Therefore, we present SynGPU, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework, to accelerate ViTs. SynGPU enhances data reuse by a novel data mapping to enable full parallelism of CUDA and Tensor Cores. Moreover, it introduces Bit-Serial Tensor Core (BSTC) that supports fixed- and floating-point MMA by combining the fixedpoint Bit-Serial Dot Product (BSDP) and exponent alignment techniques. Extensive experiments show that SynGPU achieves an average of $2.15 \times \sim 3.95 \times$ speedup and $2.49 \times \sim 3.81 \times$ compute density over A100 GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViTs）通过有效提取全局特征，在计算机视觉任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，随着图像分辨率或视频持续时间的增加，它们的自注意力机制会受到二次时间和内存复杂性的影响，导致 GPU 效率低下。为了加速 ViT，现有的工作主要集中在基于价值级别稀疏性的代币修剪上。然而，他们错过了实现峰值性能的机会，因为他们忽视了位级稀疏性。相反，我们提出了代币间位稀疏意识（IBA）算法，通过探索相似代币的位稀疏性来加速 ViT。接下来，我们在协同 CUDA 和 Tensor Core 的 GPU 上实现 IBA，解决两个问题：首先，寄存器文件的带宽拥塞阻碍了 CUDA 和 Tensor Core 的并行能力。其次，由于浮点向量的指数变化，很难通过基于定点的位级电路来加速 Tensor Core 中的位稀疏矩阵乘法和累加（MMA）。因此，我们提出了 SynGPU，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，用于加速 ViT。 SynGPU 通过新颖的数据映射增强数据重用，以实现 CUDA 和 Tensor Core 的完全并行性。此外，它还引入了位串行张量核心 (BSTC)，通过结合定点位串行点积 (BSDP) 和指数对齐技术来支持定点和浮点 MMA。大量实验表明，与 A100 GPU 相比，SynGPU 平均实现了 $2.15 \times \sim 3.95 \times$ 加速和 $2.49 \times \sim 3.81 \times$ 计算密度。

papers.title: Synthesis of CFET Cell Library Leveraging Backside Metal Routing.
papers.abstract: As technology nodes continue to shrink, Complementary FET (CFET) structures, which stack PMOS and NMOS together, have emerged as a promising candidate for next-generation technology. Due to the reduction in routing tracks, the insertion of dummy polys to increase routing resources and the use of M2 during the synthesis of CFET standard cells have become more inevitable. These two factors make block-level routing significantly more challenging. To address this, we introduce the methods to utilize the backside (BS) routing resources at the CFET standard cell synthesis stage and efficiently handle CFET transistor folding. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to consider BS routing resources at the cell synthesis stage and efficiently address transistor folding in the CFET stacked structure. In the transistor folding and placement stages, we utilize Euler paths to estimate the lower bound of contacted poly pitch (CPP) and apply dynamic programming (DP) to calculate the frontside minimum required tracks (FMRT) of BS-resource-aware placements. The subsequent satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) approach determines which tracks the devices occupy and completes cell routing. Experimental results show that compared to previous work [11], we achieve reductions of 1%, 45%, and 19% in #CPP, #M2 tracks, and runtime, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点不断缩小，将 PMOS 和 NMOS 堆叠在一起的互补 FET (CFET) 结构已成为下一代技术的有希望的候选者。由于布线轨道的减少，插入虚拟多晶硅以增加布线资源以及在CFET标准单元合成期间使用M2变得更加不可避免。这两个因素使得块级路由变得更具挑战性。 To address this, we introduce the methods to utilize the backside (BS) routing resources at the CFET standard cell synthesis stage and efficiently handle CFET transistor folding.据我们所知，这是第一个在单元合成阶段考虑 BS 布线资源并有效解决 CFET 堆叠结构中晶体管折叠问题的工作。在晶体管折叠和布局阶段，我们利用欧拉路径来估计接触多晶间距（CPP）的下限，并应用动态编程（DP）来计算BS资源感知布局的前端最小所需轨道（FMRT）。随后的可满足性模理论（SMT）方法确定设备占用哪些轨道并完成单元路由。实验结果表明，与之前的工作[11]相比，我们在#CPP、#M2 轨道和运行时间方面分别减少了 1%、45% 和 19%。

papers.title: TAXI: Traveling Salesman Problem Accelerator with X-bar-based Ising Macros Powered by SOT-MRAMs and Hierarchical Clustering.
papers.abstract: Ising solvers with hierarchical clustering have shown promise for large-scale Traveling Salesman Problems (TSPs), in terms of latency and energy. However, most of these methods still face unacceptable quality degradation as the problem size increases beyond a certain extent. Additionally, their hardwareagnostic adoptions limit their ability to fully exploit available hardware resources. In this work, we introduce TAXI – an inmemory computing-based TSP accelerator with crossbar(Xbar)-based Ising macros. Each macro independently solves a TSP subproblem, obtained by hierarchical clustering, without the need for any off-macro data movement, leading to massive parallelism. Within the macro, Spin-Orbit-Torque (SOT) devices serve as compact energy-efficient random number generators enabling rapid “natural annealing”. By leveraging hardware-algorithm co-design, TAXI offers improvements in solution quality, speed, and energy-efficiency on TSPs up to $\mathbf{8 5, 9 0 0}$ cities (the largest TSPLIB instance). TAXI produces solutions that are only $22 \%$ and $20 \%$ longer than the Concorde solver’s exact solution on $\mathbf{3 3, 8 1 0}$ and $\mathbf{8 5, 9 0 0}$ city TSPs, respectively. TAXI outperforms a current state-of-the-art clustering-based Ising solver, being $8 \times$ faster on average across 20 benchmark problems from TSPLib.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有层次聚类的 Ising 求解器在延迟和能量方面显示出解决大规模旅行商问题 (TSP) 的前景。然而，随着问题规模增加超过一定程度，大多数这些方法仍然面临不可接受的质量下降。此外，它们与硬件无关的采用限制了它们充分利用可用硬件资源的能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 TAXI——一种基于内存计算的 TSP 加速器，具有基于 crossbar(Xbar) 的 Ising 宏。每个宏独立地解决通过层次聚类获得的TSP子问题，无需任何宏外数据移动，从而实现大规模并行。在宏观范围内，自旋轨道扭矩 (SOT) 器件充当紧凑型节能随机数发生器，可实现快速“自然退火”。通过利用硬件算法协同设计，TAXI 在高达 $\mathbf{8 5, 9 0 0}$ 城市（最大的 TSPLIB 实例）的 TSP 上提供了解决方案质量、速度和能源效率的改进。 TAXI 生成的解仅比 Concorde 求解器在 $\mathbf{3 3, 8 1 0}$ 和 $\mathbf{8 5, 9 0 0}$ 城市 TSP 上的精确解长 $22 \%$ 和 $20 \%$。 TAXI 的性能优于当前最先进的基于集群的 Ising 求解器，在 TSPLib 的 20 个基准问题上平均速度提高了 8 美元。

papers.title: TetrisLock: Quantum Circuit Split Compilation with Interlocking Patterns.
papers.abstract: In quantum computing, quantum circuits are fundamental representations of quantum algorithms, which are compiled into executable functions for quantum solutions. Quantum compilers transform algorithmic quantum circuits into one compatible with target quantum computers, bridging quantum software and hardware. However, untrusted quantum compilers pose significant risks. They can lead to the theft of quantum circuit designs and compromise sensitive intellectual property (IP). In this paper, we propose TetrisLock, a split compilation method for quantum circuit obfuscation that uses an interlocking splitting pattern to effectively protect IP with minimal resource overhead. Our approach divides the quantum circuit into two interdependent segments, ensuring that reconstructing the original circuit functionality is possible only by combining both segments and eliminating redundancies. This method makes reverse engineering by an untrusted compiler unrealizable, as the original circuit is never fully shared with any single entity. Also, our approach eliminates the need for a trusted compiler to process the inserted random circuit, thereby relaxing the security requirements. Additionally, it defends against colluding attackers with mismatched numbers of qubits, while maintaining low overhead by preserving the original depth of the quantum circuit. We demonstrate our method by using established RevLib benchmarks, showing that it achieves a minimal impact on functional accuracy (less than 1%) while significantly reducing the likelihood of IP inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 在量子计算中，量子电路是量子算法的基本表示，它被编译成量子解决方案的可执行函数。量子编译器将算法量子电路转换为与目标量子计算机兼容的电路，从而桥接量子软件和硬件。然而，不受信任的量子编译器会带来巨大的风险。它们可能导致量子电路设计被盗并损害敏感的知识产权 (IP)。在本文中，我们提出了TetrisLock，一种用于量子电路混淆的分割编译方法，它使用互锁分割模式以最小的资源开销有效地保护IP。我们的方法将量子电路分为两个相互依赖的部分，确保只有通过组合两个部分并消除冗余才能重建原始电路功能。这种方法使得不受信任的编译器无法实现逆向工程，因为原始电路永远不会与任何单个实体完全共享。此外，我们的方法不需要可信编译器来处理插入的随机电路，从而放宽了安全要求。此外，它还可以防御量子位数量不匹配的合谋攻击者，同时通过保留量子电路的原始深度来保持较低的开销。我们通过使用已建立的 RevLib 基准来演示我们的方法，表明它对功能准确性的影响最小（小于 1%），同时显着降低了 IP 推断的可能性。

papers.title: The Unwritten Contract of Cloud-based Elastic Solid-State Drives.
papers.abstract: Elastic block storage (EBS) with the storagecompute disaggregated architecture stands as a pivotal piece in today’s cloud. EBS furnishes users with storage capabilities through the elastic solid-state drive (ESSD). Nevertheless, despite the widespread integration into cloud services, the absence of a thorough ESSD performance characterization raises critical doubt: when more and more services are shifted onto the cloud, can ESSD satisfactorily substitute the storage responsibilities of the local SSD and offer comparable performance? In this paper, we for the first time target this question by characterizing two ESSDs from Amazon AWS and Alibaba Cloud. We present an unwritten contract of cloud-based ESSDs, encapsulating four observations and five implications for cloud storage users. Specifically, the observations are counter-intuitive and contrary to the conventional perceptions of what one would expect from the local SSD. The implications we hope could guide users in revisiting the designs of their deployed cloud software, i.e., harnessing the distinct characteristics of ESSDs for better system performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有存储计算分解架构的弹性块存储 (EBS) 是当今云的关键部分。 EBS通过弹性固态硬盘（ESSD）为用户提供存储能力。然而，尽管广泛集成到云服务中，但缺乏全面的 ESSD 性能特征引发了严重质疑：当越来越多的服务转移到云上时，ESSD 能否令人满意地替代本地 SSD 的存储职责并提供可比的性能？在本文中，我们首次通过描述来自 Amazon AWS 和阿里云的两款 ESSD 来解决这个问题。我们提出了一份基于云的 ESSD 的不成文合同，其中包含了四项观察结果和对云存储用户的五项影响。具体来说，这些观察结果是反直觉的，并且与人们对本地 SSD 的期望相反。我们希望这些影响能够引导用户重新审视其部署的云软件的设计，即利用 ESSD 的独特特征来获得更好的系统性能。

papers.title: To Tackle Cost-Skew Tradeoff: An Adaptive Learning Approach for Hub Node Selection.
papers.abstract: In chip design, skew is a pivotal factor that significantly influences the overall performance for routing. A major challenge is how to achieve an appropriate trade-off between the total wire-length cost and skew. Selecting hub nodes is an effective method to improve this cost-skew trade-off. In this paper, we propose a novel reinforcement learning-based method for hub node selection, where our key idea is leveraging an effective adaptive learning strategy. Moreover, our approach is particularly suitable for solving large-scale routing instances. The empirical results suggest that our method can achieve promising performance on both small-scale and large-scale clock nets, implying its potential practical significance in EDA.
papers.abstract_zh: 在芯片设计中，时滞是显着影响布线整体性能的关键因素。主要挑战是如何在总线长成本和偏斜之间实现适当的权衡。选择中心节点是改善这种成本倾斜权衡的有效方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的新型中心节点选择方法，其中我们的关键思想是利用有效的自适应学习策略。此外，我们的方法特别适合解决大规模路由实例。实证结果表明，我们的方法可以在小规模和大规模时钟网络上实现良好的性能，这意味着它在 EDA 中具有潜在的实际意义。

papers.title: Towards In-Situ Neuromorphic Computing Architecture for Event Stream Super-Resolution.
papers.abstract: Event-based cameras, with their unique event stream representation, effectively mitigate motion blur in highspeed, high-exposure scenarios but suffer from low spatial resolution. To address this, we propose a super-resolution hardware accelerator for event streams based on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). In terms of network architecture, we incorporate hardware-friendly algorithmic designs by simplifying neuron models and optimizing convolution operations. On the hardware side, the design adopts a hierarchical structure featuring a highly parallel computational array. Additionally, by proposing a Kernel-Channel-Timestamp-Row (KCTR) dataflow and dual-pipeline structure, the design achieves in-situ computing, eliminating intermediate storage within layers and significantly reducing inter-layer spike storage. Evaluations on the N-MNIST and ASL-DVS datasets demonstrate root mean square errors (RMSE) of $\mathbf{1. 2 9 6}$ and $\mathbf{0. 1 2 1}$ for reconstructed super-resolution event streams. In downstream applications, the classification accuracies reach 98.84% and 99.73%, respectively. The proposed accelerator, designed using a 28 nm CMOS process, improves reconstruction speed by 95.6% compared to a GPU, operates at 500 MHz, and consumes only 0.546 pJ per synaptic operation.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机凭借其独特的事件流表示，可以有效减轻高速、高曝光场景中的运动模糊，但空间分辨率较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于尖峰神经网络（SNN）的事件流超分辨率硬件加速器。在网络架构方面，我们通过简化神经元模型和优化卷积运算，融入硬件友好的算法设计。在硬件方面，设计采用了具有高度并行计算阵列的分层结构。此外，通过提出内核-通道-时间戳-行（KCTR）数据流和双管道结构，该设计实现了原位计算，消除了层内中间存储，并显着减少了层间峰值存储。对 N-MNIST 和 ASL-DVS 数据集的评估表明 $\mathbf{1 的均方根误差 (RMSE)。 2 9 6}$ 和 $\mathbf{0. 1 2 1}$ 用于重建的超分辨率事件流。在下游应用中，分类准确率分别达到98.84%和99.73%。所提出的加速器采用 28 nm CMOS 工艺设计，与 GPU 相比，重建速度提高了 95.6%，运行频率为 500 MHz，每次突触操作仅消耗 0.546 pJ。

papers.title: Towards Secure Data Management using Multi-Cryptographic Solutions (Invited).
papers.abstract: Several secure data outsourcing systems incorporate various cryptographic techniques to balance security, functionalities, and efficiency. However, their security properties can be ad hoc and sometimes obscure. Our recent work, Secure Normal Form (SNF) [ICDE’24], presents a principled approach that allows data owners to define acceptable leakages of nonsensitive aspects of their data. This approach enables efficient processing of queries while ensuring no unintended leakage of sensitive information. In this paper, we discuss the benefits and challenges of implementing SNF within advanced computational environments and modern data management architectures. We argue that its applicability may extend beyond merely offloading secure query execution to the cloud.
papers.abstract_zh: 一些安全数据外包系统采用了各种加密技术来平衡安全性、功能和效率。然而，它们的安全属性可能是临时的，有时甚至是模糊的。我们最近的工作，安全范式（SNF）[ICDE'24]，提出了一种原则性方法，允许数据所有者定义其数据的非敏感方面的可接受的泄漏。 This approach enables efficient processing of queries while ensuring no unintended leakage of sensitive information.在本文中，我们讨论了在高级计算环境和现代数据管理架构中实施 SNF 的好处和挑战。我们认为，它的适用性可能不仅仅限于将安全查询执行卸载到云端。

papers.title: Towards Training Robustness Against Dynamic Errors in Quantum Machine Learning.
papers.abstract: Quantum machine learning, crucial in the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, confronts challenges in error mitigation. Current noise-aware training (NAT) methods often assume static error rates in quantum neural networks (QNNs), overlooking the dynamic nature of quantum noise. Our work highlights how error rates fluctuate over time and across different qubits, affecting QNN performance even when overall error rates are similar. We introduce a novel NAT strategy that dynamically adjusts to standard and fatal error conditions, incorporating a low-complexity search method to identify fatal errors during optimization. This strategy significantly improves robustness, maintaining competitive performance with leading NAT methods across varying error scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习在嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）时代至关重要，但它面临着减轻错误的挑战。当前的噪声感知训练（NAT）方法通常假设量子神经网络（QNN）中的静态错误率，忽略了量子噪声的动态性质。我们的工作强调了错误率如何随着时间和不同量子位的波动而波动，即使总体错误率相似，也会影响 QNN 性能。我们引入了一种新颖的 NAT 策略，可以动态调整标准和致命错误条件，并结合低复杂度搜索方法来识别优化过程中的致命错误。该策略显着提高了稳健性，在不同的错误场景中通过领先的 NAT 方法保持具有竞争力的性能。

papers.title: Towards Uncertainty-aware Robotic Perception via Mixed-signal BNN Engine Leveraging Probabilistic Quantum Tunneling.
papers.abstract: Integrating deep learning with environmental perception enhances robotic adaptability to complex tasks. However, its “black-box” nature, such as the lack of uncertainty quantification, poses challenges for safety-critical applications, particularly in unstructured and noisy environments. Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) offer uncertainty quantification but are limited by high hardware overhead, restricting real-time implementation on resource-constrained robots. This paper presents a mixedsignal hardware accelerator for BNNs, utilizing probabilistic quantum tunneling in fully depleted silicon-on-insulator (FDSOI) transistors to enable efficient, real-time uncertainty quantification. Device measurements indicate high-quality Gaussian random variable generation, validated through quantile-quantile plot analysis, with a high correlation coefficient ($r=0.997$) at $200 \mathrm{fJ} /$ sample. Leveraging such compact randomness, the parallel architecture achieved $10^{3}-10^{4} \times$ latency reduction at less than $2 \times$ area cost. Finally, in uncertainty-aware visual localization application of autonomous underwater vehicles, the BNN model effectively distinguishes data noise from model uncertainty, yielding significant information gain and enhancing the resampling efficiency by $4.5 \times$ at same accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 将深度学习与环境感知相结合可以增强机器人对复杂任务的适应能力。然而，其“黑匣子”性质，例如缺乏不确定性量化，给安全关键型应用带来了挑战，特别是在非结构化和嘈杂的环境中。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 提供不确定性量化，但受到高硬件开销的限制，限制了资源受限机器人的实时实施。本文提出了一种 BNN 混合信号硬件加速器，利用全耗尽绝缘体上硅 (FDSOI) 晶体管中的概率量子隧道来实现高效、实时的不确定性量化。设备测量表明高质量的高斯随机变量生成，通过分位数-分位数图分析进行验证，在 $200 \mathrm{fJ} /$ 样本处具有高相关系数 ($r=0.997$)。利用这种紧凑的随机性，并行架构以低于 2 倍的面积成本实现了 10^{3}-10^{4} 倍的延迟减少。最后，在自主水下航行器的不确定性感知视觉定位应用中，BNN 模型有效地区分数据噪声和模型不确定性，产生显着的信息增益，并在相同精度下将重采样效率提高 4.5 倍。

papers.title: TransRoute: A Novel Hierarchical Transistor-Level Routing Framework Beyond Standard-Cell Methodology.
papers.abstract: In advanced technology nodes, benefits from scaling have become limited in terms of power, performance, and area (PPA), necessitating improvements through design-technology cooptimization (DTCO). While the standard-cell methodology is widely used in modern VLSI design, it inherently constrains the potential of DTCO due to its abstraction at the logic level, limiting optimization at the physical level. To bridge this gap, transistor-level design methodology is desired to break the abstraction of standard cells. Existing research has explored large-scale transistor placement, but a gap remains in developing a routing framework that efficiently addresses transistor-level routing challenges. This paper proposes a pioneering transistorlevel routing framework for large-scale transistor placements, along with an efficient CP-SAT (Constraint ProgrammingSATisfiability) formulation for routing in lower layers. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed routing framework enables transistor-level designs to achieve significantly reduced total wirelength and high utilization rates for designs with hundreds to thousands of transistors, outperforming traditional standard-cell-based approaches in advanced technology nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: 在先进技术节点中，扩展带来的好处在功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 方面变得有限，因此需要通过设计技术协同优化 (DTCO) 进行改进。虽然标准单元方法广泛应用于现代 VLSI 设计中，但由于其在逻辑层面的抽象，它本质上限制了 DTCO 的潜力，限制了物理层面的优化。为了弥补这一差距，需要晶体管级设计方法来打破标准单元的抽象。现有研究已经探索了大规模晶体管布局，但在开发有效解决晶体管级布线挑战的布线框架方面仍然存在差距。本文提出了一种用于大规模晶体管布局的开创性晶体管级布线框架，以及用于较低层布线的高效 CP-SAT（约束编程SATisfiability）公式。实验结果表明，所提出的布线框架使晶体管级设计能够显着缩短总线长，并为具有数百至数千个晶体管的设计实现高利用率，在先进技术节点中优于传统的基于标准单元的方法。

papers.title: Tropical: Enhancing SLO Attainment in Disaggregated LLM Serving via SLO-Aware Multiplexing.
papers.abstract: To guarantee service quality in transformer based large language model (LLM) serving, it is essential to meet the latency constraints of both the prefill phase (measured by Time-to-First-Token, TTFT) and the decode phase (measured by Time-per-Output-Token, TPOT). Non-disaggregated serving places prefill and decode on the same worker, while disaggregated serving places the prefill and decode on isolated workers. However, no single architecture excels in both TTFT and TPOT metrics. After conducting a root cause analysis, we concluded that in disaggregated LLM serving, prefill execution has minimal interference with decode execution but result in high queuing times. In contrast, non-disaggregated LLM serving effectively reduces queuing times but introduces significant interference between prefills and decodes. In order to leverage the best aspects of both non-disaggregated and disaggregated LLM serving, we have designed and implemented Tropical. Tropical introduces an sevice-level objectives (SLO)-aware multiplexing strategy that balances the queuing time and the interference, enabling the LLM serving to achieve high TTFT and TPOT SLOs simultaneously. Our evaluation of real-world datasets reveals that Tropical outperforms both state-of-the-art non-disaggregated and disaggregated LLM serving systems, achieving up to $2.09 \times$ more requests within a 90% SLO attainment. Specially, compared to the disaggregated LLM serving system, Tropical improves P90 TTFT performance by $9 \times$ with only an 15% reduction in P90 TPOT. Against the non-disaggregated LLM serving systems, Tropical delivers a $2.8 \times$ performance improvement in P90 TPOT while maintaining the same P90 TTFT.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了保证基于 Transformer 的大语言模型 (LLM) 服务的服务质量，必须满足预填充阶段（通过首次令牌时间 (TTFT) 测量）和解码阶段（通过每个输出令牌时间 (TPOT) 测量）的延迟约束。非分类服务将预填充和解码放在同一个工作线程上，而分类服务将预填充和解码放在独立的工作线程上。然而，没有一种架构在 TTFT 和 TPOT 指标上都表现出色。在进行根本原因分析后，我们得出的结论是，在分解的 LLM 服务中，预填充执行对解码执行的干扰最小，但会导致排队时间较长。相比之下，非分解的 LLM 服务有效地减少了排队时间，但在预填充和解码之间引入了显着的干扰。为了充分利用非分类和分类 LLM 服务的最佳方面，我们设计并实施了 Tropical。 Tropical 引入了服务级目标 (SLO) 感知的复用策略，可平衡排队时间和干扰，使 LLM 服务能够同时实现高 TTFT 和 TPOT SLO。我们对现实世界数据集的评估表明，Tropical 的性能优于最先进的非分类和分类 LLM 服务系统，在 90% 的 SLO 实现范围内实现了高达 2.09 美元×$ 的请求。特别是，与分解的 LLM 服务系统相比，Tropical 将 P90 TTFT 性能提高了 9 美元，而 P90 TPOT 仅减少了 15%。与非分解的 LLM 服务系统相比，Tropical 在 P90 TPOT 中提供了 2.8 美元×$ 的性能改进，同时保持相同的 P90 TTFT。

papers.title: Truly Pre-Routing Timing Prediction via Considering Power Delivery Network.
papers.abstract: Fast and accurate pre-routing timing prediction is essential in the chip design flow. However, existing machine learning (ML)assisted pre-routing timing methods often overlook the impact of power delivery networks (PDNs), which contribute to IR drop and routing congestion. This limitation can make these methods less practical for realworld circuit design flows. To address this, we propose two specialized encoders-an IR drop-aware encoder and a routing congestion-aware encoder-that effectively capture PDN effects through multimodal fusion of netlist, layout, and PDN data. To mitigate the challenges of imbalanced multimodal fusion, we further develop a Pareto optimization approach to ensure balanced utilization of all modalities, enhancing timing prediction accuracy. Comprehensive experiments on large-scale open-source designs using TSMC’s 16 nm technology node validate the superiority of our model over state-of-the-art pre-routing timing prediction methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测在芯片设计流程中至关重要。然而，现有的机器学习 (ML) 辅助的预布线定时方法通常忽视了供电网络 (PDN) 的影响，这会导致 IR 压降和布线拥塞。这种限制可能会使这些方法对于现实世界的电路设计流程不太实用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种专门的编码器——IR drop-aware 编码器和路由拥塞感知编码器——通过网表、布局和 PDN 数据的多模态融合来有效捕获 PDN 效应。为了缓解不平衡多模态融合的挑战，我们进一步开发了帕累托优化方法，以确保所有模态的平衡利用，提高时序预测的准确性。使用台积电 16 nm 技术节点的大规模开源设计的综合实验验证了我们的模型相对于最先进的预布线时序预测方法的优越性。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Energy Management for Wearable IoT Devices with Conformal Prediction.
papers.abstract: Wearable internet of things (IoT) are transforming diverse healthcare applications including rehabilitation, vital symptom monitoring, and activity recognition. However, the small form-factor of wearable devices constrains the battery capacity and the operating lifetime, thus requiring frequent recharging or battery replacements. Frequent recharging and battery replacement leads to lower quality of service and user satisfaction. Harvesting energy from ambient sources to augment the battery has emerged as an effective solution to improving its operating lifetime. However, ambient energy sources are highly stochastic, making energy management challenging. Prior approaches typically use point predictions for estimating future energy and do not explicitly account for the uncertainty. In strong contrast to prior approaches, this paper presents a conformal predictionbased method for future energy harvest that provides small uncertainty regions with provable coverage guarantees (true output is within the uncertainty region). The uncertainty regions over energy harvest are then leveraged in an energy management algorithm that employs Monte Carlo sampling to evaluate the quality of multiple decisions with varying energy harvests. The decisions are then combined using a lightweight machine learning model to make an energy management decision that is close to the optimal. Experiments on two diverse real-world datasets with about 10 users show that conformal prediction achieves more than 90% coverage with tight prediction intervals; and the energy management algorithm produces decisions that are on average within 2 J of an optimal Oracle, thus showing its effectiveness in improving the quality of service.
papers.abstract_zh: 可穿戴物联网 (IoT) 正在改变各种医疗保健应用，包括康复、生命症状监测和活动识别。然而，可穿戴设备的小外形尺寸限制了电池容量和工作寿命，因此需要频繁充电或更换电池。频繁充电和更换电池会导致服务质量和用户满意度下降。从环境来源收集能量来增强电池已成为延长电池使用寿命的有效解决方案。然而，环境能源具有高度随机性，使得能源管理具有挑战性。现有方法通常使用点预测来估计未来能量，并且没有明确考虑不确定性。与之前的方法形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出了一种基于共形预测的未来能量收集方法，该方法为小的不确定性区域提供了可证明的覆盖范围保证（真实输出位于不确定性区域内）。然后，在能源管理算法中利用能量收获的不确定性区域，该算法采用蒙特卡罗采样来评估具有不同能量收获的多个决策的质量。然后使用轻量级机器学习模型将这些决策组合起来，以做出接近最优的能源管理决策。在大约 10 个用户的两个不同的现实世界数据集上进行的实验表明，保形预测在紧密的预测区间内实现了 90% 以上的覆盖率；能源管理算法产生的决策平均与最佳预言机相差2J以内，从而显示出其在提高服务质量方面的有效性。

papers.title: UniCAIM: A Unified CAM/CIM Architecture with Static-Dynamic KV Cache Pruning for Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive performance in various natural language processing (NLP) applications. However, the high memory and computation cost induced by the KV cache limits the inference efficiency, especially for long input sequences. Compute-in-memory (CIM)-based accelerators have been proposed for LLM acceleration with KV cache pruning. However, as existing accelerators only support static pruning with a fixed pattern or dynamic pruning with primitive implementations, they suffer from either high accuracy degradation or low efficiency. In this paper, we propose a ferroelectric FET (FeFET)-based unified content addressable memory (CAM) and CIM architecture, dubbed as UniCAIM. UniCAIM features simultaneous support for static and dynamic pruning with 3 computation modes: 1) in the CAM mode, UniCAIM enables approximate similarity measurement in $\mathcal{O}(1)$ time for dynamic KV cache pruning with high energy efficiency; 2) in the charge-domain CIM mode, static pruning can be supported based on accumulative similarity score, which is much more flexible compared to fixed patterns; 3) in the current-domain mode, exact attention computation can be conducted with a subset of selected KV cache. We further propose a novel CAM/CIM cell design that leverages the multi-level characteristics of FeFETs for signed multibit storage of the KV cache and in-place attention computation. With extensive experimental results, we demonstrate UniCAIM can reduce the area-energy-delay product (AEDP) by $8.2 \sim 831 \times$ over the state-of-the-art CIM-based LLM accelerators at the circuit level, along with high accuracy comparable with dense attention at the application level, showing its great potential for efficient long-context LLM inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的大语言模型 (LLM) 在各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 应用中取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，KV 缓存带来的高内存和计算成本限制了推理效率，特别是对于长输入序列。基于内存计算 (CIM) 的加速器已被提议用于通过 KV 缓存修剪进行 LLM 加速。然而，由于现有的加速器仅支持固定模式的静态剪枝或原始实现的动态剪枝，因此它们要么精度下降，要么效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的统一内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 和 CIM 架构，称为 UniCAIM。 UniCAIM 同时支持静态和动态剪枝，具有 3 种计算模式：1）在 CAM 模式下，UniCAIM 可以在 $\mathcal{O}(1)$ 时间内实现近似相似度测量，以实现高能效的动态 KV 缓存剪枝； 2）在电荷域CIM模式下，可以支持基于累积相似度得分的静态剪枝，比固定模式灵活得多； 3）在当前域模式下，可以使用选定的KV缓存的子集进行精确的注意力计算。我们进一步提出了一种新颖的 CAM/CIM 单元设计，该设计利用 FeFET 的多级特性进行 KV 缓存的签名多位存储和就地注意力计算。通过大量的实验结果，我们证明 UniCAIM 可以在电路级比最先进的基于 CIM 的 LLM 加速器将面积能量延迟积 (AEDP) 降低 $8.2 \sim 831 \times$，并且具有可与应用级密集注意力相媲美的高精度，显示出其高效长上下文 LLM 推理的巨大潜力。

papers.title: UniCoS: A Unified Neural and Accelerator Co-Search Framework for CNNs and ViTs.
papers.abstract: Current algorithm-hardware co-search works often suffer from lengthy training times and inadequate exploration of hardware design spaces, leading to suboptimal performance. This work introduces UniCoS, a unified framework for co-optimizing neural networks and accelerators for CNNs and Vision Transformers (ViTs). By introducing a novel training-free proxy that evaluates accuracy within seconds and a clustering-based algorithm for exploring heterogeneous dataflows, UniCoS efficiently navigates the design spaces of both architectures. Experimental results demonstrate that the solutions generated by UniCoS consistently surpass state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods (e.g., $3.54 \times$ energy-delay product (EDP) improvement with a $1.76 \%$ higher accuracy on ImageNet) while requiring notably reduced search time (up to $48 \times, \sim 3$ hours). The code is available at https://github.com/mine7777/Unicos.git.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的算法-硬件协同搜索工作经常受到训练时间过长和对硬件设计空间探索不足的困扰，从而导致性能不佳。这项工作介绍了 UniCoS，这是一个用于协同优化神经网络以及 CNN 和 Vision Transformers (ViT) 加速器的统一框架。通过引入一种新颖的免训练代理（可在几秒钟内评估准确性）和基于集群的算法来探索异构数据流，UniCoS 可以有效地导航两种架构的设计空间。实验结果表明，UniCoS 生成的解决方案始终超越最先进的 (SOTA) 方法（例如，在 ImageNet 上，能量延迟乘积 (EDP) 改进了 3.54 美元 \times$，精度提高了 1.76 \%$ 美元），同时需要显着减少搜索时间（高达 48 美元 \times，\sim 3$ 小时）。代码可在 https://github.com/mine7777/Unicos.git 获取。

papers.title: Unlocking a New Rust Programming Experience: Fast and Slow Thinking with LLMs to Conquer Undefined Behaviors.
papers.abstract: To provide flexibility and low-level interaction capabilities, the “unsafe” tag in Rust is essential, but undermines memory safety and introduces Undefined Behaviors (UBs) that reduce safety. Eliminating UBs requires a deep understanding of Rust’s safety rules and strong typing. Traditional methods require depth analysis of code, which is laborious and depends on knowledge design. The powerful semantic understanding capabilities of LLM offer new opportunities to solve this problem. Although existing large model debugging frameworks excel in semantic tasks, limited by fixed processes and lack adaptive and dynamic adjustment capabilities. Inspired by the dual process theory of decision-making (“Fast and Slow Thinking”), we present a LLM-based framework called RustBrain that automatically and flexibly minimizes UBs in Rust projects. Fast thinking extracts features to generate solutions, while slow thinking decomposes, verifies, and generalizes them abstractly. To apply verification and generalization results to solution generation, enabling dynamic adjustments and precise outputs, RustBrain integrates two thinking through a feedback mechanism. Experimental results on Miri dataset show a 94.3% pass rate and 80.4% execution rate, improving flexibility and Rust projects safety.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了提供灵活性和低级交互能力，Rust 中的“不安全”标签是必不可少的，但它会破坏内存安全并引入降低安全性的未定义行为（UB）。消除 UB 需要深入了解 Rust 的安全规则和强类型。传统方法需要对代码进行深度分析，费力且依赖于知识设计。 LLM强大的语义理解能力为解决这一问题提供了新的机会。现有的大型模型调试框架虽然在语义任务上表现出色，但受限于固定流程，缺乏自适应和动态调整能力。受到决策的双重过程理论（“快思考和慢思考”）的启发，我们提出了一个名为 RustBrain 的基于 LLM 的框架，它可以自动灵活地最小化 Rust 项目中的 UB。快速思维提取特征以生成解决方案，而慢速思维则对它们进行抽象分解、验证和概括。为了将验证和泛化结果应用到解决方案生成中，实现动态调整和精确输出，RustBrain 通过反馈机制整合了两种思维。 Miri 数据集上的实验结果显示，通过率达 94.3%，执行率达 80.4%，提高了灵活性和 Rust 项目的安全性。

papers.title: UPVSS: Jointly Managing Vector Similarity Search with Near-Memory Processing Systems.
papers.abstract: Vector similarity search plays a pivotal role in modern applications, including recommendation systems, image search, large language models (LLMs), and high-dimensional data retrieval. As data size scales, our research reveals that the search phase imposes substantial demands on DRAM bandwidth, leading to performance limitations in conventional von Neumann architecture with shared memory buses. This data movement bottleneck restricts the efficiency and scalability of vector similarity search due to insufficient memory bandwidth. To mitigate this issue, we leverage UPMEM, an off-the-shelf near-memory processing (NMP) system, to minimize the data movement between memory and compute units. However, UPMEM’s computing engine has certain limitations and requires thorough application integration to unleash its high-parallelism capabilities. In this work, we introduce UPMEM-aware Vector Similarity Search (UPVSS), an architecture-aware system that jointly manages vector similarity search and UPMEM’s NMP technology. UPVSS prioritizes offloading operations based on their strengths and capabilities, effectively alleviating the data movement bottleneck and improving overall system performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 矢量相似性搜索在现代应用中发挥着关键作用，包括推荐系统、图像搜索、大语言模型（LLM）和高维数据检索。随着数据规模的扩大，我们的研究表明，搜索阶段对 DRAM 带宽提出了很高的要求，导致具有共享内存总线的传统冯诺依曼架构的性能限制。由于内存带宽不足，这种数据移动瓶颈限制了向量相似性搜索的效率和可扩展性。为了缓解这个问题，我们利用 UPMEM（一种现成的近内存处理 (NMP) 系统）来最大程度地减少内存和计算单元之间的数据移动。然而，UPMEM的计算引擎有一定的局限性，需要彻底的应用集成才能发挥其高并行能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 UPMEM 感知向量相似性搜索 (UPVSS)，这是一种架构感知系统，可联合管理向量相似性搜索和 UPMEM 的 NMP 技术。 UPVSS根据卸载操作的优势和能力确定优先级，有效缓解数据移动瓶颈，提高系统整体性能。

papers.title: VEDA: Efficient LLM Generation Through Voting-based KV Cache Eviction and Dataflow-flexible Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in natural language processing tasks but pose significant computational and memory challenges for edge deployment due to their intensive resource demands. This work addresses the efficiency of LLM inference by algorithm-hardwaredataflow tri-optimizations. We propose a novel voting-based KV cache eviction algorithm, balancing hardware efficiency and algorithm accuracy by adaptively identifying unimportant kv vectors. From a dataflow perspective, we introduce a flexible-product dataflow and a runtime reconfigurable PE array for matrix-vector multiplication. The proposed approach effectively handles the diverse dimensional requirements and solves the challenges of incrementally varying sequence lengths. Additionally, an element-serial scheduling scheme is proposed for nonlinear operations, such as softmax and layer normalization (layernorm). Results demonstrate a substantial reduction in latency, accompanied by a significant decrease in hardware complexity, from $O(N)$ to $O(1)$. The proposed solution is realized in a custom-designed accelerator, VEDA, which outperforms existing hardware platforms. This research represents a significant advancement in LLM inference on resource-constrained edge devices, facilitating real-time processing, enhancing data privacy, and enabling model customization.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在自然语言处理任务中表现出色，但由于其密集的资源需求，给边缘部署带来了巨大的计算和内存挑战。这项工作通过算法-硬件数据流三重优化来解决 LLM 推理的效率。我们提出了一种新颖的基于投票的 KV 缓存驱逐算法，通过自适应识别不重要的 KV 向量来平衡硬件效率和算法准确性。从数据流的角度来看，我们引入了灵活的乘积数据流和用于矩阵向量乘法的运行时可重构PE阵列。所提出的方法有效地处理了不同的尺寸要求，并解决了序列长度增量变化的挑战。此外，还提出了一种用于非线性操作的元素串行调度方案，例如softmax和层归一化（layernorm）。结果表明，延迟显着减少，同时硬件复杂性也显着降低，从 $O(N)$ 降至 $O(1)$。所提出的解决方案是在定制设计的加速器 VEDA 中实现的，该加速器的性能优于现有的硬件平台。这项研究代表了资源受限边缘设备上的 LLM 推理的重大进步，促进了实时处理、增强了数据隐私并支持模型定制。

papers.title: VersaSlot: Efficient Fine-grained FPGA Sharing with Big.Little Slots and Live Migration in FPGA Cluster.
papers.abstract: As FPGAs gain popularity for on-demand application acceleration in data center computing, dynamic partial reconfiguration (DPR) has become an effective fine-grained sharing technique for FPGA multiplexing. However, current FPGA sharing encounters partial reconfiguration contention and task execution blocking problems introduced by the DPR, which significantly degrade application performance. In this paper, we propose VersaSlot, an efficient spatio-temporal FPGA sharing system with novel Big.Little slot architecture that can effectively resolve the contention and task blocking while improving resource utilization. For the heterogeneous Big.Little architecture, we introduce an efficient slot allocation and scheduling algorithm, along with a seamless cross-board switching and live migration mechanism, to maximize FPGA multiplexing across the cluster. We evaluate the VersaSlot system on an FPGA cluster composed of the latest Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGAs (ZCU216) and compare its performance against four existing scheduling algorithms. The results demonstrate that VersaSlot achieves up to 13.66x lower average response time than the traditional temporal FPGA multiplexing, and up to $2.19 x$ average response time improvement over the state-of-the-art spatio-temporal sharing systems. Furthermore, VersaSlot enhances the LUT and FF resource utilization by 35% and 29% on average, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 FPGA 在数据中心计算中按需应用加速方面的普及，动态部分重配置 (DPR) 已成为 FPGA 复用的有效细粒度共享技术。然而，当前的FPGA共享遇到了DPR引入的部分重配置争用和任务执行阻塞问题，这显着降低了应用程序性能。在本文中，我们提出了VersaSlot，一种高效的时空FPGA共享系统，具有新颖的Big.Little插槽架构，可以有效解决争用和任务阻塞，同时提高资源利用率。对于异构Big.Little架构，我们引入了高效的槽位分配和调度算法，以及无缝跨板切换和实时迁移机制，以最大限度地提高跨集群的FPGA复用。我们在由最新 Xilinx UltraScale+ FPGA (ZCU216) 组成的 FPGA 集群上评估 VersaSlot 系统，并将其性能与四种现有调度算法进行比较。结果表明，VersaSlot 的平均响应时间比传统时态 FPGA 多路复用缩短了 13.66 倍，与最先进的时空共享系统相比，平均响应时间缩短了 2.19 倍。此外，VersaSlot 将 LUT 和 FF 资源利用率平均分别提高了 35% 和 29%。

papers.title: Versatile Cross-platform Compilation Toolchain for Schrödinger-style Quantum Circuit Simulation.
papers.abstract: While existing quantum hardware resources have limited availability and reliability, there is a growing demand for exploring and verifying quantum algorithms. Efficient classical simulators for high-performance quantum simulation are critical to meeting this demand. However, due to the vastly varied characteristics of classical hardware, implementing hardware-specific optimizations for different hardware platforms is challenging. To address such needs, we propose CAST (Cross-platform Adaptive Schrödinger-style Simulation Toolchain), a novel compilation toolchain with cross-platform (CPU and Nvidia GPU) optimization and high-performance backend supports. CAST exploits a novel sparsity-aware gate fusion algorithm that automatically selects the best fusion strategy and backend configuration for targeted hardware platforms. CAST also aims to offer versatile and high-performance backend for different hardware platforms. To this end, CAST provides an LLVM IR-based vectorization optimization for various CPU architectures and instruction sets, and a PTX-based code generator for Nvidia GPU support. We benchmark CAST against IBM Qiskit, Google QSimCirq, Nvidia cuQuantum backend, and other high-performance simulators. On various 32-qubit CPU-based benchmarks, CAST achieves up to 8.03x speedup than Qiskit. On various 30-qubit GPU-based benchmarks, CAST achieves up to 39.3x speedup than Nvidia cuQuantum backend.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然现有量子硬件资源的可用性和可靠性有限，但探索和验证量子算法的需求不断增长。用于高性能量子模拟的高效经典模拟器对于满足这一需求至关重要。然而，由于经典硬件的特性千差万别，针对不同硬件平台实现特定于硬件的优化具有挑战性。为了满足这些需求，我们提出了 CAST（跨平台自适应薛定谔式模拟工具链），这是一种具有跨平台（CPU 和 Nvidia GPU）优化和高性能后端支持的新型编译工具链。 CAST 采用新颖的稀疏感知门融合算法，可自动为目标硬件平台选择最佳融合策略和后端配置。 CAST还旨在为不同的硬件平台提供多功能和高性能的后端。为此，CAST 为各种 CPU 架构和指令集提供了基于 LLVM IR 的矢量化优化，并为 Nvidia GPU 支持提供了基于 PTX 的代码生成器。我们针对 IBM Qiskit、Google QSimCirq、Nvidia cuQuantum 后端和其他高性能模拟器对 CAST 进行基准测试。在各种基于 32 量子位 CPU 的基准测试中，CAST 比 Qiskit 实现了高达 8.03 倍的加速。在各种基于 30 量子位 GPU 的基准测试中，CAST 比 Nvidia cuQuantum 后端实现了高达 39.3 倍的加速。

papers.title: VISTA: Optimizing GPU Scheduling through Versatile Locality-Aware Data Sharing.
papers.abstract: Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) play a pivotal role in high-performance computing by utilizing the massive parallelism of concurrent thread execution to enhance processing efficiency, known as thread-level parallelism (TLP). However, effectively managing the significant memory access generated by a large number of concurrent threads presents a significant challenge, affecting both performance and energy consumption. However, previous GPU scheduling methods often overlook the significant potential of data sharing among non-adjacent warps or Cooperative Thread Arrays (CTAs), thereby limiting their effectiveness in reducing unnecessary memory accesses through supporting data sharing. Our observation underscores the untapped potential of non-adjacent data sharing, motivating our work to optimize schedules more effectively. In this paper, we present VISTA, a smart locality-aware GPU scheduler that dynamically identifies data locality patterns at both the CTA and warp levels, leveraging this runtime information to make intelligent scheduling decisions and improving memory efficiency and overall performance. VISTA significantly reduces unnecessary memory accesses. Simulation results show a 48.1% improvement in performance and a 51.8% reduction in energy consumption for memory-intensive GPGPU applications, compared to the baseline, with negligible hardware overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 通过利用并发线程执行的大规模并行性来提高处理效率（称为线程级并行性 (TLP)），在高性能计算中发挥着关键作用。然而，有效管理大量并发线程生成的大量内存访问是一项重大挑战，会影响性能和能耗。然而，以前的 GPU 调度方法经常忽视非相邻线程束或协作线程阵列 (CTA) 之间数据共享的巨大潜力，从而限制了它们通过支持数据共享来减少不必要的内存访问的有效性。我们的观察强调了非相邻数据共享的未开发潜力，激励我们更有效地优化时间表。在本文中，我们介绍了 VISTA，这是一种智能局部性感知 GPU 调度程序，可动态识别 CTA 和扭曲级别的数据局部性模式，利用此运行时信息做出智能调度决策并提高内存效率和整体性能。 VISTA 显着减少了不必要的内存访问。仿真结果显示，与基准相比，内存密集型 GPGPU 应用程序的性能提高了 48.1%，能耗降低了 51.8%，而硬件开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: VQT-CiM: Accelerating Vector Quantization Enhanced Transformer with Ferroelectric Compute-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: Transformer models have achieved state-of-the-art performance in various natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) tasks. To meet their substantial computational demands, the compute-in-memory (CiM) architectures, which alleviate the memory wall problem and enable efficient vector-matrix multiplication (VMM), have been adopted for transformer accelerators. However, the dynamic VMM involved in the attention mechanism, which necessitates runtime write operations, presents significant challenges for non-volatile memory (NVM)-based CiM designs. High write overhead, complex compute-write-compute (CWC) dependencies, and limited endurance reduce their effectiveness. In this paper, we propose VQT-CiM, a ferroelectric FET (FeFET)-based CiM design that accelerates vector quantization (VQ) enhanced transformers by eliminating the runtime write operations. VQT-CiM quantizes keys and values in self-attention to convert dynamic VMMs in inner-product and weighted-sum into static VMMs with the codebooks, enabling efficient calculations with CiM crossbars. However, directly applying VQ hinders the accuracy of transformer model due to its limited representation capability. To address this, we introduce a vector quantization scheme that integrates residual VQ (RVQ) and product VQ (PVQ) for enhanced representation space. We present an efficient hardware implementation for the proposed VQT-CiM with optimized dataflow in RVQ, which incorporates the FeFET-based CiM crossbars and peripheral digital circuits. Evaluation results suggest that VQT-CiM achieves the $3.54 \times$ and $4.53 \times$ improvements in energy efficiency and throughput, respectively, compared to state-of-the-art NVM-based CiM transformer designs.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型在各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 任务中实现了最先进的性能。为了满足大量的计算需求，Transformer 加速器采用了内存计算 (CiM) 架构，该架构可缓解内存墙问题并实现高效的向量矩阵乘法 (VMM)。然而，注意力机制中涉及的动态 VMM 需要运行时写入操作，这给基于非易失性存储器 (NVM) 的 CiM 设计带来了重大挑战。高写入开销、复杂的计算-写入-计算 (CWC) 依赖性以及有限的耐用性降低了其有效性。在本文中，我们提出了 VQT-CiM，这是一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的 CiM 设计，可通过消除运行时写入操作来加速矢量量化 (VQ) 增强型变压器。 VQT-CiM 量化自注意力中的键和值，将内积和加权和中的动态 VMM 转换为带有码本的静态 VMM，从而能够使用 CiM 交叉开关进行高效计算。然而，由于其表示能力有限，直接应用 VQ 会影响变压器模型的准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种矢量量化方案，该方案集成了残差 VQ (RVQ) 和乘积 VQ (PVQ) 以增强表示空间。我们为所提出的 VQT-CiM 提供了一种高效的硬件实现，并在 RVQ 中优化了数据流，其中结合了基于 FeFET 的 CiM 交叉开关和外围数字电路。评估结果表明，与最先进的基于 NVM 的 CiM 变压器设计相比，VQT-CiM 在能源效率和吞吐量方面分别实现了 3.54 美元和 4.53 美元的改进。

papers.title: VSpGEMM: Exploiting Versal ACAP for High-Performance SpGEMM Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Sparse general matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) serves as a fundamental operation in real-world applications such as deep learning. Different from general matrix multiplication, matrices in SpGEMM are highly sparse and therefore require a compact representation. This places an additional burden on data preprocessing and exchanging and also causes irregular memory access patterns, which can in turn lead to communication and computation bottlenecks. To break these bottlenecks, we present VSpGEMM, a hardware accelerator for SpGEMM that is tailored and optimized on Versal ACAP. Firstly, a new storage format called BCSX is proposed in VSpGEMM, which offers a unified and block-wise compression strategy to deal with both row-major and columnmajor representation of non-zero data, enabling fixed-pattern memory accesses and effective data preloading. Secondly, a multi-level tiling mechanism is introduced to decompose the holistic SpGEMM into multiple computation granularities that fit into the AI Engines (AIEs) on Versal in a hierarchical manner, enhancing data reuse. Thirdly, a hybrid partitioning scheme is presented to orchestrate both the AIEs and programmable logic (PL) for intermediate product merging, which together resolve the issues of high memory utilization and communication demand. Experimental results demonstrate a $2.65 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art (SOTA) GEMM design on Versal and an average $33.62 \times$ improvement in energy efficiency compared to cuSPARSE on RTX 4090 GPU, showing the efficacy of VSpGEMM.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是深度学习等现实应用中的基本运算。与一般的矩阵乘法不同，SpGEMM 中的矩阵高度稀疏，因此需要紧凑的表示。这给数据预处理和交换带来了额外的负担，并且还导致不规则的内存访问模式，进而导致通信和计算瓶颈。为了打破这些瓶颈，我们推出了 VSpGEMM，这是一款在 Versal ACAP 上定制和优化的 SpGEMM 硬件加速器。首先，VSpGEMM 中提出了一种名为 BCSX 的新存储格式，它提供了统一的分块压缩策略来处理非零数据的行优先和列优先表示，从而实现固定模式内存访问和有效的数据预加载。其次，引入多级平铺机制，将整体 SpGEMM 分解为多个计算粒度，以分层方式融入 Versal 上的 AI 引擎（AIE），增强数据重用。第三，提出了一种混合分区方案来编排AIE和可编程逻辑（PL）以进行中间产品合并，共同解决高内存利用率和通信需求的问题。实验结果表明，与 RTX 4090 GPU 上的 cuSPARSE 相比，Versal 上的速度比最先进 (SOTA) GEMM 设计提高了 2.65 美元，能源效率平均提高了 33.62 美元，这显示了 VSpGEMM 的功效。

papers.title: Weighted Range-Constrained Ising-Model Decoder for Quantum Error Correction.
papers.abstract: Ising model-based Quantum Error Correction decoders reduce topological complexity compared to classical decoders. However, the SOTA Ising decoder has a higher time complexity than union-find (UF) and a lower threshold than minimum-weight perfect-matching (MWPM). We propose the Weighted Range-Constrained Ising Model-Based (WRIM) decoder. WRIM uses a polygonal region to enclose flipped syndromes, ensuring the coverage of all potential error chains while optimizing coupling and external field coefficients. WRIM reduces the variable count by $97.8 x$, achieves microsecondlevel decoding, and has a worst-case time complexity of $O(n)$, outperforming UF. WRIM exhibits threshold behavior up to 10.7$\mathbf{1 1. 0 \%}$, surpassing the MWPM’s highest reported threshold.
papers.abstract_zh: 与经典解码器相比，基于 Ising 模型的量子纠错解码器降低了拓扑复杂性。然而，SOTA Ising 解码器的时间复杂度比并查找（UF）更高，阈值比最小权重完美匹配（MWPM）更低。我们提出了基于加权范围约束伊辛模型（WRIM）的解码器。 WRIM 使用多边形区域来包围翻转综合症，确保覆盖所有潜在的误差链，同时优化耦合和外场系数。 WRIM 减少变量数 $97.8 x$，实现微秒级解码，最坏情况时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，优于 UF。 WRIM 表现出高达 10.7$\mathbf{1 1. 0 \%}$ 的阈值行为，超过了 MWPM 报告的最高阈值。

papers.title: WISEDRAM: A Reliable Bitwise In-DRAM Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-Memory (PIM) aims to address the costly data movement between processing elements and memory subsystem, by computing simple operations inside DRAM in parallel. The large capacity, wide activation size during cell access, and the maturity of DRAM technology, make this technology a great choice for PIM techniques. Nonetheless, vulnerability to process variation and noises, internal leakage of the cells, and high latency in cell access, limit the utilization of processing in DRAMs for real-world applications. This work proposes a fast PIM technique, called WISEDRAM, which leverages one row of special cells, called X-cells, to enable in-DRAM bulk-bitwise operations. Unlike previous approaches, WISEDRAM retains the conventional DRAM cell access procedure, thereby ensuring the reliability of cell access for reads and writes at a level equivalent to that of conventional DRAMs. Compared with the state-of-the-art, WISEDRAM exhibits $22 \%$ reduction in average bitwise computation latency and a $71 \%$ improvement in XOR operation execution speed, while imposing an area overhead of $1.6 \%$.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 旨在通过在 DRAM 内并行计算简单操作来解决处理元件和内存子系统之间成本高昂的数据移动问题。大容量、单元存取期间的宽激活尺寸以及DRAM技术的成熟，使得该技术成为PIM技术的绝佳选择。尽管如此，易受工艺变化和噪声影响、单元的内部泄漏以及单元访问的高延迟限制了 DRAM 处理在实际应用中的利用。这项工作提出了一种称为 WISEDRAM 的快速 PIM 技术，它利用一排称为 X 单元的特殊单元来实现 DRAM 中的批量按位操作。与之前的方法不同，WISEDRAM保留了传统DRAM单元访问流程，从而确保了单元读写访问的可靠性与传统DRAM相当。与最先进的技术相比，WISEDRAM 的平均按位计算延迟降低了 22 \%$，异或运算执行速度提高了 71 \%$，同时带来了 $1.6 \%$ 的面积开销。

papers.title: X-SAT: An Efficient Circuit-Based SAT Solver.
papers.abstract: In modern digital circuit design, verifying the equivalence of arithmetic circuits is a significant and challenging task. This paper introduces a new circuit solver based on the Conflict-Driven Clause Learning (CDCL) algorithm, which integrates structural elimination techniques to reduce the number of variables and clauses while maintaining the circuit structure. Additionally, branching heuristics have been enhanced specifically for the structure of arithmetic circuits. Experimental results demonstrate that X-SAT significantly outperforms best previous circuit solver could be found on all benchmarks. Further, X-SAT performs better than the state-of-the-art CNF-based SAT solvers on complex arithmetic circuits, underscoring its significant potential in the field of circuit design verification.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代数字电路设计中，验证算术电路的等效性是一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。本文介绍了一种基于冲突驱动子句学习（CDCL）算法的新型电路求解器，该算法集成了结构消除技术，在保持电路结构的同时减少变量和子句的数量。此外，专门针对算术电路的结构增强了分支启发式。实验结果表明，X-SAT 在所有基准测试中均明显优于之前最好的电路求解器。此外，X-SAT 在复杂算术电路上的性能优于最先进的基于 CNF 的 SAT 求解器，凸显了其在电路设计验证领域的巨大潜力。

papers.title: XShift: FPGA-efficient Binarized LLM with Joint Quantization and Sparsification.
papers.abstract: Binarization is a promising approach to significantly reduce computational complexity by replacing multiplications with hardwareefficient XNOR operations. However, the binarization of LLM activations often leads to severe accuracy degradation, while weight-only binarization fails to eliminate multipliers due to the Self-Attention mechanism. Furthermore, LLMs exhibit distinctive channel-level data distribution characteristics and differing computational and memory requirements between the Pre-fill and Decoding stages, necessitating a specialized inference framework. In response, we introduce XShift, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework optimized for efficient binarized LLM inference on FPGAs. XShift incorporates three key contributions: (1) a hardwarefriendly XNOR-Shift Encoding (XSE) format that transforms traditional multiplications into XNOR and shift operations, ensuring scalability and precision; (2) Hardware Adaptive Outlier and Sparsity (HAOS) techniques, which exploit channel-level data distribution and systolic array architectures for optimized quantization and sparsification; and (3) a dedicated hardware accelerator featuring an XNOR-Shift Systolic Array (XSSA) and an enhanced Base-2 SoftMax Converter (BSMC), designed to address the specific computational demands of binarized LLMs. Experimental evaluations on the Alveo U280 and U50 FPGA demonstrate that XShift achieves a $\mathbf{1 0 - 1 5 x}$ reduction in DSP resource usage while surpassing existing accelerators and GPUs in inference performance. Specifically, XShift delivers an average speedup of 4.174.76 x and a 14.29-6.95 x improvement in energy efficiency, alongside lower perplexity compared to other low-precision LLM techniques. These results underscore the potential of XShift for edge deployment of LLMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 二值化是一种很有前途的方法，通过用硬件高效的 XNOR 运算代替乘法来显着降低计算复杂性。然而，LLM激活的二值化通常会导致严重的精度下降，而仅权重二值化由于自注意力机制而无法消除乘数。此外，LLM 表现出独特的通道级数据分布特征以及预填充和解码阶段之间不同的计算和内存要求，需要专门的推理框架。为此，我们推出了 XShift，这是一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，针对 FPGA 上的高效二值化 LLM 推理进行了优化。 XShift 包含三个关键贡献：(1) 硬件友好的 XNOR-Shift 编码 (XSE) 格式，将传统乘法转换为 XNOR 和移位运算，确保可扩展性和精度； (2) 硬件自适应异常值和稀疏性 (HAOS) 技术，利用通道级数据分布和脉动阵列架构来优化量化和稀疏化； (3) 专用硬件加速器，具有 XNOR 移位脉动阵列 (XSSA) 和增强型 Base-2 SoftMax 转换器 (BSMC)，旨在满足二值化 LLM 的特定计算需求。对 Alveo U280 和 U50 FPGA 的实验评估表明，XShift 在 DSP 资源使用方面实现了 $\mathbf{1 0 - 1 5 x}$ 减少，同时在推理性能方面超越了现有的加速器和 GPU。具体来说，与其他低精度 LLM 技术相比，XShift 的平均加速率为 4.174.76 倍，能源效率提高了 14.29-6.95 倍，同时困惑度更低。这些结果强调了 XShift 在 LLM 边缘部署方面的潜力。

papers.title: YAP: Yield Modeling and Simulation for Advanced Packaging.
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional integration technologies present a promising path forward for extending Moore’s law, facilitating high-density interconnects between chips and supporting multi-tier architectural designs. Cu-Cu hybrid bonding has emerged as a favored technique for the integration of chiplets at high interconnect density. This paper introduces YAP, a yield model for wafer-to-wafer (W2W) and die-to-wafer (D2W) hybrid bonding process. The model accounts for key failure mechanisms that contribute to yield loss, including overlay errors, particle defects, Cu recess variations, excessive wafer surface roughness, and Cu density. We also develop an open-source yield simulator and compare the accuracy of the near-analytical yield model with the simulation results. The results demonstrate that YAP achieves virtually identical accuracy while offering over 10,000x faster runtime. YAP enables the co-optimization of packaging technologies, assembly design rules, and overall design methodologies. We used YAP to examine the impact of bonding pitch, compare W2W and D2W hybrid bonding for varying chiplet sizes, and explore the benefits of tighter process controls, such as improved particle defect density.
papers.abstract_zh: 三维集成技术为扩展摩尔定律、促进芯片之间的高密度互连和支持多层架构设计提供了一条有前途的道路。铜-铜混合键合已成为高互连密度小芯片集成的热门技术。本文介绍了 YAP，一种晶圆到晶圆 (W2W) 和芯片到晶圆 (D2W) 混合键合工艺的良率模型。该模型考虑了导致良率损失的关键失效机制，包括重叠误差、颗粒缺陷、铜凹槽变化、晶圆表面粗糙度过高和铜密度。我们还开发了一个开源良率模拟器，并将近分析良率模型的准确性与模拟结果进行比较。结果表明，YAP 实现了几乎相同的精度，同时运行时间快了 10,000 倍以上。 YAP 能够实现封装技术、装配设计规则和整体设计方法的共同优化。我们使用 YAP 来检查键合间距的影响，比较不同小芯片尺寸的 W2W 和 D2W 混合键合，并探索更严格的工艺控制的好处，例如提高颗粒缺陷密度。

papers.title: YOCO: A Hybrid In-Memory Computing Architecture with 8-bit Sub-PetaOps/W In-Situ Multiply Arithmetic for Large-Scale AI.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we further explore the potential of analog in-memory computing (AiMC) and introduce an innovative artificial intelligence (AI) accelerator architecture named YOCO, featuring three key proposals: (1) YOCO proposes a novel 8-bit in-situ multiply arithmetic (IMA) achieving 123.8 TOPS/W energy-efficiency and 34.9 TOPS throughput through efficient charge-domain computation and time-domain accumulation mechanism. (2) YOCO employs a hybrid ReRAM-SRAM memory structure to balance computational efficiency and storage density. (3) YOCO tailors an IMC-friendly attention computing flow with an efficient pipeline to accelerate the inference of transformer-based AI models. Compared to three SOTA baselines, YOCO on average improves energy efficiency by up to $3.9 \times \sim 19.9 \times$ and throughput by up to $6.8 \times \sim 33.6 \times$ across $10 \mathrm{CNN} /$ transformer models.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们进一步探索了模拟内存计算（AiMC）的潜力，并介绍了一种名为YOCO的创新人工智能（AI）加速器架构，该架构具有三个关键建议：（1）YOCO提出了一种新型8位原位乘法算法（IMA），通过高效的电荷域计算和时域累积机制实现了123.8 TOPS/W的能效和34.9 TOPS的吞吐量。 (2)YOCO采用混合ReRAM-SRAM存储器结构来平衡计算效率和存储密度。 （3）YOCO定制了IMC友好的注意力计算流程和高效的管道，以加速基于Transformer的AI模型的推理。与三个 SOTA 基线相比，YOCO 在 $10 \mathrm{CNN} /$ 变压器模型中平均能效提高高达 $3.9 \times \sim 19.9 \times$，吞吐量提高高达 $6.8 \times \sim 33.6 \times$。

papers.title: ZenLeak: Practical Last-Level Cache Side-Channel Attacks on AMD Zen Processors.
papers.abstract: While Last-Level Cache (LLC) side-channel attacks often target inclusive caches, directory-based attacks on noninclusive caches have been demonstrated on Intel and ARM processors. However, the vulnerability of AMD’s non-inclusive caches to such attacks has remained uncertain, primarily due to challenges in reverse-engineering cache addressing, constructing eviction sets, and evicting private cache lines. This paper addresses these challenges and demonstrates the feasibility of conducting LLC side-channel attacks on AMD’s non-inclusive caches. We first reverse-engineer the cache addressing functions for the L2 set index, L3 slice, and L3 set index. Leveraging this insight, we construct the first eviction sets on AMD processors. We then introduce the first LLC sidechannel attack on AMD’s Zen series CPUs. The effectiveness of our approach is validated by attacking OpenSSL’s AES T-table.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然末级缓存 (LLC) 侧通道攻击通常针对包含式缓存，但针对非包含式缓存的基于目录的攻击已在 Intel 和 ARM 处理器上得到验证。然而，AMD 的非包容性缓存对此类攻击的脆弱性仍然不确定，主要是由于逆向工程缓存寻址、构建逐出集和逐出私有缓存行方面的挑战。本文解决了这些挑战，并演示了对 AMD 非包容性缓存进行 LLC 旁道攻击的可行性。我们首先对 L2 集合索引、L3 切片和 L3 集合索引的缓存寻址函数进行逆向工程。利用这一见解，我们在 AMD 处理器上构建了第一个驱逐集。然后我们介绍了针对 AMD Zen 系列 CPU 的第一个 LLC 旁道攻击。我们的方法的有效性通过攻击 OpenSSL 的 AES T 表得到验证。

papers.title: ZION: A Practical Confidential Virtual Machine Architecture on Commodity RISC-V Processors.
papers.abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide robust hardware-based isolation to mitigate data breaches and privacy risks. Confidential Virtual Machines (confidential VMs or CVMs) extend these capabilities by using VMs as their execution abstraction, offering superior compatibility over process-based TEEs like Intel SGX. The rising demand for Confidential VMs has spurred innovations from major chip manufacturers, such as AMD SEV, Intel TDX, and Arm CCA, and their integration into leading cloud platforms, including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. On the RISC-V platform, however, existing TEE architectures rely on process-level abstractions or custom hardware, leading to limited compatibility and scalability.This paper presents ZION, a confidential VM architecture for commodity RISC-V hardware that operates without custom extensions. ZION ensures security, flexibility, and efficiency through a short-path CVM mode and a secure vCPU mechanism for protecting and efficiently updating vCPU states, enhancing context-switching performance. It combines Physical Memory Protection (PMP) with paging for scalable memory isolation, employs a hierarchical memory structure for efficient management, and introduces a split-page-table-based mechanism for secure memory sharing with virtio devices. Evaluations show ZION achieves under 5% overhead in real-world applications, demonstrating its practicality.
papers.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境 (TEE) 提供强大的基于硬件的隔离，以减轻数据泄露和隐私风险。机密虚拟机（机密 VM 或 CVM）通过使用 VM 作为执行抽象来扩展这些功能，提供比 Intel SGX 等基于流程的 TEE 更高的兼容性。对机密虚拟机不断增长的需求刺激了 AMD SEV、Intel TDX 和 Arm CCA 等主要芯片制造商的创新，并将其集成到领先的云平台（包括 AWS、Azure 和 Google Cloud）中。然而，在 RISC-V 平台上，现有的 TEE 架构依赖于进程级抽象或自定义硬件，导致兼容性和可扩展性有限。本文提出了 ZION，一种用于商用 RISC-V 硬件的机密 VM 架构，无需自定义扩展即可运行。 ZION通过短路径CVM模式和安全vCPU机制确保安全性、灵活性和效率，保护和高效更新vCPU状态，增强上下文切换性能。它将物理内存保护 (PMP) 与可扩展内存隔离的分页相结合，采用分层内存结构进行高效管理，并引入基于拆分页表的机制来与 virtio 设备安全共享内存。评估显示，ZION 在实际应用中实现了低于 5% 的开销，证明了其实用性。

papers.title: ZK-Hammer: Leaking Secrets from Zero-Knowledge Proofs via Rowhammer.
papers.abstract: Zero-knowledge succinct non-interactive arguments of knowledge (zk-SNARK) schemes have been a promising technique in verified computation. Zk-SNARK schemes were designed to be mathematically secure against cryptographic attacks and it remains unclear whether they are vulnerable to fault injection attacks. In this work, we provide a positive answer by presenting ZK-Hammer, which leaks secrets from zk-SNARK schemes via Rowhammer. We incur faults in the exponentiate variables in the Quadratic Arithmetic Program (QAP) problem. Then we analyze the faulty proof using the bilinear pairing technique and manage to recover the secret. We employ a Rowhammer fault evaluation in libsnark and identify 3 CVEs.
papers.abstract_zh: 零知识简洁非交互式知识论证（zk-SNARK）方案一直是验证计算中一种有前途的技术。 Zk-SNARK 方案的设计目的是在数学上安全地抵御加​​密攻击，但目前尚不清楚它们是否容易受到故障注入攻击。在这项工作中，我们通过提出 ZK-Hammer 提供了肯定的答案，它通过 Rowhammer 泄露 zk-SNARK 方案中的秘密。我们在二次算术规划 (QAP) 问题中的指数变量中遇到了错误。然后我们使用双线性配对技术分析错误证明并设法恢复秘密。我们在 libsnark 中采用 Rowhammer 故障评估并识别出 3 个 CVE。

papers.title: zkVC: Fast Zero-Knowledge Proof for Private and Verifiable Computing.
papers.abstract: In the context of cloud computing, services are held on cloud servers, where the clients send their data to the server and obtain the results returned by server. However, the computation, data and results are prone to tampering due to the vulnerabilities on the server side. Thus, verifying the integrity of computation is important in the client-server setting. The cryptographic method known as Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) is renowned for facilitating private and verifiable computing. ZKP allows the client to validate that the results from the server are computed correctly without violating the privacy of the server’s intellectual property. Zero-Knowledge Succinct NonInteractive Argument of Knowledge (zkSNARKs), in particular, has been widely applied in various applications like blockchain and verifiable machine learning. Despite their popularity, existing zkSNARKs approaches remain highly computationally intensive. For instance, even basic operations like matrix multiplication require an extensive number of constraints, resulting in significant overhead. In addressing this challenge, we introduce $z k V C$, which optimizes the ZKP computation for matrix multiplication, enabling rapid proof generation on the server side and efficient verification on the client side. zkVC integrates optimized ZKP modules, such as Constraint-reduced Polynomial Circuit (CRPC) and Prefix-Sum Query (PSQ), collectively yielding a more than $\mathbf{1 2}$-fold increase in proof speed over prior methods. The code is available at https://github.com/UCF-Lou-Lab-PET/zkformer.
papers.abstract_zh: 在云计算的背景下，服务保存在云服务器上，客户端将数据发送到服务器并获取服务器返回的结果。然而，由于服务器端存在漏洞，计算、数据和结果容易被篡改。因此，验证计算的完整性在客户端-服务器设置中非常重要。被称为零知识证明（ZKP）的加密方法以促进私密和可验证计算而闻名。 ZKP 允许客户端验证服务器的结果是否正确计算，而不会侵犯服务器知识产权的隐私。特别是零知识简洁非交互式知识论证（zkSNARKs）已广泛应用于区块链和可验证机器学习等各种应用中。尽管很受欢迎，现有的 zkSNARKs 方法仍然是高度计算密集型的。例如，即使像矩阵乘法这样的基本运算也需要大量的约束，从而导致大量的开销。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 $z k V C$，它优化了矩阵乘法的 ZKP 计算，从而能够在服务器端快速生成证明并在客户端进行高效验证。 zkVC 集成了优化的 ZKP 模块，例如约束减少多项式电路 (CRPC) 和前缀求和查询 (PSQ)，与之前的方法相比，总体证明速度提高了 $\mathbf{1 2}$ 倍以上。代码可在 https://github.com/UCF-Lou-Lab-PET/zkformer 获取。

papers.title: ZXNet: ZX Calculus-Driven Graph Neural Network Framework for Quantum Circuit Equivalence Checking.
papers.abstract: Quantum circuit execution often requires transpilation into hardware-compatible instructions, which can significantly alter the original design, making equivalence checking essential. However, existing approaches struggle with scalability and computational overhead. In this paper, we present ZXNet, a transformative framework for quantum circuit equivalence checking using $\mathbf{Z X}$ calculus-based graph abstractions. Leveraging graph neural networks, ZXNet captures complex equivalence patterns by integrating critical local and global circuit features. ZXNet achieves 99.4% validation accuracy, and up to $62 \times$ speedup over state-of-the-art methods, furnishing improvements of 45.83% in scalability, 42.22% in per-qubit verification time, and 5.94% in accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子电路执行通常需要转换为硬件兼容的指令，这可能会显着改变原始设计，因此等效性检查至关重要。然而，现有方法在可扩展性和计算开销方面存在困难。在本文中，我们提出了 ZXNet，这是一种使用 $\mathbf{Z X}$ 基于微积分的图抽象进行量子电路等效性检查的变革框架。 ZXNet 利用图神经网络，通过集成关键的局部和全局电路特征来捕获复杂的等价模式。 ZXNet 实现了 99.4% 的验证准确率，与最先进的方法相比，速度提高了 62 美元，可扩展性提高了 45.83%，每量子位验证时间提高了 42.22%，准确性提高了 5.94%，优于最先进的方法。

papers.title: 3D-Carbon: An Analytical Carbon Modeling Tool for 3D and 2.5D Integrated Circuits.
papers.abstract: Environmental sustainability is crucial for Integrated Circuits (ICs) across their lifecycle, particularly in manufacturing and use. Meanwhile, ICs using 3D/2.5D integration technologies have emerged as promising solutions to meet the growing demands for computational power. However, there is a distinct lack of carbon modeling tools for 3D/2.5D ICs. Addressing this, we propose 3D-Carbon, an analytical carbon modeling tool designed to quantify the carbon emissions of 3D/2.5D ICs throughout their life cycle. 3D-Carbon factors in both potential savings and overheads from advanced integration technologies, considering practical deployment constraints like bandwidth. We validate 3D-Carbon's accuracy against established baselines and illustrate its utility through case studies in autonomous vehicles. We believe that 3D-Carbon lays the initial foundation for future innovations in developing environmentally sustainable 3D/2.5D ICs. Our open-source code is available at https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/3D-Carbon.
papers.abstract_zh: 环境可持续性对于集成电路 (IC) 的整个生命周期至关重要，特别是在制造和使用过程中。与此同时，使用 3D/2.5D 集成技术的 IC 已成为有前途的解决方案，可以满足对计算能力日益增长的需求。然而，3D/2.5D IC 明显缺乏碳建模工具。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 3D-Carbon，这是一种分析碳建模工具，旨在量化 3D/2.5D IC 在其整个生命周期中的碳排放。 3D-Carbon 考虑了先进集成技术的潜在节省和开销，并考虑了带宽等实际部署限制。我们根据既定基线验证 3D-Carbon 的准确性，并通过自动驾驶汽车的案例研究说明其实用性。我们相信，3D-Carbon 为开发环境可持续的 3D/2.5D IC 的未来创新奠定了初步基础。我们的开源代码可在 https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/3D-Carbon 获取。

papers.title: 4-Transistor Ternary Content Addressable Memory Cell Design using Stacked Hybrid IGZO/Si Transistors.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a 4T-based paired orthogonally stacked transistors for random access memory (POST-RAM) cell structure and also suggest ternary content addressable memory (TCAM) applications. POST-RAM cells feature vertically stacked read and write transistors, maximizing area efficiency by utilizing only two transistors' space. POST-RAM employs InGaZnO (IGZO) channels for write transistors and single crystal silicon channels for read transistors, which results in both extremely long memory retention and fast reading performance. A comprehensive 3D-TCAD simulation is conducted to validate the procedural design of the proposed device structure. Furthermore, we introduced a self-clamped searching scheme (SC2S) designed to enhance the efficiency of TCAM operations. The results conclusively demonstrate that operating a TCAM based on the proposed POST-RAM architecture can lead to a 20% improvement in energy-delay product (EDP). Notably, the delay performance can be enhanced by up to 40% when compared to a 16T SRAM-based TCAM. Additionally, the proposed scheme enables a more than sixfold reduction in cell area, demonstrating an efficient use of space.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 4T 的成对正交堆叠晶体管，用于随机存取存储器 (POST-RAM) 单元结构，并提出了三态内容可寻址存储器 (TCAM) 应用。 POST-RAM 单元具有垂直堆叠的读取和写入晶体管，仅利用两个晶体管的空间即可最大限度地提高面积效率。 POST-RAM 采用 InGaZnO (IGZO) 通道作为写入晶体管，采用单晶硅通道作为读取晶体管，从而实现极长的内存保留和快速的读取性能。进行全面的 3D-TCAD 仿真以验证所提出的设备结构的程序设计。此外，我们引入了一种自钳位搜索方案（SC2S），旨在提高 TCAM 操作的效率。结果最终表明，基于所提出的 POST-RAM 架构运行 TCAM 可以使能量延迟积 (EDP) 提高 20%。值得注意的是，与基于 16T SRAM 的 TCAM 相比，延迟性能可提高高达 40%。此外，所提出的方案可以将单元面积减少六倍以上，展示了空间的有效利用。
