Worse still, most sensors will fail in the presence of dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) because they are built upon fixed delay chains and cannot adapt to operating voltage and frequency variations. In this paper, we overcome these limitations by presenting CDS, a delay chain based digital sensor that exploits timing variations of both detector and protected object for detecting multiple types of fault injection attacks. CDS utilizes a calibration module to solve the accuracy degradation caused by aging phenomena and a dynamic adjustment module to acclimatize itself to the need of dynamically adjusting voltage according to operating frequency in the presence of DVFS. To demonstrate its capability, we use CDS to protect the hardware accelerator of PRESENT cryptographic algorithm against voltage and laser glitching attacks. Simulation results based on HSPICE show that (i) CDS can detect 100% of voltage and temperature coordinated glitching attacks with 4.1% early warning; (ii) CDS can detect 100% of laser glitching attacks with 9.1% early warning; (iii) CDS maintains outstanding aging resistance with only 1.1% false alarm rate increase after 7 years of use.
papers.abstract_zh: 故障注入攻击（FIA）是一类主动物理攻击，它将故障注入计算设备中，故意改变其预期行为，以达到恶意目的，例如安全功能规避、权限升级、通过分析错误输出提取秘密数据等。检测故障注入攻击的现有传感器要么容易老化，要么需要经历复杂且昂贵的校准过程。更糟糕的是，大多数传感器在动态电压和频率缩放 (DVFS) 的情况下都会失败，因为它们是建立在固定延迟链上的，无法适应工作电压和频率变化。在本文中，我们通过提出 CDS 克服了这些限制，CDS 是一种基于延迟链的数字传感器，它利用检测器和受保护对象的时序变化来检测多种类型的故障注入攻击。 CDS利用校准模块来解决老化现象引起的精度下降，并利用动态调整模块来适应DVFS存在下根据工作频率动态调整电压的需要。为了展示其功能，我们使用 CDS 来保护 PRESENT 加密算法的硬件加速器免受电压和激光毛刺攻击。基于HSPICE的仿真结果表明：（i）CDS可以100%检测到电压和温度协调的毛刺攻击，预警率为4.1%； (ii) CDS 可以 100% 检测激光故障攻击，预警率为 9.1%； (iii) CDS保持出色的抗老化性能，使用7年后误报率仅增加1.1%。

papers.title: CEDAR: Computing-in-pixel Edge-aware Detection and Reconstruction Architecture for High-resolution 3D Imaging.
papers.abstract: Large-format single-photon avalanche diode (SPAD)-based direct time of flight (dToF) sensors are expected to be widely applied in future L5 full driving automation. However, the high-power in-pixel TDCs and the huge amount of data generated by multiframe histogram sampling impose limitations on the pixel format of SPAD-based dToF sensors. To tackle this challenge, we proposed the C omputing-in-pixel E dge-aware D etection a nd R econstruction ( CEDAR ) architecture. In this architecture, edge pixels are recognized by charge-domain convolution (CDC) computing, and noise pixels are eliminated by in-memory denoising (IMD). Only few TDCs in these edge pixels are activated, resulting in significant power and data savings. Afterward, the full-format image is reconstructed by a U-Net using the obtained depth information from these edge pixels. For the first time, we proposed a high-resolution 512 × 512 SPAD-based dToF sensor with a low power of 83.3 mW , a distance accuracy of 0.9 cm , and a frame rate of 60 fps. The high-resolution 3D image can be reconstructed by only 3.5% sparse edge pixels, achieving a PSNR of 35.2 dB. The CEDAR architecture can achieve 16× pixel format and image resolution improvement under the same constraint of power dissipation.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于大尺寸单光子雪崩二极管（SPAD）的直接飞行时间（dToF）传感器有望在未来L5级全驾驶自动化中得到广泛应用。然而，高功率像素内 TDC 和多帧直方图采样生成的大量数据对基于 SPAD 的 dToF 传感器的像素格式造成了限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了像素计算边缘感知检测和重建（CEDAR）架构。在该架构中，边缘像素通过电荷域卷积（CDC）计算来识别，噪声像素通过内存去噪（IMD）来消除。这些边缘像素中只有少数 TDC 被激活，从而显着节省功耗和数据。随后，U-Net 使用从这些边缘像素获得的深度信息重建全格式图像。我们首次提出了一种基于SPAD的高分辨率512×512 dToF传感器，具有83.3 mW的低功耗、0.9 cm的距离精度和60 fps的帧速率。仅用3.5%的稀疏边缘像素即可重建高分辨率3D图像，实现35.2 dB的PSNR。 CEDAR架构可以在相同功耗约束下实现16×像素格式和图像分辨率提升。

papers.title: CFTCG: Test Case Generation for Simulink Model through Code Based Fuzzing.
papers.abstract:
Simulink is extensively utilized in system design for its ability to facilitate modeling and synthesis of embedded controllers. It provides automatic test case generation to assist testers in inspecting the model. However, with the continuous increase in the model's scale, the control logic and internal states of the model are becoming more and more complex. Mainstream test case generation methods based on constraint solving and model simulation face challenges in achieving high coverage metrics.

In this paper, we propose CFTCG, a fuzzing based test case generation method for Simulink models. First, CFTCG generates the fuzzing code, which includes the fuzz driver based on the model's input information and the fuzz code with model-level branch instrumentation. These codes are then compiled together to execute the model oriented fuzzing loop. During this fuzzing loop, we make use of the field information of the model inports and the coverage difference between iterative executions, allowing for more targeted input mutation. We evaluated CFTCG on several benchmark Simulink models. In comparison to the built-in Simulink Design Verifier and the state-of-the-art academic work SimCoTest, CFTCG demonstrates an average improvement of 47.2% and 100.8% on Decision Coverage, 38.3% and 44.6% on Condition Coverage, and 144.5% and 232.4% on Modified Condition Decision Coverage, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
Simulink 因其能够促进嵌入式控制器的建模和综合而在系统设计中得到广泛应用。它提供自动测试用例生成来帮助测试人员检查模型。然而，随着模型规模的不断增大，模型的控制逻辑和内部状态变得越来越复杂。基于约束求解和模型模拟的主流测试用例生成方法在实现高覆盖率指标方面面临挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 CFTCG，一种基于模糊测试的 Simulink 模型测试用例生成方法。首先，CFTCG 生成模糊代码，其中包括基于模型输入信息的模糊驱动程序和具有模型级分支检测的模糊代码。然后将这些代码编译在一起以执行面向模型的模糊测试循环。在这个模糊循环中，我们利用模型输入端口的字段信息和迭代执行之间的覆盖差异，从而允许更有针对性的输入突变。我们在几个基准 Simulink 模型上评估了 CFTCG。与内置的 Simulink Design Verifier 和最先进的学术著作 SimCoTest 相比，CFTCG 的决策覆盖率平均提高了 47.2% 和 100.8%，条件覆盖率平均提高了 38.3% 和 44.6%，修改条件决策覆盖率平均提高了 144.5% 和 232.4%。

papers.title: ChatCPU: An Agile CPU Design and Verification Platform with LLM.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of semiconductor designs necessitates agile hardware development methodologies to keep pace with rapid technological advancements. Following this trend, the Large Language Models (LLMs) emerge as a potential solution, providing new opportunities in hardware design automation. However, existing LLMs exhibit challenges in HDL design and verification, especially for complicated hardware systems. Addressing this need, we introduce ChatCPU, the first end-to-end agile hardware design and verification platform with LLM. ChatCPU streamlines the ASIC design and verification process, guiding it from initial specifications to the final RTL implementations with enhanced design agility. Incorporating the LLM fine-tuning and the processor description language design for CPU design automation, ChatCPU significantly enhances the hardware design capability using LLM. Utilizing ChatCPU, we developed a 6-stage in-order RISC-V CPU prototype, achieving successful tape-out using SkyWater 130nm MPW project with Efabless, which is currently the largest CPU design generated by LLM. Our results demonstrate a remarkable improvement in CPU design efficiency, accelerating the design iteration process by an average of 3.81X, and peaking at 12X and 9.33X in HDL implementations and verification stages, respectively. The ChatCPU also enhances the design capability of LLM by 2.63X as compared to base LLama2. These advancements in ChatCPU represent a significant milestone in LLM-driven ASIC design and optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 半导体设计的复杂性日益增加，需要灵活的硬件开发方法来跟上快速的技术进步。顺应这一趋势，大型语言模型 (LLM) 作为一种潜在的解决方案应运而生，为硬件设计自动化提供了新的机遇。然而，现有的法学硕士在 HDL 设计和验证方面面临挑战，特别是对于复杂的硬件系统。为了满足这一需求，我们推出了 ChatCPU，这是第一个具有法学硕士的端到端敏捷硬件设计和验证平台。 ChatCPU 简化了 ASIC 设计和验证流程，引导其从最初的规范到最终的 RTL 实现，并增强了设计灵活性。 ChatCPU结合了LLM微调和CPU设计自动化的处理器描述语言设计，利用LLM显着增强了硬件设计能力。利用ChatCPU，我们开发了一个6级有序RISC-V CPU原型，并使用Efabless的SkyWater 130nm MPW项目成功实现了流片，这是目前LLM生成的最大的CPU设计。我们的结果表明 CPU 设计效率显着提高，设计迭代过程平均加速 3.81 倍，在 HDL 实现和验证阶段分别达到峰值 12 倍和 9.33 倍。与基础 LLama2 相比，ChatCPU 还将 LLM 的设计能力增强了 2.63 倍。 ChatCPU 的这些进步代表了 LLM 驱动的 ASIC 设计和优化的一个重要里程碑。

papers.title: ChatPattern: Layout Pattern Customization via Natural Language.
papers.abstract: Existing works focus on fixed-size layout pattern generation, while the more practical free-size pattern generation receives limited attention. In this paper, we propose ChatPattern, a novel Large-Language-Model (LLM) powered framework for flexible pattern customization. ChatPattern utilizes a two-part system featuring an expert LLM agent and a highly controllable layout pattern generator. The LLM agent can interpret natural language requirements and operate design tools to meet specified needs, while the generator excels in conditional layout generation, pattern modification, and memory-friendly patterns extension. Experiments on challenging pattern generation setting shows the ability of ChatPattern to synthesize high-quality large-scale patterns.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的工作重点是固定尺寸的布局图案生成，而更实用的自由尺寸图案生成受到的关注有限。在本文中，我们提出了 ChatPattern，这是一种新颖的大语言模型 (LLM) 支持的框架，用于灵活的模式定制。 ChatPattern 采用由两部分组成的系统，其中包括专业的 LLM 代理和高度可控的布局模式生成器。 LLM 代理可以解释自然语言要求并操作设计工具来满足指定需求，而生成器则擅长条件布局生成、模式修改和内存友好型模式扩展。在具有挑战性的模式生成设置上的实验表明了 ChatPattern 合成高质量大规模模式的能力。

papers.title: Chiplever: Towards Effortless Extension of Chiplet-based System for FHE.
papers.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is one of the most promising privacy-preserving techniques that has drawn increasing attention from academia and industry due to its ideal security. Chiplet-based designs integrate multiple dies into the package delivering high performance and thereby are embraced by the resources-hungry FHE. Despite the chiplet-based system with various specialized accelerators, it falls short in supporting FHE with the novel polynomial operations. For a chiplet-based system that is not tailored for FHE, one common approach to support FHE is designing a new dedicated accelerator, However, this full design-and-build approach overlooks the existing abundant resources of accelerators in the system and incurs repeated customization and resource waste.

In this paper, we propose Chiplever, a framework enables effort-less extension of Chiplet-based system for FHE. We aim to fully harness the available resources in the room for efficient FHE. To achieve this, Chiplever (1)introduces a specialized extension in I/O Chiplet guided by semantics matching (2)and proposes an efficient allocator featuring specialized dataflow scheduling. (3)Chiplever provides three-step mapping to achieve compiler-level to hardwarelevel support for FHE and optimizes the data communications.
papers.abstract_zh:
全同态加密（FHE）是最有前途的隐私保护技术之一，由于其理想的安全性越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。基于 Chiplet 的设计将多个芯片集成到封装中，提供高性能，因此受到资源匮乏的 FHE 的欢迎。尽管基于小芯片的系统具有各种专用加速器，但它在通过新颖的多项式运算支持 FHE 方面仍存在不足。对于非针对FHE量身定制的基于chiplet的系统，支持FHE的一种常见方法是设计新的专用加速器。然而，这种完全设计和构建的方法忽略了系统中现有丰富的加速器资源，导致重复定制和资源浪费。

在本文中，我们提出了 Chiplever，这是一个框架，可以轻松扩展基于 Chiplet 的 FHE 系统。我们的目标是充分利用房间内的可用资源来实现高效的 FHE。为了实现这一目标，Chiplever (1) 在语义匹配 (2) 的指导下在 I/O Chiplet 中引入了专门的扩展，并提出了一种具有专门数据流调度功能的高效分配器。 (3)Chipever提供三步映射，实现编译器级到硬件级的FHE支持，并优化数据通信。

papers.title: CircuitVAE: Efficient and Scalable Latent Circuit Optimization.
papers.abstract: Automatically designing fast and space-efficient digital circuits is challenging because circuits are discrete, must exactly implement the desired logic, and are costly to simulate. We address these challenges with CircuitVAE, a search algorithm that embeds computation graphs in a continuous space and optimizes a learned surrogate of physical simulation by gradient descent. By carefully controlling overfitting of the simulation surrogate and ensuring diverse exploration, our algorithm is highly sample-efficient, yet gracefully scales to large problem instances and high sample budgets. We test CircuitVAE by designing binary adders across a large range of sizes, IO timing constraints, and sample budgets. Our method excels at designing large circuits, where other algorithms struggle: compared to reinforcement learning and genetic algorithms, CircuitVAE typically finds 64-bit adders which are smaller and faster using less than half the sample budget. We also find CircuitVAE can design state-of-the-art adders in a real-world chip, demonstrating that our method can outperform commercial tools in a realistic setting.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动设计快速且节省空间的数字电路具有挑战性，因为电路是分立的，必须精确实现所需的逻辑，并且仿真成本高昂。我们使用 CircuitVAE 来解决这些挑战，这是一种搜索算法，将计算图嵌入连续空间中，并通过梯度下降来优化物理模拟的学习代理。通过仔细控制模拟代理的过度拟合并确保多样化的探索，我们的算法具有很高的样本效率，但可以优雅地扩展到大型问题实例和高样本预算。我们通过设计各种尺寸、IO 时序约束和样本预算的二进制加法器来测试 CircuitVAE。我们的方法擅长设计大型电路，而其他算法则难以做到这一点：与强化学习和遗传算法相比，CircuitVAE 通常会使用不到一半的样本预算来找到更小、更快的 64 位加法器。我们还发现 CircuitVAE 可以在现实芯片中设计最先进的加法器，这证明我们的方法在现实环境中可以优于商业工具。

papers.title: CLUMAP: Clustered Mapper for CGRAs with Predication.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architectures (CGRAs) have gained popularity as accelerators for compute-intensive kernels. Complex CGRA architectures that support key features such as multi-context and predication are being developed to support a wider range of kernels. However, mapping applications on these complex architectures poses significant challenges. In this paper, we provide an architecture-agnostic clustered mapping technique and a new cost function tailored for simulated-annealing placement. The mapper simplifies placement and routing phases, demonstrating significant speedup for popular CGRA architectures: HyCUBE and ADRES. Additionally, our method demonstrates an increase in mapping success for the ADRES architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构 (CGRA) 作为计算密集型内核的加速器而广受欢迎。支持多上下文和预测等关键功能的复杂 CGRA 架构正在开发中，以支持更广泛的内核。然而，在这些复杂的架构上映射应用程序带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提供了一种与架构无关的集群映射技术和一种为模拟退火布局量身定制的新成本函数。该映射器简化了布局和布线阶段，展示了流行的 CGRA 架构（HyCUBE 和 ADRES）的显着加速。此外，我们的方法表明 ADRES 架构的映射成功率有所提高。

papers.title: Co-Via: A Video Frame Interpolation Accelerator Exploiting Codec Information Reuse.
papers.abstract: Video Frame Interpolation (VFI) aims to generate intermediate frames between consecutive frames. Recent DNN-based VFI offers superior quality but suffers from performance issues. However, very few studies have focused on VFI hardware acceleration and existing work overlooks temporal information from compressed video bitstreams. In this paper, we propose a novel compressed VFI workflow and an accelerator, Co-Via. Co-Via exploits codec information reuse to reduce complex DNN computations and alleviate hardware pressure. FPGA-based Co-Via outperforms an RTX 4090 GPU 10.31X, offering a 43.08X energy efficiency boost. Its ASIC version achieves 2.4X higher throughput and 3.6X energy efficiency than the state-of-the-art solution.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频帧插值（VFI）旨在生成连续帧之间的中间帧。最近基于 DNN 的 VFI 提供了卓越的质量，但存在性能问题。然而，很少有研究关注 VFI 硬件加速，并且现有的工作忽略了压缩视频比特流中的时间信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的压缩 VFI 工作流程和加速器 Co-Via。 Co-Via 利用编解码器信息重用来减少复杂的 DNN 计算并减轻硬件压力。基于 FPGA 的 Co-Via 的性能优于 RTX 4090 GPU 10.31 倍，能效提升 43.08 倍。其 ASIC 版本的吞吐量比最先进的解决方案高 2.4 倍，能源效率高 3.6 倍。

papers.title: Combining Parameterized Pulses and Contextual Subspace for More Practical VQE.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we explore the integration of parameterized quantum pulses with the contextual subspace method. The advent of parameterized quantum pulses marks a transition from traditional quantum gates to a more flexible and efficient approach to quantum computing. Working with pulses allows us to potentially access areas of the Hilbert space that are inaccessible with a CNOT-based circuit decomposition. Compared to solving the complete Hamiltonian via the traditional Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE), the computation of the contextual correction generally requires fewer qubits and measurements, thus improving computational efficiency. Plus a Pauli grouping strategy, our framework, SpacePulse, can minimize the quantum resource cost for the VQE and enhance the potential for processing larger molecular structures.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索了参数化量子脉冲与上下文子空间方法的集成。参数化量子脉冲的出现标志着从传统量子门到更灵活、更高效的量子计算方法的转变。使用脉冲使我们能够访问希尔伯特空间中基于 CNOT 的电路分解无法访问的区域。与通过传统的变分量子本征求解器（VQE）求解完整的哈密顿量相比，上下文校正的计算通常需要更少的量子位和测量，从而提高了计算效率。加上泡利分组策略，我们的框架 SpacePulse 可以最大限度地降低 VQE 的量子资源成本，并增强处理更大分子结构的潜力。

papers.title: Compact and Efficient CAM Architecture through Combinatorial Encoding and Self-Terminating Searching for In-Memory-Searching Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Content addressable memory (CAM) has triggered a lot of attention for data-intensive applications due to highly parallel pattern searching capability. Most state-of-the-art works focus on reducing hardware cost of CAM by exploiting various emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies. However, the existing CAM designs still mainly follow the conventional encoding scheme which requires two complementary storage nodes and search signals for each bit of entry and query respectively, along with separate precharging and evaluation phases for bit-vector searching, limiting the further improvement of area- and energy-efficiency. In this work, a compact and efficient CAM architecture is proposed through two techniques: (1) a combinatorial encoding scheme for CAM by encoding entry/query states with permutations and combinations of multiple storage nodes as a group, which can significantly improve the encoding efficiency and thus greatly reduce the hardware implementation cost of CAM compared with conventional encoding scheme; (2) an one-step self-terminating searching scheme for CAM by detecting matching condition during precharging phase and terminating precharging once a match is detected, which can further reduce the search delay and energy. The experiments and evaluations of the proposed CAM architecture with co-optimization of combinatorial encoding and self-terminating searching are carried out based on ferroelectric FET (FeFET), which can reduce the area-energy-delay product (AEDP) by 1182X over the conventional CMOS-based CAM in data searching tasks, showing its great potential for area- and energy-efficient in-memory-searching accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于高度并行的模式搜索能力，内容可寻址存储器（CAM）引起了数据密集型应用的广泛关注。大多数最先进的工作都集中在通过利用各种新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术来降低 CAM 的硬件成本。然而，现有的CAM设计仍然主要遵循传统的编码方案，需要两个互补的存储节点，分别为条目和查询的每一位提供搜索信号，以及用于位向量搜索的单独的预充电和评估阶段，限制了面积效率和能量效率的进一步提高。在这项工作中，通过两种技术提出了一种紧凑高效的CAM架构：（1）一种CAM组合编码方案，通过将多个存储节点作为一组进行排列组合来编码条目/查询状态，与传统编码方案相比，可以显着提高编码效率，从而大大降低CAM的硬件实现成本； (2)一种CAM的一步自终止搜索方案，在预充电阶段检测匹配条件，一旦检测到匹配就终止预充电，这可以进一步减少搜索延迟和能量。所提出的具有组合编码和自终止搜索联合优化的 CAM 架构的实验和评估是基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 进行的，与传统基于 CMOS 的 CAM 相比，在数据搜索任务中，该架构可以将面积能量延迟积 (AEDP) 减少 1182 倍，显示出其作为面积和能源高效内存搜索加速器的巨大潜力。

papers.title: Conclave - Secure and Robust Cooperative Perception for Connected Autonomous Vehicle Using Authenticated Consensus and Trust Scoring.
papers.abstract:
Connected Autonomous Vehicles have great potential to improve automobile safety and traffic flow, especially in cooperative applications where perception data is shared between vehicles. However, this cooperation must be secured from malicious intent and unintentional errors that could cause accidents. Previous works typically address singular security or reliability issues for cooperative driving in specific scenarios rather than the set of errors together. In this paper, we propose CONClave - a tightly coupled authentication, consensus, and trust scoring mechanism that provides comprehensive security and reliability for cooperative perception in autonomous vehicles. CONClave benefits from the pipelined nature of the steps such that faults can be detected significantly faster and with less compute. Overall, CONClave shows huge promise in preventing security flaws, detecting even relatively minor sensing faults, and increasing the robustness and accuracy of cooperative perception in CAVs while adding minimal overhead.

This work was partially supported by funding from National Science Foundation grants CPS 1645578 and Semiconductor Research Corporation (SRC) project 3154.
papers.abstract_zh:
联网自动驾驶汽车在改善汽车安全和交通流量方面具有巨大潜力，特别是在车辆之间共享感知数据的协作应用中。然而，这种合作必须避免可能导致事故的恶意和无意错误。以前的工作通常解决特定场景下协同驾驶的单一安全性或可靠性问题，而不是解决一组错误。在本文中，我们提出了 CONClave——一种紧密耦合的身份验证、共识和信任评分机制，为自动驾驶车辆的协作感知提供全面的安全性和可靠性。 CONClave 受益于步骤的流水线性质，因此可以更快地检测到故障，并且计算量更少。总体而言，CONClave 在防止安全缺陷、检测相对较小的传感故障以及提高 CAV 协作感知的鲁棒性和准确性方面显示出巨大的前景，同时增加最小的开销。

这项工作得到了国家科学基金会拨款 CPS 1645578 和半导体研究公司 (SRC) 项目 3154 的部分资助。

papers.title: Concurrent Detailed Routing with Pin Pattern Re-generation for Ultimate Pin Access Optimization.
papers.abstract: Pin access has become one of the most significant challenges in large-scale full-chip routing due to the continuous reduction in feature sizes and the increasing complexity of designs. The conventional standard cell layout synthesis approaches usually optimize pin accessibility by maximizing pin lengths and access points. However, these predetermined pin patterns greatly occupy routing resources and may contrarily degrade routability. To address this problem, this paper proposes the first work of concurrent detailed routing with pin pattern re-generation to achieve ultimate pin access optimization. A pseudopin extraction and routing technique is proposed that can secure one access point for each input/output pin while allowing the remaining access points to be routable by other nets. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can resolve 89% of local regions that are unroutable with original layout patterns without compromising power and timing performances.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于特征尺寸的不断减小和设计复杂性的不断增加，引脚访问已成为大规模全芯片布线中最重大的挑战之一。传统的标准单元布局综合方法通常通过最大化引脚长度和接入点来优化引脚可访问性。然而，这些预定的管脚图案极大地占用了布线资源并且可能反而降低了可布线性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了第一个工作，即并发详细布线和引脚模式重新生成，以实现最终的引脚访问优化。提出了一种伪引脚提取和路由技术，该技术可以保护每个输入/输出引脚的一个接入点，同时允许其余接入点可由其他网络路由。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以解决 89% 的原始布局图案无法布线的局部区域，而不会影响功耗和时序性能。

papers.title: Conjuring: Leaking Control Flow via Speculative Fetch Attacks.
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose a new attack called Conjuring that exploits one of the main features of CPUs' frontend: speculative fetch of instructions. We show that the Pattern History Table (PHT) in modern CPUs are a great channel to learn and leak control flow of victim applications. Unlike prior work, Conjuring does not require that one primes the PHT or interferes with the victim execution enabling a realistic and unprivileged attacker to leak control flow information. By improving the branch predictors, our attack becomes even more serious and practical. We demonstrate the feasibility of our attack on different existing Intel, AMD, and Apple CPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 Conjuring 的新攻击，它利用了 CPU 前端的主要功能之一：推测性指令获取。我们证明，现代 CPU 中的模式历史表 (PHT) 是学习和泄漏受害应用程序流量的绝佳渠道。与之前的工作不同，Conjuring 不需要启动 PHT 或干扰受害者的执行，从而使现实且无特权的攻击者能够泄漏控制流信息。通过改进分支预测器，我们的攻击变得更加严肃和实用。我们展示了对不同的现有 Intel、AMD 和 Apple CPU 进行攻击的可行性。

papers.title: Control Flow Divergence Optimization by Exploiting Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract: Kernels are scheduled on Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) in the granularity of GPU warp, which is a bunch of threads that must be scheduled together. When executing kernels with conditional branches, the threads within a warp may execute different branches sequentially, resulting in a considerable utilization loss and unpredictable execution time. This problem is known as the control flow divergence. In this work, we propose a novel method to predict threads' execution path before the launch of the kernel by deploying a branch prediction network on the GPU's tensor cores, which can efficiently parallel run with the kernels on CUDA cores, so that the divergence problem can be eased in a large extent with the lowest overhead. Combined with a well-designed thread data reorganization algorithm, this solution can better mitigate GPUs' control flow divergence problem.
papers.abstract_zh: 内核以 GPU warp 的粒度在图形处理单元 (GPU) 上进行调度，GPU warp 是一堆必须一起调度的线程。当执行带有条件分支的内核时，warp 内的线程可能会顺序执行不同的分支，从而导致相当大的利用率损失和不可预测的执行时间。这个问题被称为控制流发散。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在内核启动之前预测线程执行路径的新方法，通过在 GPU 张量核心上部署分支预测网络，可以与 CUDA 核心上的内核高效地并行运行，从而可以以最低的开销在很大程度上缓解发散问题。结合精心设计的线程数据重组算法，该解决方案可以更好地缓解GPU的控制流发散问题。

papers.title: Crop: An Analytical Cost Model for Cross-Platform Performance Prediction of Tensor Programs.
papers.abstract:
Learn-based cost models used for tensor compiler auto-tuning often suffer from poor performance when trained on one hardware platform and applied to another. This issue necessitates collecting performance data for each potential platform during model deployment, incurring significant overhead.

We propose Crop, a comprehensive and universal analytical cost model designed for cross-platform performance prediction of tensor programs. Crop decouples program features and hardware features. It gathers hardware-independent program features on one platform and predicts their performance based on parametric hardware features for a given platform. Crop achieves comparable levels of prediction accuracy to that of a learn-based cost model while ensuring portability.
papers.abstract_zh:
用于张量编译器自动调优的基于学习的成本模型在一个硬件平台上进行训练并应用于另一硬件平台时，通常会出现性能不佳的问题。此问题需要在模型部署期间收集每个潜在平台的性能数据，从而产生大量开销。

我们提出了 Crop，一种全面且通用的分析成本模型，专为张量程序的跨平台性能预测而设计。 Crop 将程序功能和硬件功能解耦。它在一个平台上收集与硬件无关的程序功能，并根据给定平台的参数化硬件功能来预测其性能。 Crop 实现了与基于学习的成本模型相当的预测准确性，同时确保了可移植性。

papers.title: Cross-Layer Exploration and Chip Demonstration of In-Sensor Computing for Large-Area Applications with Differential-Frame ROM-Based Compute-In-Memory.
papers.abstract: In-sensor computing has emerged as a promising approach to mitigating huge data transmission costs between sensors and processing units. Recently, the emerging application scenarios have raised more demands of sensory technology for large-area and flexible integration. However, with thin-film technologies that are capable of providing flexible and large-area integration support, the implementation of in-sensor computing can be strongly restricted due to the low device performance, large-area integration variation, and costly interface between sensors and CMOS processors. To address this challenge, we propose an in-sensor computing architecture to facilitate high-parallelism NN pre-processing and effective data compression. The boundaries of computing parallelism are expanded by adopting compact ROM-based compute-in-memory scheme next to sensing array. Differential-frame computing provides not only excellent robustness, but also high data sparsity. A bio-inspired data compression method with residual recovery caches and zero-skip circuits further enhances output sparsity without accumulated error. Based on the proposed cross-layer design optimization, an LTPS TFT-based ROM CiM chip has been fabricated and experimentally measured. The system-level evaluation demonstrates 3.85× speedup and 5.10× energy efficiency improvement compared with traditional architecture with separated sensors and processors, outperforming existing in-sensor computing works in large-area thin-film technology scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 传感器内计算已成为一种有前途的方法，可以减轻传感器和处理单元之间巨大的数据传输成本。近年来，新兴的应用场景对传感技术提出了更多大面积、灵活集成的需求。然而，凭借能够提供灵活和大面积集成支持的薄膜技术，由于器件性能低、大面积集成变化以及传感器和 CMOS 处理器之间昂贵的接口，传感器内计算的实现可能受到强烈限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种传感器内计算架构，以促进高并行性神经网络预处理和有效的数据压缩。通过在传感阵列旁边采用基于 ROM 的紧凑型内存计算方案，扩展了计算并行性的边界。差分帧计算不仅提供出色的鲁棒性，而且提供高数据稀疏性。具有残留恢复缓存和零跳跃电路的仿生数据压缩方法进一步增强了输出稀疏性，而不会累积错误。基于所提出的跨层设计优化，基于 LTPS TFT 的 ROM CiM 芯片已经制造出来并进行了实验测量。系统级评估表明，与传感器和处理器分离的传统架构相比，加速性能提高了3.85倍，能效提高了5.10倍，在大面积薄膜技术场景下的性能优于现有的传感器内计算工作。

papers.title: Cross-Layer Reliability Evaluation and Efficient Hardening of Large Vision Transformers Models.
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are highly accurate Machine Learning (ML) models. However, their large size and complexity increase the expected error rate due to hardware faults. Measuring the error rate of large ViT models is challenging, as conventional microarchitectural fault simulations can take years to produce statistically significant data. This paper proposes a two-level evaluation based on data collected through more than 70 hours of neutron beam experiments and more than 600 hours of software fault simulation. We consider 12 ViT models executed in 2 NVIDIA GPU architectures. We first characterize the fault model in ViT's kernels to identify the faults more likely to propagate to the output. We then design dedicated procedures efficiently integrated into the ViT to locate and correct these faults. We propose Maximum corrupted Malicious values (MaxiMals), an experimentally tuned low-cost mitigation solution to reduce the impact of transient faults on ViTs. We demonstrate that MaxiMals can correct 90.7% of critical failures, with execution time overheads as low as 5.61%.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 是高度准确的机器学习 (ML) 模型。然而，它们的大尺寸和复杂性增加了由于硬件故障而导致的预期错误率。测量大型 ViT 模型的错误率具有挑战性，因为传统的微架构故障模拟可能需要数年时间才能产生具有统计意义的数据。本文根据70多个小时的中子束实验和600多个小时的软件故障模拟收集的数据提出了两级评估。我们考虑在 2 个 NVIDIA GPU 架构中执行 12 个 ViT 模型。我们首先描述 ViT 内核中的故障模型，以识别更有可能传播到输出的故障。然后，我们设计专用程序，有效地集成到 ViT 中来定位和纠正这些故障。我们提出了最大损坏恶意值 (MaxiMals)，这是一种经过实验调整的低成本缓解解决方案，可减少瞬时故障对 ViT 的影响。我们证明 MaxiMals 可以纠正 90.7% 的关键故障，而执行时间开销低至 5.61%。

papers.title: CSTrans-OPU: An FPGA-based Overlay Processor with Full Compilation for Transformer Networks via Sparsity Exploration.
papers.abstract: A few overlay processors for transformer networks emerge to achieve reconfigurable architectures and dynamic instructions. However, these processors consistently neglect exploring network sparsity, while existing sparse accelerators inefficiently utilize resources with separate computation parts. Furthermore, mainstream compilers for instruction generation are intricate and demand significant engineering efforts. In this work, we propose CSTrans-OPU , an FPGA-based overlay processor with full compilation for transformer networks via sparsity exploration. Specifically, we customize a multi-precision processing element (PE) array with DSP-packing for unified computation format with full resource utilization. Additionally, the introduced sorting and computation mode selection modules make it possible to explore the token sparsity. Moreover, equipped with a user-friendly compiler, CSTrans-OPU enables model parsing, operation fusion, model quantization, instruction generation and reordering directly from model files. Experimental results show that CSTrans-OPU achieves 6.92-20.06× speedup and 182.48× higher energy efficiency compared with CPU, and 1.47-3.85× latency reduction with 4.63-52.53× better energy efficiency compared with GPU. Furthermore, we observe up to 4.28× better latency and 4.94× higher energy efficiency compared with previously customized accelerators, and can be up to 1.93× faster and 4.39× more energy efficient than FPGA processors. To the best of our knowledge, our CSTrans-OPU is the first overlay processor for transformer networks considering sparsity.
papers.abstract_zh: 一些用于变压器网络的覆盖处理器的出现是为了实现可重新配置的架构和动态指令。然而，这些处理器始终忽视探索网络稀疏性，而现有的稀疏加速器则无法有效地利用具有单独计算部分的资源。此外，用于指令生成的主流编译器非常复杂，需要大量的工程工作。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CSTrans-OPU，这是一种基于 FPGA 的覆盖处理器，通过稀疏性探索对变压器网络进行完整编译。具体来说，我们定制了一个带有DSP封装的多精度处理元件（PE）阵列，以实现统一的计算格式和充分的资源利用。此外，引入的排序和计算模式选择模块使得探索令牌稀疏性成为可能。此外，CSTrans-OPU配备了用户友好的编译器，可以直接从模型文件进行模型解析、运算融合、模型量化、指令生成和重新排序。实验结果表明，与CPU相比，CSTrans-OPU实现了6.92-20.06倍的加速和182.48倍的能效提高；与GPU相比，CSTrans-OPU的延迟降低了1.47-3.85倍，能效提高了4.63-52.53倍。此外，与之前定制的加速器相比，我们观察到延迟提高了 4.28 倍，能效提高了 4.94 倍，并且比 FPGA 处理器速度提高了 1.93 倍，能效提高了 4.39 倍。据我们所知，我们的 CSTrans-OPU 是第一个考虑稀疏性的变压器网络覆盖处理器。

papers.title: DACPara: A Divide-and-Conquer Parallel Approach for High-Quality Logic Rewriting in Large-Scale Circuits.
papers.abstract: Logic rewriting is a critical and time-consuming task in logic synthesis, which determines the area and delay of the synthesized circuit. However, existing parallel solutions for this task suffer from limitations in terms of runtime or quality in large-scale complex circuits. In this paper, we propose a divide-and-conquer parallel approach namely DACPara for high-quality logic rewriting in large-scale circuits. Specifically, after nodes in AIG are divided in each level, dynamic global information is considered to divide and conquer rewriting into three stages for parallel processing. Experiments show that DACPara using 40 CPU physical cores can be 34.36x and 1.96x faster than logic rewriting in ABC and the state-of-the-art CPU parallel method on large benchmarks, respectively, with extremely comparable quality of result. Also, for large-scale complex benchmarks, compared with state-of-the-art GPU accelerated method ours can achieve 1.1% quality improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑重写是逻辑综合中一项关键且耗时的任务，它决定了综合电路的面积和延迟。然而，该任务的现有并行解决方案在大规模复杂电路中的运行时间或质量方面受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种分而治之的并行方法，即 DACPara，用于大规模电路中的高质量逻辑重写。具体来说，AIG中的节点进行各级划分后，考虑动态全局信息，将重写分为三个阶段进行并行处理。实验表明，在大型基准测试中，使用 40 个 CPU 物理核心的 DACPara 分别比 ABC 中的逻辑重写和最先进的 CPU 并行方法快 34.36 倍和 1.96 倍，并且结果质量极其可比。此外，对于大规模复杂的基准测试，与最先进的 GPU 加速方法相比，我们的质量可以实现 1.1% 的提升。

papers.title: Data is all you need: Finetuning LLMs for Chip Design via an Automated design-data augmentation framework.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models have demonstrated their potential for automated generation of hardware description language (HDL) code from high-level prompts. Researchers have utilized fine-tuning to enhance the ability of these large language models (LLMs) in the field of Chip Design. However, the lack of Verilog data hinders further improvement in the quality of Verilog generation by LLMs. Additionally, the absence of a Verilog and electronic design automation (EDA) script data augmentation framework significantly increases the time required to prepare the training dataset for LLM trainers. This paper proposes an automated design-data augmentation framework, which generates high-volume and high-quality natural language aligned with Verilog and EDA scripts. For Verilog generation, it translates Verilog files to an abstract syntax tree and then maps nodes to natural language with a predefined template. For Verilog repair, it uses predefined rules to generate the wrong verilog file and then pairs EDA Tool feedback with the right and wrong verilog file. For EDA Script generation, it uses existing LLM(GPT-3.5) to obtain the description of the Script. To evaluate the effectiveness of our data augmentation method, we finetune Llama2--13B and Llama2-7B models using the dataset generated by our augmentation framework. The results demonstrate a significant improvement in the Verilog generation tasks with LLMs. Moreover, the accuracy of Verilog generation surpasses that of the current state-of-the-art open-source Verilog generation model, increasing from 58.8% to 70.6% with the same benchmark. Our 13B model (ChipGPT-FT 1 ) has a pass rate improvement compared with GPT-3.5 in Verilog generation and outperforms in EDA script ( i.e. , SiliconCompiler) generation with only 200 EDA script data.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型的最新进展已经证明了它们根据高级提示自动生成硬件描述语言 (HDL) 代码的潜力。研究人员利用微调来增强这些大型语言模型 (LLM) 在芯片设计领域的能力。然而，Verilog数据的缺乏阻碍了法学硕士进一步提高Verilog生成质量。此外，缺乏 Verilog 和电子设计自动化 (EDA) 脚本数据增强框架显着增加了为 LLM 培训师准备培训数据集所需的时间。本文提出了一种自动化设计数据增强框架，该框架可生成与 Verilog 和 EDA 脚本一致的大容量、高质量自然语言。对于 Verilog 生成，它将 Verilog 文件转换为抽象语法树，然后使用预定义的模板将节点映射到自然语言。对于Verilog修复，它使用预定义的规则生成错误的verilog文件，然后将EDA工具反馈与正确和错误的verilog文件配对。对于 EDA 脚本生成，它使用现有的 LLM(GPT-3.5) 来获取脚本的描述。为了评估我们的数据增强方法的有效性，我们使用我们的增强框架生成的数据集对 Llama2--13B 和 Llama2-7B 模型进行微调。结果表明，LLM 在 Verilog 生成任务方面取得了显着改进。此外，Verilog生成的准确性超越了当前最先进的开源Verilog生成模型，在相同基准下从58.8%提高到70.6%。与 GPT-3.5 相比，我们的 13B 模型 (ChipGPT-FT 1 ) 在 Verilog 生成方面具有通过率提高，并且在仅 200 个 EDA 脚本数据的 EDA 脚本（即 SiliconCompiler）生成方面表现优于 GPT-3.5。

papers.title: Data-driven HLS optimization for reconfigurable accelerators.
papers.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) has played a pivotal role in making FPGAs accessible to a broader audience by facilitating high-level device programming and rapid microarchitecture customization through the use of directives. However, manually selecting the right directives can be a formidable challenge for programmers lacking a hardware background. This paper introduces an ultra-fast, knowledge-based HLS design optimization method that automatically extracts and applies the most promising directive configurations to the original source code. This optimization approach is entirely data-driven, offering a generalized HLS tuning solution without reliance on Quality of Result (QoR) models or meta-heuristics. We design, implement, and evaluate our methodology using over 100 applications sourced from well-established benchmark suites and GitHub repositories, all running on a Xilinx ZCU104 FPGA. The results are promising, including an average geometric mean speedup of ×7.2 and ×1.35 compared to designer-optimized designs and resource over-provisioning strategies, respectively. Additionally, it demonstrates a high design feasibility score and maintains an average inference latency of 38ms. Comparative analysis with traditional genetic algorithm-based Design Space Exploration (DSE) methods and State-of-the-Art (SoA) approaches reveals that it produces designs of similar quality but at speeds 2-3 orders of magnitude faster. This suggests that it is a highly promising solution for ultra-fast and automated HLS optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 高级综合 (HLS) 通过使用指令促进高级设备编程和快速微架构定制，在让 FPGA 为更广泛的受众所使用方面发挥了关键作用。然而，对于缺乏硬件背景的程序员来说，手动选择正确的指令可能是一个巨大的挑战。本文介绍了一种超快速、基于知识的 HLS 设计优化方法，该方法可自动提取最有前途的指令配置并将其应用到原始源代码中。这种优化方法完全由数据驱动，提供通用的 HLS 调优解决方案，而不依赖于结果质量 (QoR) 模型或元启发式方法。我们使用来自完善的基准测试套件和 GitHub 存储库的 100 多个应用程序来设计、实现和评估我们的方法，所有这些应用程序都在 Xilinx ZCU104 FPGA 上运行。结果令人鼓舞，与设计人员优化的设计和资源过度配置策略相比，平均几何平均加速分别为 ×7.2 和 ×1.35。此外，它还表现出较高的设计可行性得分，并保持 38 毫秒的平均推理延迟。与传统的基于遗传算法的设计空间探索 (DSE) 方法和最先进的 (SoA) 方法的比较分析表明，它产生的设计质量相似，但速度快了 2-3 个数量级。这表明它是一种非常有前途的超快速和自动化 HLS 优化解决方案。

papers.title: Data-Efficient Conformalized Interval Prediction of Minimum Operating Voltage Capturing Process Variations.
papers.abstract: Accurate minimum operating voltage ( V min ) prediction is a critical element in manufacturing tests. Conventional methods lack coverage guarantees in interval predictions. Conformal Prediction (CP), a distribution-free machine learning approach, excels in providing rigorous coverage guarantees for interval predictions. However, standard CP predictors may fail due to a lack of knowledge of process variations. We address this challenge by providing principled conformalized interval prediction in the presence of process variations with high data efficiency, where the data from a few additional chips is utilized for calibration. We demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method on industrial 16nm chip data.
papers.abstract_zh: 准确的最小工作电压 (V min ) 预测是制造测试中的关键要素。传统方法缺乏区间预测的覆盖保证。保形预测（CP）是一种无分布的机器学习方法，擅长为区间预测提供严格的覆盖保证。然而，由于缺乏对过程变化的了解，标准 CP 预测器可能会失败。我们通过在存在过程变化的情况下以高数据效率提供有原则的共形区间预测来应对这一挑战，其中来自一些附加芯片的数据用于校准。我们在工业 16nm 芯片数据上证明了所提出方法的优越性。

papers.title: Deep Harmonic Finesse: Signal Separation in Wearable Systems with Limited Data.
papers.abstract: We present a method, referred to as Deep Harmonic Finesse (DHF), for separation of non-stationary quasi-periodic signals when limited data is available. The problem frequently arises in wearable systems in which, a combination of quasi-periodic physiological phenomena give rise to the sensed signal, and excessive data collection is prohibitive. Our approach utilizes prior knowledge of time-frequency patterns in the signals to mask and in-paint spectrograms. This is achieved through an application-inspired deep harmonic neural network coupled with an integrated pattern alignment component. The network's structure embeds the implicit harmonic priors within the time-frequency domain, while the pattern-alignment method transforms the sensed signal, ensuring a strong alignment with the network. The effectiveness of the algorithm is demonstrated in the context of non-invasive fetal monitoring using both synthesized and in vivo data. When applied to the synthesized data, our method exhibits significant improvements in signal-to-distortion ratio (26% on average) and mean squared error (80% on average), compared to the best competing method. When applied to in vivo data captured in pregnant animal studies, our method improves the correlation error between estimated fetal blood oxygen saturation and the ground truth by 80.5% compared to the state of the art.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为深度谐波精细 (DHF) 的方法，用于在可用数据有限时分离非平稳准周期信号。这个问题经常出现在可穿戴系统中，其中准周期性生理现象的组合会产生感测信号，并且过多的数据收集是令人望而却步的。我们的方法利用信号中时频模式的先验知识来屏蔽和修复频谱图。这是通过应用启发的深度谐波神经网络与集成模式对齐组件相结合来实现的。该网络的结构将隐式谐波先验嵌入到时频域内，而模式对齐方法则对感测到的信号进行变换，确保与网络的强对齐。该算法的有效性在使用合成数据和体内数据的无创胎儿监测中得到了证明。当应用于合成数据时，与最佳竞争方法相比，我们的方法在信号失真比（平均 26%）和均方误差（平均 80%）方面表现出显着改进。当应用于怀孕动物研究中捕获的体内数据时，与现有技术相比，我们的方法将估计的胎儿血氧饱和度与真实值之间的相关误差提高了 80.5%。

papers.title: Deep Reorganization: Retaining Residuals in TinyML.
papers.abstract: Designing intelligent, tiny devices with limited memory is immensely challenging, exacerbated by the additional memory requirement of residual connections in deep neural networks. In contrast to existing approaches that eliminate residuals to reduce peak memory usage at the cost of significant accuracy degradation, this paper presents DERO, which reorganizes residual connections by leveraging insights into the types and interdependencies of operations across residual connections. Evaluations were conducted across diverse model architectures designed for common computer vision applications. DERO consistently achieves peak memory usage comparable to plain-style models without residuals, while closely matching the accuracy of the original models with residuals.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计内存有限的智能微型设备极具挑战性，而深度神经网络中剩余连接的额外内存要求更是雪上加霜。与现有的以显着降低精度为代价消除残差以减少峰值内存使用的方法相比，本文提出了 DERO，它通过利用对残差连接之间操作的类型和相互依赖性的洞察来重新组织残差连接。对为常见计算机视觉应用设计的不同模型架构进行了评估。 DERO 始终达到与没有残差的普通模型相当的峰值内存使用量，同时与带有残差的原始模型的准确性紧密匹配。

papers.title: DeepRIoT: Continuous Integration and Deployment of Robotic-IoT Applications.
papers.abstract: We present DeepRIoT, a continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) based architecture that accelerates the learning and deployment of a Robotic-IoT system trained from deep reinforcement learning (RL). We adopted a multi-stage approach that agilely trains a multi-objective RL controller in the simulator. We then collected traces from the real robot to optimize its plant model, and used transfer learning to adapt the controller to the updated model. We automated our framework through CI/CD pipelines, and finally, with low cost, succeeded in deploying our controller in a real F1tenth car that is able to reach the goal and avoid collision from a virtual car through mixed reality.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 DeepRIoT，这是一种基于持续集成和持续部署 (CI/CD) 的架构，可加速通过深度强化学习 (RL) 训练的机器人物联网系统的学习和部署。我们采用了多阶段方法，可以在模拟器中灵活地训练多目标 RL 控制器。然后，我们从真实机器人收集痕迹来优化其工厂模型，并使用迁移学习使控制器适应更新的模型。我们通过 CI/CD 管道自动化了我们的框架，最终以低成本成功地将我们的控制器部署在一辆真正的 F1tenth 汽车上，该汽车能够通过混合现实达到目标并避免虚拟汽车的碰撞。

papers.title: DEFA: Efficient Deformable Attention Acceleration via Pruning-Assisted Grid-Sampling and Multi-Scale Parallel Processing.
papers.abstract: Multi-scale deformable attention (MSDeformAttn) has emerged as a key mechanism in various vision tasks, demonstrating explicit superiority attributed to multi-scale grid-sampling. However, this newly introduced operator incurs irregular data access and enormous memory requirement, leading to severe PE under-utilization. Meanwhile, existing approaches for attention acceleration cannot be directly applied to MSDeformAttn due to lack of support for this distinct procedure. Therefore, we propose a dedicated algorithm-architecture co-design dubbed DEFA, the first-of-its-kind method for MSDeformAttn acceleration. At the algorithm level, DEFA adopts frequency-weighted pruning and probability-aware pruning for feature maps and sampling points respectively, alleviating the memory footprint by over 80%. At the architecture level, it explores the multi-scale parallelism to boost the throughput significantly and further reduces the memory access via fine-grained layer fusion and feature map reusing. Extensively evaluated on representative benchmarks, DEFA achieves 10.1-31.9X speedup and 20.3-37.7X energy efficiency boost compared to powerful GPU platforms. It also rivals the related accelerators by 2.2-3.7X energy efficiency improvement while providing pioneering support of MSDeformAttn.
papers.abstract_zh: 多尺度可变形注意力（MSDeformAttn）已成为各种视觉任务中的关键机制，证明了多尺度网格采样的明显优越性。然而，这个新引入的算子会带来不规则的数据访问和巨大的内存需求，导致严重的PE利用率不足。同时，由于缺乏对这种独特过程的支持，现有的注意力加速方法不能直接应用于 MSDeformAttn。因此，我们提出了一种名为 DEFA 的专用算法架构协同设计，这是第一种 MSDeformAttn 加速方法。在算法层面，DEFA对特征图和采样点分别采用频率加权剪枝和概率感知剪枝，内存占用减少80%以上。在架构层面，它探索了多尺度并行性，以显着提高吞吐量，并通过细粒度层融合和特征图重用进一步减少内存访问。经过对代表性基准的广泛评估，与强大的 GPU 平台相比，DEFA 实现了 10.1-31.9 倍的加速和 20.3-37.7 倍的能效提升。它还可与相关加速器相媲美，能效提高 2.2-3.7 倍，同时提供 MSDeformAttn 的开创性支持。

papers.title: Defending against Adversarial Patches using Dimensionality Reduction.
papers.abstract: Adversarial patch-based attacks have shown to be a major deterrent towards the reliable use of machine learning models. These attacks involve the strategic modification of localized patches or specific image areas to deceive trained machine learning models. In this paper, we propose DefensiveDR , a practical mechanism using a dimensionality reduction technique to thwart such patch-based attacks. Our method involves projecting the sample images onto a lower-dimensional space while retaining essential information or variability for effective machine learning tasks. We perform this using two techniques, Singular Value Decomposition and t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding. We experimentally tune the variability to be preserved for optimal performance as a hyper-parameter. This dimension reduction substantially mitigates adversarial perturbations, thereby enhancing the robustness of the given machine learning model. Our defense is model-agnostic and operates without assumptions about access to model decisions or model architectures, making it effective in both black-box and white-box settings. Furthermore, it maintains accuracy across various models and remains robust against several unseen patch-based attacks. The proposed defensive approach improves the accuracy from 38.8% (without defense) to 66.2% (with defense) when performing LaVAN and GoogleAp attacks, which supersedes that of the prominent state-of-the-art like LGS [19] (53.86%) and Jujutsu [7] (60%).
papers.abstract_zh: 基于补丁的对抗性攻击已被证明是机器学习模型可靠使用的主要威慑因素。这些攻击涉及对局部补丁或特定图像区域进行策略性修改，以欺骗训练有素的机器学习模型。在本文中，我们提出了 DefectiveDR，这是一种使用降维技术来阻止此类基于补丁的攻击的实用机制。我们的方法涉及将样本图像投影到较低维度的空间，同时保留有效机器学习任务的基本信息或可变性。我们使用奇异值分解和 t 分布随机邻域嵌入两种技术来执行此操作。我们通过实验调整要保留的可变性，以作为超参数获得最佳性能。这种降维大大减轻了对抗性扰动，从而增强了给定机器学习模型的鲁棒性。我们的防御与模型无关，并且在不假设访问模型决策或模型架构的情况下运行，使其在黑盒和白盒设置中都有效。此外，它可以保持各种模型的准确性，并针对几种看不见的基于补丁的攻击保持稳健。在执行 LaVAN 和 GoogleAp 攻击时，所提出的防御方法将准确率从 38.8%（无防御）提高到 66.2%（有防御），取代了 LGS [19] (53.86%) 和 Jujutsu [7] (60%) 等最先进的技术。

papers.title: Design of a Quantum Walk Circuit to Solve the Subset-Sum Problem.
papers.abstract: Search algorithms based on quantum walks have emerged as a promising approach to solve computational problems across various domains, including combinatorial optimization, and cryptography. Stating a generic search problem in terms of a (quantum) search over a graph makes the efficiency of the algorithmic method depend on the structure of the graph itself. In this work, we propose a complete implementation of a quantum walk search on Johnson graphs, speeding up the solution of the subset-sum problem. We provide a detailed design of each sub-circuit, quantifying their cost in terms of gate number, depth, and width. We compare our solution against a Grover quantum search, showing a reduction of the T-count and T-depth for practically solvable problems. The proposed design provides a building block for the construction of efficient quantum search algorithms that can be modelled on Johnson graphs, filling the gap with the existing theoretical complexity analyses.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于量子行走的搜索算法已成为解决各个领域（包括组合优化和密码学）计算问题的一种有前景的方法。用图上的（量子）搜索来表述通用搜索问题使得算法方法的效率取决于图本身的结构。在这项工作中，我们提出了约翰逊图上量子行走搜索的完整实现，加速了子集和问题的解决。我们提供每个子电路的详细设计，根据门数、深度和宽度量化其成本。我们将我们的解决方案与 Grover 量子搜索进行比较，显示了实际可解决问题的 T 计数和 T 深度的减少。所提出的设计为构建有效的量子搜索算法提供了一个构建块，该算法可以在约翰逊图上建模，填补了现有理论复杂性分析的空白。

papers.title: DGR: Differentiable Global Router.
papers.abstract: Modern VLSI design flows necessitate fast and high-quality global routers. In this paper, we introduce DGR, a differentiable global router capable of concurrent optimization for hundreds of thousands of nets 1 . Our innovation lies in the development of a routing Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) forest to represent the 2D pattern routing space for all nets, enabling coordinated selection of Steiner trees and 2-pin routing paths from a global perspective. For efficient search within the DAG forest, we relax the discrete search space to be continuous and develop a differentiable solver accelerated by deep learning toolkits on GPUs. Experimental results demonstrate that DGR substantially mitigates routing overflow while concurrently reducing total wirelengths from 0.95% to 4.08% and via numbers from 1.28% to 2.54% in congested testcases compared to state-of-the-art academic global routers. Additionally, DGR exhibits favorable scalability in both runtime and memory with respect to the number of nets.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 VLSI 设计流程需要快速且高质量的全局路由器。在本文中，我们介绍了 DGR，一种可微分全局路由器，能够对数十万个网络进行并发优化 1 。我们的创新在于开发路由有向无环图 (DAG) 森林来表示所有网络的 2D 模式路由空间，从而能够从全局角度协调选择 Steiner 树和 2 引脚路由路径。为了在 DAG 森林中进行高效搜索，我们将离散搜索空间放宽为连续，并开发了由 GPU 上的深度学习工具包加速的可微分求解器。实验结果表明，与最先进的学术全局路由器相比，DGR 大大减轻了路由溢出，同时将拥塞测试用例中的总线长从 0.95% 减少到 4.08%，通过数量从 1.28% 减少到 2.54%。此外，DGR 在运行时间和内存方面以及网络数量方面都表现出了良好的可扩展性。

papers.title: DH-TRNG: A Dynamic Hybrid TRNG with Ultra-High Throughput and Area-Energy Efficiency.
papers.abstract: As a vital security primitive, the true random number generator (TRNG) is a mandatory component to build roots of trust for any encryption system. However, existing TRNGs suffer from bottlenecks of low throughput and high area-energy consumption. In this work, we propose DH-TRNG, a dynamic hybrid TRNG circuitry architecture with ultra-high throughput and area-energy efficiency. Our DH-TRNG exhibits portability to distinct process FPGAs and passes both NIST and AIS-31 tests without any post-processing. The experiments show it incurs only 8 slices with the highest throughput of 670Mbps and 620Mbps on Xilinx Virtex-6 and Artix-7, respectively. Compared to the state-of-the-art TRNGs, our proposed design has the highest Throughput/Slices Power with 2.63× increase.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为重要的安全原语，真随机数生成器 (TRNG) 是为任何加密系统构建信任根的必备组件。然而，现有的TRNG存在吞吐量低和面积能耗高的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DH-TRNG，一种具有超高吞吐量和面积能效的动态混合 TRNG 电路架构。我们的 DH-TRNG 表现出对不同工艺 FPGA 的可移植性，并且无需任何后处理即可通过 NIST 和 AIS-31 测试。实验表明，它只需要 8 个片，在 Xilinx Virtex-6 和 Artix-7 上的最高吞吐量分别为 670Mbps 和 620Mbps。与最先进的 TRNG 相比，我们提出的设计具有最高的吞吐量/切片功率，增加了 2.63 倍。

papers.title: Digital CIM with Noisy SRAM Bit: A Compact Clustered Annealer for Large-Scale Combinatorial Optimization.
papers.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems (COP) are NP-hard and intractable to solve using conventional computing. The Ising model-based annealer has gained increasing attention recently due to its efficiency and speed in finding approximate solutions. However, Ising solvers for travelling salesman problems (TSP) usually suffer from a scalability issue due to quadratically increasing number of spins. In this paper, we propose a digital computing-in-memory (CIM) based clustered annealer to solve tens of thousands of city-scale TSP with only a few mega-byte (MB) of static random access memory (SRAM), using hierarchical clustering to solve input sparsity and digital CIM flexibility to solve weight sparsity. The intrinsic process variations between SRAM devices are utilized to generate the noisy bit errors during pseudo-read under reduced supply voltage, realizing the annealing process. The design space of cluster size and programmability is explored to understand the trade-offs of solution quality and hardware cost, for TSP scale ranging from 3080 to 85900 cities. The proposed design speeds up the convergence by >10 9 × with <25% solution quality overhead compared with the CPU baseline. The comparison with state-of-the-art scalable annealers shows a >10 13 × improvement on functionally normalized area and power.
papers.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题 (COP) 是 NP 难题，很难使用传统计算来解决。基于 Ising 模型的退火器由于其寻找近似解的效率和速度最近受到越来越多的关注。然而，旅行商问题 (TSP) 的 Ising 求解器通常会因旋转次数呈二次方增加而遇到可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于内存数字计算（CIM）的集群退火器，只需几兆字节（MB）的静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）即可解决数万个城市规模的TSP，使用层次集群来解决输入稀疏性，并使用数字CIM灵活性来解决权重稀疏性。利用SRAM器件之间固有的工艺差异，在降低的电源电压下进行伪读取期间产生噪声位错误，从而实现退火过程。探索集群规模和可编程性的设计空间，以了解解决方案质量和硬件成本的权衡，TSP 规模范围为 3080 到 85900 个城市。与 CPU 基线相比，所提出的设计将收敛速度提高了 >10 9 ×，且解决方案质量开销<25%。与最先进的可扩展退火炉的比较表明，功能归一化面积和功率有 >10 13 倍的改进。

papers.title: Disentangle, Align and Generalize: Learning A Timing Predictor from Different Technology Nodes.
papers.abstract: In VLSI design, accurate pre-routing timing prediction is paramount. Traditional machine learning-based methods require extensive data, posing challenges for advanced technology nodes due to the time-consuming data preparation. To mitigate this issue, we propose a novel transfer learning framework that uses data from previous nodes for learning on the target node. Our method initially disentangles and aligns timing path features across different nodes, then predicts each path's arrival time employing a Bayesian-based model capable of handling highly variable arrival time and generalizing to new designs. Experimental results on transfer learning from 130 nm to 7 nm nodes validate our method's effectiveness.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 VLSI 设计中，准确的预布线时序预测至关重要。传统的基于机器学习的方法需要大量数据，由于数据准备耗时，给先进技术节点带来了挑战。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，该框架使用先前节点的数据在目标节点上进行学习。我们的方法首先解开并对齐不同节点之间的时序路径特征，然后使用基于贝叶斯的模型来预测每条路径的到达时间，该模型能够处理高度可变的到达时间并推广到新设计。从 130 nm 到 7 nm 节点的迁移学习的实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。

papers.title: DL2Fence: Integrating Deep Learning and Frame Fusion for Enhanced Detection and Localization of Refined Denial-of-Service in Large-Scale NoCs.
papers.abstract: page for arXiv paper 2403.13563: DL2Fence: Integrating Deep Learning and Frame Fusion for Enhanced Detection and Localization of Refined Denial-of-Service in Large-Scale NoCs
papers.abstract_zh: arXiv 论文 2403.13563 的页面：DL2Fence：集成深度学习和帧融合以增强大规模 NoC 中精细拒绝服务的检测和定位

papers.title: DNN-Defender: A Victim-Focused In-DRAM Defense Mechanism for Taming Adversarial Weight Attack on DNNs.
papers.abstract: With deep learning deployed in many security-sensitive areas, machine learning security is becoming progressively important. Recent studies demonstrate attackers can exploit system-level techniques exploiting the RowHammer vulnerability of DRAM to deterministically and precisely flip bits in Deep Neural Networks (DNN) model weights to affect inference accuracy. The existing defense mechanisms are software-based, such as weight reconstruction requiring expensive training overhead or performance degradation. On the other hand, generic hardware-based victim-/aggressor-focused mechanisms impose expensive hardware overheads and preserve the spatial connection between victim and aggressor rows. In this paper, we present the first DRAM-based victim-focused defense mechanism tailored for quantized DNNs, named DNN-Defender that leverages the potential of in-DRAM swapping to withstand the targeted bit-flip attacks with a priority protection mechanism. Our results indicate that DNN-Defender can deliver a high level of protection downgrading the performance of targeted RowHammer attacks to a random attack level. In addition, the proposed defense has no accuracy drop on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets without requiring any software training or incurring hardware overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在许多安全敏感领域的部署，机器学习安全性变得越来越重要。最近的研究表明，攻击者可以利用系统级技术，利用 DRAM 的 RowHammer 漏洞来确定性地、精确地翻转深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型权重中的位，从而影响推理准确性。现有的防御机制是基于软件的，例如权重重建需要昂贵的训练开销或性能下降。另一方面，基于通用硬件的以受害者/攻击者为中心的机制会带来昂贵的硬件开销，并保留受害者和攻击者行之间的空间连接。在本文中，我们提出了第一个针对量化 DNN 量身定制的基于 DRAM 的以受害者为中心的防御机制，名为 DNN-Defender，它利用 DRAM 内交换的潜力，通过优先级保护机制来抵御有针对性的位翻转攻击。我们的结果表明，DNN-Defender 可以提供高水平的保护，将目标 RowHammer 攻击的性能降低到随机攻击级别。此外，所提出的防御方法在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的准确性没有下降，不需要任何软件训练或产生硬件开销。

papers.title: Double-Win NAS: Towards Deep-to-Shallow Transformable Neural Architecture Search for Intelligent Embedded Systems.
papers.abstract: Thanks to the evolving network depth, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved impressive performance across various intelligent embedded scenarios towards embedded intelligence. Nonetheless, this trend also leads to degraded hardware efficiency as the network evolves deeper and deeper. In contrast, shallow networks exhibit superior hardware efficiency, which, unfortunately, suffer from inferior accuracy. To tackle this dilemma, we establish the first deep-to-shallow transformable neural architecture search (NAS) paradigm, namely Double-Win NAS (DW-NAS), which is dedicated to automatically exploring deep-to-shallow transformable networks to marry the best of both worlds. Extensive experiments on two NVIDIA Jetson intelligent embedded systems clearly show the superiority of DW-NAS over previous state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于网络深度不断发展，卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种智能嵌入式场景中实现了令人印象深刻的性能，以实现嵌入式智能。 Nonetheless, this trend also leads to degraded hardware efficiency as the network evolves deeper and deeper. In contrast, shallow networks exhibit superior hardware efficiency, which, unfortunately, suffer from inferior accuracy.为了解决这个困境，我们建立了第一个从深到浅的可变换神经架构搜索（NAS）范式，即双赢NAS（DW-NAS），它致力于自动探索从深到浅的可变换网络，以结合两个世界的优点。在两个 NVIDIA Jetson 智能嵌入式系统上进行的大量实验清楚地表明了 DW-NAS 相对于之前最先进方法的优越性。

papers.title: Drift: Leveraging Distribution-based Dynamic Precision Quantization for Efficient Deep Neural Network Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Quantization is one of the most hardware-efficient ways to reduce inference costs for deep neural network (DNN) models. Nevertheless, with the continuous increase of DNN model sizes (240× in two years) and the emergence of large language models, existing static quantization methods fail to utilize the sparsity and redundancy of models sufficiently. Motivated by the pervasive dynamism in data tensors across DNN models, we propose a dynamic precision quantization algorithm to further reduce computational costs beyond statically quantized DNN models. Furthermore, we find that existing precision-flexible accelerators cannot support the DNN models with dynamic precision. To this end, we design a novel accelerator, Drift, and achieve online scheduling to efficiently support dynamic precision execution. We conduct experiments with various DNN models, including CNN-based and Transformer-based models. Evaluation results show that Drift achieves 2.85× speedup and 3.12× energy saving compared to existing precision-flexible accelerators with statically quantized models.
papers.abstract_zh: 量化是降低深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型推理成本的最硬件效率最高的方法之一。然而，随着DNN模型尺寸的不断增加（两年内240×）和大型语言模型的出现，现有的静态量化方法无法充分利用模型的稀疏性和冗余性。受 DNN 模型中数据张量普遍存在的动态性的推动，我们提出了一种动态精度量化算法，以进一步降低静态量化 DNN 模型之外的计算成本。此外，我们发现现有的精度灵活的加速器无法支持动态精度的 DNN 模型。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的加速器Drift，并实现在线调度，以高效支持动态精度执行。我们使用各种 DNN 模型进行实验，包括基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的模型。评估结果表明，与现有静态量化模型的精密柔性加速器相比，Drift 实现了 2.85 倍加速和 3.12 倍节能。

papers.title: Duet: A Collaborative User Driven Recommendation System for Edge Devices.
papers.abstract: Recommendation systems are the backbone for numerous user applications on edge devices. However, the compute and memory-intensive nature of recommendation models renders them unsuitable for edge devices. Nevertheless, by decoupling the model fraction related to user history (e.g., past visited pages, liked posts) and user attributes (such as age, gender), we can offload partial recommendation models onto local edge devices. Hence, we present Duet, a novel collaborative edge-cloud recommendation system that intelligently decomposes the recommendation model into two smaller models - user and item models - that execute simultaneously on the edge device and cloud before coming together to deliver final recommendations. Further, we propose a lightweight Duet architecture to support user models on resource-constrained edge devices. Duet reduces the average latency by 6.4X and improves energy efficiency by 4.6X across five recommendation models.
papers.abstract_zh: Recommendation systems are the backbone for numerous user applications on edge devices. However, the compute and memory-intensive nature of recommendation models renders them unsuitable for edge devices.尽管如此，通过解耦与用户历史记录（例如，过去访问过的页面、喜欢的帖子）和用户属性（例如年龄、性别）相关的模型部分，我们可以将部分推荐模型卸载到本地边缘设备上。因此，我们提出了 Duet，一种新颖的协作式边缘云推荐系统，该系统可以智能地将推荐模型分解为两个较小的模型（用户模型和项目模型），这两个模型在边缘设备和云上同时执行，然后一起提供最终推荐。 Further, we propose a lightweight Duet architecture to support user models on resource-constrained edge devices. Duet reduces the average latency by 6.4X and improves energy efficiency by 4.6X across five recommendation models.

papers.title: Dyn-Bitpool: A Two-sided Sparse CIM Accelerator Featuring a Balanced Workload Scheme and High CIM Macro Utilization.
papers.abstract:
Computing-in-memory (CIM), a promising computing paradigm, has demonstrated great energy-efficiency by integrating computing units into memory. However, previous research on CIM has rarely utilized sparsity in activation and weight concurrently. Moreover, new challenges arise when harnessing sparsity in both activation and weight (two-sided sparsity), such as unbalanced workload and low hardware substrate utilization.

To fully unleash the acceleration potential brought by two-sided sparsity, we implemented an accelerator called Dyn-Bitpool which innovates on two fronts: 1) a balanced working scheme called "pool first and cross lane sharing" to maximize the available performance benefiting from bit-level sparsity in activation; 2) dynamic topology of CIM arrays to effectively handle low CIM macro utilization issue stemming from value-level sparsity in weight. All the contributions collaborate to speed up Dyn-Bitpool by 1.89x and 2.64x on average on Googlenet, Mobilenetv3, Resnet50, ResNeXt101 and VGG19, compared with two state-of-the-art accelerators featuring CIM.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存计算 (CIM) 是一种很有前景的计算范式，通过将计算单元集成到内存中，展示了巨大的能源效率。然而，之前关于 CIM 的研究很少同时利用激活和权重的稀疏性。此外，利用激活和权重的稀疏性（两侧稀疏性）时会出现新的挑战，例如工作负载不平衡和硬件基板利用率低。

为了充分释放两侧稀疏性带来的加速潜力，我们实现了一款名为 Dyn-Bitpool 的加速器，它在两个方面进行了创新：1）称为“池优先和跨车道共享”的平衡工作方案，以最大限度地提高激活中位级稀疏性的可用性能； 2) CIM 阵列的动态拓扑，可有效处理因值级权重稀疏而导致的 CIM 宏利用率低的问题。与采用 CIM 的两个最先进的加速器相比，所有贡献共同将 Dyn-Bitpool 在 Googlenet、Mobilenetv3、Resnet50、ResNeXt101 和 VGG19 上的平均速度提高了 1.89 倍和 2.64 倍。

papers.title: DySpMM: From Fix to Dynamic for Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is one of the key operators in many fields, showing dynamic features in terms of sparsity, element distribution, and data dependency. Previous studies have proposed FPGA-based SpMM accelerators with fixed configurations of on-chip dataflow, leaving three major challenges unsolved: 1) Partitioning matrices with the fixed sub-matrix size to fit limited on-chip buffer on FPGA leads to performance loss because the optimal sub-matrix size to minimize memory access varies with dynamic sparsity. 2) The fixed row-wise allocation scheme of sparse elements in streaming architecture leads to unbalanced workloads because of dynamic element distribution across sparse matrix rows. 3) Read-after-write (RAW) hazard caused by floating-point adder makes the elements in one row cannot be processed consecutively. Architectures with fixed execution order rely on time-consuming pre-processing to deal with dynamic data dependency. Motivated by the observation that fixed configurations lead to performance loss, we propose DySpMM by introducing the dynamic design methodology to SpMM architectures. The configurable data distributor is introduced to enable dynamic sub-matrix size , achieving up to 3.79× less memory access amount. The element-wise allocator is designed for dynamic workload balance , improving utilization up to 3.74×. The interleaved reorder unit is proposed to reorder the elements and dynamically avoid RAW hazards at runtime, avoiding time-consuming pre-processing. We implement DySpMM on U280 FPGA, and the evaluation shows that it achieves 1.42× geomean throughput compared with the state-of-the-art accelerator Sextans and 1.78× energy efficiency compared with V100S GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是许多领域的关键算子之一，在稀疏性、元素分布和数据依赖性方面表现出动态特征。先前的研究提出了基于 FPGA 的 SpMM 加速器，具有固定的片上数据流配置，但仍存在三个未解决的主要挑战：1）使用固定子矩阵大小的分区矩阵以适应 FPGA 上有限的片上缓冲区会导致性能损失，因为最小化内存访问的最佳子矩阵大小随动态稀疏性而变化。 2）流式架构中稀疏元素的固定行分配方案会由于稀疏矩阵行之间的动态元素分布而导致工作负载不平衡。 3) 浮点加法器引起的读后写(RAW)危险使得一行中的元素无法连续处理。具有固定执行顺序的架构依赖于耗时的预处理来处理动态数据依赖性。由于观察到固定配置会导致性能损失，我们通过将动态设计方法引入 SpMM 架构来提出 DySpMM。引入可配置数据分配器以实现动态子矩阵大小，从而实现高达 3.79 倍的内存访问量减少。逐元素分配器专为动态工作负载平衡而设计，可将利用率提高高达 3.74 倍。提出了交错重新排序单元来重新排序元素并在运行时动态避免 RAW 危险，从而避免耗时的预处理。我们在 U280 FPGA 上实现了 DySpMM，评估表明，与最先进的加速器 Sextans 相比，它实现了 1.42 倍的几何平均吞吐量，与 V100S GPU 相比，它实现了 1.78 倍的能效。

papers.title: E-Syn: E-Graph Rewriting with Technology-Aware Cost Functions for Logic Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Logic synthesis plays a crucial role in the digital design flow. It has a decisive influence on the final Quality of Results (QoR) of the circuit implementations. However, existing multi-level logic optimization algorithms often employ greedy approaches with a series of local optimization steps. Each step breaks the circuit into small pieces (e.g.,k-feasible cuts) and applies incremental changes to individual pieces separately. These local optimization steps could limit the exploration space and may miss opportunities for significant improvements. To address the limitation, this paper proposes using e-graph in logic synthesis. The new workflow, named E-Syn, makes use of the well-established e-graph infrastructure to efficiently perform logic rewriting. It explores a diverse set of equivalent Boolean representations while allowing technology-aware cost functions to better support delay-oriented and area-oriented logic synthesis. Experiments over a wide range of benchmark designs show our proposed logic optimization approach reaches a wider design space compared to the commonly used AIG-based logic synthesis flow. It achieves on average 15.29% delay saving in delay-oriented synthesis and 6.42% area saving for area-oriented synthesis.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑综合在数字设计流程中起着至关重要的作用。它对电路实现的最终结果质量（QoR）具有决定性影响。然而，现有的多级逻辑优化算法通常采用具有一系列局部优化步骤的贪婪方法。每个步骤将电路分成小块（例如，k-可行切割），并分别对各个块应用增量更改。这些局部优化步骤可能会限制探索空间，并可能错过重大改进的机会。为了解决这个限制，本文提出在逻辑综合中使用电子图。新的工作流程名为 E-Syn，利用完善的电子图基础设施来高效地执行逻辑重写。它探索了一组不同的等效布尔表示，同时允许技术感知的成本函数更好地支持面向延迟和面向区域的逻辑综合。各种基准设计的实验表明，与常用的基于 AIG 的逻辑综合流程相比，我们提出的逻辑优化方法达到了更广泛的设计空间。它在面向延迟的合成中平均节省了 15.29% 的延迟，在面向区域的合成中平均节省了 6.42% 的面积。

papers.title: EasyACIM: An End-to-End Automated Analog CIM with Synthesizable Architecture and Agile Design Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: Analog Computing-in-Memory (ACIM) is an emerging architecture to perform efficient AI edge computing. However, current ACIM designs usually have unscalable topology and still heavily rely on manual efforts. These drawbacks limit the ACIM application scenarios and lead to an un-desired time-to-market. This work proposes an end-to-end automated ACIM based on a synthesizable architecture (EasyACIM). With a given array size and customized cell library, EasyACIM can generate layouts for ACIMs with various design specifications end-to-end automatically. Leveraging the multi-objective genetic algorithm (MOGA)-based design space explorer, EasyACIM can obtain high-quality ACIM solutions based on the proposed synthesizable architecture, targeting versatile application scenarios. The ACIM solutions given by EasyACIM have a wide design space and competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) ACIMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存模拟计算 (ACIM) 是一种执行高效 AI 边缘计算的新兴架构。然而，当前的 ACIM 设计通常具有不可扩展的拓扑结构，并且仍然严重依赖手动工作。这些缺点限制了 ACIM 的应用场景并导致不理想的上市时间。这项工作提出了一种基于可综合架构（EasyACIM）的端到端自动化 ACIM。通过给定的阵列尺寸和定制的单元库，EasyACIM 可以自动生成具有各种端到端设计规范的 ACIM 布局。利用基于多目标遗传算法（MOGA）的设计空间浏览器，EasyACIM 可以获得基于所提出的可综合架构的高质量 ACIM 解决方案，针对多种应用场景。与最先进的（SOTA）ACIM 相比，EasyACIM 提供的 ACIM 解决方案具有广阔的设计空间和具有竞争力的性能。

papers.title: EDGE-LLM: Enabling Efficient Large Language Model Adaptation on Edge Devices via Unified Compression and Adaptive Layer Voting.
papers.abstract: Efficient adaption of large language models (LLMs) on edge devices is essential for applications requiring continuous and privacy-preserving adaptation and inference. However, existing tuning techniques fall short because of the high computation and memory overhead. To this end, we introduce a computation- and memory-efficient LLM tuning framework, called Edge-LLM, to facilitate affordable and effective LLM adaptation on edge devices. Specifically, Edge-LLM features three core components: (1) a layer-wise unified compression (LUC) technique to reduce the computation overhead by generating layer-wise pruning sparsity and quantization bit-width policies, (2) an adaptive layer tuning and voting scheme to reduce the memory overhead by reducing the backpropagation depth, and (3) a complementary hardware scheduling strategy to handle the irregular computation patterns introduced by LUC and adaptive layer tuning, thereby achieving improved real hardware efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Edge-LLM achieves on-device adaptation with comparable task accuracy as vanilla tuning methods with a 2.92× speed up and a 4× reduction in memory overhead. Our code is available at https://github.com/GATECH-EIC/Edge-LLM
papers.abstract_zh: 对于需要连续且保护隐私的适应和推理的应用程序来说，边缘设备上大语言模型 (LLM) 的高效适应至关重要。然而，由于计算和内存开销较高，现有的调优技术存在不足。为此，我们引入了一种计算和内存高效的 LLM 调优框架，称为 Edge-LLM，以促进边缘设备上经济且有效的 LLM 适应。具体来说，Edge-LLM具有三个核心组件：（1）分层统一压缩（LUC）技术，通过生成分层修剪稀疏性和量化位宽策略来减少计算开销；（2）自适应层调整和投票方案，通过减少反向传播深度来减少内存开销；（3）补充硬件调度策略，处理LUC和自适应层调整引入的不规则计算模式，从而提高实际硬件效率。大量实验表明，Edge-LLM 实现了设备上自适应，其任务精度与普通调整方法相当，速度提高了 2.92 倍，内存开销降低了 4 倍。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/GATECH-EIC/Edge-LLM

papers.title: EdGeo: A Physics-guided Generative AI Toolkit for Geophysical Monitoring on Edge Devices.
papers.abstract: Full-waveform inversion (FWI) plays a vital role in geoscience to explore the subsurface. It utilizes the seismic wave to image the subsurface velocity map. As the machine learning (ML) technique evolves, the data-driven approaches using ML for FWI tasks have emerged, offering enhanced accuracy and reduced computational cost compared to traditional physics-based methods. However, a common challenge in geoscience --- the unprivileged data --- severely limits ML effectiveness. The issue becomes even worse during model pruning, a step essential in geoscience due to environmental complexities. To tackle this, we introduce the EdGeo toolkit, which employs a diffusion-based model guided by physics principles to generate high-fidelity velocity maps. The toolkit uses the acoustic wave equation to generate corresponding seismic waveform data, facilitating the fine-tuning of pruned ML models. Our results demonstrate significant improvements in SSIM scores and reduction in both MAE and MSE across various pruning ratios. Notably, the ML model fine-tuned using data generated by EdGeo yields superior quality of velocity maps, especially in representing unprivileged features, outperforming other existing methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 全波形反演（FWI）在地球科学探索地下方面发挥着至关重要的作用。它利用地震波对地下速度图进行成像。随着机器学习 (ML) 技术的发展，使用 ML 执行 FWI 任务的数据驱动方法已经出现，与传统的基于物理的方法相比，它提供了更高的准确性并降低了计算成本。然而，地球科学中的一个常见挑战——非特权数据——严重限制了机器学习的有效性。由于环境的复杂性，模型修剪是地球科学中必不可少的一步，在模型修剪过程中，这个问题变得更加严重。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 EdGeo 工具包，它采用物理原理指导的基于扩散的模型来生成高保真速度图。该工具包使用声波方程生成相应的地震波形数据，有助于对剪枝后的机器学习模型进行微调。我们的结果表明，在不同的剪枝率下，SSIM 分数显着提高，MAE 和 MSE 均降低。值得注意的是，使用 EdGeo 生成的数据进行微调的 ML 模型产生了卓越的速度图质量，特别是在表示非特权特征方面，优于其他现有方法。

papers.title: Effective Quantum Resource Optimization via Circuit Resizing in BQSKit.
papers.abstract: In the noisy intermediate-scale quantum era, mid-circuit measurement and reset operations facilitate novel circuit optimization strategies by reducing a circuit's qubit count in a method called resizing. This paper introduces two such algorithms. The first one leverages gate-dependency rules to reduce qubit count by 61.6% or 45.3% when optimizing depth as well. Based on numerical instantiation and synthesis, the second algorithm finds resizing opportunities in previously unresizable circuits via dependency rules and other state-of-the-art tools. This resizing algorithm, implemented in BQSKit, reduces qubit count by 20.7% on average for these previously impossible-to-resize circuits.
papers.abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的中规模量子时代，中间电路测量和重置操作通过一种称为调整大小的方法减少电路的量子位计数，从而促进新颖的电路优化策略。本文介绍了两种这样的算法。第一个在优化深度时也利用门依赖规则将量子位数量减少 61.6% 或 45.3%。基于数值实例化和综合，第二种算法通过依赖规则和其他最先进的工具在以前不可调整的电路中找到调整大小的机会。这种在 BQSKit 中实现的大小调整算法将这些以前无法调整大小的电路的量子位数量平均减少了 20.7%。

papers.title: Effectively Sanitizing Embedded Operating Systems.
papers.abstract:
Embedded operating systems, considering their widespread use in security-critical applications, are not effectively tested with sanitizers to effectively root out bugs. Sanitizers provide a means to detect bugs that are not visible directly through exceptional or erroneous behaviors, thus uncovering more potent bugs during testing.

In this paper, we propose EmbSan, an embedded systems sanitizer for a diverse range of embedded operating system firmware through the use of dynamic instrumentation of sanitizer facilities and de-coupled on-host runtime libraries. This allows us to perform sanitation for multiple embedded OSs during fuzzing, such as many Embedded Linux-based firmware, various FreeRTOS firmware, and detect actual bugs within them. We evaluated EmbSan's effective-ness on firmware images based on Embedded Linux, FreeRTOS, LiteOS, and VxWorks. Our results show that EmbSan can detect the same criteria of actual bugs found in the Embedded Linux kernel as reference implementations of KASAN, and exhibits a slowdown of 2.2× to 3.2× and 5.2× to 5.7× for KASAN and KCSAN, respectively, which is on par with established kernel sanitizers. EmbSan and embedded OS fuzzers also found a total of 41 new bugs in Embedded Linux, FreeRTOS, LiteOS and VxWorks.
papers.abstract_zh:
考虑到嵌入式操作系统在安全关键型应用中的广泛使用，它们没有经过消毒剂的有效测试来有效地根除错误。消毒剂提供了一种通过异常或错误行为检测不直接可见的错误的方法，从而在测试过程中发现更有效的错误。

在本文中，我们提出了 EmbSan，这是一种嵌入式系统清理程序，通过使用清理程序设施的动态检测和解耦的主机运行时库，用于各种嵌入式操作系统固件。这使我们能够在模糊测试期间对多个嵌入式操作系统（例如许多基于嵌入式 Linux 的固件、各种 FreeRTOS 固件）进行清理，并检测其中的实际错误。我们评估了 EmbSan 对基于嵌入式 Linux、FreeRTOS、LiteOS 和 VxWorks 的固件映像的有效性。我们的结果表明，EmbSan 可以检测嵌入式 Linux 内核中发现的实际错误的标准与 KASAN 的参考实现相同，并且 KASAN 和 KCSAN 的速度分别降低 2.2 倍至 3.2 倍和 5.2 倍至 5.7 倍，这与现有的内核清理程序相当。 EmbSan 和嵌入式操作系统模糊器还在嵌入式 Linux、FreeRTOS、LiteOS 和 VxWorks 中总共发现了 41 个新错误。

papers.title: Efficient Approximate Decomposition Solver using Ising Model.
papers.abstract: Computing with memory is an energy-efficient computing approach. It pre-computes a function and stores its values in a lookup table (LUT), which can be retrieved at runtime. Approximate Boolean decomposition reduces the LUT size for implementing complex functions, but it takes a long time to find a decomposition with a minimal error. In this work, to address this issue, we propose an efficient Ising model-based approximate Boolean decomposition solver. First, a new column-based approximate disjoint decomposition method is proposed to fit the Ising model. Then, it is adapted to the Ising model-based optimization solver. Moreover, two improvement techniques are developed for an efficient search of the approximate disjoint decomposition when using simulated bifurcation to solve the Ising model. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art work, our approach achieves a 11% smaller mean error distance with an average 1.16× speedup when approximately decomposing 16-input Boolean functions.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用内存计算是一种节能的计算方法。它预先计算一个函数并将其值存储在查找表 (LUT) 中，可以在运行时检索该表。近似布尔分解减少了实现复杂功能的 LUT 大小，但需要很长时间才能找到误差最小的分解。在这项工作中，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高效的基于 Ising 模型的近似布尔分解求解器。首先，提出了一种新的基于列的近似不相交分解方法来拟合Ising模型。然后，将其适应基于Ising模型的优化求解器。此外，还开发了两种改进技术，用于在使用模拟分岔求解伊辛模型时有效搜索近似不相交分解。实验结果表明，与最先进的工作相比，我们的方法在近似分解 16 输入布尔函数时，平均误差距离减小了 11%，平均加速提高了 1.16 倍。

papers.title: Efficient Bilevel Source Mask Optimization.
papers.abstract: Resolution Enhancement Techniques (RETs) are critical to meet the demands of advanced technology nodes. Among RETs, Source Mask Optimization (SMO) is pivotal, concurrently optimizing both the source and the mask to expand the process window. Traditional SMO methods, however, are limited by sequential and alternating optimizations, leading to extended runtimes without performance guarantees. This paper introduces a unified SMO framework utilizing the accelerated Abbe forward imaging to enhance precision and efficiency. Further, we propose the innovative BiSMO framework, which reformulates SMO through a bilevel optimization approach, and present three gradient-based methods to tackle the challenges of bilevel SMO. Our experimental results demonstrate that BiSMO achieves a remarkable 40% reduction in error metrics and 8× increase in runtime efficiency, signifying a major leap forward in SMO.
papers.abstract_zh: 分辨率增强技术 (RET) 对于满足先进技术节点的需求至关重要。在 RET 中，源掩模优化 (SMO) 至关重要，它同时优化源和掩模以扩展工艺窗口。然而，传统的 SMO 方法受到顺序和交替优化的限制，导致运行时间延长而无法保证性能。本文介绍了一个统一的 SMO 框架，利用加速阿贝前向成像来提高精度和效率。此外，我们提出了创新的 BiSMO 框架，该框架通过双层优化方法重新表述了 SMO，并提出了三种基于梯度的方法来应对双层 SMO 的挑战。我们的实验结果表明，BiSMO 的错误指标显着降低了 40%，运行时效率提高了 8 倍，这标志着 SMO 的重大飞跃。

papers.title: Efficient Code Generation for Data-Intensive Simulink Models via Redundancy Elimination.
papers.abstract:
Simulink has emerged as the fundamental infrastructure that supports modeling, simulation, verification, and code generation for embedded software development. To improve the performance of the code generated from Simulink models, state-of-the-art code generators employ various optimization techniques, such as expression folding, variable reuse, and parallelism. However, they overlook the presence of redundant calculations within data-intensive models widely used to perform substantial data processing in embedded scenarios, which can significantly undermine the efficiency and performance of the generated code.

This paper proposes Frodo, an efficient code generator for data-intensive Simulink models via redundancy elimination. Frodo first conducts model analysis to construct the dataflow graph and derive the I/O mapping of each block. Then, for each block within the dataflow graph, Frodo recursively determines its calculation range by leveraging the I/O mapping of its subsequent blocks. After that, Frodo generates concise code for optimizable blocks in accordance with the precise calculation range. We implemented and evaluated Frodo on benchmark Simulink models. Compared with the state-of-the-art code generators Simulink Embedded Coder, DFSynth, and HCG, the code generated by Frodo is 1.17X - 8.55X faster in terms of execution duration across different compilers and architectures, without incurring additional overhead of memory usage.
papers.abstract_zh:
Simulink 已成为支持嵌入式软件开发的建模、仿真、验证和代码生成的基础设施。为了提高 Simulink 模型生成的代码的性能，最先进的代码生成器采用了各种优化技术，例如表达式折叠、变量重用和并行性。然而，他们忽视了广泛用于在嵌入式场景中执行大量数据处理的数据密集型模型中存在的冗余计算，这可能会显着降低生成代码的效率和性能。

本文提出了 Frodo，一种通过冗余消除用于数据密集型 Simulink 模型的高效代码生成器。 Frodo首先进行模型分析，构建数据流图并导出每个块的I/O映射。然后，对于数据流图中的每个块，Frodo 通过利用其后续块的 I/O 映射递归地确定其计算范围。之后，Frodo根据精确的计算范围生成可优化块的简洁代码。我们在基准 Simulink 模型上实现并评估了 Frodo。与最先进的代码生成器 Simulink Embedded Coder、DFSynth 和 HCG 相比，Frodo 生成的代码在不同编译器和架构上的执行持续时间快了 1.17 倍 - 8.55 倍，且不会产生额外的内存使用开销。

papers.title: Efficient Equivalence Checking of Nonlinear Analog Circuits using Gradient Ascent.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present an optimized methodology for performing state-space-based equivalence checking of nonlinear analog circuits by using a gradient-ascent-based search algorithm to efficiently traverse a common state space. Essentially, the method searches for critical regions where the functional behaviors of two circuit designs show the greatest divergence. The key challenges in this approach are the mapping of both designs onto a common canonical state space, the computation of the gradient, and the exclusion of unreachable regions within the state space. To address the first challenge, we use locally linearized systems and leverage the Kronecker Canonical Form (KCF). To facilitate the computation of the gradient, we employ a purpose-built target function, and to exclude unreachable regions, we utilize vector projection techniques.
