Through experiments with nonlinear analog circuits and a scalability analysis, we demonstrate the successful and efficient computation performed with the proposed methodology, achieving speedups of up to 468 times.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种优化方法，通过使用基于梯度上升的搜索算法来有效地遍历公共状态空间，对非线性模拟电路执行基于状态空间的等价性检查。本质上，该方法搜索两个电路设计的功能行为表现出最大差异的关键区域。这种方法的关键挑战是将两种设计映射到公共规范状态空间、梯度计算以及状态空间内无法到达的区域的排除。为了解决第一个挑战，我们使用局部线性化系统并利用克罗内克规范形式（KCF）。为了促进梯度的计算，我们采用了专门构建的目标函数，并利用矢量投影技术来排除无法到达的区域。通过非线性模拟电路实验和可扩展性分析，我们展示了使用所提出的方法进行的成功且高效的计算，实现了高达 468 倍的加速。

papers.title: Efficient ILT via Multigrid-Schwartz Method.
papers.abstract: Inverse Lithography Technology (ILT) is an important Resolution Enhancement Technology (RET) in chip manufacturing. Due to the high computational demands of ILT, large-scale layouts are typically partitioned into smaller tiles for independent processing. In this paper, we propose a multigrid-Schwarz method to overcome challenges in tile assembly. Experimental results show that our approach achieves comparable performance to the full-chip ILT, offering increased parallelizability and speedup in parallel mode. Unlike the traditional divide-and-conquer algorithm, it effectively alleviates discontinuities of tile stitching, preventing manufacturing failures.
papers.abstract_zh: 逆光刻技术（ILT）是芯片制造中重要的分辨率增强技术（RET）。由于 ILT 的高计算需求，大规模布局通常被分割成较小的图块以进行独立处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种多重网格施瓦茨方法来克服瓷砖组装中的挑战。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与全芯片 ILT 相当的性能，在并行模式下提供了更高的并行性和加速。与传统的分而治之算法不同，它有效地缓解了瓷砖拼接的不连续性，防止了制造故障。

papers.title: Efficient Memory Integration: MRAM-SRAM Hybrid Accelerator for Sparse On-Device Learning.
papers.abstract: With the prosperous development of Deep Neural Network (DNNs), numerous Process-In-Memory (PIM) designs have emerged to accelerate DNN models with exceptional throughput and energy-efficiency. PIM accelerators based on Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) or volatile memory offer distinct advantages for computational efficiency and performance. NVM based PIM accelerators, demonstrated success in DNN inference, face limitations in on-device learning due to high write energy, latency, and instability. Conversely, fast volatile memories, like SRAM, offer rapid read/write operations for DNN training, but suffer from significant leakage currents and large memory footprints. In this paper, for the first time, we present a fully-digital sparse processing in hybrid NVM-SRAM design, synergistically combines the strengths of NVM and SRAM, tailored for on-device continual learning. Our designed NVM and SRAM based PIM circuit macros could support both storage and processing of N:M structured sparsity pattern, significantly improving the storage and computing efficiency. Exhaustive experiments demonstrate that our hybrid system effectively reduces area and power consumption while maintaining high accuracy, offering a scalable and versatile solution for on-device continual learning.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络（DNN）的蓬勃发展，出现了许多内存处理（PIM）设计来加速具有卓越吞吐量和能源效率的DNN模型。基于非易失性存储器 (NVM) 或易失性存储器的 PIM 加速器在计算效率和性能方面具有明显的优势。基于 NVM 的 PIM 加速器在 DNN 推理方面取得了成功，但由于高写入能量、延迟和不稳定而在设备上学习方面面临限制。相反，快速易失性存储器（如 SRAM）可以为 DNN 训练提供快速读/写操作，但会遭受显着的泄漏电流和较大的存储器占用空间。在本文中，我们首次提出了混合 NVM-SRAM 设计中的全数字稀疏处理，协同结合了 NVM 和 SRAM 的优势，专为设备上持续学习而定制。我们设计的基于NVM和SRAM的PIM电路宏可以支持N:M结构稀疏模式的存储和处理，显着提高存储和计算效率。详尽的实验表明，我们的混合系统有效地减少了面积和功耗，同时保持了高精度，为设备上持续学习提供了可扩展且多功能的解决方案。

papers.title: Efficient Open Modification Spectral Library Searching in High-Dimensional Space with Multi-Level-Cell Memory.
papers.abstract: Open Modification Search (OMS) is a promising algorithm for mass spectrometry analysis that enables the discovery of modified peptides. However, OMS encounters challenges as it exponentially extends the search scope. Existing OMS accelerators either have limited parallelism or struggle to scale effectively with growing data volumes. In this work, we introduce an OMS accelerator utilizing multi-level-cell (MLC) RRAM memory to enhance storage capacity by 3x. Through in-memory computing, we achieve up to 77x faster data processing with two to three orders of magnitude better energy efficiency. Testing was done on a fabricated MLC RRAM chip. We leverage hyperdimensional computing to tolerate up to 10% memory errors while delivering massive parallelism in hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 开放修饰搜索 (OMS) 是一种很有前途的质谱分析算法，可以发现修饰的肽。然而，OMS 在搜索范围呈指数级扩展时遇到了挑战。现有的 OMS 加速器要么并行性有限，要么难以随着数据量的增长而有效扩展。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种 OMS 加速器，利用多级单元 (MLC) RRAM 存储器将存储容量提高 3 倍。通过内存计算，我们的数据处理速度提高了 77 倍，能源效率提高了两到三个数量级。测试是在制造的 MLC RRAM 芯片上进行的。我们利用超维计算来容忍高达 10% 的内存错误，同时在硬件中提供大规模并行性。

papers.title: EGMA: Enhancing Data Reuse and Workload Balancing in Message Passing GNN Acceleration via Gram Matrix Optimization.
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been widely used to handle intricate graph-related problems, in which complex vertex and edge operations are performed in the form of message passing between vertices. Such complex GNN operations are highly dependent on the graph structure and can no longer be characterized as sparse-dense or general matrix multiplications. Consequently, current matrix-based data reuse and workload balancing optimizations have limited applicability to Message Passing-based GNN acceleration. In this paper, we leverage the mathematical insights from Gram Matrix to simultaneously exploit data reuse and workload balancing opportunities for message passing-based GNN accelerations. Upon this insight, we further propose a novel accelerator, named EGMA, that can efficiently facilitate a wide range of GNN models with improved data reuse and workload balance. Consequently, EGMA can achieve performance speedup by 1.57×, 1.72×, and 1.43× and energy reduction by 38.19%, 34.02%, and 24.54% on average compared to Betty, FlowGNN, and ReGNN, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已被广泛用于处理复杂的图相关问题，其中复杂的顶点和边操作以顶点之间消息传递的形式执行。这种复杂的 GNN 运算高度依赖于图结构，不能再被描述为稀疏-密集或一般的矩阵乘法。因此，当前基于矩阵的数据重用和工作负载平衡优化对于基于消息传递的 GNN 加速的适用性有限。在本文中，我们利用 Gram Matrix 的数学见解，同时利用数据重用和工作负载平衡机会，实现基于消息传递的 GNN 加速。基于这一见解，我们进一步提出了一种名为 EGMA 的新型加速器，它可以有效地促进各种 GNN 模型，并改善数据重用和工作负载平衡。因此，与 Betty、FlowGNN 和 ReGNN 相比，EGMA 平均可以实现性能加速 1.57 倍、1.72 倍和 1.43 倍，能耗平均降低 38.19%、34.02% 和 24.54%。

papers.title: ElasticZRAM: Revisiting ZRAM for Swapping on Mobile Devices.
papers.abstract: Modern mobile devices adopt two-level memory swapping consisting of ZRAM and storage devices to relieve memory pressure. In the swap subsystem, ZRAM can improve application responsiveness and reduce write traffic to storage devices while consuming physical memory and additional CPU cycles. To better utilize ZRAM and improve system performance, we propose ElasticZRAM, an elastic ZRAM to redesign the traditional memory swapping with full awareness of the characteristics of applications and NAND flash-based storage devices on mobile devices. Experimental results on Google Pixel 6 demonstrate that ElasticZRAM improves application response time by up to 24.8% with negligible overhead compared with state-of-the-arts.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代移动设备采用由ZRAM和存储设备组成的两级内存交换来缓解内存压力。在交换子系统中，ZRAM 可以提高应用程序响应能力并减少存储设备的写入流量，同时消耗物理内存和额外的 CPU 周期。为了更好地利用 ZRAM 并提高系统性能，我们提出了 ElasticZRAM，这是一种弹性 ZRAM，它充分了解移动设备上应用程序和基于 NAND 闪存的存储设备的特点，重新设计了传统的内存交换。 Google Pixel 6 上的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，ElasticZRAM 将应用程序响应时间提高了 24.8%，而开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: EmMark: Robust Watermarks for IP Protection of Embedded Quantized Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces EmMark, a novel watermarking framework for protecting intellectual property (IP) of embedded large language models deployed on resource-constrained edge devices. To address the IP theft risks posed by malicious end-users, EmMark enables proprietors to authenticate ownership by querying the watermarked model weights and matching the inserted signatures. EmMark's novelty lies in its strategic watermark weight parameters selection, ensuring robustness and maintaining model quality. Extensive proof-of-concept evaluations of models from OPT and LLaMA-2 families demonstrate EmMark's fidelity, achieving 100% success in watermark extraction with model performance preservation. EmMark also showcased its resilience against watermark removal and forging attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 EmMark，这是一种新颖的水印框架，用于保护部署在资源受限的边缘设备上的嵌入式大型语言模型的知识产权 (IP)。为了解决恶意最终用户带来的 IP 盗窃风险，EmMark 使所有者能够通过查询带水印的模型权重并匹配插入的签名来验证所有权。 EmMark的新颖之处在于其战略性水印权重参数选择，确保鲁棒性并保持模型质量。对 OPT 和 LLaMA-2 系列模型的广泛概念验证评估证明了 EmMark 的保真度，在保留模型性能的情况下在水印提取方面取得了 100% 的成功。 EmMark 还展示了其抵御水印去除和伪造攻击的能力。

papers.title: EMOGen: Enhancing Mask Optimization via Pattern Generation.
papers.abstract: Layout pattern generation via deep generative models is a promising methodology for building practical large-scale pattern libraries. However, although improving optical proximity correction (OPC) is a major target of existing pattern generation methods, they are not explicitly trained for OPC and integrated into OPC methods. In this paper, we propose EMOGen to enable the co-evolution of layout pattern generation and learning-based OPC methods. With the novel co-evolution methodology, we achieve up to 39% enhancement in OPC and 34% improvement in pattern legalization.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过深度生成模型生成布局图案是构建实用的大规模图案库的一种很有前途的方法。然而，尽管改进光学邻近校正（OPC）是现有模式生成方法的主要目标，但它们没有经过明确的 OPC 训练并集成到 OPC 方法中。在本文中，我们提出 EMOGen 来实现布局图案生成和基于学习的 OPC 方法的共同进化。借助新颖的协同进化方法，我们在 OPC 方面实现了高达 39% 的增强，在模式合法化方面实现了 34% 的改进。

papers.title: Enabling Low Latency for ECQF based Flow Aggregation Scheduling in Time-Sensitive Networking.
papers.abstract: Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding (CQF) configures the same cycle length on the flow path, resulting in certain flows unschedulable. Enhanced CQF (ECQF) based flow aggregation utilizes variable cycle length to address this issue. However, it remains a conceptual model without a concrete implementation. In this paper, we propose a jointly optimize aggregation cycle and flows' offsets (JACO) mechanism to achieve ECQF-based flow aggregation. We also design an incremental heuristic algorithm for JACO. Finally, we evaluate the performance of JACO in different scenarios using OMNet++ simulation platform. Compared with ECQF, the results show that JACO reduces latency and improves resource utilization.
papers.abstract_zh: 循环排队转发（CQF）在流路径上配置相同的循环长度，导致某些流不可调度。基于增强型 CQF (ECQF) 的流聚合利用可变周期长度来解决此问题。然而，它仍然是一个概念模型，没有具体的实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合优化聚合周期和流偏移（JACO）机制来实现基于ECQF的流聚合。我们还为 JACO 设计了增量启发式算法。最后，我们使用OMNet++仿真平台评估了JACO在不同场景下的性能。与ECQF相比，结果表明JACO降低了延迟并提高了资源利用率。

papers.title: Enabling Multiple Tensor-wise Operator Fusion for Transformer Models on Spatial Accelerators.
papers.abstract: In transformer models, data reuse within an operator is insufficient, which prompts more aggressive multiple tensor-wise operator fusion ( multi-tensor fusion ). Due to the complexity in tensor-wise operator dataflow, conventional fusion techniques often fall short by limited dataflow options and short fusion length. In this study, we first identify three challenges on multi-tensor fusion that result in inferior fusions. Then we propose dataflow adaptive tiling (DAT), a novel inter-operator dataflow to enable an efficient fusion of multiple operators connected in any form and chained in any length. Then, we broaden the dataflow exploration from intraoperator to inter-operator and develop an exploration framework to quickly find the best dataflow on spatial accelerators with given on-chip buffer size. Experiment results show that DAT delivers 2.24× and 1.74× speedup and 35.5% and 15.5% energy savings on average for edge and cloud accelerators, respectively, comparing to the state-of-the-art dataflow explorer FLAT. DAT is open-sourced at https://github.com/lxu28973/DAT.git.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 Transformer 模型中，算子内的数据重用是不够的，这促使更积极的多张量算子融合（多张量融合）。由于张量算子数据流的复杂性，传统的融合技术常常因数据流选项有限和融合长度短而不足。在这项研究中，我们首先确定了多张量融合的三个挑战，这些挑战导致融合效果较差。然后，我们提出了数据流自适应切片（DAT），这是一种新颖的运营商间数据流，可以实现以任何形式连接并以任何长度链接的多个运营商的有效融合。然后，我们将数据流探索从操作员内扩展到操作员间，并开发了一个探索框架，以在给定片上缓冲区大小的空间加速器上快速找到最佳数据流。实验结果表明，与最先进的数据流浏览器 FLAT 相比，DAT 为边缘加速器和云加速器平均分别提供 2.24 倍和 1.74 倍的加速以及 35.5% 和 15.5% 的节能。 DAT 在 https://github.com/lxu28973/DAT.git 上开源。

papers.title: Enabling On-Device Large Language Model Personalization with Self-Supervised Data Selection and Synthesis.
papers.abstract: After a large language model (LLM) is deployed on edge devices, it is desirable for these devices to learn from user-generated conversation data to generate user-specific and personalized responses in real-time. However, user-generated data usually contains sensitive and private information, and uploading such data to the cloud for annotation is not preferred if not prohibited. While it is possible to obtain annotation locally by directly asking users to provide preferred responses, such annotations have to be sparse to not affect user experience. In addition, the storage of edge devices is usually too limited to enable large-scale fine-tuning with full user-generated data. It remains an open question how to enable on-device LLM personalization, considering sparse annotation and limited on-device storage. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to select and store the most representative data online in a self-supervised way. Such data has a small memory footprint and allows infrequent requests of user annotations for further fine-tuning. To enhance fine-tuning quality, multiple semantically similar pairs of question texts and expected responses are generated using the LLM. Our experiments show that the proposed framework achieves the best user-specific content-generating capability (accuracy) and fine-tuning speed (performance) compared with vanilla baselines. To the best of our knowledge, this is the very first on-device LLM personalization framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 后，这些设备需要从用户生成的对话数据中学习，以实时生成特定于用户的个性化响应。然而，用户生成的数据通常包含敏感和隐私信息，如果不禁止，则不建议将此类数据上传到云端进行注释。虽然可以通过直接要求用户提供首选响应来在本地获取注释，但此类注释必须稀疏，以免影响用户体验。此外，边缘设备的存储通常非常有限，无法利用完整的用户生成数据进行大规模微调。考虑到稀疏注释和有限的设备存储，如何实现设备上的 LLM 个性化仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，以自我监督的方式在线选择和存储最具代表性的数据。此类数据的内存占用较小，并且允许不频繁地请求用户注释以进行进一步微调。为了提高微调质量，使用 LLM 生成多个语义相似的问题文本对和预期响应。我们的实验表明，与普通基线相比，所提出的框架实现了最佳的用户特定内容生成能力（准确性）和微调速度（性能）。据我们所知，这是第一个设备上的 LLM 个性化框架。

papers.title: Energy Efficient Dual Designs of FeFET-Based Analog In-Memory Computing with Inherent Shift-Add Capability.
papers.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) architecture emerges as a promising paradigm, improving the energy efficiency of multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operations within deep neural networks (DNNs) by integrating the parallel computations within the memory arrays. Various high-precision analog IMC array designs have been developed based on both SRAM and emerging non-volatile memories (NVMs). These designs perform MAC operations of partial input and weight, with the corresponding partial products then fed into shift-add circuitry to produce the final MAC results. However, existing works often present intricate shift-add process for weight. The traditional digital shift-add process is limited in throughput due to time-multiplexing of ADCs, and advancing the shift-add process to the analog domain necessitates customized circuit implementations, resulting in compromises in energy and area efficiency. Furthermore, the joint optimization of the partial MAC operations and the weight shift-add process is rarely explored. In this paper, we propose novel, energy efficient dual designs of ferroelectric FET (FeFET) based high precision analog IMC featuring inherent shift-add capability. We introduce a FeFET based IMC paradigm that performs partial MAC in each column, and inherently integrates the shift-add process for 4-bit weights by leveraging FeFET's analog storage characteristics. This paradigm supports both 2's complement mode (2CM) and non-2's complement mode (N2CM) MAC, thereby offering flexible support for 4-/8-bit weight data in 2's complement format. Building upon this paradigm, we propose novel FeFET based dual designs, CurFe for the current mode and ChgFe for the charge mode, to accommodate the high precision analog domain IMC architecture. Evaluation results at circuit and system levels indicate that the circuit/system-level energy efficiency of the proposed FeFET-based analog IMC is 1.56×/1.37× higher when compared to the state-of-the-art analog IMC designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (IMC) 架构作为一种有前途的范例出现，通过集成内存阵列内的并行计算来提高深度神经网络 (DNN) 内乘法累加 (MAC) 操作的能源效率。基于 SRAM 和新兴非易失性存储器 (NVM) 开发了各种高精度模拟 IMC 阵列设计。这些设计执行部分输入和权重的 MAC 运算，然后将相应的部分乘积输入移位加法电路以产生最终的 MAC 结果。然而，现有的工作经常呈现复杂的权重移位添加过程。由于 ADC 的时间复用，传统的数字移位加法过程的吞吐量受到限制，而将移位加法过程推进到模拟领域需要定制电路实现，从而导致能量和面积效率的妥协。此外，部分MAC操作和权重移位-添加过程的联合优化很少被探索。在本文中，我们提出了基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的新型、节能的双设计高精度模拟 IMC，具有固有的移位加法功能。我们引入了基于 FeFET 的 IMC 范例，该范例在每列中执行部分 MAC，并通过利用 FeFET 的模拟存储特性固有地集成了 4 位权重的移位加法过程。该范例支持 2 的补码模式 (2CM) 和非 2 的补码模式 (N2CM) MAC，从而为 2 的补码格式的 4 位/8 位权重数据提供灵活的支持。在此范例的基础上，我们提出了基于 FeFET 的新型双设计，CurFe 用于电流模式，ChgFe 用于充电模式，以适应高精度模拟域 IMC 架构。电路和系统级的评估结果表明，与最先进的模拟 IMC 设计相比，所提出的基于 FeFET 的模拟 IMC 的电路/系统级能效高出 1.56 倍/1.37 倍。

papers.title: Energy-efficient SNN Architecture using 3nm FinFET Multiport SRAM-based CIM with Online Learning.
papers.abstract: Current Artificial Intelligence (AI) computation systems face challenges, primarily from the memory-wall issue, limiting overall system-level performance, especially for Edge devices with constrained battery budgets, such as smartphones, wearables, and Internet-of-Things sensor systems. In this paper, we propose a new SRAM-based Compute-In-Memory (CIM) accelerator optimized for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) Inference. Our proposed architecture employs a multiport SRAM design with multiple decoupled Read ports to enhance the throughput and Transposable Read-Write ports to facilitate online learning. Furthermore, we develop an Arbiter circuit for efficient data-processing and port allocations during the computation. Results for a 128×128 array in 3nm FinFET technology demonstrate a 3.1× improvement in speed and a 2.2× enhancement in energy efficiency with our proposed multiport SRAM design compared to the traditional single-port design. At system-level, a throughput of 44 MInf/s at 607 pJ/Inf and 29mW is achieved.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的人工智能 (AI) 计算系统面临着挑战，主要来自内存墙问题，限制了整体系统级性能，特别是对于电池预算有限的边缘设备，例如智能手机、可穿戴设备和物联网传感器系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 加速器，针对尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 推理进行了优化。我们提出的架构采用多端口 SRAM 设计，具有多个解耦读取端口以提高吞吐量，并采用转置读写端口以促进在线学习。此外，我们开发了一个仲裁器电路，用于在计算过程中进行高效的数据处理和端口分配。采用 3nm FinFET 技术的 128×128 阵列的结果表明，与传统的单端口设计相比，我们提出的多端口 SRAM 设计的速度提高了 3.1 倍，能效提高了 2.2 倍。在系统级，在 607 pJ/Inf 和 29mW 下实现了 44 MInf/s 的吞吐量。

papers.title: Engineering an Efficient Preprocessor for Model Counting.
papers.abstract: Given a formula F , the problem of model counting is to compute the number of solutions (also known as models) of F. Over the past decade, model counting has emerged as key building block of quantitative reasoning in design automation and artificial intelligence. Given the wide-ranging applications, scalability remains the major challenge. Motivated by the observation that the formula simplification can dramatically impact the performance of the state-of-the-art exact model counters, we design a new state-of-the-art preprocessor, Arjun2, that relies on tight integration of techniques. The design of Arjun2 is motivated from our observation that it is often beneficial to employ preprocessing techniques whose overhead may be prohibitive for the task of SAT solving but not for model counting: accordingly, we rely on a specifically tailored SAT solver design for redundancy detection, sampling-boosted backbone detection, as well as storing of redundancy information for the purposes of improving propagation within top-down model counters. Our detailed empirical evaluation demonstrates that Arjun2 achieves significant performance improvements over prior model counting preprocessors in terms of instance-size reductions achieved as well as the runtime improvements of the downstream model counters.
papers.abstract_zh: 给定公式 F ，模型计数的问题是计算 F 的解（也称为模型）的数量。在过去的十年中，模型计数已成为设计自动化和人工智能中定量推理的关键构建块。鉴于应用范围广泛，可扩展性仍然是主要挑战。由于观察到公式简化可以极大地影响最先进的精确模型计数器的性能，我们设计了一种新的最先进的预处理器 Arjun2，它依赖于技术的紧密集成。 Arjun2 的设计源于我们的观察，即采用预处理技术通常是有益的，这些技术的开销可能对于 SAT 求解任务来说是令人望而却步的，但对于模型计数来说却不是：因此，我们依靠专门定制的 SAT 求解器设计来进行冗余检测、采样增强骨干检测以及存储冗余信息，以改善自上而下模型计数器内的传播。我们详细的实证评估表明，与之前的模型计数预处理器相比，Arjun2 在实例大小减小以及下游模型计数器的运行时改进方面实现了显着的性能改进。

papers.title: Enhancing 3-D Random Walk Capacitance Solver with Analytic Surface Green's Functions of Transition Cubes.
papers.abstract: The complicated dielectric profile under advanced process technologies challenges the accuracy of floating random walk (FRW) based capacitance extraction, as the latter pre-computes the surface Green's functions for a finite set of multi-dielectric transition cubes and makes approximations of transition cubes during the FRW process. In this work, we derive analytic surface Green's functions for transition cubes with arbitrary stratified dielectrics and propose a fast algorithm named AGF to compute them. A capacitance solver named FRW-AGF is then proposed to incorporate AGF into the FRW process to accurately model realistic transition cubes. Experimental results show that the proposed AGF is over 100× faster than the state-of-the-art, and FRW-AGF largely improves the accuracy of RWCap4 [3, 16] (making all errors to golden values below 5%) without degrading computational speed and parallel scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 先进工艺技术下复杂的介电分布对基于浮动随机游走（FRW）的电容提取的精度提出了挑战，因为后者预先计算了有限组多介电质过渡立方体的表面格林函数，并在 FRW 过程中对过渡立方体进行了近似。在这项工作中，我们推导了具有任意分层电介质的过渡立方体的解析表面格林函数，并提出了一种名为 AGF 的快速算法来计算它们。然后提出了一种名为 FRW-AGF 的电容求解器，将 AGF 合并到 FRW 过程中，以准确地模拟真实的过渡立方体。实验结果表明，所提出的 AGF 比最先进的技术快 100 倍以上，并且 FRW-AGF 极大地提高了 RWCap4 [3, 16] 的准确性（使所有错误达到黄金值低于 5%），而不会降低计算速度和并行可扩展性。

papers.title: EnTurbo: Accelerate Confidential Serverless Computing via Parallelizing Enclave Startup Procedure.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing has gained widespread attention, and Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) are well-suited for safeguarding user privacy. However, the additional startup procedure introduced by TEEs imposes considerable performance overhead on confidential serverless workloads. This paper introduces a novel parallelized enclave startup design, EnTurbo, which eliminates the integrity dependence of the enclave startup procedure, accelerating it while ensuring its security. Additionally, EnTurbo parallelizes the measurement procedure, enabling multi-thread measurement for acceleration with provable security. We evaluate EnTurbo by running confidential serverless workloads on SGX simulation mode. Results show that EnTurbo effectively speeds up enclave serverless by 1.42x-6.48x (SGXv1) and 1.33x-3.76x (SGXv2).
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算受到广泛关注，可信执行环境（TEE）非常适合保护用户隐私。然而，TEE 引入的额外启动过程给机密无服务器工作负载带来了相当大的性能开销。本文介绍了一种新颖的并行Enclave启动设计EnTurbo，它消除了Enclave启动过程的完整性依赖，在加速的同时保证了其安全性。此外，EnTurbo 并行化了测量过程，支持多线程测量以实现加速，并具有可证明的安全性。我们通过在 SGX 模拟模式上运行机密无服务器工作负载来评估 EnTurbo。结果表明，EnTurbo 有效地将 enclave serverless 速度提高了 1.42x-6.48x (SGXv1) 和 1.33x-3.76x (SGXv2)。

papers.title: EOS: An Energy-Oriented Attack Framework for Spiking Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are emerging as energy-efficient alternatives to traditional artificial neural networks (ANNs). Their event-driven information processing significantly reduces computational demands while maintaining competitive performance. However, as SNNs are increasingly deployed in edge devices, security concerns have emerged. While significant research efforts have been dedicated to addressing the security vulnerabilities stemming from malicious input, often referred to as adversarial examples, the security of SNN parameters remains relatively unexplored. This work introduces a novel attack methodology for SNNs known as Energy-Oriented SNN attack (EOS). EOS is designed to increase the energy consumption of SNNs through the malicious manipulation of binary bits within their memory systems (i.e., DRAM), where neuronal information is stored. The key insight of EOS lies in the observation that energy consumption in SNN implementations is intricately linked to spiking activity. The bit-flip operation, the well-known Row Hammer technique, is employed in EOS. It achieves this by identifying the most robust neurons in the SNN based on the spiking activity, particularly those related to the firing threshold, which is stored as binary bits in memory. EOS employs a combination of spiking activity analysis and a progressive search strategy to pinpoint the target neurons for bit-flip attacks. The primary objective is to incrementally increase the energy consumption of the SNN while ensuring that accuracy remains intact. With the implementation of EOS, successful attacks on SNNs can lead to an average of 43% energy increase with no drop in accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 正在成为传统人工神经网络 (ANN) 的节能替代品。它们的事件驱动信息处理显着降低了计算需求，同时保持了竞争性能。然而，随着 SNN 越来越多地部署在边缘设备中，安全问题也随之出现。尽管大量的研究工作致力于解决恶意输入（通常称为对抗性示例）引起的安全漏洞，但 SNN 参数的安全性仍然相对未经探索。这项工作引入了一种新颖的 SNN 攻击方法，称为面向能量的 SNN 攻击 (EOS)。 EOS 旨在通过恶意操纵存储神经元信息的存储系统（即 DRAM）内的二进制位来增加 SNN 的能耗。 EOS 的关键见解在于观察到 SNN 实现中的能源消耗与尖峰活动有着错综复杂的联系。 EOS 中采用了位翻转操作，即著名的 Row Hammer 技术。它通过根据尖峰活动识别 SNN 中最稳健的神经元来实现这一目标，特别是那些与激发阈值相关的神经元，这些神经元以二进制位形式存储在内存中。 EOS 采用尖峰活动分析和渐进式搜索策略相结合来精确定位位翻转攻击的目标神经元。主要目标是逐步增加 SNN 的能耗，同时确保准确性保持不变。随着 EOS 的实施，对 SNN 的成功攻击可以导致平均 43% 的能量增加，而准确率却没有下降。

papers.title: EPIM: Efficient Processing-In-Memory Accelerators based on Epitome.
papers.abstract: The utilization of large-scale neural networks on Processing-In-Memory (PIM) accelerators encounters challenges due to constrained on-chip memory capacity. To tackle this issue, current works explore model compression algorithms to reduce the size of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Most of these algorithms either aim to represent neural operators with reduced-size parameters (e.g., quantization) or search for the best combinations of neural operators (e.g., neural architecture search). Designing neural operators to align with PIM accelerators' specifications is an area that warrants further study. In this paper, we introduce the Epitome, a lightweight neural operator offering convolution-like functionality, to craft memory-efficient CNN operators for PIM accelerators (EPIM). On the software side, we evaluate epitomes' latency and energy on PIM accelerators and introduce a PIM-aware layer-wise design method to enhance their hardware efficiency. We apply epitome-aware quantization to further reduce the size of epitomes. On the hardware side, we modify the datapath of current PIM accelerators to accommodate epitomes and implement a feature map reuse technique to reduce computation cost. Experimental results reveal that our 3-bit quantized EPIM-ResNet50 attains 71.59% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, reducing crossbar areas by 30.65X. EPIM surpasses the state-of-the-art pruning methods on PIM.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于片上内存容量有限，在内存处理 (PIM) 加速器上使用大规模神经网络遇到了挑战。为了解决这个问题，当前的工作探索模型压缩算法来减小卷积神经网络（CNN）的大小。这些算法中的大多数旨在表示具有减小尺寸的参数（例如量化）的神经算子，或者搜索神经算子的最佳组合（例如神经架构搜索）。设计神经算子以符合 PIM 加速器的规格是一个值得进一步研究的领域。在本文中，我们介绍了 Epitome，一种提供类似卷积功能的轻量级神经算子，为 PIM 加速器 (EPIM) 制作内存高效的 CNN 算子。在软件方面，我们评估了PIM加速器上缩影的延迟和能量，并引入了PIM感知的分层设计方法来提高其硬件效率。我们应用缩影感知量化来进一步减小缩影的大小。在硬件方面，我们修改了当前 PIM 加速器的数据路径以适应缩影，并实现特征图重用技术以降低计算成本。实验结果表明，我们的 3 位量化 EPIM-ResNet50 在 ImageNet 上达到了 71.59% 的 top-1 准确率，将交叉区域减少了 30.65 倍。 EPIM 超越了 PIM 上最先进的修剪方法。

papers.title: Ev-Edge: Efficient Execution of Event-based Vision Algorithms on Commodity Edge Platforms.
papers.abstract: Event cameras have emerged as a promising sensing modality for autonomous navigation systems, owing to their high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and negligible motion blur. To achieve the best performance across a range of vision tasks using the asynchronous temporal event streams from such sensors, recent research has shown that a mix of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), as well as hybrid SNN-ANN algorithms are desirable. However, we observe that such workloads achieve poor utilization and performance on commodity edge platforms which feature heterogeneous processing elements such as CPUs, GPUs and neural accelerators. This is due to the mismatch between the irregular nature of event streams and diverse characteristics of algorithms on the one hand and the underlying hardware platform on the other. We propose Ev-Edge, a framework that contains three key optimizations to boost the performance of event-based vision algorithms on edge platforms: (1) An Event2Sparse Frame converter directly transforms raw event streams into sparse frames, enabling the use of sparse libraries with minimal encoding overheads (2) A Dynamic Sparse Frame Aggregator merges sparse frames at runtime by trading off the temporal granularity of events and computational demand, thereby improving hardware utilization, and (3) A Network Mapper maps concurrently executing tasks to different processing elements while also selecting layer precision while considering both compute and communication overheads. On several state-of-art networks for a range of autonomous navigation tasks, Ev-Edge achieves 1.28x-2.05x improvements in latency and 1.23x-2.15x in energy over an all-GPU implementation on the NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX platform for single-task execution scenarios. Ev-Edge also achieves 1.43x-1.81x latency improvements over round-robin scheduling methods in multi-task execution scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 事件相机因其高时间分辨率、高动态范围和可忽略的运动模糊而成为自主导航系统有前途的传感方式。为了使用来自此类传感器的异步时间事件流在一系列视觉任务中实现最佳性能，最近的研究表明，需要混合使用人工神经网络 (ANN)、尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 以及混合 SNN-ANN 算法。然而，我们观察到，此类工作负载在具有 CPU、GPU 和神经加速器等异构处理元件的商品边缘平台上的利用率和性能较差。这是由于事件流的不规则性质和算法的不同特征与底层硬件平台之间的不匹配造成的。我们提出了 Ev-Edge，一个包含三个关键优化的框架，可提高边缘平台上基于事件的视觉算法的性能：（1）Event2Sparse Frame 转换器直接将原始事件流转换为稀疏帧，从而以最小的编码开销使用稀疏库（2）动态稀疏帧聚合器通过权衡事件的时间粒度和计算需求在运行时合并稀疏帧，从而提高硬件利用率，以及（3）网络映射器将并发执行的任务映射到不同的处理元素，同时还选择层精度，同时考虑计算和通信开销。在用于一系列自主导航任务的多个最先进网络上，与 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX 平台上针对单任务执行场景的全 GPU 实现相比，Ev-Edge 在延迟方面实现了 1.28 倍到 2.05 倍的延迟改进，在能耗方面实现了 1.23 倍到 2.15 倍的改进。在多任务执行场景中，Ev-Edge 还比循环调度方法实现了 1.43 倍至 1.81 倍的延迟改进。

papers.title: Evaluating the Security of Logic Locking on Deep Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks are susceptible to model piracy and adversarial attacks when malicious end-users have full access to the model parameters. Recently, a logic locking scheme called HPNN has been proposed. HPNN utilizes hardware root-of-trust to prevent end-users from accessing the model parameters. This paper investigates whether logic locking is secure on deep neural networks. Specifically, it presents a systematic I/O attack that combines algebraic and learning-based approaches. This attack incrementally extracts key values from the network to minimize sample complexity. Besides, it employs a rigorous procedure to ensure the correctness of the extracted key values. Our experiments demonstrate the accuracy and efficiency of this attack on large networks with complex architectures. Consequently, we conclude that HPNN-style logic locking and its variants we can foresee are insecure on deep neural networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 当恶意最终用户完全访问模型参数时，深度神经网络很容易受到模型盗版和对抗性攻击。最近，提出了一种称为 HPNN 的逻辑锁定方案。 HPNN 利用硬件信任根来防止最终用户访问模型参数。本文研究逻辑锁定在深度神经网络上是否安全。具体来说，它提出了一种结合了代数和基于学习的方法的系统 I/O 攻击。这种攻击逐步从网络中提取关键值，以最大限度地减少样本复杂性。此外，它采用严格的程序来确保提取的关键值的正确性。我们的实验证明了这种攻击对具有复杂架构的大型网络的准确性和效率。因此，我们得出结论，我们可以预见的 HPNN 式逻辑锁定及其变体在深度神经网络上是不安全的。

papers.title: EVDMARL: Efficient Value Decomposition-based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Domain-Randomization for Complex Analog Circuit Design Migration.
papers.abstract: Automated analog circuit design migration significantly alleviates the burden on designers in circuit sizing under various operating conditions. Conventional methods model the migration problem as black-box optimization, requiring excessive iterations of costly simulations to converge. Reinforcement learning exhibits significant promise in transfer learning, as it enables the generation of circuits that fulfill specifications efficiently. The paper proposes a novel value decomposition-based multi-agent reinforcement learning framework, aiming to model complex analog circuits and eliminate the need for manually defined specifications of sub-circuits for new operating conditions. Additionally, it incorporates domain randomization techniques to efficiently generate circuits that meet unforeseen scenarios with minimal simulations. Experiment demonstrates that our algorithm can efficiently generate circuits meeting specifications under new operating conditions in few number of steps, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动模拟电路设计迁移显着减轻了设计人员在各种工作条件下调整电路尺寸的负担。传统方法将迁移问题建模为黑盒优化，需要进行大量昂贵的模拟迭代才能收敛。强化学习在迁移学习中展现出巨大的前景，因为它能够生成有效满足规范的电路。本文提出了一种新颖的基于价值分解的多智能体强化学习框架，旨在对复杂的模拟电路进行建模，并消除针对新操作条件手动定义子电路规范的需要。此外，它还结合了域随机化技术，可以有效地生成电路，以最少的模拟来满足不可预见的场景。实验表明，我们的算法可以在新的操作条件下以很少的步骤有效地生成满足规格的电路，优于最先进的方法。

papers.title: Every Failure Is A Lesson: Utilizing All Failure Samples To Deliver Tuning-Free Efficient Yield Evaluation.
papers.abstract: Yield estimation and optimization have become increasingly important for circuit design as technology nodes scale down. Simple yet well-established minimal norm importance sampling (MNIS) still serves as an industrial standard due to its robustness and reliability. In this study, we generalize the classic MNIS and propose Every Failure Is A Lesson (EFIAL) to utilize every failure sample (instead of one in MNIS) to construct the proposal distribution. EFIAL is completely tuning-free and the update computation complexity is only O ( M ) ( M is the number of failure samples) by utilizing the blessing of dimensionality. The idea of EFIAL is then extended to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) pre-sampling method, onion sampling, to significantly boost efficiency, by up to 9.08x (4.68x on average). Extensive evaluations against SOTA yield estimation methods reveal that EFIAL achieves a speedup of up to 13.54x (5.16x on average) and an accuracy improvement of up to 24.91%.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点规模的缩小，良率估算和优化对于电路设计变得越来越重要。简单但完善的最小范数重要性抽样 (MNIS) 由于其稳健性和可靠性，仍然作为行业标准。在本研究中，我们概括了经典的 MNIS 并提出“每个失败都是一次教训”（EFIAL），以利用每个失败样本（而不是 MNIS 中的一个）来构建提案分布。 EFIAL 完全免调优，利用维数的优势，更新计算复杂度仅为 O(M)（M 为失败样本数）。然后，EFIAL 的理念被扩展到最先进的 (SOTA) 预采样方法（洋葱采样），以显着提高效率高达 9.08 倍（平均 4.68 倍）。针对 SOTA 良率估算方法的广泛评估表明，EFIAL 的加速比高达 13.54 倍（平均 5.16 倍），准确率提高高达 24.91%。

papers.title: Execution Sequence Optimization for Processing In-Memory using Parallel Data Preparation.
papers.abstract: Processing in-memory (PIM) promises to unleash unprecedented computing capabilities for high-data-rate applications. Computation using PIM is performed by breaking down computationally expensive operations into in-memory kernels that can be efficiently executed using non-volatile memory. Logic styles such as MAGIC require that each output memory cell is prepared for evaluation before executing the functional logic operation. State-of-the-art synthesis algorithms perform the preparation immediately after memory cells have expired. Unfortunately, this results in that columns of cells are prepared greedily, instead of leveraging efficient parallel data preparation instructions. In this paper, we propose the PREP framework that maximizes the opportunities for parallel column preparation using execution sequence optimization. The key idea of the framework is to postpone data preparation instructions until there are no available prepared cells. Next, the accumulated memory cells are prepared in parallel to release the memory for functional evaluations. The framework is capable of exploring a frontier of area-performance solutions. The PREP framework is evaluated using 15 benchmarks from the SuiteSparse library. Compared with state-of-the-art synthesis tools, energy consumption and latency are respectively reduced by 27% and 25% with no additional cost in crossbar memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 有望为高数据速率应用释放前所未有的计算能力。使用 PIM 的计算是通过将计算成本较高的操作分解为内存内核来执行的，这些内核可以使用非易失性内存有效地执行。 MAGIC 等逻辑类型要求每个输出存储单元在执行功能逻辑操作之前准备好进行评估。最先进的合成算法会在存储单元失效后立即执行准备工作。不幸的是，这导致单元列被贪婪地准备，而不是利用有效的并行数据准备指令。在本文中，我们提出了 PREP 框架，该框架使用执行序列优化来最大化并行列准备的机会。该框架的关键思想是推迟数据准备指令，直到没有可用的准备单元。接下来，并行准备累积的存储器单元以释放存储器以进行功能评估。该框架能够探索区域性能解决方案的前沿。 PREP 框架使用 SuiteSparse 库中的 15 个基准进行评估。与最先进的综合工具相比，能耗和延迟分别降低了 27% 和 25%，并且没有额外的交叉存储器成本。

papers.title: Explainable Fuzzy Neural Network with Multi-Fidelity Reinforcement Learning for Micro-Architecture Design Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: With the continuous advancement of processors, modern micro-architecture designs have become increasingly complex. The vast design space presents significant challenges for human designers, making design space exploration (DSE) algorithms a significant tool for μ-arch design. In recent years, efforts have been made in the development of DSE algorithms, and promising results have been achieved. However, the existing DSE algorithms, e.g., Bayesian Optimization and ensemble learning, suffer from poor interpretability, hindering designers' understanding of the decision-making process. To address this limitation, we propose utilizing Fuzzy Neural Networks to induce and summarize knowledge and insights from the DSE process, enhancing interpretability and controllability. Furthermore, to improve efficiency, we introduce a multi-fidelity reinforcement learning approach, which primarily conducts exploration using cheap but less precise data, thereby substantially diminishing the reliance on costly data. Experimental results show that our method achieves excellent results with a very limited sample budget and successfully surpasses the current state-of-the-art. Our DSE framework is open-sourced and available at https://github.com/fanhanwei/FNN_MFRL_ArchDSE/.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着处理器的不断进步，现代微架构设计变得越来越复杂。巨大的设计空间给人类设计师带来了巨大的挑战，使得设计空间探索（DSE）算法成为μ-arch设计的重要工具。近年来，人们在DSE算法的发展方面做出了努力，并取得了可喜的成果。然而，现有的DSE算法，例如贝叶斯优化和集成学习，可解释性较差，阻碍了设计者对决策过程的理解。为了解决这一限制，我们建议利用模糊神经网络来归纳和总结 DSE 过程中的知识和见解，从而增强可解释性和可控性。此外，为了提高效率，我们引入了多保真强化学习方法，该方法主要使用廉价但不太精确的数据进行探索，从而大大减少对昂贵数据的依赖。实验结果表明，我们的方法在非常有限的样本预算下取得了优异的结果，并成功超越了当前的最先进技术。我们的 DSE 框架是开源的，可从 https://github.com/fanhanwei/FNN_MFRL_ArchDSE/ 获取。

papers.title: Fake Node-Based Perception Poisoning Attacks against Federated Object Detection Learning in Mobile Computing Networks.
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) supports massive edge devices to collaboratively train object detection models in mobile computing scenarios. However, the distributed nature of FL exposes significant security vulnerabilities. Existing attack methods either require considerable costs to compromise the majority of participants, or suffer from poor attack success rates. Inspired by this, we devise an efficient fake node-based perception poisoning attacks strategy (FNPPA) to target such weaknesses. In particular, FNPPA poisons local data and injects multiple fake nodes to participate in aggregation, aiming to make the local poisoning model more likely to overwrite clean updates. Moreover, it can achieve greater malicious influence on target objects at a lower cost without affecting the normal detection of other objects. We demonstrate through exhaustive experiments that FNPPA exhibits superior attack impact than the state-of-the-art in terms of average precision and aggregation effect.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）支持海量边缘设备在移动计算场景中协作训练对象检测模型。然而，FL 的分布式特性暴露了重大的安全漏洞。现有的攻击方法要么需要相当大的成本才能危害大多数参与者，要么攻击成功率很低。受此启发，我们设计了一种高效的基于假节点的感知中毒攻击策略（FNPPA）来针对此类弱点。特别是，FNPPA对本地数据进行投毒，并注入多个假节点参与聚合，旨在使本地投毒模型更有可能覆盖干净的更新。而且，可以在不影响其他对象正常检测的情况下，以较低的成本实现对目标对象更大的恶意影响。我们通过详尽的实验证明，FNPPA 在平均精度和聚合效果方面表现出优于最先进技术的攻击影响。

papers.title: Fast Virtual Gate Extraction For Silicon Quantum Dot Devices.
papers.abstract: Silicon quantum dot devices stand as promising candidates for large scale quantum computing due to their extended coherence times compact size, and recent experimental demonstrations of sizable qubit arrays. Despite the great potential, controlling these arrays remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces a new virtual gate extraction method to quickly establish orthogonal control on the potentials for individual quantum dots. Leveraging insights from the device physics, the proposed approach significantly re duces the experimental overhead by focusing on crucial regions around charge state transition. Furthermore, by employing an efficient voltage sweeping method, we can efficiently pinpoint these charge state transition lines and filter out erroneous points. Exper imental evaluation using real quantum dot chip datasets demon strates a substantial 5.84× to 19.34× speedup over conventional methods, thereby showcasing promising prospects for accelerating the scaling of silicon spin qubit devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 硅量子点器件因其延长的相干时间、紧凑的尺寸以及最近的大型量子位阵列的实验演示而成为大规模量子计算的有希望的候选者。尽管潜力巨大，但控制这些阵列仍然是一项重大挑战。本文介绍了一种新的虚拟门提取方法，可以快速建立对单个量子点电势的正交控制。利用器件物理的见解，所提出的方法通过关注电荷状态转变周围的关键区域，显着减少了实验开销。此外，通过采用有效的电压扫描方法，我们可以有效地查明这些电荷状态转换线并滤除错误点。使用真实量子点芯片数据集进行的实验评估表明，与传统方法相比，速度大幅提高了 5.84 倍至 19.34 倍，从而展示了加速硅自旋量子位器件扩展的广阔前景。

papers.title: FastQuery: Communication-efficient Embedding Table Query for Private LLMs inference.
papers.abstract: With the fast evolution of large language models (LLMs), privacy concerns with user queries arise as they may contain sensitive information. Private inference based on homomorphic encryption (HE) has been proposed to protect user query privacy. However, private embedding table query has to be formulated as a HE-based matrix-vector multiplication problem and suffers from enormous computation and communication overhead. We observe the overhead mainly comes from the neglect of 1) the one-hot nature of user queries and 2) the robustness of the embedding table to low bit-width quantization noise. Hence, in this paper, we propose a private embedding table query optimization framework, dubbed FastQuery. FastQuery features a communication-aware embedding table quantization algorithm and a one-hot-aware dense packing algorithm to simultaneously reduce both the computation and communication costs. Compared to prior-art HE-based frameworks, e.g., Cheetah, Iron, and Bumblebee, FastQuery achieves more than 4.3×, 2.7×, 1.3× latency reduction, respectively and more than 75.7×, 60.2×, 20.2× communication reduction, respectively, on both LLAMA-7B and LLAMA-30B.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，用户查询的隐私问题出现了，因为它们可能包含敏感信息。提出了基于同态加密（HE）的私有推理来保护用户查询隐私。然而，私有嵌入表查询必须被表述为基于 HE 的矩阵向量乘法问题，并且会遭受巨大的计算和通信开销。我们观察到开销主要来自于忽视 1）用户查询的独热性质和 2）嵌入表对低位宽量化噪声的鲁棒性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种私有嵌入表查询优化框架，称为 FastQuery。 FastQuery 具有通信感知嵌入表量化算法和单热感知密集打包算法，可同时降低计算和通信成本。与现有的基于 HE 的框架（例如 Cheetah、Iron 和 Bumblebee）相比，FastQuery 在 LLAMA-7B 和 LLAMA-30B 上分别实现了超过 4.3×、2.7×、1.3× 的延迟减少和超过 75.7×、60.2×、20.2× 的通信减少。

papers.title: FCM: A Fusion-aware Wire Cutting Approach for Measurement-based Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract:
Measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC) is a promising quantum computing paradigm that carries out computation through one-way measurements on entangled photon qubits. Practical photonic hardware first generates a 2D mesh of resource states with each being a small number of entangled photon qubits and then exploits fusion operations to connect resource states to scale up the computation. Given that the fusion operation is highly error-prone, it is important to reduce the number of fusions for an MBQC circuit.

In this paper, we propose FCM, a fusion-aware scheme that exploits wire cutting to improve the fidelity of MBQC. By cutting a large MBQC circuit into several smaller subcircuits, FCM effectively reduces the number of fusions in each subcircuit and thus improves the computation fidelity. Given circuit cutting requires classical post-processing to combine the results of subcircuits, FCM strives to achieve the best cutting strategy under different settings. Evaluation of representative benchmarks demonstrates that, when cutting a large circuit to two subcircuits, FCM reduces the maximum number of fusions of all subcircuits by 59.6% on average (up to 69.1%).
papers.abstract_zh:
基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）是一种有前途的量子计算范式，它通过对纠缠光子量子位的单向测量来进行计算。实用的光子硬件首先生成资源状态的二维网格，每个资源状态都是少量纠缠光子量子位，然后利用融合操作连接资源状态以扩大计算规模。鉴于融合操作非常容易出错，因此减少 MBQC 电路的融合次数非常重要。

在本文中，我们提出了 FCM，一种融合感知方案，利用线切割来提高 MBQC 的保真度。 FCM通过将大型MBQC电路切割成多个较小的子电路，有效地减少了每个子电路中的融合次数，从而提高了计算保真度。鉴于电路切割需要经典的后处理来结合子电路的结果，FCM 力求在不同设置下实现最佳切割策略。对代表性基准的评估表明，当将一个大电路切割为两个子电路时，FCM 使所有子电路的最大融合数量平均减少 59.6%（最高可达 69.1%）。

papers.title: FDCA: Fine-grained Digital-CIM based CNN Accelerator with Hybrid Quantization and Weight-Stationary Dataflow.
papers.abstract: Digital-Compute-in-memory (DCIM) has demonstrated significant energy and area efficiency in convolutional neural network (CNN) accelerators, particularly for high precision applications. However, to mitigate parasitic effects on word and bit lines, most DCIMs employ fine-grained multiply-accumulate operations, which introduces new challenges and opportunities but has not been widely explored. This paper proposes FDCA: a fine-grained digital-CIM based CNN accelerator with hybrid quantization and weight-stationary dataflow, in which the key contributions are :1) a hybrid quantization approach for CNNs leveraging hessian trace and approximation is utilized. This method incorporates the ratio of computation time and storage time into quantization, achieving high efficiency while maintaining accuracy; 2) a Cartesian Genetic Programming based approximate shift and accumulate with error compensation is proposed, where an approximate adder tree is generated to compensate for errors introduced by DCIM; 3) an optimized weight-stationary dataflow is used to improve the utilization of CIM and eliminate dataflow stalls. The experimental results demonstrate that under 28-nm process, when running VGG16 and ResNet50 on CIFAR100, the proposed FDCA achieves 17.1TOPS/W and 18.79TOPS/W with only a slight decrease in accuracy by 0.71% and 0.98%, respectively. Compared to previous works, this work achieves 1.76× and 1.28× better in energy efficiency with less accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存数字计算 (DCIM) 在卷积神经网络 (CNN) 加速器中展示了显着的能量和面积效率，特别是对于高精度应用。然而，为了减轻字线和位线的寄生效应，大多数 DCIM 采用细粒度乘法累加运算，这带来了新的挑战和机遇，但尚未得到广泛探索。本文提出了 FDCA：一种基于细粒度数字 CIM 的 CNN 加速器，具有混合量化和权重平稳数据流，其中的主要贡献是：1）利用了利用 Hessian 迹和近似的 CNN 混合量化方法。该方法将计算时间与存储时间的比例纳入量化，在保持精度的同时实现了高效率； 2）提出了一种基于笛卡尔遗传规划的带有误差补偿的近似移位和累加，其中生成近似加法器树以补偿DCIM引入的误差； 3）采用优化的重量平稳数据流来提高CIM的利用率并消除数据流停顿。实验结果表明，在28 nm工艺下，当在CIFAR100上运行VGG16和ResNet50时，所提出的FDCA达到了17.1TOPS/W和18.79TOPS/W，精度仅略有下降，分别分别为0.71%和0.98%。与之前的工作相比，这项工作在能源效率上提高了 1.76 倍和 1.28 倍，同时精度损失也更少。

papers.title: FeBiM: Efficient and Compact Bayesian Inference Engine Empowered with Ferroelectric In-Memory Computing.
papers.abstract: In scenarios with limited training data or where explainability is crucial, conventional neural network-based machine learning models often face challenges. In contrast, Bayesian inference-based algorithms excel in providing interpretable predictions and reliable uncertainty estimation in these scenarios. While many state-of-the-art in-memory computing (IMC) architectures leverage emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies to offer unparalleled computing capacity and energy efficiency for neural network workloads, their application in Bayesian inference is limited. This is because the core operations in Bayesian inference, i.e., cumulative multiplications of prior and likelihood probabilities, differ significantly from the multiplication-accumulation (MAC) operations common in neural networks, rendering them generally unsuitable for direct implementation in most existing IMC designs. In this paper, we propose FeBiM, an efficient and compact Bayesian inference engine powered by multi-bit ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET)-based IMC. FeBiM effectively encodes the trained probabilities of a Bayesian inference model within a compact FeFET-based crossbar. It maps quantized logarithmic probabilities to discrete FeFET states. As a result, the accumulated outputs of the crossbar naturally represent the posterior probabilities, i.e., the Bayesian inference model's output given a set of observations. This approach enables efficient in-memory Bayesian inference without the need for additional calculation circuitry. As the first FeFET-based in-memory Bayesian inference engine, FeBiM achieves an impressive storage density of 26.32 Mb/mm 2 and a computing efficiency of 581.40 TOPS/W in a representative Bayesian classification task. These results demonstrate 10.7×/43.4× improvement in compactness/efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art hardware implementation of Bayesian inference.
papers.abstract_zh: In scenarios with limited training data or where explainability is crucial, conventional neural network-based machine learning models often face challenges. In contrast, Bayesian inference-based algorithms excel in providing interpretable predictions and reliable uncertainty estimation in these scenarios. While many state-of-the-art in-memory computing (IMC) architectures leverage emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies to offer unparalleled computing capacity and energy efficiency for neural network workloads, their application in Bayesian inference is limited. This is because the core operations in Bayesian inference, i.e., cumulative multiplications of prior and likelihood probabilities, differ significantly from the multiplication-accumulation (MAC) operations common in neural networks, rendering them generally unsuitable for direct implementation in most existing IMC designs. In this paper, we propose FeBiM, an efficient and compact Bayesian inference engine powered by multi-bit ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET)-based IMC. FeBiM 在基于 FeFET 的紧凑型交叉开关中有效地编码贝叶斯推理模型的训练概率。它将量化对数概率映射到离散 FeFET 状态。 As a result, the accumulated outputs of the crossbar naturally represent the posterior probabilities, i.e., the Bayesian inference model's output given a set of observations.这种方法可以实现高效的内存中贝叶斯推理，而无需额外的计算电路。 As the first FeFET-based in-memory Bayesian inference engine, FeBiM achieves an impressive storage density of 26.32 Mb/mm 2 and a computing efficiency of 581.40 TOPS/W in a representative Bayesian classification task. These results demonstrate 10.7×/43.4× improvement in compactness/efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art hardware implementation of Bayesian inference.

papers.title: FHE-CGRA: Enable Efficient Acceleration of Fully Homomorphic Encryption on CGRAs.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is an attractive privacy-preserving technique that allows computation directly on encrypted data without decryption. However, it incurs significant performance and memory costs due to intensive computations. In this work, we investigate the execution of FHE-enabled machine learning (ML) applications. We show that the runtime hardware reconfigurability of the underlying execution units of homomorphic operations is highly desirable for efficient hardware resource utilization during FHE-ML execution, due to the changing FHE encryption variants across different ML stages (e.g., the multiplicative level of the ciphertext) and corresponding optimal execution unit design. Based on the observation, we propose FHE-CGRA, a coarse-grained re-configurable architecture (CGRA) acceleration framework with an MLIR-based compiler toolchain for end-to-end homomorphic applications. The experiment shows that FHE-CGRA achieves up-to 8.15× speedup against a conventional CGRA baseline for accelerating the inference of FHE-encrypted convolution neural network (FHE-CNN) models, and up-to 16.48× power efficiency w.r.t. the state-of-the-art FPGA-based FHE-CNN accelerator design.
papers.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密（FHE）是一种有吸引力的隐私保护技术，允许直接对加密数据进行计算而无需解密。然而，由于密集的计算，它会产生显着的性能和内存成本。在这项工作中，我们研究了支持 FHE 的机器学习 (ML) 应用程序的执行情况。我们表明，由于不同 ML 阶段之间不断变化的 FHE 加密变体（例如密文的乘法级别）和相应的最佳执行单元设计，同态操作的底层执行单元的运行时硬件可重构性对于 FHE-ML 执行期间高效硬件资源利用是非常理想的。根据观察，我们提出了 FHE-CGRA，这是一种粗粒度可重配置架构 (CGRA) 加速框架，具有基于 MLIR 的编译器工具链，用于端到端同态应用程序。实验表明，与传统 CGRA 基线相比，FHE-CGRA 可实现高达 8.15 倍的加速，以加速 FHE 加密卷积神经网络 (FHE-CNN) 模型的推理，并且功率效率高达 16.48 倍。最先进的基于 FPGA 的 FHE-CNN 加速器设计。

papers.title: Finding Bugs in RTL Descriptions: High-Level Synthesis to the Rescue.
papers.abstract:
Most Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs originate from behavioral descriptions specified in C or C++ often written by Software (SW) designers. Hardware (HW) designers then manually describe an efficient hardware implementation of that application using a Hardware Description Language (HDL) like Verilog or VHDL. Although it has been shown that High-Level Synthesis (HLS) provides a direct path to synthesizing these behavioral descriptions into RTL, the quality of the generated RTL is often still unacceptable, hence, requiring to manually design the HW. This is nevertheless time consuming and error prone. In particular, finding bugs introduced in the manual design is very tedious as HW designers rely on long simulations that generate large waveforms that have to be thoroughly scrutinized.

To address this, in this work we present an automated method to accurately point to where in an RTL description a bug is located by using HLS. In particular we leverage the ability of HLS to generate a variety of different micro-architectures to automatically find a design architecturally 'similar' to the manually optimized one in order to help locate the bugs. This also involves automatically updating the HLS technology library in order to match the delay from floating-point functional units (FUs) such that these match the equivalent integer functional units used in the manually optimized RTL design as one of the main optimization that can lead to numerical stability issues in the manual translation is floating-point to fixed-point data translation.
papers.abstract_zh:
大多数寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计源自通常由软件 (SW) 设计人员编写的 C 或 C++ 中指定的行为描述。然后，硬件 (HW) 设计人员使用 Verilog 或 VHDL 等硬件描述语言 (HDL) 手动描述该应用程序的高效硬件实现。尽管已经证明高级综合（HLS）提供了将这些行为描述综合到 RTL 中的直接途径，但生成的 RTL 的质量通常仍然不可接受，因此需要手动设计 HW。然而，这既耗时又容易出错。特别是，查找手动设计中引入的错误非常繁琐，因为硬件设计人员依赖于长时间的仿真，生成必须彻底检查的大型波形。

为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自动化方法，通过使用 HLS 准确指出 RTL 描述中错误所在的位置。特别是，我们利用 HLS 生成各种不同微架构的能力，自动找到与手动优化的架构“相似”的设计，以帮助定位错误。这还涉及自动更新 HLS 技术库，以匹配浮点功能单元 (FU) 的延迟，以便这些功能单元与手动优化的 RTL 设计中使用的等效整数功能单元相匹配，因为在手动转换中可能导致数值稳定性问题的主要优化之一是浮点到定点数据转换。

papers.title: FinerDedup: Sifting Fingerprints for Efficient Data Deduplication on Mobile Devices.
papers.abstract: Data deduplication is promised to extend the lifetime and capacity of storage on mobile devices. However, existing data deduplication works show high memory consumption and indexing costs for maintaining a fingerprint for each data block, especially when the duplicate ratio of data blocks on mobile systems is about 10% to 30%. In this paper, we propose a novel approach called FinerDedup to optimize the memory costs and retrieval efficiency of data deduplication. FinerDedup drastically reduces the number of fingerprints by screening out the duplicate data blocks via random forest and Bloom filter. We implement FinerDedup on real mobile devices with Android 10 and evaluate it with real workloads. Extensive experimental results show that FinerDedup can reduce 85% of fingerprints and 20% of I/O latency over the widely-used DmDedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除有望延长移动设备存储的寿命和容量。然而，现有的重复数据删除工作在维护每个数据块的指纹时表现出较高的内存消耗和索引成本，特别是当移动系统上的数据块的重复率约为10%至30%时。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 FinerDedup 的新颖方法来优化重复数据删除的内存成本和检索效率。 FinerDedup 通过随机森林和布隆过滤器筛选出重复的数据块，大大减少了指纹的数量。我们在搭载 Android 10 的真实移动设备上实施 FinerDedup，并使用真实工作负载对其进行评估。大量实验结果表明，与广泛使用的 DmDedup 相比，FinerDedup 可以减少 85% 的指纹和 20% 的 I/O 延迟。

papers.title: FLAME: Fully Leveraging MoE Sparsity for Transformer on FPGA.
papers.abstract: MoE (Mixture-of-Experts) mechanism has been widely adopted in transformer-based models to facilitate further expansion of model parameter size and enhance generalization capabilities. However, the practical deployment of MoE mechanism for transformer on resource-constrained platforms, such as FPGA, remains challenging due to heavy memory footprints and impractical runtime costs introduced by the MoE mechanism. Diving into the MoE mechanism, we raise two key observations: (1) Expert weights are heavy but cold, making it ideal to leverage expert weight sparsity. (2) There exists highly skewed expert activation paths for MoE layers in transformer-based models, making it feasible to conduct expert prediction and prefetching. Motivated by these two observations, we propose FLAME, the first algorithm-hardware co-optimized MoE accelerating framework designed to fully leverage MoE sparsity for efficient transformer deployment on FPGA. First, to leverage expert weight sparsity, we integrate an N:M pruning algorithm, allowing for the pruning of expert weights without significantly compromising model accuracy. Second, to settle expert activation sparsity, we propose a circular expert prediction (CEPR) strategy. CEPR prefetches expert weights from external storage to on-chip cache before the activated expert index is determined. Last, we co-optimize both MoE sparsity through the introduction of an efficient pruning-aware expert buffering (PA-BUF) mechanism. Experimental results demonstrate that FLAME achieves 84.4% accuracy of expert prediction with merely two expert caches on-chip. In comparison with CPU and GPU, FLAME achieves 4.12× and 1.49× speedup, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: MoE（Mixture-of-Experts）机制已广泛应用于基于 Transformer 的模型中，以方便进一步扩展模型参数大小并增强泛化能力。然而，由于 MoE 机制带来的大量内存占用和不切实际的运行时成本，在资源受限的平台（例如 FPGA）上实际部署 Transformer 的 MoE 机制仍然具有挑战性。深入研究 MoE 机制，我们提出两个关键观察结果：（1）专家权重很重但很冷，因此非常适合利用专家权重稀疏性。 (2)基于Transformer的模型中MoE层存在高度倾斜的专家激活路径，使得进行专家预测和预取变得可行。受这两个观察的启发，我们提出了 FLAME，这是第一个算法-硬件协同优化的 MoE 加速框架，旨在充分利用 MoE 稀疏性在 FPGA 上高效部署变压器。首先，为了利用专家权重的稀疏性，我们集成了 N:M 修剪算法，允许在不显着影响模型准确性的情况下修剪专家权重。其次，为了解决专家激活稀疏性，我们提出了循环专家预测（CEPR）策略。在确定激活的专家索引之前，CEPR 将专家权重从外部存储器预取到片上缓存。最后，我们通过引入高效的剪枝感知专家缓冲（PA-BUF）机制来共同优化 MoE 稀疏性。实验结果表明，FLAME 仅用片上两个专家缓存即可实现 84.4% 的专家预测准确率。与CPU和GPU相比，FLAME分别实现了4.12倍和1.49倍的加速。

papers.title: FNM-Trans: Efficient FPGA-based Transformer Architecture with Full N: M Sparsity.
papers.abstract: Transformer models have become popular in various AI applications due to their exceptional performance. However, their impressive performance comes with significant computing and memory costs, hindering efficient deployment of Transformer-based applications. Many solutions focus on leveraging sparsity in weight matrix and attention computation. However, previous studies fail to exploit unified sparse pattern to accelerate all three modules of Transformer (QKV generation, attention computation and FFN). In this paper, we propose FNM-Trans , an adaptable and efficient algorithm-hardware co-design aimed at optimizing all three modules of the Transformer by fully harnessing N : M sparsity. At the algorithm level, we fully explore the interplay of dynamic pruning with static pruning under high N : M sparsity. At the hardware level, we develop a dedicated hardware architecture featuring a custom computing engine and a softmax module, tailored to support varying levels of N : M sparsity. Experiment results show that, our algorithm optimizes accuracy by 11.03% under 2:16 attention sparsity and 4:16 weight sparsity, compared to other methods. Additionally, FNM-Trans achieves speedups of 27.13× and 21.24× over Intel i9-9900X and NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti, respectively, and outpaces current FPGA-based Transformers by 1.88× to 36.51×.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型因其卓越的性能而在各种人工智能应用中广受欢迎。然而，它们令人印象深刻的性能伴随着巨大的计算和内存成本，阻碍了基于 Transformer 的应用程序的高效部署。许多解决方案侧重于利用权重矩阵和注意力计算中的稀疏性。然而，之前的研究未能利用统一的稀疏模式来加速 Transformer 的所有三个模块（QKV 生成、注意力计算和 FFN）。在本文中，我们提出了 FNM-Trans，这是一种适应性强且高效的算法硬件协同设计，旨在通过充分利用 N:M 稀疏性来优化 Transformer 的所有三个模块。在算法层面，我们充分探索了高N:M稀疏度下动态剪枝与静态剪枝的相互作用。在硬件层面，我们开发了一个专用的硬件架构，具有定制计算引擎和 softmax 模块，专为支持不同级别的 N:M 稀疏度而定制。实验结果表明，与其他方法相比，我们的算法在 2:16 注意力稀疏度和 4:16 权重稀疏度下，准确率优化了 11.03%。此外，FNM-Trans 比 Intel i9-9900X 和 NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti 分别实现了 27.13 倍和 21.24 倍的加速，并且比当前基于 FPGA 的 Transformer 快了 1.88 倍到 36.51 倍。

papers.title: Formally Verifying Arithmetic Chisel Designs for All Bit Widths at Once.
papers.abstract: Chisel is an open-source hardware description language embedded in Scala to facilitate parameterized and reusable digital circuit design. Chisel is becoming increasingly popular and has been used to design RISC-V CPUs, e.g. RocketChip and XiangShan. While Chisel features high-level hardware designs, its verification is still low-level: Low-level (e.g. Verilog) programs are first generated from Chisel programs, then the verification tools are applied to these low-level programs. In this work, we focus on formal verification of arithmetic units. Efficient low-level formal verification of arithmetic units has always been a challenge and remains an active research area, attributed to the state explosion problem brought on by bit widths. To circumvent this problem for arithmetic Chisel designs, we propose an approach to their high-level formal verification so that their correctness is verified for all bit widths at once, instead of for each bit width separately. The key idea is to transform arithmetic Chisel designs into Scala software programs that simulate their behaviors, where the high-level features are preserved, then resort to Stainless, a deductive formal verification tool for Scala. We validate the effectiveness of this approach by formally verifying the correctness of dividers and multipliers in two representative open source RISC-V processors, namely, RocketChip and XiangShan. Compared to the existing proof-assistant-based parameterized verification approaches for arithmetic designs (e.g. Kami), the verification cost in our approach is much lower on average.
papers.abstract_zh: Chisel是一种嵌入Scala的开源硬件描述语言，用于促进参数化和可重用的数字电路设计。 Chisel 变得越来越流行，并已用于设计 RISC-V CPU，例如RocketChip和象山。虽然Chisel具有高级硬件设计的特点，但其验证仍然是低级的：首先从Chisel程序生成低级（例如Verilog）程序，然后将验证工具应用于这些低级程序。在这项工作中，我们重点关注算术单元的形式验证。由于位宽带来的状态爆炸问题，算术单元的高效低级形式验证一直是一个挑战，并且仍然是一个活跃的研究领域。为了避免算术 Chisel 设计的这个问题，我们提出了一种高级形式验证方法，以便同时验证所有位宽度的正确性，而不是分别验证每个位宽度。关键思想是将算术 Chisel 设计转换为模拟其行为的 Scala 软件程序，其中保留高级功能，然后诉诸不锈钢，这是一种 Scala 的演绎形式验证工具。我们通过正式验证两个具有代表性的开源 RISC-V 处理器 RocketChip 和香山中除法器和乘法器的正确性来验证该方法的有效性。与现有的基于辅助证明的算术设计参数化验证方法（例如 Kami）相比，我们方法的验证成本平均要低得多。

papers.title: FQP: A Fibonacci Quantization Processor with Multiplication-Free Computing and Topological-Order Routing.
papers.abstract:
With the continuous advancement of artificial intelligence, neural networks exhibit an escalating parameter size, demanding increased computational power and excessive memory access. Low bit-width quantization emerges as a viable solution to address this challenge. However, conventional low bit-width uniform quantization suffers from a mismatch with the weight and activation data distribution in neural networks, resulting in accuracy degradation.

We propose Fibonacci Quantization, which matches the distribution of weights and activations by using Fibonacci numbers. It achieves negligible accuracy loss for ResNet50 on ImageNet1k with both activations and weights quantized to 4-bit. Based on the Fibonacci Quantization, we present the Fibonacci Quantization Processor. It comprises two types of multiplication-free computing units: the Dualistic-Transformation Adder (DTA) and the Bit-Exclusive Adder (BEA), both capable of transforming the multiplication of Fibonacci numbers into simple addition. In addition, to effectively map multiplications of small and large Fibonacci numbers onto BEA and DTA, we propose Topological-Order Routing (TOR) that routes data either to the previous or current position. Our 4-bit Fibonacci quantization achieves a 0.98% higher accuracy compared with 4-bit uniform quantization for ResNet50 on ImageNet1k. For equivalent accuracy, our proposed processor outperforms uniform quantization with 2.17× higher energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着人工智能的不断进步，神经网络的参数大小不断增加，需要更高的计算能力和过多的内存访问。低位宽量化成为应对这一挑战的可行解决方案。然而，传统的低位宽均匀量化与神经网络中的权重和激活数据分布不匹配，导致精度下降。

我们提出斐波那契量化，它通过使用斐波那契数来匹配权重和激活的分布。它在 ImageNet1k 上实现了可忽略不计的 ResNet50 精度损失，同时将激活和权重量化为 4 位。基于斐波那契量化，我们提出了斐波那契量化处理器。它包括两种类型的无乘法计算单元：二元变换加法器（DTA）和位独占加法器（BEA），两者都能够将斐波那契数的乘法转换为简单的加法。此外，为了有效地将小斐波那契数和大斐波那契数的乘法映射到 BEA 和 DTA 上，我们提出了拓扑顺序路由 (TOR)，将数据路由到先前或当前位置。与 ImageNet1k 上 ResNet50 的 4 位均匀量化相比，我们的 4 位斐波那契量化精度提高了 0.98%。对于同等精度，我们提出的处理器的性能优于均匀量化，能源效率高出 2.17 倍。

papers.title: Fracturing-aware Curvilinear ILT via Circular E-beam Mask Writer.
papers.abstract: Inverse lithography technology (ILT) plays a crucial role in optical proximity correction, tending to generate curvilinear masks for optimal process windows. Traditional curvilinear mask manufacturing involves fracturing into rectangles, requiring expensive mask write times. A novel E-beam mask writer that writes variable radius circles per shot significantly reduces the shot count for curvilinear masks. To exploit this mask writer's benefits, we present two methods to generate circular fracturing-aware masks. The first one converts pixel-based masks from existing ILT methods into circle-based masks using predefined rules. The second one integrates circular constraints into the ILT process, generating circle-based masks directly via optimization. Extensive experimental results validate both approaches' effectiveness.
papers.abstract_zh: 逆光刻技术 (ILT) 在光学邻近校正中发挥着至关重要的作用，倾向于生成曲线掩模以实现最佳工艺窗口。传统的曲线掩模制造涉及分裂成矩形，需要昂贵的掩模写入时间。一种新颖的电子束掩模写入器，每次射击写入可变半径圆，显着减少了曲线掩模的射击次数。为了利用该掩模编写器的优势，我们提出了两种生成圆形断裂感知掩模的方法。第一个使用预定义规则将基于像素的掩模从现有 ILT 方法转换为基于圆的掩模。第二个将圆形约束集成到 ILT 过程中，通过优化直接生成基于圆形的掩模。大量的实验结果验证了这两种方法的有效性。

papers.title: FRM-CIM: Full-Digital Recursive MAC Computing in Memory System Based on MRAM for Neural Network Applications.
papers.abstract: Computing in memory (CIM) realizes energy-efficient neural network algorithms by implementing highly parallel multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operation. However, the MAC delay of CIM will sharply increase with the improvement of computing precision, which restricts its development. In this work, we propose a full-digital recursive MAC (FRM) operation based on spin-transfer-torque magnetic random access memory (STT-MRAM) CIM system to enable fast and energy-efficient image recognition application. First, the fast FRM scheme is proposed by utilizing the recursive operations of read and addition in segmented bit-line array, which effectively reduces the delay of MAC operations to 3.5ns and 4ns for 8-bit and 16-bit input and weight precision, respectively. Second, we design an image recognition system using FRM-CIM architecture as the processing element (PE), where the adaptive pruning method for layers is proposed to improve the compatibility of it with the neural network. By performing image recognition for the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, results show that the throughput and energy efficiency of the FRM-CIM system are 58.51TOPS/mm 2 and 11.3--56.72 TOPS/W under 8--16-bit precision, which are improved by 4.3 times and 2.6 times compared with the state-of-the-art works. Finally, the recognition accuracy can reach 96.65% and 82.7% on MNIST and CIFAR-10, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算（CIM）通过实现高度并行的乘法累加（MAC）运算来实现节能的神经网络算法。然而，CIM的MAC延迟会随着计算精度的提高而急剧增加，制约了其发展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自旋转移矩磁性随机存取存储器（STT-MRAM）CIM系统的全数字递归MAC（FRM）操作，以实现快速且节能的图像识别应用。首先，利用分段位线阵列中的读取和加法递归操作，提出了快速FRM方案，对于8位和16位输入和权重精度，该方案有效地将MAC操作的延迟分别降低到3.5ns和4ns。其次，我们设计了一个使用FRM-CIM架构作为处理元件（PE）的图像识别系统，其中提出了层的自适应剪枝方法以提高其与神经网络的兼容性。通过对MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集进行图像识别，结果表明，FRM-CIM系统在8--16位精度下的吞吐量和能效分别为58.51TOPS/mm 2 和11.3--56.72 TOPS/W，与现有技术相比分别提高了4.3倍和2.6倍。最终，在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上识别准确率分别达到 96.65% 和 82.7%。

papers.title: Fused Sampling and Grouping with Search Space Reduction for Efficient Point Cloud Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Recently, point-based deep neural networks (DNN) have demonstrated remarkable ability in analyzing point cloud data. However, challenges arise in sampling and grouping layers, particularly in terms of time and energy consumption due to the iterative access and computation of point cloud data for local feature extraction. In this paper, we introduce a Morton code-based data structure which stores point data with the shared upper bits together, enabling sequential access to the points within a specific voxel. We also propose a fused sampling and grouping approach with a reduced search space, which reuses the point data and the calculated distances for the farthest voxel and its neighbors. Additionally, a dedicated hardware architecture is introduced to maximize the efficiency of the proposed optimization technique. Experimental results show that our approach effectively reduces the number of distance calculations and data accesses with negligible accuracy loss, without requiring retraining of the network model.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，基于点的深度神经网络（DNN）在分析点云数据方面表现出了卓越的能力。然而，在采样和分组层中出现了挑战，特别是由于用于局部特征提取的点云数据的迭代访问和计算而导致的时间和能耗方面的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于莫顿代码的数据结构，它将点数据与共享的高位存储在一起，从而能够顺序访问特定体素内的点。我们还提出了一种减少搜索空间的融合采样和分组方法，该方法重用点数据和最远体素及其邻居的计算距离。此外，还引入了专用硬件架构，以最大限度地提高所提出的优化技术的效率。实验结果表明，我们的方法有效地减少了距离计算和数据访问的次数，并且精度损失可以忽略不计，并且不需要重新训练网络模型。

papers.title: G-kway: Multilevel GPU-Accelerated k-way Graph Partitioner.
papers.abstract: Graph partitioning is important for the design of many CAD algorithms. However, as the graph size continues to grow, graph partitioning becomes increasingly time-consuming. To overcome these challenges, we propose G-kway, an efficient multilevel GPU-accelerated k -way graph partitioner. G-kway introduces an effective union find-based coarsening and a novel independent set-based refinement algorithm to significantly accelerate both the coarsening and uncoarsening stages. Experimental results have shown that G-kway outperforms both the state-of-the-art CPU-based and GPU-based parallel partitioners with an average speedup of 8.6× and 3.8×, respectively, while achieving comparable partitioning quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 图划分对于许多 CAD 算法的设计非常重要。然而，随着图大小的不断增长，图分区变得越来越耗时。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 G-kway，一种高效的多级 GPU 加速 k 路图分区器。 G-kway 引入了一种有效的基于联合查找的粗化和一种新颖的基于独立集的细化算法，以显着加速粗化和非粗化阶段。实验结果表明，G-kway 的性能优于最先进的基于 CPU 和基于 GPU 的并行分区器，平均加速分别为 8.6 倍和 3.8 倍，同时实现了相当的分区质量。

papers.title: G-PASTA: GPU-Accelerated Partitioning Algorithm for Static Timing Analysis.
papers.abstract: Recent static timing analysis (STA) engines have leveraged task dependency graph (TDG) parallelism to accelerate various STA algorithms, including graph-based analysis and path-based analysis. Despite the promising speedup via task parallelism, the scheduling cost of a TDG has become dominant when handling large TDGs. To overcome this challenge, we propose G-PASTA, a simple and fast TDG partitioning algorithm to reduce the scheduling cost of large task-parallel STA algorithms. By harnessing the power of GPU computing, G-PASTA incurs minimal cost of partitioning while bringing significant runtime improvement to task-parallel STA algorithms. Compared to a state-of-the-art CPU-based TDG partitioner, G-PASTA is up to 41.8× faster in partitioning runtime and can improve the overall STA performance by 43% on large designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的静态时序分析 (STA) 引擎利用任务依赖图 (TDG) 并行性来加速各种 STA 算法，包括基于图的分析和基于路径的分析。尽管通过任务并行性有望实现加速，但在处理大型 TDG 时，TDG 的调度成本已成为主导。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 G-PASTA，一种简单快速的 TDG 划分算法，以降低大型任务并行 STA 算法的调度成本。通过利用 GPU 计算的能力，G-PASTA 可以将分区成本降至最低，同时为任务并行 STA 算法带来显着的运行时改进。与最先进的基于 CPU 的 TDG 分区器相比，G-PASTA 的分区运行时间速度提高了 41.8 倍，并且可以将大型设计的整体 STA 性能提高 43%。

papers.title: G2PM: Performance Modeling for ACAP Architecture with Dual-Tiered Graph Representation Learning.
papers.abstract: Performance estimation is a crucial component in the optimization processes of accelerator development on the Versal ACAP architecture. However, existing approaches present limitations - they are either too slow to facilitate efficient iterations, or they lack the necessary accuracy due to the specific AIE array architecture and two-level programming model of Versal ACAP. To tackle this challenge, we propose G 2 PM, a performance modeling technique based on a hierarchical graph representation centered on the AIE array. More specifically, we employ a hierarchical graph neural network to identify features of both kernel programs and dataflow programs, taking into account the hardware and software characteristics of the Versal ACAP architecture. In our evaluations, our method demonstrates significant improvements, achieving a mean error rate of less than 1.6% and providing a speed-up factor of 4165X compared to the simulation-based method.
papers.abstract_zh: 性能评估是 Versal ACAP 架构上加速器开发优化过程中的关键组成部分。然而，现有方法存在局限性 - 它们要么太慢而无法促进有效迭代，要么由于特定的 AIE 阵列架构和 Versal ACAP 的两级编程模型而缺乏必要的准确性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 G 2 PM，这是一种基于以 AIE 阵列为中心的分层图表示的性能建模技术。更具体地说，我们采用分层图神经网络来识别内核程序和数据流程序的特征，同时考虑到 Versal ACAP 架构的硬件和软件特征。在我们的评估中，我们的方法显示出显着的改进，与基于模拟的方法相比，平均错误率低于 1.6%，加速系数为 4165 倍。

papers.title: Garrison: A High-Performance GPU-Accelerated Inference System for Adversarial Ensemble Defense.
papers.abstract: In the face of huge threats from adversarial attacks, developing an efficient defense mechanism is crucial for deep learning systems. Adversarial ensemble defense method is one of the most effective techniques for defending against adversarial attacks, which constructs ensembles of multiple DNNs to improve model's robustness. However, deploying ensemble defense methods on existing DNN inference systems is inefficient and impractical due to their dynamics and randomness. To this end, we propose an inference system for adversarial ensemble defense called Garrison , which can deliver robust and low-latency predictions using Multi-Instance GPUs. Garrison employs a multi-granularity GPU partitioning strategy, optimizing hardware utilization by capitalizing on the intrinsic heterogeneity of GPUs. It also integrates a reinforcement learning-based scheduling mechanism, enabling random ensemble of diverse defense models to enhance robustness while maintaining bounded latency. Our evaluations show that Garrison can improve adversarial robustness by up to 24.5%, while accelerating ensemble inference by up to 6.6X compared to the state-of-the-art inference framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 面对对抗性攻击的巨大威胁，开发有效的防御机制对于深度学习系统至关重要。对抗性集成防御方法是防御对抗性攻击最有效的技术之一，它构建多个 DNN 的集成来提高模型的鲁棒性。然而，由于其动态性和随机性，在现有 DNN 推理系统上部署集成防御方法效率低下且不切实际。为此，我们提出了一种称为 Garrison 的对抗性集成防御推理系统，它可以使用多实例 GPU 提供稳健且低延迟的预测。 Garrison 采用多粒度 GPU 分区策略，通过利用 GPU 固有的异构性来优化硬件利用率。它还集成了基于强化学习的调度机制，使不同防御模型的随机集成能够增强鲁棒性，同时保持有限的延迟。我们的评估表明，与最先进的推理框架相比，Garrison 可以将对抗鲁棒性提高高达 24.5%，同时将集成推理速度提高高达 6.6 倍。

papers.title: GATE-SiP: Enabling Authenticated Encryption Testing in Systems-in-Package.
papers.abstract: A heterogeneous integrated system in package (SIP) system integrates chiplets outsourced from different vendors into the same substrate for better performance. However, during post-integration testing, the sensitive testing data designated for a specific chiplet can be blocked, tampered or sniffed by other malicious chiplets. This paper proposes GATE-SiP which is an authenticated partial encryption protocol to enable secure testing. Within GATE-SiP, the sensitive testing pattern will only be sent to the authenticated chiplet. In addition, partial encryption of the sensitive data prevents data sniff threats without causing significant penalties on timing overhead. Extensive simulation results show the GATE-SiP protocol only brings 6.74% and 14.31% on area and timing overhead, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构集成系统级封装 (SIP) 系统将从不同供应商外包的小芯片集成到同一基板中，以获得更好的性能。然而，在集成后测试期间，为特定 Chiplet 指定的敏感测试数据可能会被其他恶意 Chiplet 阻止、篡改或嗅探。本文提出了 GATE-SiP，这是一种经过身份验证的部分加密协议，可实现安全测试。在 GATE-SiP 中，敏感测试模式将仅发送到经过验证的小芯片。此外，敏感数据的部分加密可以防止数据嗅探威胁，而不会造成计时开销的重大损失。大量的仿真结果表明，GATE-SiP 协议仅带来面积和时序开销，分别为 6.74% 和 14.31%。

papers.title: GCS-Timer: GPU-Accelerated Current Source Model Based Static Timing Analysis.
papers.abstract: Composite Current Source (CCS) timing model plays an important role in modern static timing analysis (STA) because it precisely captures the timing behavior of a design at advanced nodes. However, CCS is extremely time-consuming due to its accurate but complicated timing models. To overcome this challenge, we introduce GCS-Timer, a GPU-accelerated CCS-based timing analysis algorithm. Unlike existing methods that perform model order reduction to trade accuracy for speed, GCS-Timer achieves high accuracy through a fast simulation-based analysis using GPU computing. Experimental results show that GCS-Timer can complete CCS analysis with better accuracy and achieve 3.2X faster runtime compared with a 16-threaded industrial standard timer. The source code is available at https://github.com/cuhk-eda/GCS-Timer.
papers.abstract_zh: 复合电流源 (CCS) 时序模型在现代静态时序分析 (STA) 中发挥着重要作用，因为它可以精确捕获高级节点设计的时序行为。然而，CCS 由于其精确但复杂的时序模型而极其耗时。为了克服这一挑战，我们引入了 GCS-Timer，一种基于 GPU 加速的 CCS 时序分析算法。与执行模型降阶以牺牲精度换取速度的现有方法不同，GCS-Timer 通过使用 GPU 计算进行基于仿真的快速分析来实现高精度。实验结果表明，GCS-Timer能够以更高的精度完成CCS分析，并且与16线程工业标准定时器相比，运行时间提高了3.2倍。源代码可在 https://github.com/cuhk-eda/GCS-Timer 获取。

papers.title: GDR-HGNN: A Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks Accelerator Frontend with Graph Decoupling and Recoupling.
papers.abstract:
Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) have broadened the applicability of graph representation learning to heterogeneous graphs. However, the irregular memory access pattern of HGNNs leads to the buffer thrashing issue in HGNN accelerators.

In this work, we identify an opportunity to address buffer thrashing in HGNN acceleration through an analysis of the topology of heterogeneous graphs. To harvest this opportunity, we propose a graph restructuring method and map it into a hardware frontend named GDR-HGNN. GDR-HGNN dynamically restructures the graph on the fly to enhance data locality for HGNN accelerators. Experimental results demonstrate that, with the assistance of GDR-HGNN, a leading HGNN accelerator achieves an average speedup of 14.6X and 1.78X compared to the state-of-the-art software framework running on A100 GPU and itself, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
异构图神经网络（HGNN）扩大了图表示学习对异构图的适用性。然而，HGNN 的不规则内存访问模式导致 HGNN 加速器中的缓冲区抖动问题。

在这项工作中，我们通过分析异构图的拓扑来确定解决 HGNN 加速中的缓冲区抖动问题的机会。为了抓住这个机会，我们提出了一种图重组方法并将其映射到名为 GDR-HGNN 的硬件前端。 GDR-HGNN 动态地动态重构图，以增强 HGNN 加速器的数据局部性。实验结果表明，在 GDR-HGNN 的帮助下，与在 A100 GPU 上运行的最先进的软件框架及其本身相比，领先的 HGNN 加速器的平均加速分别为 14.6 倍和 1.78 倍。

papers.title: Genetic Quantization-Aware Approximation for Non-Linear Operations in Transformers.
papers.abstract: Non-linear functions are prevalent in Transformers and their lightweight variants, incurring substantial and frequently underestimated hardware costs. Previous state-of-the-art works optimize these operations by piece-wise linear approximation and store the parameters in look-up tables (LUT), but most of them require unfriendly high-precision arithmetics such as FP/INT 32 and lack consideration of integer-only INT quantization. This paper proposed a genetic LUT-Approximation algorithm namely GQA-LUT that can automatically determine the parameters with quantization awareness. The results demonstrate that GQA-LUT achieves negligible degradation on the challenging semantic segmentation task for both vanilla and linear Transformer models. Besides, proposed GQA-LUT enables the employment of INT8-based LUT-Approximation that achieves an area savings of 81.3~81.7% and a power reduction of 79.3~80.2% compared to the high-precision FP/INT 32 alternatives. Code is available at https://github.com/PingchengDong/GQA-LUT.
papers.abstract_zh: 非线性函数在 Transformer 及其轻量级变体中普遍存在，导致大量且经常被低估的硬件成本。之前最先进的工作通过分段线性逼近来优化这些操作，并将参数存储在查找表（LUT）中，但大多数都需要不友好的高精度算术，例如 FP/INT 32，并且缺乏对纯整数 INT 量化的考虑。本文提出了一种遗传LUT近似算法，即GQA-LUT，可以自动确定具有量化意识的参数。结果表明，对于普通 Transformer 模型和线性 Transformer 模型，GQA-LUT 在具有挑战性的语义分割任务中实现了可以忽略不计的退化。此外，所提出的 GQA-LUT 允许采用基于 INT8 的 LUT 近似，与高精度 FP/INT 32 替代方案相比，可节省 81.3~81.7% 的面积，降低 79.3~80.2% 的功耗。代码可在 https://github.com/Ping ChengDong/GQA-LUT 获取。

papers.title: Geneva: A Dynamic Confluence of Speculative Execution and In-Order Commitment Windows.
papers.abstract: Modern out-of-order microprocessors are increasingly expanding resources such as reorder buffer (ROB) and instruction queue (IQ) for memory-level parallelism (MLP). While this expansion effectively addresses the memory wall challenge, it also incurs notable cost and energy trade-offs. To tackle this, we propose Geneva , a microarchitecture that improves performance and saves energy.
