Critical challenges in routing include generating a rectilinear Steiner minimum tree (RSMT) for each net and handling routing resources among nets. Due to limited resources and net order, congestion is inevitable in VLSI circuit routing. Most competitive routers address congestion after routing without prior net guidance, leading to difficulty in managing resources among nets. We suggest introducing a net resource allocation step to tackle routing and congestion as a potentially desirable initial routing stage. Firstly, we introduce the net region probability density (NRPD) concept to achieve suitable net resource allocation. Using a prior NRPD, we model the resource allocation problem as linear programming (LP). We solve the LP problem and obtain a posterior NRPD for each net on each grid. Based on the posterior NRPD and congestion map, we introduce a cost scheme to guide net routing. This cost scheme supports a weighted RSMT construction technique for better topological solutions. We propose an iterative method for global routing and track assignment, improving detailed routing quality and optimizing design rule violations. Experimental results show the effectiveness of net resource allocation and demonstrate the superior performance of our router over OpenROAD's router across multiple metrics.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代 IC 设计中，布线显着影响芯片性能、功耗、面积和设计迭代次数。路由中的关键挑战包括为每个网络生成直线斯坦纳最小树（RSMT）以及处理网络之间的路由资源。由于资源和网络秩序的限制，VLSI电路布线中的拥塞是不可避免的。大多数竞争性路由器在没有事先网络指导的情况下在路由后解决拥塞问题，从而导致管理网络间资源的困难。我们建议引入网络资源分配步骤来解决路由和拥塞问​​题，作为可能理想的初始路由阶段。首先，我们引入净区域概率密度（NRPD）概念来实现适当的净资源分配。使用先前的 NRPD，我们将资源分配问题建模为线性规划 (LP)。我们解决 LP 问题并获得每个网格上每个网络的后验 NRPD。基于后验 NRPD 和拥塞图，我们引入了一种成本方案来指导网络路由。该成本方案支持加权 RSMT 构造技术，以获得更好的拓扑解决方案。我们提出了一种用于全局布线和轨道分配的迭代方法，提高了详细布线质量并优化了设计规则违规。实验结果显示了网络资源分配的有效性，并证明了我们的路由器在多个指标上优于 OpenROAD 路由器的性能。

papers.title: Neural Barrier Certificates Synthesis of NN-Controlled Continuous Systems via Counterexample-Guided Learning.
papers.abstract: There is a pressing need to ensure the safety of closed-loop systems with neural network controllers, as they are often incorporated into safety-critical applications. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach for generating barrier certificates, which combines counterexample-guided learning with efficient Sum-Of-Squares (SOS) based verification. By leveraging barrier certificate candidates obtained from the learning phase, our proposed method offers an efficient verification procedure that solves three Linear Matrix Inequality (LMI) constraint feasibility testing problems, instead of relying on an SMT solver to verify the barrier certificate conditions. We conduct comparison experiments on a set of benchmarks, demonstrating the advantages of our method in terms of efficiency and scalability, which enable effective verification of high-dimensional systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 迫切需要确保具有神经网络控制器的闭环系统的安全性，因为它们通常被纳入安全关键型应用中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种生成屏障证书的新方法，它将反例引导的学习与基于有效平方和（SOS）的验证相结合。通过利用从学习阶段获得的障碍证书候选，我们提出的方法提供了一种有效的验证程序，可以解决三个线性矩阵不等式（LMI）约束可行性测试问题，而不是依赖于 SMT 求解器来验证障碍证书条件。我们在一组基准上进行了比较实验，证明了我们的方法在效率和可扩展性方面的优势，可以有效验证高维系统。

papers.title: NeuroSelect: Learning to Select Clauses in SAT Solvers.
papers.abstract: Modern SAT solvers depend on conflict-driven clause learning to avoid recurring conflicts. Deleting less valuable learned clauses is a crucial component of modern SAT solvers to ensure efficiency. However, a single clause deletion policy cannot guarantee optimal performance on all SAT instances. This paper introduces a new clause deletion metric to diversify existing clause deletion policies. Then, we propose to use machine learning to evaluate and select clause deletion policies adaptively based on the input instance. We show that our method can reduce the runtime of the state-of-the-art SAT solver Kissat by 5.8% on large industry benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 SAT 求解器依靠冲突驱动的子句学习来避免重复出现的冲突。删除价值较低的学习子句是现代 SAT 求解器确保效率的重要组成部分。但是，单个子句删除策略无法保证所有 SAT 实例上的最佳性能。本文引入了一种新的子句删除度量来使现有的子句删除策略多样化。然后，我们建议使用机器学习根据输入实例自适应地评估和选择子句删除策略。我们证明，我们的方法可以在大型行业基准测试中将最先进的 SAT 求解器 Kissat 的运行时间缩短 5.8%。

papers.title: NOFIS: Normalizing Flow for Rare Circuit Failure Analysis.
papers.abstract: Accurate estimation of rare failure occurrence probability is crucial for ensuring the proper and reliable functioning of integrated circuits (ICs). Conventional Monte Carlo methods are inefficient, demanding an exorbitant number of samples to achieve reliable estimates. Inspired by the exact sampling capabilities of normalizing flows, we revisit this problem and propose normalizing flow assisted importance sampling, termed NOFIS. NOFIS first learns a sequence of proposal distributions associated with predefined nested subset events by minimizing KL divergence losses. Next, it estimates the rare event probability by utilizing importance sampling in conjunction with the last proposal. The efficacy of our NOFIS method is substantiated through comprehensive qualitative visualizations, affirming the optimality of the learned proposal distribution, as well as 10 quantitative experiments, which highlight NOFIS's superior accuracy over baseline approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 准确估计罕见故障发生概率对于确保集成电路（IC）正常可靠地运行至关重要。传统的蒙特卡罗方法效率低下，需要大量样本才能获得可靠的估计。受到归一化流精确采样能力的启发，我们重新审视这个问题并提出归一化流辅助重要性采样，称为 NOFIS。 NOFIS 首先通过最小化 KL 散度损失来学习与预定义嵌套子集事件相关的一系列提议分布。接下来，它通过结合最后一个提案利用重要性采样来估计罕见事件概率。我们的 NOFIS 方法的有效性通过全面的定性可视化得到证实，确认了学习提案分布的最优性，以及 10 个定量实验，突出了 NOFIS 相对于基线方法的卓越准确性。

papers.title: Nona: Accurate Power Prediction Model Using Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a neural-network-based power model, Nona , that accurately predicts the power consumption of heterogeneous CPUs on a commercial mobile device. With aggressive on-device power management in action, it becomes increasingly challenging to make accurate power predictions for diverse applications. To overcome the limitations of the existing power models based on linear regression, Nona uses a lightweight neural network with a small number of performance monitoring counters (PMCs) chosen from a system analysis and a loss function designed for power prediction. Experiments on Google Pixel 6 show that Nona has a 3.4% average prediction error, improving on prior work by 2.6x.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的功耗模型 Nona，它可以准确预测商用移动设备上异构 CPU 的功耗。随着积极的设备电源管理的实施，为不同的应用做出准确的功率预测变得越来越具有挑战性。为了克服基于线性回归的现有功率模型的局限性，Nona 使用轻量级神经网络，其中包含从系统分析中选择的少量性能监控计数器 (PMC) 和专为功率预测而设计的损失函数。在 Google Pixel 6 上的实验表明，Nona 的平均预测误差为 3.4%，比之前的工作提高了 2.6 倍。

papers.title: NSPG: Natural language Processing-based Security Property Generator for Hardware Security Assurance.
papers.abstract: The efficiency of validating complex System-on-Chips (SoCs) is contingent on the quality of the security properties provided. Generating security properties with traditional approaches often requires expert intervention and is limited to a few IPs, thereby resulting in a time-consuming and non-robust process. To address this issue, we, for the first time, propose a novel and automated Natural Language Processing (NLP)-based Security Property Generator (NSPG). Specifically, our approach utilizes hardware documentation in order to propose the first hardware security-specific language model, HS-BERT, for extracting security properties dedicated to hardware design. It is capable of phasing a significant amount of hardware specification, and the generated security properties can be easily converted into hardware assertions, thereby reducing the manual effort required for hardware verification. NSPG is trained using sentences from several SoC documentations and achieves up to 88% accuracy for property classification, outperforming ChatGPT. When assessed on five untrained OpenTitan hardware IP documents, NSPG aided in identifying eight security vulnerabilities in the buggy OpenTitan SoC presented in Hack@DAC 2022.
papers.abstract_zh: 验证复杂片上系统 (SoC) 的效率取决于所提供的安全属性的质量。使用传统方法生成安全属性通常需要专家干预，并且仅限于少数 IP，从而导致过程耗时且不稳健。为了解决这个问题，我们首次提出了一种新颖且自动化的基于自然语言处理（NLP）的安全属性生成器（NSPG）。具体来说，我们的方法利用硬件文档来提出第一个硬件安全特定语言模型 HS-BERT，用于提取专用于硬件设计的安全属性。它能够分阶段划分大量的硬件规范，并且生成的安全属性可以轻松转换为硬件断言，从而减少硬件验证所需的手动工作。 NSPG 使用多个 SoC 文档中的句子进行训练，属性分类准确率高达 88%，优于 ChatGPT。在对五个未经训练的 OpenTitan 硬件 IP 文档进行评估时，NSPG 帮助识别了 Hack@DAC 2022 中提出的有缺陷的 OpenTitan SoC 中的八个安全漏洞。

papers.title: Obstacle-Aware Length-Matching Routing for Any-Direction Traces in Printed Circuit Board.
papers.abstract: Emerging applications in Printed Circuit Board (PCB) routing impose new challenges on automatic length matching, including adaptability for any-direction traces with their original routing preserved for interactiveness. The challenges can be addressed through two orthogonal stages: assign non-overlapping routing regions to each trace and meander the traces within their regions to reach the target length. In this paper, mainly focusing on the meandering stage, we propose an obstacle-aware detailed routing approach to optimize the utilization of available space and achieve length matching while maintaining the original routing of traces. Furthermore, our approach incorporating the proposed Multi-Scale Dynamic Time Warping (MSDTW) method can also handle differential pairs against common decoupled problems. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach has effective length-matching routing ability and compares favorably to previous approaches under more complicated constraints.
papers.abstract_zh: 印刷电路板 (PCB) 布线中的新兴应用对自动长度匹配提出了新的挑战，包括对任意方向走线的适应性，并保留其原始布线以实现交互性。这些挑战可以通过两个正交阶段来解决：将不重叠的布线区域分配给每条走线，并使走线在其区域内蜿蜒以达到目标长度。在本文中，主要关注蜿蜒阶段，我们提出了一种障碍物感知的详细布线方法，以优化可用空间的利用率并实现长度匹配，同时保持迹线的原始布线。此外，我们的方法结合了所提出的多尺度动态时间规整（MSDTW）方法，还可以处理常见解耦问题的差分对。实验结果表明，我们的方法具有有效的长度匹配路由能力，并且在更复杂的约束下与以前的方法相比具有优势。

papers.title: Older and Wiser: The Marriage of Device Aging and Intellectual Property Protection of DNNs.
papers.abstract:
Deep neural networks (DNNs), such as the widely-used GPT-3 with billions of parameters, are often kept secret due to high training costs and privacy concerns surrounding the data used to train them. Previous approaches to securing DNNs typically require expensive circuit redesign, resulting in additional overheads such as increased area, energy consumption, and latency. To address these issues, we propose a novel hardware-software co-design approach for DNN intellectual property (IP) protection that capitalizes on the inherent aging characteristics of circuits and a novel differential orientation fine-tuning (DOFT) to ensure effective protection.

Hardware-wise, we employ random aging to produce authorized chips. This process circumvents the need for chip redesign, thereby eliminating any additional hardware overhead during the inference procedure of DNNs. Moreover, the authorized chips demonstrate a considerable disparity in DNN inference performance when compared to unauthorized chips. Software-wise, we propose a novel DOFT, which allows pre-trained DNNs to maintain their original accuracy on authorized chips with minimal fine-tuning, while the model's performance on unauthorized chips is reduced to random guessing. Extensive experiments on various models, including MLP, VGG, ResNet, Mixer, and SwinTransformer, with lightweight binary and practical multi-bit weights demonstrate that the proposed method achieves effective IP protection, with only 10% accuracy on unauthorized chips, while preserving nearly the original accuracy on authorized ones.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN)，例如广泛使用的具有数十亿参数的 GPT-3，由于训练成本高昂以及用于训练它们的数据的隐私问题，通常是保密的。以前保护 DNN 的方法通常需要昂贵的电路重新设计，从而导致额外的开销，例如增加面积、能耗和延迟。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件-软件协同设计方法来保护 DNN 知识产权 (IP)，该方法利用电路固有的老化特性和新颖的差分方向微调 (DOFT) 来确保有效的保护。

硬件方面，我们采用随机老化的方式生产授权芯片。该过程无需重新设计芯片，从而消除了 DNN 推理过程中的任何额外硬件开销。此外，与未经授权的芯片相比，授权芯片在 DNN 推理性能方面表现出相当大的差异。在软件方面，我们提出了一种新颖的 DOFT，它允许预先训练的 DNN 在授权芯片上以最少的微调保持其原始精度，而模型在未经授权的芯片上的性能则降低为随机猜测。对MLP、VGG、ResNet、Mixer和SwinTransformer等各种模型以及轻量级二进制和实用的多位权重的大量实验表明，该方法实现了有效的IP保护，在未经授权的芯片上只有10%的准确率，而在授权芯片上几乎保持了原始的准确率。

papers.title: Oltron: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Outlier-Aware Quantization of LLMs with Inter-/Intra-Layer Adaptation.
papers.abstract: In Large Language Models (LLMs), outliers are identified by a small number of values with exceptionally high magnitudes, critically affecting model accuracy. Researchers have proposed several mixed-precision quantization techniques to manage these activation outliers. These approaches, employing value-wise outlier granularity, face challenges in balancing model accuracy with hardware efficiency. To address this issue, we capitalize on the observation that activation outliers of LLMs typically cluster within specific channels. Consequently, we introduce Oltron, a comprehensive software/hardware co-design strategy for outlier-aware quantization of LLMs with inter-/intra-layer adaptation. Our method includes three key innovations: firstly, a novel quantization algorithm that identifies the optimal ratio of outliers across different layers and channel groups within a layer; secondly, a reconfigurable architecture that adapts to inter- and intra-layer distributions; and thirdly, a tile-based dataflow optimizer that intricately arranges complex computations and memory access for mixed-precision tensors. Oltron outperforms the state-of-the-art outlier-aware accelerator, OliVe, achieving a 1.9x performance boost and 1.6x greater energy efficiency, while also enhancing model accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大型语言模型 (LLM) 中，异常值是通过少数数量级极高的值来识别的，这严重影响了模型的准确性。研究人员提出了几种混合精度量化技术来管理这些激活异常值。这些方法采用了价值方面的异常值粒度，在平衡模型准确性和硬件效率方面面临着挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们利用了法学硕士的激活异常值通常聚集在特定渠道内的观察结果。因此，我们引入了 Oltron，一种全面的软件/硬件协同设计策略，用于具有层间/层内适应的 LLM 异常值感知量化。我们的方法包括三个关键创新：首先，一种新颖的量化算法，可以识别不同层和层内通道组之间异常值的最佳比例；其次，适应层间和层内分布的可重构架构；第三，基于图块的数据流优化器，可以为混合精度张量复杂地安排复杂的计算和内存访问。 Oltron 的性能优于最先进的异常值感知加速器 OliVe，实现了 1.9 倍的性能提升和 1.6 倍的能源效率，同时还提高了模型精度。

papers.title: On the Design of Novel Attention Mechanism for Enhanced Efficiency of Transformers.
papers.abstract: We present a new xor-based attention function for efficient hardware implementation of transformers. While the standard attention mechanism relies on matrix multiplication between the key and the transpose of the query, we propose replacing the computation of this attention function with bitwise xor operations. We mathematically analyze the information-theoretic properties of the standard multiplication-based attention, demonstrating that it preserves input entropy, and then computationally show that the xor-based attention approximately preserves the entropy of its input despite small variations in correlations between the inputs. Across various admittedly simple tasks, including arithmetic, sorting, and text generation, we show comparable performance to baseline methods using scaled GPT models. The xor-based computation of the attention function shows substantial improvement in power consumption, latency, and circuit area compared to the corresponding multiplication-based attention function. This hardware efficiency makes xor-based attention more compelling for the deployment of transformers under tight resource constraints, opening new application domains in sustainable energy-efficient computing. Additional optimizations to the xor-based attention function can further improve efficiency of transformers.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的基于异或的注意力函数，用于变压器的高效硬件实现。虽然标准注意力机制依赖于查询的键和转置之间的矩阵乘法，但我们建议用按位异或运算替换此注意力函数的计算。我们对标准基于乘法的注意力的信息论属性进行了数学分析，证明它保留了输入熵，然后通过计算表明，尽管输入之间的相关性变化很小，但基于异或的注意力近似保留了其输入的熵。在各种公认的简单任务中，包括算术、排序和文本生成，我们展示了与使用缩放 GPT 模型的基线方法相当的性能。与相应的基于乘法的注意力函数相比，基于异或的注意力函数计算在功耗、延迟和电路面积方面显示出显着的改进。这种硬件效率使得基于异或的注意力对于在资源紧张的情况下部署变压器更加引人注目，从而在可持续节能计算中开辟了新的应用领域。对基于异或的注意力函数的额外优化可以进一步提高变压器的效率。

papers.title: OPAL: Outlier-Preserved Microscaling Quantization Accelerator for Generative Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: To overcome the burden on the memory size and bandwidth due to ever-increasing size of large language models (LLMs), aggressive weight quantization has been recently studied, while lacking research on quantizing activations. In this paper, we present a hardware-software co-design method that results in an energy-efficient LLM accelerator, named OPAL, for generation tasks. First of all, a novel activation quantization method that leverages the microscaling data format while preserving several outliers per subtensor block (e.g., four out of 128 elements) is proposed. Second, on top of preserving outliers, mixed precision is utilized that sets 5-bit for inputs to sensitive layers in the decoder block of an LLM, while keeping inputs to less sensitive layers to 3-bit. Finally, we present the OPAL hardware architecture that consists of FP units for handling outliers and vectorized INT multipliers for dominant non-outlier related operations. In addition, OPAL uses log2-based approximation on softmax operations that only requires shift and subtraction to maximize power efficiency. As a result, we are able to improve the energy efficiency by 1.6~2.2×, and reduce the area by 2.4~3.1× with negligible accuracy loss, i.e., <1 perplexity increase.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了克服由于大型语言模型（LLM）尺寸不断增加而导致的内存大小和带宽负担，最近研究了积极的权重量化，但缺乏对量化激活的研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种硬件-软件协同设计方法，该方法产生了一种名为 OPAL 的节能 LLM 加速器，用于生成任务。首先，提出了一种新颖的激活量化方法，该方法利用微尺度数据格式，同时保留每个子张量块的多个异常值（例如，128 个元素中的四个）。其次，除了保留异常值之外，还利用混合精度将 LLM 解码器块中敏感层的输入设置为 5 位，同时将不太敏感层的输入保持为 3 位。最后，我们提出了 OPAL 硬件架构，该架构由用于处理异常值的 FP 单元和用于主要非异常值相关操作的矢量化 INT 乘法器组成。此外，OPAL 在 softmax 运算上使用基于 log2 的近似，仅需要移位和减法即可最大限度地提高功效。结果，我们能够将能源效率提高 1.6~2.2 倍，并将面积减少 2.4~3.1 倍，而精度损失可以忽略不计，即困惑度增加 <1。

papers.title: OPTIMA: Design-Space Exploration of Discharge-Based In-SRAM Computing: Quantifying Energy-Accuracy Trade-offs.
papers.abstract: In-SRAM computing promises energy efficiency, but circuit nonlinearities and PVT variations pose major challenges in designing robust accelerators. To address this, we introduce OPTIMA, a modeling framework that aids in analyzing bitline discharge and power consumption in 6T-SRAM-based accelerators. It provides insights into limiting factors and enables fast design-space exploration of circuit configurations. Leveraging OPTIMA for in-SRAM multiplications exhibits ~100 × simulation speed-up while maintaining an RMS modeling error of 0.88 mV. Exploration yields an optimized multiplier with 1.05 pJ energy consumption per 4-bit operation and classification accuracies of 71.8% (top-1) and 90.4% (top-5) for ImageNet and 92.5% for CIFAR-10 datasets respectively when applied in quantized DNNs. To further support research and development efforts, we have made our OPTIMAptima tool flow available as open source [https://github.com/sevjaeg/optima].
papers.abstract_zh: SRAM 内计算保证了能源效率，但电路非线性和 PVT 变化对设计稳健的加速器提出了重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 OPTIMA，这是一个建模框架，有助于分析基于 6T-SRAM 的加速器中的位线放电和功耗。它提供了对限制因素的深入了解，并能够快速探索电路配置的设计空间。利用 OPTIMA 进行 SRAM 内乘法可实现约 100 倍的仿真加速，同时保持 0.88 mV 的 RMS 建模误差。当应用于量化 DNN 时，探索产生了一个优化乘法器，每 4 位操作的能耗为 1.05 pJ，ImageNet 的分类精度为 71.8%（top-1），CIFAR-10 数据集的分类精度为 90.4%（top-5），为 92.5%。为了进一步支持研究和开发工作，我们将 OPTIMaptima 工具流程开源 [https://github.com/sevjaeg/optima]。

papers.title: Optimal Transistor Folding and Placement for Synthesizing Standard Cells of Complementary FET Technology.
papers.abstract: As the VLSI technology continues to scale beyond 5nm, a strong demand on the continuing layout reduction of standard cells is required. However, the standard cells with conventional FinFET or nanosheet-FET structure are becoming much hard to meet this requirement due to the lateral P-FET and N-FET separation. It has been widely accepted that Complementary-FET (CFET) is a promising technology, which stacks P-FET on N-FET or vice versa, to achieve this objective. In comparison with synthesizing the conventional FET based standard cells, two prominent optimization tasks in CFET based multi-row cell synthesis that significantly affect the cell quality, in terms of area and routability, are (1) determining transistor folding shapes and (2) determining placement order of transistors with fully secured vertical i.e., z-directional routing space on the stacked FETs as well as buried power rail (BPR). In this work, we propose an optimal solution to the combined problem of tasks 1 and 2. Precisely, we develop a search tree-based area-optimal method of transistor folding and placement , in which we accelerate the cost computation of partial solutions by formulating it into dynamic programming while performing a strict feasibility checking of securing in-cell vertical routing space of partial solutions by formulating and solving it into an instance of network flow problem. In the meantime, through experiment with benchmark circuits, it is shown that the CFET cells produced by our cell synthesizer are 5% smaller in size on average even with 38% shorter total metal length and 70% less use of metal2 for in-cell routing over the cells produced by the recent state-of-the-art CFET cell generator.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着超大规模集成电路技术不断扩展到5nm以上，对标准单元布局的持续缩减提出了强烈需求。然而，由于 P-FET 和 N-FET 横向分离，具有传统 FinFET 或纳米片 FET 结构的标准单元变得越来越难以满足这一要求。人们普遍认为，互补 FET (CFET) 是一种很有前途的技术，它将 P-FET 堆叠在 N-FET 上，反之亦然，以实现这一目标。与合成基于传统 FET 的标准单元相比，基于 CFET 的多行单元合成中两个显着影响单元质量（在面积和可布线性方面）的重要优化任务是（1）确定晶体管折叠形状和（2）确定具有完全安全的垂直（即堆叠 FET 上的 z 方向布线空间）以及埋入式电源轨（BPR）的晶体管的放置顺序。在这项工作中，我们提出了任务 1 和 2 的组合问题的最优解决方案。准确地说，我们开发了一种基于搜索树的晶体管折叠和布局的区域优化方法，其中我们通过将其制定为动态规划来加速部分解决方案的成本计算，同时通过将其制定并解决为网络流问题的实例来对确保部分解决方案的单元内垂直布线空间进行严格的可行性检查。同时，通过基准电路实验表明，与最近最先进的 CFET 单元生成器生产的单元相比，我们的单元合成器生产的 CFET 单元的尺寸平均缩小了 5%，尽管总金属长度缩短了 38%，并且用于单元内布线的 metal2 使用量也减少了 70%。

papers.title: Order-Preserving Cryptography for the Confidential Inference in Random Forests: FPGA Design and Implementation.
papers.abstract: Prior work has addressed the problem of confidential inference in decision trees. Both traditional order-preserving cryptography (OPE) and order-preserving NTRU cryptography have been used to ensure data and model privacy in decision trees. Furthermore, FPGA architectures and implementations have been proposed for implementing such confidential inference algorithms on resource-limited, edge-based platforms such as low-cost FPGA boards. In this paper, we address the challenging problem of scalability of order-preserving confidential inference to random forests, which are ensembles of decision trees that are meant to improve their classification accuracy and reduce their overfitting. The paper develops a methodology and an FPGA implementation strategy for scaling up OPE to random forests. In particular, a framework is used to study the multifaceted tradeoffs that exist between the number of trees in the random forest, the strength of the encryption, the accuracy of the inferences, and the resources of the edge platform. Extensive experiments are conducted using the MNIST dataset and the Intel DE10 Standard FPGA board.
papers.abstract_zh: 先前的工作已经解决了决策树中的机密推理问题。传统的保序密码术 (OPE) 和保序 NTRU 密码术都已用于确保决策树中的数据和模型隐私。此外，已经提出了 FPGA 架构和实现，用于在资源有限的基于边缘的平台（例如低成本 FPGA 板）上实现此类机密推理算法。在本文中，我们解决了随机森林保序机密推理的可扩展性问题，随机森林是决策树的集合，旨在提高其分类准确性并减少过度拟合。本文开发了一种将 OPE 扩展到随机森林的方法和 FPGA 实现策略。特别是，使用一个框架来研究随机森林中树木的数量、加密强度、推理准确性和边缘平台资源之间存在的多方面权衡。使用 MNIST 数据集和英特尔 DE10 标准 FPGA 板进行了大量实验。

papers.title: OTPlace-Vias: A Novel Optimal Transport Based Method for High Density Vias Placement in 3D Circuits.
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional integrated circuit (3D IC) is an important manufacturing technology. In particular, the Monolithic 3D (M3D) technology stands out as a cutting-edge approach that provides higher integration density. However, M3D also introduces several challenges in terms of high density and computational complexity. In this paper, we propose a new approach for solving the inter-tier vias placement problem through optimal transport, which can be efficiently implemented in parallel with GPUs and consequently achieves significant speedup. Moreover, comparing with previous methods, our approach can also facilitate the processing of high integration density circuits to be more effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 三维集成电路（3D IC）是一项重要的制造技术。特别是，Monolithic 3D (M3D) 技术作为提供更高集成密度的尖端方法脱颖而出。然而，M3D 也带来了高密度和计算复杂性方面的一些挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过最佳传输解决层间过孔布局问题的新方法，该方法可以与 GPU 并行有效地实现，从而实现显着的加速。此外，与以前的方法相比，我们的方法还可以更有效地促进高集成密度电路的加工。

papers.title: Partially-Structured Transformer Pruning with Patch-Limited XOR-Gate Compression for Stall-Free Sparse-Model Access.
papers.abstract: The pruning-based model compression is regarded as an essential technique to deploy the recent large-size transformer models in practical services; however, accessing sparse transformer models cannot reach the ideal speed at all due to the frequent memory stalls for the irregular memory-accessing patterns. Based on the recent XOR-gate compression relaxing the amount of irregular accesses, this work presents a novel partially-structured transformer pruning method dedicated to the interface-friendly compression format. The stall-free memory access is firstly derived by limiting the number of patches per weight, introducing a new trade-off between model quality and effective memory bandwidth. Then, the partially-structured pruning patterns are deployed to provide better accuracy-bandwidth trade-off by significantly reducing the number of correction patches. Adjusting the patch distribution per weight in an aggressive way, the number of limited patches can be even smaller than that of weight bits, further increasing the effective bandwidth for achieving the similar model accuracy. We demonstrate the proposed stall-free XOR-gate compression schemes at pruned DeiT/BERT models on ImageNet/SQuAD datasets, presenting the highest effective bandwidth for accessing sparse transformers compared to the existing stall-based solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于剪枝的模型压缩被认为是在实际服务中部署最新大型变压器模型的基本技术；然而，由于不规则的内存访问模式导致频繁的内存停顿，访问稀疏变压器模型根本无法达到理想的速度。基于最近放宽不规则访问量的异或门压缩，这项工作提出了一种新颖的部分结构化变压器修剪方法，专用于接口友好的压缩格式。无失速内存访问首先是通过限制每个权重的补丁数量来导出的，从而在模型质量和有效内存带宽之间引入了新的权衡。然后，部署部分结构化修剪模式，通过显着减少校正补丁的数量来提供更好的精度与带宽权衡。以积极的方式调整每个权重的补丁分布，有限的补丁数量甚至可以小于权重位数，进一步增加实现相似模型精度的有效带宽。我们在 ImageNet/SQuAD 数据集上的修剪 DeiT/BERT 模型上演示了所提出的无失速异或门压缩方案，与现有的基于失速的解决方案相比，提供了访问稀疏变压器的最高有效带宽。

papers.title: Partitioned Scheduling and Parallelism Assignment for Real-Time DNN Inference Tasks on Multi-TPU.
papers.abstract: Pipelining on Edge Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) optimizes the deep neural network (DNN) inference by breaking it down into multiple stages processed concurrently on multiple accelerators. Such DNN inference tasks can be modeled as sporadic non-preemptive gangs with execution times that vary with their parallelism levels. This paper proposes a strict partitioning strategy for deploying DNN inferences in real-time systems. The strategy determines tasks' parallelism levels and assigns tasks to disjoint processor partitions. Configuring the tasks in the same partition with a uniform parallelism level avoids scheduling anomalies and enables schedulability verification using well-understood uniprocessor analyses. Evaluation using real-world Edge TPU benchmarks demonstrated that the proposed method achieves a higher schedulability ratio than state-of-the-art gang scheduling techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 边缘张量处理单元 (TPU) 上的流水线通过将深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理分解为在多个加速器上同时处理的多个阶段来优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理。此类 DNN 推理任务可以建模为零星的非抢占式组，其执行时间随并行级别的变化而变化。本文提出了一种在实时系统中部署 DNN 推理的严格划分策略。该策略确定任务的并行级别并将任务分配给不相交的处理器分区。使用统一的并行级别在同一分区中配置任务可以避免调度异常，并使用易于理解的单处理器分析来实现可调度性验证。使用现实世界的 Edge TPU 基准进行的评估表明，所提出的方法比最先进的组调度技术实现了更高的可调度性比率。

papers.title: PathFuzz: Broadening Fuzzing Horizons with Footprint Memory for CPUs.
papers.abstract: Coverage metrics have been widely adopted to quantify the completeness of hardware verification. Recently, coverage-guided fuzzing has emerged as a popular method for automatically creating test inputs toward higher verification coverage reach. However, we observe that its effectiveness on CPUs is hindered by limited sources of seed corpus and efficiency of mutations. To broaden the fuzzing horizons, this paper proposes the PathFuzz framework incorporating an efficient input format for fuzzing CPUs, the footprint memory, with seed corpus from real-world large-scale programs. Experiments demonstrate that using PathFuzz reaches over 95% verification coverage with four long-standing bugs newly identified in two well-known open-source CPU designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 覆盖率指标已被广泛采用来量化硬件验证的完整性。最近，覆盖率引导的模糊测试已成为一种流行的方法，用于自动创建测试输入以实现更高的验证覆盖率。然而，我们观察到它在 CPU 上的有效性受到有限的种子语料库来源和突变效率的阻碍。为了拓宽模糊测试的视野，本文提出了 PathFuzz 框架，该框架结合了用于模糊测试 CPU 的有效输入格式、足迹内存以及来自现实世界大型程序的种子语料库。实验表明，使用 PathFuzz 可以达到超过 95% 的验证覆盖率，并且在两个著名的开源 CPU 设计中新发现了四个长期存在的错误。

papers.title: PDRC: Package Design Rule Checking via GPU-Accelerated Geometric Intersection Algorithms for Non-Manhattan Geometry.
papers.abstract: With the emergence of chiplet technology, the scale of IC packaging design has been steadily increasing, making the utilization of traditional design rule checking (DRC) methods more time-consuming. In this paper, we propose PDRC, a package-level design rule checker for non-manhattan geometry with GPU acceleration. PDRC employs hierarchical interval lists within an iterative parallel sweepline framework to implement the geometric intersection algorithm, thereby finishing design rule checking tasks. Experimental results have demonstrated 30 - 50 times speedup achieved by PDRC compared with two CPU-based checkers.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着chiplet技术的出现，IC封装设计的规模不断扩大，使得传统设计规则检查（DRC）方法的利用更加耗时。在本文中，我们提出了 PDRC，一种用于非曼哈顿几何图形的封装级设计规则检查器，具有 GPU 加速功能。 PDRC在迭代并行扫描线框架内采用分层区间列表来实现几何相交算法，从而完成设计规则检查任务。实验结果表明，与两个基于 CPU 的检查器相比，PDRC 实现了 30 - 50 倍的加速。

papers.title: Performance-driven Analog Routing via Heterogeneous 3DGNN and Potential Relaxation.
papers.abstract: Analog routing is crucial for performance optimization in analog circuit design, but conventionally takes significant development time and requires design expertise. Recent research has attempted to use machine learning (ML) to generate guidance to preserve circuit performance after analog routing. These methods face challenges such as expensive data acquisition and biased guidance. This paper presents AnalogFold , a new paradigm of analog routing that leverages ML to provide performance-oriented routing guidance. Our approach learns performance-driven routing guidance and uses it to help automatic routers for performance-driven routing optimization. We propose to use a 3DGNN that incorporates cost-aware distance to make accurate predictions on post-layout performance. A pool-assisted potential relaxation process derives the effective routing guidance. The experimental results on multiple benchmarks under the TSMC 40nm technology node demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework compared to the cutting-edge works.
papers.abstract_zh: 模拟布线对于模拟电路设计中的性能优化至关重要，但通常需要大量的开发时间并且需要设计专业知识。最近的研究尝试使用机器学习 (ML) 来生成指导，以在模拟布线后保持电路性能。这些方法面临着昂贵的数据采集和有偏见的指导等挑战。本文提出了 AnalogFold，这是一种新的模拟路由范例，它利用 ML 提供面向性能的路由指导。我们的方法学习性能驱动的路由指导，并使用它来帮助自动路由器进行性能驱动的路由优化。我们建议使用包含成本感知距离的 3DGNN 来对布局后性能做出准确预测。池辅助的潜在松弛过程得出有效的路由指导。台积电40nm技术节点下多个基准测试的实验结果证明了所提出的框架与前沿作品相比的优越性。

papers.title: PHD: Parallel Huffman Decoder on FPGA for Extreme Performance and Energy Efficiency.
papers.abstract: Huffman decoding is crucial in data compression, and the self-synchronization-based parallel decoding algorithm enables subsequence-level parallelism. This paper introduces PHD, the first accelerator designed for self-synchronization-based parallel Huffman decoding on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA). Designing PHD poses challenges, including managing fine-grained parallelism, addressing limited on-chip memory, and handling inter-codeword dependency. PHD incorporates bit-level, subsequence-level, and tile-level parallelism, utilizes hybrid memory to store the codebook efficiently, and introduces the ONCE MORE optimization to reduce decoding loop iterations. Experimental results demonstrate that PHD outperforms the state-of-the-art GPU-based baseline regarding latency (9.4X to 12.8X reduction) and energy consumption (12.4X to 18.2X reduction).
papers.abstract_zh: 霍夫曼解码在数据压缩中至关重要，基于自同步的并行解码算法可实现子序列级并行。本文介绍了 PHD，这是第一个为现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 上基于自同步的并行霍夫曼解码而设计的加速器。设计 PHD 带来了挑战，包括管理细粒度并行性、解决有限的片上内存以及处理码字间依赖性。 PHD融合了比特级、子序列级和瓦片级并行性，利用混合存储器有效地存储码本，并引入ONCE MORE优化来减少解码循环迭代。实验结果表明，PHD 在延迟（减少 9.4 倍至 12.8 倍）和能耗（减少 12.4 倍至 18.2 倍）方面优于基于 GPU 的最先进基准。

papers.title: PipeSSD: A Lock-free Pipelined SSD Firmware Design for Multi-core Architecture.
papers.abstract:
Modern SSD firmware is continuously optimized for higher parallelism to match the growing frontend PCIe bandwidth with more backend flash channels. Although a multi-core microprocessor is typically adopted to concurrently process independent NVMe requests from multiple NVMe queues, the existing one-to-many thread-request mapping model with each thread serving one or more incoming I/O requests has poor scalability due to severe lock contention problem, especially in cache management.

In this paper, we first conduct experiments on an open-channel NVMe SSD to exhibit the lock contention problem in the one-to-many thread-request mapping model when multiple threads compete for the cacheline, which occupies more than 50% of the long-tail request latency. To mitigate this, we propose PipeSSD, a lock-free pipeline-based SSD firmware design with a many-to-one thread-request mapping model that assigns multiple threads to serve different stages of each I/O request in a pipelined way. Three novel designs are introduced in PipeSSD: 1) a loop-free request processing pipeline with a postponed cache stage to reduce cacheline competition; 2) a lock-free cache management scheme to ensure consistent cache behavior; and 3) a FIFO-based inter-stage request flow for correct request dependencies. We implement PipeSSD on real hardware and evaluate its performance on a multi-core NVMe SSD prototype. The evaluation results show that PipeSSD has a significant throughput improvement compared to the state-of-the-art multi-core SSD firmware.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代 SSD 固件不断优化以获得更高的并行性，以将不断增长的前端 PCIe 带宽与更多后端闪存通道相匹配。尽管通常采用多核微处理器来同时处理来自多个 NVMe 队列的独立 NVMe 请求，但由于严重的锁争用问题，现有的一对多线程请求映射模型（每个线程服务一个或多个传入 I/O 请求）的可扩展性较差，尤其是在缓存管理方面。

在本文中，我们首先在开放通道NVMe SSD上进行实验，以展示一对多线程请求映射模型中多个线程竞争缓存行时的锁争用问题，该问题占据了长尾请求延迟的50％以上。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 PipeSSD，这是一种基于无锁管道的 SSD 固件设计，具有多对一线程请求映射模型，可以分配多个线程以管道方式服务每个 I/O 请求的不同阶段。 PipeSSD 引入了三种新颖的设计：1）无循环请求处理管道，具有延迟的缓存阶段，以减少缓存行竞争； 2）无锁缓存管理方案，确保缓存行为一致； 3) 基于 FIFO 的级间请求流，用于正确的请求依赖性。我们在真实硬件上实现 PipeSSD，并在多核 NVMe SSD 原型上评估其性能。评估结果表明，与最先进的多核SSD固件相比，PipeSSD具有显着的吞吐量提升。

papers.title: PIVOT- Input-aware Path Selection for Energy-efficient ViT Inference.
papers.abstract: The attention module in vision transformers(ViTs) performs intricate spatial correlations, contributing significantly to accuracy and delay. It is thereby important to modulate the number of attentions according to the input feature complexity for optimal delay-accuracy tradeoffs. To this end, we propose PIVOT - a co-optimization framework which selectively performs attention skipping based on the input difficulty. For this,PIVOT employs a hardware-in-loop co-search to obtain optimal attention skip configurations. Evaluations on the ZCU102 MPSoC FPGA show that PIVOT achieves 2.7× lower EDP at 0.2% accuracy reduction compared to LVViT-S ViT. PIVOT also achieves 1.3% and 1.8× higher accuracy and throughput than prior works on traditional CPUs and GPUs. The PIVOT project can be found at this Github link.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViTs）中的注意力模块执行复杂的空间相关性，对准确性和延迟有显着贡献。因此，根据输入特征复杂性来调整注意力的数量以实现最佳延迟精度权衡非常重要。为此，我们提出了 PIVOT——一种协同优化框架，它根据输入难度有选择地执行注意力跳跃。为此，PIVOT 采用硬件在环协同搜索来获得最佳的注意力跳跃配置。对 ZCU102 MPSoC FPGA 的评估表明，与 LVViT-S ViT 相比，PIVOT 的 EDP 降低了 2.7 倍，精度降低了 0.2%。与之前在传统 CPU 和 GPU 上进行的研究相比，PIVOT 的精度和吞吐量分别提高了 1.3% 和 1.8 倍。 PIVOT 项目可以在此 Github 链接中找到。

papers.title: Planaria: Pattern Directed Cross-page Composite Prefetcher.
papers.abstract:
Given the memory wall, the performance of the memory system significantly influences the user experience of mobile phones. The system cache (SC), located on the memory side, is shared among all CPUs and GPUs within the mobile phone, serving as the last line of defense before resorting to time-consuming off-chip memory access. Managing SC is a challenge due to its large working set and irregular access patterns. Despite occupying a substantial on-chip area, SC's effectiveness in terms of hit rate is relatively low. It has been observed that neither state-of-the-art cache replacement policies nor increasing cache size significantly improve SC performance. Prefetchers designed for higher-level caches cannot be seamlessly applied to SC due to the absence of the required program counter (PC) on the memory side and the violation of stringent power constraints in mobile phones by aggressive prefetch traffic.

In this study, we present Planaria, comprising two sub-prefetchers (SLP and TLP) and a coordinator, aiming to achieve high accuracy and coverage simultaneously. The two sub-prefetchers exploit intra- and inter-page regularities through self and transfer learning, respectively. The coordinator explicitly decouples the learning and issuing phases of the sub-prefetchers. Experimental results demonstrate that Planaria has enhanced overall system performance in terms of instructions per cycle (IPC) by an average of 28.9%, 21.9%, and 15.3% over no prefetcher, BOP, and SPP, respectively. Moreover, Planaria proves to be power-efficient, incurring only a 0.5% increase in power consumption, while BOP and SPP increase power consumption by 13.5% and 9.7%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
考虑到内存墙，内存系统的性能显着影响手机的用户体验。系统缓存（SC）位于内存一侧，由手机内的所有CPU和GPU共享，是诉诸耗时的片外内存访问之前的最后一道防线。由于 SC 工作集庞大且访问模式不规则，管理 SC 是一项挑战。尽管占据了相当大的片上面积，但SC在命中率方面的有效性相对较低。据观察，最先进的缓存替换策略和增加缓存大小都无法显着提高 SC 性能。由于内存侧缺乏所需的程序计数器（PC），并且激进的预取流量违反了移动电话中严格的功耗限制，因此为高级缓存设计的预取器无法无缝应用于 SC。

在这项研究中，我们提出了 Planaria，它由两个子预取器（SLP 和 TLP）和一个协调器组成，旨在同时实现高精度和覆盖率。这两个子预取器分别通过自学习和迁移学习来利用页面内和页面间的规律。协调器明确地解耦子预取器的学习和发布阶段。实验结果表明，与无预取器、BOP 和 SPP 相比，Planaria 在每周期指令 (IPC) 方面的整体系统性能分别平均提高了 28.9%、21.9% 和 15.3%。此外，Planaria 被证明是节能的，仅导致功耗增加 0.5%，而 BOP 和 SPP 分别增加 13.5% 和 9.7% 的功耗。

papers.title: Plug Your Volt: Protecting Intel Processors against Dynamic Voltage Frequency Scaling based Fault Attacks.
papers.abstract: Existing countermeasures to DVFS based fault attacks are overly restrictive because (1) they prevent benign, non-SGX processes from utilizing DVFS, and (2) rely upon a less practical threat model than that of Intel SGX. Consequently, this work proposes a new countermeasure principle to defend against DVFS based fault attacks on modern Intel systems. First, we establish that the fundamental cause of DVFS fault attacks is the ability to independently control the frequency and voltage of a processor. Using this observation, we construct a partition of frequency-voltage tuples into unsafe-safe states based on whether a tuple causes timing violations according to switching circuit theoretic principles. Our countermeasure completely prevents DVFS faults on three Intel generation CPUs: Sky Lake, Kaby Lake R, and Comet Lake. Further, it can also be deployed both as microcode or as model-specific registers at the hardware level, unlike previous countermeasures. Our countermeasure incurs a slowdown of only 0.28% on overall system performance when benchmarked against SPEC2017.
papers.abstract_zh: 针对基于 DVFS 的故障攻击的现有对策过于严格，因为 (1) 它们阻止良性非 SGX 进程利用 DVFS，以及 (2) 依赖于比 Intel SGX 不太实用的威胁模型。因此，这项工作提出了一种新的对策原则来防御现代英特尔系统上基于 DVFS 的故障攻击。首先，我们确定DVFS故障攻击的根本原因是独立控制处理器频率和电压的能力。利用这一观察结果，我们根据开关电路理论原理，根据元组是否导致时序违规，将频率电压元组划分为不安全-安全状态。我们的对策完全防止了三代 Intel CPU 上的 DVFS 故障：Sky Lake、Kaby Lake R 和 Comet Lake。此外，与之前的对策不同，它还可以部署为硬件级别的微代码或特定于模型的寄存器。与 SPEC2017 进行基准测试时，我们的对策仅导致整体系统性能下降 0.28%。

papers.title: PMP: Pattern Morphing-based Memory Partitioning in High-Level Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Memory partitioning is a widely used technique to reduce access conflicts on multi-bank memory in high-level synthesis. Previous memory partitioning methods mainly focus on a given access pattern extracted from stencil applications. Restricted by the pattern shape, these methods are prone to sub-optimal bank numbers or large overhead on address generation. In this work, we propose a pattern-morphing-based memory partitioning method, PMP, that only requires reduced hyperplane families to achieve the minimal bank number. To reduce the side effect of extra data padding, an integer linear programming problem is formulated for pattern morphing. Compared to the previous hyperplane-based memory partitioning, the experimental results show that our approach could achieve the optimal partition factor while saving 22% in LUTs, 21% in FlipFlops, 10% in DSPs, and 40% in memory overhead, on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存分区是一种广泛使用的技术，用于减少高级综合中多存储体内存的访问冲突。以前的内存分区方法主要关注从模板应用程序中提取的给定访问模式。受模式形状的限制，这些方法很容易出现次优的存储体数量或地址生成的巨大开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于模式变形的内存分区方法（PMP），该方法只需要减少超平面族即可实现最小的存储体数量。为了减少额外数据填充的副作用，为模式变形制定了整数线性规划问题。与之前基于超平面的内存分区相比，实验结果表明，我们的方法可以实现最佳分区因子，同时平均节省 22% 的 LUT、21% 的 FlipFlops、10% 的 DSP 和 40% 的内存开销。

papers.title: PONO: Power Optimization with Near Optimal SMT-based Sub-circuit Generation.
papers.abstract: Generating high-quality sub-circuits for local substitution is an effective optimization technique in logic synthesis. There have been abundant works on generating area- and delay-optimal sub-circuits, greatly enhancing the logic optimization quality. However, power-oriented sub-circuit generation is rarely discussed, while optimizing power consumption in this sub-15 nm era is of paramount interest. We propose PONO, an SMT-based near optimal sub-circuit generation flow for power optimization. PONO enables power-oriented circuit library building and fills the gap in generating circuits near the Pareto frontier in PPA (Power, Performance, and Area). It manifests superiority in power reduction over traditional one in rewrite, a key logic optimization algorithm. We test PONO on EFPL benchmarks, and it shows 8.7% less power consumption without degrading the post-place-and-route performance and area.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成用于局部替换的高质量子电路是逻辑综合中的一种有效的优化技术。在生成面积和延迟最优子电路方面已经有大量工作，极大地提高了逻辑优化质量。然而，以功率为导向的子电路生成却很少被讨论，而优化 15 nm 以下时代的功耗却是最受关注的。我们提出 PONO，一种基于 SMT 的近乎最优的子电路生成流程，用于功率优化。 PONO 能够构建面向功率的电路库，并填补了在 PPA（功率、性能和面积）帕累托前沿附近生成电路的空白。在关键逻辑优化算法重写方面，它比传统算法体现出功耗优势。我们在 EFPL 基准测试中测试了 PONO，结果显示功耗降低了 8.7%，而没有降低布局布线后的性能和面积。

papers.title: PowerLens: An Adaptive DVFS Framework for Optimizing Energy Efficiency in Deep Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: To address the power management challenges in deep neural networks (DNNs), dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) technology is garnering attention for its ability to enhance energy efficiency without modifying the structure of DNNs. However, current DVFS methods, which depend on historical information such as processor utilization and task computational load, face issues like frequency ping-pong, response lag, and poor generalizability. Therefore, this paper introduces PowerLens, an adaptive DVFS framework. Initially, we develop a power-sensitive feature extraction method for DNNs and identify critical power blocks through clustering based on power behavior similarity, thereby achieving adaptive DVFS instrumentation point settings. Then, the framework adaptively presets the target frequency for each power block through a decision model. Finally, through a refined training and deployment process, we ensure the framework's effective adaptability across different platforms. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of the framework in energy efficiency optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了解决深度神经网络 (DNN) 中的电源管理挑战，动态电压和频率缩放 (DVFS) 技术因其能够在不修改 DNN 结构的情况下提高能源效率而受到关注。然而，当前的 DVFS 方法依赖于处理器利用率和任务计算负载等历史信息，面临频率乒乓、响应滞后和通用性差等问题。因此，本文介绍了PowerLens，一个自适应DVFS框架。最初，我们开发了一种 DNN 功率敏感特征提取方法，并通过基于功率行为相似性的聚类来识别关键功率块，从而实现自适应 DVFS 仪表点设置。然后，该框架通过决策模型自适应地预设每个功率块的目标频率。最后，通过精细化的训练和部署流程，确保框架在不同平台上的有效适应性。实验结果证实了该框架在能源效率优化方面的有效性。

papers.title: PowerRChol: Efficient Power Grid Analysis Based on Fast Randomized Cholesky Factorization.
papers.abstract: Efficient power grid analysis is critical in modern VLSI design. It is computationally challenging because it requires solving large linear equations with millions of unknowns. Iterative solvers are more scalable, but their performance relies on preconditioners. Existing preconditioning approaches suffer from either high construction cost or slow convergence rate, both resulting in unsatisfactory total solution time. In this work, we propose an efficient power grid simulator based on fast randomized Cholesky factorization, named PowerRChol. We first propose a randomized Cholesky factorization algorithm with provable linear-time complexity. Then we propose a randomized factorization oriented matrix reordering approach. Experimental results on large-scale power grids demonstrate the superior efficiency of PowerRChol over existing iterative solvers, showing 1.51X, 1.93X and 3.64X speedups on average over the original RChol [3], feGRASS [11] and AMG [14] based PCG solvers, respectively. For instance, a power grid matrix with 60 million nodes and 260 million nonzeros can be solved (at a 1E-6 accuracy level) in 148 seconds on a single CPU core.
papers.abstract_zh: 高效的电网分析对于现代 VLSI 设计至关重要。它在计算上具有挑战性，因为它需要求解具有数百万个未知数的大型线性方程。迭代求解器更具可扩展性，但其性能依赖于预处理器。现有的预处理方法要么构造成本高，要么收敛速度慢，导致总求解时间不理想。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于快速随机 Cholesky 分解的高效电网模拟器，名为 PowerRChol。我们首先提出了一种具有可证明的线性时间复杂度的随机 Cholesky 分解算法。然后我们提出了一种面向随机因式分解的矩阵重新排序方法。大规模电网的实验结果证明了 PowerRChol 比现有迭代求解器具有更高的效率，与原始基于 RChol [3]、feGRASS [11] 和 AMG [14] 的 PCG 求解器相比，平均加速分别为 1.51 倍、1.93 倍和 3.64 倍。例如，具有 6000 万个节点和 2.6 亿个非零值的电网矩阵可以在单个 CPU 内核上在 148 秒内求解（以 1E-6 精度级别）。

papers.title: PowPrediCT: Cross-Stage Power Prediction with Circuit-Transformation-Aware Learning.
papers.abstract: Accurate and efficient power analysis at early VLSI design stages is critical for effective power optimization. It is a promising yet challenging task to model the circuit power at early design stages, especially during placement with the clock tree and final signal routing unavailable. Additionally, optimization-induced circuit transformations like circuit restructuring and gate sizing can invalidate fine-grained power supervision. Addressing these difficulties, we introduce the first circuit-transformation-aware power prediction model at placement stage with robust generalization capabilities. Our technology includes a dedicated clock tree model and an innovative train-and-calibrate scheme that effectively integrates topological and layout features. Compared to the cutting-edge commercial IC engine Innovus, we have significantly reduced the cross-stage power analysis error between placement and detailed routing.
papers.abstract_zh: 早期 VLSI 设计阶段准确、高效的功耗分析对于有效的功耗优化至关重要。在早期设计阶段对电路功率进行建模是一项有前途但具有挑战性的任务，特别是在时钟树和最终信号布线不可用的布局期间。此外，优化引起的电路转换（例如电路重组和门尺寸调整）可能会使细粒度的电源监控失效。为了解决这些困难，我们在布局阶段引入了第一个具有强大泛化能力的电路变换感知功率预测模型。我们的技术包括专用时钟树模型和创新的训练和校准方案，可有效集成拓扑和布局功能。与尖端商用IC引擎Innovus相比，我们显着降低了布局和详细布线之间的跨级功耗分析误差。

papers.title: PPA-Relevant Clustering-Driven Placement for Large-Scale VLSI Designs.
papers.abstract: Today's place-and-route (P&R) flows are increasingly challenged by complexity and scale of modern designs. Often, heuristics must trade off between turnaround time and quality of PPA outcomes. This paper presents a clustered placement methodology that improves both turnaround time and final-routed solution quality. Our PPA-aware clustering considers timing, power and logical hierarchy during netlist clustering, effectively reducing problem size and accelerating global placement runtime while improving post-route PPA metrics. Additionally, our machine learning (ML)-accelerated virtualized P&R methodology predicts the best cluster shapes (i.e., aspect ratios and utilizations) to use in P&R of the clustered netlist. With the open-source OpenROAD tool, our methods achieve up to 47% (average: 36%) global placement runtime improvement with similar half-perimeter wirelength (HPWL) and 90% (29%) improvement in post-route total negative slack (TNS). With the commercial Cadence Innovus tool, our methods achieve up to 3.92% (1%) improvement in power and 99% (49%) improvement in TNS.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今的布局布线 (P&R) 流程日益受到现代设计的复杂性和规模的挑战。通常，启发式方法必须在周转时间和 PPA 结果质量之间进行权衡。本文提出了一种集群布局方法，可提高周转时间和最终路由解决方案的质量。我们的 PPA 感知集群在网表集群期间考虑时序、功耗和逻辑层次结构，有效减少问题规模并加速全局布局运行时间，同时改进布线后 PPA 指标。此外，我们的机器学习 (ML) 加速虚拟化 P&R 方法可以预测在集群网表的 P&R 中使用的最佳集群形状（即纵横比和利用率）。借助开源 OpenROAD 工具，我们的方法在类似的半周线长 (HPWL) 下实现了高达 47%（平均：36%）的全局布局运行时间改进，并且布线后总负裕度 (TNS) 提高了 90% (29%)。借助商业 Cadence Innovus 工具，我们的方法在功率方面实现了高达 3.92% (1%) 的改进，在 TNS 方面实现了 99% (49%) 的改进。

papers.title: PPGNN: Fast and Accurate Privacy-Preserving Graph Neural Network Inference via Parallel and Pipelined Arithmetic-and-Logic FHE Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly used in fields like social media and bioinformatics, promoting the prosperity of cloud-based GNN inference services. Nevertheless, data privacy becomes a critical issue when handling sensitive information. Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables computations on encrypted data, while privacy-preserving GNN inference generally necessitates ensuring graph structure data confidentiality and maintaining computation precision, both of which are computationally expensive in FHE. Existing schemes of GNNs inference with FHE are deterred by either computational overhead, accuracy degradation, or incomplete data protection. This paper presents PPGNN to address these challenges all at once. We first propose a novel privacy-preserving GNN inference algorithm utilizing a high-accuracy arithmetic-and-logic FHE approach, meanwhile only need much smaller parameters, substantially reducing computational complexity and facilitating parallel processing. Correspondingly, a dedicated hardware architecture has been designed to implement these innovations, with featured specialized units for arithmetic and logic FHE operations in a pipelined manner. Collectively, PPGNN achieves 2.7× and 1.5× speedup over state-of-the-art Arithmetic FHE and Logic FHE accelerators while ensuring high accuracy, simultaneously with about 18× energy reduction on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）越来越多地应用于社交媒体、生物信息学等领域，促进了基于云的 GNN 推理服务的繁荣。然而，在处理敏感信息时，数据隐私成为一个关键问题。完全同态加密（FHE）可以对加密数据进行计算，而保护隐私的 GNN 推理通常需要确保图结构数据的机密性和保持计算精度，这两者在 FHE 中的计算成本都很高。现有的 GNN 与 FHE 推理方案因计算开销、准确性下降或不完整的数据保护而受到阻碍。本文提出 PPGNN 来同时解决这些挑战。我们首先提出了一种新颖的隐私保护 GNN 推理算法，利用高精度算术逻辑 FHE 方法，同时只需要更小的参数，大大降低了计算复杂度并促进并行处理。相应地，我们设计了专用硬件架构来实现这些创新，并具有以流水线方式进行算术和逻辑 FHE 运算的专用单元。总的来说，PPGNN 比最先进的算术 FHE 和逻辑 FHE 加速器实现了 2.7 倍和 1.5 倍的加速，同时确保高精度，同时平均能耗降低约 18 倍。

papers.title: Predicting Lemmas in Generalization of IC3.
papers.abstract: The IC3 algorithm, also known as PDR, has made a significant impact in the field of safety model checking in recent years due to its high efficiency, scalability, and completeness. The most crucial component of IC3 is inductive generalization, which involves dropping variables one by one and is often the most time-consuming step. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to predict a possible minimal lemma before dropping variables by utilizing the counterexample to propagation (CTP). By leveraging this approach, we can avoid dropping variables if predict successfully. The comprehensive evaluation demonstrates a commendable success rate in lemma prediction and a significant performance improvement achieved by our proposed method.
papers.abstract_zh: IC3算法，又称PDR，由于其高效率、可扩展性和完整性，近年来在安全模型检查领域产生了重大影响。 IC3 最关键的组成部分是归纳泛化，这涉及到将变量一一删除，并且通常是最耗时的步骤。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，通过利用传播反例（CTP）在丢弃变量之前预测可能的最小引理。通过利用这种方法，如果预测成功，我们可以避免丢弃变量。综合评估表明，引理预测的成功率值得称赞，并且我们提出的方法取得了显着的性能改进。

papers.title: PT-Map: Efficient Program Transformation Optimization for CGRA Mapping.
papers.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array (CGRA) is a parallel architecture providing high energy efficiency and spatial-temporal re-configurability. Beyond loop scheduling for throughput optimization, program transformation is also crucial in CGRA mapping to optimize overall performance and efficiency. However, existing studies on program transformation optimization face challenges in exploring the transformation space systematically and evaluating candidates efficiently, leading to sub-optimal results. To tackle these challenges, this paper introduces PT-Map, an efficient program transformation optimization framework for CGRA mapping. PT-Map defines a comprehensive transformation space and employs a CGRA-specialized top-down exploration approach. It also incorporates a bottom-up evaluation scheme using architectural parameters and a graph neural network-based predictive model. Experiments demonstrate that PT-Map achieves up to 2.95X/1.80X speedups and 59.0%/23.2% energy-delay-product (EDP) reductions over the state-of-the-art approaches MapZero and PBP, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）是一种并行架构，提供高能效和时空可重构性。除了用于吞吐量优化的循环调度之外，程序转换在 CGRA 映射中对于优化整体性能和效率也至关重要。然而，现有的程序转换优化研究在系统地探索转换空间和有效评估候选方案方面面临挑战，导致结果次优。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 PT-Map，一种用于 CGRA 映射的高效程序转换优化框架。 PT-Map定义了一个综合的变换空间，并采用了CGRA专门的自上而下的探索方法。它还结合了使用架构参数和基于图神经网络的预测模型的自下而上的评估方案。实验表明，与最先进的方法 MapZero 和 PBP 相比，PT-Map 分别实现了高达 2.95 倍/1.80 倍的加速和 59.0%/23.2% 的能量延迟产物 (EDP) 减少。

papers.title: PVTSizing: A TuRBO-RL-Based Batch-Sampling Optimization Framework for PVT-Robust Analog Circuit Synthesis.
papers.abstract: With the CMOS technology advancing and the complexity of circuits growing, the demand for analog/mixed-signal design automation tools is increasing quickly. Although some tools have been developed to tackle this challenge, the performance degradation caused by process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations has been less considered. This paper presents PVTSizing, an optimization framework for PVT-robust analog circuit synthesis. PVTSizing adopts trust region Bayesian optimization (TuRBO) for high-quality initial datasets and reference points. Multi-task reinforcement learning (RL) is utilized for PVT optimization. Both TuRBO and RL are batch-friendly, allowing parallel sampling of design solutions. Meanwhile, critic-assisted pruning and zoom target metrics are proposed to improve sample efficiency and reduce runtime. In addition, this framework naturally supports sizing over random mismatch. On 4 real-world circuits with TSMC 28/180nm process, PVTSizing achieves 1.9X --8.8X sample efficiency and 1.6X --9.8X time efficiency improvements compared to prior sizing tools from both industry and academia.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 CMOS 技术的进步和电路复杂性的增加，对模拟/混合信号设计自动化工具的需求正在迅速增加。尽管已经开发了一些工具来应对这一挑战，但很少考虑由工艺、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化引起的性能下降。本文提出了 PVTSizing，一种用于 PVT 鲁棒模拟电路综合的优化框架。 PVTSizing 采用信赖域贝叶斯优化 (TuRBO) 来获得高质量的初始数据集和参考点。多任务强化学习 (RL) 用于 PVT 优化。 TuRBO 和 RL 都是批量友好的，允许对设计解决方案进行并行采样。同时，提出了批评辅助剪枝和缩放目标度量来提高样本效率并减少运行时间。此外，该框架自然支持随机不匹配的大小调整。在采用 TSMC 28/180nm 工艺的 4 个实际电路上，与业界和学术界之前的尺寸调整工具相比，PVTSizing 实现了 1.9 倍 --8.8 倍的采样效率和 1.6 倍 --9.8 倍的时间效率改进。

papers.title: Q-Pilot: Field Programmable Qubit Array Compilation with Flying Ancillas.
papers.abstract: Neutral atom arrays, particularly the reconfigurable field programmable qubit arrays (FPQA) with atom movement, show strong promise for quantum computing. FPQA has a dynamic qubit connectivity, facilitating cost-effective execution of long-range gates, but it also poses new challenges in the compilation. Inspired by the FPGA compilation strategy, we develop a router, Q-Pilot, that leverages flying ancillas to implement 2-Q gates between data qubits mapped to fixed atoms. Equipped with domain-specific routing techniques, Q-Pilot achieves 1.4×, 27.7×, and 6.7× reductions in circuit depth for 100-qubit random, quantum simulation, and QAOA circuits, respectively, compared to alternative fixed atom array architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 中性原子阵列，特别是具有原子运动的可重构现场可编程量子位阵列（FPQA），显示出量子计算的巨大前景。 FPQA 具有动态量子位连接性，有助于经济有效地执行远程门，但它也给编译带来了新的挑战。受 FPGA 编译策略的启发，我们开发了一种路由器 Q-Pilot，它利用飞行辅助装置在映射到固定原子的数据量子位之间实现 2-Q 门。与替代的固定原子阵列架构相比，Q-Pilot 配备了特定于域的路由技术，100 量子位随机、量子模拟和 QAOA 电路的电路深度分别减少了 1.4 倍、27.7 倍和 6.7 倍。

papers.title: QuGeo: An End-to-end Quantum Learning Framework for Geoscience - A Case Study on Full-Waveform Inversion.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of quantum computing has generated considerable anticipation for its transformative potential. However, harnessing its full potential relies on identifying "killer applications". In this regard, QuGeo emerges as a groundbreaking quantum learning framework, poised to become a key application in geoscience, particularly for Full-Waveform Inversion (FWI). This framework integrates variational quantum circuits with geoscience, representing a novel fusion of quantum computing and geophysical analysis. This synergy unlocks quantum computing's potential within geoscience. It addresses the critical need for physics-guided data scaling, ensuring high-performance geoscientific analyses aligned with core physical principles. Furthermore, QuGeo's introduction of a quantum circuit custom-designed for FWI highlights the critical importance of application-specific circuit design for quantum computing. In the OpenFWI's FlatVelA dataset experiments, the variational quantum circuit from QuGeo, with only 576 parameters, achieved significant improvement in performance. It reached a Structural Similarity Image Metric (SSIM) score of 0.905 between the ground truth and the output velocity map. This is a notable enhancement from the baseline design's SSIM score of 0.800, which was achieved without the incorporation of physics knowledge.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算的快速发展引发了对其变革潜力的巨大期待。然而，充分发挥其潜力依赖于识别“杀手级应用程序”。在这方面，QuGeo 作为一个突破性的量子学习框架而出现，有望成为地球科学的关键应用，特别是全波形反演 (FWI)。该框架将变分量子电路与地球科学相结合，代表了量子计算和地球物理分析的新颖融合。这种协同作用释放了量子计算在地球科学领域的潜力。它满足了物理引导数据扩展的关键需求，确保高性能地球科学分析符合核心物理原理。此外，QuGeo 推出的专为 FWI 定制的量子电路凸显了量子计算专用电路设计的至关重要性。在OpenFWI的FlatVelA数据集实验中，QuGeo的变分量子电路仅用576个参数，就取得了性能上的显着提升。它在地面实况和输出速度图之间达到了 0.905 的结构相似性图像度量 (SSIM) 分数。与基线设计的 SSIM 分数 0.800 相比，这是一个显着的提高，而基线设计的 SSIM 分数是在没有结合物理知识的情况下实现的。

papers.title: QUQ: Quadruplet Uniform Quantization for Efficient Vision Transformer Inference.
papers.abstract: While exhibiting superior performance in many tasks, vision transformers (ViTs) face challenges in quantization. Some existing low-bit-width quantization techniques cannot effectively cover the whole inference process of ViTs, leading to an additional memory overhead (22.3%-172.6%) compared with corresponding fully quantized models. To address this issue, we propose quadruplet uniform quantization (QUQ) to deal with data of various distributions in ViT. QUQ divides the entire data range into at most four subranges that are uniformly quantized with different scale factors. To determine the partition scheme and quantization parameters, an efficient relaxation algorithm is proposed accordingly. Moreover, dedicated encoding and decoding strategies are devised to facilitate the design of an efficient accelerator. Experimental results show that QUQ surpasses state-of-the-art quantization techniques; it is the first viable scheme that can fully quantize ViTs to 6-bit with acceptable accuracy. Compared with conventional uniform quantization, QUQ leads to not only a higher accuracy but also an accelerator with lower area and power.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然视觉转换器 (ViT) 在许多任务中表现出卓越的性能，但在量化方面面临着挑战。现有的一些低位宽量化技术无法有效覆盖ViT的整个推理过程，与相应的全量化模型相比，导致额外的内存开销（22.3%-172.6%）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出四重态均匀量化（QUQ）来处理 ViT 中各种分布的数据。 QUQ 将整个数据范围划分为最多四个子范围，并使用不同的比例因子进行统一量化。为了确定分区方案和量化参数，相应地提出了一种有效的松弛算法。此外，还设计了专用的编码和解码策略，以促进高效加速器的设计。实验结果表明，QUQ 超越了最先进的量化技术；它是第一个能够以可接受的精度将 ViT 完全量化为 6 位的可行方案。与传统的均匀量化相比，QUQ不仅具有更高的精度，而且加速器的面积和功耗更低。

papers.title: RCGP: An Automatic Synthesis Framework for Reversible Quantum-Flux-Parametron Logic Circuits based on Efficient Cartesian Genetic Programming.
papers.abstract: Reversible computing has gained increasing attention as a prospective solution for energy dissipation, particularly in quantum computing. As the first practical reversible logic gate using adiabatic superconducting devices, the reversible quantum-flux-parametron (RQFP) has been experimentally demonstrated in logical and physical reversibility. However, the circuit design of RQFP logic poses enormous challenges due to its distinctive logic function and structure. Furthermore, the circuit scale severely restricts the applicability of the existing exact logic synthesis method for RQFP logic. Therefore, this paper proposes RCGP, an automatic synthesis framework based on efficient Cartesian genetic programming, to generate large RQFP logic circuits. RCGP considers the characteristics of RQFP logic circuits to minimize the number of gates and garbage outputs. Meanwhile, RCGP combines circuit simulation with formal verification to assess the functional equivalence between the parent and its offspring. Experimental results on reversible logic benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of RCGP.
papers.abstract_zh: 可逆计算作为能量耗散的潜在解决方案越来越受到关注，特别是在量子计算中。作为第一个使用绝热超导器件的实用可逆逻辑门，可逆量子通量参数（RQFP）已在逻辑和物理可逆性方面得到了实验证明。然而，RQFP逻辑由于其独特的逻辑功能和结构，给电路设计带来了巨大的挑战。此外，电路规模严重限制了现有的RQFP逻辑精确逻辑综合方法的适用性。因此，本文提出RCGP，一种基于高效笛卡尔遗传编程的自动综合框架，用于生成大型RQFP逻辑电路。 RCGP考虑了RQFP逻辑电路的特性，尽量减少门数和垃圾输出。同时，RCGP 将电路仿真与形式验证相结合，以评估亲代及其后代之间的功能等效性。可逆逻辑基准测试的实验结果证明了 RCGP 的有效性。

papers.title: ReCG: ReRAM-Accelerated Sparse Conjugate Gradient.
papers.abstract:
Solving sparse linear systems is crucial in scientific computing. Sparse Conjugate Gradient (CG) is one of the most well-known iterative solvers with high efficiency and low storage requirements. However, the performance of sparse CG solvers implemented on storage-compute separated architectures is greatly limited by the irregular memory access and the large amount of data transmission.

In this paper, we propose a processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture, ReCG, based on the resistive random-access memory (ReRAM) to accelerate sparse CG solvers. The design of ReCG faces three major challenges: (1) how to make complex sparse CG more suitable for acceleration with ReRAM-based architecture, (2) how to map sparse and irregular operations to regular crossbars that are more suitable for dense operations, and (3) how to coordinate the dataflow among hardware units to minimize the impact of the poor write endurance of ReRAMs on CG acceleration. To address these challenges, we (1) classify the kernels of sparse CG by exploring the commonality of operations and design a flexible and dedicated architecture, (2) efficiently implement the sparse and irregular operations by utilizing both content-addressable memory (CAM) and multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) crossbars, and (3) develop a novel scheduling strategy for the dataflow. The experimental results show that ReCG improves the performance by up to three, one and one order of magnitude compared with PETSc on CPU and GPU and CALLIPEPLA on FPGA, respectively, and the energy consumption is reduced by up to two, two and one order of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh:
求解稀疏线性系统对于科学计算至关重要。稀疏共轭梯度（CG）是最著名的迭代求解器之一，具有高效率和低存储要求。然而，存储-计算分离架构上实现的稀疏CG求解器的性能受到不规则的内存访问和大量数据传输的极大限制。

在本文中，我们提出了一种基于电阻式随机存取存储器（ReRAM）的内存处理（PIM）架构ReCG，以加速稀疏CG求解器。 ReCG的设计面临三大挑战：（1）如何使复杂的稀疏CG更适合基于ReRAM的架构加速；（2）如何将稀疏和不规则的操作映射到更适合密集操作的规则交叉开关；（3）如何协调硬件单元之间的数据流，以尽量减少ReRAM较差的写入耐久性对CG加速的影响。为了应对这些挑战，我们（1）通过探索操作的共性对稀疏CG的内核进行分类，并设计一个灵活且专用的架构，（2）通过利用内容寻址存储器（CAM）和乘法累加（MAC）交叉开关有效地实现稀疏和不规则操作，以及（3）为数据流开发一种新颖的调度策略。实验结果表明，与CPU和GPU上的PETSc以及FPGA上的CALLIPEPLA相比，ReCG分别提高了高达3、1和1个数量级的性能，并且能耗降低了高达2、2和1个数量级。

papers.title: Redistribution Layer Routing with Dynamic Via Insertion Under Irregular Via Structures.
papers.abstract: In modern advanced packaging, redistribution layers (RDLs) are often used for signal transmission among chips, and vias are used for communication among different layers. Most existing RDL routers perform via planning before routing. However, since vias can be placed at arbitrary locations under the irregular via structure, via planning limits the solution space and reduces layout flexibility. This paper proposes a new flow with a novel routing graph model for 90- and 135-degree routing, which allows dynamic via insertion during routing. The proposed algorithm enlarges the solution space by providing more choices during path-finding, achieving higher routing quality. The experimental results based on commonly used benchmark suites show that our router achieves over 10% better wirelength with over 29X speedup over the state-of-the-art work and even achieves 0.4% better wirelength with 55X speedup over the state-of-the-art any-angle router.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代先进封装中，重分布层（RDL）通常用于芯片之间的信号传输，而过孔则用于不同层之间的通信。大多数现有的 RDL 路由器都是通过在路由之前进行规划来执行的。然而，由于通孔可以放置在不规则通孔结构下的任意位置，因此通孔规划限制了解决方案空间并降低了布局灵活性。本文提出了一种新流程，具有用于 90 度和 135 度布线的新颖布线图模型，允许在布线期间动态插入过孔。该算法通过在寻路过程中提供更多选择来扩大解空间，实现更高的路由质量。基于常用基准套件的实验结果表明，我们的路由器的线长比最先进的路由器提高了 10% 以上，加速超过 29 倍，甚至比最先进的任意角度路由器的线长提高了 0.4%，加速提高了 55 倍。

papers.title: Reducing DRAM Latency via In-situ Temperature- and Process-Variation-Aware Timing Detection and Adaption.
papers.abstract: Long DRAM access latency has a significant impact on modern system performance. However, the improvement of DRAM access latency is limited, as the DRAM vendors reserve considerable timing margins against seldom worst-case conditions. To mitigate such pessimistic timing margins, we propose a temperature- and process-variation-aware timing detection and adaption DRAM (TPDA-DRAM) architecture. It equips in-situ cross-coupled detectors to monitor the voltage difference between bitline pairs, enabling estimation of timing margins caused by process and temperature variations. Moreover, TPDA-DRAM incorporates two collaborative timing adaption schemes: 1) a process-variation-aware timing adaption scheme (PVA) that selectively accelerates the access to weak cells, and 2) a temperature-variation-aware timing adaption scheme (TVA) that precisely adjusts timing parameters by adopting temperature information. Compared to prior art, the proposed detector reduces detection deviation by 54.8% and area overhead by 88.1%. The system-level evaluation in an eight-core system shows that TPDA-DRAM improves the average performance and energy efficiency by 20.5% and 15.0%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 较长的 DRAM 访问延迟对现代系统性能具有重大影响。然而，DRAM 访问延迟的改善是有限的，因为 DRAM 供应商为很少出现的最坏情况条件保留了相当大的时序裕度。为了缓解这种悲观的时序裕度，我们提出了一种温度和工艺变化感知时序检测和自适应 DRAM (TPDA-DRAM) 架构。它配备了原位交叉耦合检测器来监控位线对之间的电压差，从而能够估计由工艺和温度变化引起的时序裕度。此外，TPDA-DRAM还采用了两种协作时序自适应方案：1）选择性地加速对弱单元的访问的工艺变化感知时序自适应方案（PVA），以及2）通过采用温度信息精确调整时序参数的温度变化感知时序自适应方案（TVA）。与现有技术相比，所提出的检测器将检测偏差减少了54.8%，将面积开销减少了88.1%。在八核系统中的系统级评估表明，TPDA-DRAM的平均性能和能效分别提高了20.5%和15.0%。

papers.title: Revisiting Automatic Pipelining: Gate-level Forwarding and Speculation.
papers.abstract:
Pipelining is a widely applied micro-architectural performance optimization and requires non-trivial designs for better execution throughput. The key to pipeline throughput optimization is to resolve data hazards caused by read-after-write (RAW) dependencies, which are traditionally tackled by forwarding and speculation to avoid pipeline stalls. However, existing approaches are conducted based on high-level dataflow analysis, with potential loss of optimization opportunities for lack of analysis of the netlist structures.

We propose an efficient method to resolve RAW dependencies with low-level netlist analysis by gate-level forwarding and speculation. With a greedy search method to detect and resolve short-delay gate-level signal paths for forwarding and an approximate circuit synthesis method with formal verification for gate-level speculation, the method efficiently utilizes the gate-level information to further improve pipeline throughput. Even if the gate-level design space is vast, by assembling the logic gates in the short-delay signal paths in fewer adjacent pipeline stages, the forwarding paths and the speculator bypass invalid pipeline stages and thus conceal the latency of these paths. We conduct experiments on the widely-used ISCAS/EPFL benchmark circuits and a large-scale RISC-V CPU, and our approach can find better designs than human experts.
papers.abstract_zh:
流水线是一种广泛应用的微架构性能优化，需要不平凡的设计以获得更好的执行吞吐量。管道吞吐量优化的关键是解决由写后读（RAW）依赖性引起的数据危险，传统上通过转发和推测来解决这些问题以避免管道停顿。然而，现有方法是基于高级数据流分析进行的，由于缺乏对网表结构的分析，可能会失去优化机会。

我们提出了一种有效的方法，通过门级转发和推测来解决低级网表分析的 RAW 依赖性。该方法通过贪婪搜索方法来检测和解析用于转发的短延迟门级信号路径，以及对门级推测进行形式验证的近似电路综合方法，有效地利用门级信息来进一步提高流水线吞吐量。即使门级设计空间很大，通过在较少的相邻流水线级中组装短延迟信号路径中的逻辑门，转发路径和投机器绕过无效流水线级，从而隐藏这些路径的延迟。我们在广泛使用的 ISCAS/EPFL 基准电路和大规模 RISC-V CPU 上进行实验，我们的方法可以找到比人类专家更好的设计。

papers.title: RexBDDs: Reduction-on-Edge Complement-and-Swap Binary Decision Diagrams.
papers.abstract: We introduce RexBDDs, binary decision diagrams (BDDs) that exploit reduction opportunities well beyond those of reduced ordered BDDs, zero-suppressed BDDs, and recent proposals integrating multiple reduction rules. RexBDDs also leverage (output) complement flags and (input) swap flags to potentially decrease the number of nodes by a factor of four. We define a reduced form of RexBDDs that ensures canonicity, and use a set of benchmarks to demonstrate their superior storage and runtime requirements compared to previous alternatives.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了 RexBDD、二元决策图 (BDD)，其利用的缩减机会远远超出了缩减有序 BDD、零抑制 BDD 以及集成多个缩减规则的最新提议。 RexBDD 还利用（输出）补码标志和（输入）交换标志来潜在地将节点数量减少四倍。我们定义了 RexBDD 的简化形式，以确保规范性，并使用一组基准来证明与以前的替代方案相比，它们具有卓越的存储和运行时要求。

papers.title: RISC-V Instruction Set Extensions for Multi-Precision Integer Arithmetic: A Case Study on Post-Quantum Key Exchange Using CSIDH-512.
papers.abstract: Multi-Precision Integer (MPI) arithmetic is a performance-critical component of many public-key cryptosystems, including besides classical ones (e.g., RSA, ECC) also isogeny-based post-quantum schemes. In this paper, we analyze and compare two widely-used MPI representations, namely full-radix and reduced-radix, for the efficient implementation of modular arithmetic operations on the 64-bit RISC-V (RV64GC) architecture. We also evaluate how the execution times of both can be further improved with Instruction Set Extensions (ISEs). The ISEs we propose are able to accelerate a CSIDH-512 class group action by a factor of 1.71 compared to a standard software implementation on a 64-bit Rocket core. This speed-up comes at the cost of a hardware overhead of about 10%.
papers.abstract_zh: 多精度整数 (MPI) 算法是许多公钥密码系统的性能关键组成部分，除了经典密码系统（例如 RSA、ECC）之外，还包括基于同源的后量子方案。在本文中，我们分析和比较了两种广泛使用的 MPI 表示形式，即全基数和缩减基数，以在 64 位 RISC-V (RV64GC) 架构上有效实现模块化算术运算。我们还评估了如何通过指令集扩展 (ISE) 进一步改进两者的执行时间。与 64 位 Rocket 核心上的标准软件实现相比，我们建议的 ISE 能够将 CSIDH-512 集体诉讼加速 1.71 倍。这种加速是以约 10% 的硬件开销为代价的。

papers.title: RL-PTQ: RL-based Mixed Precision Quantization for Hybrid Vision Transformers.
papers.abstract: Existing quantization approaches incur significant accuracy loss when compressing hybrid convolution and transformer models with low bit-width. This paper presents RL-PTQ, a novel post-training quantization (PTQ) framework utilizing reinforcement learning (RL). Our focus is on determining the most effective bit-width and observer for quantization configurations tailored for mixed precision by grouping layers and addressing the challenges of quantization of hybrid transformers. We achieved the highest quantized accuracy for MobileViTs compared to the previous PTQ methods [5--7]. Furthermore, our quantized model on Processing In Memory (PIM) architecture exhibited an energy efficiency enhancement of 10.1× and 22.6× compared to the baseline model, on the state-of-the-art PIM accelerator [15] and GPU, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的量化方法在压缩低位宽的混合卷积和变换器模型时会导致严重的精度损失。本文提出了 RL-PTQ，一种利用强化学习 (RL) 的新型训练后量化 (PTQ) 框架。我们的重点是通过对层进行分组来确定针对混合精度量身定制的量化配置的最有效位宽和观测器，并解决混合变压器量化的挑战。与之前的 PTQ 方法相比，我们为 MobileViTs 实现了最高的量化精度 [5--7]。此外，我们的内存处理 (PIM) 架构量化模型在最先进的 PIM 加速器 [15] 和 GPU 上与基准模型相比分别表现出 10.1 倍和 22.6 倍的能效提升。

papers.title: RT-MDM: Real-Time Scheduling Framework for Multi-DNN on MCU Using External Memory.
papers.abstract: As the application scope of DNNs executed on microcontroller units (MCUs) extends to time-critical systems, it becomes important to ensure timing guarantees for increasing demand of DNN inferences. To this end, this paper proposes RT-MDM, the first RealTime scheduling framework for Multiple DNN tasks executed on an MCU using external memory. Identifying execution-order dependencies among segmented DNN models and memory requirements for parallel execution subject to the dependencies, we propose (i) a segment-group-based memory management policy that achieves isolated memory usage within a segment group and sharded memory usage across different segment groups, and (ii) an intra-task scheduler specialized for the proposed policy. Implementing RT-MDM on an actual system and optimizing its parameters for DNN segmentation and segment-group mapping, we demonstrate the effectiveness of RT-MDM in accommodating more DNN tasks while providing their timing guarantees.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着在微控制器单元 (MCU) 上执行的 DNN 的应用范围扩展到时间关键型系统，确保时序保证以满足不断增长的 DNN 推理需求变得非常重要。为此，本文提出了 RT-MDM，这是第一个使用外部存储器在 MCU 上执行的多个 DNN 任务的实时调度框架。识别分段 DNN 模型之间的执行顺序依赖性以及受依赖性影响的并行执行的内存需求，我们提出了（i）基于段组的内存管理策略，该策略实现了段组内的隔离内存使用和不同段组之间的分片内存使用，以及（ii）专门针对所提出的策略的任务内调度程序。在实际系统上实现 RT-MDM 并优化其用于 DNN 分段和段组映射的参数，我们证明了 RT-MDM 在容纳更多 DNN 任务同时提供时序保证方面的有效性。

papers.title: RTGA: A Redundancy-free Accelerator for High-Performance Temporal Graph Neural Network Inference.
papers.abstract: Temporal Graph Neural Network (TGNN) has attracted much research attention because it can capture the dynamic nature of complex networks. However, existing solutions suffer from redundant computation overhead and excessive off-chip communications for TGNN inference because they often rely on redundant graph sampling and repeatedly fetching the features and vertex memory. This paper proposes a redundancy-free accelerator, RTGA, for high-performance TGNN inference. Specifically, RTGA proposes a redundancy-aware execution approach with temporal tree into a novel accelerator design to effectively eliminate unnecessary data processing for fewer redundant computations and off-chip communications and also designs a temporal-aware data caching method to improve data locality for TGNN. We have implemented and evaluated RTGA on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card. Compared with cutting-edge software solutions (i.e., TGN and TGL) and hardware solutions (i.e., BlockGNN and FlowGNN), RTGA improves the performance of TGNN inference by an average of 473.2x, 87.4x, 8.2x, and 6.9x and saves energy by 542.8x, 102.2x, 9.4x, and 8.3x, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 时态图神经网络（TGNN）因其能够捕获复杂网络的动态性质而引起了广泛的研究关注。然而，现有的解决方案面临着冗余计算开销和用于 TGNN 推理的过多片外通信，因为它们通常依赖于冗余图采样并重复获取特征和顶点内存。本文提出了一种用于高性能 TGNN 推理的无冗余加速器 RTGA。具体来说，RTGA 在新颖的加速器设计中提出了一种带有时间树的冗余感知执行方法，以有效消除不必要的数据处理，以减少冗余计算和片外通信，并设计了一种时间感知数据缓存方法来提高 TGNN 的数据局部性。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现并评估了 RTGA。与前沿的软件解决方案（TGN、TGL）和硬件解决方案（BlockGNN、FlowGNN）相比，RTGA 的 TGNN 推理性能平均提升了 473.2 倍、87.4 倍、8.2 倍和 6.9 倍，节能分别为 542.8 倍、102.2 倍、9.4 倍和 8.3 倍。

papers.title: RTLFixer: Automatically Fixing RTL Syntax Errors with Large Language Model.
papers.abstract: This paper presents RTLFixer , a novel framework enabling automatic syntax errors fixing for Verilog code with Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite LLM's promising capabilities, our analysis indicates that approximately 55% of errors in LLM-generated Verilog are syntax-related, leading to compilation failures. To tackle this issue, we introduce a novel debugging framework that employs Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and ReAct prompting, enabling LLMs to act as autonomous agents in interactively debugging the code with feedback. This framework demonstrates exceptional proficiency in resolving syntax errors, successfully correcting about 98.5% of compilation errors in our debugging dataset, comprising 212 erroneous implementations derived from the VerilogEval benchmark. Our method leads to 32.3% and 10.1% increase in pass@1 success rates in the VerilogEval-Machine and VerilogEval-Human benchmarks, respectively. The source code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/RTLFixer.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 RTLFixer，这是一种新颖的框架，可以使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 自动修复 Verilog 代码的语法错误。尽管 LLM 的功能很有前途，但我们的分析表明，LLM 生成的 Verilog 中大约 55% 的错误与语法相关，从而导致编译失败。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的调试框架，该框架采用检索增强生成（RAG）和 ReAct 提示，使 LLM 能够充当自主代理，通过反馈交互式调试代码。该框架在解决语法错误方面表现出卓越的能力，成功纠正了调试数据集中约 98.5% 的编译错误，其中包括源自 VerilogEval 基准测试的 212 个错误实现。我们的方法使 VerilogEval-Machine 和 VerilogEval-Human 基准测试中的 pass@1 成功率分别提高了 32.3% 和 10.1%。源代码和基准测试可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/RTLFixer 上获取。

papers.title: RWriC: A Dynamic Writing Scheme for Variation Compensation for RRAM-based In-Memory Computing.
papers.abstract: RRAM-based compute-in-memory (CIM) suffers from programming variation issues, specifically device-to-device variation (DDV) and cycle-to-cycle variation (CCV), which can have a detrimental impact on inference accuracy. To address these variation issues, we propose RWriC, a dynamic Wri ting scheme for variation C ompensation for R RAM-based CIM. RWriC sequentially programs the weights, implemented by multiple RRAM cells, starting from the high significance cell (HSC) and moving towards the low significance cell (LSC). This approach leverages the knowledge of current cumulative errors and the programming targets (PTs) of other RRAM cells to dynamically adjust the PT of the RRAM currently under programming. By shifting the PT of HSC, RWriC enables the LSC to compensate for the programming errors of the HSC. Moreover, when the variation is substantial, RWriC allows the magnitude of LSC to be scaled up, providing an even wider compensation range. Through the combined application of the shifting and scaling techniques, experimental results show that the inference accuracy for ResNet50 on the CIFAR-10 dataset only drops by 0.9% under 18% device variation. In comparison to the conventional writing scheme, our RWriC approach achieves a 5-11x improvement in variation robustness for ResNet50 and Yolov8 across different tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 RRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 存在编程变异问题，特别是器件间变异 (DDV) 和周期间变异 (CCV)，这可能会对推理精度产生不利影响。为了解决这些变化问题，我们提出了 RWriC，一种用于基于 R RAM 的 CIM 的变化补偿的动态写入方案。 RWriC 按顺序对权重进行编程，由多个 RRAM 单元实现，从高重要性单元 (HSC) 开始，向低重要性单元 (LSC) 移动。该方法利用当前累积误差和其他 RRAM 单元的编程目标 (PT) 的知识来动态调整当前正在编程的 RRAM 的 PT。通过移位 HSC 的 PT，RWriC 使 LSC 能够补偿 HSC 的编程错误。此外，当变化较大时，RWriC 允许扩大 LSC 的幅度，从而提供更宽的补偿范围。通过移位和缩放技术的结合应用，实验结果表明，在 18% 的设备变化下，ResNet50 在 CIFAR-10 数据集上的推理精度仅下降 0.9%。与传统的写入方案相比，我们的 RWriC 方法在不同任务中的 ResNet50 和 Yolov8 的变异鲁棒性提高了 5-11 倍。

papers.title: S2RAM PUF: An Ultra-low Power Subthreshold SRAM PUF with Zero Bit Error Rate.
papers.abstract: The reliability of physical unclonable function (PUF) has become the biggest challenge for key generation. Existing reliability improvement technologies incur high hardware overhead or testing costs. This paper proposes S2RAM-PUF, a novel, highly reliable and energy-efficient subthreshold SRAM PUF fabricated in 65nm process, with zero bit error rate (BER) across all voltage/temperature corners from 0.5V to 0.8V and from -40°C to 120°C. The 20480 bits generated by the fabricated 5 S2RAM PUF chips pass the NIST 800-22 randomness test and exhibit almost ideal uniqueness with a mean inter-die hamming distance of 0.5007. The total energy per bit is as low as 3.12fJ at 0.5V supply voltage. Both stabilization BER and energy outperform the two state-of-the-art SRAM-type PUFs reported in JSSC 2020 and 2021.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆功能（PUF）的可靠性已成为密钥生成的最大挑战。现有的可靠性改进技术会带来较高的硬件开销或测试成本。本文提出了 S2RAM-PUF，这是一种采用 65nm 工艺制造的新型、高度可靠且节能的亚阈值 SRAM PUF，在 0.5V 至 0.8V 以及 -40°C 至 120°C 的所有电压/温度范围内具有零误码率 (BER)。所制造的 5 个 S2RAM PUF 芯片生成的 20480 位通过了 NIST 800-22 随机性测试，并表现出几乎理想的唯一性，平均芯片间汉明距离为 0.5007。在 0.5V 电源电压下，每位总能量低至 3.12fJ。稳定性 BER 和能量均优于 JSSC 2020 和 2021 中报告的两种最先进的 SRAM 型 PUF。

papers.title: Safe Controller Synthesis for Nonlinear Systems via Reinforcement Learning and PAC Approximation.
papers.abstract: Controller synthesis for nonlinear systems is an important research issue. Deep Neural Network (DNN) control policies obtained through reinforcement learning (RL), though exhibiting good performance in simulations, cannot be applied to safety-critical systems for lack of formal guarantee. To address this, this paper considers fully utilizing the advantages of RL for complex control tasks to obtain a well-performing DNN controller.
