papers.abstract_zh: 端到端随机计算 (SC) 通过在 SC 比特流中进行非线性加法（包括累加和激活函数）来实现容错和区域高效的神经加速。然而，现有的非线性加法器设计面临着硬件成本高、占数据路径功率和面积的主要部分的困扰，并且还可能具有有限的计算精度和灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了一种准确而高效的非线性加法器设计。我们分析了现有设计中的冗余，并提出了参数化近似非线性加法器设计空间。通过系统的设计空间探索，我们开发了非线性加法器，其效率明显高于现有设计，且计算误差可忽略不计。我们进一步提出了一种时空架构，以提高各种网络规模的设计灵活性和效率。为了支持最先进的网络，例如 ResNet18，我们证明与基线设计相比，我们的设计可以将数据路径面积减少 2.16 倍。对于 ResNet18 中的大卷积层和小卷积层，我们的设计还可以分别将非线性加法器的面积延迟积 (ADP) 减少 4.13× 和 23.29×。

papers.title: Efficient Transformer Inference with Statically Structured Sparse Attention.
papers.abstract: Self-attention matrices of Transformers are often highly sparse because the relevant context of each token is typically limited to just a few other tokens in the sequence. To reduce the computational burden of self-attention on Transformer inference, we propose static, structured, sparse attention masks that split attention matrices into dense regions, skipping computations outside these regions while reducing computations inside these regions. To support the proposed mask structure, we design an entropy-aware finetuning algorithm to naturally encourage attention sparsity while maximizing task accuracy. Furthermore, we extend a typical dense deep learning accelerator to efficiently exploit our structured sparsity pattern. Compared to a dense baseline, we achieve 56.6% reduction in energy consumption, 58.9% performance improvement with <1% accuracy loss and 2.6% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 的自注意力矩阵通常非常稀疏，因为每个标记的相关上下文通常仅限于序列中的几个其他标记。为了减少 Transformer 推理中自注意力的计算负担，我们提出了静态、结构化、稀疏注意力掩模，将注意力矩阵分割成密集区域，跳过这些区域外的计算，同时减少这些区域内的计算。为了支持所提出的掩模结构，我们设计了一种熵感知微调算法，以自然地鼓励注意力稀疏性，同时最大化任务准确性。此外，我们扩展了典型的密集深度学习加速器，以有效地利用我们的结构化稀疏模式。与密集基线相比，我们实现了 56.6% 的能耗降低、58.9% 的性能提升，同时精度损失小于 1%，面积开销为 2.6%。

papers.title: Emerging Hardware Technologies and 3D System Integration for Ubiquitous Machine Intelligence.
papers.abstract: Next-generation semiconductor hardware technologies and system integration serve as the physical foundation in the pursuit of ubiquitous machine intelligence, with unprecedented requirements in energy efficiency, performance, cost effectiveness, and security. Here, we provide an overview of emerging technologies with an emphasis on 3D system integration, and discuss on cross-layer designs for memory-centric computing in the 3D era.
papers.abstract_zh: 下一代半导体硬件技术和系统集成是追求无处不在的机器智能的物理基础，对能源效率、性能、成本效益和安全性提出了前所未有的要求。在这里，我们概述了新兴技术，重点是 3D 系统集成，并讨论了 3D 时代以内存为中心的计算的跨层设计。

papers.title: Emerging Trends in Multi-Accelerator and Distributed System for ML: Devices, Architectures, Tools and Applications.
papers.abstract: As the complexity and diversity of machine/deep learning models is increasing at a rapid pace, multi-accelerator and distributed systems are becoming a critical component of the machine learning (ML) stack. Besides efficient compute engines and communication mechanisms, these systems also require intelligent strategies for mapping workloads to accelerators and memory management to achieve high performance and energy efficiency, while meeting the demands for high-performance ML/AI systems. This article presents an overview of the emerging trends in multi-accelerator and distributed systems designed for handling complex AI-powered application workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着机器/深度学习模型的复杂性和多样性快速增加，多加速器和分布式系统正在成为机器学习 (ML) 堆栈的关键组成部分。除了高效的计算引擎和通信机制之外，这些系统还需要智能策略将工作负载映射到加速器和内存管理，以实现高性能和能源效率，同时满足高性能 ML/AI 系统的需求。本文概述了旨在处理复杂的人工智能应用程序工作负载的多加速器和分布式系统的新兴趋势。

papers.title: Energy-Efficient On-Chip Training for Customized Home-based Rehabilitation Systems.
papers.abstract: Rehabilitation is an essential process for patients suffering from motor disorders. It is generally performed by experts in a clinical environment. Home-based rehabilitation systems allow patients to perform rehabilitation without going to clinics, thus, reducing the commute and healthcare costs. Human joint estimation allows visualization of body movements required for rehabilitation. However, the estimations can be inaccurate if they are not customized for the specific patient. Therefore, we propose a personalized rehabilitation system customized to new patients utilizing energy-efficient on-chip training with in-memory acceleration. Experiments show that it customizes to new patients successfully with an average 28.01% lower error and provides energy-efficient estimates of human joint coordinates with 611.1× lower inference energy and 14.0× faster training.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于患有运动障碍的患者来说，康复是一个重要的过程。它通常由专家在临床环境中执行。家庭康复系统允许患者无需去诊所即可进行康复，从而减少通勤和医疗费用。人体关节估计可以实现康复所需的身体运动的可视化。然而，如果不是针对特定患者定制的，则估计可能不准确。因此，我们提出了一种针对新患者定制的个性化康复系统，利用具有内存加速功能的节能片上训练。实验表明，它成功地为新患者进行了定制，平均误差降低了 28.01%，并提供了人体关节坐标的节能估计，推理能量降低了 611.1 倍，训练速度提高了 14.0 倍。

papers.title: EP-ORAM: Efficient NVM-Friendly Path Eviction for Ring ORAM in Hybrid Memory.
papers.abstract: Recent studies showed that only ORAM (oblivious RAM) can securely protect memory access patterns (i.e., data privacy) on modern computer systems. Ring ORAM is a promising ORAM protocol as it demands O(1) memory accesses for servicing each user memory request. However, Ring ORAM exhibits low memory utilization, i.e., its memory requirement is 4.8× of the protected user space. While adopting NVM (non-volatile memory) can alleviate the memory requirement, a simple implementation tends to introduce large performance degradation, preventing its adoption in practice.In this paper, we propose EP-ORAM, an NVM-friendly Ring ORAM implementation on DRAM/NVM hybrid memory. EP-ORAM is developed based on two key observations: (1) for tree-based Ring ORAM memory organization, saving bottom levels in NVM can dramatically reduce the DRAM memory requirement; (2) the tradeoffs among Ring ORAM operations expose design opportunities without security compromise. We, therefore, propose to save the bottom levels of the ORAM tree in NVM and shorten the path of EvictPath operation, which not only mitigates the number of NVM writes but also speeds up the execution. Our experimental results show that, under the design constraints of similar performance as the baseline that saves two bottom levels in NVM, EP-ORAM helps to save three levels in NVM, achieving 50% DRAM space reduction. In addition, EP-ORAM reduces the NVM writes by 15%.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，只有 ORAM（不经意的 RAM）才能安全地保护现代计算机系统上的内存访问模式（即数据隐私）。 Ring ORAM 是一种很有前途的 ORAM 协议，因为它需要 O(1) 内存访问来服务每个用户内存请求。然而，Ring ORAM 的内存利用率较低，即其内存需求是受保护用户空间的 4.8 倍。虽然采用 NVM（非易失性存储器）可以减轻存储器需求，但简单的实现往往会带来较大的性能下降，从而阻碍了其在实践中的采用。在本文中，我们提出了 EP-ORAM，这是一种在 DRAM/NVM 混合存储器上实现的 NVM 友好的环形 ORAM。 EP-ORAM 的开发基于两个关键观察：（1）对于基于树的 Ring ORAM 内存组织，在 NVM 中保存底层可以显着减少 DRAM 内存需求； (2) Ring ORAM 操作之间的权衡在不损害安全性的情况下暴露了设计机会。因此，我们建议将ORAM树的底层保存在NVM中，并缩短EvictPath操作的路径，这不仅减少了NVM写入次数，而且加快了执行速度。我们的实验结果表明，在与节省 NVM 两个底层的基准性能类似的设计约束下，EP-ORAM 有助于在 NVM 中节省三个底层，实现 50% 的 DRAM 空间减少。此外，EP-ORAM 将 NVM 写入减少了 15%。

papers.title: Equality Saturation for Datapath Synthesis: A Pathway to Pareto Optimality.
papers.abstract: Equality saturation, originally developed in the late 1970s for use in automated theorem provers, has been recently advanced to perform scalable rule-based rewriting for optimizations in various domains, such as program synthesis, compiler optimization, and datapath synthesis. Constructing an e-graph using rewrite rules that preserve program functionality, equality saturation addresses phase ordering problems in rewriting-driven optimizations. This promising approach shows significant potential for achieving Pareto optimality. This paper provides a brief introduction to equality saturation and the open-source tool egg, and highlights its potential application in optimizing datapaths in both RTL and high-level synthesis. We include case studies and outline the opportunities for future work in both datapath and logic synthesis using equality saturation.
papers.abstract_zh: 等式饱和最初是在 20 世纪 70 年代末开发的，用于自动定理证明器，最近已发展到可以执行可扩展的基于规则的重写，以实现各个领域的优化，例如程序综合、编译器优化和数据路径综合。使用保留程序功能的重写规则构建电子图，等式饱和解决了重写驱动的优化中的相排序问题。这种有前景的方法显示出实现帕累托最优的巨大潜力。本文简要介绍了等式饱和和开源工具 Egg，并重点介绍了其在优化 RTL 和高级综合中的数据路径方面的潜在应用。我们包括案例研究，并概述了使用等式饱和在数据路径和逻辑综合方面未来工作的机会。

papers.title: Ever more optimized simulations of fermionic systems on a quantum computer.
papers.abstract: Despite using a novel model of computation, quantum computers break down programs into elementary gates. Among such gates, entangling gates are the most expensive. In the context of fermionic simulations, we develop a suite of compilation and optimization techniques that massively reduce the entangling-gate counts. We exploit the well-studied non-quantum optimization algorithms to achieve up to 24% savings over the state of the art for several small-molecule simulations, with no loss of accuracy or hidden costs. Our methodologies straightforwardly generalize to wider classes of near-term simulations of the ground state of a fermionic system or real-time simulations probing dynamical properties of a fermionic system.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管使用了一种新颖的计算模型，量子计算机仍将程序分解为基本门。此类门中，纠缠门最为昂贵。在费米子模拟的背景下，我们开发了一套编译和优化技术，可以大大减少纠缠门数量。我们利用经过充分研究的非量子优化算法，在多个小分子模拟中比现有技术节省高达 24%，且不会损失准确性或隐藏成本。我们的方法可以直接推广到更广泛的费米子系统基态近期模拟或探测费米子系统动力学特性的实时模拟。

papers.title: ExploreFault: Identifying Exploitable Fault Models in Block Ciphers with Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Exploitable fault models for block ciphers are typically cipher-specific, and their identification is essential for evaluating and certifying fault attack-protected implementations. However, identifying exploitable fault models has been a complex manual process. In this work, we utilize reinforcement learning (RL) to identify exploitable fault models generically and automatically. In contrast to the several weeks/months of tedious analyses required from experts, our RL-based approach identifies exploitable fault models for protected/unprotected AES and GIFT ciphers within 12 hours. Notably, in addition to all existing fault models, we identify/discover a novel fault model for GIFT, illustrating the power and promise of our approach in exploring new attack avenues.
papers.abstract_zh: 分组密码的可利用故障模型通常是特定于密码的，并且它们的识别对于评估和认证故障攻击保护的实现至关重要。然而，识别可利用的故障模型是一个复杂的手动过程。在这项工作中，我们利用强化学习（RL）来通用地自动识别可利用的故障模型。与专家需要进行数周/数月的繁琐分析相比，我们基于强化学习的方法可在 12 小时内识别受保护/未受保护的 AES 和 GIFT 密码的可利用故障模型。值得注意的是，除了所有现有的故障模型之外，我们还识别/发现了一种新颖的 GIFT 故障模型，说明了我们的方法在探索新攻击途径方面的力量和前景。

papers.title: Fair Will Go On: A Collaboration-Aware Fairness Scheme for NVMe SSD in Cloud Storage System.
papers.abstract: Since multiple flows (users) compete for a single, shared solid state drives (SSDs) concurrently in cloud environments, fairness has drawn great interest in recent years. Although many fair schemes are proposed on different modules of SSDs, such as resource allocation for the cache and chip queue reordering for the transaction scheduling unit (TSU), they fail to continue to provide fairness for the worse locality of I/O requests due to a deeper cloud storage stack that makes cache performance poor. Moreover, existing methods only treat back-end flash as a black box and do not exploit the differences in flash features across requests. This paper proposes CoFS, a novel coordinated SSD cache and TSU light-weight learning-based fair scheme to achieve complete fairness considering cache and bandwidth resources which are significant for fairness control. The key idea is to make the front-end SSD cache achieves fairness at the workload-level by recognizing dynamic I/O changes, while the back-end TSU achieves fairness at the flash-level by awareness of flash page-types, and finally CoFS collaborates with them to achieve fairness at the SSD device-level. Experimental results show that CoFS achieves significant fairness and performance gain of a wide range of the latest cloud block storage workloads, with an average improvement of 46.3% and 94.5% compared to state-of-the-art fairness policies, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于多个流（用户）在云环境中同时竞争单个共享固态硬盘（SSD），因此近年来公平性引起了人们的极大兴趣。尽管在SSD的不同模块上提出了许多公平方案，例如缓存的资源分配和事务调度单元（TSU）的芯片队列重新排序，但由于更深的云存储堆栈导致缓存性能较差，因此它们无法继续为I/O请求的较差局部性提供公平性。此外，现有方法仅将后端闪存视为黑匣子，并且没有利用跨请求的闪存功能的差异。本文提出了 CoFS，一种新颖的协调 SSD 缓存和 TSU 轻量级基于学习的公平方案，以实现完全公平，考虑到对公平控制至关重要的缓存和带宽资源。核心思想是让前端SSD缓存通过识别动态I/O变化实现工作负载级别的公平性，后端TSU通过感知闪存页面类型实现闪存级别的公平性，最后CoFS与它们配合实现SSD设备级别的公平性。实验结果表明，CoFS 在各种最新的云块存储工作负载上实现了显着的公平性和性能提升，与最先进的公平策略相比，平均分别提高了 46.3% 和 94.5%。

papers.title: Fast Adversarial Training with Dynamic Batch-level Attack Control.
papers.abstract: Despite the fact that adversarial training provides an effective protection against adversarial attacks, it suffers from a huge computational overhead. To mitigate the overhead, we propose DBAC, a fast adversarial training with dynamic batch-level attack control. Based on a prior study where attack strength should gradually grow throughout the training, we control the number of samples attacked per batch for better throughput. Additionally, we collect samples from multiple batches to form a pseudo-batch and attack them simultaneously for higher GPU utilization. We implement DBAC using PyTorch to show its superior throughput with similar robust accuracy compared to the prior art.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管对抗性训练可以有效地防御对抗性攻击，但它会承受巨大的计算开销。为了减轻开销，我们提出了 DBAC，一种具有动态批量级攻击控制的快速对抗训练。根据先前的研究，攻击强度应在整个训练过程中逐渐增长，我们控制每批攻击的样本数量以获得更好的吞吐量。此外，我们从多个批次中收集样本以形成伪批次并同时攻击它们以提高 GPU 利用率。我们使用 PyTorch 实现 DBAC，以展示与现有技术相比其卓越的吞吐量和类似的鲁棒精度。

papers.title: Fast FPGA Accelerator of Graph Cut Algorithm with Out-of-order Parallel Execution in Folding Grid Architecture.
papers.abstract: Graph cut is a popular approach to solving optimization tasks related to Min-cut/Max-flow problems. However, existing FPGA accelerators of graph cut have difficulty in handling large grid graphs and achieving real-time performance. To address the issue, we propose a novel folding grid architecture that maps an actual one-layered large 2-dimension grid graph into a virtual multi-layered small 2-dimension grid graph. The new architecture not only enables the virtual multi-layered grid graph to execute on a small-size processor array but also adds the potential to concurrently execute grid graph nodes in different layers. In addition, we also propose a novel out-of-order parallel execution technique to fully utilize the architecture parallelism potential. Compared to the state-of-the-art, experimental results show that our design can solve the graph cut problem for grid graphs of 1920 × 1080 nodes in real-time (above 60fps) and achieve a 5.4× improvement in execution time with similar FPGA resources.
papers.abstract_zh: 图割是解决与最小割/最大流问题相关的优化任务的流行方法。然而，现有的图割FPGA加速器在处理大型网格图和实现实时性能方面存在困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的折叠网格架构，将实际的单层大型二维网格图映射到虚拟多层小型二维网格图。新架构不仅使虚拟多层网格图能够在小尺寸处理器阵列上执行，而且还增加了在不同层中并发执行网格图节点的潜力。此外，我们还提出了一种新颖的乱序并行执行技术，以充分利用架构并行潜力。与现有技术相比，实验结果表明，我们的设计可以实时（60fps以上）解决1920×1080节点网格图的图割问题，并在相似的FPGA资源下实现执行时间提高5.4倍。

papers.title: Faster and Stronger Lossless Compression with Optimized Autoregressive Framework.
papers.abstract: Neural AutoRegressive (AR) framework has been applied in general-purpose lossless compression recently to improve compression performance. However, this paper found that directly applying the original AR framework causes the duplicated processing problem and the in-batch distribution variation problem, which leads to deteriorated compression performance. The key to address the duplicated processing problem is to disentangle the processing of the history symbol set at the input side. Two new types of neural blocks are first proposed. An individual-block performs separate feature extraction on each history symbol while a mix-block models the correlation between extracted features and estimates the probability. A progressive AR-based compression framework (PAC) is then proposed, which only requires one history symbol from the host at a time rather than the whole history symbol set. In addition, we introduced a trainable matrix multiplication to model the ordered importance, replacing previous hardware-unfriendly Gumble-Softmax sampling. The in-batch distribution variation problem is caused by AR-based compression’s structured batch construction. Based on this observation, a batch-location-aware individual block is proposed to capture the heterogeneous in-batch distributions precisely, improving the performance without efficiency losses. Experimental results show the proposed framework can achieve an average of 130% speed improvement with an average of 3% compression ratio gain across data domains compared to the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经自回归（AR）框架最近已应用于通用无损压缩以提高压缩性能。然而本文发现，直接应用原有的AR框架会导致重复处理问题和批量分布变化问题，从而导致压缩性能恶化。解决重复处理问题的关键是解开输入侧历史符号集的处理。首次提出了两种新型神经块。单独块对每个历史符号执行单独的特征提取，而混合块对提取的特征之间的相关性进行建模并估计概率。然后提出了一种基于 AR 的渐进式压缩框架（PAC），该框架一次只需要来自主机的一个历史符号，而不是整个历史符号集。此外，我们引入了可训练的矩阵乘法来对有序重要性进行建模，取代了之前对硬件不友好的 Gumble-Softmax 采样。批次内分布变化问题是由基于 AR 的压缩的结构化批次构造引起的。基于这一观察，提出了一种批量位置感知的单独块来精确捕获异构批量分布，从而在不损失效率的情况下提高性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，所提出的框架可以实现平均 130% 的速度提升，跨数据域的压缩比平均提高 3%。

papers.title: Fault Injection in Native Logic-in-Memory Computation on Neuromorphic Hardware.
papers.abstract: Logic-in-memory (LIM) describes the execution of logic gates within memristive crossbar structures, promising to improve performance and energy efficiency. Utilizing only binary values, LIM particularly excels in accelerating binary neural networks, shifting it in the focus of edge applications. Considering its potential, the impact of faults on BNNs accelerated with LIM still lacks investigation. In this paper, we propose faulty logic-in-memory (FLIM), a fault injection platform capable of executing full-fledged BNNs on LIM while injecting in-field faults. The results show that FLIM runs a single MNIST picture 66754× faster than the state of the art by offering a fine-grained fault injection methodology.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存逻辑（LIM）描述了忆阻交叉结构内逻辑门的执行，有望提高性能和能源效率。 LIM 仅利用二进​​制值，尤其擅长加速二进制神经网络，将其重点转移到边缘应用。考虑到其潜力，LIM 加速故障对 BNN 的影响仍缺乏研究。在本文中，我们提出了内存故障逻辑（FLIM），这是一个故障注入平台，能够在 LIM 上执行成熟的 BNN，同时注入现场故障。结果表明，FLIM 通过提供细粒度的故障注入方法，运行单个 MNIST 图片的速度比现有技术快 66754 倍。

papers.title: Fault Tolerance in Time-Sensitive Networking with Mixed-Critical Traffic.
papers.abstract: As an Ethernet-based communication protocol with timing determinism, TSN (time-sensitive networking) has become a well-recognized promising in-vehicle network solution for increasingly automated automobiles. To satisfy the reliability requirement of safety-critical applications, existing works towards fault-tolerant TSN trade too much bandwidth for redundancy, limiting their scope of applicability. Targeting mixed-critical traffic, which is widely found in practice, we define a shared fault-tolerant segment that is compatible with the TSN standard. It serves the critical flows when faults occur, to improve their reliability and serves the non-critical flows when otherwise, to improve their quality of service (QoS). On top of this, we propose a space-time redundancy scheduling algorithm, aiming to make the most efficient use of bandwidth, i.e., to fulfill both the reliability as well as hard real-time requirements, and maximize the QoS with the least bandwidth. In essence, we formulate a bi-objective design space exploration problem with hundreds of thousands of decision variables and solve it with customized heuristics. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art methods, our reported work increases the number of critical flows that can be accommodated on a resource-constrained network by 3 to 4 times, and achieve the highest QoS with an average reduction of 60.3% in bandwidth. As the first work along sharing of bandwidth between mixed-critical traffic in fault-tolerant TSN, this idea can be further pursued towards higher efficiency and may be applied in general autonomous systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一种基于以太网的具有定时确定性的通信协议，TSN（时间敏感网络）已成为日益自动化的汽车公认的有前途的车载网络解决方案。为了满足安全关键应用的可靠性要求，现有的容错 TSN 工作用过多的带宽换取冗余，限制了它们的适用范围。针对实践中广泛存在的混合关键流量，我们定义了一个与 TSN 标准兼容的共享容错段。它在发生故障时为关键流提供服务，以提高其可靠性；在故障发生时为非关键流提供服务，以提高其服务质量 (QoS)。在此基础上，我们提出了一种空时冗余调度算法，旨在最有效地利用带宽，即既满足可靠性又满足硬实时要求，并以最少的带宽最大化QoS。本质上，我们制定了一个具有数十万个决策变量的双目标设计空间探索问题，并用定制的启发式方法解决它。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们报告的工作将资源有限的网络上可容纳的关键流数量增加了 3 至 4 倍，并实现了最高的 QoS，平均减少了 60.3% 的带宽。作为容错 TSN 中混合关键流量之间共享带宽的第一个工作，这个想法可以进一步追求更高的效率，并可以应用于一般的自治系统。

papers.title: Fault-Tolerance-Oriented Physical Design for Fully Programmable Valve Array Biochips.
papers.abstract: As a new generation of flow-based microfluidics, the Fully Programmable Valve Array (FPVA) biochips have become a popular biochemical experimental platform that provide higher flexibility and programmability. Due to environmental and human factors, however, there are usually some physical faults in the manufacturing process such as channel blockage and leakage, which, undoubtedly, can affect the results of bioassays and even cause execution failure. Accordingly, we focus on the fault-tolerant design of FPVA biochips for the first time in this paper, and present three dynamic fault-tolerant techniques including a cell function conversion method, a bidirectional redundancy scheme, and a fault mapping method. By integrating these techniques into the component placement and channel routing stages, we further realize an efficient and effective fault-tolerance-oriented physical design approach for FPVA biochips, thus ensuring the robustness of chip architecture and correctness of assay outcomes. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks confirm that the proposed approach can generate fault-tolerant FPVA architectures with both high execution efficiency and low fabrication cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为新一代基于流的微流控，完全可编程阀阵列（FPVA）生物芯片已成为流行的生化实验平台，提供更高的灵活性和可编程性。然而，由于环境和人为因素，制造过程中常常会出现一些通道堵塞、泄漏等物理故障，这无疑会影响生物测定的结果，甚至导致执行失败。因此，本文首次关注 FPVA 生物芯片的容错设计，提出了三种动态容错技术，包括单元功能转换方法、双向冗余方案和故障映射方法。通过将这些技术集成到组件布局和通道布线阶段，我们进一步实现了 FPVA 生物芯片高效且有效的面向容错的物理设计方法，从而确保了芯片架构的稳健性和检测结果的正确性。多个基准测试的实验结果证实，所提出的方法可以生成具有高执行效率和低制造成本的容错 FPVA 架构。

papers.title: Fine-Grained QoS Control via Tightly-Coupled Bandwidth Monitoring and Regulation for FPGA-based Heterogeneous SoCs.
papers.abstract: Embedded systems are increasingly adopting heterogeneous templates integrating hardware accelerators and application-specific processors, which poses novel challenges. In particular, it is difficult to have accurate control of task activities in Commercial Off-the-shelf (COTS) System on Chips (SoCs), due to complex main memory sharing mechanisms among different computing engines. To address this problem, bandwidth regulation approaches based on monitoring and throttling are widely adopted. Existing solutions, however, are either too coarse-grained, limiting the control over computing engines activities, or platform-dependent, addressing the problem only for specific SoCs. In this paper we propose an innovative, fine-grained and platform-independent approach that can accurately control main memory bandwidth usage in an FPGA-based Heterogeneous System on Chip (HeSoC). Experimental results conducted on the Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ platform demonstrate that our approach enables solutions not feasible with state-of-the-art bandwidth regulation methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入式系统越来越多地采用集成硬件加速器和专用处理器的异构模板，这带来了新的挑战。特别是，由于不同计算引擎之间复杂的主存共享机制，很难准确控制商用现成（COTS）片上系统（SoC）中的任务活动。为了解决这个问题，基于监控和​​节流的带宽调节方法被广泛采用。然而，现有的解决方案要么过于粗粒度，限制了对计算引擎活动的控制，要么依赖于平台，仅解决特定 SoC 的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新的、细粒度的、独立于平台的方法，可以精确控制基于 FPGA 的异构片上系统 (HeSoC) 中主存储器带宽的使用。在 Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ 平台上进行的实验结果表明，我们的方法可实现采用最先进的带宽调节方法无法实现的解决方案。

papers.title: FIONA: Fine-grained Incoherent Optical DNN Accelerator Search for Superior Efficiency and Robustness.
papers.abstract: Incoherent optical DNN accelerators (OAs) are booming thanks to unparalleled performance-per-watt and excellent scalability. To boost their innovative development, a recent work revolutionarily proposed automatic OA search. However, the robustness and the acceleration performance of the generated OAs are below expectation, because the impacts of inter-tile data transfer and fabrication process & thermal variations (i.e., PTVs) on OAs were ignored. Both hinder OA design automation from being a reality. To resolve theses challenges, we develop FIONA, a novel framework for Fine-grained Incoherent Optical DNN Accelerator search towards both superior acceleration efficiency and inference robustness. Compared against 5 state-of-the-art incoherent OAs on 9 DNN benchmarks, extensive experiments and ablation studies validate the effectiveness of FIONA, achieving up to 198.01× acceleration efficiency improvement based on guaranteed robustness.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于无与伦比的每瓦性能和出色的可扩展性，非相干光学 DNN 加速器 (OA) 正在蓬勃发展。为了促进他们的创新发展，最近的一项工作革命性地提出了自动OA搜索。然而，生成的 OA 的鲁棒性和加速性能低于预期，因为忽略了瓦片间数据传输和制造工艺以及热变化（即 PTV）对 OA 的影响。两者都阻碍了 OA 设计自动化成为现实。为了解决这些挑战，我们开发了 FIONA，这是一种用于细粒度非相干光学 DNN 加速器搜索的新型框架，可实现卓越的加速效率和推理鲁棒性。与 9 个 DNN 基准上的 5 个最先进的不相干 OA 相比，大量的实验和消融研究验证了 FIONA 的有效性，在保证鲁棒性的基础上实现了高达 198.01 倍的加速效率提升。

papers.title: Flex-SFU: Accelerating DNN Activation Functions by Non-Uniform Piecewise Approximation.
papers.abstract: Modern DNN workloads increasingly rely on activation functions consisting of computationally complex operations. This poses a challenge to current accelerators optimized for convolutions and matrix-matrix multiplications. This work presents Flex-SFU, a lightweight hardware accelerator for activation functions implementing non-uniform piecewise interpolation supporting multiple data formats. Non-Uniform segments and floating-point numbers are enabled by implementing a binary-tree comparison within the address decoding unit. An SGD-based optimization algorithm with heuristics is proposed to find the interpolation function reducing the mean squared error. Thanks to non-uniform interpolation and floating-point support, Flex-SFU achieves on average 22.3x better mean squared error compared to previous piecewise linear interpolation approaches. The evaluation with more than 700 computer vision and natural language processing models shows that Flex-SFU can, on average, improve the end-to-end performance of state-of-the-art AI hardware accelerators by 35.7%, achieving up to 3.3x speedup with negligible impact in the models’ accuracy when using 32 segments, and only introducing an area and power overhead of 5.9% and 0.8% relative to the baseline vector processing unit.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 DNN 工作负载越来越依赖由计算复杂的操作组成的激活函数。这对当前针对卷积和矩阵乘法进行优化的加速器提出了挑战。这项工作提出了 Flex-SFU，这是一种轻量级硬件加速器，用于实现支持多种数据格式的非均匀分段插值的激活函数。通过在地址解码单元内实现二叉树比较来启用非统一段和浮点数。提出了一种基于 SGD 的启发式优化算法来寻找减少均方误差的插值函数。得益于非均匀插值和浮点支持，与之前的分段线性插值方法相比，Flex-SFU 的均方误差平均提高了 22.3 倍。对700多个计算机视觉和自然语言处理模型的评估表明，Flex-SFU平均可以将最先进的AI硬件加速器的端到端性能提高35.7%，在使用32个段时实现高达3.3倍的加速，对模型精度的影响可以忽略不计，并且相对于基线矢量处理单元仅引入5.9%和0.8%的面积和功耗开销。

papers.title: FLNA: An Energy-Efficient Point Cloud Feature Learning Accelerator with Dataflow Decoupling.
papers.abstract: Grid-based feature learning network plays a key role in recent point-cloud based 3D perception. However, high point sparsity and special operators lead to large memory footprint and long processing latency, posing great challenges to hardware acceleration. We propose FLNA, a novel feature learning accelerator with algorithm-architecture co-design. At algorithm level, the dataflow-decoupled graph is adopted to reduce 86% computation by exploiting inherent sparsity and concat redundancy. At hardware design level, we customize a pipelined architecture with block-wise processing, and introduce transposed SRAM strategy to save 82.1% access power. Implemented on a 40nm technology, FLNA achieves 13.4 − 43.3× speedup over RTX 2080Ti GPU. It rivals the state-of-the-art accelerator by 1.21× energy-efficiency improvement with 50.8% latency reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于网格的特征学习网络在最近基于点云的 3D 感知中发挥着关键作用。然而，高点稀疏性和特殊算子导致内存占用大、处理延迟长，给硬件加速带来了巨大挑战。我们提出了 FLNA，一种具有算法架构协同设计的新型特征学习加速器。在算法层面，采用数据流解耦图，利用固有的稀疏性和串联冗余，减少了86%的计算量。在硬件设计层面，我们定制了具有分块处理的流水线架构，并引入转置SRAM策略以节省82.1%的访问功率。 FLNA 采用 40nm 技术实现，与 RTX 2080Ti GPU 相比，速度提升了 13.4 – 43.3 倍。它能效提高 1.21 倍，延迟降低 50.8%，可与最先进的加速器相媲美。

papers.title: Formal Verification of Restoring Dividers made Fast and Simple.
papers.abstract: The paper describes a formal verification method for hardware implementation of restoring divider circuits. The method is based on setting select signals to predefined constants to reduce the design to easily verifiable circuit components, followed by their verification using standard equivalence checking and SAT. It is then concluded by a global proof that the composition of those components indeed implements a divider. In contrast to previous approaches, the verification is done on a functional level without any reverse engineering of the internal structure. The results show significant improvement in verification time compared to other methods. The proposed approach can also be used in debugging by localizing the source of a bug. This feature is currently not available in the existing verification tools and will be a subject of future work.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种恢复分频器电路硬件实现的形式化验证方法。该方法基于将选择信号设置为预定义常数，以将设计简化为易于验证的电路组件，然后使用标准等效检查和 SAT 对其进行验证。然后通过全局证明得出结论，证明这些组件的组合确实实现了分隔器。与以前的方法相比，验证是在功能级别上完成的，无需对内部结构进行任何逆向工程。结果表明，与其他方法相比，验证时间显着缩短。所提出的方法还可以通过定位错误源来用于调试。该功能目前在现有验证工具中不可用，将是未来工作的主题。

papers.title: FPDsim: A Structural Simulator For Power Grid Analysis Of Flat Panel Display.
papers.abstract: As the resolution continues to increase, the scale of the power grid of the flat panel display (FPD) becomes huge. This imposes a severe computational challenge for analysis and storage. In this paper, based on the highly periodic FPD structure, we present an efficient simulator which contains a novel stamping scheme and a fast structural solver. Experiments on real industrial cases show that compared to the conventional stamping scheme, our proposed stamping scheme achieves up to 118× speedup in 74× less memory; compared to the state-of-art direct solver, Cholmod, our proposed structural solver achieves up to 17× speedup in 5× less memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着分辨率的不断提高，平板显示器(FPD)的电网规模变得巨大。这给分析和存储带来了严峻的计算挑战。在本文中，基于高周期性 FPD 结构，我们提出了一种高效的模拟器，其中包含新颖的冲压方案和快速结构求解器。实际工业案例的实验表明，与传统的冲压方案相比，我们提出的冲压方案在减少 74 倍的内存的情况下实现了高达 118 倍的加速；与最先进的直接求解器 Cholmod 相比，我们提出的结构求解器在减少 5 倍的内存的情况下实现了高达 17 倍的加速。

papers.title: FSPA: An FeFET-based Sparse Matrix-Dense Vector Multiplication Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-dense vector multiplication (SpMV) is widely used in various applications. The performance of traditional SpMV accelerators is bounded by memory. In-memory computing (IMC) is a promising technique to alleviate the memory bottleneck. The current IMC accelerator cannot support sparse storage format and in-situ floating-point multiplication at the same time. In this paper, we propose FSPA, an ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET) based SpMV accelerator. FSPA integrates novel content-addressable memory (CAM) arrays and multiply-add computation (MAC) arrays to support sparse matrices represented in the floating-point format. FSPA achieves significant speedups and energy savings over CPU, GPU and two state-of-the-art IMC accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-密集向量乘法（SpMV）广泛应用于各种应用中。传统 SpMV 加速器的性能受到内存的限制。内存计算（IMC）是一种很有前景的缓解内存瓶颈的技术。目前的IMC加速器无法同时支持稀疏存储格式和原位浮点乘法。 In this paper, we propose FSPA, an ferroelectric field-effect transistor (FeFET) based SpMV accelerator. FSPA 集成了新颖的内容可寻址存储器 (CAM) 阵列和乘加计算 (MAC) 阵列，以支持以浮点格式表示的稀疏矩阵。与 CPU、GPU 和两个最先进的 IMC 加速器相比，FSPA 实现了显着的加速和节能。

papers.title: G-QED: Generalized QED Pre-silicon Verification beyond Non-Interfering Hardware Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Hardware accelerators (HAs) underpin high-performance and energy-efficient digital systems. Correctness of these systems thus depends on the correctness of constituent HAs. Self-consistency-based pre-silicon verification techniques, like A-QED (Accelerator Quick Error Detection), provide a quick and provably thorough HA verification framework that does not require extensive design-specific properties or a full functional specification. However, A-QED is limited to verifying HAs which are non-interfering – i.e., they produce the same result for a given input independent of its context within a sequence of inputs. We present a new technique called G-QED (Generalized QED) which goes beyond non-interfering HAs while retaining A-QED’s benefits. Our extensive results as well as a detailed industrial case study show that: G-QED is highly thorough in detecting critical bugs in well-verified designs that otherwise escape traditional verification flows while simultaneously improving verification productivity 18-fold (from 370 person days to 21 person days). These results are backed by theoretical guarantees of soundness and completeness.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件加速器 (HA) 是高性能和高能效数字系统的基础。因此，这些系统的正确性取决于组成 HA 的正确性。基于自一致性的硅前验证技术，例如 A-QED（加速器快速错误检测），提供了快速且可证明彻底的 HA 验证框架，不需要大量的特定于设计的属性或完整的功能规范。然而，A-QED 仅限于验证非干扰的 HA，即，它们对于给定输入产生相同的结果，而与输入序列中的上下文无关。我们提出了一种称为 G-QED（广义 QED）的新技术，它超越了非干扰 HA，同时保留了 A-QED 的优点。我们的广泛结果以及详细的工业案例研究表明：G-QED 在检测经过充分验证的设计中的关键错误方面非常彻底，否则可以逃避传统的验证流程，同时将验证效率提高 18 倍（从 370 人日到 21 人日）。这些结果得到了合理性和完整性的理论保证的支持。

papers.title: Gamora: Graph Learning based Symbolic Reasoning for Large-Scale Boolean Networks.
papers.abstract: Reasoning high-level abstractions from bit-blasted Boolean networks (BNs) such as gate-level netlists can significantly benefit functional verification, logic minimization, datapath synthesis, malicious logic identification, etc. Mostly, conventional reasoning approaches leverage structural hashing and functional propagation, suffering from limited scalability and inefficient usage of modern computing power. In response, we propose a novel symbolic reasoning framework exploiting graph neural networks (GNNs) and GPU acceleration to reason high-level functional blocks from gate-level netlists, namely Gamora, which offers high reasoning performance w.r.t exact reasoning algorithms, strong scalability to BNs with over 33 million nodes, and generalization capability from simple to complex designs. To further demonstrate the capability of Gamora, we also evaluate its reasoning performance after various technology mapping options, since technology-dependent optimizations are known to make functional reasoning much more challenging. Experimental results show that (1) Gamora reaches almost 100% and over 97% reasoning accuracy for carry-save-array (CSA) and Booth-encoded multipliers, respectively, with up to six orders of magnitude speedups compared to the state-of-the-art implementation in the ABC framework; (2) Gamora maintains high reasoning accuracy (>92%) in finding functional modules after complex technology mapping, and we comprehensively analyze the impacts on Gamora reasoning from technology mapping. Gamora is available at https://github.com/Yu-Utah/Gamora.
papers.abstract_zh: 从位爆炸布尔网络 (BN)（例如门级网表）中推理高级抽象可以显着有益于功能验证、逻辑最小化、数据路径综合、恶意逻辑识别等。大多数情况下，传统推理方法利用结构散列和功能传播，但其可扩展性有限且现代计算能力使用效率低下。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的符号推理框架，利用图神经网络（GNN）和 GPU 加速从门级网表推理高级功能块，即 Gamora，它提供了针对精确推理算法的高推理性能、对超过 3300 万个节点的 BN 的强大可扩展性以及从简单到复杂设计的泛化能力。为了进一步证明 Gamora 的能力，我们还评估了各种技术映射选项后的推理性能，因为众所周知，依赖于技术的优化会使功能推理变得更具挑战性。实验结果表明：（1）Gamora 对于进位保存数组（CSA）和 Booth 编码乘法器的推理准确率分别达到近 100% 和超过 97%，与 ABC 框架中最先进的实现相比，加速高达六个数量级； (2)在复杂的技术映射后，Gamora在寻找功能模块方面保持了较高的推理精度(>92%)，我们综合分析了技术映射对Gamora推理的影响。卡魔拉可在 https://github.com/Yu-Utah/Gamora 上找到。

papers.title: GDSII-Guard: ECO Anti-Trojan Optimization with Exploratory Timing-Security Trade-Offs.
papers.abstract: With the ever-shrinking feature size of transistors, the exorbitant cost has driven the massive outsourcing of integrated circuits (IC) fabrication. However, this outsourcing poses significant security risks because untrustworthy foundries can conduct insidious fabrication-time attacks without close supervision. Therefore, it is crucial to undertake design-time protection before sending finalized design layouts to the foundry. Foundry-level hardware Trojan has emerged as a major security threat, but existing design-time countermeasures lack sufficient consideration of good trade-offs between design security and performance.This work proposes an automatic framework, GDSII-Guard, to strengthen implemented physical layouts against potential fabrication-time Trojan attacks while preserving design performance, power, and quality. We develop an Engineering Change Order (ECO) placement and routing (P&R) flow containing elaborate anti-Trojan operators to prevent Trojan insertion. Moreover, we introduce a multi-objective optimization model with evolutionary strategies that incorporate anti-Trojan flow information to exploit balances between the aforementioned multiple design metrics. Experimental results demonstrate that GDSII-Guard reduces the overall risk of Trojan attacks on given designs by 98.8% with minimized timing, power, and design quality impact, surpassing existing approaches prominently.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着晶体管特征尺寸的不断缩小，高昂的成本推动了集成电路（IC）制造的大规模外包。然而，这种外包带来了重大的安全风险，因为不值得信赖的代工厂可能会在没有密切监督的情况下进行阴险的制造时攻击。因此，在将最终设计布局发送给代工厂之前进行设计时保护至关重要。代工厂级硬件木马已成为主要的安全威胁，但现有的设计时对策缺乏对设计安全性和性能之间良好权衡的充分考虑。这项工作提出了一种自动框架 GDSII-Guard，以加强已实施的物理布局以抵御潜在的制造时木马攻击，同时保持设计性能、功耗和质量。我们开发了一个工程变更指令 (ECO) 布局和路由 (P&R) 流程，其中包含精心设计的反特洛伊木马操作符，以防止特洛伊木马插入。此外，我们引入了一种具有进化策略的多目标优化模型，该策略结合了反特洛伊木马流信息，以利用上述多个设计指标之间的平衡。实验结果表明，GDSII-Guard 将给定设计的木马攻击总体风险降低了 98.8%，同时最大限度地减少了对时序、功耗和设计质量的影响，显着超越了现有方法。

papers.title: General-Purpose Gate-Level Simulation with Partition-Agnostic Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Gate-level simulation with delay annotation is a both critical and time-consuming task in the circuit design flow. It is highly nontrivial to parallelize a simulation process, especially on designs with arbitrary general-purpose sequential elements such as latches, gated clocks, and scan chains. Current works on parallelizing gate-level simulation are fundamentally incompatible with these design elements and are highly reliant on circuit partitioning to achieve the best performance. In this paper, we propose a general-purpose gate-level simulation engine with partition-agnostic parallelism. We propose a general sequential behavior encoding technique and a fast event scheduling algorithm for general-purpose simulation tasks. Experimental results have shown up to 30× speed-up over commercial simulation engines.
papers.abstract_zh: 带有延迟注释的门级仿真是电路设计流程中一项既关键又耗时的任务。并行化仿真过程非常重要，尤其是在具有任意通用顺序元件（例如锁存器、门控时钟和扫描链）的设计上。当前的并行门级仿真工作从根本上与这些设计元素不兼容，并且高度依赖电路分区来实现最佳性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有分区无关并行性的通用门级仿真引擎。我们提出了一种用于通用模拟任务的通用顺序行为编码技术和快速事件调度算法。实验结果表明，与商业模拟引擎相比，速度提升高达 30 倍。

papers.title: GenFuzz: GPU-accelerated Hardware Fuzzing using Genetic Algorithm with Multiple Inputs.
papers.abstract: Hardware fuzzing has emerged as a promising automatic verification technique to efficiently discover and verify hardware vulnerabilities. However, hardware fuzzing can be extremely time-consuming due to compute-intensive iterative simulations. While recent research has explored several approaches to accelerate hardware fuzzing, nearly all of them are limited to single-input fuzzing using one thread of a CPU-based simulator. As a result, we propose Gen-Fuzz, a GPU-accelerated hardware fuzzer using a genetic algorithm with multiple inputs. Measuring experimental results on a real industrial design, we show that GenFuzz running on a single A6000 GPU and eight CPU cores achieves 80× runtime speed-up when compared to state-of-the-art hardware fuzzers.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件模糊测试已成为一种有前途的自动验证技术，可以有效地发现和验证硬件漏洞。然而，由于计算密集型迭代模拟，硬件模糊测试可能非常耗时。虽然最近的研究探索了多种加速硬件模糊测试的方法，但几乎所有方法都仅限于使用基于 CPU 的模拟器的一个线程进行单输入模糊测试。因此，我们提出了 Gen-Fuzz，这是一种 GPU 加速的硬件模糊器，使用具有多个输入的遗传算法。通过测量真实工业设计的实验结果，我们发现，与最先进的硬件模糊器相比，在单个 A6000 GPU 和 8 个 CPU 内核上运行的 GenFuzz 实现了 80 倍的运行时加速。

papers.title: Glass Interposer Integration of Logic and Memory Chiplets: PPA and Power/Signal Integrity Benefits.
papers.abstract: Glass interposers enable 3D stacking between the chiplets embedded into the substrate and the ones stacked directly on top, which is not possible in silicon. In this work, we demonstrate the benefits of such stacking in glass interposers over silicon in terms of key system-level metrics including area, wirelength, signal, power, and thermal integrity. We achieve this goal with GDS layouts of both chiplets and interposers and sign-off simulations. Our experiments show that glass offers 2.6X area, 21X wirelength, 17.72% full-chip power, 64.7% signal integrity, and 10X power integrity improvement over silicon at the cost of 15% increase in temperature.
papers.abstract_zh: 玻璃中介层可以在嵌入基板的小芯片和直接堆叠在顶部的小芯片之间实现 3D 堆叠，这在硅中是不可能的。在这项工作中，我们展示了玻璃中介层的这种堆叠在关键系统级指标（包括面积、线长、信号、功率和热完整性）方面相对于硅的优势。我们通过小芯片和中介层的 GDS 布局以及签核模拟来实现这一目标。我们的实验表明，与硅相比，玻璃的面积增加了 2.6 倍，线长增加了 21 倍，全芯片功率提高了 17.72%，信号完整性提高了 64.7%，功率完整性提高了 10 倍，但代价是温度升高了 15%。

papers.title: Global Floorplanning via Semidefinite Programming.
papers.abstract: A major task in chip design involves identifying the location and shape of each major design block/module in the layout footprint. This is commonly known as floorplanning. The first step of this task is known as global floorplanning and involves identifying a location for each module that minimizes wire length and leaves sufficient area for each module. Existing global floorplanning methods either have a non-convex problem formulation, or have trivial global solutions with no guarantee on the quality of the result. Here, we model the global floorplanning as a Semi-Definite Programming (SDP) problem with a rank constraint. We replace the rank constraint with a direction matrix and convexify the problem, whose solution is shown to be a global optimum if an appropriate direction matrix is chosen. To calculate the direction matrix, a convex iteration algorithm is used where the problem is decomposed into two SDP sub-problems. Furthermore, we introduce a series of techniques that enhance the flexibility, accuracy, and efficiency of our algorithm. Design experiments demonstrate that our proposed method reduces the average wirelength up to 20% for different benchmarks and outline aspect ratios.
papers.abstract_zh: 芯片设计的一项主要任务涉及确定布局足迹中每个主要设计块/模块的位置和形状。这通常称为布局规划。此任务的第一步称为全局布局规划，涉及确定每个模块的位置，以最大限度地减少电线长度并为每个模块留出足够的区域。现有的全局布局规划方法要么具有非凸问题表述，要么具有微不足道的全局解决方案，无法保证结果的质量。在这里，我们将全局布局规划建模为具有秩约束的半定规划（SDP）问题。我们用方向矩阵代替秩约束并对问题进行凸化，如果选择适当的方向矩阵，则其解决方案将是全局最优的。为了计算方向矩阵，使用凸迭代算法将问题分解为两个 SDP 子问题。此外，我们引入了一系列技术来增强算法的灵活性、准确性和效率。设计实验表明，对于不同的基准和轮廓纵横比，我们提出的方法将平均线长减少了 20%。

papers.title: Graph Representation Learning for Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration.
papers.abstract: Design optimization of modern microprocessors is a complex task due to the exponential growth of the design space. This work presents GRL-DSE, an automatic microarchitecture search framework based on graph embeddings. GRL-DSE uses graph representation learning to build a compact and continuous embedding space. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization using an ensemble surrogate model conducts microarchitecture design space exploration in the graph embedding space to efficiently and holistically optimize performance-power-area (PPA) objectives. Experimental studies on RISC-V BOOM show that GRLDSE outperforms previous techniques by 74.59% on Pareto front quality and outperforms manual designs in terms of PPA.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于设计空间呈指数增长，现代微处理器的设计优化是一项复杂的任务。这项工作提出了 GRL-DSE，一种基于图嵌入的自动微架构搜索框架。 GRL-DSE 使用图表示学习来构建紧凑且连续的嵌入空间。使用集成代理模型的多目标贝叶斯优化在图嵌入空间中进行微架构设计空间探索，以高效、全面地优化性能功率面积 (PPA) 目标。在 RISC-V BOOM 上的实验研究表明，GRLDSE 在 Pareto 前沿质量上优于之前的技术 74.59%，在 PPA 方面优于手动设计。

papers.title: Graph-Based Simultaneous Placement and Routing for Two-Dimensional Directed Self-Assembly Technology.
papers.abstract: Two-dimensional directed self-assembly (2D-DSA) is an emerging lithography technology for advanced process nodes. We can determine the orientations of double posts to guide block copolymers to form feasible 2D guiding template patterns by the 2D-DSA process. This paper presents the first work to handle the 2D-DSA simultaneous placement and routing problem. We first propose a novel graph to model feasible guiding templates with a constant-time update scheme for each double-post assignment. Based on a graph model, we then present an algorithm for 2D-DSA simultaneous placement and routing, with a broadcast-based cost function for 2D-DSA cell placement and a graph-based scheme for DSA-compliant routing. Finally, we employ a strongly effective region property to minimize the cuts in the final layout. Experimental results show that our algorithm can efficiently generate a 2D-DSA placement and routing solution with high routability and a low cut number.
papers.abstract_zh: 二维定向自组装（2D-DSA）是一种用于先进工艺节点的新兴光刻技术。我们可以通过2D-DSA过程确定双柱的方向来引导嵌段共聚物形成可行的2D引导模板图案。本文介绍了处理 2D-DSA 同时布局和布线问题的第一项工作。我们首先提出了一种新颖的图来为每个双岗位任务使用恒定时间更新方案来建模可行的指导模板。基于图模型，我们提出了一种用于 2D-DSA 同时布局和布线的算法，以及用于 2D-DSA 单元布局的基于广播的成本函数和用于 DSA 兼容布线的基于图的方案。最后，我们采用了一个非常有效的区域属性来最小化最终布局中的剪切。实验结果表明，我们的算法可以有效地生成具有高可布线性和低切割次数的2D-DSA布局布线解决方案。

papers.title: HAIMA: A Hybrid SRAM and DRAM Accelerator-in-Memory Architecture for Transformer.
papers.abstract: Through the attention mechanism, Transformer-based large-scale deep neural networks (LSDNNs) have demonstrated remarkable achievements in artificial intelligence applications such as natural language processing and computer vision. The matrix-matrix multiplication operation (MMMO) in Transformer makes data movement dominate the inference overhead over computation. A solution for efficient data movement during Transformer inference is to embed arithmetic logic units (ALUs) into the memory array, hence an accelerator-in-memory architecture (AIMA). Existing work along this direction has not considered the heterogeneity of parallelism and resource requirements among Transformer layers. This increases the inference latency and lowers the resource utilization, which is critical for the embedded systems domain. To this end, we propose HAIMA, a hybrid AIMA and the parallel dataflow for Transformer, which exploit the cooperation between SRAM and DRAM to accelerate different MMMOs. Compared to the state-of-the-art Newton and TransPIM, our proposed hardware-software co-design achieves 1.4x-1.5x speedup, and solves the problem of resource under-utilization when DRAM-based AIMA performs the light-weight MMMOs.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过注意力机制，基于Transformer的大规模深度神经网络（LSDNN）在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等人工智能应用中展现了令人瞩目的成就。 Transformer 中的矩阵-矩阵乘法运算 (MMMO) 使数据移动在计算的推理开销中占主导地位。在 Transformer 推理期间实现高效数据移动的解决方案是将算术逻辑单元 (ALU) 嵌入到内存阵列中，从而形成内存加速器架构 (AIMA)。沿着这个方向的现有工作没有考虑 Transformer 层之间并行性和资源需求的异构性。这会增加推理延迟并降低资源利用率，这对于嵌入式系统领域至关重要。为此，我们提出了 HAIMA，一种混合​​ AIMA 和 Transformer 的并行数据流，它利用 SRAM 和 DRAM 之间的合作来加速不同的 MMMO。与最先进的Newton和TransPIM相比，我们提出的硬件-软件协同设计实现了1.4x-1.5x的加速，并解决了基于DRAM的AIMA执行轻量级MMMO时资源利用不足的问题。

papers.title: HammerDodger: A Lightweight Defense Framework against RowHammer Attack on DNNs.
papers.abstract: RowHammer attacks have become a serious security problem on deep neural networks (DNNs). Some carefully induced bit-flips degrade the prediction accuracy of DNN models to random guesses. This work proposes a lightweight defense framework that detects and mitigates adversarial bit-flip attacks. We employ a dynamic channel-shuffling obfuscation scheme to present moving targets to the attack, and develop a logits-based model integrity monitor with negligible performance loss. The parameters and architecture of DNN models remain unchanged, which ensures lightweight deployment and makes the framework compatible with commodity models. We demonstrate that our framework can protect various DNN models against RowHammer attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: RowHammer attacks have become a serious security problem on deep neural networks (DNNs). Some carefully induced bit-flips degrade the prediction accuracy of DNN models to random guesses. This work proposes a lightweight defense framework that detects and mitigates adversarial bit-flip attacks.我们采用动态通道混洗混淆方案来向攻击呈现移动目标，并开发基于逻辑的模型完整性监视器，其性能损失可以忽略不计。 DNN模型的参数和架构保持不变，保证了轻量级部署，并使框架兼容商品模型。 We demonstrate that our framework can protect various DNN models against RowHammer attacks.

papers.title: Hardware Support for Durable Atomic Instructions for Persistent Parallel Programming.
papers.abstract: Persistent memory is emerging as an attractive main memory fabric capable of hosting persistent data. However, its programmability is hampered by the lack of persistent synchronization primitives. Atomic instructions are immensely useful for higher-level synchronization (locks and barriers) and for supporting lock-free data structures, but they have no durable/persistent version. In this paper, we propose a new approach to solve the problem: durable atomic instructions (DAIs). We show that DAIs can be supported with minor hardware support (low-cost modifications to the cache coherence protocol), and simultaneously achieve high performance, scalability, and crash consistency.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存正在成为一种有吸引力的主内存结构，能够托管持久数据。然而，它的可编程性因缺乏持久同步原语而受到阻碍。原子指令对于更高级别的同步（锁和屏障）和支持无锁数据结构非常有用，但它们没有持久/持久版本。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决该问题的新方法：持久原子指令（DAI）。我们证明，DAI 可以通过少量硬件支持（对缓存一致性协议进行低成本修改）来支持，并同时实现高性能、可扩展性和崩溃一致性。

papers.title: Hardware-Aware Graph Neural Network Automated Design for Edge Computing Platforms.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a popular strategy for handling non-Euclidean data due to their state-of-the-art performance. However, most of the current GNN model designs mainly focus on task accuracy, lacking in considering hardware resources limitation and real-time requirements of edge application scenarios. Comprehensive profiling of typical GNN models indicates that their execution characteristics are significantly affected across different computing platforms, which demands hardware awareness for efficient GNN designs. In this work, HGNAS is proposed as the first Hardware-aware Graph Neural Architecture Search framework targeting resource constraint edge devices. By decoupling the GNN paradigm, HGNAS constructs a fine-grained design space and leverages an efficient multi-stage search strategy to explore optimal architectures within a few GPU hours. Moreover, HGNAS achieves hardware awareness during the GNN architecture design by leveraging a hardware performance predictor, which could balance the GNN model accuracy and efficiency corresponding to the characteristics of targeted devices. Experimental results show that HGNAS can achieve about 10.6× speedup and 88.2% peak memory reduction with a negligible accuracy loss compared to DGCNN on various edge devices, including Nvidia RTX3080, Jetson TX2, Intel i7-8700K and Raspberry Pi 3B+.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其最先进的性能，图神经网络（GNN）已成为处理非欧几里得数据的流行策略。然而，目前的GNN模型设计大多主要关注任务精度，缺乏考虑硬件资源限制和边缘应用场景的实时性要求。对典型 GNN 模型的全面分析表明，它们的执行特性在不同的计算平台上受到显着影响，这需要硬件意识来实现高效的 GNN 设计。在这项工作中，HGNAS 被提议作为第一个针对资源受限边缘设备的硬件感知图神经架构搜索框架。通过解耦 GNN 范式，HGNAS 构建了细粒度的设计空间，并利用高效的多阶段搜索策略在几个 GPU 小时内探索最佳架构。此外，HGNAS 通过利用硬件性能预测器在 GNN 架构设计过程中实现硬件感知，这可以根据目标设备的特性平衡 GNN 模型的准确性和效率。实验结果表明，与 DGCNN 相比，HGNAS 在各种边缘设备（包括 Nvidia RTX3080、Jetson TX2、Intel i7-8700K 和 Raspberry Pi 3B+）上可以实现约 10.6 倍的加速和 88.2% 的峰值内存减少，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

papers.title: HAWEN: Hardware Accelerator for Thread Wake-Ups in Linux Event Notification.
papers.abstract: The performance of multi-threaded applications relies on efficient inter-process communication. One common practice is putting a thread asleep while waiting for a certain condition. Exemplary Linux kernel mechanisms that use this practice include futex, sockets, epoll, eventfd and pipe. Once the condition is met, i.e., the associated event has occurred, the waiting thread is notified. Optimizations for event notification mechanisms in Linux mostly target the thread which receives events. Contrarily, we identified high potential in relieving the event-generating thread and propose HAWEN, a hardware accelerator for thread wake-up support. HAWEN has been integrated into Linux event notification in a minimally intrusive manner. Gem5-based multi-core architecture simulations revealed up to 80% faster thread wake-up times and a 53% shorter event-generating syscall.
papers.abstract_zh: 多线程应用程序的性能依赖于高效的进程间通信。一种常见的做法是在等待特定条件时让线程休眠。使用这种实践的示例性 Linux 内核机制包括 futex、socket、epoll、eventfd 和 pipeline。一旦满足条件，即相关事件发生，等待线程就会收到通知。 Linux中事件通知机制的优化主要针对接收事件的线程。相反，我们发现了减轻事件生成线程的巨大潜力，并提出了 HAWEN，一种用于线程唤醒支持的硬件加速器。 HAWEN 已以侵入性最小的方式集成到 Linux 事件通知中。基于 Gem5 的多核架构模拟显示，线程唤醒时间加快了 80%，事件生成系统调用缩短了 53%。

papers.title: HBP: Hierarchically Balanced Pruning and Accelerator Co-Design for Efficient DNN Inference.
papers.abstract: Weight pruning is studied to accelerate DNN inference by reducing the parameters and computations. Irregular pruning achieves high sparsity while incurring low computation parallelism and imbalanced workloads. The coarse-grained structured pruning sacrifices sparsity for higher parallelism. To strike a better balance, we propose Hierarchically Balanced Pruning by applying fine-grained but structured adjustments based on irregular pruning. Besides, it partitions the weight matrix into hierarchical blocks and constrains the sparsity of the blocks for balanced workloads. Furthermore, an accelerator is proposed to unleash the power of the pruning method. Experimental results show our method achieves 1.1×-6 higher sparsity than prior studies, and the accelerator achieves 1.2×-13× speedup and 3.3× energy efficiency improvement than its counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 研究了权重剪枝，通过减少参数和计算来加速 DNN 推理。不规则剪枝实现了高稀疏性，但会导致计算并行性低和工作负载不平衡。粗粒度的结构化剪枝牺牲了稀疏性以获得更高的并行性。为了达到更好的平衡，我们提出了分层平衡剪枝，通过在不规则剪枝的基础上应用细粒度但结构化的调整。此外，它将权重矩阵划分为分层块，并限制块的稀疏性以平衡工作负载。此外，还提出了一种加速器来释放剪枝方法的力量。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了比现有研究高1.1×-6的稀疏度，加速器比同类加速器实现了1.2×-13倍的加速和3.3倍的能效提升。

papers.title: HDSuper: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Light-weight High-quality Super-Resolution Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) networks have been gradually applied to embedded devices with good-quality image reconstruction. However, the hardware performance and power efficiency are limited by a large number of algorithm parameters, computation complexity, and hardware resources, obstructing the development of a high-quality SR accelerator. This paper proposes an end-to-end platform with a lightweight super-resolution network (LSR) and an efficient, high-quality super-resolution architecture HDSuper, to perform algorithm-hardware co-design for the SR accelerator. For algorithm design, we employ depth-wise separable convolution and pixelshuffle to reduce network size and computation complexity by considering the hardware constraints. For hardware design, we provide a unified computing core (UCC) combined with an efficient flattening-and-allocation (F-A) mapping strategy to support various operators with high computational utilization. We adopt the patch training method to reduce the external memory access of the hardware architecture. Based on the evaluation, the proposed algorithm achieves high-quality image reconstruction with 37.44dB PSNR. Finally, we implement the image reconstruction in FPGA demonstration, achieving high-quality image reconstruction with 2.08W power consumption under the lowest hardware resources compared to the state-of-the-art works.
papers.abstract_zh: 超分辨率（SR）网络已逐渐应用于嵌入式设备，具有良好的图像重建质量。然而，硬件性能和功效受到大量算法参数、计算复杂度和硬件资源的限制，阻碍了高质量SR加速器的发展。本文提出了一种具有轻量级超分辨率网络（LSR）和高效、高质量超分辨率架构HDSuper的端到端平台，以对SR加速器进行算法-硬件协同设计。对于算法设计，我们考虑硬件限制，采用深度可分离卷积和像素洗牌来减少网络规模和计算复杂度。对于硬件设计，我们提供统一计算核心（UCC）与高效的扁平化和分配（F-A）映射策略相结合，以支持具有高计算利用率的各种算子。我们采用补丁训练方法来减少硬件架构的外部存储器访问。根据评估，该算法实现了PSNR为37.44dB的高质量图像重建。最后，我们在FPGA演示中实现了图像重建，与现有技术相比，在最低的硬件资源下以2.08W的功耗实现了高质量的图像重建。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Reconfigurable Accelerators: Trends and Perspectives.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneity and reconfigurability have both been adopted by accelerators to improve their flexibility and efficiency for a wide variety of applications, from cloud computing to embedded systems. This paper provides an overview of the trends of heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerators including field-programmable gate arrays and coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays, and the related design automation approaches for enhancing design quality and designer productivity of these accelerators. We shall also discuss how recent advances in technology, such as multi-level co-design, heterogeneous Function-as-a-Service and meta-programming, would help address the challenges in engineering next-generation heterogeneous reconfigurable accelerators and beyond.
papers.abstract_zh: 加速器采用异构性和可重构性来提高从云计算到嵌入式系统等各种应用的灵活性和效率。本文概述了包括现场可编程门阵列和粗粒度可重构阵列在内的异构可重构加速器的发展趋势，以及用于提高这些加速器的设计质量和设计人员生产力的相关设计自动化方法。我们还将讨论多层协同设计、异构功能即服务和元编程等技术的最新进展如何帮助解决下一代异构可重构加速器等工程中的挑战。

papers.title: HexaMesh: Scaling to Hundreds of Chiplets with an Optimized Chiplet Arrangement.
papers.abstract: 2.5D integration is an important technique to tackle the growing cost of manufacturing chips in advanced technology nodes. This poses the challenge of providing high-performance inter-chiplet interconnects (ICIs). As the number of chiplets grows to tens or hundreds, it becomes infeasible to hand-optimize their arrangement in a way that maximizes the ICI performance. In this paper, we propose HexaMesh, an arrangement of chiplets that outperforms a grid arrangement both in theory (network diameter reduced by 42%; bisection bandwidth improved by 130%) and in practice (latency reduced by 19%; throughput improved by 34%). MexaMesh enables large-scale chiplet designs with high-performance ICIs.
papers.abstract_zh: 2.5D集成是解决先进技术节点芯片制造成本不断增长的重要技术。这对提供高性能小芯片间互连 (ICI) 提出了挑战。随着小芯片数量增长到数十或数百个，以最大化 ICI 性能的方式手动优化它们的排列变得不可行。在本文中，我们提出了 HexaMesh，这是一种小芯片的排列方式，在理论上（网络直径减少了 42%；二等分带宽提高了 130%）和实践中（延迟降低了 19%；吞吐量提高了 34%），其性能均优于网格排列。 MexaMesh 支持使用高性能 ICI 进行大规模小芯片设计。

papers.title: High Performance, Low Power Matrix Multiply Design on ACAP: from Architecture, Design Challenges and DSE Perspectives.
papers.abstract: As the increasing complexity of Neural Network(NN) models leads to high demands for computation, AMD introduces a heterogeneous programmable system-on-chip (SoC), i.e., Versal ACAP architectures featured with programmable logic(PL), CPUs, and dedicated AI engines (AIE) ASICs which has a theoretical throughput up to 6.4 TFLOPs for FP32, 25.6 TOPs for INT16 and 102.4 TOPs for INT8. However, the higher level of complexity makes it non-trivial to achieve the theoretical performance even for well-studied applications like matrix-matrix multiply. In this paper, we provide AutoMM, an automatic white-box framework that can systematically generate the design for MM accelerators on Versal which achieves 3.7 TFLOPs, 7.5 TOPs, and 28.2 TOPs for FP32, INT16, and INT8 data type respectively. Our designs are tested on board and achieve gains of 7.20x (FP32), 3.26x (INT16), 6.23x (INT8) energy efficiency than AMD U250, 2.32x (FP32) than Nvidia Jetson TX2, 1.06x (FP32), 1.70x (INT8) than Nvidia A100.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着神经网络（NN）模型日益复杂，对计算的要求越来越高，AMD推出了异构可编程片上系统（SoC），即具有可编程逻辑（PL）、CPU和专用AI引擎（AIE）ASIC的Versal ACAP架构，其理论吞吐量（FP32）高达6.4 TFLOP，INT16为25.6 TOP，INT8为102.4 TOP。然而，较高的复杂性使得即使对于矩阵乘法等经过充分研究的应用程序而言，实现理论性能也并非易事。在本文中，我们提供了 AutoMM，一个自动白盒框架，可以在 Versal 上系统地生成 MM 加速器的设计，对于 FP32、INT16 和 INT8 数据类型分别实现 3.7 TFLOP、7.5 TOP 和 28.2 TOP。我们的设计经过板上测试，能效比 AMD U250 提高 7.20 倍 (FP32)、3.26 倍 (INT16)、6.23 倍 (INT8)，比 Nvidia Jetson TX2 提高 2.32 倍 (FP32)，比 Nvidia A100 提高 1.06 倍 (FP32)、1.70 倍 (INT8)。

papers.title: Holistic WCRT Analysis for Global Fixed-Priority Preemptive Multiprocessor Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Many embedded applications demand both resource efficiency and timing guarantee. However, resource sharing naturally complicates the analysis that extracts the worst-case scenario out of contention. Global Fixed-Priority (GFP) preemptive multiprocessor scheduling is one of the mainstream strategies to resolve contention on computational resources. It allows jobs of the same task to be executed on different processors, hence potentially enabling better parallelism and more efficient resource utilization. Unfortunately, its worst-case response time (WCRT) analysis is challenging. Existing approaches divide a high-priority task into three workloads, namely, carry-in workload, body workload, and carry-out workload, trying to optimize them individually. In this work, we propose a holistic WCRT analysis for GFP preemptive multiprocessor scheduling, where a task is no longer divided. Specifically, (i) we establish the tight interference scenario for the task being analyzed to find the most interfering high-priority jobs in any time interval; (ii) we obtain the starting released instant of each high-priority task’s first job to determine the maximum interference from high-priority tasks’ first jobs to the task being analyzed; (iii) we build the worst-case tight interference scenario for the task being analyzed by combining the tight interference scenario and the starting released instants; (iv) we prove that the WCRT of the task being analyzed can be decided by the worst-case tight interference scenario. Evaluation on schedulability shows that our proposed analysis achieves 4.2%-8.6% higher acceptance ratio in randomly generated data sets than the state-of-the-art workload division approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多嵌入式应用既需要资源效率又需要时序保证。然而，资源共享自然会使从争用中提取最坏情况的分析变得复杂。全局固定优先级（GFP）抢占式多处理器调度是解决计算资源争用的主流策略之一。它允许同一任务的作业在不同的处理器上执行，因此有可能实现更好的并行性和更有效的资源利用。不幸的是，其最坏情况响应时间 (WCRT) 分析具有挑战性。现有的方法将高优先级任务分为三个工作负载，即进位工作负载、主体工作负载和传出工作负载，并试图单独优化它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对 GFP 抢占式多处理器调度的整体 WCRT 分析，其中任务不再被划分。具体来说，（i）我们为正在分析的任务建立严格干扰场景，以找到任何时间间隔内干扰最大的高优先级作业； (ii) 获取每个高优先级任务的第一个作业的开始释放时刻，以确定高优先级任务的第一个作业对正在分析的任务的最大干扰； (iii) 我们通过结合紧密干扰场景和起始释放时刻，为正在分析的任务构建最坏情况的紧密干扰场景； (iv) 我们证明所分析任务的 WCRT 可以由最坏情况的紧密干扰场景决定。对可调度性的评估表明，我们提出的分析在随机生成的数据集中实现了比最先进的工作负载划分方法高 4.2%-8.6% 的接受率。

papers.title: How to Boost Deep Neural Networks for Computer Vision.
papers.abstract: As the range of neural network applications has exploded, various model compression techniques have been developed to increase the accuracy of neural networks under the resource constraints given by the hardware platform and the performance constraints required by users. In this perspective paper, the current status and future prospects of individual techniques are briefly summarized. And it presents the importance of understanding the characteristics of the hardware platform and the systematic methodology of applying these techniques harmoniously.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着神经网络应用范围的爆炸式增长，各种模型压缩技术被开发出来，以在硬件平台给定的资源约束和用户要求的性能约束下提高神经网络的精度。在这篇透视论文中，简要总结了各项技术的现状和未来前景。并提出了理解硬件平台特性的重要性以及协调应用这些技术的系统方法。

papers.title: HTVM: Efficient Neural Network Deployment On Heterogeneous TinyML Platforms.
papers.abstract: Optimal deployment of deep neural networks (DNNs) on state-of-the-art Systems-on-Chips (SoCs) is crucial for tiny machine learning (TinyML) at the edge. The complexity of these SoCs makes deployment non-trivial, as they typically contain multiple heterogeneous compute cores with limited, programmer-managed memory to optimize latency and energy efficiency. We propose HTVM – a compiler that merges TVM with DORY to maximize the utilization of heterogeneous accelerators and minimize data movements. HTVM allows deploying the MLPerf™ Tiny suite on DIANA, an SoC with a RISC-V CPU, and digital and analog compute-in-memory AI accelerators, at 120x improved performance over plain TVM deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 在最先进的片上系统 (SoC) 上优化部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 对于边缘的微型机器学习 (TinyML) 至关重要。这些 SoC 的复杂性使得部署变得非常重要，因为它们通常包含多个异构计算核心，以及有限的、由程序员管理的内存，以优化延迟和能源效率。我们提出 HTVM——一种将 TVM 与 DORY 合并的编译器，以最大限度地利用异构加速器并最大限度地减少数据移动。 HTVM 允许在 DIANA 上部署 MLPerf™ Tiny 套件，DIANA 是一个带有 RISC-V CPU 的 SoC，以及数字和模拟内存计算 AI 加速器，其性能比普通 TVM 部署提高了 120 倍。

papers.title: HUNTER: Releasing Persistent Memory Write Performance with A Novel PM-DRAM Collaboration Architecture.
papers.abstract: We present HUNTER, a POSIX-compliant persistent memory (PM) file system that fully releases PM’s write performance. Compared to state-of-the-art ones, HUNTER proposes a novel PM-DRAM collaboration architecture to significantly eliminate/reduce software overheads in the write path. Expensive in-PM metadata are updated asynchronously to hide their performance penalties. Furthermore, in-PM metadata/data are laid out separately for locality awareness, enabling collaboration with asynchronous architecture. HUNTER also adopts several lightweight in-DRAM allocators/indexes to manage PM efficiently.Experimental results suggest that HUNTER achieves 2.0–3.4× write bandwidth compared to state-of-the-art PM file systems in write-intensive workloads and shows similar write bandwidth compared to bare PM.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出HUNTER，一个符合POSIX标准的持久内存（PM）文件系统，可以充分释放PM的写入性能。与最先进的架构相比，HUNTER 提出了一种新颖的 PM-DRAM 协作架构，可显着消除/减少写入路径中的软件开销。昂贵的 PM 内元数据会异步更新，以隐藏其性能损失。此外，PM 内元数据/数据单独布局以实现位置感知，从而实现与异步架构的协作。 HUNTER 还采用了多个轻量级 DRAM 内分配器/索引来有效管理 PM。实验结果表明，在写入密集型工作负载中，HUNTER 与最先进的 PM 文件系统相比，实现了 2.0–3.4 倍的写入带宽，并且与裸 PM 相比，显示了相似的写入带宽。

papers.title: Hybrid Gate-Pulse Model for Variational Quantum Algorithms.
papers.abstract: Current quantum programs are mostly synthesized and compiled on the gate-level, where quantum circuits are composed of quantum gates. The gate-level workflow, however, introduces significant redundancy when quantum gates are eventually transformed into control signals and applied on quantum devices. For superconducting quantum computers, the control signals are microwave pulses. Therefore, pulse-level optimization has gained more attention from researchers due to their advantages in terms of circuit duration. Recent works, however, are limited by their poor scalability brought by the large parameter space of control signals. In addition, the lack of gate-level "knowledge" also affects the performance of pure pulse-level frameworks. We present a hybrid gate-pulse model that can mitigate these problems. We propose to use gate-level compilation and optimization for "fixed" part of the quantum circuits and to use pulse-level methods for problem-agnostic parts. Experimental results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed framework in discrete optimization tasks. We achieve a performance boost at most 8% with 60% shorter pulse duration in the problem-agnostic layer.
papers.abstract_zh: 目前的量子程序大多是在门级上综合和编译的，其中量子电路是由量子门组成的。然而，当量子门最终转换为控制信号并应用于量子设备时，门级工作流程会引入显着的冗余。对于超导量子计算机，控制信号是微波脉冲。因此，脉冲级优化因其在电路持续时间方面的优势而受到了研究人员的更多关注。然而，最近的工作受到控制信号参数空间大带来的可扩展性差的限制。此外，缺乏门级“知识”也影响了纯脉冲级框架的性能。我们提出了一种混合栅极脉冲模型，可以缓解这些问题。我们建议对量子电路的“固定”部分使用门级编译和优化，并对与问题无关的部分使用脉冲级方法。实验结果证明了所提出的框架在离散优化任务中的效率。我们在与问题无关的层中将脉冲持续时间缩短了 60%，从而实现了最多 8% 的性能提升。

papers.title: Hybrid Obfuscation of Chiplet-Based Systems.
papers.abstract: The growing concern about offshore chip manufacturing has created considerable interest in solutions that can ensure the integrity and security of chips. Among various solutions, split manufacturing has received a lot of attention due to its security guarantees. With the recent emergence of new heterogeneous manufacturing technologies, including chiplet-based systems, there is a new opportunity for revisiting the design considerations for split manufacturing to fully exploit the opportunities presented by chiplet-based systems and improve various metrics, such as security, performance, and overhead.This work improves the state-of-the-art in secure chip manufacturing by proposing a new split manufacturing scheme. The key idea is to exploit the capabilities provided by chiplet integration technology for designing a new hybrid split manufacturing scheme that includes both vertical and horizontal splitting. Unlike existing vertical-only split manufacturing mechanisms, that target obfuscation of interconnections by splitting the design at a specific metallization layer into two portions, the proposed hybrid method increases trust by exploiting the chiplet paradigm shift, specifically, breaking the design into sub-designs, each represented by chiplets (independently fabricated), and obfuscating interconnections among them. The proposed obfuscation mechanism targets systems that exploit the chiplet technology to obtain important performance advantages, thus any chiplet-related overhead is not due to obfuscation. We evaluate our method using several experiments and compare it with the state-of-the-art using standard metrics, including area, power, delay, wirelength, and trust. Compared to conventional split manufacturing, our hybrid method achieves up to 245× higher trust, while exhibiting negligible overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们对离岸芯片制造的日益关注，引起了人们对能够确保芯片完整性和安全性的解决方案的极大兴趣。在各种解决方案中，分体制造因其安全保障而备受关注。随着最近出现的新型异构制造技术（包括基于小芯片的系统），出现了重新审视分割制造的设计考虑因素的新机会，以充分利用基于小芯片的系统带来的机会并改进各种指标，例如安全性、性能和开销。这项工作通过提出一种新的分割制造方案，提高了安全芯片制造的最新水平。关键思想是利用小芯片集成技术提供的功能来设计一种新的混合分割制造方案，包括垂直和水平分割。与现有的仅垂直分割制造机制不同，该机制通过将特定金属化层上的设计分割成两部分来混淆互连，所提出的混合方法通过利用小芯片范式转变来增加信任，具体来说，将设计分解为子设计，每个子设计由小芯片（独立制造）表示，并混淆它们之间的互连。所提出的混淆机制针对的是利用小芯片技术来获得重要性能优势的系统，因此任何与小芯片相关的开销都不是由于混淆造成的。我们通过多次实验评估我们的方法，并使用标准指标（包括面积、功率、延迟、线长和信任度）将其与最先进的方法进行比较。与传统的拆分制造相比，我们的混合方法实现了高达 245 倍的高信任度，同时开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: HyperAttack: An Efficient Attack Framework for HyperDimensional Computing.
papers.abstract: HyperDimensional Computing (HDC) is emerging as a lightweight computational model for robust and efficient learning on resource-constrained hardware. Since HDC often runs on edge devices, the security challenge of HDC is a pressing issue confronting all the practitioners. Meanwhile, the security challenge of HDC’s parameters stored in memory has not been well studied. In this work, we are the first to propose a novel HDC attack framework called HyperAttack, which can crush a robust HDC model (i.e., binary HDC) by maliciously flipping an extremely few amount of bits within its memory system (i.e., DRAM) that stores the associative memory. Since the bit-flip operation can be conducted by the well-known Row Hammer attack, HyperAttack maximizes the accuracy degradation with the minimum number of bit-flips by identifying the bits closely related to the classification accuracy of hyperdimensional vectors (stored in the associative memory as binary vectors) in HDC. The proposed HyperAttack is based on the concept of fuzzing, combining dimensional ranking and distributions of features in hypervectors to identify the bits to be flipped. Our evaluation shows that HyperAttack can successfully attack a binary HDC by flipping only 10% bits of hyperdimensional vectors to decrease top-1 accuracy from 90.9% to 10%, while randomly flipping merely degrades the accuracy by less than 2%.
papers.abstract_zh: 超维计算 (HDC) 是一种轻量级计算模型，可在资源受限的硬件上实现稳健、高效的学习。由于HDC通常运行在边缘设备上，HDC的安全挑战是所有从业者面临的紧迫问题。同时，HDC存储在内存中的参数的安全挑战尚未得到很好的研究。在这项工作中，我们第一个提出了一种名为 HyperAttack 的新型 HDC 攻击框架，该框架可以通过恶意翻转存储关联内存的内存系统（即 DRAM）中的极少量位来破坏稳健的 HDC 模型（即二进制 HDC）。由于众所周知的 Row Hammer 攻击可以进行位翻转操作，HyperAttack 通过识别 HDC 中与超维向量（作为二进制向量存储在关联存储器中）的分类精度密切相关的位，以最少的位翻转次数最大限度地降低精度。所提出的 HyperAttack 基于模糊测试的概念，结合超向量中的维度排序和特征分布来识别要翻转的位。我们的评估表明，HyperAttack 可以通过仅翻转超维向量的 10% 位来成功攻击二进制 HDC，将 top-1 精度从 90.9% 降低到 10%，而随机翻转仅使精度降低不到 2%。

papers.title: IFHE: Intermediate-Feature Heterogeneity Enhancement for Image Synthesis in Data-Free Knowledge Distillation.
papers.abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation (DFKD) explores training a compact student network only by a pre-trained teacher without real data. Prevailing DFKD methods mainly consist of image synthesis and knowledge distillation. The synthesized images are crucial to enhance the student network performance. However, the images synthesized by existing methods cause high homogeneity on intermediate features, incurring undesired distillation performance. To address this problem, we propose the Intermediate-Feature Heterogeneity Enhancement (IFHE) method, which effectively enhances the heterogeneity of synthesized images by minimizing the loss between intermediate features and pre-set labels of the synthesized images Our IFHE outperforms the SOTA results on CIFAR-10/100 datasets of representative networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）探索仅由经过预训练的教师在没有真实数据的情况下训练紧凑的学生网络。流行的DFKD方法主要包括图像合成和知识蒸馏。合成图像对于提高学生网络性能至关重要。然而，现有方法合成的图像导致中间特征高度均匀，导致蒸馏性能不理想。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了中间特征异质性增强（IFHE）方法，该方法通过最小化合成图像的中间特征和预设标签之间的损失来有效增强合成图像的异质性。我们的 IFHE 在代表性网络的 CIFAR-10/100 数据集上优于 SOTA 结果。

papers.title: Improving Standard-Cell Design Flow using Factored Form Optimization.
papers.abstract: Factored form is a powerful multi-level representation of a Boolean function that readily translates into an implementation of the function in CMOS technology. In particular, the number of literals in a factored form correlates strongly with the number of transistors in the CMOS implementation. This paper develops novel methods for optimizing factored forms while working on the efficient and-inverter graph (AIG) representation of combinational logic. This is in contrast to the traditional logic synthesis based on logic networks, and other AIG-based methods that minimize the AIG nodes count. Experiments show that applying these methods helps to reduce the area after technology mapping by an additional 2.8% on average, compared to a high-effort area-oriented baseline. It is expected that deploying these methods as part of an industrial standard-cell design flow will reduce design costs and power consumption. Additionally, this work enables efficient transistor-level logic synthesis of large designs with various applications in design automation.
papers.abstract_zh: 分解形式是布尔函数的强大多级表示，可以轻松转换为 CMOS 技术中函数的实现。特别是，因子形式的文字数量与 CMOS 实现中晶体管的数量密切相关。本文开发了优化因式分解形式的新颖方法，同时致力于组合逻辑的高效与反相图（AIG）表示。这与基于逻辑网络的传统逻辑综合以及最小化 AIG 节点数量的其他基于 AIG 的方法形成对比。实验表明，与高强度区域导向基线相比，应用这些方法有助于将技术映射后的区域平均减少 2.8%。预计将这些方法部署为工业标准单元设计流程的一部分将降低设计成本和功耗。此外，这项工作还可以对大型设计进行高效的晶体管级逻辑综合，并在设计自动化中实现各种应用。

papers.title: In-Memory Neural Network Accelerator based on eDRAM Cell with Enhanced Retention Time.
papers.abstract: Logic compatible eDRAM cell-based computing-in-memory (CIM) neural network accelerators have been actively studied as an energy-efficient neural network computing platform thanks to their small cell size and low static power compared to SRAM. However, previous eDRAM-based CIM accelerators suffer from significant accuracy degradation caused by process, voltage, temperature (PVT) variations and short retention time. To overcome the issues, we introduce a PVT-variation tolerant capacitive coupling-based eDRAM cell that has a much longer retention time than previous works. Simulation results show that the proposed eDRAM cell has up to 50× higher retention time compared to the state-of-the-art designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 与 SRAM 相比，逻辑兼容的基于 eDRAM 单元的内存计算 (CIM) 神经网络加速器由于其单元尺寸小且静态功耗低，因此作为节能神经网络计算平台得到了积极的研究。然而，之前基于 eDRAM 的 CIM 加速器因工艺、电压、温度 (PVT) 变化和短保留时间而导致精度显着下降。为了克服这些问题，我们引入了一种基于容性耦合的 PVT 变化的 eDRAM 单元，它的保留时间比以前的作品长得多。仿真结果表明，与最先进的设计相比，所提出的 eDRAM 单元的保留时间提高了 50 倍。

papers.title: Input-Aware Dynamic Timestep Spiking Neural Networks for Efficient In-Memory Computing.
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have recently attracted widespread research interest as an efficient alternative to traditional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) because of their capability to process sparse and binary spike information and avoid expensive multiplication operations. Although the efficiency of SNNs can be realized on the In-Memory Computing (IMC) architecture, we show that the energy cost and latency of SNNs scale linearly with the number of timesteps used on IMC hardware. Therefore, in order to maximize the efficiency of SNNs, we propose input-aware Dynamic Timestep SNN (DT-SNN), a novel algorithmic solution to dynamically determine the number of timesteps during inference on an input-dependent basis. By calculating the entropy of the accumulated output after each timestep, we can compare it to a predefined threshold and decide if the information processed at the current timestep is sufficient for a confident prediction. We deploy DT-SNN on an IMC architecture and show that it incurs negligible computational overhead. We demonstrate that our method only uses 1.46 average timesteps to achieve the accuracy of a 4-timestep static SNN while reducing the energy-delay-product by 80%.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 作为传统人工神经网络 (ANN) 的有效替代品，最近引起了广泛的研究兴趣，因为它们能够处理稀疏和二进制尖峰信息并避免昂贵的乘法运算。尽管 SNN 的效率可以在内存计算 (IMC) 架构上实现，但我们表明 SNN 的能源成本和延迟与 IMC 硬件上使用的时间步数呈线性关系。因此，为了最大限度地提高 SNN 的效率，我们提出了输入感知动态时间步长 SNN (DT-SNN)，这是一种新颖的算法解决方案，可在依赖于输入的基础上动态确定推理过程中的时间步数。通过计算每个时间步后累积输出的熵，我们可以将其与预定义的阈值进行比较，并确定当前时间步处理的信息是否足以进行置信预测。我们在 IMC 架构上部署 DT-SNN，并表明它产生的计算开销可以忽略不计。我们证明，我们的方法仅使用 1.46 个平均时间步长即可达到 4 时间步长静态 SNN 的精度，同时将能量延迟积减少 80%。

papers.title: Instant-NeRF: Instant On-Device Neural Radiance Field Training via Algorithm-Accelerator Co-Designed Near-Memory Processing.
papers.abstract: Instant on-device Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) are in growing demand for unleashing the promise of immersive AR/VR experiences, but are still limited by their prohibitive training time. Our profiling analysis reveals a memory-bound inefficiency in NeRF training. To tackle this inefficiency, near-memory processing (NMP) promises to be an effective solution, but also faces challenges due to the unique workloads of NeRFs, including the random hash table lookup, random point processing sequence, and heterogeneous bottleneck steps. Therefore, we propose the first NMP framework, Instant-NeRF, dedicated to enabling instant on-device NeRF training. Experiments on eight datasets consistently validate the effectiveness of Instant-NeRF.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们对设备上即时神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的需求不断增长，以释放沉浸式 AR/VR 体验的希望，但仍然受到其训练时间的限制。我们的分析揭示了 NeRF 训练中内存限制的低效率。为了解决这种低效率问题，近内存处理（NMP）有望成为一种有效的解决方案，但由于 NeRF 独特的工作负载，包括随机哈希表查找、随机点处理序列和异构瓶颈步骤，也面临着挑战。因此，我们提出了第一个 NMP 框架 Instant-NeRF，致力于实现即时设备上 NeRF 训练。对八个数据集的实验一致验证了 Instant-NeRF 的有效性。

papers.title: Intermittent-Aware Neural Network Pruning.
papers.abstract: Deep neural network inference on energy harvesting tiny devices has emerged as a solution for sustainable edge intelligence. However, compact models optimized for continuously-powered systems may become suboptimal when deployed on intermittently-powered systems. This paper presents the pruning criterion, pruning strategy, and prototype implementation of iPrune, the first framework which introduces intermittency into neural network pruning to produce compact models adaptable to intermittent systems. The pruned models are deployed and evaluated on a Texas Instruments device with various power strengths and TinyML applications. Compared to an energy-aware pruning framework, iPrune can speed up intermittent inference by 1.1 to 2 times while achieving comparable model accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 针对能量收集微型设备的深度神经网络推理已成为可持续边缘智能的解决方案。然而，针对连续供电系统优化的紧凑型模型在部署在间歇供电系统上时可能会变得次优。本文介绍了 iPrune 的剪枝标准、剪枝策略和原型实现，iPrune 是第一个将间歇性引入神经网络剪枝以产生适用于间歇系统的紧凑模型的框架。修剪后的模型在具有各种功率强度和 TinyML 应用程序的 Texas Instruments 设备上进行部署和评估。与能量感知剪枝框架相比，iPrune 可以将间歇推理速度提高 1.1 至 2 倍，同时实现相当的模型精度。

papers.title: Invited: A Scalable Formal Approach for Correctness-Assured Hardware Design.
papers.abstract: Correctness must be a first principle in hardware/-software co-design, especially for security and safety critical applications. We will give an overview of our scalable approach for correctness-assured hardware/software design at behavioral level, based on formalizing microarchitecture features as program transformations in an incremental compiler design and microprocessor correctness as a refined notation of compiler correctness. We will show how our approach is applied to designing a formally verified FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 正确性必须是硬件/软件协同设计的首要原则，特别是对于安全和安全关键应用程序。我们将概述我们在行为级别确保正确性的硬件/软件设计的可扩展方法，该方法基于将微体系结构特征形式化为增量编译器设计中的程序转换，并将微处理器正确性作为编译器正确性的精细表示法。我们将展示如何应用我们的方法来设计经过正式验证的 FHE（完全同态加密）加速器。

papers.title: Invited: Accelerating Genome Analysis via Algorithm-Architecture Co-Design.
papers.abstract: High-throughput sequencing (HTS) technologies have revolutionized the field of genomics, enabling rapid and cost-effective genome analysis for various applications. However, the increasing volume of genomic data generated by HTS technologies presents significant challenges for computational techniques to effectively analyze genomes. To address these challenges, several algorithm-architecture co-design works have been proposed, targeting different steps of the genome analysis pipeline.
