These works explore emerging technologies to provide fast, accurate, and low-power genome analysis.This paper provides a brief review of the recent advancements in accelerating genome analysis, covering the opportunities and challenges associated with the acceleration of the key steps of the genome analysis pipeline. Our analysis highlights the importance of integrating multiple steps of genome analysis using suitable architectures to unlock significant performance improvements and reduce data movement and energy consumption. We conclude by emphasizing the need for novel strategies and techniques to address the growing demands of genomic data generation and analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 高通量测序 (HTS) 技术彻底改变了基因组学领域，为各种应用提供快速且经济高效的基因组分析。然而，高温超导技术生成的基因组数据量不断增加，对有效分析基因组的计算技术提出了重大挑战。为了应对这些挑战，已经提出了几种算法架构协同设计工作，针对基因组分析流程的不同步骤。这些工作探索了提供快速、准确和低功耗基因组分析的新兴技术。本文简要回顾了加速基因组分析的最新进展，涵盖了与加速基因组分析流程关键步骤相关的机遇和挑战。我们的分析强调了使用合适的架构集成基因组分析的多个步骤的重要性，以显着提高性能并减少数据移动和能源消耗。最后，我们强调需要新的策略和技术来满足基因组数据生成和分析日益增长的需求。

papers.title: Invited: Algorithm-Software-Hardware Co-Design for Deep Learning Acceleration.
papers.abstract: With the development of AI techniques, it is appealing but challenging to efficiently deploy deep neural networks on resource-constrained devices. This paper presents two novel algorithm-software-hardware co-designs for improving the performance of deep neural networks. The first part introduces a hardware-efficient adaptive token pruning framework for Vision Transformers (ViTs) on FPGA, which achieves significant speedup under similar model accuracy. The second part introduces a design automation flow for crossbar-based Binary Neural Network (BNN) accelerators using the emerging technique Adiabatic Quantum-Flux-Parametron (AQFP). The proposed method significantly improves energy efficiency by combining AQFP with BNN together, which achieves over 100× better energy efficiency compared with the previous representative AQFP-based framework. Both proposed designs demonstrate superior performance compared to existing methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能技术的发展，在资源受限的设备上有效部署深度神经网络很有吸引力，但也充满挑战。本文提出了两种新颖的算法-软件-硬件协同设计，用于提高深度神经网络的性能。第一部分介绍了 FPGA 上的 Vision Transformers (ViTs) 的硬件高效自适应令牌剪枝框架，该框架在相似的模型精度下实现了显着的加速。第二部分介绍了使用新兴技术绝热量子通量参量管 (AQFP) 的基于交叉的二元神经网络 (BNN) 加速器的设计自动化流程。该方法通过将 AQFP 与 BNN 相结合，显着提高了能源效率，与之前基于 AQFP 的代表性框架相比，能源效率提高了 100 倍以上。与现有方法相比，两种提议的设计都表现出优越的性能。

papers.title: Invited: Algorithms and Architectures for Accelerating Long Read Sequence Analysis.
papers.abstract: Genome sequencing is continuing to revolutionize the medical, forensics, agricultural, and biosecurity fields. The enormous amounts of data from modern sequencing technology, require significant time and cost to obtain accurate results using general-purpose computing resources. The emergence of third-generation sequencers called nanopore sequencers offers small, cheap, and portable genome sequencing capabilities. However, the bottleneck during computational analysis limits scalability and portability. This paper introduces the necessity for one, optimization of existing algorithms; two, efficient utilization of existing heterogeneous systems; and three, novel algorithms and domain-specific architectures for rapid in situ analysis of third-generation sequencing data. State-of-the-art examples are described and future challenges are outlined.
papers.abstract_zh: 基因组测序正在继续彻底改变医学、法医学、农业和生物安全领域。现代测序技术产生的大量数据需要大量时间和成本才能使用通用计算资源获得准确的结果。称为纳米孔测序仪的第三代测序仪的出现提供了小型、廉价且便携式的基因组测序功能。然而，计算分析过程中的瓶颈限制了可扩展性和可移植性。介绍一、优化现有算法的必要性；二、高效利用现有异构系统；第三，用于第三代测序数据快速原位分析的新颖算法和特定领域架构。描述了最先进的示例并概述了未来的挑战。

papers.title: Invited: Automated Code generation for Information Technology Tasks in YAML through Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: The recent improvement in code generation capabilities due to the use of large language models has mainly benefited general purpose programming languages. Domain specific languages, such as the ones used for IT Automation, received far less attention, despite involving many active developers and being an essential component of modern cloud platforms. This work focuses on the generation of Ansible YAML, a widely used markup language for IT Automation. We present Ansible Wisdom, a natural-language to Ansible YAML code generation tool, aimed at improving IT automation productivity. Results show that Ansible Wisdom can accurately generate Ansible script from natural language prompts with performance comparable or better than existing state of the art code generation models.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于大型语言模型的使用，最近代码生成能力的改进主要使通用编程语言受益。尽管涉及许多活跃的开发人员并且是现代云平台的重要组成部分，但领域特定语言（例如用于 IT 自动化的语言）受到的关注要少得多。这项工作重点关注 Ansible YAML 的生成，这是一种广泛使用的 IT 自动化标记语言。我们推出 Ansible Wisdom，一种自然语言到 Ansible YAML 代码生成工具，旨在提高 IT 自动化生产力。结果表明，Ansible Wisdom 可以根据自然语言提示准确生成 Ansible 脚本，其性能与现有最先进的代码生成模型相当或更好。

papers.title: Invited: Autonomous Driving Digital Twin Empowered Design Automation: An Industry Perspective.
papers.abstract: Designing reliable computing systems for autonomous driving is extremely challenging, as the performance and reliability of the systems have to be thoroughly evaluated under an extremely large amount of driving scenarios. Physically constructing scenarios and conducting testing for autonomous driving systems is time-consuming and expensive. To minimize the need for physical testing and improve development efficiency, we developed a digital-twin-based simulation, which can generate an integral, precise, and comprehensive representation of physical scenarios. In this paper, we share our experiences with the digital-twin-based simulation for autonomous driving, particularly the design requirements and components demanded to facilitate virtual environment construction and design verification, which could greatly improve development efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 为自动驾驶设计可靠的计算系统极具挑战性，因为必须在大量驾驶场景下全面评估系统的性能和可靠性。物理构建场景并进行自动驾驶系统测试既耗时又昂贵。为了最大限度地减少物理测试的需要并提高开发效率，我们开发了基于数字孪生的仿真，它可以生成完整、精确、全面的物理场景表示。在本文中，我们分享了基于数字孪生的自动驾驶仿真经验，特别是促进虚拟环境构建和设计验证的设计要求和组件，可以大大提高开发效率。

papers.title: Invited: Building Robust Quantum System Software for Technology-Specific Characteristics.
papers.abstract: This paper discusses the various technologies used for quantum computing and highlights the need for compiler and software stack solutions that are portable across different technologies (beyond superconducting qubit quantum computers) while providing a higher-level interface that allows scientists to run their programs in a technology-agnostic manner. To achieve this, quantum compilers and architecture designs must not be bound by classical-style standards and specifications. As a first step toward tackling this challenge, this paper then focuses on developing a compiler solution for neutral atom quantum computing technology, which has several potential benefits over superconducting qubit quantum computing technology.These benefits include a greater connectivity of qubits within the Rydberg interaction radius, which allows for fewer SWAP operations, and the ability to execute multi-qubit gates directly. However, neutral atom quantum computers have a different set of constraints and requirements, including interaction blockades, which can result in potential serialization of operations, reducing some of the gains due to the better connectivity of neutral atom quantum computers. The paper then concludes by stating that addressing these challenges requires further research and development in the field.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文讨论了用于量子计算的各种技术，并强调了对可跨不同技术（超越超导量子位量子计算机）进行移植的编译器和软件堆栈解决方案的需求，同时提供更高级别的接口，使科学家能够以与技术无关的方式运行他们的程序。为了实现这一目标，量子编译器和架构设计不得受到经典风格的标准和规范的约束。作为应对这一挑战的第一步，本文重点开发中性原子量子计算技术的编译器解决方案，该解决方案比超导量子位量子计算技术具有多个潜在优势。这些优势包括里德堡相互作用半径内量子位的更大连接性，这允许更少的交换操作，以及直接执行多量子位门的能力。然而，中性原子量子计算机具有不同的约束和要求，包括交互封锁，这可能导致操作的潜在串行化，从而减少由于中性原子量子计算机更好的连接性而带来的一些收益。该论文最后指出，应对这些挑战需要该领域的进一步研究和开发。

papers.title: Invited: Buried Power Rails and Back-side Power Grids: Prospects and Challenges.
papers.abstract: Buried power rails and back-side power grids are promising technology-scaling boosters for advanced CMOS technology nodes. System-level evaluation of these technologies shows tremendous promise from power-performance-area (PPA), IR drop, and dynamic voltage droop perspective. However, several process, device, and architectural challenges must be addressed to realize the full potential of this technology. This article reviews the advancements and challenges in successfully adopting buried power rail and back-side power grid technology.
papers.abstract_zh: 埋地电源轨和背面电网是先进 CMOS 技术节点的有前途的技术扩展助推器。从功率性能范围 (PPA)、IR 压降和动态电压降角度来看，这些技术的系统级评估显示出巨大的前景。然而，为了充分发挥该技术的潜力，必须解决一些工艺、设备和架构挑战。本文回顾了成功采用埋地电源轨和背面电网技术的进展和挑战。

papers.title: Invited: Caching in Automated Data Centric Vehicles for Edge Computing Scenarios.
papers.abstract: With the current trend towards large data volumes, state-of-the-art communication and data management solutions based on the publish/subscribe pattern reach the network limits, hampering the deployment of advanced edge and cloud computing services. A main reason is the established publisher-centric distribution mechanism that over-utilizes network resources. We suggest a network and subscriber-centric adaptive data caching communication scheme supported by dynamic network management and configuration, which has great potential to solve the data distribution challenges. We show that state-of-the-art publish/subscribe middlewares like Data Distribution Service (DDS) can transparently be combined with such software caching.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着当前大数据量的趋势，基于发布/订阅模式的最先进的通信和数据管理解决方案达到了网络极限，阻碍了先进边缘和云计算服务的部署。一个主要原因是建立的以发布者为中心的分发机制过度利用了网络资源。我们提出了一种由动态网络管理和配置支持的以网络和用户为中心的自适应数据缓存通信方案，该方案具有解决数据分发挑战的巨大潜力。我们表明，最先进的发布/订阅中间件（例如数据分发服务（DDS））可以透明地与此类软件缓存相结合。

papers.title: Invited: Compute Express Link™ (CXL™): An Open Interconnect for Cloud Infrastructure.
papers.abstract: Compute Express Link is an open industry standard interconnect offering caching and memory semantics on top of PCI-Express (PCIe)®, with resource pooling and fabric capabilities. This paper delves into the role of CXL to solve some of the challenges in the cloud infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link 是一种开放式行业标准互连，在 PCI-Express (PCIe)® 之上提供缓存和内存语义，并具有资源池和结构功能。本文深入探讨了 CXL 在解决云基础设施中的一些挑战方面的作用。

papers.title: INVITED: Design Automation Needs for Monolithic 3D ICs: Accomplishments and Gaps.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we provide an overview of design automation tools and methodology for Monolithic 3D ICs, focusing on the accomplishments in recent years and the gaps that remain to be filled. Monolithic 3D integration is an emerging technology with high 3D interconnect density and performance benefits, but it proposes new challenges for computer-aided design tools. In this paper, we first revisit the current status of design automation tools for Monolithic 3D and highlight the recent developments in tier partitioning, 3D placement and routing, inter-tier via controls, and power and thermal integrity analysis. Then, we discuss the gaps to be met for next-generation system-level heterogeneous Monolithic 3D IC design. Finally, we present our vision for the future of design automation developments for Monolithic 3D ICs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们概述了单片 3D IC 的设计自动化工具和方法，重点介绍了近年来取得的成就以及仍有待填补的空白。单片3D集成是一种新兴技术，具有高3D互连密度和性能优势，但它给计算机辅助设计工具带来了新的挑战。在本文中，我们首先回顾了单片 3D 设计自动化工具的现状，并重点介绍了层分区、3D 布局和布线、层间过孔控制以及电源和热完整性分析方面的最新发展。然后，我们讨论下一代系统级异构单片 3D IC 设计需要满足的差距。最后，我们提出了对单片 3D IC 设计自动化开发未来的愿景。

papers.title: INVITED: Generalizing the ISA to the ILA: A Software/Hardware Interface for Accelerator-rich Platforms.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the Instruction-Level Abstraction (ILA) as a formal software/hardware interface for accelerator-rich platforms. The ILA provides a common framework for formal functional specification of processors and accelerator behavior, verifying their implementations, and reasoning about software-hardware interactions of programs with accelerators. The ILA-MCM specification extends the ILA to enable reasoning about interactions of accelerators with other compute engines through shared memory. The 3LA compilation flow for accelerators uses the ILA model to bridge the gap between fine-grain compiler intrinsics and coarse-grain accelerator operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出指令级抽象 (ILA) 作为加速器丰富平台的正式软件/硬件接口。 ILA 为处理器和加速器行为的正式功能规范、验证其实现以及推理程序与加速器的软硬件交互提供了通用框架。 ILA-MCM 规范扩展了 ILA，以支持通过共享内存对加速器与其他计算引擎的交互进行推理。加速器的 3LA 编译流程使用 ILA 模型来弥合细粒度编译器内在函数和粗粒度加速器操作之间的差距。

papers.title: Invited: Pre-silicon Side Channel and Fault Analysis.
papers.abstract: In this work, we address the challenges of side channel analysis (SCA) and fault injection (FI) in the pre-silicon design stage, particularly for cryptographic implementations. We show that the industry perspective uncovers different challenges than those usually tackled by academia, emphasizing the need for practical and scalable solutions. We present (Side Channel Attack Testbench Emulator) SCATE, a framework for detecting and mitigating SCA vulnerabilities, leveraging industry-standard electronic design automation (EDA) software for efficient power estimation and FI simulations. Moreover, we demonstrate a significant performance increase in power simulation tools by optimizing EDA algorithms for SCA applications, resulting in faster power trace generation. Additionally, we discuss the application of formal property verification (FPV) for verifying fault injection countermeasures and present a case study on an AES S-box. These approaches enable non-security-expert designers to evaluate SCA and FI resistant designs with significant time savings. The vulnerabilities uncovered by these approaches highlight the importance of pre-silicon analysis at each design stage to produce secure application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs).
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了硅前设计阶段的侧通道分析 (SCA) 和故障注入 (FI) 的挑战，特别是在加密实现方面。我们表明，行业视角揭示了与学术界通常解决的挑战不同的挑战，强调了对实用且可扩展的解决方案的需求。我们推出（侧通道攻击测试平台仿真器）SCATE，这是一个用于检测和缓解 SCA 漏洞的框架，利用行业标准电子设计自动化 (EDA) 软件进行高效功耗估计和 FI 仿真。此外，我们通过优化 SCA 应用的 EDA 算法，展示了功率仿真工具的显着性能提升，从而加快了功率跟踪生成速度。此外，我们还讨论了形式属性验证 (FPV) 在验证故障注入对策中的应用，并介绍了 AES S-box 的案例研究。这些方法使非安全专家设计人员能够评估 SCA 和 FI 抵抗设计，并节省大量时间。这些方法发现的漏洞凸显了在每个设计阶段进行硅前分析以生产安全的专用集成电路 (ASIC) 的重要性。

papers.title: Invited: Waving the Double-Edged Sword: Building Resilient CAVs with Edge and Cloud Computing.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of edge and cloud computing platforms, vehicular ad-hoc networks, and machine learning techniques have brought both opportunities and challenges for next-generation connected and automated vehicles (CAVs). On the one hand, these technologies can enable vehicles to leverage more computing power from edge and cloud servers and to share information with each other and surrounding infrastructures for better situation awareness and more intelligent decision making. On the other hand, the more distributed computing process and the wireless nature of V2X (vehicle-to-everything) communication expose vulnerabilities to various disturbances and attacks. In this paper, we discuss the security and safety challenges for edge- and cloud-enabled CAVs, particularly when they are under environment interferences, execution errors, and malicious attacks, and we will introduce our recent work and future directions in developing system-driven, end-to-end methodologies and tools to address these challenges and ensure system resiliency under uncertainties.
papers.abstract_zh: 边缘和云计算平台、车载自组织网络和机器学习技术的快速发展为下一代联网和自动驾驶汽车（CAV）带来了机遇和挑战。一方面，这些技术可以使车辆利用边缘和云服务器的更多计算能力，并与彼此和周围基础设施共享信息，以实现更好的态势感知和更智能的决策。另一方面，更加分布式的计算过程和 V2X（车对万物）通信的无线特性暴露了容易受到各种干扰和攻击的漏洞。在本文中，我们讨论了边缘和云支持的 CAV 的安全挑战，特别是当它们受到环境干扰、执行错误和恶意攻击时，我们将介绍我们在开发系统驱动的端到端方法和工具方面的近期工作和未来方向，以应对这些挑战并确保不确定情况下的系统弹性。

papers.title: IP Protection in TinyML.
papers.abstract: Tiny machine learning (TinyML) is an essential component of emerging smart microcontrollers (MCUs). However, the protection of the intellectual property (IP) of the model is an increasing concern due to the lack of desktop/server-grade resources on these power-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose STML, a system and algorithm co-design to Secure IP of TinyML on MCUs with ARM TrustZone. Our design jointly optimizes memory utilization and latency while ensuring the security and accuracy of emerging models. We implemented a prototype and benchmarked with 7 models, demonstrating STML reduces 40% of model protection runtime overhead on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 微型机器学习 (TinyML) 是新兴智能微控制器 (MCU) 的重要组成部分。然而，由于这些功耗受限的设备上缺乏桌面/服务器级资源，模型知识产权 (IP) 的保护日益受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了 STML，这是一种系统和算法联合设计，用于通过 ARM TrustZone 在 MCU 上保护 TinyML 的 IP。我们的设计共同优化内存利用率和延迟，同时确保新兴模型的安全性和准确性。我们实现了一个原型并用 7 个模型进行了基准测试，证明 STML 平均减少了 40% 的模型保护运行时开销。

papers.title: Ising-CF: A Pathbreaking Collaborative Filtering Method Through Efficient Ising Machine Learning.
papers.abstract: Due to the Ising model’s strong expressivity and Ising machines’ unique computational power, it is highly desired if Ising-based learning can be used in real-world applications. Unfortunately, the challenges in learning the Ising model and gaps between the practical accuracy of Ising machines and the theoretical accuracy of the Ising model impede the realization of Ising machines’ potential. Hence, we propose an Ising Machine Learning framework, Ising-CF, for collaborative filtering, a widely-used recommendation method. Specifically, Ising-CF uses Linear Neural Networks with Besag’s pseudo-likelihood and voltage polarization for fast, accurate Ising model learning and an Ising-specific logarithmic quantization for ns-level Ising machine inference with near-theoretical accuracy, 7.3% over SOTA.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 Ising 模型强大的表达能力和 Ising 机器独特的计算能力，基于 Ising 的学习能否应用于实际应用是非常令人期待的。不幸的是，学习伊辛模型的挑战以及伊辛机的实际精度与伊辛模型的理论精度之间的差距阻碍了伊辛机潜力的实现。因此，我们提出了一种 Ising 机器学习框架 Ising-CF，用于协作过滤（一种广泛使用的推荐方法）。具体来说，Ising-CF 使用具有 Besag 伪似然和电压极化的线性神经网络来实现快速、准确的 Ising 模型学习，并使用 Ising 特定的对数量化来实现 ns 级 Ising 机器推理，其精度接近理论精度，比 SOTA 高出 7.3%。

papers.title: Lamellar DSA-aware Detailed Routing Considering Double Patterning and Short Template Minimization.
papers.abstract: With the advance of technology nodes, via fabrication in a dense design becomes a difficult challenge, and the directed self-assembly (DSA) technology has shown its great potential in contact/via layer manufacturing. As many studies consider the guiding template design problem for cylindrical DSA, lamellar DSA with the self-aligned via process emerges as an alternative with better yield and design flexibility. However, the new process also imposes new constraints on template design, making an arbitrary contact/via layout suffer from unsatisfactory manufacturability. In this paper, we present the first work on detailed routing considering lamellar DSA guiding template design and mask assignment with double patterning lithography (DPL) to minimize the numbers of unmanufacturable vias and short templates. In the proposed router, we construct a conflict graph and a via forbidden map for routing guidance and via mask assignment. A prerouting methodology is developed to obtain better via distribution in critical areas and preserve routing space for further detailed routing. After that, a short template-aware detailed routing approach routes the rest of the nets and an existing template design engine is adopted for optimal template design and mask assignment. The experimental results indicate that compared to a conventional A<sup>*</sup> search-based router, our approach can generate conflict-free template design results and achieve 35% reduction in short templates.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点的进步，密集设计中的过孔制造成为一项艰巨的挑战，定向自组装（DSA）技术在接触/过孔层制造中显示出巨大的潜力。由于许多研究考虑了圆柱形 DSA 的引导模板设计问题，因此采用自对准通孔工艺的层状 DSA 成为具有更好良率和设计灵活性的替代方案。然而，新工艺也对模板设计施加了新的限制，使得任意接触/通孔布局的可制造性不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了第一个关于详细布线的工作，考虑层状 DSA 指导模板设计和使用双图案光刻 (DPL) 进行掩模分配，以最大限度地减少不可制造的通孔和短模板的数量。在所提出的路由器中，我们构建了一个冲突图和一个过孔禁止图，用于路由指导和过孔掩码分配。开发了一种预布线方法，以便在关键区域获得更好的通孔分布，并为进一步详细布线保留布线空间。之后，采用简短的模板感知详细布线方法对网络的其余部分进行布线，并采用现有的模板设计引擎来实现最佳模板设计和掩模分配。实验结果表明，与传统的基于 A<sup>*</sup> 搜索的路由器相比，我们的方法可以生成无冲突的模板设计结果，并实现短模板减少 35%。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results From Hybrid Design Automation for Field-coupled Nanotechnologies.
papers.abstract: Recent breakthroughs in atomically precise manufacturing are paving the way for Field-coupled Nanocomputing (FCN) to become a real-world post-CMOS technology. This drives the need for efficient and scalable physical design automation methods. However, due to the problem’s NP-completeness, existing solutions either generate designs of high quality, but are not scalable, or generate designs in negligible time but of poor quality. In an attempt to balance scalability and quality, we created and evaluated a hybrid approach that combines the best of established design methods and deep reinforcement learning. This paper summarizes the obtained results.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近在原子级精确制造方面取得的突破为场耦合纳米计算 (FCN) 成为现实世界的后 CMOS 技术铺平了道路。这推动了对高效且可扩展的物理设计自动化方法的需求。然而，由于问题的 NP 完整性，现有的解决方案要么生成高质量的设计，但不可扩展，要么在可忽略的时间内生成设计，但质量较差。为了平衡可扩展性和质量，我们创建并评估了一种混合方法，该方法结合了现有的最佳设计方法和深度强化学习。本文总结了所获得的结果。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: An Efficient Bridge-based Compression Algorithm for Topologically Quantum Error Corrected Circuits.
papers.abstract: Topological quantum error correction (TQEC) is a promising method for fault-tolerant quantum circuits. A TQEC circuit can be visualized as the defect movement along the time axis and modeled as a 3D space-time volume to estimate the required resource. A quantum algorithm must minimize the space-time volume for a feasible physical qubit number and computational time, especially for large-scale designs. Previous work presents quadratic-time simultaneous primal and dual bridge compression for a TQEC circuit, which is infeasible for large-scale problems. This paper presents an efficient divide-and-conquer approach to primal and dual bridge compression, which can support different code distances between qubits. Compared with the previous work, experimental results show that our algorithm is effective and efficient even for large-scale problems.
papers.abstract_zh: 拓扑量子纠错（TQEC）是一种有前途的容错量子电路方法。 TQEC 电路可以可视化为沿时间轴的缺陷移动，并建模为 3D 时空体积以估计所需的资源。量子算法必须最小化时空体积以获得可行的物理量子比特数和计算时间，特别是对于大规模设计。先前的工作提出了 TQEC 电路的二次时间同时原始和双桥压缩，这对于大规模问题是不可行的。本文提出了一种有效的分而治之的原始和双桥压缩方法，可以支持量子位之间的不同代码距离。与之前的工作相比，实验结果表明，我们的算法即使对于大规模问题也是有效且高效的。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Analytical Placement for 3D ICs with Multiple Manufacturing Technologies.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a high-quality 3D placement algorithm to determine the positions of standard cells and inter-die vias to optimize wirelength considering multiple manufacturing technologies for different dies. The algorithm consists of three major novel techniques: (1) a multi-technologies weighted-average (MTWA) wirelength model, (2) a weighted inter-die-connection cost controlling the net-degree distribution of the cut set, and (3) a via-cell co-optimization technique to further improve the quality of placement solutions. Compared with the winners at the 2022 CAD Contest at ICCAD on 3D Placement with D2D Vertical Connections, our placer achieves the best results for all nontrivial cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种高质量 3D 布局算法，用于确定标准单元和芯片间过孔的位置，以优化线长，同时考虑不同芯片的多种制造技术。该算法由三项主要新技术组成：(1) 多技术加权平均 (MTWA) 线长模型，(2) 控制切割集网络度分布的加权芯片间连接成本，以及 (3) 通孔单元协同优化技术，以进一步提高贴装解决方案的质量。与 2022 年 ICCAD CAD 竞赛中 D2D 垂直连接 3D 布局的获奖者相比，我们的布局器在所有重要情况下都取得了最佳结果。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Configurable Ring Oscillators as a Side-Channel Countermeasure.
papers.abstract: Side-channel attacks are a threat to computing devices. In this work, we propose a novel countermeasure against power analysis side-channel attacks. This countermeasure uses ring oscillators with runtime-configurable chain lengths to generate noise to hide the effects of the secret intermediate values on the device’s power consumption. We develop our countermeasure to be compatible with a state-of-the-art of side-channel-attack detection mechanism. Therefore, our solution does not incur any extra area overhead as it uses a subset of the circuit needed for detection. We evaluate our countermeasure using the test vector leakage assessment test (TVLA test). When our countermeasure is active no side-channel leakage could be detected.
papers.abstract_zh: 旁道攻击对计算设备构成威胁。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对功率分析侧信道攻击的新颖对策。该对策使用具有运行时可配置链长度的环形振荡器来生成噪声，以隐藏秘密中间值对设备功耗的影响。我们开发的对策与最先进的侧信道攻击检测机制兼容。因此，我们的解决方案不会产生任何额外的面积开销，因为它使用检测所需电路的子集。我们使用测试矢量泄漏评估测试（TVLA 测试）来评估我们的对策。当我们的对策处于活动状态时，无法检测到旁道泄漏。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: COPPER: Computation Obfuscation by Producing Permutations for Encoding Randomly.
papers.abstract: Deployed embedded devices face security risks due to increased ease of physical access to the devices by unauthorized users. Capable adversaries can intercept a device to recover the data in memory, including results of performed sensitive computations. Device owners require data confidentiality on their physically insecure devices. To satisfy this goal we implement a novel method, COPPER (Computation Obfuscation by Producing Permutations for Encoding Randomly), to create data which never exists on the device digitally in plaintext format and which is subsequently used for computation. In this paper we utilize COPPER to calculate a moving average computation on encoded data. <sup>1</sup>
papers.abstract_zh: 由于未经授权的用户对设备的物理访问变得更加容易，已部署的嵌入式设备面临安全风险。有能力的对手可以拦截设备以恢复内存中的数据，包括执行敏感计算的结果。设备所有者要求其物理上不安全的设备上的数据机密性。为了实现这一目标，我们实施了一种新颖的方法，COPPER（通过随机生成排列进行计算混淆），以纯文本格式创建设备上从未存在的数字数据，并随后用于计算。在本文中，我们利用 COPPER 对编码数据进行移动平均计算。 <sup>1</sup>

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Fast Fair Medical Applications? Hybrid Vision Models Achieve the Fairness on the Edge.
papers.abstract: As edge devices become readily available and indispensable, there is an urgent need for effective and efficient intelligent applications to be deployed widespread. However, fairness has always been an issue, especially in edge medical applications. Compared to convolutional neuron networks (CNNs), Vision Transformer (ViT) has a better ability to extract global information, which will contribute to alleviating the unfairness problem. Typically, ViTs consume large amounts of computational and memory resources, which hinders their usage on edge. In this work, we propose a novel hardware-efficient Vision Model search framework for the fair dermatology classification, namely HeViFa. Experimental results show that HeViFa could search for a hybrid ViT model that reaches 173.1 FPS on a Samsung S21 mobile phone with 85.71% accuracy on the light skin dataset and 80.85% accuracy on the dark skin dataset. Note that HeViFa can reach both the highest accuracy and fairness under similar latency constrain on multiple edge devices (Samsung S21 mobile phone, iPhone 13 Pro and Raspberry PI).
papers.abstract_zh: 随着边缘设备变得唾手可得且不可或缺，迫切需要广泛部署有效且高效的智能应用。然而，公平性一直是一个问题，尤其是在边缘医疗应用中。与卷积神经网络（CNN）相比，视觉变换器（ViT）具有更好的提取全局信息的能力，这将有助于缓解不公平问题。通常，ViT 会消耗大量计算和内存资源，这阻碍了它们在边缘的使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件高效视觉模型搜索框架，用于公平的皮肤病学分类，即 HeViFa。实验结果表明，HeViFa 可以在三星 S21 手机上搜索达到 173.1 FPS 的混合 ViT 模型，在浅色皮肤数据集上的准确率达到 85.71%，在深色皮肤数据集上的准确率达到 80.85%。请注意，HeViFa 在多个边缘设备（三星 S21 手机、iPhone 13 Pro 和 Raspberry PI）上相似的延迟约束下可以达到最高的准确性和公平性。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: PVT-Sensitive Delay Fitting for High-Performance Computing.
papers.abstract: Aggressively monitoring and tracking system-on-chip (SoC) performance under process/voltage/temperature (PVT) variations is essential for high-performance computing systems. This work observes that different chips of the same SoC design may have different PVT-to-delay sensitivities, which must be carefully considered for accurate chip performance tracking. A learning-based method is then proposed to fit critical path delay for different chips with different PVT-to-delay sensitivities. Experimental results based on the fabricated chip samples of a 7nm SoC have justified the effectiveness of the proposed PVT-sensitive delay fitting method. Compared with the state-of-the-art, our method can achieve excellent performance tracking accuracy when the chip performance is dominated by different critical paths under different PVT conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 积极监控和跟踪工艺/电压/温度 (PVT) 变化下的片上系统 (SoC) 性能对于高性能计算系统至关重要。这项工作观察到，同一 SoC 设计的不同芯片可能具有不同的 PVT 延迟敏感度，必须仔细考虑这一点，以实现准确的芯片性能跟踪。然后提出了一种基于学习的方法来适应具有不同 PVT 延迟敏感性的不同芯片的关键路径延迟。基于 7nm SoC 制造芯片样品的实验结果证明了所提出的 PVT 敏感延迟拟合方法的有效性。与现有技术相比，当芯片性能在不同PVT条件下由不同关键路径主导时，我们的方法可以实现优异的性能跟踪精度。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: RL-LPO: Reinforcement Learning Based Leakage Power Optimization Framework with Graph Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Leakage power optimization based on threshold voltage (V<inf>th</inf>) assignment poses great challenge in circuit design due to its tremendous solution space. In this paper, a Reinforcement Learning-based Leakage Power Optimization framework (RL-LPO) is first-ever proposed to formulate V<inf>th</inf> assignment as a reinforcement learning (RL) process by learning timing and physical characteristics of each circuit instance with Graph Neural Networks (GNN). The proposed RL-LPO was validated by the IWLS2005 and Opencores benchmark circuits with TSMC 28nm technology and experimental results demonstrate that our work achieves better leakage power optimization by additional 3% reduction on average than the commercial tool PrimeTime with 6.7× speed up when being transferred to unseen circuits with negligible timing degradation.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于阈值电压 (V<inf>th</inf>) 分配的泄漏功率优化由于其巨大的解决方案空间而给电路设计带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，首次提出了基于强化学习的泄漏功率优化框架（RL-LPO），通过使用图神经网络（GNN）学习每个电路实例的时序和物理特性，将 V<inf>th</inf> 分配制定为强化学习（RL）过程。所提出的 RL-LPO 通过采用 TSMC 28nm 技术的 IWLS2005 和 Opencores 基准电路进行了验证，实验结果表明，我们的工作实现了更好的泄漏功率优化，比商业工具 PrimeTime 平均额外减少了 3%，当转移到看不见的电路时，速度提高了 6.7 倍，时序退化可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Scalable and Efficient Hyperdimensional Computing for Network Intrusion Detection.
papers.abstract: Cybersecurity has emerged as a critical challenge for the industry. With the large complexity of the security landscape, sophisticated and costly deep learning models often fail to provide timely detection of cyber threats on edge devices. Brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC) has been introduced as a promising solution to address this issue. However, existing HDC approaches use static encoders and require very high dimensionality and hundreds of training iterations to achieve reasonable accuracy. This results in a serious loss of learning efficiency and causes huge latency for detecting attacks. In this paper, we propose CyberHD, an innovative HDC learning framework that identifies and regenerates insignificant dimensions to capture complicated patterns of cyber threats with remarkably lower dimensionality. Additionally, the holographic distribution of patterns in high dimensional space provides CyberHD with notably high robustness against hardware errors.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络安全已成为该行业面临的严峻挑战。由于安全环境非常复杂，复杂且成本高昂的深度学习模型通常无法及时检测边缘设备上的网络威胁。类脑超维计算（HDC）已被引入作为解决这一问题的有前途的解决方案。然而，现有的 HDC 方法使用静态编码器，需要非常高的维度和数百次训练迭代才能达到合理的精度。这导致学习效率的严重损失，并导致检测攻击的巨大延迟。在本文中，我们提出了 Cyber​​HD，这是一种创新的 HDC 学习框架，可以识别并重新生成无关紧要的维度，以捕获维度明显较低的网络威胁的复杂模式。此外，高维空间中图案的全息分布为 Cyber​​HD 提供了针对硬件错误的极高鲁棒性。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Test Selection For RTL Coverage By Unsupervised Learning From Fast Functional Simulation.
papers.abstract: Functional coverage closure is an important but RTL simulation intensive aspect of constrained random verification. To reduce these computational demands, we propose test selection for functional coverage via machine learning (ML) based anomaly detection in the structural coverage space of fast functional simulators. We achieve promising results on two units from a state-of-the-art production GPU design. With our approach, an up to 85% RTL simulation runtime reduction can be achieved when compared to baseline constrained random test selection while achieving the same RTL functional coverage.
papers.abstract_zh: 功能覆盖收敛是约束随机验证的一个重要但 RTL 模拟密集的方面。为了减少这些计算需求，我们建议通过快速功能模拟器的结构覆盖空间中基于机器学习（ML）的异常检测来进行功能覆盖的测试选择。我们通过最先进的生产 GPU 设计在两台设备上取得了令人鼓舞的结果。通过我们的方法，与基线约束随机测试选择相比，可以实现高达 85% 的 RTL 仿真运行时间减少，同时实现相同的 RTL 功能覆盖率。

papers.title: Late Breaking Results: Weight Decay is ALL You Need for Neural Network Sparsification.
papers.abstract: The heuristic iterative pruning strategy has been widely used for neural network sparsification. However, it is challenging to identify the right connections to remove at each pruning iteration with only a one-shot evaluation of weight magnitude, especially at the early pruning stage. The erroneously removed connections, unfortunately, can hardly be recovered. In this work, we propose a weight decay strategy as a substitute for pruning, which let the "insignificant" weights moderately decay instead of being directly clamped to zero. At the end of the training, the vast majority of redundant weights will naturally become close to zero, making it easier to identify which connections could be removed safely. Experimental results show that the proposed weight decay method can achieve an ultra-high sparsity of 99%. Compared to the current pruning strategy, the model size is further reduced by 34%, improving the compression rate from 69× to 106× at the same accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 启发式迭代剪枝策略已广泛用于神经网络稀疏化。然而，仅通过权重大小的一次性评估来确定每次剪枝迭代时要删除的正确连接是具有挑战性的，特别是在早期剪枝阶段。不幸的是，被错误删除的连接很难恢复。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种权重衰减策略作为剪枝的替代品，它让“无关紧要”的权重适度衰减，而不是直接钳制为零。训练结束时，绝大多数冗余权重自然会变得接近于零，从而更容易识别哪些连接可以安全删除。实验结果表明，所提出的权重衰减方法可以实现99%的超高稀疏度。与当前的剪枝策略相比，模型尺寸进一步减小了34%，在相同精度的情况下，压缩率从69×提高到106×。

papers.title: Layout Decomposition via Boolean Satisfiability.
papers.abstract: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) has been introduced in the integrated circuits manufacturing industry to enhance feature density as the technology node advances. A crucial step of MPL is assigning layout features to different masks, namely layout decomposition. Exact algorithms like integer linear programming (ILP) can solve layout decomposition to optimality but lacks scalability for very dense patterns. Approximation algorithms (e.g., linear programming, semi-definite programming) and heuristics (e.g., Exact-Cover) are capable of handling large cases but can only get inferior solutions. In this paper, we propose a new exact algorithm that tackles layout decomposition by solving a series of boolean satisfiability instances. Our algorithm can preserve optimality and achieve more than 4× speedup compared to ILP. In addition, we provide an approximation algorithm by reformulating the layout decomposition to a bilevel optimization problem. Experiments show that our approximation algorithm can attain higher solution quality compared to SDP and heuristics within faster convergence.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点的进步，多重图案化光刻（MPL）已被引入集成电路制造行业以提高特征密度。 MPL 的一个关键步骤是将布局特征分配给不同的掩模，即布局分解。整数线性规划 (ILP) 等精确算法可以解决布局分解的最优问题，但对于非常密集的图案缺乏可扩展性。近似算法（例如线性规划、半定规划）和启发式算法（例如 Exact-Cover）能够处理大型情况，但只能得到较差的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的精确算法，通过求解一系列布尔可满足性实例来解决布局分解问题。与 ILP 相比，我们的算法可以保持最优性并实现超过 4 倍的加速。此外，我们通过将布局分解重新表述为双层优化问题来提供近似算法。实验表明，与 SDP 和启发式算法相比，我们的近似算法可以在更快的收敛速度内获得更高的解质量。

papers.title: Leaky MDU: ARM Memory Disambiguation Unit Uncovered and Vulnerabilities Exposed.
papers.abstract: Memory Disambiguation Unit (MDU) is widely used on modern processors to speculatively execute load instructions and improve pipeline performance. Given that the MDU design details on ARM processors are not available to the public, it is unclear whether there are any security vulnerabilities associated with its MDU. In this paper, we first reverse engineer the undocumented features of ARM MDU, then we discover three potential user-privilege attacks to leak secret data via MDU: cross-process attack that allows users to communicate through a convert channel, cross-domain attack that leaks kernel information and a new variant of inner-process and inter-processes Spectre attacks. These attacks pose serious security challenges as they can bypass both all the known countermeasures against cache side-channel attacks and those against transient execution attacks. Potential mitigation against the proposed MDU-based attacks are also discussed.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存消歧单元 (MDU) 广泛用于现代处理器上，用于推测性地执行加载指令并提高管道性能。鉴于ARM处理器上的MDU设计细节尚未向公众公开，目前尚不清楚其MDU是否存在任何安全漏洞。在本文中，我们首先对 ARM MDU 未记录的功能进行逆向工程，然后发现三种潜在的用户权限攻击，通过 MDU 泄露秘密数据：允许用户通过转换通道进行通信的跨进程攻击、泄露内核信息的跨域攻击以及进程内和进程间 Spectre 攻击的新变体。这些攻击带来了严重的安全挑战，因为它们可以绕过所有已知的针对缓存侧通道攻击和瞬时执行攻击的对策。还讨论了针对所提议的基于 MDU 的攻击的潜在缓解措施。

papers.title: Learning-based Data Separation for Write Amplification Reduction in Solid State Drives.
papers.abstract: Garbage collection in SSDs causes write amplification. The key to mitigating this problem is separating data by lifetime. Prior works proposed using machine learning to accurately predict data lifetime but prediction is performed at the host side, burdening the host storage stack. We present PHFTL, a practical, holistic FTL design with device-side learning-based data separation. The machine learning model in PHFTL accurately and adaptively predicts the lifetime of every written page. A suite of enabling techniques are introduced to keep computation and storage overhead low. Extensive evaluation of PHFTL demonstrates superiority over state-of-the-art and feasibility on real hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: SSD 中的垃圾收集会导致写入放大。缓解这个问题的关键是按生命周期分离数据。先前的工作提出使用机器学习来准确预测数据寿命，但预测是在主机端执行的，这给主机存储堆栈带来了负担。我们提出 PHFTL，一种实用的、整体的 FTL 设计，具有基于设备端学习的数据分离。 PHFTL 中的机器学习模型可以准确且自适应地预测每个写入页面的生命周期。引入了一套支持技术来保持较低的计算和存储开销。 PHFTL 的广泛评估证明了其相对于最先进技术的优越性以及在实际硬件上的可行性。

papers.title: Lift: Exploiting Hybrid Stacked Memory for Energy-Efficient Processing of Graph Convolutional Networks.
papers.abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are powerful learning approaches for graph-structured data. GCNs are both computing- and memory-intensive. The emerging 3D-stacked computation-in-memory (CIM) architecture provides a promising solution to process GCNs efficiently. The CIM architecture can provide near-data computing, thereby reducing data movement between computing logic and memory. However, previous works do not fully exploit the CIM architecture in both dataflow and mapping, leading to significant energy consumption.This paper presents Lift, an energy-efficient GCN accelerator based on 3D CIM architecture using software and hardware co-design. At the hardware level, Lift introduces a hybrid architecture to process vertices with different characteristics. Lift adopts near-bank processing units with a push-based dataflow to process vertices with strong re-usability. A dedicated unit is introduced to reduce massive data movement caused by high-degree vertices. At the software level, Lift adopts a hybrid mapping to further exploit data locality and fully utilize the hybrid computing resources. The experimental results show that the proposed scheme can significantly reduce data movement and energy consumption compared with representative schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）是图结构数据的强大学习方法。 GCNs are both computing- and memory-intensive.新兴的 3D 堆栈内存计算 (CIM) 架构为高效处理 GCN 提供了一种有前途的解决方案。 CIM架构可以提供近数据计算，从而减少计算逻辑和内存之间的数据移动。然而，之前的工作在数据流和映射方面都没有充分利用CIM架构，导致大量的能源消耗。本文提出了Lift，一种基于3D CIM架构、采用软硬件协同设计的节能GCN加速器。在硬件层面，Lift引入了混合架构来处理具有不同特征的顶点。 Lift采用近岸处理单元，采用基于推送的数据流来处理顶点，具有很强的可重用性。引入专用单元来减少高度顶点引起的大量数据移动。在软件层面，Lift采用混合映射，进一步挖掘数据局部性，充分利用混合计算资源。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，所提出的方案可以显着减少数据移动和能耗。

papers.title: Lightning Talk 21: EDA with ML, Rule-Based, or Both?
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) has been effectively applied to many applications these days mainly because huge amount of data is available through internet. This is not the case in semiconductor industry, where data is not shared between companies or even inside a single organization. ML model, in particular complex one with many parameters, is in danger of overfit when data volume is small and becomes inefficient.Rule-based (or expert) system has been considered a part of AI (artificial intelligence), which also includes ML, and has been popular in many EDA applications. This paper tries to compare the two methods when data volume is high and low. The expectation is that ML is more efficient with high data volume and rule-based is less sensitive to the amount of data and so can be a better choice in low data volume. In addition, combining both methods in a way that rules are revised with some guidance from ML model is investigated so that rule-based method can be a good option in low data volume.Two example applications are considered: OPC refragmentation, which has been addressed through random forest classifier (RFC) ML model [1], and placement utilization in low aspect ratio design, where CNN has been applied [3] to identify utilization distribution over layout sub-regions.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，机器学习（ML）已被有效地应用于许多应用程序，主要是因为通过互联网可以获得大量数据。半导体行业的情况并非如此，公司之间甚至单个组织内部都不会共享数据。 ML模型，特别是具有多个参数的复杂模型，当数据量较小时存在过度拟合的危险并且变得低效。基于规则（或专家）的系统被认为是AI（人工智能）的一部分，其中也包括ML，并在许多EDA应用中很流行。本文尝试在数据量较大和较小时比较这两种方法。人们期望机器学习在高数据量时效率更高，而基于规则对数据量不太敏感，因此在低数据量时可能是更好的选择。此外，研究了以在 ML 模型的指导下修改规则的方式结合这两种方法，以便基于规则的方法可以成为低数据量的一个不错的选择。考虑了两个示例应用：OPC 重新分段，已通过随机森林分类器 (RFC) ML 模型 [1] 解决，以及低纵横比设计中的布局利用，其中 CNN 已被应用 [3] 来识别布局子区域上的利用率分布。

papers.title: Lightning Talk 6: Bringing Together Foundation Models and Edge Devices.
papers.abstract: Deep learning models have been widely used in natural language processing and computer vision. These models require heavy computation, large memory, and massive amounts of training data. Deep learning models may be deployed on edge devices when transferring data to cloud is infeasible or undesirable. Running these models on edge devices require significant improvement in the efficiency by reducing the models’ resource demands. Existing methods to improve efficiency often require new architectures and retraining. The recent trend in machine learning is to create general-purpose models (called foundation models). These pre-trained models can be repurposed for different applications. This paper reviews the methods for improving efficiency of machine learning models, the rise of foundation models, challenges and possible solutions improving efficiency of pre-trained models. Future solutions for better efficiency should focus on improving existing trained models with no or limited training.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型已广泛应用于自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域。这些模型需要大量计算、大量内存和大量训练数据。当将数据传输到云不可行或不合需要时，深度学习模型可以部署在边缘设备上。在边缘设备上运行这些模型需要通过减少模型的资源需求来显着提高效率。现有的提高效率的方法通常需要新的架构和重新训练。机器学习的最新趋势是创建通用模型（称为基础模型）。这些预先训练的模型可以重新用于不同的应用。本文回顾了提高机器学习模型效率的方法、基础模型的兴起、提高预训练模型效率的挑战和可能的解决方案。未来提高效率的解决方案应侧重于在没有或有限训练的情况下改进现有的训练模型。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: A Perspective on Neuromorphic Computing.
papers.abstract: Neuromorphic computing, based on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), has recently gained immense popularity in machine learning community. It aims to offer reduced learning complexity, energy and latency through sparse event-driven computations, enabling real-time and sequential edge applications. However, due to their asynchronous spatio-temporal compute, SNNs require specialized sensing as well as algorithms and are not compatible with deployment on standard machine learning hardware such as GPUs. To that effect, there needs to be an end-to-end paradigm shift, from sensors to learning algorithms to the underlying hardware architectures. In this paper, we provide a perspective on the various efforts by the research community towards overcoming these challenges and realizing truly brain-inspired efficient machine intelligence.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于尖峰神经网络（SNN）的神经形态计算最近在机器学习社区中获得了巨大的欢迎。它旨在通过稀疏事件驱动的计算来降低学习复杂性、能量和延迟，从而实现实时和顺序边缘应用。然而，由于其异步时空计算，SNN 需要专门的传感和算法，并且与 GPU 等标准机器学习硬件上的部署不兼容。为此，需要进行端到端的范式转变，从传感器到学习算法再到底层硬件架构。在本文中，我们提供了研究界为克服这些挑战并实现真正受大脑启发的高效机器智能而做出的各种努力的观点。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: All Routes to Timing Closure.
papers.abstract: Timing analysis and optimization is essential for each stage throughout the entire design flow to achieve timing closure. This talk provides a retrospective and prospective study to highlight two categories of emerging timing challenges: 1) analysis efficiency and scalability, and 2) advanced process effect on timing. We survey recent advances for handling these challenges and provide future research directions in timing.
papers.abstract_zh: 时序分析和优化对于整个设计流程中的每个阶段都至关重要，以实现时序收敛。本次演讲提供了一项回顾性和前瞻性研究，以强调两类新兴的时序挑战：1) 分析效率和可扩展性，以及 2) 高级流程对时序的影响。我们调查了应对这些挑战的最新进展，并提供了未来的时序研究方向。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Bridging Neuro-Dynamics and Cognition.
papers.abstract: Brain-inspired computing models have shown great potential to outperform today’s deep learning solutions in terms of robustness and energy efficiency. Particularly, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) and HyperDimensional Computing (HDC) have shown promising results in enabling efficient and robust cognitive learning. Despite the success, these two brain-inspired models have different strengths. While SNN mimics the physical properties of the human brain, HDC models the brain on a more abstract and functional level. Their design philosophies demonstrate complementary patterns that motivate their combination. With the help of the classical psychological model of memory, we aim to explore the difference between Spiking neural networks and hyperdimensional computing and how they can combine to develop a more advanced cognitive learning model.
papers.abstract_zh: 类脑计算模型在鲁棒性和能源效率方面表现出了超越当今深度学习解决方案的巨大潜力。特别是，尖峰神经网络（SNN）和超维计算（HDC）在实现高效、稳健的认知学习方面显示出了有希望的结果。尽管取得了成功，但这两种受大脑启发的模型具有不同的优势。 SNN 模仿人脑的物理特性，而 HDC 在更抽象和功能的层面上对大脑进行建模。他们的设计理念展示了激发他们组合的互补模式。借助经典的记忆心理学模型，我们的目标是探索尖峰神经网络和超维计算之间的区别，以及它们如何结合起来开发更先进的认知学习模型。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Can memory technologies meet demands of data abundant applications?
papers.abstract: Ferroelectric-based devices and circuits are emerging as a key solution for supporting the storage and computing needs of data-abundant applications. Co-design across the stack from materials to architectures will be vital to addressing cross-cutting challenges posed by the enormity of data that needs to be processed. This talk will highlight opportunities and challenges for ferroelectric electronics.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于铁电的设备和电路正在成为支持数据丰富的应用程序的存储和计算需求的关键解决方案。从材料到架构的跨堆栈协同设计对于解决需要处理的海量数据所带来的跨领域挑战至关重要。本次演讲将重点介绍铁电电子学的机遇和挑战。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Efficiency and Programmability of DNN Accelerators and GPUs.
papers.abstract: While GPUs have provided high computational power for AI applications, their power efficiency may not be satisfied for applications requiring a high-speed response within a low power budget. Specialized deep neural network (DNN) accelerators have been developed to address this challenge. However, there are still limitations and concerns surrounding the adoption of DNN accelerators as a viable choice for commercial products. This lightning talk aims to highlight the importance of fast and domain-specific DNN accelerators and discuss the additional features they should possess besides speed and power efficiency. By addressing these points, the talk will shed light on the necessity of specialized DNN accelerators and explore potential areas for improvement to meet the growing demands of efficient and high-performance AI computations.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然 GPU 为人工智能应用提供了高计算能力，但对于需要在低功耗预算内高速响应的应用来说，其功效可能无法满足。专门的深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器已被开发出来来应对这一挑战。然而，采用 DNN 加速器作为商业产品的可行选择仍然存在局限性和担忧。这次闪电演讲旨在强调快速且特定领域的 DNN 加速器的重要性，并讨论除了速度和功效之外它们还应具备的其他功能。通过解决这些问题，本次演讲将阐明专用 DNN 加速器的必要性，并探索潜在的改进领域，以满足高效和高性能 AI 计算日益增长的需求。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Efficient Embedded Machine Learning Deployment on Edge and IoT Devices.
papers.abstract: There has been rapid growth in the use of machine learning (ML) software in emerging edge and IoT systems. ML software deployments enable analytics and pattern recognition for multi-modal data (e.g., audio, images/video, wireless signals, air quality) obtained from embedded sensors and transceivers. However, resource constraints in edge and IoT platforms make it challenging to meet quality-of-service and real-time goals. The growing complexity of ML also exacerbates these issues. We discuss the challenges of ML software deployment in edge and IoT platforms, present strategies to ease deployment, and discuss case studies from the automotive, indoor navigation, and hardware/software co-design domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 软件在新兴边缘和物联网系统中的使用迅速增长。 ML 软件部署支持对从嵌入式传感器和收发器获得的多模式数据（例如音频、图像/视频、无线信号、空气质量）进行分析和模式识别。然而，边缘和物联网平台的资源限制使得实现服务质量和实时目标具有挑战性。机器学习日益复杂的情况也加剧了这些问题。我们讨论了边缘和物联网平台中机器学习软件部署的挑战，提出了简化部署的策略，并讨论了汽车、室内导航和硬件/软件协同设计领域的案例研究。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Memory-Centric Computing.
papers.abstract: Modern computing systems are processor-centric. Data processing (i.e., computation) happens only in the processor (e.g., a CPU, GPU, FPGA, ASIC). As such, data needs to be moved from where it is generated/captured (e.g., sensors) and stored (e.g., storage and memory devices) to the processor before it can be processed. The processor-centric design paradigm greatly limits the performance & energy-efficiency, as well as scalability & sustainability, of modern computing systems. Many studies show that even the most powerful processors and accelerators waste a large fraction (e.g., >60%) of their time simply waiting for data and energy on moving data between storage/memory units to the processor. This is so even though most of the hardware real estate of such systems is dedicated to data storage and communication (e.g., many levels of caches, DRAM chips, storage systems, and interconnects).Memory-centric computing aims to enable computation capability in and near all places where data is generated and stored. As such, it can greatly reduce the large negative performance and energy impact of data access and data movement, by fundamentally avoiding data movement and reducing data access latency & energy. Many recent studies show that memory-centric computing can greatly improve system performance and energy efficiency. Major industrial vendors and startup companies have also recently introduced memory chips that have sophisticated computation capabilities.This talk describes promising ongoing research and development efforts in memory-centric computing. We classify such efforts into two major fundamental categories: 1) processing using memory, which exploits analog operational properties of memory structures to perform massively-parallel operations in memory, and 2) processing near memory, which integrates processing capability in memory controllers, the logic layer of 3D-stacked memory technologies, or memory chips to enable high-bandwidth and low-latency memory access to near-memory logic. We show both types of architectures (and their combination) can enable orders of magnitude improvements in performance and energy consumption of many important workloads, such as graph analytics, databases, machine learning, video processing, climate modeling, genome analysis. We discuss adoption challenges for the memory-centric computing paradigm and conclude with some research & development opportunities.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代计算系统以处理器为中心。数据处理（即计算）仅发生在处理器（例如 CPU、GPU、FPGA、ASIC）中。因此，数据需要从生成/捕获的地方（例如传感器）和存储的地方（例如存储和存储设备）移动到处理器，然后才能进行处理。以处理器为中心的设计范式极大地限制了现代计算系统的性能和能效以及可扩展性和可持续性。许多研究表明，即使是最强大的处理器和加速器也会浪费很大一部分（例如，> 60％）的时间来等待数据和将数据在存储/内存单元之间移动到处理器的能量。即使此类系统的大部分硬件资源专用于数据存储和通信（例如，多级缓存、DRAM 芯片、存储系统和互连），情况也是如此。以内存为中心的计算旨在在生成和存储数据的所有位置及其附近实现计算能力。因此，它可以通过从根本上避免数据移动并减少数据访问延迟和能源，从而大大减少数据访问和数据移动对性能和能源的巨大负面影响。最近的许多研究表明，以内存为中心的计算可以极大地提高系统性能和能源效率。主要工业供应商和初创公司最近也推出了具有复杂计算能力的存储芯片。本次演讲描述了以内存为中心的计算领域正在进行的有前景的研究和开发工作。我们将这些努力分为两个主要的基本类别：1）使用内存进行处理，它利用内存结构的模拟操作特性在内存中执行大规模并行操作；2）近内存处理，它集成了内存控制器、3D堆叠内存技术的逻辑层或内存芯片中的处理能力，以实现对近内存逻辑的高带宽和低延迟内存访问。我们展示了两种类型的架构（及其组合）可以使许多重要工作负载的性能和能耗实现数量级的改进，例如图形分析、数据库、机器学习、视频处理、气候建模、基因组分析。我们讨论了以内存为中心的计算范式的采用挑战，并总结了一些研究和开发机会。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Model, Framework and Integration for In-Storage Computing with Computational SSDs.
papers.abstract: In-storage computing with computational SSDs is emerging as one effective solution for I/O bottlenecks in big data applications such as AI learning model training. Specifically, with in-SSD computing, computation can be pushed down to SSDs and the volume of the output data that will be transferred back to the host can be greatly reduced. However, there are several fundamental issues for applications to fully exploit in-SSD computing with simple and efficient function offloading. In this paper, we present three challenges for in-SSD computing, namely, data model, programming framework, and storage/computing integration, and discuss possible research directions.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用计算 SSD 的存储内计算正在成为解决人工智能学习模型训练等大数据应用中 I/O 瓶颈的一种有效解决方案。具体来说，通过SSD内计算，可以将计算下推到SSD，并且可以大大减少传回主机的输出数据量。然而，应用程序要通过简单高效的功能卸载来充分利用 SSD 内计算，存在几个基本问​​题。在本文中，我们提出了SSD内计算的三个挑战，即数据模型、编程框架和存储/计算集成，并讨论了可能的研究方向。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Power and Performance Reconciliation - from Tradeoff to Win-Win.
papers.abstract: Power and performance are the two most important objectives for many digital IC designs. However, they often conflict with each other and the reconciliation between them is a continuous challenge. This paper presents a comprehensive overview of various techniques that can address this challenge and discusses their respective advantages and disadvantages. These techniques can also offer insights for handling other competing design objectives.
papers.abstract_zh: 功耗和性能是许多数字 IC 设计的两个最重要的目标。然而，他们之间经常发生冲突，他们之间的和解是一个持续的挑战。本文全面概述了可以应对这一挑战的各种技术，并讨论了它们各自的优点和缺点。这些技术还可以为处理其他竞争设计目标提供见解。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Private and Secure Edge AI with Hyperdimensional Computing.
papers.abstract: As a lightweight and robust brain-inspired computing paradigm, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) serves as a promising solution for the next-generation edge AI. However, the basic form of HDC is vulnerable to privacy leaks and cyber attacks. In this paper, we breifly review and discuss the recent contributions to privacy and security of HDC. We first summarize existing HDC designs to protect against privacy leaks, such as differential privacy. Next, we review the data encryption techniques for collaborative learning using HDC based on Multi-Party Computation and Homomorphic Encryption. Finally, we discuss the HDC-based designs for combating cyber attacks in a malicious environment. More research on private and secure HDC-based methods are needed for future large-scale edge deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一种轻量级且强大的类脑计算范式，超维计算（HDC）是下一代边缘人工智能的有前途的解决方案。然而，HDC 的基本形式很容易遭受隐私泄露和网络攻击。在本文中，我们简要回顾并讨论了 HDC 最近对隐私和安全的贡献。我们首先总结现有的 HDC 设计，以防止隐私泄露，例如差分隐私。接下来，我们回顾一下基于多方计算和同态加密的 HDC 协作学习数据加密技术。最后，我们讨论了基于 HDC 的设计，用于对抗恶意环境中的网络攻击。未来大规模边缘部署需要对基于 HDC 的私有且安全的方法进行更多研究。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Scaling Up Quantum Compilation - Challenges and Opportunities.
papers.abstract: The past decade witnessed exciting advances in quantum computing (QC) platforms. For example, superconducting qubit systems of over a hundred qubits have been developed and are now commercially available [1] , [2] . Trapped ion systems in long chains or quantum charge-coupled device (CCD) [3] architectures have also been developed, reaching very low gate errors [4] , [5] . Recently, neutral atoms trapped in arrays of optical tweezers emerged as a very promising experimental platform with hundreds of qubits at room temperature for programmable quantum simulations and quantum computation [6] , [7] . Figure 1 illustrates the rapid growth of the capacity of these QC platforms in recent years. With IBM’s recent announcement of the plan for building a 100,000-qubit quantum processing unit (QPU) [8] , there is a strong need to scale up the capacity and performance of quantum compilation tools to match the rapid advances of quantum hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 过去十年见证了量子计算 (QC) 平台令人兴奋的进步。例如，已经开发了超过一百个量子位的超导量子位系统，并且现已投入商业使用 [1] , [2] 。长链或量子电荷耦合器件 (CCD) [3] 架构中的俘获离子系统也已开发出来，达到非常低的门误差 [4] 、 [5] 。最近，光镊阵列中捕获的中性原子成为一个非常有前途的实验平台，在室温下具有数百个量子位，用于可编程量子模拟和量子计算 [6] ， [7] 。图1说明了近年来这些QC平台能力的快速增长。随着IBM最近宣布建造10万量子位的量子处理单元（QPU）的计划[8]，迫切需要扩大量子编译工具的容量和性能，以适应量子硬件的快速发展。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: The Incredible Shrinking Black Box Model.
papers.abstract: A black box model is an assumption on the implementation of a cryptographic primitive to limit the capabilities of the attacker. Black boxes are a useful component in a proof of protocol correctness, but it is not obvious how to securely implement one in hardware. The current state of the art in tamper from open literature shows impressive efficiency and precision in prying open these black boxes. Secure hardware designers are compelled to shrink the black boxes with every new device generation, while making a careful assessment of the need to load, store and handle secrets in hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 黑盒模型是对加密原语实现的假设，以限制攻击者的能力。黑匣子是证明协议正确性的有用组件，但如何在硬件中安全地实现黑匣子并不明显。公开文献中篡改技术的当前发展水平表明，撬开这些黑匣子的效率和精度令人印象深刻。安全硬件设计人员被迫在每一代新设备中缩小黑匣子，同时仔细评估在硬件中加载、存储和处理秘密的需求。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: The New Era of Computational Cognitive Intelligence.
papers.abstract: The triple whammy of variability in platforms (e.g., process variability), applications (e.g., dynamic use cases in autonomous systems), and the environment (e.g., context) renders ineffective the classical computational/algorithmic/numerical computing paradigm in dealing with the inherent runtime dynamism and uncertainty faced by emerging systems. We posit that this requires a fundamental change from classical "static" computing to a new era that deploys a computational cognitive intelligence (CCI) paradigm that is able to learn and evolve at runtime. The CCI paradigm empowers systems to be adaptable and evolvable by exploiting biologically-inspired cognitive intelligence principles.
papers.abstract_zh: 平台（例如，流程可变性）、应用程序（例如，自治系统中的动态用例）和环境（例如，上下文）的可变性的三重打击使得经典计算/算法/数值计算范式在处理新兴系统所面临的固有运行时动态性和不确定性时变得无效。我们认为，这需要从经典的“静态”计算到部署能够在运行时学习和进化的计算认知智能（CCI）范式的新时代进行根本性改变。 CCI 范式通过利用生物启发的认知智能原理，使系统具有适应性和可进化性。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: The Next Wave of High-level Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Recent works established new High-Level Synthesis (HLS) solutions translating AI models described in PyTorch to customized AI accelerators automatically. By adopting PyTorch as input for AI designs (instead of traditional C/C++ for HLS), the lines of code and design simulation time can be reduced by about 10× and 100×, respectively. Such AI model-to-RTL flows pave the way for a new wave of HLS that could drive the high-productivity designs of AI circuits with high-density, high-energy efficiency, low cost, and short design cycle. And such high-level model-to-RTL flows can be expanded to other non-AI domains. Meanwhile, we are also facing existing and new challenges for such HLS solutions, such as ensuring the correctness of the high-level design, accommodating accurate low-level timing/energy information, handling the complexity of 3D circuits and/or chiplet-based design flows, and achieving all these in a highly scalable manner. In this paper, we share the state-of-the-art solutions, limitations, and new opportunities facing the emergence of a new wave of the next-generation HLS.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的工作建立了新的高级综合 (HLS) 解决方案，将 PyTorch 中描述的 AI 模型自动转换为定制的 AI 加速器。通过采用 PyTorch 作为 AI 设计的输入（而不是用于 HLS 的传统 C/C++），代码行数和设计仿真时间可以分别减少约 10 倍和 100 倍。这种 AI 模型到 RTL 的流程为新一波 HLS 铺平了道路，可以推动高密度、高能效、低成本和短设计周期的 AI 电路的高生产率设计。这种高级模型到 RTL 的流程可以扩展到其他非人工智能领域。与此同时，我们还面临着此类 HLS 解决方案的现有挑战和新挑战，例如确保高层设计的正确性、容纳准确的低层时序/能量信息、处理 3D 电路和/或基于小芯片的设计流程的复杂性，以及以高度可扩展的方式实现所有这些。在本文中，我们分享了下一代 HLS 新浪潮的出现所面临的最先进的解决方案、局限性和新机遇。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Trinity - Assured Neuro-symbolic Model Inspired by Hierarchical Predictive Coding.
papers.abstract: This paper describes the core concepts and challenges in developing Trinity - a high-assurance neuro-symbolic approach to trustworthy and resilient machine learning for applications in open-world, contested, and rapidly-evolving environments. The two central concepts in Trinity are a neuro-symbolic factored world model that identifies entities, activities, and complex events, and the notion of surprise against this world model that is used for self-adaptation and learning, as well as runtime assurance. The world model is not derived purely as a bottom-up inference from sensors treating each observation as independent uncorrelated input; instead, we iteratively interleave bottom-up inference (conditioned on context) with top-down predictions and context identification using a three-layered hierarchical predictive processing (HPP) stack. Thus, the neuro-symbolic inference in Trinity is bidirectional – learning-based bottom-up pull that is uncertainty-driven and reasoning-based symbolic top-down push that is decision-driven. The progressively symbolic higher layers capture a larger context than the bottom layers finally culminating in the highest layer implemented using large language models. Any surprise arising from the mismatch between the top-down prediction and the bottom-up inference is used for the continual adaptation of Trinity. The inference in Trinity produces a factored temporal world model as the result of perception. The predictions are accompanied by a quantitative measure of surprise from the 3-layered HPP stack. This surprise corresponds to the confidence of the model in its current inference. The continuous monitoring and adaptation accompanied by risk analysis make Trinity robust to semantic adversarial perturbations and more efficiently generalizable to novelties. The hierarchical nature of Trinity also enables adaptation of the architecture to the available compute resources.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文描述了开发 Trinity 的核心概念和挑战，Trinity 是一种高保证的神经符号方法，用于在开放世界、有争议和快速发展的环境中应用可信和有弹性的机器学习。 Trinity 中的两个核心概念是一个神经符号因子世界模型，用于识别实体、活动和复杂事件，以及针对该世界模型的意外概念，用于自适应和学习以及运行时保证。世界模型并不是纯粹作为传感器将每个观察结果视为独立的不相关输入的自下而上的推论而得出的；相反，我们使用三层分层预测处理（HPP）堆栈迭代地将自下而上的推理（以上下文为条件）与自上而下的预测和上下文识别交织在一起。因此，Trinity 中的神经符号推理是双向的——基于学习的自下而上拉动（不确定性驱动）和基于推理的符号自上而下推动（决策驱动）。逐渐符号化的较高层比底层捕获更大的上下文，最终达到使用大型语言模型实现的最高层。自上而下的预测与自下而上的推理之间的不匹配所产生的任何意外都会被用于Trinity的不断适应。 《三位一体》中的推论产生了一个因式分解的时间世界模型作为感知的结果。这些预测伴随着来自 3 层 HPP 堆栈的定量测量。这种意外与模型当前推论的置信度相对应。持续的监控和适应以及风险分析使 Trinity 对语义对抗性扰动具有鲁棒性，并且更有效地推广到新事物。 Trinity 的分层性质还使架构能够适应可用的计算资源。

papers.title: Lightning Talk: Unlocking the Potential of the Analog Domain: Exploring the Next Frontier in Hardware Security.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of microelectronics has revolutionized our society, offering enhanced features, automation, and connectivity. However, alongside these remarkable advancements, we must acknowledge the emerging challenges. As designs grow increasingly complex and offshoring becomes more prevalent, the threats and vulnerabilities to our systems multiply. While digital hardware security has received considerable attention, addressing the abstracted world of 1's and 0's, analog hardware security has been comparatively overlooked. This talk serves as a call to action, urging the design automation community to recognize the significance of analog security and work towards establishing a comprehensive, resilient, and secure hardware platform for the future. This talk aims to shed light on the pivotal role of analog hardware security in establishing a more secure and resilient hardware platform, emphasizing the need to bridge the gaps in analog hardware security and showcasing the progress made by the analog community in complementing the efforts in the digital domain. Join us as we explore the advances in analog hardware security, highlighting its vital role in safeguarding our interconnected world.
papers.abstract_zh: 微电子技术的快速发展彻底改变了我们的社会，提供了增强的功能、自动化和连接性。然而，除了这些显着的进步之外，我们还必须承认新出现的挑战。随着设计变得越来越复杂，离岸外包变得越来越普遍，我们系统面临的威胁和漏洞也在成倍增加。虽然数字硬件安全性受到了相当多的关注，解决了 1 和 0 的抽象世界，但模拟硬件安全性却相对被忽视了。本次演讲呼吁采取行动，敦促设计自动化社区认识到模拟安全的重要性，并努力为未来建立一个全面、有弹性和安全的硬件平台。本次演讲旨在阐明模拟硬件安全在建立更安全、更有弹性的硬件平台方面的关键作用，强调需要弥合模拟硬件安全方面的差距，并展示模拟社区在补充数字领域的努力方面所取得的进展。与我们一起探索模拟硬件安全的进步，突出其在保护我们的互联世界中的重要作用。

papers.title: Lightweight Structural Choices Operator for Technology Mapping.
papers.abstract: Technology mapping quality heavily depends on the subject graph structure. To overcome structural biases, operators construct choice nodes to enable mappings with improved node and level counts. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art structural choice operators scale poorly with graph size.We present the lightweight structural choices (LCH) operator that incorporates equivalencies by processing only subparts of the graph. We propose multiple heuristics that rely on specific node extraction orders and subpart sizes to extract non-overlapping components. Compared to state-of-the-art methods on EPFL circuits, LCH is 2.35x faster enduring a small sacrifice in node count (3%) and level reduction (2%).
papers.abstract_zh: 技术图谱质量在很大程度上取决于主题图结构。为了克服结构偏差，操作员构建选择节点以实现具有改进的节点和级别计数的映射。然而，最先进的结构选择算子随着图的大小而扩展性很差。我们提出了轻量级结构选择（LCH）算子，它通过仅处理图的子部分来合并等价性。我们提出了多种启发式方法，依赖于特定的节点提取顺序和子部分大小来提取不重叠的组件。与 EPFL 电路上最先进的方法相比，LCH 的速度提高了 2.35 倍，但在节点数量 (3%) 和电平降低 (2%) 方面略有牺牲。

papers.title: LRSDP: Low-Rank SDP for Triple Patterning Lithography Layout Decomposition.
papers.abstract: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) has been widely adopted in advanced technology nodes to enhance lithography resolution. As layout decomposition for triple patterning lithography (TPL) and beyond is NP-hard, existing approaches formulate mathematical programming problems and leverage general-purpose solvers such as integer linear programming (ILP) and semidefinite programming (SDP) to trade off quality against runtime. With the aggressive increase in design complexity, existing approaches can no longer scale to solve complicated designs with high solution quality. In this paper, we propose a dedicated low-rank SDP algorithm for MPL decomposition with augmented Lagrangian relaxation and Riemannian optimization. Experimental results demonstrate that our method is 186×, 25×, and 12× faster than the state-of-the-art decomposition approaches with highly competitive solution quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 多重图案光刻（MPL）已在先进技术节点中广泛采用，以提高光刻分辨率。由于三重图案光刻 (TPL) 及更高版本的布局分解是 NP 困难的，因此现有方法制定数学规划问题并利用整数线性规划 (ILP) 和半定规划 (SDP) 等通用求解器来权衡质量与运行时间。随着设计复杂性的急剧增加，现有方法无法再扩展以解决具有高解决方案质量的复杂设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种专用的低秩 SDP 算法，用于具有增强拉格朗日松弛和黎曼优化的 MPL 分解。实验结果表明，我们的方法比最先进的分解方法快 186 倍、25 倍和 12 倍，且解质量极具竞争力。

papers.title: Machine Learning-based Thermally-Safe Cache Contention Mitigation in Clustered Manycores.
papers.abstract: We present the first technique that mitigates cache contention under thermal constraints in clustered manycores. We show by means of extensive experiments that significant performance gains in this scenario can be achieved. The background is that concurrently-running applications on manycore clusters compete for the shared cache, slowing down their execution. In addition, heavy parallel computations on physically-close cores increase temperatures to non-sustainable levels, which in turn triggers a throttle down of voltage/frequency levels and hence performance is compromised. These problems are not unknown, but as our analysis shows, tackling them independently is sub-optimal. We introduce the first task migration technique that jointly mitigates cache contention while enforcing the thermal constraint at the same time. It works in conjunction with cluster-level dynamic voltage and frequency scaling. Our technique needs to predict the impact of task migration on performance considering cache contention. Since it is impossible to derive an analytical model for cache contention that is both sufficiently accurate and practically feasible to implement, we employ an accurate, yet lightweight neural network (NN) model. As a result, we can operate the manycore system at higher performance while safely staying within thermal constraints. We report a significant step forward in this paper and unveil new potentials for performance optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一种技术，可以减轻集群众核中热约束下的缓存争用。我们通过大量实验表明，在这种情况下可以实现显着的性能提升。背景是多核集群上并发运行的应用程序会竞争共享缓存，从而减慢它们的执行速度。此外，物理上接近的核心上的大量并行计算会将温度升高到不可持续的水平，这反过来又会触发电压/频率水平的降低，从而影响性能。这些问题并非未知，但正如我们的分析所示，独立解决这些问题并不是最佳选择。我们引入了第一个任务迁移技术，该技术可以联合减轻缓存争用，同时强制执行热约束。它与集群级动态电压和频率缩放结合使用。我们的技术需要考虑缓存争用来预测任务迁移对性能的影响。由于不可能导出既足够准确又实际可行的缓存争用分析模型，因此我们采用了准确但轻量级的神经网络 (NN) 模型。因此，我们可以以更高的性能运行众核系统，同时安全地保持在热限制范围内。我们在本文中报告了向前迈出的重要一步，并揭示了性能优化的新潜力。

papers.title: Mantra: Mutation Testing of Hardware Design Code Based on Real Bugs.
papers.abstract: Mutation testing, a well-suited technology for functional validation, is regrettably poorly studied in hardware. We propose Mantra: the first open-source code-level mutation testing tool based on real hardware bugs. Specifically, Mantra devises time-aware mutation killing mechanism for cost reduction of hardware mutation testing using the parallelism of hardware design code, and then defines and implements 19 hardware mutation operators via large-scale empirical analysis on real bugs. Finally, the evaluation on public datasets from CirFix and OpenCores shows that Mantra achieves promising results with a maximum boost of 83.44%.
papers.abstract_zh: 突变测试是一种非常适合功能验证的技术，但遗憾的是在硬件方面的研究很少。我们提出 Mantra：第一个基于真实硬件错误的开源代码级突变测试工具。具体来说，Mantra利用硬件设计代码的并行性设计了时间感知突变杀死机制，以降低硬件突变测试的成本，然后通过对真实错误的大规模实证分析，定义并实现了19个硬件突变算子。最后，对 CirFix 和 OpenCores 的公共数据集的评估表明，Mantra 取得了可喜的结果，最大提升了 83.44%。

papers.title: Map-and-Conquer: Energy-Efficient Mapping of Dynamic Neural Nets onto Heterogeneous MPSoCs.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous MPSoCs comprise diverse processing units of varying compute capabilities. To date, the mapping strategies of neural networks (NNs) onto such systems are yet to exploit the full potential of processing parallelism, made possible through both the intrinsic NNs’ structure and underlying hardware composition. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to effectively map NNs onto heterogeneous MPSoCs in a manner that enables them to leverage the underlying processing concurrency. Specifically, our approach identifies an optimal partitioning scheme of the NN along its ‘width’ dimension, which facilitates deployment of concurrent NN blocks onto different hardware computing units. Additionally, our approach contributes a novel scheme to deploy partitioned NNs onto the MPSoC as dynamic multi-exit networks for additional performance gains. Our experiments on a standard MPSoC platform have yielded dynamic mapping configurations that are 2.1x more energy-efficient than the GPU-only mapping while incurring 1.7x less latency than DLA-only mapping.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构 MPSoC 包含具有不同计算能力的多种处理单元。迄今为止，神经网络 (NN) 到此类系统的映射策略尚未充分利用处理并行性的全部潜力，而处理并行性是通过内在的 NN 结构和底层硬件组合实现的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以有效地将神经网络映射到异构 MPSoC 上，从而使它们能够利用底层处理并发性。具体来说，我们的方法确定了神经网络沿其“宽度”维度的最佳划分方案，这有助于将并发神经网络块部署到不同的硬件计算单元上。此外，我们的方法提供了一种新颖的方案，将分区的神经网络部署到 MPSoC 上作为动态多出口网络，以获得额外的性能增益。我们在标准 MPSoC 平台上进行的实验产生了动态映射配置，其能效比仅 GPU 映射高 2.1 倍，同时延迟比仅 DLA 映射低 1.7 倍。

papers.title: MARS: Exploiting Multi-Level Parallelism for DNN Workloads on Adaptive Multi-Accelerator Systems.
papers.abstract: Along with the fast evolution of deep neural networks, the hardware system is also developing rapidly. As a promising solution achieving high scalability and low manufacturing cost, multi-accelerator systems widely exist in data centers, cloud platforms, and SoCs. Thus, a challenging problem arises in multi-accelerator systems: selecting a proper combination of accelerators from available designs and searching for efficient DNN mapping strategies. To this end, we propose MARS, a novel mapping framework that can perform computation-aware accelerator selection, and apply communication-aware sharding strategies to maximize parallelism. Experimental results show that MARS can achieve 32.2% latency reduction on average for typical DNN workloads compared to the baseline, and 59.4% latency reduction on heterogeneous models compared to the corresponding state-of-the-art method.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络的快速演进，硬件系统也在快速发展。作为一种实现高可扩展性和低制造成本的有前途的解决方案，多加速器系统广泛存在于数据中心、云平台和SoC中。因此，多加速器系统中出现了一个具有挑战性的问题：从可用设计中选择合适的加速器组合并搜索有效的 DNN 映射策略。为此，我们提出了 MARS，一种新颖的映射框架，可以执行计算感知的加速器选择，并应用通信感知的分片策略来最大化并行性。实验结果表明，与基线相比，MARS 可以在典型的 DNN 工作负载上平均减少 32.2% 的延迟，与相应的最先进方法相比，在异构模型上平均减少 59.4% 的延迟。

papers.title: Mckeycutter: A High-throughput Key Generator of Classic McEliece on Hardware.
papers.abstract: Classic McEliece is a code-based quantum-resistant public-key scheme characterized with relative high encapsulation/decapsulation speed and small ciphertexts, with an in-depth analysis on its security. However, slow key generation with large public key size make it hard for wider applications. Based on this observation, Mckeycutter, a high-throughput key generator in hardware, is proposed to accelerate the key generation in Classic McEliece based on algorithm-hardware co-design. Meanwhile the storage overhead caused by large-size keys is also minimized. First, compact large-size GF(2) Gauss elimination method is presented by adopting naive processing array and memory-friendly scheduling strategy. Second, an optimized constant-time hardware sorter is proposed to support regular memory accesses with less comparators and storage. Third, algorithmlevel pipeline is enabled for high-throughput processing, allowing for concurrent key generations. Our FPGA implementation results achieve around 4× improvements in throughput with 9~14× less memory-time product compared with the existing FPGA solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: Classic McEliece是一种基于代码的抗量子公钥方案，具有较高的封装/解封装速度和较小的密文，对其安全性进行了深入分析。然而，由于公钥大小较大，密钥生成速度较慢，因此很难得到更广泛的应用。基于这一观察，提出了一种硬件高吞吐量密钥生成器 Mckeycutter，以基于算法-硬件协同设计来加速 Classic McEliece 中的密钥生成。同时，大尺寸密钥带来的存储开销也被最小化。首先，采用朴素处理阵列和内存友好的调度策略，提出了紧凑的大尺寸GF(2)高斯消除方法。其次，提出了一种优化的恒定时间硬件排序器，以支持使用更少的比较器和存储的常规内存访问。第三，算法级管道可实现高吞吐量处理，从而允许并发密钥生成。与现有 FPGA 解决方案相比，我们的 FPGA 实现结果将吞吐量提高了约 4 倍，内存时间乘积减少了 9~14 倍。

papers.title: MeG2: In-Memory Acceleration for Genome Graphs Analysis.
papers.abstract: Genome graphs analysis has emerged as an effective means to enable mapping DNA fragments (known as reads) to the reference genome. It replaces the traditional linear reference with a graph-based representation to augment the genetic variations and diversity information, significantly improving the quality of genotyping. The in-depth characterization of genome graphs analysis uncovers that it is bottlenecked by the irregular seed index access and the intensive alignment operation, stressing both the memory system and computing resources.Based on these observations, we propose MeG<sup>2</sup>, a lightweight, commodity DRAM-compliant, processing-in-memory architecture to accelerate genome graphs analysis. MeG<sup>2</sup> is specifically integrated with the capabilities of both near-memory processing and bitwise in-situ computation. Specifically, MeG<sup>2</sup> leverages the low access latency of near-memory processing with the index-centric offload mechanism to alleviate the irregular memory access in the seeding procedure, and harnesses the row-parallel capacity of in-situ computation with the distance-aware technique to exploit the intensive computational parallelism in the alignment process. Results show that MeG<sup>2</sup> outperforms the CPU-, GPU-, and ASIC-based genome graphs analysis solutions by 502× (30.2×), 272× (15.1× ), and 5.5× (8.3×) for short (long) reads, while reducing energy consumption by 1628× (85.6×), 1443× (77.1×), and 7.8× (11.7×), respectively. We also demonstrate that MeG<sup>2</sup> offers significant improvements over existing PIM-based genome sequence analysis accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 基因组图分析已成为将 DNA 片段（称为读数）映射到参考基因组的有效手段。它用基于图形的表示取代了传统的线性参考，以增强遗传变异和多样性信息，显着提高基因分型的质量。基因组图分析的深入表征发现，不规则的种子索引访问和密集的比对操作是其瓶颈，对内存系统和计算资源都造成压力。基于这些观察，我们提出了 MeG<sup>2</sup>，这是一种轻量级、兼容商用 DRAM 的内存处理架构，可加速基因组图分析。 MeG<sup>2</sup>专门集成了近内存处理和按位原位计算的功能。具体来说，MeG<sup>2</sup>利用近内存处理的低访问延迟和以索引为中心的卸载机制来缓解播种过程中的不规则内存访问，并利用距离感知技术的原位计算的行并行能力来利用对齐过程中的密集计算并行性。结果表明，MeG<sup>2</sup> 的短（长）读长比基于 CPU、GPU 和 ASIC 的基因组图分析解决方案分别提高了 502×（30.2×）、272×（15.1×）和 5.5×（8.3×），同时能耗降低了 1628×（85.6×）、1443×（77.1×）和分别为 7.8× (11.7×)。我们还证明 MeG<sup>2</sup> 比现有基于 PIM 的基因组序列分析加速器具有显着改进。

papers.title: Memory and Computation Coordinated Mapping of DNNs onto Complex Heterogeneous SoC.
papers.abstract: The DNN models are now pervasively used for various applications. Meanwhile, the computing hardware has shifted towards heterogeneous system composed of various accelerators. The intertwined complexity of DNN models and hardware makes it challenging for mapping DNN models. Existing mapping frameworks suffer from inefficiencies due to under utilization of computation and bandwidth in heterogeneous SoC. In this paper, we propose COMB, a mapping framework that coordinates the memory and computation and data transfer overhead of heterogeneous accelerators to achieve latency improvement and energy efficiency with two optimizations: dataflow grouping and accelerator mapping. Dataflow grouping maps multiple independent DNN layers to the same accelerator at the same time to spatially share the hardware resources; accelerator mapping finds the optimized placement of the layer groups to accelerators to reduce data transfer overhead. These two optimizations provide a huge design space for heterogeneous DNN mapping. To explore the space efficiently, we present a hybrid scheduling algorithm by combining greedy algorithm and genetic algorithm. In evaluation, COMB achieves 1.28× and 1.37× speedup for latency compared to MAGMA and H2H; COMB also reduces 22.7% and 29.2% energy consumption compared to MAGMA and H2H.
papers.abstract_zh: DNN 模型现在广泛用于各种应用。同时，计算硬件已转向由各种加速器组成的异构系统。 DNN 模型和硬件交织在一起的复杂性使得映射 DNN 模型具有挑战性。由于异构 SoC 中的计算和带宽利用率不足，现有的映射框架效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 COMB，一种映射框架，它协调异构加速器的内存、计算和数据传输开销，通过数据流分组和加速器映射两项优化来实现延迟改善和能源效率。数据流分组将多个独立的DNN层同时映射到同一个加速器上，在空间上共享硬件资源；加速器映射找到层组到加速器的优化放置，以减少数据传输开销。这两种优化为异构DNN映射提供了巨大的设计空间。为了有效地探索空间，我们提出了一种结合贪心算法和遗传算法的混合调度算法。在评估中，与 MAGMA 和 H2H 相比，COMB 在延迟方面实现了 1.28 倍和 1.37 倍的加速；与 MAGMA 和 H2H 相比，COMB 还降低了 22.7% 和 29.2% 的能耗。

papers.title: Memory-Efficient and Real-Time SPAD-based dToF Depth Sensor with Spatial and Statistical Correlation.
papers.abstract: Single Photon Avalanche Diode (SPAD)-based direct time-of-flight (dToF) depth sensors are widely used in Internet of Things (IoT) devices due to their high accuracy. Existing SPAD-based dToF sensors measure depth by continually accumulating the depth-measured value in a histogram. However, histogram-based methods typically have low convergence speed (~10 frames per second (FPS)) and large memory overhead (MB-level), hindering their use in real-time embedded IoT devices. To overcome these two challenges, we propose SSC, a histogram-free Spatial and Statistical Correlation based depth measurement method. On the one hand, SSC applies the spatial correlation of the adjacent pixels to accelerate the convergence speed. On the other hand, SSC explores the statistical correlation of depth measurements to reduce the memory overhead. In order to implement SSC with small hardware area and low power, we design mert-dToF, a memory-efficient and real-time dToF sensor for efficient execution. mert-dToF abstracts mainly operations in SSC into four basic operators and designs corresponding hardware with a fine-grained pipeline to maximize resource reuse and computational parallelism. Extensive experiments show that compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA) histogram-based dToF sensors, mert-dToF achieves ~8% accuracy improvement and 7.80× speedup (from 6.24 FPS to 48.70 FPS). The memory overhead is reduced by up to 60.91% (from 48 KB to 18.75 KB).
papers.abstract_zh: 基于单光子雪崩二极管 (SPAD) 的直接飞行时间 (dToF) 深度传感器因其高精度而广泛应用于物联网 (IoT) 设备。现有的基于 SPAD 的 dToF 传感器通过不断累积直方图中的深度测量值来测量深度。然而，基于直方图的方法通常具有较低的收敛速度（每秒约 10 帧（FPS））和较大的内存开销（MB 级），阻碍了它们在实时嵌入式物联网设备中的使用。为了克服这两个挑战，我们提出了 SSC，一种基于无直方图空间和统计相关性的深度测量方法。一方面，SSC应用相邻像素的空间相关性来加快收敛速度​​。另一方面，SSC 探索深度测量的统计相关性以减少内存开销。为了以小硬件面积和低功耗实现SSC，我们设计了mert-dToF，一种内存高效且实时的dToF传感器，以实现高效执行。 mert-dToF将SSC中的主要操作抽象为四个基本算子，并设计相应的具有细粒度管道的硬件，以最大限度地提高资源重用和计算并行性。大量实验表明，与最先进 (SOTA) 的基于直方图的 dToF 传感器相比，mert-dToF 实现了约 8% 的精度提升和 7.80 倍的加速（从 6.24 FPS 到 48.70 FPS）。内存开销减少高达 60.91%（从 48 KB 减少到 18.75 KB）。

papers.title: MES-Attacks: Software-Controlled Covert Channels based on Mutual Exclusion and Synchronization.
