papers.abstract: Multi-process concurrency is effective in improving program efficiency and maximizing CPU utilization. The correct execution of concurrency is ensured by the mutual exclusion and synchronization mechanism (MESM) that manages the shared hardware and software resources. We propose MES-Attacks, a new set of software-controlled covert channel attacks based on MESM to transmit confidential information. MES-Attacks offer several advantages: 1) the covert channels are constructed at software level and can be deployed on any hardware; 2) the closed share of resource ensures the quality of the channels with low interference and makes them hard to be detected; and 3) the attack utilizes system’s software resources which are abound and hence difficult to isolate. We report the covert channels we have built with the following MESMs on Linux and Windows: flock, FileLockEX, Mutex, Semaphore, Event and WaitableTimer. Experimental results demonstrate that these covert channels can achieve transmission rate of 13.105 kb/s, 12.383 kb/s, and 6.552 kb/s, respectively in the scenarios of local, cross-sandbox and cross-virtual machine, all with bit error rate under 1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 多进程并发可以有效提高程序效率，最大化CPU利用率。管理共享硬件和软件资源的互斥和同步机制（MESM）保证了并发的正确执行。我们提出 MES-Attacks，这是一套基于 MESM 的新的软件控制的隐蔽通道攻击，用于传输机密信息。 MES-攻击具有以下几个优点：1）隐蔽通道是在软件级别构建的，可以部署在任何硬件上； 2）资源的封闭共享，保证了低干扰信道的质量，不易被检测到； 3）攻击利用系统软件资源，系统软件资源丰富，难以隔离。我们报告了在 Linux 和 Windows 上使用以下 MESM 构建的隐蔽通道：flock、FileLockEX、Mutex、Semaphore、Event 和 WaitableTimer。实验结果表明，这些隐蔽通道在本地、跨沙箱和跨虚拟机场景下分别可以实现13.105 kb/s、12.383 kb/s和6.552 kb/s的传输速率，且误码率均低于1%。

papers.title: Mitigating Distribution Shift for Congestion Optimization in Global Placement.
papers.abstract: The placement and routing (PnR) flow plays a critical role in physical design. Poor routing congestion is a possible problem causing severe routing detours, which can lead to deteriorated timing performance or even routing failure. Deep-learning-based congestion prediction model is designed to guide the global placement process in previous work. However, the distribution shift problem in this method limits its performance. In this paper, we mitigate the distribution shift problem with a look-ahead mechanism inspired by optical flow prediction and an invariant feature space learning technique. With the proposed method, we can achieve better congestion prediction performance and less-congested placement results.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局布线 (PnR) 流程在物理设计中起着至关重要的作用。不良的路由拥塞是一个可能导致严重路由绕行的问题，这可能导致时序性能恶化甚至路由失败。基于深度学习的拥塞预测模型旨在指导先前工作中的全局布局过程。然而，该方法中的分布偏移问题限制了其性能。在本文中，我们通过受光流预测和不变特征空间学习技术启发的前瞻机制来缓解分布偏移问题。通过所提出的方法，我们可以获得更好的拥塞预测性能和更少拥塞的放置结果。

papers.title: Mixed-cell-height Placement with Minimum-Implant-Area and Drain-to-Drain Abutment Constraints.
papers.abstract: In modern circuits, mixed-cell-height standard cells have been prevailing to meet various requirements and achieve better trade-offs among timing, power, and routability. Besides, the constraints of the minimum-implant-area (MIA) and drain-to-drain-abutment (DDA) arise as emerging challenges at advanced technology nodes. In this paper, we present an algorithm to address the mixed-cell-height placement problem with MIA and DDA constraints in three major stages: (1) post-global placement, (2) legalization, and (3) detailed placement. In the post-global stage, we first align mixed-cell-height standard cells to the desired rows by conjugate gradient method with dynamic step size and then reorder them by the shortest path algorithm to distribute the source nodes evenly. In the legalization stage, we propose a two-step combination algorithm to cluster cells and repack the clusters to minimize the wirelength, after which we presented a queue based method to address the inter-row MIA violations. In the detailed placement, an MIA-aware DDA reduction algorithm is adopted after multi-region partitioning to eliminate DDA violations without introducing MIA violations. Experimental results show that our algorithm can resolve all MIA and almost all DDA violations with a 13% reduction in displacement, a 4% reduction in HPWL, and 25% less runtime compared with the state-of-the-art work.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代电路中，混合单元高度的标准单元已经盛行，以满足各种要求并在时序、功耗和可布线性之间实现更好的权衡。此外，最小植入面积（MIA）和漏极至漏极基台（DDA）的限制也成为先进技术节点的新挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法来解决具有 MIA 和 DDA 约束的混合单元高度布局问题，分三个主要阶段：(1) 后全局布局，(2) 合法化，以及 (3) 详细布局。在后全局阶段，我们首先通过动态步长的共轭梯度法将混合单元高度的标准单元对齐到所需的行，然后通过最短路径算法将它们重新排序以均匀分布源节点。在合法化阶段，我们提出了一种两步组合算法来对单元进行聚类并重新打包簇以最小化线长，之后我们提出了一种基于队列的方法来解决行间 MIA 违规问题。在具体布局中，多区域划分后采用了MIA感知的DDA缩减算法，在不引入MIA违规的情况下消除DDA违规。实验结果表明，我们的算法可以解决所有 MIA 和几乎所有 DDA 违规，与最先进的工作相比，位移减少 13%，HPWL 减少 4%，运行时间减少 25%。

papers.title: MixPipe: Efficient Bidirectional Pipeline Parallelism for Training Large-Scale Models.
papers.abstract: The rapid development of large-scale deep neural networks has put forward an urgent demand for the efficiency of parallel training. Recently, bidirectional pipeline parallelism has been recognized as an effective approach for improving training throughput. This paper proposes MixPipe, a novel bidirectional pipeline parallelism for efficiently training large-scale models in synchronous scenarios. Compared with previous proposals, MixPipe achieves a better balance between pipeline utilization and device utilization, which benefits from the flexible regulating for the number of micro-batches injected into the bidirectional pipelines at the beginning. MixPipe also features a mixed schedule to balance memory usage and further reduce the bubble ratio. Evaluation results show that: for Transformer based language models (i.e., Bert and GPT-2 models), MixPipe improves the training throughput by up to 2.39× over the state-of-the-art synchronous pipeline approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模深度神经网络的快速发展对并行训练的效率提出了迫切的需求。最近，双向管道并行性已被认为是提高训练吞吐量的有效方法。本文提出了 MixPipe，一种新颖的双向管道并行性，用于在同步场景中有效训练大规模模型。与之前的提案相比，MixPipe在管道利用率和设备利用率之间取得了更好的平衡，这得益于一开始就注入双向管道的微批量数量的灵活调节。 MixPipe 还具有混合调度功能，以平衡内存使用并进一步减少气泡比率。评估结果表明：对于基于 Transformer 的语言模型（即 Bert 和 GPT-2 模型），MixPipe 的训练吞吐量比最先进的同步管道方法提高了 2.39 倍。

papers.title: ML-CGRA: An Integrated Compilation Framework to Enable Efficient Machine Learning Acceleration on CGRAs.
papers.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) can achieve higher energy-efficiency than general-purpose processors and accelerators or fine-grained reconfigurable devices, while maintaining adaptability to different computational patterns. CGRAs have shown some success as a platform to accelerate machine learning (ML) thanks to their flexibility, which allows them to support new models not considered by fixed accelerators. However, current solutions for CGRAs employ low level instruction-based compiler approaches and lack specialized compilation infrastructures from high-level ML frameworks that could leverage semantic information from the models, limiting the ability to efficiently map them on the reconfigurable substrate. This paper proposes ML-CGRA, an integrated compilation framework based on the MLIR infrastructure that enables efficient ML acceleration on CGRAs. ML-CGRA provides an end-to-end solution for mapping ML models on CGRAs that outperforms conventional approaches by 3.15× and 6.02 × on 4×4 and 8×8 CGRAs, respectively. The framework is open-source and available from https://github.com/tancheng/mlir-cgra.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）可以实现比通用处理器和加速器或细粒度可重构设备更高的能效，同时保持对不同计算模式的适应性。由于其灵活性，CGRA 作为加速机器学习 (ML) 的平台已经取得了一些成功，这使得它们能够支持固定加速器未考虑的新模型。然而，当前的 CGRA 解决方案采用基于低级指令的编译器方法，并且缺乏来自高级 ML 框架的专门编译基础设施，这些框架可以利用模型中的语义信息，从而限制了将它们有效映射到可重构基板上的能力。本文提出了 ML-CGRA，这是一种基于 MLIR 基础设施的集成编译框架，可在 CGRA 上实现高效的 ML 加速。 ML-CGRA 提供了一种用于在 CGRA 上映射 ML 模型的端到端解决方案，其在 4×4 和 8×8 CGRA 上的性能分别比传统方法高出 3.15 倍和 6.02 倍。该框架是开源的，可从 https://github.com/tan Cheng/mlir-cgra 获取。

papers.title: Morphable CIM: Improving Operation Intensity and Depthwise Capability for SRAM-CIM Architecture.
papers.abstract: SRAM-based computing in memory (SRAM-CIM) supports weight-stationary dataflows and in-situ computation, successfully achieving lower weight SRAM traffic and hence better operation intensity (OI) than Von Neumann architecture. However, sticking to weight-stationary dataflows is sub-optimal since some layers of CNNs, e.g., depth-wise and input-dominant, suffer from large activation traffic and underutilization.We propose Morphable CIM to address the above challenges, in which the key contributions are: 1) We propose a dataflow-morphable SRAM-CIM architecture that adaptively switches between weight-stationary and input-stationary dataflow to enhance the overall operation intensity (OI) and computation utilization. 2) We propose an input-stationary systolic dataflow and a word-wise mapping to efficiently achieve dataflow reconfigurability for SRAM-CIM. 3) We propose a depthwise-capable CIM macro to improve the utilization of processing depth-wise layers.The experimental results on ten workloads show that our proposed SRAM-CIM architecture successfully outperforms the traffic-optimized and the performance-optimized baselines by up to 16.7× performance speedup, 3.6× higher energy efficiency, and 94.8% memory traffic reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (SRAM-CIM) 支持重量平稳数据流和原位计算，成功实现了较低重量的 SRAM 流量，从而比冯·诺依曼架构具有更好的操作强度 (OI)。然而，坚持权重平稳数据流并不是最优的，因为 CNN 的某些层（例如深度方向和输入主导）会受到大激活流量和利用率不足的影响。我们提出 Morphable CIM 来解决上述挑战，其中的关键贡献是：1）我们提出了一种数据流可变形 SRAM-CIM 架构，该架构可在权重平稳和输入平稳数据流之间自适应切换，以提高整体操作强度（OI）和计算利用率。 2）我们提出了输入稳态脉动数据流和逐字映射，以有效实现 SRAM-CIM 的数据流可重构性。 3）我们提出了一种具有深度能力的CIM宏，以提高处理深度层的利用率。十个工作负载的实验结果表明，我们提出的SRAM-CIM架构成功地超越了流量优化和性能优化的基准，性能加速高达16.7倍，能源效率提高了3.6倍，内存流量减少了94.8%。

papers.title: MPass: Bypassing Learning-based Static Malware Detectors.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) based static malware detectors are widely deployed, but vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Unlike images or texts, tiny modifications to malware samples would significantly compromise their functionality. Consequently, existing attacks against images or texts will be significantly restricted when being deployed on malware detectors. In this work, we propose a hard-label black-box attack MPass against ML-based detectors. MPass employs a problem-space explainability method to locate critical positions of malware, applies adversarial modifications to such positions, and utilizes a runtime recovery technique to preserve the functionality. Experiments show MPass outperforms existing solutions and bypasses both state-of-the-art offline models and commercial ML-based antivirus products.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于机器学习 (ML) 的静态恶意软件检测器得到广泛部署，但容易受到对抗性攻击。与图像或文本不同，对恶意软件样本的微小修改会严重损害其功能。因此，现有的针对图像或文本的攻击在部署到恶意软件检测器上时将受到显着限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对基于 ML 的检测器的硬标签黑盒攻击 MPass。 MPass 采用问题空间可解释性方法来定位恶意软件的关键位置，对这些位置应用对抗性修改，并利用运行时恢复技术来保留功能。实验表明，MPass 的性能优于现有解决方案，并绕过了最先进的离线模型和基于 ML 的商业防病毒产品。

papers.title: MTL-Designer: An Integrated Flow for Analysis and Synthesis of Microstrip Transmission Line.
papers.abstract: Microstrip transmission line (MTL) appears extensively in microwave integrated circuits (MIC). To sufficiently analyze and synthesize the MTL, we propose MTL-Designer that can design the electrical and geometrical parameters of an MTL given performance specifications. We construct a deep generative model to generate initial solutions, and a surrogate model to predict the characteristics, optimize the solutions, and select from them. We further propose an adaptive sampling algorithm to speedup training. Our flow can generate 1000 feasible solutions within ∼0.6 s, realizing > 99.8% accuracy given various design specifications for two common MTL systems, exhibiting its strong potential for MIC design.
papers.abstract_zh: 微带传输线（MTL）广泛出现在微波集成电路（MIC）中。为了充分分析和综合 MTL，我们提出了 MTL-Designer，它可以在给定性能规格的情况下设计 MTL 的电气和几何参数。我们构建一个深度生成模型来生成初始解决方案，并构建一个代理模型来预测特征、优化解决方案并从中进行选择。我们进一步提出了一种自适应采样算法来加速训练。我们的流程可以在 ∼0.6 秒内生成 1000 个可行的解决方案，在给定两个常见 MTL 系统的各种设计规范的情况下，实现 > 99.8% 的精度，展示了其在 MIC 设计方面的强大潜力。

papers.title: Muffin: A Framework Toward Multi-Dimension AI Fairness by Uniting Off-the-Shelf Models.
papers.abstract: Model fairness (a.k.a., bias) has become one of the most critical problems in a wide range of AI applications. An unfair model in autonomous driving may cause a traffic accident if corner cases (e.g., extreme weather) cannot be fairly regarded; or it will incur healthcare disparities if the AI model misdiagnoses a certain group of people (e.g., brown and black skin). In recent years, there are emerging research works on addressing unfairness, and they mainly focus on a single unfair attribute, like skin tone; however, real-world data commonly have multiple attributes, among which unfairness can exist in more than one attribute, called "multi-dimensional fairness". In this paper, we first reveal a strong correlation between the different unfair attributes, i.e., optimizing fairness on one attribute will lead to the collapse of others. Then, we propose a novel Multi-Dimension Fairness framework, namely Muffin, which includes an automatic tool to unite off-the-shelf models to improve the fairness on multiple attributes simultaneously. Case studies on dermatology datasets with two unfair attributes show that the existing approach can achieve 21.05% fairness improvement on the first attribute while it makes the second attribute unfair by 1.85%. On the other hand, the proposed Muffin can unite multiple models to achieve simultaneously 26.32% and 20.37% fairness improvement on both attributes; meanwhile, it obtains 5.58% accuracy gain.
papers.abstract_zh: 模型公平性（又称偏差）已成为各种人工智能应用中最关键的问题之一。自动驾驶的不公平模型如果不能公平对待极端情况（例如极端天气），可能会导致交通事故；否则，如果人工智能模型误诊特定人群（例如棕色和黑色皮肤），就会产生医疗保健差异。近年来，针对不公平现象的研究不断涌现，而且主要集中在单一的不公平属性上，比如肤色；然而，现实世界的数据通常具有多种属性，其中不公平性可以存在于多个属性中，称为“多维公平性”。在本文中，我们首先揭示了不同不公平属性之间的强相关性，即优化一个属性的公平性将导致其他属性的崩溃。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的多维公平框架，即 Muffin，它包括一个自动工具来联合现成的模型，以同时提高多个属性的公平性。对具有两个不公平属性的皮肤病学数据集的案例研究表明，现有方法可以在第一个属性上实现 21.05% 的公平性改进，而使第二个属性不公平性提高 1.85%。另一方面，所提出的 Muffin 可以联合多个模型，在两个属性上同时实现 26.32% 和 20.37% 的公平性改进；同时，获得了5.58%的精度增益。

papers.title: NetBooster: Empowering Tiny Deep Learning By Standing on the Shoulders of Deep Giants.
papers.abstract: Tiny deep learning has attracted increasing attention driven by the substantial demand for deploying deep learning on numerous intelligent Internet-of-Things devices. However, it is still challenging to unleash tiny deep learning’s full potential on both large-scale datasets and downstream tasks due to the under-fitting issues caused by the limited model capacity of tiny neural networks (TNNs). To this end, we propose a framework called NetBooster to empower tiny deep learning by augmenting the architectures of TNNs via an expansion-then-contraction strategy. Extensive experiments show that NetBooster consistently outperforms state-of-the-art tiny deep learning solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于在众多智能物联网设备上部署深度学习的巨大需求，微型深度学习引起了越来越多的关注。然而，由于微型神经网络（TNN）模型容量有限导致的欠拟合问题，要在大规模数据集和下游任务上充分发挥微型深度学习的潜力仍然具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了一个名为 NetBooster 的框架，通过先扩展后收缩的策略来增强 TNN 的架构，从而增强小型深度学习的能力。大量实验表明，NetBooster 的性能始终优于最先进的微型深度学习解决方案。

papers.title: Neurogenesis Dynamics-inspired Spiking Neural Network Training Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Biologically inspired Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have attracted significant attention for their ability to provide extremely energy-efficient machine intelligence through event-driven operation and sparse activities. As artificial intelligence (AI) becomes ever more democratized, there is an increasing need to execute SNN models on edge devices. Existing works adopt weight pruning to reduce SNN model size and accelerate inference. However, these methods mainly focus on how to obtain a sparse model for efficient inference, rather than training efficiency. To overcome these drawbacks, in this paper, we propose a Neurogenesis Dynamics-inspired Spiking Neural Network training acceleration framework, NDSNN. Our framework is computational efficient and trains a model from scratch with dynamic sparsity without sacrificing model fidelity. Specifically, we design a new drop-and-grow strategy with decreasing number of non-zero weights, to maintain extreme high sparsity and high accuracy. We evaluate NDSNN using VGG-16 and ResNet-19 on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet. Experimental results show that NDSNN achieves up to 20.52% improvement in accuracy on Tiny-ImageNet using ResNet-19 (with a sparsity of 99%) as compared to other SOTA methods (e.g., Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH), SET-SNN, RigL-SNN). In addition, the training cost of NDSNN is only 40.89% of the LTH training cost on ResNet-19 and 31.35% of the LTH training cost on VGG-16 on CIFAR-10.
papers.abstract_zh: 受生物学启发的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 因其通过事件驱动操作和稀疏活动提供极其节能的机器智能的能力而引起了广泛关注。随着人工智能 (AI) 变得越来越大众化，在边缘设备上执行 SNN 模型的需求也越来越大。现有工作采用权重剪枝来减少 SNN 模型大小并加速推理。然而，这些方法主要关注如何获得稀疏模型以进行高效推理，而不是训练效率。为了克服这些缺点，在本文中，我们提出了一种受神经发生动力学启发的尖峰神经网络训练加速框架，NDSNN。我们的框架计算效率高，并且从头开始以动态稀疏性训练模型，而不会牺牲模型保真度。具体来说，我们设计了一种新的 drop-and-grow 策略，减少非零权重的数量，以保持极高的稀疏性和高精度。我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 TinyImageNet 上使用 VGG-16 和 ResNet-19 评估 NDSNN。实验结果表明，与其他 SOTA 方法（例如 Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH)、SET-SNN、RigL-SNN）相比，NDSNN 使用 ResNet-19（稀疏度为 99%）在 Tiny-ImageNet 上实现了高达 20.52% 的精度提升。此外，NDSNN 的训练成本仅为 ResNet-19 上 LTH 训练成本的 40.89%，在 CIFAR-10 上仅为 VGG-16 上 LTH 训练成本的 31.35%。

papers.title: Neuromorphic Swarm on RRAM Compute-in-Memory Processor for Solving QUBO Problem.
papers.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems prevail in engineering and industry. Some are NP-hard and thus become difficult to solve on edge devices due to limited power and computing resources. Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem is a valuable emerging model that can formulate numerous combinatorial problems, such as Max-Cut, traveling salesman problems, and graphic coloring. QUBO model also reconciles with two emerging computation models, quantum computing and neuromorphic computing, which can potentially boost the speed and energy efficiency in solving combinatorial problems. In this work, we design a neuromorphic QUBO solver composed of a swarm of spiking neural networks (SNN) that conduct a population-based meta-heuristic search for solutions. The proposed model can achieve about x20 40 speedup on large QUBO problems in terms of time steps compared to a traditional neural network solver. As a codesign, we evaluate the neuromorphic swarm solver on a 40nm 25mW Resistive RAM (RRAM) Compute-in-Memory (CIM) SoC with a 2.25MB RRAM-based accelerator and an embedded Cortex M3 core. The collaborative SNN swarm can fully exploit the specialty of CIM accelerator in matrix and vector multiplications. Compared to previous works, such an algorithm-hardware synergized solver exhibits advantageous speed and energy efficiency for edge devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题在工程和工业中普遍存在。有些是 NP 困难的，因此由于有限的功率和计算资源而难以在边缘设备上解决。二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 问题是一种有价值的新兴模型，可以制定许多组合问题，例如最大割、旅行商问题和图形着色。 QUBO 模型还与量子计算和神经形态计算这两种新兴计算模型相协调，这可能会提高解决组合问题的速度和能源效率。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个神经形态 QUBO 求解器，由一群尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 组成，该网络对解决方案进行基于群体的元启发式搜索。与传统的神经网络求解器相比，所提出的模型在时间步长方面可以在大型 QUBO 问题上实现约 x20 40 的加速。作为协同设计，我们在 40nm 25mW 电阻 RAM (RRAM) 内存计算 (CIM) SoC 上评估神经形态群体求解器，该 SoC 具有基于 2.25MB RRAM 的加速器和嵌入式 Cortex M3 内核。协作SNN群可以充分利用CIM加速器在矩阵和向量乘法方面的特性。与之前的工作相比，这种算法-硬件协同求解器为边缘设备展现了有利的速度和能源效率。

papers.title: NMExplorer: An Efficient Exploration Framework for DIMM-based Near-Memory Tensor Reduction.
papers.abstract: Various DIMM-based near-memory processing (DIMM-NMP) architectures have been proposed to accelerate tensor reduction. With careful evaluation, we find that diverse scenarios exhibit distinct performance on DIMM-NMP architectures adopting different design configurations. However, given a tensor reduction scenario, there is a lack of a fast and accurate solution to identify a proper DIMM-NMP architecture. To tackle this problem, we propose an efficient exploration framework called NMExplorer. Given a scenario and hardware parameters, NMExplorer can generate and explore a wide range of potential design configurations. Experiments show that the recommended designs can outperform state-of-the-art DIMM-NMP accelerators by up to 1.95× in performance and 3.69× in energy.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种基于 DIMM 的近内存处理 (DIMM-NMP) 架构来加速张量缩减。经过仔细评估，我们发现采用不同设计配置的 DIMM-NMP 架构在不同场景下表现出不同的性能。然而，考虑到张量缩减场景，缺乏快速准确的解决方案来识别合适的 DIMM-NMP 架构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 NMExplorer 的高效探索框架。给定场景和硬件参数，NMExplorer 可以生成并探索各种潜在的设计配置。实验表明，推荐的设计在性能上比最先进的 DIMM-NMP 加速器高出 1.95 倍，在能耗上高出 3.69 倍。

papers.title: NNTesting: Neural Network Fault Attacks Detection Using Gradient-Based Test Vector Generation.
papers.abstract: Recent studies have shown Neural Networks (NNs) are highly vulnerable to fault attacks. This work proposes a novel defensive framework, NNTesting, for detecting the fault attack and recovering the model. We first leverage gradient-based optimization to generate a set of high-quality Test Vectors (TVs) that effectively differentiate faulty profile models and further optimize the TV set by reducing the TVs through compression. The selected final TV set is then used to recover the model. The effectiveness of the proposed method is comprehensively evaluated on a wide range of models across various benchmark datasets. For instance, we successfully generate more than thousands of TV candidates using a gradient-based generation method. After compression, we achieve up to 94.76% detection success rate with only 140 TVs on the CIFAR-10 dataset.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，神经网络（NN）非常容易受到故障攻击。这项工作提出了一种新颖的防御框架 NTesting，用于检测故障攻击并恢复模型。我们首先利用基于梯度的优化来生成一组高质量的测试向量（TV），这些向量可以有效区分有缺陷的配置文件模型，并通过压缩减少 TV 来进一步优化电视机。然后使用选定的最终电视机来恢复模型。该方法的有效性在各种基准数据集的各种模型上进行了全面评估。例如，我们使用基于梯度的生成方法成功生成了数千个电视候选者。压缩后，我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上仅用 140 台电视就实现了高达 94.76% 的检测成功率。

papers.title: NTT-PIM: Row-Centric Architecture and Mapping for Efficient Number-Theoretic Transform on PIM.
papers.abstract: Recently DRAM-based PIMs (processing-in-memories) with unmodified cell arrays have demonstrated impressive performance for accelerating AI applications. However, due to the very restrictive hardware constraints, PIM remains an accelerator for simple functions only. In this paper we propose NTT-PIM, which is based on the same principles such as no modification of cell arrays and very restrictive area budget, but shows state-of-the-art performance for a very complex application such as NTT, thanks to features optimized for the application’s characteristics, such as in-place update and pipelining via multiple buffers. Our experimental results demonstrate that our NTT-PIM can outperform previous best PIM-based NTT accelerators in terms of runtime by 1.7 ∼ 17× while having negligible area and power overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，基于 DRAM 且具有未经修改的单元阵列的 PIM（内存处理）在加速 AI 应用方面表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，由于硬件限制非常严格，PIM 仍然只是简单功能的加速器。在本文中，我们提出了 NTT-PIM，它基于相同的原理，例如不修改单元阵列和非常严格的面积预算，但由于针对应用程序的特性进行了优化，例如通过多个缓冲区进行就地更新和流水线操作，因此为 NTT 等非常复杂的应用程序显示了最先进的性能。我们的实验结果表明，我们的 NTT-PIM 在运行时间方面可以优于之前最好的基于 PIM 的 NTT 加速器 1.7 ∼ 17 倍，同时面积和功率开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Occamy: Memory-efficient GPU Compiler for DNN Inference.
papers.abstract: This work proposes Occamy, a new memory-efficient DNN compiler that reduces the memory usage of a DNN model without affecting its accuracy. For each DNN operation, Occamy analyzes the dimensions of input and output tensors, and their liveness within the operation. Across all the operations, Occamy analyzes liveness of all the tensors, generates a memory pool after calculating the maximum required memory size, and schedules when and where to place each tensor in the memory pool. Compared to PyTorch, on an integrated embedded GPU for six DNNs, Occamy reduces the memory usage by 34.6% and achieves a geometric mean speedup of 1.25×.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 Occamy，一种新的内存高效 DNN 编译器，可减少 DNN 模型的内存使用而不影响其准确性。对于每个 DNN 操作，Occamy 都会分析输入和输出张量的维度及其在操作中的活跃度。在所有操作中，Occamy 分析所有张量的活跃度，在计算所需的最大内存大小后生成内存池，并安排将每个张量放置在内存池中的时间和位置。与 PyTorch 相比，在 6 个 DNN 的集成嵌入式 GPU 上，Occamy 减少了 34.6% 的内存使用量，并实现了 1.25 倍的几何平均加速。

papers.title: OmniBoost: Boosting Throughput of Heterogeneous Embedded Devices under Multi-DNN Workload.
papers.abstract: Modern Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) exhibit profound efficiency and accuracy properties. This has introduced application workloads that comprise of multiple DNN applications, raising new challenges regarding workload distribution. Equipped with a diverse set of accelerators, newer embedded system present architectural heterogeneity, which current run-time controllers are unable to fully utilize. To enable high throughput in multi-DNN workloads, such a controller is ought to explore hundreds of thousands of possible solutions to exploit the underlying heterogeneity. In this paper, we propose OmniBoost, a lightweight and extensible multi-DNN manager for heterogeneous embedded devices. We leverage stochastic space exploration and we combine it with a highly accurate performance estimator to observe a ×4.6 average throughput boost compared to other state-of-the-art methods. The evaluation was performed on the HiKey970 development board. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/AndreasKaratzas/omniboost-v1.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络 (DNN) 展现出卓越的效率和准确性特性。这引入了由多个 DNN 应用程序组成的应用程序工作负载，从而对工作负载分配提出了新的挑战。较新的嵌入式系统配备了多种加速器，呈现出架构异构性，当前的运行时控制器无法充分利用这种异构性。为了在多 DNN 工作负载中实现高吞吐量，这样的控制器应该探索数十万种可能的解决方案，以利用底层的异构性。在本文中，我们提出了 OmniBoost，一种用于异构嵌入式设备的轻量级且可扩展的多 DNN 管理器。我们利用随机空间探索，并将其与高度准确的性能估计器相结合，观察到与其他最先进的方法相比，平均吞吐量提高了 4.6 倍。评估是在HiKey970开发板上进行的。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/AndreasKaratzas/omniboost-v1 上公开获取。

papers.title: On a Moreau Envelope Wirelength Model for Analytical Global Placement.
papers.abstract: Analytical placement is proven to be effective in global placement. The differentiability of wirelength models is very critical to gradient-based numerical optimization. Most previous works approximate the non-smooth half-perimeter wirelength (HPWL) model with various differentiable functions. In this paper, we propose a new differentiable wirelength model using the Moreau envelope to approximate HPWL. By combining the state-of-the-art electrostatic-based placement algorithm, the experimental results demonstrate that our proposed algorithm can achieve up to 5.4% HPWL improvement and more than 1% on average compared to the most widely-used nonlinear wirelength model.
papers.abstract_zh: 事实证明，分析性布局在全球布局中是有效的。线长模型的可微性对于基于梯度的数值优化非常关键。大多数先前的工作都使用各种可微函数来近似非光滑半周长线长（HPWL）模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的可微分线长模型，使用 Moreau 包络来近似 HPWL。通过结合最先进的基于静电的布局算法，实验结果表明，与最广泛使用的非线性线长模型相比，我们提出的算法可以实现高达 5.4% 的 HPWL 改进，平均超过 1%。

papers.title: On EDA-Driven Learning for SAT Solving.
papers.abstract: We present DeepSAT, a novel end-to-end learning framework for the Boolean satisfiability (SAT) problem. Unlike existing solutions trained on random SAT instances with relatively weak supervision, we propose applying the knowledge of the well-developed electronic design automation (EDA) field for SAT solving. Specifically, we first resort to logic synthesis algorithms to pre-process SAT instances into optimized and-inverter graphs (AIGs). By doing so, the distribution diversity among various SAT instances can be dramatically reduced, which facilitates improving the generalization capability of the learned model. Next, we regard the distribution of SAT solutions being a product of conditional Bernoulli distributions. Based on this observation, we approximate the SAT solving procedure with a conditional generative model, leveraging a novel directed acyclic graph neural network (DAGNN) with two polarity prototypes for conditional SAT modeling. To effectively train the generative model, with the help of logic simulation tools, we obtain the probabilities of nodes in the AIG being logic ‘1’ as rich supervision. We conduct comprehensive experiments on various SAT problems. Our results show that, DeepSAT achieves significant accuracy improvements over state-of-the-art learning-based SAT solutions, especially when generalized to SAT instances that are relatively large or with diverse distributions.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepSAT，一种针对布尔可满足性（SAT）问题的新颖的端到端学习框架。与在监督相对较弱的随机 SAT 实例上训练的现有解决方案不同，我们建议应用成熟的电子设计自动化 (EDA) 领域的知识来解决 SAT 问题。具体来说，我们首先采用逻辑综合算法将 SAT 实例预处理为优化的逆变器图（AIG）。通过这样做，可以大大减少各种 SAT 实例之间的分布多样性，这有利于提高学习模型的泛化能力。接下来，我们将 SAT 解的分布视为条件伯努利分布的乘积。基于这一观察，我们使用条件生成模型来近似 SAT 求解过程，利用新颖的有向无环图神经网络 (DAGNN) 和两个极性原型进行条件 SAT 建模。为了有效地训练生成模型，借助逻辑仿真工具，我们获得AIG中节点为逻辑“1”的概率作为丰富的监督。我们对各种 SAT 问题进行了全面的实验。我们的结果表明，与最先进的基于学习的 SAT 解决方案相比，DeepSAT 的准确性显着提高，特别是在推广到相对较大或具有不同分布的 SAT 实例时。

papers.title: On the Unpredictability of SPICE Simulations for Side-Channel Leakage Verification of Masked Cryptographic Circuits.
papers.abstract: Circuits for cryptography are vulnerable to side-channel (SC) attacks. Masking is a countermeasure which splits secrets into random shares. It is provable secure under the assumption that physical leakage of each share is independent of each other. For a secure implementation of masked circuits, this independency assumption must be satisfied after layout. A transistor-level simulator such as SPICE produces analog waveforms that are sufficiently trustworthy to verify timing accuracy. Due to this accuracy, SPICE is expected to be useful for SC leakage verification after layout. However, we demonstrate that the statistical variation of the power noise amplitude in SPICE simulation is not always correct and varies a lot for SC evaluation. We believe it results from the internal time-step creation optimized for efficiency. It causes false-positives in the verification of security order. A small nonlinear function with a domain-oriented masking scheme is used to demonstrate these SPICE-simulation anomalies.
papers.abstract_zh: 加密电路容易受到旁道 (SC) 攻击。屏蔽是一种将秘​​密分割成随机部分的对策。在每个共享的物理泄漏彼此独立的假设下，它是可证明安全的。为了安全地实现屏蔽电路，布局后必须满足这种独立性假设。 SPICE 等晶体管级模拟器可生成足够可靠的模拟波形来验证时序精度。由于这种精度，SPICE 预计可用于布局后的 SC 泄漏验证。然而，我们证明 SPICE 仿真中功率噪声幅度的统计变化并不总是正确的，并且对于 SC 评估来说变化很大。我们相信这是为了效率而优化的内部时间步长创建的结果。它会导致安全订单验证误报。使用具有面向域的掩蔽方案的小型非线性函数来演示这些 SPICE 仿真异常。

papers.title: On-Device Unsupervised Image Segmentation.
papers.abstract: Along with the breakthrough of convolutional neural networks, in particular encoder-decoder and U-Net, learning-based segmentation has emerged in many research works. Most of them are based on supervised learning, requiring plenty of annotated data; however, to support segmentation, a label for each pixel is required, which is obviously expensive. As a result, the issue of lacking annotated segmentation data commonly exists. Continuous learning is a promising way to deal with this issue; however, it still has high demands on human labor for annotation. What’s more, privacy is highly required in segmentation data for real-world applications, which further calls for on-device learning. In this paper, we aim to resolve the above issue in an alternative way: Instead of supervised segmentation, we propose to develop efficient unsupervised segmentation which can be executed on edge devices without annotated data. Based on our observation that segmentation can obtain high performance when pixels are mapped to a high-dimension space using their position and color information, we for the first time bring brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC) to the segmentation task. We build the HDC-based unsupervised segmentation framework, namely "SegHDC". In SegHDC, we devise a novel encoding approach, which follows the Manhattan distance. A clustering algorithm is further developed on top of the encoded high-dimension vectors to obtain segmentation results. Experimental results show that SegHDC can significantly surpass neural network-based unsupervised segmentation. On a standard segmentation dataset, DSB2018, SegHDC can achieve a 28.0% improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) score; meanwhile, it achieves over 300× speedup on Raspberry PI. What’s more, for a larger size image in the BBBC005 dataset, the existing approach cannot be accommodated to Raspberry PI due to out of memory; on the other hand, SegHDC can obtain segmentation results within 3 minutes while achieving a 0.9587 IoU score.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着卷积神经网络，特别是编码器-解码器和U-Net的突破，基于学习的分割已经出现在许多研究工作中。大部分都是基于监督学习，需要大量的标注数据；然而，为了支持分割，需要每个像素都有一个标签，这显然是昂贵的。因此，缺乏带注释的分割数据的问题普遍存在。持续学习是解决这个问题的一个有前途的方法；然而，它对人工标注仍然有很高的要求。更重要的是，现实应用中的分割数据对隐私的要求很高，这进一步需要设备上的学习。在本文中，我们旨在以另一种方式解决上述问题：我们建议开发有效的无监督分割，而不是有监督分割，该分割可以在没有注释数据的边缘设备上执行。根据我们的观察，当使用像素的位置和颜色信息将像素映射到高维空间时，分割可以获得高性能，因此我们首次将受大脑启发的超维计算（HDC）引入分割任务。我们构建了基于 HDC 的无监督分割框架，即“SegHDC”。在 SegHDC 中，我们设计了一种新颖的编码方法，它遵循曼哈顿距离。在编码的高维向量之上进一步开发聚类算法以获得分割结果。实验结果表明，SegHDC 可以显着超越基于神经网络的无监督分割。在标准分割数据集 DSB2018 上，SegHDC 的 Intersection over Union (IoU) 分数可以实现 28.0% 的提升；同时，它在 Raspberry PI 上实现了超过 300 倍的加速。更重要的是，对于BBBC005数据集中较大尺寸的图像，由于内存不足，现有方法无法适应Raspberry PI；另一方面，SegHDC可以在3分钟内获得分割结果，同时达到0.9587的IoU分数。

papers.title: OpenDRC: An Efficient Open-Source Design Rule Checking Engine with Hierarchical GPU Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Design rule checking (DRC) is an essential procedure in physical verification, yet few open-source DRC tools are accessible in academia. To fill in the gap, we present OpenDRC, an open-source DRC engine that aims for extremely high efficiency. OpenDRC maintains hierarchical layouts with layer-wise bounding volume hierarchies and performs adaptive row-based partition to identify independent regions for check pruning and/or parallel processing. For common design rules, OpenDRC provides a sequential mode that runs cell-level sweeplines, and a parallel mode that launches edge-based GPU check kernels. Experiments demonstrate that OpenDRC outperforms state-of-the-art multi-threading and GPU-accelerated design rule checkers. The source code is available at https://github.com/opendrc/opendrc.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计规则检查（DRC）是物理验证中的一个重要过程，但学术界很少有开源的 DRC 工具可用。为了填补这一空白，我们推出了 OpenDRC，这是一个旨在实现极高效率的开源 DRC 引擎。 OpenDRC 使用分层包围体层次结构维护层次结构，并执行自适应的基于行的分区来识别独立区域以进行检查修剪和/或并行处理。对于常见的设计规则，OpenDRC 提供了运行单元级扫描线的顺序模式和启动基于边缘的 GPU 检查内核的并行模式。实验表明，OpenDRC 的性能优于最先进的多线程和 GPU 加速的设计规则检查器。源代码可在 https://github.com/opendrc/opendrc 获取。

papers.title: Optimal Synthesis of Multi-Controlled Qudit Gates.
papers.abstract: We propose a linear-size synthesis of the multi-controlled Toffoli gate on qudits with at most one borrowed ancilla. This one ancilla can even be saved when the qudit dimension is odd. Our synthesis leads to improvements in various quantum algorithms implemented on qudits. In particular, we obtain (i) a linear-size and one-clean-ancilla synthesis of multi-controlled qudit gates; (ii) an optimal-size and one-clean-ancilla synthesis of unitaries on qudits; (iii) a near-optimal-size and ancilla-free/one-borrowed-ancilla implementation of classical reversible functions as qudit gates.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在最多一个借用辅助设备上对多控制 Toffoli 门进行线性尺寸综合的方案。当qudit维度为奇数时，这一辅助甚至可以被保存。我们的综合导致了在 qudits 上实现的各种量子算法的改进。特别是，我们获得了（i）多控制 qudit 门的线性尺寸和一次性辅助合成； (ii) qudits 上酉式的最佳尺寸和 one-clean-ancilla 综合； (iii) 作为 qudit 门的经典可逆函数的近乎最佳尺寸和无辅助/单借用辅助实现。

papers.title: Optimizing Data Reuse for CGRA Mapping Using Polyhedral-based Loop Transformations.
papers.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRA) can provide high energy efficiency while keeping moderate flexibility. With flexible connections, modern CGRAs are allowed to construct register chains on demand such that data reuse could be achieved. However, existing works put little effort into loop transformations for better data reuse. Therefore, this paper proposes an efficient loop transformation approach considering data reuse for the overall performance. Using reduced polyhedral formulation and Dynamical Programming (DP) based searching, loop structures could be thoroughly and efficiently explored for optimized solutions. The experimental results show that our approach can achieve 1.11-1.15 × speedup compared to the state-of-the-art approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）可以提供高能效，同时保持适度的灵活性。通过灵活的连接，现代CGRA可以按需构建寄存器链，从而实现数据重用。然而，现有的工作很少致力于循环转换以实现更好的数据重用。因此，本文提出了一种考虑数据重用以提高整体性能的有效循环转换方法。使用简化的多面体公式和基于动态规划（DP）的搜索，可以彻底有效地探索循环结构以获得优化解决方案。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以实现 1.11-1.15 倍的加速。

papers.title: Optimizing the Performance of NDP Operations by Retrieving File Semantics in Storage.
papers.abstract: In-storage Near-Data Processing (NDP) architectures can reduce data movement between the host and the storage device by offloading computing tasks to the storage. This encourages many studies on building NDP applications, such as recommendation systems and databases, on computational SSDs. However, in the data path of existing NDP architectures, an NDP application has to find out the address of the requested file data by calling the I/O stacks of the kernel on the host, which incurs large overhead for transferring data between the host and the computational SSD. In this paper, we present File Semantics Retriever (FSR) to optimize the data path of NDP architectures by locating and fetching the requested file data directly in the computational SSD. The key idea is to recognize the file system layout and the metadata structures in the storage with the collaboration of a user-space library and a handler in the firmware of the computational SSD. We implement a prototype of FSR and evaluate it on the Cosmos plus OpenSSD, a widely-used computational SSD platform. The experimental results show that FSR outperforms existing NDP architectures in both benchmarks and real-world NDP applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 存储内近数据处理（NDP）架构可以通过将计算任务卸载到存储来减少主机和存储设备之间的数据移动。这鼓励了许多在计算 SSD 上构建 NDP 应用程序的研究，例如推荐系统和数据库。然而，在现有NDP架构的数据路径中，NDP应用程序必须通过调用主机上内核的I/O堆栈来找出所请求的文件数据的地址，这会在主机和计算SSD之间传输数据带来很大的开销。在本文中，我们提出了文件语义检索器（FSR），通过直接在计算 SSD 中定位和获取请求的文件数据来优化 NDP 架构的数据路径。关键思想是通过用户空间库和计算 SSD 固件中的处理程序的协作来识别存储中的文件系统布局和元数据结构。我们实现了 FSR 原型，并在广泛使用的计算 SSD 平台 Cosmos plus OpenSSD 上对其进行评估。实验结果表明，FSR 在基准测试和实际 NDP 应用中都优于现有的 NDP 架构。

papers.title: Orchestrated Scheduling and Partitioning for Improved Address Translation in GPUs.
papers.abstract: Unified Virtual Memory (UVM) is a promising feature in CPU-GPU heterogeneous systems that allows data structures to be accessed by both CPU and GPUs through unified pointers without explicit data copying. However, the delivered performance of UVM significantly relies on the efficiency of address translation. The current GPU thread block (TB) management is not aware of the translation process and heavily thrashes the per-streaming multiprocessor (SM) private Translation Look-ahead Buffers (TLBs). In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive characterization of 10 GPU benchmarks and quantify the translation reuses among the thread blocks. Our observation reveals that there exists substantial translation reuse within TBs rather than across the TBs. Moreover, the inter-TB interference significantly enlarges the intra-TB translation reuse distances. To this end, we propose a translation-aware TB scheduling and lightweight GPU L1 TLB partitioning to effectively mitigate the contention. Experimental results show that our proposed approach improves the L1 TLB hit rate, and this improvement translates to, on average, a 12.5% execution time reduction.
papers.abstract_zh: 统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 是 CPU-GPU 异构系统中一项很有前途的功能，它允许 CPU 和 GPU 通过统一指针访问数据结构，而无需显式数据复制。然而，UVM 的交付性能很大程度上依赖于地址转换的效率。当前的 GPU 线程块 (TB) 管理不知道转换过程，并且会严重影响每个流式多处理器 (SM) 私有转换先行缓冲区 (TLB)。在本文中，我们对 10 个 GPU 基准测试进行了全面的表征，并量化了线程块之间的转换重用。我们的观察表明，TB 内部而非跨 TB 之间存在大量翻译重用。此外，TB间干扰显着扩大了TB内翻译重用距离。为此，我们提出了一种翻译感知的 TB 调度和轻量级 GPU L1 TLB 分区，以有效缓解争用。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法提高了 L1 TLB 命中率，这种改进平均意味着执行时间减少了 12.5%。

papers.title: Orchestrating Measurement-Based Quantum Computation over Photonic Quantum Processors.
papers.abstract: Quantum computing has rapidly evolved in recent years and has established its supremacy in many application domains. While matter-based qubit platforms such as superconducting qubits have received the most attention so far, there is a rising interest in photonic qubits lately, which show advantages in parallelism, speed, and scalability. Photonic qubits are best served by the paradigm of measurement-based quantum computation (MBQC). To deliver the promise of measurement-based photonic quantum computing (MBPQC), the photon cluster state depth and photon utilization are two of the most important metrics. However, little attention has been paid to optimizing the depth and utilization when mapping quantum circuits to the photon clusters. In this paper, we propose a compiler framework that achieves automatic and dynamic depth and utilization optimizations. Our approach consists of an MBPQC mapping mechanism that maps optimized measurement patterns on a cluster state and a cluster state pruning strategy that removes all possible redundancies without impacting the circuit functions. Experimental results on five quantum benchmark with three different qubit numbers indicate our approach achieves an average of 63.4% cluster depth reduction and 22.8% photon utilization improvements.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算近年来迅速发展，并在许多应用领域确立了其霸主地位。虽然超导量子位等基于物质的量子位平台迄今为止受到了最多的关注，但最近人们对光子量子位的兴趣日益浓厚，它在并行性、速度和可扩展性方面表现出优势。基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）范式最好地服务于光子量子位。为了实现基于测量的光子量子计算（MBPQC）的承诺，光子簇状态深度和光子利用率是两个最重要的指标。然而，在将量子电路映射到光子簇时，很少有人关注优化深度和利用率。在本文中，我们提出了一种编译器框架，可实现自动动态深度和利用率优化。我们的方法由MBPQC映射机制和集群状态修剪策略组成，MBPQC映射机制将优化的测量模式映射到集群状态，集群状态修剪策略在不影响电路功能的情况下消除所有可能的冗余。具有三个不同量子比特数的五个量子基准的实验结果表明，我们的方法平均实现了 63.4% 的簇深度减少和 22.8% 的光子利用率提高。

papers.title: Partition Based Differential Testing for Finding Embedded Code Generation Bugs in Simulink.
papers.abstract: Engineers frequently generate embedded code from Simulink models for control applications. However, target applications using the code could behave unexpectedly, due to the bugs in code generation. In this study, we propose MOPART, the first model partition based differential testing method for code generation testing in Simulink. MOPART uses multiple-way network partitioning to generate diverse bug-triggering Simulink models to thoroughly exercise the code generation process. MOPART then finds bugs by analyzing the outputs of these Simulink models with differential testing. Experiments show that MOPART significantly outperforms existing approaches, which finds 11 confirmed code generation bugs in only two weeks.
papers.abstract_zh: 工程师经常从 Simulink 模型生成用于控制应用的嵌入式代码。但是，由于代码生成中的错误，使用该代码的目标应用程序可能会出现意外行为。在本研究中，我们提出了 MOPART，这是第一个基于模型划分的差分测试方法，用于 Simulink 中的代码生成测试。 MOPART 使用多路网络分区来生成各种错误触发 Simulink 模型，以彻底练习代码生成过程。然后，MOPART 通过差异测试分析这些 Simulink 模型的输出来发现错误。实验表明，MOPART 的性能显着优于现有方法，后者在短短两周内就发现了 11 个已确认的代码生成错误。

papers.title: PASNet: Polynomial Architecture Search Framework for Two-party Computation-based Secure Neural Network Deployment.
papers.abstract: Two-party computation (2PC) is promising to enable privacy-preserving deep learning (DL). However, the 2PC-based privacy-preserving DL implementation comes with high comparison protocol overhead from the non-linear operators. This work presents PASNet, a novel systematic framework that enables low latency, high energy efficiency & accuracy, and security-guaranteed 2PC-DL by integrating the hardware latency of the cryptographic building block into the neural architecture search loss function. We develop a cryptographic hardware scheduler and the corresponding performance model for Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGA) as a case study. The experimental results demonstrate that our light-weighted model PASNet-A and heavily-weighted model PASNet-B achieve 63 ms and 228 ms latency on private inference on ImageNet, which are 147 and 40 times faster than the SOTA CryptGPU system, and achieve 70.54% & 78.79% accuracy and more than 1000 times higher energy efficiency. The pretrained PASNet models and test code can be found on Github<sup>1</sup>.
papers.abstract_zh: 两方计算 (2PC) 有望实现隐私保护深度学习 (DL)。然而，基于 2PC 的隐私保护深度学习实现会带来来自非线性算子的高比较协议开销。这项工作提出了 PASNet，这是一种新颖的系统框架，通过将加密构建块的硬件延迟集成到神经架构搜索损失函数中，实现低延迟、高能效和准确性以及安全保证的 2PC-DL。我们为现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）开发了一种加密硬件调度器和相应的性能模型作为案例研究。实验结果表明，我们的轻权模型PASNet-A和重权模型PASNet-B在ImageNet上的私有推理上分别实现了63毫秒和228毫秒的延迟，分别比SOTA CryptGPU系统快147倍和40倍，并实现了70.54%和78.79%的准确率和1000倍以上的能效。预训练的 PASNet 模型和测试代码可以在 Github<sup>1</sup> 上找到。

papers.title: Pathfinding Model and Lagrangian-Based Global Routing.
papers.abstract: Global routing is a critical step in VLSI physical design. This paper proposes a novel pathfinding model based on integer linear programming for VLSI global routing. The Lagrangian relaxation method combined with a direction-aware weighted A*-algorithm is developed to quickly solve the model to obtain a better initial routing solution, which is further optimized by a designed multi-stage rip-up & rerouting algorithm. In each stage of rip-up & rerouting, different routing algorithms and cost functions are used to optimize the overflow and wire length. SPRoute and CUGR are two state-of-the-art global routers. Our proposed global routing algorithm outperforms SPRoute 1.0 & 2.0 in both the wire length and the number of vias on the ISPD08 benchmarks. On the ISPD18 benchmarks, compared to CUGR, our algorithm has about 5.1% reduction in the number of vias, and the average runtime is 4.89× speedup; compared to SPRoute 2.0, our algorithm has about 1.7% reduction on the average wire length, and the number of vias is comparable.
papers.abstract_zh: 全局布线是 VLSI 物理设计中的关键步骤。本文提出了一种基于整数线性规划的VLSI全局路径寻路模型。开发了拉格朗日松弛方法与方向感知加权A*算法相结合，以快速求解模型以获得更好的初始路由解决方案，并通过设计的多级撕裂和重路由算法进一步优化该解决方案。在剥离和重新路由的每个阶段，使用不同的路由算法和成本函数来优化溢出和线长。 SPRoute 和 CUGR 是两个最先进的全局路由器。我们提出的全局布线算法在 ISPD08 基准测试中的导线长度和过孔数量方面均优于 SPRoute 1.0 和 2.0。在ISPD18基准上，与CUGR相比，我们的算法过孔数量减少了约5.1%，平均运行时间加速了4.89倍；与SPRoute 2.0相比，我们的算法平均线长减少了约1.7%，并且过孔数量相当。

papers.title: PATRONoC: Parallel AXI Transport Reducing Overhead for Networks-on-Chip targeting Multi-Accelerator DNN Platforms at the Edge.
papers.abstract: Emerging deep neural network (DNN) applications require high-performance multi-core hardware acceleration with large data bursts. Classical network-on-chips (NoCs) use serial packet-based protocols suffering from significant protocol translation overheads towards the endpoints. This paper proposes PATRONoC, an open-source fully AXI-compliant NoC fabric to better address the specific needs of multi-core DNN computing platforms. Evaluation of PATRONoC in a 2D-mesh topology shows 34 % higher area efficiency compared to a state-of-the-art classical NoC at 1 GHz. PATRONoC’s throughput outperforms a baseline NoC by 2-8× on uniform random traffic and provides a high aggregated throughput of up to 350 GiB/s on synthetic and DNN workload traffic.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的深度神经网络 (DNN) 应用需要高性能多核硬件加速和大数据突发。传统的片上网络 (NoC) 使用基于串行数据包的协议，遭受到端点的大量协议转换开销。本文提出了 PATRONoC，一种完全兼容 AXI 的开源 NoC 结构，以更好地满足多核 DNN 计算平台的特定需求。对 2D 网状拓扑中的 PATRONoC 进行的评估表明，与 1 GHz 下最先进的经典 NoC 相比，面积效率高出 34%。 PATRONoC 的吞吐量在统一随机流量上优于基准 NoC 2-8 倍，并在合成和 DNN 工作负载流量上提供高达 350 GiB/s 的高聚合吞吐量。

papers.title: PertNAS: Architectural Perturbations for Memory-Efficient Neural Architecture Search.
papers.abstract: Differentiable Neural Architecture Search (NAS) relies on aggressive weight-sharing to reduce its search cost. This leads to GPU-memory bottlenecks that hamper the algorithm’s scalability. To resolve these bottlenecks, we propose a perturbations-based evolutionary approach that significantly reduces the memory cost while largely maintaining the efficiency benefits of weight-sharing. Our approach makes minute changes to compact neural architectures and measures their impact on performance. In this way, it extracts high-quality motifs from the search space. We utilize these perturbations to perform NAS in compact models evolving over time to traverse the search space. Our method disentangles GPU-memory consumption from search space size, offering exceptional scalability to large search spaces. Results show competitive accuracy on multiple benchmarks, including CIFAR10, ImageNet2012, and NASBench-301. Specifically, our approach improves accuracy on ImageNet and NASBench-301 by 0.3% and 0.87%, respectively. Furthermore, the memory consumption of search is reduced by roughly 80% against state-of-the-art weight-shared differentiable NAS works while achieving a search time of only 6 GPU hours.
papers.abstract_zh: 可微神经架构搜索 (NAS) 依靠积极的权重共享来降低其搜索成本。这会导致 GPU 内存瓶颈，从而阻碍算法的可扩展性。为了解决这些瓶颈，我们提出了一种基于扰动的进化方法，该方法可以显着降低内存成本，同时在很大程度上保持权重共享的效率优势。我们的方法对紧凑的神经架构进行了微小的改变，并测量了它们对性能的影响。通过这种方式，它从搜索空间中提取高质量的主题。我们利用这些扰动在随时间演变的紧凑模型中执行 NAS，以遍历搜索空间。我们的方法将 GPU 内存消耗与搜索空间大小分开，为大型搜索空间提供卓越的可扩展性。结果显示，在多个基准测试（包括 CIFAR10、ImageNet2012 和 NASBench-301）上的准确性具有竞争力。具体来说，我们的方法将 ImageNet 和 NASBench-301 的准确率分别提高了 0.3% 和 0.87%。此外，与最先进的权重共享可微 NAS 工作相比，搜索的内存消耗减少了大约 80%，同时搜索时间仅为 6 个 GPU 小时。

papers.title: Physics-aware Roughness Optimization for Diffractive Optical Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: As a representative next-generation device/circuit technology beyond CMOS, diffractive optical neural networks (DONNs) have shown promising advantages over conventional deep neural networks due to extreme fast computation speed (light speed) and low energy consumption. However, there is a mismatch, i.e., significant prediction accuracy loss, between the DONN numerical modelling and physical optical device deployment, because of the interpixel interaction within the diffractive layers. In this work, we propose a physics-aware diffractive optical neural network training framework to reduce the performance difference between numerical modeling and practical deployment. Specifically, we propose the roughness modeling regularization in the training process and integrate the physics-aware sparsification method to introduce sparsity to the phase masks to reduce sharp phase changes between adjacent pixels in diffractive layers. We further develop 2π periodic optimization to reduce the roughness of the phase masks to preserve the performance of DONN. Experiment results demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-arts, our physics-aware optimization can provide 35.7%, 34.2%, 28.1%, and 27.3% reduction in roughness with only accuracy loss on MNIST, FMNIST, KMNIST, and EMNIST, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为超越 CMOS 的下一代代表性器件/电路技术，衍射光学神经网络（DONN）由于极快的计算速度（光速）和低能耗而显示出优于传统深度神经网络的优势。然而，由于衍射层内的像素间相互作用，DONN 数值建模和物理光学设备部署之间存在不匹配，即显着的预测精度损失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种物理感知衍射光学神经网络训练框架，以减少数值建模与实际部署之间的性能差异。具体来说，我们提出在训练过程中进行粗糙度建模正则化，并集成物理感知稀疏方法，将稀疏性引入相位掩模，以减少衍射层中相邻像素之间的急剧相位变化。我们进一步开发 2π 周期性优化来降低相位掩模的粗糙度，以保持 DONN 的性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们的物理感知优化可以分别将 MNIST、FMNIST、KMNIST 和 EMNIST 上的粗糙度降低 35.7%、34.2%、28.1% 和 27.3%，而仅损失精度。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Optical Kernel Regression Using Complex-valued Neural Fields.
papers.abstract: Lithography is fundamental to integrated circuit fabrication, necessitating large computation overhead. The advancement of machine learning (ML)-based lithography models alleviates the trade-offs between manufacturing process expense and capability. However, all previous methods regard the lithography system as an image-to-image black box mapping, utilizing network parameters to learn by rote mappings from massive mask-to-aerial or mask-to-resist image pairs, resulting in poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a new ML-based paradigm disassembling the rigorous lithographic model into non-parametric mask operations and learned optical kernels containing determinant source, pupil, and lithography information. By optimizing complex-valued neural fields to perform optical kernel regression from coordinates, our method can accurately restore lithography system using a small-scale training dataset with fewer parameters, demonstrating superior generalization capability as well. Experiments show that our framework can use 31% of parameters while achieving 69× smaller mean squared error with 1.3× higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 光刻是集成电路制造的基础，需要大量的计算开销。基于机器学习 (ML) 的光刻模型的进步减轻了制造工艺费用和能力之间的权衡。然而，以前的所有方法都将光刻系统视为图像到图像的黑盒映射，利用网络参数从大量掩模到航空或掩模到抗蚀剂图像对中死记硬背地学习，导致泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范例，将严格的光刻模型分解为非参数掩模操作，并学习包含行列式源、光瞳和光刻信息的光学内核。通过优化复值神经场以从坐标执行光学核回归，我们的方法可以使用参数较少的小规模训练数据集准确地恢复光刻系统，也表现出卓越的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的框架可以使用 31% 的参数，同时实现比现有技术低 69 倍的均方误差和高 1.3 倍的吞吐量。

papers.title: PIE-DRAM: Postponing IECC to Enhance DRAM performance with access table.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel memory architecture, PIE-DRAM, to mitigate the performance overhead caused by IECC. Unlike conventional IECC architectures, the proposed method separates IECC from data path to enable independent IECC operations from memory read or write access. Based on recent memory access histories, memory controller selectively determines the usage of IECC to alleviate IECC overhead, thereby the proposed architecture enhances the memory performance. Experimental results show that, from memory intensive workloads, 6% IPC (Instructions Per Cycle) improvement is achieved solely by applying the proposed DRAM architecture utilizing the locality and modified RMW.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的内存架构 PIE-DRAM，以减轻 IECC 造成的性能开销。与传统的 IECC 架构不同，所提出的方法将 IECC 与数据路径分开，以实现独立于存储器读或写访问的 IECC 操作。基于最近的存储器访问历史，存储器控制器选择性地确定IECC的使用以减轻IECC开销，从而所提出的架构增强了存储器性能。实验结果表明，对于内存密集型工作负载，仅通过应用所提出的利用局部性和修改后的 RMW 的 DRAM 架构即可实现 6% 的 IPC（每周期指令数）改进。

papers.title: PIM-HLS: An Automatic Hardware Generation Tool for Heterogeneous Processing-In-Memory-based Neural Network Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have shown great abilities for neural network (NN) acceleration on edge devices that demand low latency under severe area constraints. Heterogeneous PIM architectures with different PIM implementation approaches such as RRAM-based PIM and SRAM-based PIM can further improve the performance. However, the automatic generation of heterogeneous PIM architectures faces the following two unresolved problems. First, existing work has not considered the design for heterogeneous PIM-based NN accelerators with multiple memory technologies. Second, for PIM with insufficient memory on edge devices, it is challenging to find the optimal runtime weight scheduling strategy in an O(L!) optimization space for the NN with L layers.In this paper, we propose PIM-HLS, an automatic hardware generation tool for heterogeneous PIM-based NN accelerators. Aiming at the problems above, we first point out that heterogeneous PIM can improve the performance under severe area constraints. Then we optimize the architectures for each NN layer by taking the advantage of different memory technologies. We also define the optimization problem of runtime weight scheduling and mapping for the first time, and propose a dynamic-programming-based weight scheduling algorithm to reduce the optimization space to O(L<sup>2</sup>). We implement PIM-HLS to automatically generate the hardware code and the instructions. Results show that we achieve an averagely 5.9× speedup with 72.8% less area compared with state-of-the-art PIM designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 架构在边缘设备上显示出强大的神经网络 (NN) 加速能力，这些设备在严格的面积限制下需要低延迟。具有不同PIM实现方法（例如基于RRAM的PIM和基于SRAM的PIM）的异构PIM架构可以进一步提高性能。然而，异构PIM架构的自动生成面临以下两个未解决的问题。首先，现有的工作没有考虑采用多种内存技术的基于 PIM 的异构神经网络加速器的设计。其次，对于边缘设备上内存不足的 PIM，在具有 L 层的 NN 的 O(L!) 优化空间中找到最佳运行时权重调度策略具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 PIM-HLS，一种用于基于异构 PIM 的 NN 加速器的自动硬件生成工具。针对上述问题，我们首先指出异构PIM可以在严重的面积限制下提高性能。然后，我们利用不同的内存技术来优化每个神经网络层的架构。我们还首次定义了运行时权重调度和映射的优化问题，并提出了一种基于动态规划的权重调度算法，将优化空间减少到O(L<sup>2</sup>)。我们实现PIM-HLS来自动生成硬件代码和指令。结果表明，与最先进的 PIM 设计相比，我们实现了平均 5.9 倍的加速，并且面积减少了 72.8%。

papers.title: PIMA-LPN: Processing-in-memory Acceleration for Efficient LPN-based Post-Quantum Cryptography.
papers.abstract: Learning parity with noise (LPN) is under intensive research in building advanced cryptography suites and protocols. However, in LPN-based cryptography, the transmission of the large matrices between the memory and the processor units generally incurs a significant latency overhead. In this work, we propose PIMA-LPN, a processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerator for LPN cryptography. Specifically, our PIM architecture can carry out the entire computations of LPN in memory. In this experiment, we demonstrate that PIMA-LPN can be 20.86× ~ 216.8× faster than existing CPU and FPGA implementations of LPN cryptography. Furthermore, we show that using PIMA-LPN, LPN cryptography can achieve similar computational efficiency compared to the post-quantum cryptography standard (i.e., CRYSTALS-Kyber) with 15.4x fewer memory units.
papers.abstract_zh: 学习噪声奇偶校验 (LPN) 正在深入研究构建高级密码学套件和协议。然而，在基于 LPN 的密码术中，存储器和处理器单元之间的大型矩阵的传输通常会产生显着的延迟开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PIMA-LPN，一种用于 LPN 加密的内存处理 (PIM) 加速器。具体来说，我们的 PIM 架构可以在内存中执行 LPN 的全部计算。在本实验中，我们证明 PIMA-LPN 的速度比现有的 LPN 加密 CPU 和 FPGA 实现快 20.86 倍 ~ 216.8 倍。此外，我们表明，与后量子密码标准（即 CRYSTALS-Kyber）相比，使用 PIMA-LPN，LPN 密码可以实现类似的计算效率，但内存单元少 15.4 倍。

papers.title: PIMCOMP: A Universal Compilation Framework for Crossbar-based PIM DNN Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Crossbar-based PIM DNN accelerators can provide massively parallel in-situ operations. A specifically designed compiler is important to achieve high performance for a wide variety of DNN workloads. However, some key compilation issues such as parallelism considerations, weight replication selection, and array mapping methods have not been solved. In this work, we propose PIMCOMP - a universal compilation framework for NVM crossbar-based PIM DNN accelerators. PIMCOMP is built on an abstract PIM accelerator architecture, which is compatible with the widely used Crossbar/IMA/Tile/Chip hierarchy. On this basis, we propose four general compilation stages for crossbar-based PIM accelerators: node partitioning, weight replicating, core mapping, and dataflow scheduling. We design two compilation modes with different inter-layer pipeline granularities to support high-throughput and low-latency application scenarios, respectively. Our experimental results show that PIMCMOP yields improvements of 1.6× and 2.4× in throughput and latency, respectively, relative to PUMA.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Crossbar 的 PIM DNN 加速器可以提供大规模并行原位操作。专门设计的编译器对于实现各种 DNN 工作负载的高性能非常重要。然而，一些关键的编译问题如并行性考虑、权重复制选择、数组映射方法等尚未解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PIMCOMP——一种用于基于 NVM crossbar 的 PIM DNN 加速器的通用编译框架。 PIMCOMP建立在抽象的PIM加速器架构之上，与广泛使用的Crossbar/IMA/Tile/Chip层次结构兼容。在此基础上，我们提出了基于crossbar的PIM加速器的四个通用编译阶段：节点分区、权重复制、核心映射和数据流调度。我们设计了两种具有不同层间管道粒度的编译模式，分别支持高吞吐量和低延迟的应用场景。我们的实验结果表明，相对于 PUMA，PIMCMOP 的吞吐量和延迟分别提高了 1.6 倍和 2.4 倍。

papers.title: Power Side-Channel Vulnerability Assessment of Lightweight Cryptographic Scheme, XOODYAK.
papers.abstract: This work presents a power side-channel analysis (SCA) of a lightweight cryptography (LWC) algorithm, XOODYAK, implemented on an FPGA. First, we perform generic leakage detection tests for two phases of authenticated encryption with associated data (AEAD) mode, namely INITIALIZE, and ABSORB. Second, we develop novel hypothetical attack models for correlation power analysis (CPA) and demonstrate a success rate (SR) of 92%/82% and minimum-traces-to-disclosure (MTD)=13K/38K on the INITIALIZE/ABSORB phases, respectively. Third, we evaluate ABSORB against Profiled SCA using convolutional neural network (CNN), and achieve SR=96%/64% and MTD=2K/16K on the test set for the same/different keys used for training, respectively. Finally, we suggest low-overhead countermeasures to protect against these SCA attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了在 FPGA 上实现的轻量级加密 (LWC) 算法 XOODYAK 的功率侧通道分析 (SCA)。首先，我们对关联数据认证加密 (AEAD) 模式的两个阶段（即 INITIALIZE 和 ABSORB）执行通用泄漏检测测试。其次，我们开发了用于相关功率分析 (CPA) 的新型假设攻击模型，并在 INITIALIZE/ABSORB 阶段分别证明了 92%/82% 的成功率 (SR) 和最小泄露痕迹 (MTD)=13K/38K。第三，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）针对 Profiled SCA 评估 ABSORB，并在用于训练的相同/不同密钥的测试集上分别实现 SR=96%/64% 和 MTD=2K/16K。最后，我们建议采取低开销对策来防范这些 SCA 攻击。

papers.title: PowerPruning: Selecting Weights and Activations for Power-Efficient Neural Network Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been successfully applied in various fields. A major challenge of deploying DNNs, especially on edge devices, is power consumption, due to the large number of multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operations. To address this challenge, we propose PowerPruning, a novel method to reduce power consumption in digital neural network accelerators by selecting weights that lead to less power consumption in MAC operations. In addition, the timing characteristics of the selected weights together with all activation transitions are evaluated. The weights and activations that lead to small delays are further selected. Consequently, the maximum delay of the sensitized circuit paths in the MAC units is reduced even without modifying MAC units, which thus allows a flexible scaling of supply voltage to reduce power consumption further. Together with retraining, the proposed method can reduce power consumption of DNNs on hardware by up to 73.9% with only a slight accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已成功应用于各个领域。部署 DNN（尤其是在边缘设备上）的一个主要挑战是功耗，因为需要进行大量乘法累加 (MAC) 运算。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 PowerPruning，这是一种通过选择权重来降低数字神经网络加速器功耗的新方法，从而减少 MAC 操作中的功耗。此外，还会评估所选权重的时序特性以及所有激活转换。进一步选择导致小延迟的权重和激活。因此，即使不修改MAC单元，MAC单元中的敏化电路路径的最大延迟也被减少，从而允许灵活地缩放电源电压以进一步减少功耗。与再训练相结合，所提出的方法可以将硬件上 DNN 的功耗降低高达 73.9%，而精度仅略有损失。

papers.title: Primer: Fast Private Transformer Inference on Encrypted Data.
papers.abstract: It is increasingly important to enable privacy-preserving inference for cloud services based on Transformers. Post-quantum cryptographic techniques, e.g., fully homomorphic encryption (FHE), and multi-party computation (MPC), are popular methods to support private Transformer inference. However, existing works still suffer from prohibitively computational and communicational overhead. In this work, we present, Primer, to enable a fast and accurate Transformer over encrypted data for natural language processing tasks. In particular, Primer is constructed by a hybrid cryptographic protocol optimized for attention-based Transformer models, as well as techniques including computation merge and tokens-first ciphertext packing. Comprehensive experiments on encrypted language modeling show that Primer achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and reduces the inference latency by 90.6% ∼ 97.5% over previous methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 为基于 Transformer 的云服务启用隐私保护推理变得越来越重要。后量子密码技术，例如全同态加密（FHE）和多方计算（MPC），是支持私有 Transformer 推理的流行方法。然而，现有的工作仍然面临着令人望而却步的计算和通信开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Primer，为自然语言处理任务提供基于加密数据的快速、准确的 Transformer。特别是，Primer 由针对基于注意力的 Transformer 模型优化的混合密码协议以及计算合并和令牌优先密文打包等技术构建。加密语言建模的综合实验表明，Primer 实现了最先进的精度，并且比之前的方法减少了 90.6% ∼ 97.5% 的推理延迟。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving DNN Training with Prefetched Meta-Keys on Heterogeneous Neural Network Accelerators.
papers.abstract: The embedded software may migrate the collected data to the server for DNN computation acceleration, which may compromise privacy. We propose a DNN computation framework that combines TEE and NNA to address the privacy leakage problem. We design an NNA-friendly encryption method that enables NNA to correctly compute the encrypted linear input. Facing the overhead of TEE-NNA interaction, we design a pipeline-based prefetch mechanism that can reduce the TEE interaction overhead. Experimentally, our approach proves to be compatible with a wide range of NPUs and TPUs, and improves the performance by 8-19 times over the TEE scheme.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入式软件可能会将收集到的数据迁移到服务器以进行 DNN 计算加速，这可能会损害隐私。我们提出了一种结合 TEE 和 NNA 的 DNN 计算框架来解决隐私泄露问题。我们设计了一种 NNA 友好的加密方法，使 NNA 能够正确计算加密的线性输入。面对TEE-NNA交互的开销，我们设计了一种基于管道的预取机制，可以减少TEE交互开销。实验证明，我们的方法可以兼容多种 NPU 和 TPU，并且性能比 TEE 方案提高 8-19 倍。

papers.title: Processing-In-Hierarchical-Memory Architecture for Billion-Scale Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search.
papers.abstract: Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) algorithms achieve the best accuracy for fast high-recall searches on billion-scale datasets. Because of the irregular and large-volume data access, existing CPU-based systems suffer from heavy data movements when dealing with graph-based ANNS algorithms. Near-memory-computing (NMC) architectures have demonstrated great potential in boosting the performance of big-data processing. However, existing NMC architectures face two serious problems when processing graph-based ANNS algorithms: (1) the memory capacity of main memory level NMC (e.g., 64GB) cannot meet the storage requirement of ANNS on billion-scale datasets (e.g., 800GB), resulting in heavy data transfers between main memory and storage; (2) the contradiction between the irregular and fine-grained graph access and the page-level read granularity hinder the throughput of storage level NMC.This paper proposes Pyramid, the processing-in-hierarchical-memory architecture for graph-based ANNS on billion-scale datasets. Pyramid combines the internal bandwidth benefits of main memory level NMC with the capacity benefits of storage level NMC. A hierarchical graph-cluster-based ANNS is also proposed for Pyramid. It transforms the irregular data access on large-scale graphs into the irregular access on small-scale graphs at the main memory level and regular sequential in-cluster access at the storage level. Experimental results show that with the same recall of 0.9, Pyramid improves the throughput by 21.1~72.8× and 26.0~50.7× compared with existing CPU/GPU-based ANNS systems on million-scale and billion-scale datasets, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 算法可在十亿级数据集上实现快速高召回率搜索的最佳准确度。由于不规则且大量的数据访问，现有的基于 CPU 的系统在处理基于图的 ANNS 算法时会遭受大量数据移动的困扰。近内存计算 (NMC) 架构在提升大数据处理性能方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的NMC架构在处理基于图的ANNS算法时面临两个严重的问题：（1）主存级NMC的存储容量（例如64GB）无法满足ANNS对十亿级数据集（例如800GB）的存储要求，导致主存和存储之间的数据传输量很大； (2)不规则、细粒度的图访问与页级读取粒度之间的矛盾阻碍了存储级NMC的吞吐量。本文提出了Pyramid，一种针对十亿级数据集的基于图的ANNS的分层内存处理架构。 Pyramid 结合了主内存级 NMC 的内部带宽优势和存储级 NMC 的容量优势。还为 Pyramid 提出了基于分层图簇的 ANNS。它将大规模图上的不规则数据访问转化为主存层面上小规模图上的不规则访问和存储层面上规则的顺序簇内访问。实验结果表明，在相同的召回率 0.9 下，Pyramid 与现有基于 CPU/GPU 的 ANNS 系统在百万级和十亿级数据集上的吞吐量分别提高了 21.1~72.8 倍和 26.0~50.7 倍。

papers.title: Processor Vulnerability Discovery.
papers.abstract: Processor security vulnerability discovery has drawn increasing attention since the disclosure of Meltdown, Spectre and other vulnerabilities. This paper presents a concise roadmap of this emerging research direction from the simple manual discovery to automated discovery methodologies, as well as the major challenges along the roadmap.
papers.abstract_zh: 自Meltdown、Spectre等漏洞被披露以来，处理器安全漏洞发现越来越受到关注。本文提出了这一新兴研究方向从简单的手动发现到自动发现方法的简明路线图，以及该路线图中的主要挑战。

papers.title: Profile-Driven Banded Smith-Waterman acceleration for Short Read Alignment.
papers.abstract: Short read alignment is a critical step in genomic pipelines that requires optimization due to the enormous input size and complexity of SmithWaterman string matching. Several optimization techniques have been examined, such as hardware acceleration, heuristics and pre-filtering. This work combines these approaches into a single powerful solution that leverages the low edit rate of reads and the principles of Banded SmithWaterman, to highlight the value of creating accelerators customized to the input accuracy requirements. We propose a dataset-specific multi-dataflow design that leverages both pre-filtering and Banded SmithWaterman to meet the demands of the datasets in both throughput and accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 短读比对是基因组流程中的关键步骤，由于 SmithWaterman 字符串匹配的输入量巨大且复杂，因此需要进行优化。已经检查了几种优化技术，例如硬件加速、启发式和预过滤。这项工作将这些方法组合成一个强大的解决方案，利用读取的低编辑率和 Banded SmithWaterman 的原理，突出创建根据输入精度要求定制的加速器的价值。我们提出了一种特定于数据集的多数据流设计，利用预过滤和 Banded SmithWaterman 来满足数据集在吞吐量和准确性方面的需求。

papers.title: Property-Based Timing Analysis and Optimization for Complex Cyber-Physical Real-Time Systems.
papers.abstract: This lightning talk introduces the motivations of the needs of formal properties that can be used modularly to compose safe and tight analysis and optimization for the scheduler design and schedulability test problems for cyber-physical real-time systems. The key challenge is the correct and precise translation from different schedule functions to proper mathematical properties that can be further used for property-based modulable designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 这次闪电演讲介绍了形式化属性需求的动机，这些形式化属性可以模块化地用于对网络物理实时系统的调度器设计和可调度性测试问题进行安全、严格的分析和优化。关键的挑战是从不同的调度函数到正确的数学属性的正确和精确的转换，这些属性可以进一步用于基于属性的模块化设计。

papers.title: PROPHET: Predictive On-Chip Power Meter in Hardware Accelerator for DNN.
papers.abstract: On-chip power meters play a critical role in power management by generating timely and accurate power traces at runtime. However, both performance-counter-based and existing RTL-based on-chip power meters have difficulty in providing sufficient response time for fast power and voltage management scenarios. Additionally, they can be costly to implement for large-scale DNN accelerators with many homogeneous process elements. To address these limitations, this paper proposes PROPHET, a data-pattern-based predictive on-chip power meter targeting multiply-accumulate-based DNN accelerators. By sampling pre-defined data patterns during memory access, PROPHET can predict power consumption before it actually happens. In our experiments, PROPHET predicts power consumption dozens of clock cycles in advance, with a temporal resolution of 4 clock cycles and NMAE < 7% and area overhead < 2% for various systolic-array-based DNN accelerators. PROPHET has the potential to enable fine-grained power management and optimization for large-scale DNN accelerators, improving their energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 片上功率计通过在运行时生成及时、准确的功率跟踪，在功率管理中发挥着关键作用。然而，基于性能计数器的功率计和现有的基于RTL的片上功率计都难以为快速功率和电压管理场景提供足够的响应时间。此外，对于具有许多同质过程元素的大规模 DNN 加速器来说，实施它们的成本可能很高。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了 PROPHET，一种基于数据模式的预测片上功率计，针对基于乘法累加的 DNN 加速器。通过在内存访问期间采样预定义的数据模式，PROPHET 可以在功耗实际发生之前预测功耗。在我们的实验中，PROPHET 提前预测了数十个时钟周期的功耗，对于各种基于脉动阵列的 DNN 加速器，时间分辨率为 4 个时钟周期，NMAE < 7%，面积开销 < 2%。 PROPHET 有潜力为大规模 DNN 加速器实现细粒度的电源管理和优化，从而提高其能源效率。

papers.title: PseudoSC: A Binary Approximation to Stochastic Computing within Latent Operation-Space for Ultra-Lightweight on-Edge DNNs.
papers.abstract: Recently, stochastic computing (SC) is increasingly popular in constructing MAC for on-edge DNNs benefiting from its outstanding energy-efficiency, including its adequate precision and gate-level operation. However, current SC-DNN systems always include a lot of costly SNGs/APCs for inevitably switches between binary and stochastic domains, which mortgages incongruous resources to pay the "bill" of the domain-switches and impedes highly-concurrent deployments. In this work, PseudoSC, a binary approximation to low-discrepancy SC, is proposed to totally remove the domain-switch for SNG/APC-free SC-DNNs. Its basic idea is to virtually re-arrange a couple of stochastic operands into a 2-D latent op-space, in which, original Monte Carlo sampling can be partitioned into three sub-ops, i.e., two fixed binary-ops and a fractal recursion. In theory, the recursion forms an isomorphic partition of the sampling repeated in smaller scales until the binary base-case achieved, as a result, a SC-op is well approximated only with binary-ops. Based on above theory, a multi-lane micro-architecture is designed to unroll the recursion within a few cycles and its advantages on hardware saving is verified under popular DNNs. The evaluation shows that the DNN-models with our schemes achieve 98.7% accuracy of the fixed-point implementations, which significantly outperform other SOTA methods. In addition, its reduced structure improves the power efficiency by 3.67 times on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，随机计算 (SC) 在构建边缘 DNN 的 MAC 方面越来越受欢迎，这得益于其出色的能源效率，包括足够的精度和门级操作。然而，当前的 SC-DNN 系统总是包含大量昂贵的 SNG/APC，用于不可避免地在二进制域和随机域之间切换，这会抵押不协调的资源来支付域切换的“账单”，并阻碍高并发部署。在这项工作中，提出了 PseudoSC（低差异 SC 的二进制近似）来完全消除无 SNG/APC SC-DNN 的域切换。其基本思想是将几个随机操作数虚拟地重新排列到二维潜在操作空间中，其中原始蒙特卡罗采样可以分为三个子操作，即两个固定二元操作和一个分形递归。理论上，递归形成了以较小规模重复的采样的同构分区，直到实现二进制基本情况，因此，SC 操作只能用二进制操作来很好地近似。基于上述理论，设计了一种多通道微架构，可在几个周期内展开递归，并在流行的 DNN 下验证了其在硬件节省方面的优势。评估表明，采用我们的方案的 DNN 模型的定点实现准确率达到 98.7%，明显优于其他 SOTA 方法。此外，其精简的结构使电源效率平均提高3.67倍。

papers.title: PSMiner: A Pattern-Aware Accelerator for High-Performance Streaming Graph Pattern Mining.
papers.abstract: Streaming Graph Pattern Mining (GPM) has been widely used in many application fields. However, the existing streaming GPM solution suffers from many unnecessary explorations and isomorphism tests, while the existing static GPM ones require many repetitive operations to compute the full graph. In this paper, we propose a pattern-aware incremental execution approach and design the first streaming GPM accelerator called PSMiner, which integrates multiple optimizations to reduce redundant computation and improve computing efficiency. We have conducted extensive experiments. The results show that compared with the state-of-the-art software and hardware solutions, PSMiner achieves the average speedups of 770.9× and 60.4×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 流式图模式挖掘（GPM）已广泛应用于许多应用领域。然而，现有的流式 GPM 解决方案遭受了许多不必要的探索和同构测试，而现有的静态 GPM 解决方案需要许多重复操作来计算完整的图。在本文中，我们提出了一种模式感知增量执行方法，并设计了第一个名为 PSMiner 的流式 GPM 加速器，它集成了多种优化来减少冗余计算并提高计算效率。我们进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与最先进的软件和硬件解决方案相比，PSMiner 的平均加速分别为 770.9 倍和 60.4 倍。

papers.title: PTStore: Lightweight Architectural Support for Page Table Isolation.
papers.abstract: Page tables are critical data structures in kernels, serving as the trust base of most mitigation solutions. Their integrity is thus crucial but is often taken for granted. Existing page table protection solutions usually provide insufficient security guarantees, require heavy hardware, or introduce high overheads. In this paper, we present a novel lightweight hardware-software co-design solution, PTStore, consisting of a secure region storing page tables and tokens verifying page table pointers. Evaluation results on FPGA-based prototypes show that PTStore only introduces <0.92% hardware overheads and <0.86% performance overheads, but provides strong security guarantees, showing that PTStore is efficient and effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 页表是内核中的关键数据结构，是大多数缓解解决方案的信任基础。因此，他们的诚信至关重要，但往往被视为理所当然。现有的页表保护解决方案通常无法提供足够的安全保障，需要大量硬件，或者引入较高的开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级硬件-软件协同设计解决方案 PTStore，它由存储页表和验证页表指针的令牌的安全区域组成。基于FPGA原型的评估结果表明，PTStore仅引入<0.92%的硬件开销和<0.86%的性能开销，但提供了强大的安全保证，表明PTStore是高效且有效的。

papers.title: PUFFER: A Routability-Driven Placement Framework via Cell Padding with Multiple Features and Strategy Exploration.
papers.abstract: Placement is a critical stage in VLSI physical design, especially for routability optimization. Due to the large scale and high integration introduced by the advanced semiconductor manufacturing technology, there remains a significant challenge in routability in the placement stage, which will affect the subsequent routing process. This paper proposes a placement framework, called PUFFER, to optimize routability by cell padding and strategy exploration. The framework first estimates congestion by imitating the behaviors of routing detours and clustered cell spreading. Then it calculates cell padding based on multiple features inspired by the characteristics of convolutional and graph neural networks. Besides, it applies a Bayesian-based method to explore a better placement strategy. Compared with a commercial tool and the state-of-the-art academic RePlAce placer, experiments on industrial benchmarks show that our framework achieves the best routability on average, with a 2.7× speedup over the commercial tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局是 VLSI 物理设计中的关键阶段，特别是对于可布线性优化而言。由于先进半导体制造技术带来的大规模和高集成度，在布局阶段的可布线性仍然存在重大挑战，这将影响后续的布线工艺。本文提出了一种名为 PUFFER 的布局框架，通过单元填充和策略探索来优化可路由性。该框架首先通过模仿路由绕行和集群小区扩散的行为来估计拥塞情况。然后，它根据受卷积和图神经网络特征启发的多个特征计算单元格填充。此外，它应用基于贝叶斯的方法来探索更好的放置策略。与商业工具和最先进的学术 RePlAce 布局器相比，工业基准测试表明，我们的框架平均实现了最佳的可路由性，比商业工具加速了 2.7 倍。

papers.title: PUMICE: Processing-using-Memory Integration with a Scalar Pipeline for Symbiotic Execution.
papers.abstract: Existing SIMD extensions in scalar CPUs (e.g., SSE, AVX, etc.) can leverage instruction-level parallelism (ILP) because of their tight integration with the CPU pipeline. However, the vectors they employ are quite short, and this limits their ability to exploit data-level parallelism (DLP). On the other hand, processing-using-memory (PUM) accelerators are capable of exploiting massive amounts of DLP, as they typically perform computation on very long vectors (tens of thousands of elements) within the memory itself. Recent work demonstrates that order-of-magnitude speedups can be achieved by these architectures for a variety of workloads over area-equivalent multicore CPUs with SIMD extensions. Still, PUM architectures are largely decoupled from the CPU itself, thereby limiting their ability to tap the CPU’s ILP the way SIMD extensions do.In this paper, we propose PUMICE, a tightly integrated CPU-PUM architecture that simultaneously exploits DLP and ILP for very long vector operations. As a result of this tight integration, PUMICE delivers significant performance gains: Our experimental results show speedups of up to 2.2× (1.4× on average) over a state-of-the-art decoupled approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 标量 CPU 中现有的 SIMD 扩展（例如 SSE、AVX 等）可以利用指令级并行性 (ILP)，因为它们与 CPU 管道紧密集成。然而，他们使用的向量非常短，这限制了他们利用数据级并行性（DLP）的能力。另一方面，使用内存处理 (PUM) 加速器能够利用大量 DLP，因为它们通常在内存本身内的非常长的向量（数万个元素）上执行计算。最近的工作表明，这些架构可以在具有 SIMD 扩展的面积等效多核 CPU 上实现各种工作负载的数量级加速。尽管如此，PUM 架构在很大程度上与 CPU 本身解耦，从而限制了它们以 SIMD 扩展的方式利用 CPU ILP 的能力。在本文中，我们提出了 PUMICE，这是一种紧密集成的 CPU-PUM 架构，可同时利用 DLP 和 ILP 进行超长向量运算。由于这种紧密集成，PUMICE 带来了显着的性能提升：我们的实验结果显示，与最先进的解耦方法相比，速度提升高达 2.2 倍（平均 1.4 倍）。

papers.title: PVC-RAM:Process Variation Aware Charge Domain In-Memory Computing 6T-SRAM for DNNs.
papers.abstract: This work introduces PVC-RAM, a process variation aware in-memory computing (IMC) static random-access memory (SRAM) macro designed for efficient convolutional neural network (CNN) inference. PVC-RAM is a charge-domain based compact IMC and is the first fully analog IMC for 4b-weights/4b-inputs MAC operation for deep neural networks in 6T-SRAM to the best of our knowledge. Further, PVC-RAM fully computes 4-bit MAC in the analog domain and requires fewer invocations of the ADCs. Implemented in 28nm technology, PVC-RAM achieves a bitwise throughput of 6964.48 TOPS, which is 1.5× higher than the SOTA, and a bitwise energy efficiency of 75.12 TOPS/W, which is 1.3× higher than the SOTA.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 PVC-RAM，这是一种过程变化感知内存计算 (IMC) 静态随机存取存储器 (SRAM) 宏，专为高效卷积神经网络 (CNN) 推理而设计。 PVC-RAM 是一种基于电荷域的紧凑型 IMC，据我们所知，它是第一个用于 6T-SRAM 中深度神经网络的 4b 权重/4b 输入 MAC 操作的全模拟 IMC。此外，PVC-RAM 在模拟域中完全计算 4 位 MAC，并且需要更少的 ADC 调用。 PVC-RAM采用28nm技术实现，按位吞吐量为6964.48 TOPS，比SOTA高1.5倍，按位能效为75.12 TOPS/W，比SOTA高1.3倍。

papers.title: Quixote: Improving Fidelity of Quantum Program by Independent Execution of Controlled Gates.
papers.abstract: NISQ (noisy intermediate-scale quantum) computers are vulnerable to errors, which limit the size of verifiable quantum circuits. For large quantum circuits, it is more difficult to obtain reliable results due to errors. A circuit partitioning approach can improve fidelity by separating and reducing the size of circuits processed at once in NISQ devices. In this paper, we propose Quixote (quantum independent execution architecture), that can execute quantum circuits independently as subcircuits to improve the fidelity of NISQ program results. We present methods for decomposing controlled gates into independent subcircuits and additional techniques for reducing circuit costs through identical gate transformation.
papers.abstract_zh: NISQ（嘈杂的中级量子）计算机很容易出错，这限制了可验证量子电路的大小。对于大型量子电路，由于误差而更难以获得可靠的结果。电路分区方法可以通过分离和减小 NISQ 设备中同时处理的电路的大小来提高保真度。在本文中，我们提出了 Quixote（量子独立执行架构），它可以将量子电路作为子电路独立执行，以提高 NISQ 程序结果的保真度。我们提出了将受控门分解为独立子电路的方法以及通过相同的门变换降低电路成本的附加技术。

papers.title: R-TOSS: A Framework for Real-Time Object Detection using Semi-Structured Pruning.
papers.abstract: Object detectors used in autonomous vehicles can have high memory and computational overheads. In this paper, we introduce a novel semi-structured pruning framework called R-TOSS that overcomes the shortcomings of state-of-the-art model pruning techniques. Experimental results on the JetsonTX2 platform show that R-TOSS has a compression rate of 4.4× on the YOLOv5 object detector with a 2.15× speedup in inference time and 57.01% decrease in energy usage. R-TOSS also enables 2.89× compression on RetinaNet with a 1.86× speedup in inference time and 56.31% decrease in energy usage. We also demonstrate significant improvements compared to various state-of-the-art pruning techniques.
