papers.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆中使用的物体检测器可能具有较高的内存和计算开销。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 R-TOSS 的新型半结构化剪枝框架，它克服了最先进的模型剪枝技术的缺点。 JetsonTX2平台上的实验结果表明，R-TOSS在YOLOv5目标检测器上的压缩率为4.4倍，推理时间加速2.15倍，能耗降低57.01%。 R-TOSS 还在 RetinaNet 上实现了 2.89 倍压缩，推理时间加速 1.86 倍，能源使用量减少 56.31%。与各种最先进的修剪技术相比，我们还展示了显着的改进。

papers.title: Range-Invariant Approximation of Non-Linear Operations for Efficient BERT Fine-Tuning.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a range-invariant approximation of non-linear operations for training computations of Transformer-based large language models. The proposed method decomposes the approximation into the scaling and the range-invariant resolution for LUT approximation, covering diverse data ranges of non-linear operations with drastically reduced LUT entries during task-dependent BERT fine-tuning. We demonstrate that the proposed method robustly approximates all the non-linear operations of BERT without score degradation on challenging GLUE benchmarks using only a single-entry LUT, facilitating 52% area savings in hardware implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种非线性运算的范围不变近似，用于基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型的训练计算。该方法将近似分解为 LUT 近似的缩放和范围不变分辨率，在任务相关的 BERT 微调过程中，通过大幅减少 LUT 条目，覆盖非线性操作的不同数据范围。我们证明，所提出的方法仅使用单条目 LUT 即可稳健地逼近 BERT 的所有非线性操作，且在具有挑战性的 GLUE 基准测试中得分不会下降，从而在硬件实现中节省了 52% 的面积。

papers.title: Reaction Time Analysis of Event-Triggered Processing Chains with Data Refreshing.
papers.abstract: Many real-time systems process and react to external events by a chain of tasks, and have constraints on the maximum reaction time which describes how long it takes to respond to an external event. While a processing chain typically starts with a sampling task periodically triggered to sample the sensor data, other tasks in the chain could be triggered in two different ways: event-triggered or time-triggered, which have their own pros and cons. In this paper, we propose the third option to trigger the processing tasks in a chain, namely, the event-triggered with data refreshing approach, which combines the benefits of the event-triggered or time-triggered approaches. As the main technical contribution, we develop techniques to formally upper-bound its maximum reaction time and analytically compare it with the existing approaches. Experiments with synthetic workload are conducted to show the performance improvement by our proposed techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多实时系统通过一系列任务来处理和响应外部事件，并且对最大反应时间有限制，该最大反应时间描述了响应外部事件需要多长时间。虽然处理链通常以定期触发的采样任务开始，以对传感器数据进行采样，但链中的其他任务可以通过两种不同的方式触发：事件触发或时间触发，这两种方式各有利弊。在本文中，我们提出了触发链中处理任务的第三种选择，即事件触发和数据刷新方法，它结合了事件触发或时间触发方法的优点。作为主要的技术贡献，我们开发了正式限制其最大反应时间的技术，并将其与现有方法进行分析比较。进行了合成工作负载的实验，以显示我们提出的技术的性能改进。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning-Assisted Management for Convertible SSDs.
papers.abstract: Convertible SSDs, which allow flash cells to convert between different types of flash cells (e.g., SLC/MLC/TLC/QLC), are designed for achieving both high performance and high density. However, previous designs with two types of flash cells encounter a performance cliff degradation once the flash cells of single bit mode are consumed. In this work, we propose a novel level-based convertible SSD (e.g., including SLC-MLC-QLC), named RL-cSSD, that adopts an intermediate layer (e.g., MLC) as a performance cushion. A reinforcement learning-assisted device management scheme is designed to coordinate the data allocation, garbage collection and flash conversion processes considering both the SSD internal status and workload patterns. We evaluated RL-cSSD with various real-world workloads based on simulation. The experimental results show that the proposed RL-cSSD provides 72.98% higher performance on average compared with state-of-the-art schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 可转换 SSD 允许闪存单元在不同类型的闪存单元（例如 SLC/MLC/TLC/QLC）之间转换，旨在实现高性能和高密度。然而，先前具有两种类型闪存单元的设计一旦耗尽单位模式的闪存单元就会遇到性能悬崖下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新型的基于级别的可转换SSD（例如，包括SLC-MLC-QLC），称为RL-cSSD，它采用中间层（例如MLC）作为性能缓冲。强化学习辅助设备管理方案旨在协调数据分配、垃圾收集和闪存转换过程，同时考虑 SSD 内部状态和工作负载模式。我们基于模拟使用各种实际工作负载评估了 RL-cSSD。 The experimental results show that the proposed RL-cSSD provides 72.98% higher performance on average compared with state-of-the-art schemes.

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning-based Analog Circuit Optimizer using gm/ID for Sizing.
papers.abstract: Designing analog circuits incurs high time costs because designers must consider numerous design variables or trade-off relationships of circuit performance based on a lot of knowledge and experience. To reduce design time, various machine learning methods have been used to optimize analog circuits by learning the correlation between the device size and the circuit performance. However, it is difficult to train the correlation because of its high non-linearity and wide design space. In this paper, this study proposes a new framework to optimize analog circuit designs by combining reinforcement learning (RL) and the sensitivity analysis with g<inf>m</inf>/I<inf>D</inf> sizing, which is more intuitive for interpreting circuit performance. Furthermore, the universal value function approximator (UVFA), previously proposed in RL, is modified more simply to make it easier to find the target design. Additionally, the dataset is rearranged and sampled by the criteria that are established based on the principle of circuit operation, which helps to orient the agent to learn the circuit operation. Using the proposed methods, we optimize three types of differential amplifiers with common mode feedback circuits and obtain the best circuit design. Compared to baseline, we find the optimal point using modified UVFA, and moreover, reduce the number of iterations by 42.2%, 39.5%, and 37.5%, respectively, for the three test cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计模拟电路会产生很高的时间成本，因为设计人员必须基于大量的知识和经验来考虑众多的设计变量或电路性能的权衡关系。为了减少设计时间，已经使用各种机器学习方法通​​过学习器件尺寸和电路性能之间的相关性来优化模拟电路。然而，由于其高度非线性和广泛的设计空间，很难训练相关性。在本文中，本研究提出了一种新的框架，通过将强化学习（RL）和灵敏度分析与 g<inf>m</inf>/I<inf>D</inf> 尺寸相结合来优化模拟电路设计，这对于解释电路性能更加直观。此外，之前在强化学习中提出的通用价值函数逼近器（UVFA）经过更简单的修改，以便更容易找到目标设计。此外，根据电路操作原理建立的标准对数据集进行重新排列和采样，这有助于指导智能体学习电路操作。使用所提出的方法，我们优化了三种类型的具有共模反馈电路的差分放大器，并获得了最佳电路设计。与基线相比，我们使用改进的 UVFA 找到了最佳点，并且对于三个测试用例分别减少了 42.2%、39.5% 和 37.5% 的迭代次数。

papers.title: ReRAM-based graph attention network with node-centric edge searching and hamming similarity.
papers.abstract: The graph attention network (GAT) has demonstrated its advantages via local attention mechanism but suffered from low energy and latency efficiency when implemented on conventional von-Neumann hardware. This work proposes and experimentally demonstrates an algorithm-hardware co-designed GAT that runs efficiently and reliably in ReRAM-based hardware. The neighborhood information is retrieved from trained node embeddings stored on crossbars in a single time step, and attention is implemented by efficient hashing and hamming similarity for higher robustness. Our scaled simulation based on the experimentally-validated model shows only 0.9% accuracy loss with over 35,500x energy improvement on the Cora dataset compared with GPU, and 1.1% accuracy improvement with 2× energy improvement compared with state-of-the-art ReRAM-based GNN accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 图注意力网络（GAT）通过局部注意力机制展示了其优势，但在传统的冯诺依曼硬件上实现时存在能量低和延迟效率低的问题。这项工作提出并通过实验演示了一种算法-硬件共同设计的 GAT，它可以在基于 ReRAM 的硬件中高效可靠地运行。邻域信息是在单个时间步长中从存储在交叉开关上的经过训练的节点嵌入中检索的，并且通过有效的散列和汉明相似度来实现注意力以实现更高的鲁棒性。我们基于实验验证模型的扩展模拟显示，与 GPU 相比，Cora 数据集上的精度损失仅为 0.9%，能量提高了 35,500 倍；与最先进的基于 ReRAM 的 GNN 加速器相比，精度提高了 1.1%，能量提高了 2 倍。

papers.title: RESPECT: Reinforcement Learning based Edge Scheduling on Pipelined Coral Edge TPUs.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have substantial computational and memory requirements, and the compilation of its computational graphs has a great impact on the performance of resource-constrained (e.g., computation, I/O, and memory-bound) edge computing systems. While efficient execution of their computational graph requires an effective scheduling algorithm, generating the optimal scheduling solution is a challenging NP-hard problem. Furthermore, the complexity of scheduling DNN computational graphs will further increase on pipelined multi-core systems considering memory communication cost, as well as the increasing size of DNNs. Using the synthetic graph for the training dataset, this work presents a reinforcement learning (RL) based scheduling framework RESPECT, which learns the behaviors of optimal optimization algorithms and generates near-optimal scheduling results with short solving runtime overhead. Our framework has demonstrated up to ∼ 2.5 × real-world on-chip inference runtime speedups over the commercial compiler with ten popular ImageNet models deployed on the physical Coral Edge TPUs system. Moreover, compared to the exact optimization methods, the proposed RL scheduling improves the scheduling optimization runtime by up to 683× speedups compared to the commercial compiler and matches the exact optimal solutions with up to 930× speedups. Finally, we perform a comprehensive generalizability test, which demonstrates RESPECT successfully imitates optimal solving behaviors from small synthetic graphs to large real-world DNNs computational graphs.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）具有大量的计算和内存要求，其计算图的编译对资源受限（例如计算、I/O 和内存限制）边缘计算系统的性能有很大影响。虽然计算图的高效执行需要有效的调度算法，但生成最优调度解决方案是一个具有挑战性的 NP 难题。此外，考虑到内存通信成本以及 DNN 大小的增加，在流水线多核系统上调度 DNN 计算图的复杂性将进一步增加。使用训练数据集的合成图，这项工作提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的调度框架 RESPECT，它学习最优优化算法的行为，并以较短的求解运行时间开销生成接近最优的调度结果。我们的框架在物理 Coral Edge TPU 系统上部署了 10 个流行的 ImageNet 模型，与商业编译器相比，实际片上推理运行时速度提高了约 2.5 倍。此外，与精确优化方法相比，所提出的 RL 调度与商业编译器相比，将调度优化运行时间提高了高达 683 倍的加速，并以高达 930 倍的加速匹配精确最优解。最后，我们进行了全面的泛化性测试，证明 RESPECT 成功模仿了从小型合成图到大型现实世界 DNN 计算图的最佳求解行为。

papers.title: Response Time Analysis and Optimization of DAG Tasks Exploiting Mutually Exclusive Execution.
papers.abstract: There is an increasing move towards implementing embedded real-time systems upon multiprocessors with parallel applications, which are usually modeled as Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs). Plentiful work has been presented to optimize the bound of Worst-Case Response Time (WCRT) since the cornerstone work proposed by Graham in 1969. However, all these works are developed on the basis of Graham’s bound and failed to tackle the root of pessimism in it. In this work, we present a novel method to optimize the WCRT bound of a DAG task by designing mutually exclusive groups so that a sequential execution is enforced for some nodes, under which the problem of bounding WCRT becomes a problem of identifying a mutually exclusive path and thus does not suffer the pessimism in Graham’s bound. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our method against other WCRT optimization approaches in the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们越来越倾向于在具有并行应用程序的多处理器上实现嵌入式实时系统，这些系统通常建模为有向无环图 (DAG)。自Graham于1969年提出基石工作以来，已经提出了大量的工作来优化最坏情况响应时间（WCRT）的界限。然而，所有这些工作都是在Graham的界限的基础上发展起来的，未能解决其中悲观主义的根源。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过设计互斥组来优化 DAG 任务的 WCRT 边界的新方法，以便对某些节点强制执行顺序执行，在这种方法下，边界 WCRT 的问题变成了识别互斥路径的问题，因此不会遭受格雷厄姆边界中的悲观主义。进行实验是为了评估我们的方法相对于其他最先进的 WCRT 优化方法的性能。

papers.title: Restructure-Tolerant Timing Prediction via Multimodal Fusion.
papers.abstract: Fast and accurate pre-routing timing prediction is crucial in the very-large-scale integration (VLSI) design flow. Existing machine learning (ML)-assisted pre-routing timing evaluators neglect the impact of timing optimization, which may render their approaches impractical in real circuit design flows. To model the impact of timing optimization, we propose an endpoint embedding framework that integrates netlist-layout information via multimodal fusion. An end-to-end flow is further developed for pre-routing restructure-tolerant prediction on global timing metrics. Comprehensive experiments on large-scale RISC-V designs with advanced 7-nm technology node demonstrate the superiority of our model compared to the SOTA pre-routing timing evaluators.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测在超大规模集成 (VLSI) 设计流程中至关重要。现有的机器学习 (ML) 辅助预布线时序评估器忽略了时序优化的影响，这可能导致其方法在实际电路设计流程中不切实际。为了模拟时序优化的影响，我们提出了一种端点嵌入框架，该框架通过多模式融合集成网表布局信息。进一步开发了端到端流程，用于全局时序指标的预路由重组容忍预测。采用先进 7 nm 技术节点的大规模 RISC-V 设计的综合实验证明了我们的模型相对于 SOTA 预路由时序评估器的优越性。

papers.title: Rethinking AIG Resynthesis in Parallel.
papers.abstract: The efficiency issue of logic optimization becomes critical as the scale of VLSI designs grows. Since various algorithms are interleaved during optimization to ensure quality, it is necessary to accelerate those commonly used algorithms for obtaining substantial total speed-up. This paper proposes novel parallel algorithms for AIG refactoring and AND-balancing. Equipped with delicately designed parallel-friendly, data-race-free frameworks and GPU data structures, our algorithms obtain significant speed-up and enable the resyn2 sequence to be fully GPU-parallelized when combined with GPU rewriting. Experiments show that on large AIGs, we achieve average accelerations up to 45.9×over ABC with comparable or better qualities.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 VLSI 设计规模的增长，逻辑优化的效率问题变得至关重要。由于优化期间各种算法交织在一起以确保质量，因此有必要对那些常用算法进行加速以获得显着的总加速比。本文提出了用于 AIG 重构和 AND 平衡的新型并行算法。凭借精心设计的并行友好、无数据竞争的框架和 GPU 数据结构，我们的算法获得了显着的加速，并使 resyn2 序列在与 GPU 重写相结合时能够完全 GPU 并行。实验表明，在大型 AIG 上，我们的平均加速度比 ABC 提高了 45.9 倍，且质量相当或更好。

papers.title: Rethinking Programming Frameworks for In-Storage Processing.
papers.abstract: In-storage processing (ISP) is the most commercialized implementation of the near-data processing (NDP) model that executes tasks near their storage locations. However, programming ISP devices is complicated as it requires programmers to work closely with the underlying hardware, and even highly-optimized code can easily lead to suboptimal performance.This paper introduces ActivePy. ActivePy makes the programmer completely agnostic to ISP hardware. ActivePy automatically, transpartently, and dynamically generates high-performance code to balance system-wide trade-offs and max-imize the benefits of ISP. Our real system implementation shows that ActivePy can use ISP as efficiently as conventional C-based frameworks.
papers.abstract_zh: 存储内处理 (ISP) 是近数据处理 (NDP) 模型最商业化的实现，它在存储位置附近执行任务。然而，ISP设备的编程很复杂，因为它需要程序员与底层硬件紧密合作，即使是高度优化的代码也很容易导致性能不佳。本文介绍了ActivePy。 ActivePy 使程序员完全不知道 ISP 硬件。 ActivePy 自动、透明、动态地生成高性能代码，以平衡系统范围的权衡并最大限度地发挥 ISP 的优势。我们的真实系统实现表明，ActivePy 可以像传统的基于 C 的框架一样有效地使用 ISP。

papers.title: Return-to-Non-Secure Vulnerabilities on ARM Cortex-M TrustZone: Attack and Defense.
papers.abstract: ARM Cortex-M is one of the most popular microcontroller architectures designed for embedded and Internet of Things (IoT) applications. To facilitate efficient execution, it has some unique hardware optimization. In particular, Cortex-M TrustZone has a fast state switch mechanism that allows direct control-flow transfer from the secure state program to the non-secure state userspace program. In this paper, we demonstrate how this fast state switch mechanism can be exploited for arbitrary code execution with escalated privilege in the non-secure state by introducing a new exploitation technique, namely return-to-non-secure (ret2ns). We experimentally confirmed the feasibility of four variants of ret2ns attacks on two Cortex-M hardware systems. To defend against ret2ns attacks, we design two address sanitizing mechanisms that have negligible performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: ARM Cortex-M 是最流行的微控制器架构之一，专为嵌入式和物联网 (IoT) 应用而设计。为了促进高效执行，它有一些独特的硬件优化。特别是，Cortex-M TrustZone 具有快速状态切换机制，允许从安全状态程序到非安全状态用户空间程序的直接控制流传输。在本文中，我们通过引入一种新的利用技术，即返回非安全（ret2ns），演示了如何利用这种快速状态切换机制在非安全状态下以升级的权限执行任意代码。我们通过实验证实了 ret2ns 攻击的四种变体对两个 Cortex-M 硬件系统的可行性。为了防御 ret2ns 攻击，我们设计了两种性能开销可以忽略不计的地址清理机制。

papers.title: RL-CCD: Concurrent Clock and Data Optimization using Attention-Based Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Concurrent Clock and Data (CCD) optimization is a well-adopted approach in modern commercial tools that resolves timing violations using a mixture of clock skewing and delay fixing strategies. However, existing CCD algorithms are flawed. Particularly, they fail to prioritize violating endpoints for different optimization strategies correctly, leading to flow-wise globally sub-optimal results. In this paper, we overcome this issue by presenting RL-CCD, a Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent that selects endpoints for useful skew prioritization using the proposed EP-GNN, an endpoint-oriented Graph Neural Network (GNN) model, and a Transformer-based self-supervised attention mechanism. Experimental results on 19 industrial designs in 5 − 12nm technologies demonstrate that RL-CCD achieves up to 64% Total Negative Slack (TNS) reduction and 66.5% number of violating endpoints (NVE) improvement over the native implementation of a commercial tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 并发时钟和数据 (CCD) 优化是现代商业工具中广泛采用的方法，它结合使用时钟偏差和延迟修复策略来解决时序违规问题。然而，现有的 CCD 算法存在缺陷。特别是，他们无法正确地优先考虑不同优化策略的违规端点，从而导致流程方面的全局次优结果。在本文中，我们通过提出 RL-CCD 来克服这个问题，这是一种强化学习（RL）代理，它使用所提出的 EP-GNN、面向端点的图神经网络（GNN）模型和基于 Transformer 的自监督注意力机制来选择有用的倾斜优先级的端点。采用 5 – 12 纳米技术的 19 种工业设计的实验结果表明，与商业工具的本机实现相比，RL-CCD 的总负裕度 (TNS) 减少量高达 64%，违规端点数 (NVE) 改善量达 66.5%。

papers.title: RL-MUL: Multiplier Design Optimization with Deep Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Multiplication is a fundamental operation in many applications, and multipliers are widely adopted in various circuits. However, optimizing multipliers is challenging and non-trivial due to the huge design space. In this paper, we propose RL-MUL, a multiplier design optimization framework based on reinforcement learning. Specifically, we utilize matrix and tensor representations for the compressor tree of a multiplier, based on which the convolutional neural networks can be seamlessly incorporated as the agent network. The agent can learn to adjust the multiplier structure based on a Pareto-driven reward which is customized to accommodate the trade-off between area and delay. Experiments are conducted on different bit widths of multipliers. The results demonstrate that the multipliers produced by RL-MUL dominate all baseline designs in terms of both area and delay. The performance gain of RL-MUL is further validated by comparing the area and delay of processing element arrays using multipliers from RL-MUL and baseline approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 乘法是许多应用中的基本运算，乘法器广泛应用于各种电路中。然而，由于设计空间巨大，优化乘法器具有挑战性且并非易事。在本文中，我们提出了 RL-MUL，一种基于强化学习的乘法器设计优化框架。具体来说，我们利用矩阵和张量表示来表示乘法器的压缩树，基于此，卷积神经网络可以无缝地合并为代理网络。代理可以学习根据帕累托驱动的奖励来调整乘数结构，该奖励是定制的以适应面积和延迟之间的权衡。对不同位宽的乘法器进行了实验。结果表明，RL-MUL 产生的乘法器在面积和延迟方面主导了所有基线设计。通过使用 RL-MUL 乘法器和基线方法比较处理元件阵列的面积和延迟，进一步验证了 RL-MUL 的性能增益。

papers.title: RLAlloc: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-Assisted Resource Allocation Framework for Enhanced Both I/O Throughput and QoS Performance of Multi-Streamed SSDs.
papers.abstract: Multi-streamed Solid-State Disks (SSDs) have attracted increasing adoption in modern flash storage devices. Despite their excellent promise, effective flash resource allocation is still limiting both their achievable I/O performance and practical implementation. To this end, we develop the first-of-its-kind framework dubbed RLAlloc, which for the first time demonstrates deep Reinforcement Learning-assisted resource Allocation for boosting both I/O throughput and QoS performance of multi-streamed SSDs. Extensive experiments consistently validate the effectiveness of RLAlloc, improving up to 39.9% on I/O throughput and 44.0% on QoS performance over the state-of-the-art competitors.
papers.abstract_zh: 多流固态磁盘 (SSD) 在现代闪存存储设备中的应用越来越广泛。尽管它们有着出色的前景，但有效的闪存资源分配仍然限制了它们可实现的 I/O 性能和实际实施。为此，我们开发了名为 RLAlloc 的首个框架，该框架首次展示了深度强化学习辅助资源分配，可提高多流 SSD 的 I/O 吞吐量和 QoS 性能。大量实验一致验证了 RLAlloc 的有效性，与最先进的竞争对手相比，I/O 吞吐量提高了 39.9%，QoS 性能提高了 44.0%。

papers.title: RMP-MEM: A HW/SW Reconfigurable Multi-Port Memory Architecture for Multi-PEA Oriented CGRA.
papers.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Architecture (CGRA), especially the one with multiple parallelized Processing Element Arrays (PEA), possesses flexible programmability and high parallel computational efficiency, which relies upon an efficient memory architecture to deliver the corresponding computing power. Multi-PEA oriented CGRA allows for mapping various applications and thus demands a flexible memory to adapt to the ever-changing workloads, whose parallel access also requires an efficient multi-port memory. However, the existing memory designs for CGRA are hard to satisfy those requirements since conventional rigid memories fail to provide the desired flexibility due to fixed structure, and traditional multi-port designs are impractical due to large overhead. Therefore, this paper proposes a hardware/software (HW/SW) hybrid reconfigurable multi-port memory architecture (RMP-MEM) with an instructive analysis for the multi-PEA oriented CGRA. RMP-MEM supports adaptive memory partition and programmer-defined access modes to adapt the different features of memory accesses. Also, RMP-MEM achieves an efficient multi-port implementation by a partially shared mechanism. Furthermore, the microarchitecture of RMP-MEM is optimized multi-directionally, resulting in a significant performance gain. The experimental results indicate that RMP-MEM reduces the parallel access latency by 81.1% and exhibits 28.3% energy efficiency improvement compared to prior designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA），尤其是具有多个并行处理单元阵列（PEA）的架构，具有灵活的可编程性和较高的并行计算效率，依赖于高效的内存架构来提供相应的计算能力。面向多PEA的CGRA允许映射各种应用程序，因此需要灵活的内存来适应不断变化的工作负载，其并行访问也需要高效的多端口内存。然而，现有的 CGRA 存储器设计很难满足这些要求，因为传统的刚性存储器由于结构固定而无法提供所需的灵活性，并且传统的多端口设计由于开销较大而不切实际。因此，本文提出了一种硬件/软件（HW/SW）混合可重构多端口内存架构（RMP-MEM），并对面向多 PEA 的 CGRA 进行了有益的分析。 RMP-MEM支持自适应内存分区和程序员定义的访问模式，以适应内存访问的不同特性。此外，RMP-MEM 通过部分共享机制实现了高效的多端口实现。此外，RMP-MEM 的微架构经过多方位优化，带来了显着的性能增益。实验结果表明，与现有设计相比，RMP-MEM 将并行访问延迟降低了 81.1%，能效提高了 28.3%。

papers.title: Robust Tickets Can Transfer Better: Drawing More Transferable Subnetworks in Transfer Learning.
papers.abstract: Transfer learning leverages feature representations of deep neural networks (DNNs) pretrained on source tasks with rich data to empower effective finetuning on downstream tasks. However, the pre-trained models are often prohibitively large for delivering generalizable representations, which limits their deployment on edge devices with constrained resources. To close this gap, we propose a new transfer learning pipeline, which leverages our finding that robust tickets can transfer better, i.e., subnetworks drawn with properly induced adversarial robustness can win better transferability over vanilla lottery ticket subnetworks. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that our proposed transfer learning pipeline can achieve enhanced accuracy-sparsity trade-offs across both diverse downstream tasks and sparsity patterns, further enriching the lottery ticket hypothesis.
papers.abstract_zh: 迁移学习利用在具有丰富数据的源任务上预训练的深度神经网络 (DNN) 的特征表示，以实现对下游任务的有效微调。然而，预训练的模型通常对于提供可概括的表示来说太大，这限制了它们在资源有限的边缘设备上的部署。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种新的转移学习管道，它利用了我们的发现，即稳健的彩票可以更好地转移，即，通过适当诱导的对抗稳健性绘制的子网络可以比普通彩票子网络赢得更好的可转移性。大量的实验和消融研究验证了我们提出的迁移学习管道可以在不同的下游任务和稀疏模式之间实现增强的准确性-稀疏性权衡，进一步丰富了彩票假设。

papers.title: RoSE: Robust Analog Circuit Parameter Optimization with Sampling-Efficient Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Design automation of analog circuits has been a long-standing challenge in the integrated circuit field. Recently, multiple methods based on learning or optimization have demonstrated great promise in automating device sizing for analog circuits. However, they often ignore the strong susceptibility of analog circuits to process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations or suffer from low sampling efficiency to train algorithms. To address these critical limitations, this paper proposes RoSE, the first Robust analog circuit parameter optimization framework with high Sampling Efficience by synergistically combining Bayesian Optimization (BO) and reinforcement learning (RL). Its core is to use the fast convergence of BO to find an optimized starting point for the backbone RL agent to notably improve its sampling efficiency during the learning process. With this pre-optimization, we further leverage the RL’s superior optimization ability to achieve robust device sizing by incorporating sufficient features of PVT variations into the representation learning loop. Experimental results of our proposed method on exemplary circuits show 3.25×∼16× improvement of sampling efficiency and 6.8× ∼ 24× improvement of figure-of-merit (FoM, defined with design efficiency and design accuracy) as compared to prior methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 模拟电路的设计自动化一直是集成电路领域长期面临的挑战。最近，基于学习或优化的多种方法在自动化模拟电路器件尺寸调整方面展现出了巨大的前景。然而，他们经常忽视模拟电路对处理、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化的强烈敏感性，或者训练算法时采样效率低。为了解决这些关键限制，本文提出了 RoSE，这是第一个通过协同结合贝叶斯优化（BO）和强化学习（RL）来实现高采样效率的鲁棒模拟电路参数优化框架。其核心是利用BO的快速收敛为骨干强化学习代理找到一个优化的起点，以显着提高其学习过程中的采样效率。通过这种预优化，我们进一步利用 RL 的卓越优化能力，通过将 PVT 变化的足够特征纳入表示学习循环来实现稳健的设备尺寸调整。我们提出的方法在示例电路上的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，采样效率提高了 3.25×∼16×，品质因数（FoM，由设计效率和设计精度定义）提高了 6.8×∼24×。

papers.title: RQ-DNN: Reliable Quantization for Fault-tolerant Deep Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are deployed in many real-time and safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles and medical diagnosis. In such applications, quantization is used to compress the model for storage and computation reduction. However, recent research has shown that faults in memory can cause a significant drop in DNN accuracy and conventional quantization methods focus only on model compression. This paper proposes a novel method that performs model quantization while remarkably improving the fault-tolerance of the model. It can be incorporated with other hardware approaches such as Error Correcting Code to further improve fault-tolerance. The proposed method reduces possible error patterns that negatively impact classification accuracy by modifying weight distributions and applying a novel masking-based clipping function. Experimental results show that the proposed method enhances the fault-tolerance of the quantized DNN, which can tolerate 1803× higher bit error rates than the conventional method.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 部署在许多实时和安全关键的应用中，例如自动驾驶汽车和医疗诊断。在此类应用中，量化用于压缩模型以减少存储和计算。然而，最近的研究表明，内存故障会导致 DNN 精度显着下降，而传统的量化方法仅关注模型压缩。本文提出了一种执行模型量化的新方法，同时显着提高了模型的容错性。它可以与其他硬件方法（例如纠错码）结合使用，以进一步提高容错能力。该方法通过修改权重分布和应用一种新颖的基于掩码的裁剪函数，减少了可能对分类精度产生负面影响的错误模式。实验结果表明，该方法增强了量化DNN的容错能力，可以容忍比传统方法高1803倍的误码率。

papers.title: Rubick: A Synthesis Framework for Spatial Architectures via Dataflow Decomposition.
papers.abstract: Dataflows are critical for spatial architectures designed for tensor applications. Prior works develop various notations and hardware generation frameworks for dataflows. However, due to the semantic gap between notations and low-level details, analysis based on these notations cannot capture the detailed architectural features between different dataflows, so these works failed to provide architectural optimization and efficient design space exploration (DSE) at the same time.We propose Rubick, a synthesis framework for spatial architecture. Rubick decomposes the dataflow into two low-level intermediate representations including access entry and data layout. Access entry specifies how data enter into the PE arrays from memory, while data layout specifies how data are arranged and accessed. Based on this decomposition, Rubick provides efficient DSE and generates optimized hardware. Experiments show that the DSE time is accelerated by up to 1.1×10<sup>5</sup>X and performance on FPGA is improved by 13%.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据流对于为张量应用程序设计的空间架构至关重要。先前的工作为数据流开发了各种符号和硬件生成框架。然而，由于符号和低级细节之间的语义差距，基于这些符号的分析无法捕获不同数据流之间的详细架构特征，因此这些工作无法同时提供架构优化和高效的设计空间探索（DSE）。我们提出了 Rubick，一种空间架构的综合框架。 Rubick 将数据流分解为两个低级中间表示，包括访问入口和数据布局。访问入口指定数据如何从内存进入PE数组，而数据布局指定数据如何排列和访问。基于这种分解，Rubik提供了高效的DSE并生成优化的硬件。实验表明，DSE 时间加速了 1.1×10<sup>5</sup>X，FPGA 性能提高了 13%。

papers.title: Safe DNN-type Controller Synthesis for Nonlinear Systems via Meta Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: There is a pressing need to synthesize provable safety controllers for nonlinear systems as they are embedded in many safety-critical applications. In this paper, we propose a safe Meta Reinforcement Learning (Meta-RL) approach to synthesize deep neural network (DNN) controllers for nonlinear systems subject to safety constraints. Our approach incorporates two phases: Meta-RL for training the controller network, and formal safety verification based on polynomial optimization solving. In the training phase, we provide a training framework which pre-trains a unified meta-initial controller for control systems by meta-learning. An important benefit of the proposed Meta-RL approach lies in that it is much more effective and succeeds in more controller training tasks compared with existing typical RL methods, e.g., Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG). To formally verify the safety properties of the closed-loop system with the learned controller, we develop a verification procedure by using polynomial inclusion computation in combination with barrier certificate generation. Experiments on a set of benchmarks, including systems with dimension up to 12, demonstrate the effectiveness and applicability of our method.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于非线性系统嵌入到许多安全关键应用中，因此迫切需要为非线性系统合成可证明的安全控制器。在本文中，我们提出了一种安全的元强化学习（Meta-RL）方法来合成受安全约束的非线性系统的深度神经网络（DNN）控制器。我们的方法分为两个阶段：用于训练控制器网络的 Meta-RL 和基于多项式优化求解的形式安全验证。在训练阶段，我们提供了一个训练框架，通过元学习为控制系统预训练统一的元初始控制器。所提出的 Meta-RL 方法的一个重要好处在于，与现有的典型 RL 方法（例如深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG））相比，它在更多控制器训练任务中更加有效并且成功。为了正式验证具有学习控制器的闭环系统的安全属性，我们通过使用多项式包含计算与屏障证书生成相结合来开发验证程序。在一组基准（包括维度高达 12 的系统）上进行的实验证明了我们方法的有效性和适用性。

papers.title: SaGraph: A Similarity-aware Hardware Accelerator for Temporal Graph Processing.
papers.abstract: Temporal graph processing is used to handle the snapshots of the temporal graph, which concerns changes in graph over time. Although several software/hardware solutions have been designed for efficient temporal graph processing, they still suffer from serious irregular data access due to the uncoordinated graph traversal. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes SaGraph, a domain-specific hardware accelerator to support the efficient processing of temporal graph. Specifically, temporal graph processing shows strong data access similarity, i.e., most graph accesses of the processing of different snapshots are the same and usually refer to a small fraction of vertices. SaGraph can dynamically coordinate the graph traversals and adaptively cache the vertex states to fully exploit the data access similarity for smaller data access overhead. We implemented and evaluated SaGraph on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card. Compared with the cutting-edge software and hardware solutions, SaGraph achieves 8.5×-157.3×, 4.2×-16.1× speedups and 34.7×-423.6×, 5.3×-14.7× energy savings, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 时序图处理用于处理时序图的快照，涉及图随时间的变化。尽管已经设计了几种软件/硬件解决方案来实现高效的时态图处理，但由于不协调的图遍历，它们仍然遭受严重的不规则数据访问。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了 SaGraph，一种特定领域的硬件加速器，以支持时态图的高效处理。具体来说，时间图处理表现出很强的数据访问相似性，即不同快照处理的大多数图访问是相同的，并且通常涉及一小部分顶点。 SaGraph可以动态协调图的遍历并自适应地缓存顶点状态，以充分利用数据访问的相似性，从而实现更小的数据访问开销。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现并评估了 SaGraph。与前沿的软件和硬件解决方案相比，SaGraph分别实现了8.5×-157.3×、4.2×-16.1×的加速和34.7×-423.6×、5.3×-14.7×的节能。

papers.title: SCAGuard: Detection and Classification of Cache Side-Channel Attacks via Attack Behavior Modeling and Similarity Comparison.
papers.abstract: Cache side-channel attacks (CSCAs), capable of deducing secrets by analyzing timing differences in the shared cache behavior of modern processors, pose a serious security threat. While there are approaches for detecting CSCAs and mitigating information leaks, they either fail to detect and classify new variants or have to impractically update deployed systems (e.g., CPU). In this work, we propose a novel approach, named SCAGuard, to detect and classify CSCAs via attack behavior modeling and similarity comparison. Specifically, we introduce the notion of cache state transition enhanced basic block sequences (CST-BBSes) to model attack behaviors which is able to capture both attack-relevant syntactic code information and semantic cache information. We propose an approach to automatically construct CST-BBS models from binary programs. To detect and classify attacks, we adapt a dynamic time warping algorithm to compare the similarity of CST-BBSes between attack and target programs. We implement our approach in a tool SCAGuard and evaluate it using real-world attacks and diverse benign programs. The results confirm the effectiveness of our approach, compared over existing detection approaches. In particular, SCAGuard significantly outperforms the other detection approaches on new variants.
papers.abstract_zh: 缓存侧通道攻击 (CSCA) 能够通过分析现代处理器共享缓存行为的时序差异来推断秘密，构成了严重的安全威胁。虽然有一些方法可以检测 CSCA 和减轻信息泄漏，但它们要么无法检测新变体并对其进行分类，要么必须不切实际地更新已部署的系统（例如 CPU）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 SCAGuard 的新颖方法，通过攻击行为建模和相似性比较来检测和分类 CSCA。具体来说，我们引入了缓存状态转换增强基本块序列（CST-BBS）的概念来对攻击行为进行建模，该行为能够捕获与攻击相关的语法代码信息和语义缓存信息。我们提出了一种从二进制程序自动构建 CST-BBS 模型的方法。为了检测和分类攻击，我们采用动态时间扭曲算法来比较攻击程序和目标程序之间的 CST-BBS 的相似性。我们在 SCAGuard 工具中实施我们的方法，并使用现实世界的攻击和各种良性程序对其进行评估。与现有检测方法相比，结果证实了我们方法的有效性。特别是，SCAGuard 在新变体上的表现明显优于其他检测方法。

papers.title: Scalable Optimal Layout Synthesis for NISQ Quantum Processors.
papers.abstract: Due to its effect on the success rate of a quantum circuit, quantum layout synthesis is a crucial step for circuit compilation. As such, having a layout synthesis tool that provides high solution quality is important to maximize circuit performance and fidelity for NISQ application. Previous heuristic approaches have been shown to be far from optimal when evaluated on known-optimal benchmarks. Alternatively, exact layout synthesis tools can generate optimal results with the aid of constraint solvers but generally suffer from scalability issues because of inefficient encodings and slow optimization methods. In this paper, we propose a scalable optimal layout synthesis tool that improves upon previous works, through a more succinct problem formulation as well as better encoding techniques. Additionally, we implement a depth and SWAP count optimization feature that performs iterative refinement under a fixed time budget. Experimental results show that for depth optimization, our tool can achieve a 692× speedup over the state-of-the-art optimal layout synthesis, and for SWAP optimization, we can obtain a 6,957× speedup on average. Compared to a leading heuristic-based synthesizer, for depth optimization, we can solve circuits consisting of 54 program qubits and 1726 gates within 11 hours with an 18× depth reduction and by 12× SWAP count reduction on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于量子布局综合影响量子电路的成功率，因此量子布局综合是电路编译的关键步骤。因此，拥有一个提供高解决方案质量的布局综合工具对于最大限度地提高 NISQ 应用的电路性能和保真度非常重要。在已知的最佳基准上进行评估时，以前的启发式方法已被证明远非最佳。或者，精确布局综合工具可以借助约束求解器生成最佳结果，但由于编码效率低下和优化方法缓慢，通常会遇到可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的最佳布局综合工具，该工具通过更简洁的问题表述以及更好的编码技术来改进以前的工作。此外，我们还实现了深度和交换计数优化功能，可在固定时间预算下执行迭代细化。实验结果表明，对于深度优化，我们的工具可以比最先进的最佳布局综合实现 692 倍的加速，而对于 SWAP 优化，我们可以获得平均 6,957 倍的加速。与领先的基于启发式的合成器相比，对于深度优化，我们可以在 11 小时内解决由 54 个程序量子位和 1726 个门组成的电路，平均深度减少 18 倍，SWAP 计数减少 12 倍。

papers.title: SE3: Sequential Equivalence Checking for Non-Cycle-Accurate Design Transformations †.
papers.abstract: In high-level design explorations, many useful optimizations transform a circuit into another with different operating cycles for a better trade-off between performance and resource usage. How to efficiently check their equivalence is critical and challenging since most existing equivalence checkers are designed for cycle-accurate circuits. This paper presents SE3, an efficient sequential equivalence checker without assumption on cycle-accuracy, latch mapping, or I/O interface of the checked circuits. It proves the equivalence of two circuits by computing an equivalence relation between the states of the two circuits and utilizes syntax abstraction to accelerate this process. Experimental results show that SE3 is significantly faster than state-of-the-art sequential equivalence checking algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 在高级设计探索中，许多有用的优化将一个电路转换为具有不同操作周期的另一个电路，以便在性能和资源使用之间更好地权衡。如何有效地检查它们的等效性至关重要且具有挑战性，因为大多数现有的等效性检查器都是针对周期精确电路而设计的。本文提出了 SE3，一种高效的顺序等价检查器，无需对被检查电路的周期精度、锁存器映射或 I/O 接口进行假设。它通过计算两个电路状态之间的等价关系来证明两个电路的等价性，并利用语法抽象来加速这个过程。实验结果表明，SE3 明显快于最先进的顺序等价检查算法。

papers.title: Seeking the Yield Barrier: High-Dimensional SRAM Evaluation Through Optimal Manifold.
papers.abstract: Being able to efficiently obtain an accurate estimate of the failure probability of SRAM components has become a central issue as model circuits shrink their scale to submicrometer with advanced technology nodes. In this work, we revisit the classic norm minimization method. We then generalize it with infinite components and derive the novel optimal manifold concept, which bridges the surrogate-based and importance sampling (IS) yield estimation methods. We then derive a sub-optimal manifold, optimal hypersphere, which leads to an efficient sampling method being aware of the failure boundary called onion sampling. Finally, we use a neural coupling flow (which learns from samples like a surrogate model) as the IS proposal distribution. These combinations give rise to a novel yield estimation method, named Optimal Manifold Important Sampling (OPTIMIS), which keeps the advantages of the surrogate and IS methods to deliver state-of-the-art performance with robustness and consistency, with up to 3.5x in efficiency and 3x in accuracy over the best of SOTA methods in High-dimensional SRAM evaluation.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着模型电路通过先进技术节点将其尺寸缩小到亚微米，能够有效地准确估计 SRAM 组件的故障概率已成为一个中心问题。在这项工作中，我们重新审视经典的范数最小化方法。然后，我们用无限分量对其进行概括，并推导出新颖的最优流形概念，该概念将基于替代的方法和重要性采样（IS）产量估计方法联系起来。然后，我们推导出一个次优流形，即最优超球面，这导致了一种能够识别故障边界的有效采样方法，称为洋葱采样。最后，我们使用神经耦合流（从代理模型等样本中学习）作为 IS 提议分布。这些组合产生了一种新颖的良率估计方法，称为最佳流形重要采样 (OPTIMIS)，该方法保留了替代方法和 IS 方法的优点，以鲁棒性和一致性提供最先进的性能，与高维 SRAM 评估中最好的 SOTA 方法相比，效率高达 3.5 倍，精度高达 3 倍。

papers.title: SEO: Safety-Aware Energy Optimization Framework for Multi-Sensor Neural Controllers at the Edge.
papers.abstract: Runtime energy management has become quintessential for multi-sensor autonomous systems at the edge for achieving high performance given the platform constraints. Typical for such systems, however, is to have their controllers designed with formal guarantees on safety that precede in priority such optimizations, which in turn limits their application in real settings. In this paper, we propose a novel energy optimization framework that is aware of the autonomous system’s safety state, and leverages it to regulate the application of energy optimization methods so that the system’s formal safety properties are preserved. In particular, through the formal characterization of a system’s safety state as a dynamic processing deadline, the computing workloads of the underlying models can be adapted accordingly. For our experiments, we model two popular runtime energy optimization methods, offloading and gating, and simulate an autonomous driving system (ADS) use-case in the CARLA simulation environment with performance characterizations obtained from the standard Nvidia Drive PX2 ADS platform. Our results demonstrate that through a formal awareness of the perceived risks in the test case scenario, energy efficiency gains are still achieved (reaching 89.9%) while maintaining the desired safety properties.
papers.abstract_zh: 运行时能源管理已成为边缘多传感器自主系统在平台限制下实现高性能的典型。然而，此类系统的典型做法是在设计控制器时首先对安全性进行正式保证，然后再进行优化，这反过来又限制了它们在实际设置中的应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的能量优化框架，该框架了解自治系统的安全状态，并利用它来规范能量优化方法的应用，从而保留系统的形式安全属性。特别是，通过将系统的安全状态正式表征为动态处理期限，可以相应地调整底层模型的计算工作负载。在我们的实验中，我们对两种流行的运行时能量优化方法（卸载和门控）进行建模，并在 CARLA 仿真环境中模拟自动驾驶系统 (ADS) 用例，并使用从标准 Nvidia Drive PX2 ADS 平台获得的性能特征。我们的结果表明，通过正式认识测试用例场景中的感知风险，仍然可以实现能源效率提升（达到 89.9%），同时保持所需的安全属性。

papers.title: Shoggoth: Towards Efficient Edge-Cloud Collaborative Real-Time Video Inference via Adaptive Online Learning.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes Shoggoth, an efficient edge-cloud collaborative architecture, for boosting inference performance on real-time video of changing scenes. Shoggoth uses online knowledge distillation to improve the accuracy of models suffering from data drift and offloads the labeling process to the cloud, alleviating constrained resources of edge devices. At the edge, we design adaptive training using small batches to adapt models under limited computing power, and adaptive sampling of training frames for robustness and reducing bandwidth. The evaluations on the realistic dataset show 15%–20% model accuracy improvement compared to the edge-only strategy and fewer network costs than the cloud-only strategy.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Shoggoth，一种高效的边云协作架构，用于提高场景变化的实时视频的推理性能。 Shoggoth 使用在线知识蒸馏来提高受数据漂移影响的模型的准确性，并将标记过程卸载到云端，从而缓解边缘设备的资源限制。在边缘，我们设计了自适应训练，使用小批量来适应有限计算能力下的模型，并对训练帧进行自适应采样以提高鲁棒性并减少带宽。对实际数据集的评估显示，与仅边缘策略相比，模型精度提高了 15%–20%，并且比仅云策略更少的网络成本。

papers.title: Sidekick: Near Data Processing for Clustering Enhanced by Automatic Memory Disaggregation.
papers.abstract: Near Data Processing (NDP) is a promising solution for data mining/analysis techniques, which extract useful information from big data. In this paper, we propose a novel NDP-enabled memory disaggregation system called Sidekick, based on a type-2 CXL device and enhanced by an automated allocation technique for clustering algorithms. The key enabler of our migration technique is to understand clustering workflows in a unit of the program context, which is the function call stack for functions, threads, and memory allocations to drive the automated decision. The proposed technique relates the migrated computation tasks with a series of function calls and performs GA-based optimization to identify the optimal allocation scenario for a target clustering algorithm. In Scikit-learn, a popular machine learning library, we use the genetic algorithm to find the optimal memory allocation policy and the operation offloading policy using the program context. The results show that the proposed technique increases the clustering performance as compared to the case, which only uses disaggregated memory without NDP cores, by up to 92% in terms of execution time, while reducing the majority of remote CXL memory accesses.
papers.abstract_zh: 近数据处理 (NDP) 是数据挖掘/分析技术的一种有前景的解决方案，可从大数据中提取有用的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Sidekick 的新型支持 NDP 的内存分解系统，该系统基于 2 型 CXL 设备，并通过聚类算法的自动分配技术进行了增强。我们的迁移技术的关键推动者是理解程序上下文单元中的集群工作流程，程序上下文是函数、线程​​和内存分配的函数调用堆栈，以驱动自动化决策。所提出的技术将迁移的计算任务与一系列函数调用联系起来，并执行基于 GA 的优化，以确定目标聚类算法的最佳分配场景。在流行的机器学习库 Scikit-learn 中，我们使用遗传算法在程序上下文中找到最佳内存分配策略和操作卸载策略。结果表明，与仅使用不带 NDP 核心的分解内存的情况相比，所提出的技术在执行时间方面将集群性能提高了 92%，同时减少了大部分远程 CXL 内存访问。

papers.title: SimLL: Similarity-Based Logic Locking Against Machine Learning Attacks.
papers.abstract: Logic locking is a promising technique for protecting integrated circuit designs while outsourcing their fabrication. Recently, graph neural network (GNN)-based link prediction attacks have been developed which can successfully break all the multiplexer-based locking techniques that were expected to be learning-resilient. We present SimLL, a novel similarity-based locking technique which locks a design using multiplexers and shows robustness against the existing structure-exploiting oracle-less learning-based attacks. Aiming to confuse the machine learning (ML) models, SimLL introduces key-controlled multiplexers between logic gates or wires that exhibit high levels of topological and functional similarity. Empirical results show that SimLL can degrade the accuracy of existing ML-based attacks to approximately 50%, resulting in a negligible advantage over random guessing.
papers.abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定是一种在外包制造的同时保护集成电路设计的有前途的技术。最近，基于图神经网络（GNN）的链接预测攻击已经被开发出来，它可以成功地破坏所有基于多路复用器的锁定​​技术，这些技术预计具有学习弹性。我们提出了 SimLL，一种新颖的基于相似性的锁定技术，该技术使用多路复用器锁定设计，并显示出针对现有结构利用无预言机学习的攻击的鲁棒性。为了混淆机器学习 (ML) 模型，SimLL 在逻辑门或线路之间引入了键控多路复用器，这些多路复用器表现出高度的拓扑和功能相似性。经验结果表明，SimLL 可以将现有基于 ML 的攻击的准确性降低至大约 50%，与随机猜测相比，其优势可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Smart Detection of Obfuscated Thermal Covert Channel Attacks in Many-core Processors.
papers.abstract: In thermal covert channel (TCC) attacks, malicious applications seek to leak private information in a stealthy and hard-to-detect manner. State-of-the-art approaches for TCC detection employ the Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT) combined with heuristics to identify possible channels. However, as we demonstrate in this paper, these approaches are limited when detecting short-duration attacks, where an attacker intentionally halts the transmission for a time interval to avoid the detection. In order to overcome this limitation of the state-of-the-art solutions, we propose the first detection method for short-duration TCC attacks. Our solution, Dotecca, is a machine learning-based technique that employs short windows of time-domain measurements instead of the DFT to detect TCCs. To evaluate our solution, we introduce a new obfuscated short-duration attack that disguises as a regular application from the perspective of a DFT spectrum. Our experiments show that the new obfuscated attack is able to remain undetected even under advanced DFT-based state-of-the-art detection approaches, reducing their detection accuracy to about 18 %. In contrast, our smart detection approach is able to detect state-of-the-art and new obfuscated attacks with an accuracy of 99 %. Moreover, our solution reduces the overhead of the DFT-based state-of-the-art solution by more than 14 ×.
papers.abstract_zh: In thermal covert channel (TCC) attacks, malicious applications seek to leak private information in a stealthy and hard-to-detect manner.最先进的 TCC 检测方法采用离散傅立叶变换 (DFT) 与启发式方法相结合来识别可能的通道。然而，正如我们在本文中所演示的，这些方法在检测短期攻击时受到限制，攻击者故意停止传输一段时间以避免检测。 In order to overcome this limitation of the state-of-the-art solutions, we propose the first detection method for short-duration TCC attacks.我们的解决方案 Dotecca 是一种基于机器学习的技术，它采用短窗口时域测量而不是 DFT 来检测 TCC。为了评估我们的解决方案，我们引入了一种新的混淆短期攻击，从 DFT 谱的角度来看，该攻击伪装成常规应用程序。我们的实验表明，即使在先进的基于 DFT 的最先进检测方法下，新的混淆攻击也能够保持不被发现，从而将其检测准确度降低至约 18%。 In contrast, our smart detection approach is able to detect state-of-the-art and new obfuscated attacks with an accuracy of 99 %. Moreover, our solution reduces the overhead of the DFT-based state-of-the-art solution by more than 14 ×.

papers.title: Sparse Hamming Graph: A Customizable Network-on-Chip Topology.
papers.abstract: Chips with hundreds to thousands of cores require scalable networks-on-chip (NoCs). Customization of the NoC topology is necessary to reach the diverse design goals of different chips. We introduce sparse Hamming graph, a novel NoC topology with an adjustable cost-performance trade-off that is based on four NoC topology design principles we identified. To efficiently customize this topology, we develop a toolchain that leverages approximate floorplanning and link routing to deliver fast and accurate cost and performance predictions. We demonstrate how to use our methodology to achieve desired cost-performance trade-offs while outperforming established topologies in cost, performance, or both.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有数百到数千个内核的芯片需要可扩展的片上网络 (NoC)。为了实现不同芯片的不同设计目标，需要定制NoC拓扑。我们引入稀疏汉明图，这是一种新颖的 NoC 拓扑，具有可调整的成本性能权衡，基于我们确定的四种 NoC 拓扑设计原则。为了有效地定制此拓扑，我们开发了一个工具链，利用近似布局规划和链路路由来提供快速、准确的成本和性能预测。我们演示了如何使用我们的方法来实现所需的成本性能权衡，同时在成本、性能或两者方面优于现有拓扑。

papers.title: Specialization meets Flexibility: a Heterogeneous Architecture for High-Efficiency, High-flexibility AR/VR Processing.
papers.abstract: Emerging AR-VR applications execute complex heterogeneous workloads, mixing Deep-Learning(DL) and Digital-Signal-Processing(DSP) tasks, on SoCs embedded in the frame of eyeglasses, with implied tight power and area constraints, especially in the case of AR. We propose ArchiMEDES, an open-source heterogeneous-SoC platform with a programmable cluster of RISC-V cores coupled with a configurable DNN engine (NEureka) targeting AR/VR workloads. ArchiMEDES features a low-overhead Heterogeneous Cluster Interconnect(HCI) to enable fast RISC-V/NEureka cooperation on a shared tightly coupled data memory (TCDM). We show post-layout results targeting 22nm technology; ArchiMEDES shows a peak combined performance of up to 1.19 TOPS and an efficiency of up to 10.6 TOPS/W. Hardware-Software cooperation in ArchiMEDES enables a 5.5× speedup in an AR-VR gaze tracking case study, compared to a non-cooperative single-RISC-V + Accelerator system.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的 AR-VR 应用在嵌入眼镜框架的 SoC 上执行复杂的异构工作负载，混合深度学习 (DL) 和数字信号处理 (DSP) 任务，这意味着严格的功耗和面积限制，尤其是在 AR 的情况下。我们提出了 ArchiMEDES，这是一个开源异构 SoC 平台，具有可编程 RISC-V 核心集群以及针对 AR/VR 工作负载的可配置 DNN 引擎 (NEureka)。 ArchiMEDES 具有低开销异构集群互连 (HCI)，可在共享紧耦合数据存储器 (TCDM) 上实现快速 RISC-V/NEureka 协作。我们展示了针对 22nm 技术的布局后结果； ArchiMEDES 的峰值综合性能高达 1.19 TOPS，效率高达 10.6 TOPS/W。与非合作的单 RISC-V + 加速器系统相比，ArchiMEDES 中的硬件-软件合作使 AR-VR 凝视跟踪案例研究的速度提高了 5.5 倍。

papers.title: SPET: Transparent SRAM Allocation and Model Partitioning for Real-time DNN Tasks on Edge TPU.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been deployed in many safety-critical real-time embedded systems. To support DNN tasks in real-time, most previous studies focused on GPU or CPU. However, Edge TPU has not yet been studied for real-time guarantees. This paper presents a real-time DNNs framework for Edge TPU to satisfy multiple DNN inference tasks’ timing requirements. The proposed framework provides 1) SRAM allocation and model partitioning techniques and 2) a MIP-based algorithm that determines the amount of SRAM and the number of segments for each task. The experiment result shows that our framework provides 79% higher schedulability than the existing Edge TPU system.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已部署在许多安全关键的实时嵌入式系统中。为了实时支持 DNN 任务，之前的研究大多集中在 GPU 或 CPU 上。然而，Edge TPU 尚未被研究用于实时保证。本文提出了一种用于 Edge TPU 的实时 DNN 框架，以满足多个 DNN 推理任务的时序要求。所提出的框架提供了 1) SRAM 分配和模型分区技术，以及 2) 基于 MIP 的算法，用于确定每个任务的 SRAM 量和段数。实验结果表明，我们的框架提供了比现有 Edge TPU 系统高 79% 的可调度性。

papers.title: SpMMPlu: A Compiler Plug-in with Sparse IR for Efficient Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Sparsity is becoming arguably the most critical dimension to explore for efficiency and scalability as deep learning models grow significantly larger. Particularly, pruning is a common method to reduce redundant computations in attention-based and convolution-based models. The induced sparse matrix multiplication (SpMM) normally requires domain-specific hardware architecture (DSA) to eliminate unnecessary zero-valued computations. However, generating an optimal kernel code for SpMM on general-purpose and ISA-based spatial accelerators without changing the hardware architecture is still an open problem.In this paper, we propose a compiler plug-in named SpMMPlu, which can extend the representation and optimization ability for SpMM in current deep learning compiler frameworks that only support dense matrix multiplication. The key of SpMMPlu is a flexible intermediate representation— Sparse IR, representing the SpMM with various sparsity patterns based on meta-ops with a multi-level structure. Meta-op takes abstraction of the hardware intrinsic as its minimum granularity, and the powerful optimizers of existing NN compiler backends (e.g., Auto-schedule in TVM, AKG in MindSpore) can be easily reused for its computational scheduling and code generation. Moreover, we propose a two-step (segmentation & grouping) method to achieve an efficient Sparse IR for each sparsity pattern. Only three passes are added in SpMMPlu to provide an automatic solution for SpMM kernel code generation. We embed SpMMPlu into MindSpore and do experiments on NVIDIA V100 GPU and Huawei Ascend 910 to verify its effectiveness and scalability. The results show that with SpMMPlu, MindSpore can support various sparsity patterns and deliver a 1.93× (on V100 GPU) and 2.21× (on AScend 910) speedup averagely compared to the dense counterpart.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型变得越来越大，稀疏性无疑正在成为探索效率和可扩展性的最关键维度。特别是，剪枝是减少基于注意力和基于卷积的模型中冗余计算的常用方法。诱导稀疏矩阵乘法（SpMM）通常需要特定领域的硬件架构（DSA）来消除不必要的零值计算。然而，在不改变硬件架构的情况下，在通用和基于ISA的空间加速器上生成SpMM的最佳内核代码仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为SpMMPlu的编译器插件，它可以扩展当前仅支持密集矩阵乘法的深度学习编译器框架中SpMM的表示和优化能力。 SpMMPlu的关键是一种灵活的中间表示——稀疏IR，以多级结构的元操作为基础，以各种稀疏模式表示SpMM。 Meta-op 以硬件内在的抽象作为其最小粒度，现有 NN 编译器后端的强大优化器（例如 TVM 中的 Auto-schedule、MindSpore 中的 AKG）可以轻松地重用于其计算调度和代码生成。此外，我们提出了一种两步（分割和分组）方法来为每个稀疏模式实现高效的稀疏 IR。 SpMMPlu 中仅添加了三遍，即可为 SpMM 内核代码生成提供自动解决方案。我们将SpMMPlu嵌入到MindSpore中，并在NVIDIA V100 GPU和华为Ascend 910上进行实验，验证其有效性和可扩展性。结果表明，借助 SpMMPlu，MindSpore 可以支持各种稀疏模式，与密集模式相比，平均加速速度为 1.93 倍（在 V100 GPU 上）和 2.21 倍（在 AScend 910 上）。

papers.title: Stalker: A Framework to Analyze Fragility of Cryptographic Libraries under Hardware Fault Models.
papers.abstract: For embedded devices, the uncertainty of target physical environments is always a great challenge. With constrained resources and common overloaded uses, they can be more exposed to hardware faults. Other than stability and ordinary security issues, there exist some subtle phenomenons that lead to potential cryptanalysis or secret leakage. In this paper, we present STALKER, a framework to analyze the fragility of libraries under hardware fault models. Compared with existing tools, our framework targets faulty execution outputs, and can flexibly work on different libraries, architectures and support different search schemes. We find dozens of security-sensitive bits that may cause critical issues and provide detailed analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于嵌入式设备来说，目标物理环境的不确定性始终是一个巨大的挑战。由于资源有限和常见的超载使用，它们更容易出现硬件故障。除了稳定性和普通的安全问题外，还存在一些微妙的现象，导致潜在的密码分析或秘密泄露。在本文中，我们提出了 STALKER，一个用于分析硬件故障模型下库的脆弱性的框架。与现有工具相比，我们的框架针对错误的执行输出，并且可以灵活地工作在不同的库、架构上并支持不同的搜索方案。我们发现了数十个可能导致严重问题的安全敏感位，并提供了详细的分析。

papers.title: STCG: State-Aware Test Case Generation for Simulink Models.
papers.abstract: Simulink has been widely used in system design, which supports the efficient modeling and synthesis of embedded controllers, with automatic test case generation to simulate and validate the correctness of the constructed Simulink model. However, the increasing complexity of the model, especially the internal states, brings extra challenges to existing model testing techniques such as constraint solving and random search, which results in difficulties when trying to reach the deeper logic of the model effectively.In this paper, we propose STCG, a state-aware test case generation method for Simulink models. STCG solves only one iteration of the model each time to get the test input that can cover a target branch, then executes the model once to obtain and update the novel model state based on the solved input dynamically. Then, it solves the remaining branches based on the new model state iteratively until all the coverage requirements are satisfied. We implemented STCG and evaluated it on several benchmark Simulink models. Compared to the built-in Simulink Design Verifier and state-of-the-art academic work SimCoTest, STCG achieves an average improvement of 58% and 132% on Decision Coverage, 52% and 70% on Condition Coverage and 239% and 237% on Modified Condition Decision Coverage, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: Simulink在系统设计中得到了广泛的应用，它支持嵌入式控制器的高效建模和综合，并自动生成测试用例来模拟和验证所构建的Simulink模型的正确性。然而，模型尤其是内部状态的复杂性不断增加，给现有的模型测试技术（如约束求解和随机搜索）带来了额外的挑战，导致难以有效地达到模型的更深层次逻辑。在本文中，我们提出了STCG，一种用于Simulink模型的状态感知测试用例生成方法。 STCG每次仅求解模型的一次迭代，以获得能够覆盖目标分支的测试输入，然后执行模型一次，以根据求解的输入动态获取和更新新的模型状态。然后，它基于新的模型状态迭代求解剩余分支，直到满足所有覆盖要求。我们实现了 STCG 并在几个基准 Simulink 模型上对其进行了评估。与内置的 Simulink Design Verifier 和最先进的学术工作 SimCoTest 相比，STCG 在决策覆盖率上平均提高了 58% 和 132%，在条件覆盖率上平均提高了 52% 和 70%，在修改条件决策覆盖率上平均提高了 239% 和 237%。

papers.title: Stochastic-HMDs: Adversarial-Resilient Hardware Malware Detectors via Undervolting.
papers.abstract: Machine learning-based hardware malware detectors (HMDs) offer a potential game changing advantage in defending systems against malware. However, HMDs suffer from adversarial attacks, can be effectively reverse-engineered and subsequently be evaded, allowing malware to hide from detection. We address this issue by proposing novel HMDs (Stochastic-HMDs), which leverage approximate computing (AC) to harden HMDs against adversarial evasion attacks. Stochastic-HMDs introduce stochastic noise into the computations within the model to build an efficient and low-cost moving-target defense. Specifically, we use controlled undervolting, i.e., scaling the supply voltage below nominal level, to deliberately induce stochastic timing violations in the HMDs’ computations during inference (detection). We show that such technique makes HMDs more resilient to adversarial attacks, especially to reverse-engineering and transferability. Our thorough empirical results substantiate that Stochastic-HMDs offer effective defense against adversarial attacks along with by-product power savings, without requiring any changes to the hardware/software nor to the HMDs’ model, i.e., no retraining or fine tuning is needed. In particular, Stochastic-HMDs can detect more than 94% of the evasive malware with a negligible (i.e., < 2%) accuracy loss, along with ~15% power savings.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于机器学习的硬件恶意软件检测器 (HMD) 在防御系统抵御恶意软件方面提供了潜在的改变游戏规则的优势。然而，头戴式显示器会遭受对抗性攻击，可以有效地进行逆向工程并随后被规避，从而使恶意软件能够隐藏起来以躲避检测。我们通过提出新型 HMD（随机 HMD）来解决这个问题，它利用近似计算（AC）来强化 HMD 来抵御对抗性逃避攻击。随机头戴式显示器将随机噪声引入模型内的计算中，以构建高效且低成本的移动目标防御。具体来说，我们使用受控欠压，即将电源电压调整到标称水平以下，以在推理（检测）期间故意在头戴式显示器的计算中引发随机时序违规。我们表明，这种技术使头戴式显示器对对抗性攻击更具弹性，尤其是逆向工程和可转移性。我们彻底的实证结果证实，随机 HMD 可以有效防御对抗性攻击，并节省电能，无需对硬件/软件或 HMD 模型进行任何更改，即不需要重新训练或微调。特别是，随机 HMD 可以检测超过 94% 的规避恶意软件，准确度损失可以忽略不计（即 < 2%），并且节能约 15%。

papers.title: STRIVE: Enabling Choke Point Detection and Timing Error Resilience in a Low-Power Tensor Processing Unit.
papers.abstract: Rapid growth in Deep Neural Network (DNN) workloads has increased the energy footprint of the Artificial Intelligence (AI) computing realm. For optimum energy efficiency, we propose operating a DNN hardware in the Low-Power Computing (LPC) region. However, operating at LPC causes increased delay sensitivity to Process Variation (PV). Delay faults are an intriguing consequence of PV. In this paper, we demonstrate the vulnerability of DNNs to delay variations, substantially lowering the prediction accuracy. To overcome delay faults, we present STRIVE—a post-fabrication fault detection and reactive error reduction technique. We also introduce a time-borrow correction technique to ensure error-free DNN computation.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 工作负载的快速增长增加了人工智能 (AI) 计算领域的能源足迹。为了获得最佳能源效率，我们建议在低功耗计算 (LPC) 区域运行 DNN 硬件。然而，在 LPC 下运行会导致对过程变化 (PV) 的延迟敏感性增加。延迟故障是 PV 的一个有趣的后果。在本文中，我们证明了 DNN 容易受到延迟变化的影响，从而大大降低了预测精度。为了克服延迟故障，我们提出了 STRIVE——一种制造后故障检测和反应性误差减少技术。我们还引入了时间借用校正技术来确保 DNN 计算无错误。

papers.title: System-level Innovation for the Next Decade AI Performance, Power, Area with Co-optimization.
papers.abstract: Power, performance, and area (PPA) are three key parameters in conventional system-on-chip design optimization. In post Moore’s law era, system-level PPA improvement for system-of-chips/chiplets – a new "SoC" – relies on multi-disciplinary AI co-optimization across full stack innovations including process-in memory, edge intelligent sensing and heterogenous integration.
papers.abstract_zh: 功耗、性能和面积（PPA）是传统片上系统设计优化的三个关键参数。在后摩尔定律时代，芯片/小芯片系统（一种新的“SoC”）的系统级 PPA 改进依赖于跨全堆栈创新的多学科 AI 协同优化，包括内存中处理、边缘智能传感和异构集成。

papers.title: TD-Magic: From Pictures of Timing Diagrams To Formal Specifications.
papers.abstract: We introduce TD-Magic, the first neuro-symbolic approach for translating an image of a timing-diagram (TD) to a formal specification. We overcome the lack of labelled data for supervised learning, by first developing a synthetic data generator of labelled TDs. We then use object detection techniques to identify rising and failing edges, OCR to recognise the text, and image processing algorithms to capture synchronisation patterns. Finally, we use semantic interpretation to analyse the extracted features and generate the associated formal specification. Our experiments on industrial TDs show high translation accuracy opening the way to more sophisticated requirements-extraction algorithms from pictures.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们介绍 TD-Magic，这是第一个将时序图 (TD) 图像转换为正式规范的神经符号方法。我们首先开发了标记 TD 的合成数据生成器，克服了监督学习缺乏标记数据的问题。然后，我们使用对象检测技术来识别上升沿和下降沿，使用 OCR 来识别文本，并使用图像处理算法来捕获同步模式。最后，我们使用语义解释来分析提取的特征并生成相关的形式规范。我们对工业 TD 的实验表明，翻译精度很高，为更复杂的需求提取算法开辟了道路。

papers.title: TF-MVP: Novel Sparsity-Aware Transformer Accelerator with Mixed-Length Vector Pruning.
papers.abstract: We present the energy-efficient TF-MVP architecture, a sparsity-aware transformer accelerator, by introducing novel algorithm-hardware co-optimization techniques. From the previous fine-grained pruning map, for the first time, the direction strength is developed to analyze the pruning patterns quantitatively, indicating the major pruning direction and size of each layer. Then, the mixed-length vector pruning (MVP) is proposed to generate the hardware-friendly pruned-transformer model, which is fully supported by our TF-MVP accelerator with the reconfigurable PE structure. Implemented in a 28nm CMOS technology, as a result, TF-MVP achieves 377 GOPs/W for accelerating GPT-2 small model by realizing 4096 multiply-accumulate operators, which is 2.09 times better than the state-of-the-art sparsity-aware transformer accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们通过引入新颖的算法-硬件协同优化技术，提出了节能的 TF-MVP 架构，这是一种稀疏感知变压器加速器。在之前的细粒度剪枝图的基础上，首次提出方向强度来定量分析剪枝模式，指示各层的主要剪枝方向和大小。然后，提出混合长度向量剪枝（MVP）来生成硬件友好的剪枝变换器模型，我们的具有可重构PE结构的TF-MVP加速器完全支持该模型。 TF-MVP 采用 28nm CMOS 技术实现，通过实现 4096 个乘法累加算子，加速 GPT-2 小模型的速度达到了 377 GOPs/W，比最先进的稀疏感知 Transformer 加速器提高了 2.09 倍。

papers.title: TFix: Exploiting the Natural Redundancy of Ternary Neural Networks for Fault Tolerant In-Memory Vector Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) and quantization have emerged as promising techniques for edge-based deep neural network (DNN) accelerators by reducing their energy, latency and storage requirements. In pursuit of ultra-low precision, ternary precision DNNs (TDNNs) offer high efficiency without sacrificing much inference accuracy. In this work, we explore the impact of hard faults on IMC based TDNNs and propose TFix to enhance their fault tolerance. TFix exploits the natural redundancy present in most ternary IMC bitcells as well as the high weight sparsity in TDNNs to provide up to 40.68% accuracy increase over the baseline with < 6% energy overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (IMC) 和量化通过降低能源、延迟和存储需求，成为基于边缘的深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器的有前途的技术。为了追求超低精度，三元精度 DNN (TDNN) 在不牺牲太多推理精度的情况下提供了高效率。在这项工作中，我们探讨了硬故障对基于 IMC 的 TDNN 的影响，并提出 TFix 来增强其容错能力。 TFix 利用大多数三元 IMC 位单元中存在的自然冗余以及 TDNN 中的高权重稀疏性，以 < 6% 的能量开销提供比基线高达 40.68% 的精度提升。

papers.title: Thermal Scaffolding for Ultra-Dense 3D Integrated Circuits.
papers.abstract: We address the thermal challenge of ultra-dense 3D (e.g., monolithic 3D) integrated circuits with multiple high-speed computing engines in the 3D stack. We present a new thermal scaffolding approach achieved through a combination of (1) new Back-End-of-Line (BEOL)-compatible dielectric materials for simultaneous high thermal conductivity and low dielectric constant, (2) new 3D physical co-design of BEOL dielectrics with thermal metal structures for uniform heat conduction with minimal metal insertion overhead, and (3) previous, experimentally demonstrated heatsink advances. Physical designs of thermal scaffolding enable 12-tier 7nm ultra-dense 3D IC with max temperatures ≤125 degrees Celsius: an iso-footprint, iso-delay, 4x improvement in stacked tiers.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们通过 3D 堆栈中的多个高速计算引擎解决超密集 3D（例如单片 3D）集成电路的热挑战。我们提出了一种新的热脚手架方法，通过以下组合实现：(1) 新型后端 (BEOL) 兼容电介质材料，可同时实现高导热率和低介电常数；(2) BEOL 电介质与热金属结构的新 3D 物理协同设计，以最小的金属插入开销实现均匀热传导；(3) 先前经过实验证明的散热器进步。热脚手架的物理设计可实现 12 层 7nm 超密集 3D IC，最高温度≤125 摄氏度：iso 封装、iso 延迟、堆叠层提高 4 倍。

papers.title: TiPU: A Spatial-Locality-Aware Near-Memory Tile Processing Unit for 3D Point Cloud Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Energy-efficient 3D point cloud neural network accelerators are desired for autonomous driving and AR/VR applications. This paper proposes TiPU, a spatial-locality-aware near-memory tile processing unit where the point clouds are partitioned into tiles to process spatial features locally. Intra-tile farthest point sampling and cross-tile neighbor search are employed to avoid unnecessary distance computing. To efficiently facilitate the tile operations, TiPU architecture consists of a tile-based unified distance computing unit, a near-CAM feature extractor, and a near-SRAM-computing MLP engine. The experimental results show that, compared to GPU implementation, TiPU achieves 15.7× processing speed and reduces 7308× energy consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶和 AR/VR 应用需要节能的 3D 点云神经网络加速器。本文提出了 TiPU，一种空间局部性感知的近内存瓦片处理单元，其中点云被划分为瓦片以在本地处理空间特征。采用瓦内最远点采样和跨瓦邻居搜索来避免不必要的距离计算。为了有效促进图块操作，TiPU 架构由基于图块的统一距离计算单元、近 CAM 特征提取器和近 SRAM 计算 MLP 引擎组成。实验结果表明，与GPU实现相比，TiPU实现了15.7倍的处理速度并降低了7308倍的能耗。

papers.title: TOTAL: Multi-Corners Timing Optimization Based on Transfer and Active Learning.
papers.abstract: In modern advanced integrated circuit design, a design normally needs to be progressively optimized until the static timing analysis (STA) of full process corners meets the timing constraints. To improve efficiency, using machine learning to predict the path timings directly in order to reduce the extensive time-consuming SPICE simulations has become a promising technique to approach fast design closure. However, current methods lack both flexibility and reliability to be used in a practical industrial environment. To resolve these challenges, we propose TOTAL, which is constructed using a generalized linear model with latent features to effectively capture knowledge transferred from previous designs and delivers state-of-the-art (SOTA) prediction accuracy that is up to 6.6x improvement over the competitors in terms of mean absolute error (MAE). Most importantly, TOTAL is equipped with a Bayesian decision strategy to actively update uncertain predictions and deliver reliable predictions with accuracy close to 100%, pushing the frontier of the machine-learning-based STA for practical implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代先进集成电路设计中，设计通常需要逐步优化，直到全工艺角的静态时序分析（STA）满足时序约束。为了提高效率，使用机器学习直接预测路径时序以减少大量耗时的 SPICE 仿真已成为一种实现快速设计收敛的有前途的技术。然而，当前的方法缺乏在实际工业环境中使用的灵活性和可靠性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 TOTAL，它使用具有潜在特征的广义线性模型构建，可有效捕获从先前设计转移的知识，并提供最先进的 (SOTA) 预测精度，在平均绝对误差 (MAE) 方面比竞争对手提高了 6.6 倍。最重要的是，TOTAL配备了贝叶斯决策策略，可以主动更新不确定的预测，并提供准确率接近100%的可靠预测，推动基于机器学习的STA的实际应用前沿。

papers.title: Toward Optimal Filler Cell Insertion with Complex Implant Layer Constraints.
papers.abstract: Modern circuits often contain standard cells of different threshold voltages (multi-VTs) to achieve a better trade-off between timing and power consumption. Due to the heterogeneous cell structures, the multi-VTs cells impose various implant layer constraints, further complicating the already time-consuming filler cell insertion process. In this paper, we present a fast and near-optimal algorithm to solve the filler insertion problem with complex implant layer rules and minimum filler width constraints. We first propose an inference-driven detecting algorithm to identify each design rule violation accurately. Then, a dynamic-programming-based insertion method is developed to reduce the implant layer violations. Finally, we design a contour-driven violation refinement strategy to further improve manufacturability. Experimental results show that our algorithm can reduce the number of violations significantly compared with state-of-the-art works. Besides, with our identifier in the legalization stage, we can avoid conflicts in advance and solve almost all violations after filler insertion in industrial cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代电路通常包含不同阈值电压的标准单元（多VT），以实现时序和功耗之间的更好权衡。由于异质单元结构，多VT单元施加了各种植入层限制，使本已耗时的填充单元插入过程进一步复杂化。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且近乎最优的算法来解决具有复杂植入层规则和最小填充物宽度约束的填充物插入问题。我们首先提出一种推理驱动的检测算法来准确识别每个设计规则违规。然后，开发了一种基于动态编程的插入方法来减少注入层违规。最后，我们设计了一种轮廓驱动的违规细化策略，以进一步提高可制造性。实验结果表明，与最先进的算法相比，我们的算法可以显着减少违规次数。此外，通过我们在合法化阶段的标识符，我们可以提前避免冲突，并解决几乎所有工业案例中填充后的违规行为。

papers.title: Toward Parallelism-Optimal Topology Generation for Wavelength-Routed Optical NoC Designs.
papers.abstract: The wavelength-routed optical network-on-chip (WRONoC) emerges as a promising solution for multi-core system communication, providing high-bandwidth, high-speed, and low-power transmission. As the number of cores in a WRONoC increases, however, some WRONoC topologies could be infeasible with bandwidth and crosstalk constraints if bit-level parallelism is not considered during topology generation. Previous work optimized the parallelism only for the radius selection of microring resonators but not for topology generation. To remedy this drawback, we present a parallelism-aware WRONoC topology generation flow. The proposed flow guarantees to generate a parallelism-optimal topology for full connectivity; and a parallelism-optimal topology for customized connectivity if the netlist meets certain conditions. Compared with the state-of-the-art methods, experimental results show a 67.5% improvement in parallelism.
papers.abstract_zh: 波长路由片上光网络（WRONoC）作为多核系统通信的一种有前途的解决方案而出现，提供高带宽、高速和低功耗的传输。然而，随着 WRONoC 中内核数量的增加，如果在拓扑生成期间不考虑位级并行性，则某些 WRONoC 拓扑可能因带宽和串扰限制而变得不可行。先前的工作仅针对微环谐振器的半径选择优化并行性，而没有针对拓扑生成优化并行性。为了弥补这个缺点，我们提出了一种并行感知的 WRONoC 拓扑生成流程。所提出的流程保证生成用于完全连接的并行性最佳拓扑；如果网表满足某些条件，则可以使用并行优化拓扑来实现定制连接。与最先进的方法相比，实验结果显示并行度提高了 67.5%。

papers.title: Towards A Formally Verified Fully Homomorphic Encryption Compute Engine.
papers.abstract: We present a scalable approach for formally verifying the correctness of the Compute Engine (CE) against its ISA (Instruction Set Architecture) specification in an FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) accelerator, critical to many applications where safety and security of information is of vital importance. It combines algorithmic verification of the micro-architecture modules in the CE against their functional specifications and implementation verification of the CE hardware against its micro-architecture algorithmic specifications. The correctness of the CE is guaranteed by treating micro-architecture modules as semantic-preserving program transformations and leveraging the composability of the semantic-preserving properties well established in compiler design and verification.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的方法，用于在 FHE（全同态加密）加速器中根据其 ISA（指令集架构）规范正式验证计算引擎 (CE) 的正确性，这对于信息安全至关重要的许多应用程序至关重要。它将CE中的微架构模块根据其功能规范进行的算法验证和CE硬件根据其微架构算法规范进行的实现验证结合起来。通过将微体系结构模块视为保留语义的程序转换并利用编译​​器设计和验证中确立的语义保留属性的可组合性，保证了 CE 的正确性。

papers.title: Towards Efficient Convolutional Neural Network for Embedded Hardware via Multi-Dimensional Pruning.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose TECO, a multi-dimensional pruning framework to collaboratively prune the three dimensions (depth, width, and resolution) of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for better execution efficiency on embedded hardware. In TECO, we first introduce a two-stage importance evaluation framework, which efficiently and comprehensively evaluates each pruning unit according to both the local importance inside each dimension and the global importance across different dimensions. Based on the evaluation framework, we present a heuristic pruning algorithm to progressively prune the three dimensions of CNNs towards the optimal trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Experiments on multiple benchmarks validate the advantages of TECO over existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches. The code and pre-trained models are available anonymously at https://github.com/ntuliuteam/Teco.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TECO，一种多维修剪框架，用于协作修剪卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的三个维度（深度、宽度和分辨率），以提高嵌入式硬件上的执行效率。在TECO中，我们首先引入了一个两阶段重要性评估框架，该框架根据每个维度内的局部重要性和不同维度上的全局重要性来高效、全面地评估每个剪枝单元。基于评估框架，我们提出了一种启发式剪枝算法，逐步剪枝 CNN 的三个维度，以实现准确性和效率之间的最佳权衡。多个基准测试的实验验证了 TECO 相对于现有最先进 (SOTA) 方法的优势。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/ntuliuteam/Teco 上匿名获取。

papers.title: Uint-Packing: Multiply Your DNN Accelerator Performance via Unsigned Integer DSP Packing.
papers.abstract: DSP blocks are undoubtedly efficient solutions for implementing multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations on FPGA. Since DSP resources are scarce in FPGA, the advanced solution is to pack parallel multiplication operations into a single DSP. However, available methods are based on signed-type multiplication, leading to both loss of accuracy and increased area. To solve these issues simultaneously, we propose an unsigned integer DSP packing generalization model called uint-packing. Guided by this generalization model, we design the novel computational structure of the DNN accelerator. Our system design is state-of-the-art, with 2.8× throughput and 4× energy efficiency compared to the third-place DAC-SDC’22 design.
papers.abstract_zh: DSP 模块无疑是在 FPGA 上实现乘法累加 (MAC) 运算的有效解决方案。由于FPGA中DSP资源稀缺，先进的解决方案是将并行乘法运算打包到单个DSP中。然而，可用的方法基于符号类型乘法，导致精度损失和面积增加。为了同时解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为 uint-packing 的无符号整数 DSP 打包泛化模型。在此泛化模型的指导下，我们设计了 DNN 加速器的新颖计算结构。我们的系统设计是最先进的，与第三名的 DAC-SDC'22 设计相比，吞吐量提高了 2.8 倍，能效提高了 4 倍。

papers.title: Unified Agile Accuracy Assessment in Computing-in-Memory Neural Accelerators by Layerwise Dynamical Isometry.
papers.abstract: Deploying neural networks (NN) on computing-in-memory (CIM) neural accelerators incurs additional hardware factors in the test accuracy, which add substantial extra evaluation overhead. This work takes the first step to quantitatively analyze how information propagates in CIM neural accelerators as well as how additional CIM factors influence that information propagation. From our analysis, we propose a new metric named Unified-QCN that is theoretically linked to the test accuracy according to layerwise dynamical isometry (LDI), providing us with a compass to avoid direct time-consuming simulations. Our method consistently delivers high correlations with the test accuracy for various NN backbones on different datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 在内存计算 (CIM) 神经加速器上部署神经网络 (NN) 会导致测试准确性受到额外的硬件因素影响，从而增加大量额外的评估开销。这项工作迈出了定量分析信息在 CIM 神经加速器中如何传播以及其他 CIM 因素如何影响信息传播的第一步。根据我们的分析，我们提出了一种名为 Unified-QCN 的新指标，该指标理论上与分层动态等距 (LDI) 的测试精度相关，为我们提供了避免直接耗时模拟的指南针。我们的方法始终为不同数据集上的各种神经网络主干提供与测试准确性的高度相关性。

papers.title: UpPipe: A Novel Pipeline Management on In-Memory Processors for RNA-seq Quantification.
papers.abstract: RNA sequence quantification is an important analysis method to measure transcript abundances. A key overhead in RNA-seq quantification is to map a set of RNA reads to multiple reference transcripts, i.e., transcriptome. Besides, the performance of RNA-seq quantification is strictly limited by the excessive amounts of data movement between CPU and memory, i.e., memory wall problem on the conventional architecture. As the first publicly commercial processing-in-memory (PIM) system, UPMEM DPU, is proposed, the PIM gradually becomes a promising solution to overcome the memory wall problem. DPUs show great potential to accelerate data-intensive workloads by minimizing off-chip data movement between CPU and memory. Thus, this paper aims to improve the performance of RNA-seq quantification by fully exploiting the strengths of DPU. To achieve that, we propose a novel DPU-aware pipeline design "UpPipe" built on the software layer to address the hardware constraints of DPU. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to enable pipeline management on the DPU system. The evaluation results demonstrate the feasibility of our proposed design and provide a comprehensive study on how to utilize the limited hardware resources of DPUs efficiently.
papers.abstract_zh: RNA序列定量是测量转录本丰度的重要分析方法。 RNA-seq 定量的一个关键开销是将一组 RNA 读数映射到多个参考转录本，即转录组。此外，RNA-seq定量的性能受到CPU和内存之间过量数据移动的严格限制，即传统架构上的内存墙问题。随着第一个公开商用的内存处理（PIM）系统UPMEM DPU的提出，PIM逐渐成为克服内存墙问题的有前途的解决方案。 DPU 通过最大限度地减少 CPU 和内存之间的片外数据移动，显示出加速数据密集型工作负载的巨大潜力。因此，本文旨在通过充分利用DPU的优势来提高RNA-seq定量的性能。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于软件层的新型 DPU 感知管道设计“UpPipe”，以解决 DPU 的硬件限制。据我们所知，这是第一个在 DPU 系统上启用管道管理的工作。评估结果证明了我们提出的设计的可行性，并为如何有效利用 DPU 的有限硬件资源提供了全面的研究。

papers.title: UpTime: Towards Flow-based In-Memory Computing with High Fault-Tolerance.
papers.abstract: Processing in-memory promises to accelerate data-intensive applications by breaking von-Neumann based design principles. Flow-based computing is an in-memory computing paradigm that has shown immense potential for executing Boolean logic. Unfortunately, the immature fabrication processes for nanoscale memristor crossbars still struggle with yield challenges and run-time defects, which may render the computing system non-functional. Even worse, no previous studies have investigated the fault-tolerance of flow-based computing systems, which could potentially limit the capabilities of the entire paradigm. In this paper, we propose the UpTime framework to provide guaranties on the functional correctness and to maximize the lifetime of flow-based computing systems. The framework utilizes data layout organization to mitigate errors from faults with known type and location. To handle defects occurring at run-time, we propose the use of an error detection signal that can be evaluated with low overhead. The experimental evaluation demonstrates that the UpTime framework is capable of guaranteeing functional correctness for an average of 15.24 years. The up-time to down-time ratio is 99.9992%. Compared with utilizing the state-of-the-art write-verify scheme, the proposed error signal reduces power consumption by 25% and increases throughput by 6%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理有望通过打破基于冯诺依曼的设计原则来加速数据密集型应用程序。基于流的计算是一种内存计算范例，在执行布尔逻辑方面显示出巨大的潜力。不幸的是，纳米级忆阻器交叉开关的不成熟制造工艺仍然面临良率挑战和运行时缺陷，这可能导致计算系统无法运行。更糟糕的是，之前没有研究调查基于流的计算系统的容错性，这可能会限制整个范式的能力。在本文中，我们提出了 UpTime 框架，以保证功能的正确性并最大限度地延长基于流的计算系统的生命周期。该框架利用数据布局组织来减少已知类型和位置的故障造成的错误。为了处理运行时发生的缺陷，我们建议使用可以以较低开销进行评估的错误检测信号。实验评估表明，UpTime框架能够保证平均15.24年的功能正确性。正常运行时间与停机时间比率为99.9992%。与利用最先进的写入验证方案相比，所提出的错误信号分别降低了 25% 的功耗和增加了 6% 的吞吐量。

papers.title: Venus: A Versatile Deep Neural Network Accelerator Architecture Design for Multiple Applications.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) applications are pervasive. However as demands for these applications continue to increase, so is the challenges for designing flexible and scalable architectures for multi-application implementation. Such accelerators require innovative architecture with flexible Network-on-Chips (NoCs), parallelism exploitation, and better on-chip memory organization to adequately support the diverse computation, memory, and communication needs. In this paper, we propose Venus, a versatile DNN accelerator design that can provide efficient communication and computation support for multi-applications. Venus is a tile-based architecture with a distributed buffer where each tile consists of an array of processing elements (PEs) and a portion of the distributed buffer. The other salient feature of Venus is a flexible Network-on-Chip (NoC) that can dynamically adapt to the communication needs of various running applications thus maximizing data reuse, reducing DRAM accesses, and supporting multiple dataflows with an overall aim of better execution time and better energy efficiency. Simulation results show that our proposed Venus design outperforms state-of-art accelerators (NVDLA [1], ShiDianNao [2], Eyeriss [3], Planaria [4], Simba [5]).
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 应用十分普遍。然而，随着对这些应用程序的需求不断增加，为多应用程序实施设计灵活且可扩展的架构的挑战也随之增加。此类加速器需要具有灵活的片上网络 (NoC)、并行性开发和更好的片上内存组织的创新架构，以充分支持不同的计算、内存和通信需求。在本文中，我们提出了 Venus，一种多功能 DNN 加速器设计，可以为多应用程序提供高效的通信和计算支持。 Venus 是一种基于区块的架构，具有分布式缓冲区，其中每个区块由处理元件 (PE) 阵列和分布式缓冲区的一部分组成。 Venus的另一个显着特点是灵活的片上网络（NoC），可以动态适应各种正在运行的应用程序的通信需求，从而最大限度地提高数据重用，减少DRAM访问，并支持多个数据流，总体目标是更好的执行时间和更好的能源效率。仿真结果表明，我们提出的 Venus 设计优于最先进的加速器（NVDLA [1]、ShiDianNao [2]、Eyeriss [3]、Planaria [4]、Simba [5]）。

papers.title: Victor: A Variation-resilient Approach Using Cell-Clustered Charge-domain computing for High-density High-throughput MLC CiM.
papers.abstract: Multi-level cell (MLC) NVM-based CiM has become a promising candidate in computing-in-memory (CiM) designs because of its non-volatility, high cell density, and improving compatibility with the CMOS process. However, most MLC CiM faces the challenges of non-ideal device limitations, including the low on/off ratio, large device-to-device variations, and read disturbances, which limit the computing accuracy, reliability, and throughput performance.
