Different logic gates have been proposed, where the presence or absence of a single skyrmion is represented as binary logic 1 or logic 0, respectively. In this paper, we propose novel camouflaged logic gate designs to prevent an adversary from extracting the original netlist. The proposal uses differential doping to block the propagation of the skyrmions to realize the camouflaged gates. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose camouflaged skyrmion gates to prevent an adversary from performing reverse engineering. We demonstrate the functionality of different camouflaged gates using the mumax 3 micromagnetic simulator. We have also evaluated the security of the proposed camouflaged designs using SAT attacks. We show that the same security from the traditional CMOS-based camouflaged circuits can be retained.
papers.abstract_zh: 磁性斯格明子由于其超高的集成密度和超低的能量，有潜力成为新兴技术的候选者之一。斯格明子是通过铁磁 (FM) 层中的横向电流注入产生的磁性图案。斯格明子可以通过局域自旋极化电流产生，并且表现得像稳定的赝粒子。已经提出了不同的逻辑门，其中单个斯格明子的存在或不存在分别表示为二进制逻辑1或逻辑0。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的伪装逻辑门设计，以防止对手提取原始网表。该提案使用不同的掺杂来阻止斯格明子的传播，以实现伪装栅极。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出伪装斯格明子门以防止对手进行逆向工程的人。我们使用 mumax 3 微磁模拟器演示了不同伪装门的功能。我们还评估了使用 SAT 攻击的伪装设计的安全性。我们证明，可以保留与传统基于 CMOS 的伪装电路相同的安全性。

papers.title: CarM: hierarchical episodic memory for continual learning.
papers.abstract: Continual Learning (CL) is an emerging machine learning paradigm in mobile or IoT devices that learns from a continuous stream of tasks. To avoid forgetting of knowledge of the previous tasks, episodic memory (EM) methods exploit a subset of the past samples while learning from new data. Despite the promising results, prior studies are mostly simulation-based and unfortunately do not promise to meet an insatiable demand for both EM capacity and system efficiency in practical system setups. We propose CarM, the first CL framework that meets the demand by a novel hierarchical EM management strategy. CarM has EM on high-speed RAMs for system efficiency and exploits the abundant storage to preserve past experiences and alleviate the forgetting by allowing CL to efficiently migrate samples between memory and storage. Extensive evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms popular CL methods while providing high training efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）是移动或物联网设备中新兴的机器学习范例，它从连续的任务流中学习。为了避免忘记先前任务的知识，情景记忆（EM）方法在从新数据中学习的同时利用过去样本的子集。尽管结果令人鼓舞，但先前的研究大多基于模拟，不幸的是并不能满足实际系统设置中对电磁容量和系统效率的无限需求。我们提出了 CarM，这是第一个通过新颖的分层 EM 管理策略满足需求的 CL 框架。 CarM 在高速 RAM 上配备 EM，以提高系统效率，并利用丰富的存储空间来保存过去的经验，并通过允许 CL 在内存和存储之间有效地迁移样本来减少遗忘。广泛的评估表明，我们的方法显着优于流行的 CL 方法，同时提供高训练效率。

papers.title: CDB: critical data backup design for consumer devices with high-density flash based hybrid storage.
papers.abstract: Hybrid flash based storage constructed with high-density and low-cost flash memory are becoming increasingly popular in consumer devices during the last decade. However, to protect critical data, existing methods are designed for improving reliability of consumer devices with non-hybrid flash storage. Based on evaluations and analysis, these methods will result in significant performance and lifetime degradation in consumer devices with hybrid storage. The reason is that different kinds of memory in hybrid storage have different characteristics, such as performance and access granularity. To address the above problems, a critical data backup (CDB) method is proposed to backup designated critical data with making full use of different kinds of memory in hybrid storage. Experiment results show that compared with the state-of-the-arts, CDB achieves encouraging performance and lifetime improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，采用高密度和低成本闪存构建的混合闪存存储在消费设备中变得越来越流行。然而，为了保护关键数据，现有方法旨在提高具有非混合闪存的消费设备的可靠性。根据评估和分析，这些方法将导致具有混合存储的消费设备的性能和寿命显着下降。原因是混合存储中不同种类的内存具有不同的特性，例如性能和访问粒度。针对上述问题，提出了一种关键数据备份（CDB）方法，充分利用混合存储中不同类型的内存来备份指定的关键数据。实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，CDB 实现了令人鼓舞的性能和寿命改进。

papers.title: Chiplet actuary: a quantitative cost model and multi-chiplet architecture exploration.
papers.abstract: Multi-chip integration is widely recognized as the extension of Moore's Law. Cost-saving is a frequently mentioned advantage, but previous works rarely present quantitative demonstrations on the cost superiority of multi-chip integration over monolithic SoC. In this paper, we build a quantitative cost model and put forward an analytical method for multi-chip systems based on three typical multi-chip integration technologies to analyze the cost benefits from yield improvement, chiplet and package reuse, and heterogeneity. We re-examine the actual cost of multi-chip systems from various perspectives and show how to reduce the total cost of the VLSI system through appropriate multi-chiplet architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: 多芯片集成被广泛认为是摩尔定律的延伸。节省成本是一个经常被提及的优势，但之前的工作很少对多芯片集成相对于单片 SoC 的成本优势进行定量论证。在本文中，我们建立了一个定量成本模型，并提出了一种基于三种典型多芯片集成技术的多芯片系统分析方法，以分析良率提高、小芯片和封装复用以及异构性带来的成本效益。我们从各个角度重新审视多芯片系统的实际成本，并展示如何通过适当的多chiplet架构来降低VLSI系统的总成本。

papers.title: CLIMBER: defending phase change memory against inconsistent write attacks.
papers.abstract: Non-volatile Memories (NVMs) usually demonstrate vast endurance variation due to Process Variation (PV). They are vulnerable to an Inconsistent Write Attack (IWA) which reverses the write intensity distribution in two adjacent wear leveling windows. In this paper, we propose CLIMBER, a defense mechanism to neutralize IWA for NVMs. CLIMBER dynamically changes harmful address mappings so that intensive writes to weak cells are still redirected to strong cells. CLIMBER also conceals weak NVM cells from attackers by randomly mapping cold addresses to weak NVM regions. Experimental results show that CLIMBER can reduce maximum page wear rate by 43.2% compared with the state-of-the-art Toss-up Wear Leveling and prolong NVM lifetime from 4.19 years to 7.37 years with trivial performance/hardware overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于工艺变化 (PV)，非易失性存储器 (NVM) 通常会表现出巨大的耐用性变化。它们容易受到不一致写入攻击 (IWA) 的影响，这种攻击会反转两个相邻磨损均衡窗口中的写入强度分布。在本文中，我们提出了 CLIMBER，一种用于抵消 NVM 的 IWA 的防御机制。 CLIMBER 动态更改有害的地址映射，以便对弱单元的密集写入仍会重定向到强单元。 CLIMBER 还通过将冷地址随机映射到弱 NVM 区域，向攻击者隐藏弱 NVM 单元。实验结果表明，与最先进的 Toss-up Wear Leveling 相比，CLIMBER 可以将最大页面磨损率降低 43.2%，并将 NVM 寿命从 4.19 年延长到 7.37 年，而性能/硬件开销很小。

papers.title: CNN-inspired analytical global placement for large-scale heterogeneous FPGAs.
papers.abstract: The fast-growing capacity and complexity are challenging for FPGA global placement. Besides, while many recent studies have focused on the eDensity-based placement as its great efficiency and quality, they suffer from redundant frequency translation. This paper presents a CNN-inspired analytical placement algorithm to effectively handle the redundant frequency translation problem for large-scale FPGAs. Specifically, we compute the density penalty by a fully-connected propagation and gradient to a discrete differential convolution backward. With the FPGA heterogeneity, vectorization plays a vital role in self-adjusting the density penalty factor and the learning rate. In addition, a pseudo net model is used to further optimize the site constraints by establishing connections between blocks and their nearest available regions. Finally, we formulate a refined objective function and a degree-specific gradient preconditioning to achieve a robust, high-quality solution. Experimental results show that our algorithm achieves an 8% reduction on HPWL and 15% less global placement runtime on average over leading commercial tools.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速增长的容量和复杂性对 FPGA 的全球布局提出了挑战。此外，虽然最近的许多研究都集中在基于 eDensity 的布局上，因为它具有很高的效率和质量，但它们存在冗余频率转换的问题。本文提出了一种受 CNN 启发的分析放置算法，可有效处理大规模 FPGA 的冗余频率转换问题。具体来说，我们通过全连接传播和向后离散差分卷积梯度来计算密度惩罚。由于FPGA的异构性，矢量化在自我调整密度惩罚因子和学习率方面发挥着至关重要的作用。此外，使用伪网络模型通过在街区与其最近的可用区域之间建立连接来进一步优化场地约束。最后，我们制定了精确的目标函数和特定程度的梯度预处理，以实现稳健、高质量的解决方案。实验结果表明，与领先的商业工具相比，我们的算法平均 HPWL 减少了 8%，全局布局运行时间平均减少了 15%。

papers.title: Compressive sensing based asymmetric semantic image compression for resource-constrained IoT system.
papers.abstract: The widespread application of Internet-of-Things (IoT) and deep learning have made machine-to-machine semantic communication possible. However, it remains challenging to deploy DNN model on IoT devices, due to their limited computing and storage capacity. In this paper, we propose Compressed Sensing based Asymmetric Semantic Image Compression (CS-ASIC) for resource-constrained IoT systems, which consists of a lightweight front encoder and a deep iterative decoder offloaded at the server. We further consider a task-oriented scenario and optimize CS-ASIC for the semantic recognition tasks. The experiment results demonstrate that CS-ASIC achieves considerable data-semantic rate-distortion trade-off, and low encoding complexity over prevailing codecs.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网和深度学习的广泛应用使机器对机器的语义通信成为可能。然而，由于物联网设备的计算和存储容量有限，在物联网设备上部署 DNN 模型仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们针对资源受限的物联网系统提出了基于压缩感知的非对称语义图像压缩（CS-ASIC），它由轻量级前端编码器和在服务器上卸载的深度迭代解码器组成。我们进一步考虑面向任务的场景，并针对语义识别任务优化 CS-ASIC。实验结果表明，与主流编解码器相比，CS-ASIC 实现了相当大的数据语义率失真权衡，并且编码复杂度较低。

papers.title: Conditional address propagation: an efficient defense mechanism against transient execution attacks.
papers.abstract: Speculative execution is a critical technique in modern high performance processors. However, continuously exposed transient execution attacks, including Spectre and Meltdown, disclosed a large attack surface in mispredicted execution. Current state-of-the-art defense strategy blocks all memory accesses that use addresses loaded speculatively. However, propagation of base addresses is common in general applications and we find that more than 60% blocked memory accesses use propagated base rather than offset addresses. Therefore, we propose a novel hardware defense mechanism, named Conditional Address Propagation, to identify safe base addresses through taint tracking and address checking by a History Table. Then, the safe base addresses are allowed to be propagated to retrieve performance. For remaining unsafe addresses, they cannot be propagated for security. We constructed experiments on cycle-accurate Gem5 simulator. Compared to the representative study, STT, our mechanism effectively decreases the performance overhead from 13.27% to 1.92% targeting Spectre-type and 19.66% to 5.23% targeting all-type cache-based transient execution attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: 推测执行是现代高性能处理器中的一项关键技术。然而，持续暴露的瞬态执行攻击（包括 Spectre 和 Meltdown）暴露了错误预测执行中的巨大攻击面。当前最先进的防御策略会阻止所有使用推测加载地址的内存访问。然而，基地址传播在一般应用中很常见，我们发现超过 60% 的阻塞内存访问使用传播基地址而不是偏移地址。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件防御机制，称为条件地址传播，通过历史表的污点跟踪和地址检查来识别安全基地址。然后，允许传播安全基地址以检索性能。对于剩余的不安全地址，出于安全考虑，它们不能被传播。我们在周期精确的 Gem5 模拟器上构建了实验。与代表性研究 STT 相比，我们的机制有效地将针对 Spectre 类型的性能开销从 13.27% 降低到 1.92%，针对所有类型的基于缓存的瞬时执行攻击从 19.66% 降低到 5.23%。

papers.title: Contrastive quant: quantization makes stronger contrastive learning.
papers.abstract: Contrastive learning learns visual representations by enforcing feature consistency under different augmented views. In this work, we explore contrastive learning from a new perspective. Interestingly, we find that quantization, when properly engineered, can enhance the effectiveness of contrastive learning. To this end, we propose a novel contrastive learning framework, dubbed Contrastive Quant, to encourage feature consistency under both differently augmented inputs via various data transformations and differently augmented weights/activations via various quantization levels. Extensive experiments, built on top of two state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods SimCLR and BYOL, show that Contrastive Quant consistently improves the learned visual representation.
papers.abstract_zh: 对比学习通过在不同增强视图下强制特征一致性来学习视觉表示。在这项工作中，我们从新的角度探索对比学习。有趣的是，我们发现，如果设计得当，量化可以提高对比学习的有效性。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的对比学习框架，称为“Contrastive Quant”，以通过各种数据转换来鼓励不同增强输入下的特征一致性，并通过各种量化级别来鼓励不同增强权重/激活下的特征一致性。基于两种最先进的对比学习方法 SimCLR 和 BYOL 构建的大量实验表明，Contrastive Quant 持续改进了学习到的视觉表示。

papers.title: CP-SRAM: charge-pulsation SRAM marco for ultra-high energy-efficiency computing-in-memory.
papers.abstract: SRAM-based computing-in-memory (SRAM-CIM) provides fast speed and good scalability with advanced process technology. However, the energy efficiency of the state-of-the-art current-domain SRAM-CIM bit-cell structure is limited and the peripheral circuitry (e.g., DAC/ADC) for high-precision is expensive. This paper proposes a charge-pulsation SRAM (CP-SRAM) structure to achieve ultra-high energy-efficiency thanks to its charge-domain mechanism. Furthermore, our proposed CP-SRAM CIM supports configurable precision (2/4/6-bit). The CP-SRAM CIM macro was designed in 180nm (with silicon verification) and 40nm (simulation) nodes. The simulation results in 40nm show that our macro can achieve energy efficiency of ~2950Tops/W at 2-bit precision, ~576.4 Tops/W at 4-bit precision and ~111.7 Tops/W at 6-bit precision, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (SRAM-CIM) 通过先进的处理技术提供快速的速度和良好的可扩展性。然而，最先进的电流域 SRAM-CIM 位单元结构的能效有限，且高精度外围电路（例如 DAC/ADC）价格昂贵。本文提出了一种电荷脉动SRAM（CP-SRAM）结构，凭借其电荷域机制实现超高能效。此外，我们提出的 CP-SRAM CIM 支持可配置精度（2/4/6 位）。 CP-SRAM CIM 宏在 180nm（带硅验证）和 40nm（模拟）节点中设计。 40nm 的仿真结果表明，我们的宏可以在 2 位精度下实现约 2950Tops/W 的能效，在 4 位精度下实现约 576.4 Tops/W 的能效，在 6 位精度下实现约 111.7 Tops/W 的能效。

papers.title: CREAM: computing in ReRAM-assisted energy and area-efficient SRAM for neural network acceleration.
papers.abstract: Computing-in-memory has been widely explored to accelerate DNN. However, most existing CIM cannot store all NN weights due to limited SRAM capacity for edge AI devices, inducing a large amount off-chip DRAM access. In this paper, a new computing in ReRAM-assisted energy and area-efficient SRAM (CREAM) is proposed for implementing large-scale NNs while eliminating off-chip DRAM access. The weights of DNN are all stored in the high-dense on-chip ReRAM devices and restored to the proposed nvSRAM-CIM cells with array-level parallelism. A data-aware weight-mapping method is also proposed to enhance the CIM performance while fully exploiting the hardware utilization. Experiment results show that the proposed CREAM scheme enhances the storage density by up to 7.94x compared to the traditional SRAM arrays. The energy-efficiency of proposed CREAM is also enhanced by 2.14x and 1.99x, compared to the traditional SRAM-CIM with off-chip DRAM access and ReRAM-CIM circuits, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存计算已被广泛探索以加速 DNN。然而，由于边缘 AI 设备的 SRAM 容量有限，大多数现有 CIM 无法存储所有 NN 权重，从而导致大量的片外 DRAM 访问。在本文中，提出了一种 ReRAM 辅助能源和面积高效 SRAM (CREAM) 的新计算，用于实现大规模神经网络，同时消除片外 DRAM 访问。 DNN 的权重全部存储在高密度片上 ReRAM 器件中，并以阵列级并行性恢复到所提出的 nvSRAM-CIM 单元中。还提出了一种数据感知权重映射方法，以在充分利用硬件利用率的同时增强 CIM 性能。实验结果表明，与传统的SRAM阵列相比，所提出的CREAM方案将存储密度提高了7.94倍。与具有片外 DRAM 访问的传统 SRAM-CIM 和 ReRAM-CIM 电路相比，所提出的 CREAM 的能效也分别提高了 2.14 倍和 1.99 倍。

papers.title: DA PUF: dual-state analog PUF.
papers.abstract: Physical unclonable function (PUF) is a promising lightweight hardware security primitive that exploits process variations during chip fabrication for applications such as key generation and device authentication. Reliability of the PUF information plays a vital role and poses a major challenge for PUF design. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-state analog PUF (DA PUF) which has been successfully fabricated in 55nm process. The 40,960 bits generated by the fabricated DA PUF pass the NIST randomness test with reliability over 99.99% for working environment of -40 ~ 125° C (temperature) and 0.96 ~ 1.44V (voltage), outperforming the two state-of-the-art analog PUFs reported in JSSC 2016 and 2021.
papers.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 是一种很有前途的轻量级硬件安全原语，它利用芯片制造过程中的工艺变化来实现密钥生成和设备身份验证等应用。 PUF信息的可靠性起着至关重要的作用，并对PUF设计提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型双态模拟PUF（DA PUF），并已在55nm工艺中成功制造。所制造的 DA PUF 生成的 40,960 位通过了 NIST 随机性测试，在 -40 ~ 125°C（温度）和 0.96 ~ 1.44V（电压）的工作环境下可靠性超过 99.99%，优于 JSSC 2016 和 2021 中报告的两种最先进的模拟 PUF。

papers.title: DARPT: defense against remote physical attack based on TDC in multi-tenant scenario.
papers.abstract: With rapidly increasing demands for cloud computing, Field Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) has become popular in cloud datacenters. Although it improves computing performance through flexible hardware acceleration, new security concerns also come along. For example, unavoidable physical leakage from the Power Distribution Network (PDN) can be utilized by attackers to mount remote Side-Channel Attacks (SCA), such as Correlation Power Attacks (CPA). Remote Fault Attacks (FA) can also be successfully presented by malicious tenants in a cloud multi-tenant scenario, posing a significant threat to legal tenants. There are few hardware-based countermeasures to defeat both remote attacks that aforementioned. In this work, we exploit Time-to-Digital Converter (TDC) and propose a novel defense technique called DARPT (Defense Against Remote Physical attack based on TDC) to protect sensitive information from CPA and FA. Specifically, DARPT produces random clock jitters to reduce possible information leakage through the power side-channel and provides an early warning of FA by constantly monitoring the variation of the voltage drop across PDN. In comparison to the fact that 8k traces are enough for a successful CPA on FPGA without DARPT, our experimental results show that up to 800k traces (100 times) are not enough for the same FPGA protected by DARPT. Meanwhile, the TDC-based voltage monitor presents significant readout changes (by 51.82% or larger) under FA with ring oscillators, demonstrating sufficient sensitivities to voltage-drop-based FA.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着云计算需求的快速增长，现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）在云数据中心中变得越来越流行。虽然它通过灵活的硬件加速提高了计算性能，但新的安全问题也随之而来。例如，攻击者可以利用配电网络 (PDN) 中不可避免的物理泄漏来发起远程侧通道攻击 (SCA)，例如相关功率攻击 (CPA)。在云多租户场景中，恶意租户也可以成功发起远程故障攻击（FA），对合法租户构成重大威胁。很少有基于硬件的对策可以击败上述两种远程攻击。在这项工作中，我们利用时间数字转换器（TDC）并提出了一种称为 DARPT（基于 TDC 的远程物理攻击防御）的新型防御技术，以保护来自 CPA 和 FA 的敏感信息。具体来说，DARPT 会产生随机时钟抖动，以减少通过电源侧通道可能发生的信息泄漏，并通过持续监控 PDN 上压降的变化来提供 FA 早期预警。与 8k 迹线足以在没有 DARPT 的 FPGA 上成功进行 CPA 的事实相比，我们的实验结果表明，对于受 DARPT 保护的同一 FPGA，最多 800k 迹线（100 次）是不够的。同时，基于 TDC 的电压监视器在使用环形振荡器的 FA 下呈现出显着的读数变化（51.82% 或更大），表明对基于压降的 FA 具有足够的灵敏度。

papers.title: DeepGate: learning neural representations of logic gates.
papers.abstract: Applying deep learning (DL) techniques in the electronic design automation (EDA) field has become a trending topic. Most solutions apply well-developed DL models to solve specific EDA problems. While demonstrating promising results, they require careful model tuning for every problem. The fundamental question on "How to obtain a general and effective neural representation of circuits?" has not been answered yet. In this work, we take the first step towards solving this problem. We propose DeepGate , a novel representation learning solution that effectively embeds both logic function and structural information of a circuit as vectors on each gate. Specifically, we propose transforming circuits into unified and-inverter graph format for learning and using signal probabilities as the supervision task in DeepGate. We then introduce a novel graph neural network that uses strong inductive biases in practical circuits as learning priors for signal probability prediction. Our experimental results show the efficacy and generalization capability of DeepGate.
papers.abstract_zh: 将深度学习（DL）技术应用于电子设计自动化（EDA）领域已成为一个热门话题。大多数解决方案都应用成熟的深度学习模型来解决特定的 EDA 问题。在展示有希望的结果的同时，他们需要对每个问题进行仔细的模型调整。基本问题是“如何获得电路的通用且有效的神经表示？”尚未得到答复。在这项工作中，我们迈出了解决这个问题的第一步。我们提出了 DeepGate，一种新颖的表示学习解决方案，它可以有效地将电路的逻辑功能和结构信息作为向量嵌入到每个门上。具体来说，我们建议将电路转换为统一的反相图格式，以便学习和使用信号概率作为 DeepGate 中的监督任务。然后，我们介绍一种新颖的图神经网络，该网络在实际电路中使用强归纳偏差作为信号概率预测的学习先验。我们的实验结果展示了 DeepGate 的功效和泛化能力。

papers.title: DELTA: DEsigning a stealthy trigger mechanism for analog hardware trojans and its detection analysis.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a stealthy triggering mechanism that reduces the dependencies of analog hardware Trojans on the frequent toggling of the software-controlled rare nets. The trigger to activate the Trojan is generated by using a glitch generation circuit and a clock signal, which increases the selectivity and feasibility of the trigger signal. The proposed trigger is able to evade the state-of-the-art run-time detection (R2D2) and Built-In Acceleration Structure (BIAS) schemes. Furthermore, the simulation results show that the proposed trigger circuit incurs a minimal overhead in side-channel footprints in terms of area (29 transistors), delay (less than 1 ps in the clock cycle), and power (1 μ W).
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种隐秘的触发机制，可以减少模拟硬件木马对软件控制的稀有网络频繁切换的依赖。利用毛刺产生电路和时钟信号来产生激活木马的触发信号，增加了触发信号的选择性和可行性。所提出的触发器能够逃避最先进的运行时检测（R2D2）和内置加速结构（BIAS）方案。此外，仿真结果表明，所提出的触发电路在侧通道占用面积（29 个晶体管）、延迟（时钟周期中小于 1 ps）和功率（1 μW）方面的开销最小。

papers.title: Design-while-verify: correct-by-construction control learning with verification in the loop.
papers.abstract: In the current control design of safety-critical cyber-physical systems, formal verification techniques are typically applied after the controller is designed to evaluate whether the required properties (e.g., safety) are satisfied. However, due to the increasing system complexity and the fundamental hardness of designing a controller with formal guarantees, such an open-loop process of design-then-verify often results in many iterations and fails to provide the necessary guarantees. In this paper, we propose a correct-by-construction control learning framework that integrates the verification into the control design process in a closed-loop manner, i.e., design-while-verify. Specifically, we leverage the verification results (computed reachable set of the system state) to construct feedback metrics for control learning, which measure how likely the current design of control parameters can meet the required reach-avoid property for safety and goal-reaching. We formulate an optimization problem based on such metrics for tuning the controller parameters, and develop an approximated gradient descent algorithm with a difference method to solve the optimization problem and learn the controller. The learned controller is formally guaranteed to meet the required reach-avoid property. By treating verifiability as a first-class objective and effectively leveraging the verification results during the control learning process, our approach can significantly improve the chance of finding a control design with formal property guarantees, demonstrated in a set of experiments that use model-based or neural network based controllers.
papers.abstract_zh: 在当前安全关键信息物理系统的控制设计中，通常在控制器设计后应用形式验证技术来评估是否满足所需的属性（例如安全性）。然而，由于系统复杂性不断增加，以及设计具有形式保证的控制器的基本难度，这种先设计后验证的开环过程往往会导致多次迭代，并且无法提供必要的保证。在本文中，我们提出了一种构建正确的控制学习框架，该框架以闭环方式将验证集成到控制设计过程中，即边验证边设计。具体来说，我们利用验证结果（系统状态的计算可达集）来构建控制学习的反馈指标，该指标衡量控制参数的当前设计能够满足安全和目标达成所需的触及避免属性的可能性。我们根据这些指标制定优化问题来调整控制器参数，并开发一种采用差分法的近似梯度下降算法来解决优化问题并学习控制器。正式保证学习的控制器满足所需的避免到达属性。通过将可验证性视为首要目标并在控制学习过程中有效利用验证结果，我们的方法可以显着提高找到具有形式属性保证的控制设计的机会，这在一组使用基于模型或基于神经网络的控制器的实验中得到了证明。

papers.title: Designing critical systems with iterative automated safety analysis.
papers.abstract: Safety analysis is an important aspect in Safety-Critical Systems Engineering (SCSE) to discover design problems that can potentially lead to hazards and eventually, accidents. Performing safety analysis requires significant manual effort --- its automation has become the research focus in the critical system domain due to the increasing complexity of systems and emergence of open adaptive systems. In this paper, we present a methodology, in which automated safety analysis drives the design of safety-critical systems. We discuss our approach with its tool support and evaluate its applicability. We briefly discuss how our approach fits into current practice of SCSE.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全分析是安全关键系统工程 (SCSE) 的一个重要方面，用于发现可能导致危险并最终导致事故的设计问题。执行安全分析需要大量的人工工作——由于系统复杂性的增加和开放自适应系统的出现，安全分析的自动化已成为关键系统领域的研究热点。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法，其中自动化安全分析驱动安全关键系统的设计。我们讨论我们的方法及其工具支持并评估其适用性。我们简要讨论我们的方法如何适应当前 SCSE 的实践。

papers.title: Designing ML-resilient locking at register-transfer level.
papers.abstract: Various logic-locking schemes have been proposed to protect hardware from intellectual property piracy and malicious design modifications. Since traditional locking techniques are applied on the gate-level netlist after logic synthesis, they have no semantic knowledge of the design function. Data-driven, machine-learning (ML) attacks can uncover the design flaws within gate-level locking. Recent proposals on register-transfer level (RTL) locking have access to semantic hardware information. We investigate the resilience of ASSURE, a state-of-the-art RTL locking method, against ML attacks. We used the lessons learned to derive two ML-resilient RTL locking schemes built to reinforce ASSURE locking. We developed ML-driven security metrics to evaluate the schemes against an RTL adaptation of the state-of-the-art, ML-based SnapShot attack.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们已经提出了各种逻辑锁定方案来保护硬件免受知识产权盗版和恶意设计修改的影响。由于传统的锁定技术应用于逻辑综合后的门级网表，因此它们没有设计功能的语义知识。数据驱动的机器学习 (ML) 攻击可以发现门级锁定中的设计缺陷。最近关于寄存器传输级（RTL）锁定的提议可以访问语义硬件信息。我们研究了 ASSURE（一种最先进的 RTL 锁定方法）针对 ML 攻击的恢复能力。我们利用吸取的经验教训推导出两种 ML 弹性 RTL 锁定方案，旨在加强 ASSURE 锁定。我们开发了 ML 驱动的安全指标，以针对最先进的基于 ML 的 SnapShot 攻击的 RTL 改编来评估方案。

papers.title: DETERRENT: detecting trojans using reinforcement learning.
papers.abstract: Insertion of hardware Trojans (HTs) in integrated circuits is a pernicious threat. Since HTs are activated under rare trigger conditions, detecting them using random logic simulations is infeasible. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that circumvents the exponential search space and returns a minimal set of patterns that is most likely to detect HTs. Experimental results on a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and scalability of our RL agent, which obtains a significant reduction (169×) in the number of test patterns required while maintaining or improving coverage (95.75%) compared to the state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 在集成电路中插入硬件木马 (HT) 是一种有害的威胁。由于 HT 在罕见的触发条件下被激活，因此使用随机逻辑模拟来检测它们是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个强化学习 (RL) 代理，它绕过指数搜索空间并返回最有可能检测到 HT 的最小模式集。各种基准的实验结果证明了我们的 RL 代理的有效性和可扩展性，与最先进的技术相比，它在保持或提高覆盖率 (95.75%) 的同时，显着减少 (169 倍) 所需的测试模式数量。

papers.title: Differentiable-timing-driven global placement.
papers.abstract: Placement is critical to the timing closure of the very-large-scale integrated (VLSI) circuit design flow. This paper proposes a differentiable-timing-driven global placement framework inspired by deep neural networks. By establishing the analogy between static timing analysis and neural network propagation, we propose a differentiable timing objective for placement to explicitly optimize timing metrics such as total negative slack (TNS) and worst negative slack (WNS). The framework can achieve at most 32.7% and 59.1% improvements on WNS and TNS respectively compared with the state-of-the-art timing-driven placer, and achieve 1.80× speed-up when both running on GPU.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局对于超大规模集成 (VLSI) 电路设计流程的时序收敛至关重要。本文提出了一种受深度神经网络启发的可微时序驱动的全局布局框架。通过建立静态时序分析和神经网络传播之间的类比，我们提出了一个可微分时序目标用于布局，以显式优化时序指标，例如总负裕度（TNS）和最差负裕度（WNS）。与最先进的时序驱动布局器相比，该框架在 WNS 和 TNS 上分别实现了最多 32.7% 和 59.1% 的改进，并且在 GPU 上运行时实现了 1.80 倍的加速。

papers.title: Domain knowledge-infused deep learning for automated analog/radio-frequency circuit parameter optimization.
papers.abstract: The design automation of analog circuits is a longstanding challenge. This paper presents a reinforcement learning method enhanced by graph learning to automate the analog circuit parameter optimization at the pre-layout stage, i.e., finding device parameters to fulfill desired circuit specifications. Unlike all prior methods, our approach is inspired by human experts who rely on domain knowledge of analog circuit design (e.g., circuit topology and couplings between circuit specifications) to tackle the problem. By originally incorporating such key domain knowledge into policy training with a multimodal network, the method best learns the complex relations between circuit parameters and design targets, enabling optimal decisions in the optimization process. Experimental results on exemplary circuits show it achieves human-level design accuracy (~ 99% ) with 1.5 × efficiency of existing best-performing methods. Our method also shows better generalization ability to unseen specifications and optimality in circuit performance optimization. Moreover, it applies to design radio-frequency circuits on emerging semiconductor technologies, breaking the limitations of prior learning methods in designing conventional analog circuits.
papers.abstract_zh: 模拟电路的设计自动化是一个长期存在的挑战。本文提出了一种通过图学习增强的强化学习方法，可在预布局阶段自动进行模拟电路参数优化，即找到满足所需电路规格的器件参数。与所有现有方法不同，我们的方法受到人类专家的启发，他们依靠模拟电路设计的领域知识（例如电路拓扑和电路规范之间的耦合）来解决问题。通过最初将这些关键领域知识纳入多模态网络的策略训练中，该方法可以最好地学习电路参数和设计目标之间的复杂关系，从而在优化过程中实现最佳决策。示例电路的实验结果表明，它实现了人类水平的设计精度 (~ 99%)，效率是现有最佳性能方法的 1.5 倍。我们的方法还显示出对未见规范的更好泛化能力以及电路性能优化的最优性。而且，它适用于新兴半导体技术上的射频电路设计，突破了现有学习方法在设计传统模拟电路时的局限性。

papers.title: Don't open row: rethinking row buffer policy for improving performance of non-volatile memories.
papers.abstract: Among the various NVM technologies, phase-change-memory (PCM) has attracted substantial attention as a candidate to replace the DRAM for next-generation memory. However, the characteristics of PCM cause it to have much longer read and write latencies than DRAM. This paper proposes a Write-Around PCM System that addresses this limitation using two novel schemes: Pseudo-Row Activation and Direct Write. Pseudo-Row Activation provides fast row activation for PCM writes by connecting a target row to bitlines, but it does not fetch the data into the row buffer. With the Direct Write scheme, our system allows for writing operations to update the data even if the target row is in the logically closed state.
papers.abstract_zh: 在各种 NVM 技术中，相变存储器 (PCM) 作为下一代存储器替代 DRAM 的候选技术引起了广泛关注。但PCM的特性导致其读写延迟比DRAM要长得多。本文提出了一种 Write-Around PCM 系统，该系统使用两种新颖的方案解决了这一限制：伪行激活和直接写入。伪行激活通过将目标行连接到位线来为 PCM 写入提供快速行激活，但它不会将数据提取到行缓冲区中。通过直接写入方案，即使目标行处于逻辑关闭状态，我们的系统也允许写入操作来更新数据。

papers.title: E2SR: an end-to-end video CODEC assisted system for super resolution acceleration.
papers.abstract: Nowadays high-resolution (HR) videos have been a popular choice for a better viewing experience. Recent works have shown that super-resolution (SR) algorithms can provide superior quality HR video by applying the deep neural network (DNN) to each low-resolution (LR) frame. Obviously, such per-frame DNN processing is compute-intensive and hampers the deployment of SR algorithms on mobile devices. Although many accelerators have proposed solutions, they only focus on mobile devices. Differently, we notice that the HR video is originally stored in the cloud server and should be well exploited to gain high accuracy and performance improvement. Based on this observation, this paper proposes an end-to-end video CODEC assisted system (E 2 SR), which tightly couples the cloud server with the device to deliver a smooth and real-time video viewing experience. We propose the motion vector search algorithm executed in the cloud server, which can search the motion vectors and residuals for part of HR video frames and then pack them as addons. We further propose the reconstruction algorithm executed in the device to fast reconstruct the corresponding HR frames using the addons to skip part of DNN computations. We design the corresponding E 2 SR architecture to enable the reconstruction algorithm in the device, which achieves significant speedup with minimal hardware overhead. Our experimental results show that the E 2 SR system achieves 3.4x performance improvement with less than 0.56 PSNR loss compared with the state-of-the-art "EDVR" scheme.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，为了获得更好的观看体验，高分辨率 (HR) 视频已成为流行的选择。最近的研究表明，超分辨率 (SR) 算法可以通过将深度神经网络 (DNN) 应用于每个低分辨率 (LR) 帧来提供优质的 HR 视频。显然，这种每帧 DNN 处理是计算密集型的，并且阻碍了 SR 算法在移动设备上的部署。尽管许多加速器提出了解决方案，但它们只专注于移动设备。不同的是，我们注意到HR视频最初存储在云服务器中，应该充分利用以获得高精度和性能提升。基于这一观察，本文提出了一种端到端视频编解码器辅助系统（E 2 SR），它将云服务器与设备紧密耦合，以提供流畅、实时的视频观看体验。我们提出了在云服务器中执行的运动矢量搜索算法，该算法可以搜索部分 HR 视频帧的运动矢量和残差，然后将它们打包为插件。我们进一步提出了在设备中执行的重建算法，以使用插件跳过部分 DNN 计算来快速重建相应的 HR 帧。我们设计了相应的E 2 SR架构来实现设备中的重建算法，从而以最小的硬件开销实现显着的加速。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的“EDVR”方案相比，E 2 SR 系统实现了 3.4 倍的性能提升，PSNR 损失小于 0.56。

papers.title: EBSP: evolving bit sparsity patterns for hardware-friendly inference of quantized deep neural networks.
papers.abstract:
Model compression has been extensively investigated for supporting efficient neural network inference on edge-computing platforms due to the huge model size and computation amount. Recent researches embrace joint-way compression across multiple techniques for extreme compression. However, most joint-way methods adopt a naive solution that applies two approaches sequentially, which can be sub-optimal, as it lacks a systematic approach to incorporate them.

This paper proposes the integration of aggressive joint-way compression into hardware design, namely EBSP. It is motivated by 1) the quantization allows simplifying hardware implementations; 2) the bit distribution of quantized weights can be viewed as an independent trainable variable; 3) the exploitation of bit sparsity in the quantized network has the potential to achieve better performance. To achieve that, this paper introduces the bit sparsity patterns to construct both highly expressive and inherently regular bit distribution in the quantized network. We further incorporate our sparsity constraint in training to evolve inherently bit distributions to the bit sparsity pattern. Moreover, the structure of the introduced bit sparsity pattern engenders minimum hardware implementation under competitive classification accuracy. Specifically, the quantized network constrained by bit sparsity pattern can be processed using LUTs with the fewest entries instead of multipliers in minimally modified computational hardware. Our experiments show that compared to Eyeriss, BitFusion, WAX, and OLAccel, EBSP with less than 0.8% accuracy loss, can achieve 87.3%, 79.7%, 75.2% and 58.9% energy reduction and 93.8%, 83.7%, 72.7% and 49.5% performance gain on average, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于模型尺寸和计算量巨大，模型压缩已被广泛研究以支持边缘计算平台上的高效神经网络推理。最近的研究包括跨多种技术的联合压缩以实现极限压缩。然而，大多数联合方法采用一种简单的解决方案，即顺序应用两种方法，这可能不是最优的，因为它缺乏系统的方法来合并它们。

本文提出将积极的联合方式压缩集成到硬件设计中，即EBSP。其动机是：1）量化可以简化硬件实现； 2）量化权重的比特分布可以看作是一个独立的可训练变量； 3）在量化网络中利用位稀疏性有可能实现更好的性能。为了实现这一目标，本文引入了位稀疏模式，以在量化网络中构建高度表达且固有规则的位分布。我们进一步将稀疏性约束纳入训练中，以将固有的位分布演化为位稀疏模式。此外，所引入的位稀疏模式的结构在有竞争力的分类精度下产生最少的硬件实现。具体来说，受位稀疏模式约束的量化网络可以使用具有最少条目的 LUT 来处理，而不是在最小修改的计算硬件中使用乘法器。我们的实验表明，与 Eyeriss、BitFusion、WAX 和 OLAccel 相比，EBSP 的精度损失小于 0.8%，平均可以分别实现 87.3%、79.7%、75.2% 和 58.9% 的能量降低以及 93.8%、83.7%、72.7% 和 49.5% 的性能增益。

papers.title: EcoFusion: energy-aware adaptive sensor fusion for efficient autonomous vehicle perception.
papers.abstract: page for arXiv paper 2202.11330: EcoFusion: Energy-Aware Adaptive Sensor Fusion for Efficient Autonomous Vehicle Perception
papers.abstract_zh: arXiv 论文 2202.11330 的页面：EcoFusion：用于高效自主车辆感知的能量感知自适应传感器融合

papers.title: Effective zero compression on ReRAM-based sparse DNN accelerators.
papers.abstract: For efficient DNN inference Resistive RAM (ReRAM) crossbars have emerged as a promising building block to compute matrix multiplication in an area- and power-efficient manner. To improve inference throughput sparse models can be deployed on the ReRAM-based DNN accelerator. While unstructured pruning maintains both high accuracy and high sparsity, it performs poorly on the crossbar architecture due to the irregular locations of pruned weights. Meanwhile, due to the non-ideality of ReRAM cells and the high cost of ADCs, matrix multiplication is usually performed at a fine granularity, called Operation Unit (OU), along both wordline and bitline dimensions. While fine-grained, OU- based row compression (ORC) has recently been proposed to increase weight compression ratio, significant performance potentials are still left on the table due to sub-optimal weight mappings. Thus, we propose a novel weight mapping scheme that effectively clusters zero weights via OU-level filter reordering, hence improving the effective weight compression ratio. We also introduce a weight recovery scheme to further improve accuracy or compression ratio, or both. Our evaluation with three popular DNNs demonstrates that the proposed scheme effectively eliminates redundant weights in the crossbar array and hence ineffectual computation to achieve 3.27--4.26× of array compression ratio with negligible accuracy loss over the baseline ReRAM-based DNN accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了实现高效的 DNN 推理，电阻 RAM (ReRAM) 交叉开关已成为一种很有前景的构建块，可以以节省面积和功耗的方式计算矩阵乘法。为了提高推理吞吐量，稀疏模型可以部署在基于 ReRAM 的 DNN 加速器上。虽然非结构化剪枝保持了高精度和高稀疏性，但由于剪枝权重的位置不规则，它在 crossbar 架构上表现不佳。同时，由于 ReRAM 单元的非理想性和 ADC 的高成本，矩阵乘法通常在字线和位线维度上以细粒度（称为操作单元（OU））执行。虽然最近提出了基于 OU 的细粒度行压缩 (ORC) 来提高权重压缩比，但由于次优权重映射，仍然存在显着的性能潜力。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的权重映射方案，通过OU级过滤器重新排序有效地聚类零权重，从而提高有效的权重压缩比。我们还引入了权重恢复方案，以进一步提高准确性或压缩比，或两者兼而有之。我们对三种流行的 DNN 的评估表明，所提出的方案有效地消除了交叉阵列中的冗余权重，从而消除了无效的计算，以实现 3.27--4.26× 的阵列压缩比，并且与基于 ReRAM 的基线 DNN 加速器相比，精度损失可以忽略不计。

papers.title: Efficiency attacks on spiking neural networks.
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks are a class of artificial neural networks that process information as discrete spikes. The time and energy consumed in SNN implementations is strongly dependent on the number of spikes processed. We explore this sensitivity from an adversarial perspective and propose SpikeAttack, a completely new class of attacks on SNNs. SpikeAttack impacts the efficiency of SNNs via imperceptible perturbations that increase the overall spiking activity of the network, leading to increased time and energy consumption. Across four SNN benchmarks, SpikeAttackresults in 1.7x-2.5X increase in spike activity, leading to increases of 1.6x-2.3x and 1.4x-2.2x in latency and energy consumption, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络是一类将信息处理为离散尖峰的人工神经网络。 SNN 实现中消耗的时间和能量很大程度上取决于处理的尖峰数量。我们从对抗的角度探讨了这种敏感性，并提出了 SpikeAttack，这是一种针对 SNN 的全新攻击类别。 SpikeAttack 通过难以察觉的扰动影响 SNN 的效率，这些扰动会增加网络的整体尖峰活动，从而导致时间和能源消耗增加。在四个 SNN 基准测试中，SpikeAttack 导致尖峰活动增加 1.7 倍至 2.5 倍，从而导致延迟和能耗分别增加 1.6 倍至 2.3 倍和 1.4 倍至 2.2 倍。

papers.title: Efficient access scheme for multi-bank based NTT architecture through conflict graph.
papers.abstract: Number Theoretical Transform (NTT) hardware accelerator becomes crucial building block in many cryptosystems like post-quantum cryptography. In this paper, we provide new insights into the construction of conflict-free memory mapping scheme (CFMMS) for multi-bank NTT architecture. Firstly, we offer parallel loop structure of arbitrary-radix NTT and propose two point-fetching modes. Afterwards, we transform the conflict-free mapping problem into conflict graph and develop novel heuristic to explore the design space of CFMMS, which turns out more efficient access scheme than classic works. To further verify the methodology, we design high-performance NTT/INTT kernels for Dilithium, whose area-time efficiency significantly outperforms state-of-the-art works on the similar FPGA platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 数论变换 (NTT) 硬件加速器成为许多密码系统（例如后量子密码学）中的关键构建模块。在本文中，我们为多组 NTT 架构的无冲突内存映射方案（CFMMS）的构建提供了新的见解。首先，我们提供了任意基数NTT的并行循环结构，并提出了两种取点模式。随后，我们将无冲突映射问题转化为冲突图，并开发新颖的启发式方法来探索CFMMS的设计空间，从而得出比经典作品更有效的访问方案。为了进一步验证该方法，我们为 Dilithium 设计了高性能 NTT/INTT 内核，其区域时间效率显着优于类似 FPGA 平台上的最先进作品。

papers.title: Efficient bayesian yield analysis and optimization with active learning.
papers.abstract: Yield optimization for circuit design is computationally intensive due to the expensive yield estimation based on Monte Carlo methods and the difficult optimization process. In this work, a uniform framework to solve these problems simultaneously is proposed. Firstly, a novel efficient Bayesian yield analysis framework, BYA, is proposed by deriving a Bayesian estimation for the yield and introducing active learning based on reductions of integral entropy. A tractable convolutional entropy infill technique is then proposed to efficiently solve the entropy reduction problem. Lastly, we extend BYA for yield optimization by transforming knowledge across the design space and variational space. Experimental results based on SRAM and adder circuits show that BYA is 410x faster (in terms of the number of simulations) than standard MC and averagely 10x (up to 10000x) more accurate than the state-of-the-art method for yield estimation, and is about 5x faster than the SOTA yield optimization methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于基于蒙特卡罗方法的良率估计成本高昂且优化过程困难，电路设计的良率优化需要大量计算。在这项工作中，提出了一个同时解决这些问题的统一框架。首先，通过推导产量的贝叶斯估计并引入基于积分熵减少的主动学习，提出了一种新颖的高效贝叶斯产量分析框架 BYA。然后提出了一种易于处理的卷积熵填充技术来有效解决熵减少问题。最后，我们通过跨设计空间和变分空间转换知识来扩展 BYA 以实现良率优化。基于 SRAM 和加法器电路的实验结果表明，BYA 比标准 MC 快 410 倍（就模拟数量而言），比最先进的良率估计方法平均准确 10 倍（高达 10000 倍），比 SOTA 良率优化方法快约 5 倍。

papers.title: Efficient ensembles of graph neural networks.
papers.abstract: Ensembles improve the accuracy and robustness of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), but suffer from high latency and storage requirements. To address this challenge, we propose GNN Ensembles through Error Node Isolation (GEENI). The key concept in GEENI is to identify nodes that are likely to be incorrectly classified (error nodes) and suppress their outgoing messages, leading to simultaneous accuracy and efficiency improvements. GEENI also enables aggressive approximations of the constituent models in the ensemble while maintaining accuracy. To improve the efficacy of GEENI, we propose techniques for diverse ensemble creation and accurate error node identification. Our experiments establish that GEENI models are simultaneously up to 4.6% (3.8%) more accurate and up to 2.8X (5.7X) faster compared to non-ensemble (conventional ensemble) GNN models.
papers.abstract_zh: 集成提高了图神经网络 (GNN) 的准确性和鲁棒性，但面临高延迟和存储要求。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了通过错误节点隔离（GEENI）的 GNN 集成。 GEENI 的关键概念是识别可能被错误分类的节点（错误节点）并抑制其传出消息，从而同时提高准确性和效率。 GEENI 还可以在保持准确性的同时对集成中的组成模型进行积极的近似。为了提高 GEENI 的效率，我们提出了多样化集成创建和准确错误节点识别的技术。我们的实验表明，与非集成（传统集成）GNN 模型相比，GEENI 模型的准确度提高了 4.6% (3.8%)，速度提高了 2.8 倍 (5.7 倍)。

papers.title: Efficient maximum data age analysis for cause-effect chains in automotive systems.
papers.abstract: Automotive systems are often subjected to stringent requirements on the maximum data age of certain cause-effect chains. In this paper, we present an efficient method for formally analyzing maximum data age of cause-effect chains. In particular, we decouple the problem of bounding the maximum data age of a chain into a problem of bounding the releasing interval of successive Last-to-Last data propagation instances in the chain. Owing to the problem decoupling, a relatively tighter data age upper bound can be effectively obtained in polynomial time. Experiments demonstrate that our approach can achieve high precision analysis with lower computational cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 汽车系统通常对某些因果链的最大数据期限有严格的要求。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法来正式分析因果链的最大数据年龄。特别是，我们将限制链的最大数据年龄的问题解耦为限制链中连续的最后到最后数据传播实例的释放间隔的问题。由于问题解耦，可以在多项式时间内有效获得相对更严格的数据年龄上限。实验表明，我们的方法可以以较低的计算成本实现高精度分析。

papers.title: Efficient timing propagation with simultaneous structural and pipeline parallelisms: late breaking results.
papers.abstract: Graph-based timing propagation (GBP) is an essential component for all static timing analysis (STA) algorithms. To speed up GBP, the state-of-the-art timer leverages the task graph model to explore structural parallelism in an STA graph. However, many designs exhibit linear segments that cause the parallelism to serialize, degrading the performance significantly. To overcome this problem, we introduce an efficient GBP framework by exploring both structural and pipeline parallelisms in an STA task graph. Our framework identifies linear segments and parallelizes their propagation tasks using pipeline in an STA task graph. We have shown up to 25% performance improvement over the state-of-the-art task graph-based timer.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于图的时序传播 (GBP) 是所有静态时序分析 (STA) 算法的重要组成部分。为了加速 GBP，最先进的计时器利用任务图模型来探索 STA 图中的结构并行性。然而，许多设计都表现出线性段，导致并行性串行化，从而显着降低性能。为了克服这个问题，我们通过探索 STA 任务图中的结构和管道并行性，引入了一个高效的 GBP 框架。我们的框架识别线性段并使用 STA 任务图中的管道并行化它们的传播任务。与最先进的基于任务图的计时器相比，我们的性能提高了 25%。

papers.title: EMS: efficient memory subsystem synthesis for spatial accelerators.
papers.abstract:
Spatial accelerators provide massive parallelism with an array of homogeneous PEs, and enable efficient data reuse with PE array dataflow and on-chip memory. Many previous works have studied the dataflow architecture of spatial accelerators, including performance analysis and automatic generation. However, existing accelerator generators fail to exploit the entire memory-level reuse opportunities, and generate suboptimal designs with data duplication and inefficient interconnection.

In this paper, we propose EMS, an efficient memory subsystem synthesis and optimization framework for spatial accelerators. We first use space-time transformation (STT) to analyze both PE-level and memory-level data reuse. Based on the reuse analysis, we develop an algorithm to automatically generate data layout of the multi-banked scratchpad memory, data mapping, and access controller for the memory. Our generated memory subsystem supports multiple PE-memory interconnection topologies including direct, multicast, and rotated connection. The memory and interconnection generation approach can efficiently utilize the memory-level reuse to avoid duplicated data storage with low hardware cost. EMS can automatically synthesize tensor algebra to hardware designed in Chisel. Experiments show that our proposed memory generator reduces the on-chip memory size by an average of 28% than the state-of-the-art, and achieves comparable hardware performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
空间加速器通过同构 PE 阵列提供大规模并行性，并通过 PE 阵列数据流和片上存储器实现高效数据重用。之前的许多工作都研究了空间加速器的数据流架构，包括性能分析和自动生成。然而，现有的加速器生成器无法利用整个内存级重用机会，并生成具有数据重复和低效互连的次优设计。

在本文中，我们提出了 EMS，一种用于空间加速器的高效内存子系统综合和优化框架。我们首先使用时空变换（STT）来分析 PE 级和内存级数据重用。基于重用分析，我们开发了一种算法来自动生成多组暂存器存储器的数据布局、数据映射和存储器的访问控制器。我们生成的内存子系统支持多种 PE-内存互连拓扑，包括直接、多播和旋转连接。存储器和互连生成方法可以有效地利用存储器级重用，以避免重复的数据存储，并且硬件成本低。 EMS 可以自动将张量代数合成到 Chisel 中设计的硬件中。实验表明，我们提出的内存生成器将片上内存大小比最先进的技术平均减少了 28%，并实现了可比的硬件性能。

papers.title: Enabling efficient deep convolutional neural network-based sensor fusion for autonomous driving.
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving demands accurate perception and safe decision-making. To achieve this, automated vehicles are typically equipped with multiple sensors (e.g., cameras, Lidar, etc.), enabling them to exploit complementary environmental contexts by fusing data from different sensing modalities. With the success of Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN), the fusion between multiple DCNNs has been proved to be a promising strategy to achieve satisfactory perception accuracy. However, existing mainstream DCNN fusion strategies conduct fusion by simply element-wisely adding feature maps extracted from different modalities together at various stages, failing to consider whether the features being fused are matched or not. Therefore, we first propose a feature disparity metric to quantitatively measure the degree of feature disparity between the fusing feature maps. Then, we propose a Fusion-filter as the Feature-matching techniques to tackle the feature-mismatching issue. We also propose a Layer-sharing technique in the deep layer of the DCNN to achieve high accuracy. With the assistance of feature disparity working as an additional loss, our proposed technologies enable DCNN to learn corresponding feature maps with similar characteristics and complementary visual context from different modalities. Evaluations demonstrate that our proposed fusion techniques can achieve higher accuracy on KITTI dataset with less computation resources consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶需要准确的感知和安全的决策。为了实现这一目标，自动驾驶车辆通常配备多个传感器（例如摄像头、激光雷达等），使它们能够通过融合来自不同传感方式的数据来利用互补的环境背景。随着深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的成功，多个DCNN之间的融合已被证明是一种有前景的策略，可以实现令人满意的感知精度。然而，现有的主流DCNN融合策略通过简单地将各个阶段从不同模态提取的特征图逐元素相加来进行融合，没有考虑融合的特征是否匹配。因此，我们首先提出一种特征视差度量来定量测量融合特征图之间的特征视差程度。然后，我们提出融合过滤器作为特征匹配技术来解决特征不匹配问题。我们还在 DCNN 的深层提出了层共享技术以实现高精度。在特征差异作为额外损失的帮助下，我们提出的技术使 DCNN 能够从不同模态学习具有相似特征和互补视觉上下文的相应特征图。评估表明，我们提出的融合技术可以在 KITTI 数据集上以更少的计算资源消耗实现更高的精度。

papers.title: Enabling fast uncertainty estimation: accelerating bayesian transformers via algorithmic and hardware optimizations.
papers.abstract: Quantifying the uncertainty of neural networks (NNs) has been required by many safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving or medical diagnosis. Recently, Bayesian transformers have demonstrated their capabilities in providing high-quality uncertainty estimates paired with excellent accuracy. However, their real-time deployment is limited by the compute-intensive attention mechanism that is core to the transformer architecture, and the repeated Monte Carlo sampling to quantify the predictive uncertainty. To address these limitations, this paper accelerates Bayesian transformers via both algorithmic and hardware optimizations. On the algorithmic level, an evolutionary algorithm (EA)-based framework is proposed to exploit the sparsity in Bayesian transformers and ease their computational workload. On the hardware level, we demonstrate that the sparsity brings hardware performance improvement on our optimized CPU and GPU implementations. An adaptable hardware architecture is also proposed to accelerate Bayesian transformers on an FPGA. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the EA-based framework, together with hardware optimizations, reduce the latency of Bayesian transformers by up to 13, 12 and 20 times on CPU, GPU and FPGA platforms respectively, while achieving higher algorithmic performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶或医疗诊断等许多安全关键应用都需要量化神经网络 (NN) 的不确定性。最近，贝叶斯变换器展示了其提供高质量不确定性估计和出色准确性的能力。然而，它们的实时部署受到作为 Transformer 架构核心的计算密集型注意力机制以及用于量化预测不确定性的重复蒙特卡洛采样的限制。为了解决这些限制，本文通过算法和硬件优化来加速贝叶斯变换器。在算法层面，提出了一种基于进化算法（EA）的框架来利用贝叶斯变换器的稀疏性并减轻其计算工作量。在硬件层面，我们证明了稀疏性为我们优化的 CPU 和 GPU 实现带来了硬件性能的提高。还提出了一种适应性强的硬件架构来加速 FPGA 上的贝叶斯变换器。大量实验表明，基于 EA 的框架结合硬件优化，在 CPU、GPU 和 FPGA 平台上分别将贝叶斯变换器的延迟减少了多达 13 倍、12 倍和 20 倍，同时实现了更高的算法性能。

papers.title: Enabling hard constraints in differentiable neural network and accelerator co-exploration.
papers.abstract: Co-exploration of an optimal neural architecture and its hardware accelerator is an approach of rising interest which addresses the computational cost problem, especially in low-profile systems. The large co-exploration space is often handled by adopting the idea of differentiable neural architecture search. However, despite the superior search efficiency of the differentiable co-exploration, it faces a critical challenge of not being able to systematically satisfy hard constraints such as frame rate. To handle the hard constraint problem of differentiable co-exploration, we propose HDX, which searches for hard-constrained solutions without compromising the global design objectives. By manipulating the gradients in the interest of the given hard constraint, high-quality solutions satisfying the constraint can be obtained.
papers.abstract_zh: 共同探索最佳神经架构及其硬件加速器是一种越来越受关注的方法，它解决了计算成本问题，特别是在低调系统中。大的共同探索空间通常通过采用可微神经架构搜索的思想来处理。然而，尽管可微协同探索具有卓越的搜索效率，但它面临着无法系统地满足帧速率等硬约束的严峻挑战。为了处理可微协同探索的硬约束问题，我们提出了 HDX，它在不损害全局设计目标的情况下搜索硬约束解决方案。通过根据给定的硬约束操纵梯度，可以获得满足约束的高质量解决方案。

papers.title: Energy efficient data search design and optimization based on a compact ferroelectric FET content addressable memory.
papers.abstract: Content Addressable Memory (CAM) is widely used for associative search tasks in advanced machine learning models and data-intensive applications due to the highly parallel pattern matching capability. Most state-of-the-art CAM designs focus on reducing the CAM cell area by exploiting the nonvolatile memories (NVMs). There exists only little research on optimizing the design and energy efficiency of NVM based CAMs for practical deployment in edge devices and AI hardware. In this paper, we propose a general compact and energy efficient CAM design scheme that alleviates the design overhead by employing just one NVM device in the cell. We also propose an adaptive matchline ( ML ) precharge and discharge scheme that further optimizes the search energy by fully reducing the ML voltage swing. We consider Ferroelectric field effect transistors (FeFETs) as the representative NVM, and present a 2T-1FeFET CAM array including a sense amplifier implementing the proposed ML scheme. Evaluation results suggest that our proposed 2T-1FeFET CAM design achieves 6.64×/4.74×/9.14×/3.02× better energy efficiency compared with CMOS/ReRAM/STT-MRAM/2FeFET CAM arrays. Benchmarking results show that our approach provides 3.3×/2.1× energy-delay product improvement over the 2T-2R/2FeFET CAM in accelerating query processing applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于高度并行的模式匹配能力，内容可寻址存储器（CAM）广泛用于高级机器学习模型和数据密集型应用中的关联搜索任务。大多数最先进的 CAM 设计都侧重于通过利用非易失性存储器 (NVM) 来减少 CAM 单元面积。关于优化基于 NVM 的 CAM 的设计和能源效率以在边缘设备和 AI 硬件中实际部署的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的紧凑且节能的 CAM 设计方案，该方案通过在单元中仅采用一个 NVM 器件来减轻设计开销。我们还提出了一种自适应匹配线（ML）预充电和放电方案，通过充分减小 ML 电压摆幅来进一步优化搜索能量。我们将铁电场效应晶体管 (FeFET) 视为代表性 NVM，并提出了一个 2T-1FeFET CAM 阵列，其中包括实现所提出的 ML 方案的读出放大器。评估结果表明，与 CMOS/ReRAM/STT-MRAM/2FeFET CAM 阵列相比，我们提出的 2T-1FeFET CAM 设计的能效提高了 6.64×/4.74×/9.14×/3.02×。基准测试结果表明，在加速查询处理应用程序方面，我们的方法比 2T-2R/2FeFET CAM 提供了 3.3×/2.1× 能量延迟产品改进。

papers.title: Equivalence checking paradigms in quantum circuit design: a case study.
papers.abstract: As state-of-the-art quantum computers are capable of running increasingly complex algorithms, the need for automated methods to design and test potential applications rises. Equivalence checking of quantum circuits is an important, yet hardly automated, task in the development of the quantum software stack. Recently, new methods have been proposed that tackle this problem from widely different perspectives. However, there is no established baseline on which to judge current and future progress in equivalence checking of quantum circuits. In order to close this gap, we conduct a detailed case study of two of the most promising equivalence checking methodologies---one based on decision diagrams and one based on the ZX-calculus---and compare their strengths and weaknesses.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着最先进的量子计算机能够运行日益复杂的算法，对设计和测试潜在应用的自动化方法的需求不断增加。量子电路的等效性检查是量子软件堆栈开发中的一项重要但很难自动化的任务。最近，人们提出了从不同角度解决这个问题的新方法。然而，目前还没有既定的基准来判断量子电路等效性检查当前和未来的进展。为了缩小这一差距，我们对两种最有前途的等价性检查方法（一种基于决策图，一种基于 ZX 演算）进行了详细的案例研究，并比较了它们的优点和缺点。

papers.title: Eventor: an efficient event-based monocular multi-view stereo accelerator on FPGA platform.
papers.abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired vision sensors that asynchronously represent pixel-level brightness changes as event streams. Event-based monocular multi-view stereo (EMVS) is a technique that exploits the event streams to estimate semi-dense 3D structure with known trajectory. It is a critical task for event-based monocular SLAM. However, the required intensive computation workloads make it challenging for real-time deployment on embedded platforms. In this paper, Eventor is proposed as a fast and efficient EMVS accelerator by realizing the most critical and time-consuming stages including event back-projection and volumetric ray-counting on FPGA. Highly paralleled and fully pipelined processing elements are specially designed via FPGA and integrated with the embedded ARM as a heterogeneous system to improve the throughput and reduce the memory footprint. Meanwhile, the EMVS algorithm is reformulated to a more hardware-friendly manner by rescheduling, approximate computing and hybrid data quantization. Evaluation results on DAVIS dataset show that Eventor achieves up to 24X improvement in energy efficiency compared with Intel i5 CPU platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生视觉传感器，可将像素级亮度变化异步表示为事件流。基于事件的单目多视立体 (EMVS) 是一种利用事件流来估计具有已知轨迹的半密集 3D 结构的技术。这是基于事件的单目 SLAM 的一项关键任务。然而，所需的密集计算工作负载给嵌入式平台上的实时部署带来了挑战。在本文中，Eventor 被提出作为一种快速高效的 EMVS 加速器，通过在 FPGA 上实现最关键和最耗时的阶段（包括事件反投影和体积射线计数）。高度并行和全流水线处理元件通过 FPGA 专门设计，并与嵌入式 ARM 集成为异构系统，以提高吞吐量并减少内存占用。同时，通过重新调度、近似计算和混合数据量化，将EMVS算法重新表述为更加硬件友好的方式。 DAVIS 数据集的评估结果显示，与 Intel i5 CPU 平台相比，Eventor 的能效提升高达 24 倍。

papers.title: Exploiting data locality in memory for ORAM to reduce memory access overheads.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a locality-aware Oblivious RAM (ORAM) primitive, named Green ORAM, which exploits spatial locality of data in the physical memory for reducing ORAM overheads. The Green ORAM is novel consisting of three policies. The first is row-guided label allocation used for mapping spatial locality onto ORAM tree to reduce the number of memory commands. The second is segment-based path replacement able to improve the data locality within the path in the ORAM tree in order to remove the redundant memory accesses. The third is multi-path write-back able to improve the data locality between different paths in order to obtain theoretical best stash hit rate. Notably, the Green ORAM still maintains the security as we analyzed. Experimental results show that Green ORAM achieves a 28.72% access latency reduction, and a 19.06% memory energy consumption reduction on average, compared with the state-of-the-art String ORAM.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 Green ORAM 的局部感知 Oblivious RAM (ORAM) 原语，它利用物理内存中数据的空间局部性来减少 ORAM 开销。绿色 ORAM 很新颖，由三项政策组成。第一个是行引导标签分配，用于将空间局部性映射到 ORAM 树上，以减少内存命令的数量。第二个是基于段的路径替换，能够改善 ORAM 树中路径内的数据局部性，以便删除冗余内存访问。第三是多路径回写，能够提高不同路径之间的数据局部性，以获得理论上的最佳存储命中率。值得注意的是，Green ORAM 仍然保持了我们分析的安全性。实验结果表明，与最先进的 String ORAM 相比，Green ORAM 的访问延迟平均降低了 28.72%，内存能耗平均降低了 19.06%。

papers.title: FaSe: fast selective flushing to mitigate contention-based cache timing attacks.
papers.abstract: Caches are widely used to improve performance in modern processors. By carefully evicting cache lines and identifying cache hit/miss time, contention-based cache timing channel attacks can be orchestrated to leak information from the victim process. Existing hardware countermeasures explored cache partitioning and randomization, are either costly, not applicable for the L1 data cache, or are vulnerable to sophisticated attacks. Countermeasures using cache flush exist but are slow since all cache lines have to be evacuated during a cache flush. In this paper, we propose for the first time a hardware/software flush-based countermeasure, called fast selective flushing (FaSe). By utilizing an ISA extension and cache modification, FaSe selectively flushes cache lines and provides a mitigation method with a similar effect to methods using naive flush. FaSe is implemented on RISC-V Rocket Chip and evaluated on Xilinx FPGA running user programs and the Linux OS. Our experiments show that FaSe reduces time overhead by 36% for user programs and 42% for the OS compared to the methods with naive flushing, with less than 1% hardware overhead. Our security test shows FaSe can mitigate target cache timing attacks.
papers.abstract_zh: 高速缓存广泛用于提高现代处理器的性能。通过仔细地逐出缓存行并识别缓存命中/未命中时间，可以精心策划基于争用的缓存定时通道攻击，以从受害者进程中泄漏信息。现有的硬件对策探索了缓存分区和随机化，要么成本高昂，不适用于 L1 数据缓存，要么容易受到复杂的攻击。存在使用高速缓存刷新的对策，但速度很慢，因为在高速缓存刷新期间必须疏散所有高速缓存行。在本文中，我们首次提出了一种基于硬件/软件刷新的对策，称为快速选择性刷新（FaSe）。通过利用 ISA 扩展和缓存修改，FaSe 有选择地刷新缓存行，并提供与使用简单刷新的方法具有类似效果的缓解方法。 FaSe 在 RISC-V Rocket 芯片上实现，并在运行用户程序和 Linux 操作系统的 Xilinx FPGA 上进行评估。我们的实验表明，与简单刷新的方法相比，FaSe 将用户程序的时间开销减少了 36%，将操作系统的时间开销减少了 42%，而硬件开销不到 1%。我们的安全测试表明 FaSe 可以减轻目标缓存定时攻击。

papers.title: Fast and scalable human pose estimation using mmWave point cloud.
papers.abstract: Millimeter-Wave (mmWave) radar can enable high-resolution human pose estimation with low cost and computational requirements. However, mmWave data point cloud, the primary input to processing algorithms, is highly sparse and carries significantly less information than other alternatives such as video frames. Furthermore, the scarce labeled mmWave data impedes the development of machine learning (ML) models that can generalize to unseen scenarios. We propose a fast and scalable human pose estimation (FUSE) framework that combines multi-frame representation and meta-learning to address these challenges. Experimental evaluations show that FUSE adapts to the unseen scenarios 4× faster than current supervised learning approaches and estimates human joint coordinates with about 7 cm mean absolute error.
papers.abstract_zh: 毫米波 (mmWave) 雷达可以以较低的成本和计算要求实现高分辨率人体姿势估计。然而，毫米波数据点云（处理算法的主要输入）非常稀疏，并且比视频帧等其他替代方案携带的信息要少得多。此外，稀缺的标记毫米波数据阻碍了可以推广到未见过的场景的机器学习（ML）模型的开发。我们提出了一种快速且可扩展的人体姿势估计（FUSE）框架，该框架结合了多帧表示和元学习来应对这些挑战。实验评估表明，FUSE 适应未见过的场景的速度比当前的监督学习方法快 4 倍，并且估计人体关节坐标的平均绝对误差约为 7 厘米。

papers.title: FHDnn: communication efficient and robust federated learning for AIoT networks.
papers.abstract: The advent of IoT and advances in edge computing inspired federated learning, a distributed algorithm to enable on device learning. Transmission costs, unreliable networks and limited compute power all of which are typical characteristics of IoT networks pose a severe bottleneck for federated learning. In this work we propose FHDnn, a synergetic federated learning framework that combines the salient aspects of CNNs and Hyperdimensional Computing. FHDnn performs hyperdimensional learning on features extracted from a self-supervised contrastive learning framework to accelerate training, lower communication costs, and increase robustness to network errors by avoiding the transmission of the CNN and training only the hyperdimensional component. Compared to CNNs, we show through experiments that FHDnn reduces communication costs by 66X, local client compute and energy consumption by 1.5 - 6X, while being highly robust to network errors with minimal loss in accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 物联网的出现和边缘计算的进步激发了联邦学习，这是一种支持设备学习的分布式算法。传输成本、不可靠的网络和有限的计算能力都是物联网网络的典型特征，给联邦学习带来了严重的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FHDnn，这是一种结合了 CNN 和超维计算的显着方面的协同联邦学习框架。 FHDnn 对从自监督对比学习框架中提取的特征进行超维学习，通过避免 CNN 的传输并仅训练超维组件来加速训练、降低通信成本并提高对网络错误的鲁棒性。与 CNN 相比，我们通过实验表明，FHDnn 将通信成本降低了 66 倍，将本地客户端计算和能耗降低了 1.5 - 6 倍，同时对网络错误具有高度鲁棒性，且精度损失最小。

papers.title: Flexible chip placement via reinforcement learning: late breaking results.
papers.abstract: Recently, successful applications of reinforcement learning to chip placement have emerged. Pretrained models are necessary to improve efficiency and effectiveness. Currently, the weights of objective metrics (e.g., wirelength, congestion, and timing) are fixed during pretraining. However, fixed-weighed models cannot generate the diversity of placements required for engineers to accommodate changing requirements as they arise. This paper proposes flexible multiple-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) to support objective functions with inference-time variable weights using just a single pretrained model. Our macro placement results show that MORL can generate the Pareto frontier of multiple objectives effectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，强化学习在芯片布局上的成功应用已经出现。预训练模型对于提高效率和有效性是必要的。目前，客观指标（例如线长、拥塞和时序）的权重在预训练期间是固定的。然而，固定权重模型无法生成工程师所需的多样性布局来适应不断变化的需求。本文提出了灵活的多目标强化学习（MORL），仅使用单个预训练模型即可支持具有推理时间可变权重的目标函数。我们的宏观布局结果表明，MORL 可以有效地生成多个目标的帕累托前沿。

papers.title: Floorplanning with graph attention.
papers.abstract: Floorplanning has long been a critical physical design task with high computation complexity. Its key objective is to determine the initial locations of macros and standard cells with optimized wirelength for a given area constraint. This paper presents Flora, a graph attention-based floorplanner to learn an optimized mapping between circuit connectivity and physical wirelength, and produce a chip floorplan using efficient model inference. Flora has been integrated with two state-of-the-art mixed-size placers. Experimental studies using both academic benchmarks and industrial designs demonstrate that compared to state-of-the-art mixed-size placers alone, Flora improves placement runtime by 18%, with 2% wirelength reduction on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 布局规划长期以来一直是计算复杂度很高的关键物理设计任务。其主要目标是确定宏和标准单元的初始位置，并针对给定面积限制优化线长。本文介绍了 Flora，一种基于图注意力的布局规划器，用于学习电路连接和物理线长之间的优化映射，并使用高效的模型推理生成芯片布局规划。 Flora 已与两个最先进的混合尺寸放置器集成。使用学术基准和工业设计的实验研究表明，与单独使用最先进的混合尺寸布局器相比，Flora 将布局运行时间提高了 18%，线长平均缩短了 2%。

papers.title: Formal verification of modular multipliers using symbolic computer algebra and boolean satisfiability.
papers.abstract:
Modular multipliers are the essential components in cryptography and Residue Number System (RNS) designs. Especially, 2 n - 1 and 2 n + 1 modular multipliers have gained more attention due to their regular structures and a wide variety of applications. However, there is no automated formal verification method to prove the correctness of these multipliers. As a result, bugs might remain undetected after the design phase.

In this paper, we present our modular verifier that combines Symbolic Computer Algebra (SCA) and Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) to prove the correctness of 2 n - 1 and 2 n + 1 modular multipliers. Our verifier takes advantage of three techniques, i.e. coefficient correction, SAT-based local vanishing removal, and SAT-based output condition check to overcome the challenges of SCA-based verification. The efficiency of our verifier is demonstrated using an extensive set of modular multipliers with up to several million gates.
papers.abstract_zh:
模块化乘法器是密码学和残差编号系统 (RNS) 设计中的基本组件。尤其是2n-1和2n+1模乘法器由于其结构规则、应用广泛而受到越来越多的关注。然而，没有自动化的形式验证方法来证明这些乘数的正确性。因此，在设计阶段之后，错误可能仍未被发现。

在本文中，我们提出了结合符号计算机代数 (SCA) 和布尔可满足性 (SAT) 的模块化验证器，以证明 2 n - 1 和 2 n + 1 模块化乘法器的正确性。我们的验证器利用三种技术，即系数校正、基于 SAT 的局部消失去除和基于 SAT 的输出条件检查来克服基于 SCA 验证的挑战。我们的验证器的效率通过使用具有多达数百万门的大量模块化乘法器来证明。

papers.title: FPGA-aware automatic acceleration framework for vision transformer with mixed-scheme quantization: late breaking results.
papers.abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) are emerging with significantly improved accuracy in computer vision tasks. However, their complex architecture and enormous computation/storage demand impose urgent needs for new hardware accelerator design methodology. This work proposes an FPGA-aware automatic ViT acceleration framework based on the proposed mixed-scheme quantization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first FPGA-based ViT acceleration framework exploring model quantization. Compared with state-of-the-art ViT quantization work (algorithmic approach only without hardware acceleration), our quantization achieves 0.31% to 1.25% higher Top-1 accuracy under the same bit-width. Compared with the 32-bit floating-point baseline FPGA accelerator, our accelerator achieves around 5.6× improvement on the frame rate (i.e., 56.4 FPS vs. 10.0 FPS) with 0.83% accuracy drop for DeiT-base.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉变换器 (ViT) 的出现显着提高了计算机视觉任务的准确性。然而，其复杂的架构和巨大的计算/存储需求迫切需要新的硬件加速器设计方法。这项工作提出了一种基于所提出的混合方案量化的 FPGA 感知自动 ViT 加速框架。据我们所知，这是第一个基于 FPGA 的 ViT 加速框架，探索模型量化。与最先进的 ViT 量化工作（仅无硬件加速的算法方法）相比，我们的量化在相同位宽下实现了 0.31% 至 1.25% 高的 Top-1 精度。与 32 位浮点基线 FPGA 加速器相比，我们的加速器在帧速率上实现了约 5.6 倍的改进（即 56.4 FPS 与 10.0 FPS），而 DeiT-base 的精度下降了 0.83%。

papers.title: Frontmatter.
papers.abstract: This article reviews the current state-of-theart for algae use in aquaculture, plus recent developments in algal biomass as a micro- or bulk ingredient in formulated animal feeds (terrestrial livestock and aquaculture species). Microalgae provide an important direct or indirect feed source for early developmental stages of many farmed finfish, shellfish and invertebrate species. Hatcheries typically cultivate microalgae in-house, with commercial concentrates now also being used widely. Different strains of micro- and macroalgae vary in their efficacy within formulated animal feeds, although there is sufficient evidence of good nutritional properties to promote algal biomass as a source of micronutrients or as a bulk feedstuff. High costs of algal biomass compared to commodity feedstuffs currently confine their commercial use to niche animal feed applications; greater availability/lower price, via biofuels and biorefinery would en able more widespread use in future.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文回顾了藻类在水产养殖中的应用现状，以及藻类生物质作为配制动物饲料（陆生牲畜和水产养殖物种）中的微量或散装成分的最新发展。微藻为许多养殖鱼类、贝类和无脊椎动物的早期发育阶段提供重要的直接或间接饲料来源。孵化场通常在内部培养微藻，商业浓缩物现在也被广泛使用。尽管有足够的证据表明藻类生物质具有良好的营养特性，可以促进藻类生物质作为微量营养素的来源或作为散装饲料，但不同菌株的微藻和大型藻类在配制动物饲料中的功效有所不同。与商品饲料相比，藻类生物质的成本较高，目前将其商业用途仅限于小众动物饲料应用；通过生物燃料和生物精炼，提高可用性/降低价格将使未来能够得到更广泛的使用。

papers.title: Functionality matters in netlist representation learning.
papers.abstract: Learning feasible representation from raw gate-level netlists is essential for incorporating machine learning techniques in logic synthesis, physical design, or verification. Existing message-passing-based graph learning methodologies focus merely on graph topology while overlooking gate functionality, which often fails to capture underlying semantic, thus limiting their generalizability. To address the concern, we propose a novel netlist representation learning framework that utilizes a contrastive scheme to acquire generic functional knowledge from netlists effectively. We also propose a customized graph neural network (GNN) architecture that learns a set of independent aggregators to better cooperate with the above framework. Comprehensive experiments on multiple complex real-world designs demonstrate that our proposed solution significantly outperforms state-of-the-art netlist feature learning flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 从原始门级网表学习可行的表示对于将机器学习技术融入逻辑综合、物理设计或验证至关重要。现有的基于消息传递的图学习方法仅关注图拓扑，而忽略了门功能，这通常无法捕获底层语义，从而限制了它们的通用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的网表表示学习框架，该框架利用对比方案有效地从网表中获取通用功能知识。我们还提出了一种定制的图神经网络（GNN）架构，它学习一组独立的聚合器，以更好地与上述框架配合。对多个复杂现实世界设计的综合实验表明，我们提出的解决方案显着优于最先进的网表特征学习流程。

papers.title: GaBAN: a generic and flexibly programmable vector neuro-processor on FPGA.
papers.abstract: Spiking neural network (SNN) is the main computational model of brain-inspired computing and neuroscience, which also acts as the bridge between them. With the rapid development of neuroscience, accurate and flexible SNN simulation with high performance is becoming important. This paper proposes GaBAN, a generic and flexibly programmable neuro-processor on FPGA. Different from the majority of current designs that realize neural components by custom hardware directly, it is centered on a compact, versatile vector instruction set, which supports multiple-precision vector calculation, indexed-/strided-memory access, and conditional execution to accommodate computational characteristics. By software and hardware co-design, the compiler extracts memory-accesses from SNN programs to generate micro-ops executed by an independent hardware unit; the latter interacts with the computing pipeline through an asynchronous buffering mechanism. Thus memory access delay can fully cover the calculation. Tests show that GaBAN can not only outperform the SOTA ISA-based FPGA solution remarkably but also be comparable with counterparts of the hardware-fixed model on some tasks. Moreover, in end-to-end testing, its simulation performance exceeds that of high-performance X86 processor (1.44--3.0x).
papers.abstract_zh: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）是类脑计算和神经科学的主要计算模型，也是两者之间的桥梁。随着神经科学的快速发展，准确、灵活、高性能的SNN模拟变得越来越重要。本文提出了 GaBAN，一种基于 FPGA 的通用且灵活可编程的神经处理器。与当前大多数直接通过定制硬件实现神经组件的设计不同，它以紧凑、通用的向量指令集为中心，支持多精度向量计算、索引/跨步内存访问和条件执行以适应计算特性。通过软硬件协同设计，编译器从SNN程序中提取内存访问，生成由独立硬件单元执行的微操作；后者通过异步缓冲机制与计算管道交互。因此内存访问延迟可以完全覆盖计算。测试表明，GaBAN不仅可以显着优于基于SOTA ISA的FPGA解决方案，而且在某些任务上可以与硬件固定模型的对应模型相媲美。而且，在端到端测试中，其仿真性能超过了高性能X86处理器（1.44--3.0x）。

papers.title: GATSPI: GPU accelerated gate-level simulation for power improvement.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present GATSPI, a novel GPU accelerated logic gate simulator that enables ultra-fast power estimation for industry-sized ASIC designs with millions of gates. GATSPI is written in PyTorch with custom CUDA kernels for ease of coding and maintainability. It achieves simulation kernel speedup of up to 1668X on a single-GPU system and up to 7412X on a multiple-GPU system when compared to a commercial gate-level simulator running on a single CPU core. GATSPI supports a range of simple to complex cell types from an industry standard cell library and SDF conditional delay statements without requiring prior calibration runs and produces industry-standard SAIF files from delay-aware gate-level simulation. Finally, we deploy GATSPI in a glitch-optimization flow, achieving a 1.4% power saving with a 449X speedup in turnaround time compared to a similar flow using a commercial simulator.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 GATSPI，这是一种新型 GPU 加速逻辑门模拟器，能够对具有数百万个门的工业规模 ASIC 设计进行超快速功耗估计。 GATSPI 是用 PyTorch 编写的，带有自定义 CUDA 内核，以便于编码和维护。与在单 CPU 内核上运行的商业门级模拟器相比，它在单 GPU 系统上实现了高达 1668 倍的模拟内核加速，在多 GPU 系统上实现了高达 7412 倍的模拟内核加速。 GATSPI 支持来自行业标准单元库和 SDF 条件延迟语句的一系列简单到复杂的单元类型，无需事先进行校准运行，并通过延迟感知门级仿真生成行业标准 SAIF 文件。最后，我们在故障优化流程中部署 GATSPI，与使用商业模拟器的类似流程相比，实现了 1.4% 的节能，周转时间加快了 449 倍。

papers.title: GEML: GNN-based efficient mapping method for large loop applications on CGRA.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture (CGRA) is an emerging hardware architecture, with reconfigurable Processing Elements (PEs) for executing operations efficiently and flexibly. One major challenge for current CGRA compilers is the scalability issue for large loop applications, where valid loop mapping results cannot be obtained in an acceptable time. This paper proposes an enhanced loop mapping method based on Graph Neural Network (GNN), which effectively addresses the scalability issue and generates valid loop mapping results for large applications. Experimental results show that the proposed method enhances the compilation time by 10.8x on average over existing methods, with even better loop mapping solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA）是一种新兴的硬件架构，具有可重构处理元件（PE），可以高效、灵活地执行操作。当前 CGRA 编译器面临的一项主要挑战是大型循环应用程序的可扩展性问题，其中无法在可接受的时间内获得有效的循环映射结果。本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的增强循环映射方法，有效解决了可扩展性问题，并为大型应用程序生成有效的循环映射结果。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比现有方法平均编译时间提高了 10.8 倍，并且具有更好的循环映射解决方案。

papers.title: Generative self-supervised learning for gate sizing: invited.
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning has shown great promise in leveraging large amounts of unlabeled data to achieve higher accuracy than supervised learning methods in many domains. Generative self-supervised learning can generate new data based on the trained data distribution. In this paper, we evaluate the effectiveness of generative self-supervised learning on combinational gate sizing in VLSI designs. We propose a novel use of Transformers for gate sizing when trained on a large dataset generate from a commercial EDA tool. We demonstrate that our trained model can achieve 93% accuracy, 1440X speedup and fast design convergence when compared to a leading commercial EDA tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 自监督学习在利用大量未标记数据来实现比许多领域的监督学习方法更高的准确性方面显示出了巨大的前景。生成式自监督学习可以根据训练后的数据分布生成新数据。在本文中，我们评估了生成式自监督学习在 VLSI 设计中组合门大小调整的有效性。我们提出了一种在商业 EDA 工具生成的大型数据集上进行训练时使用 Transformer 来调整门大小的新颖方法。我们证明，与领先的商业 EDA 工具相比，我们训练的模型可以实现 93% 的准确度、1440 倍的加速和快速的设计收敛。

papers.title: Generic lithography modeling with dual-band optics-inspired neural networks.
papers.abstract: Lithography simulation is a critical step in VLSI design and optimization for manufacturability. Existing solutions for highly accurate lithography simulation with rigorous models are computationally expensive and slow, even when equipped with various approximation techniques. Recently, machine learning has provided alternative solutions for lithography simulation tasks such as coarse-grained edge placement error regression and complete contour prediction. However, the impact of these learning-based methods has been limited due to restrictive usage scenarios or low simulation accuracy. To tackle these concerns, we introduce an dual-band optics-inspired neural network design that considers the optical physics underlying lithography. To the best of our knowledge, our approach yields the first published via/metal layer contour simulation at 1 nm 2 /pixel resolution with any tile size. Compared to previous machine learning based solutions, we demonstrate that our framework can be trained much faster and offers a significant improvement on efficiency and image quality with 20× smaller model size. We also achieve 85× simulation speedup over traditional lithography simulator with ~ 1% accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 光刻仿真是 VLSI 设计和可制造性优化的关键步骤。即使配备了各种近似技术，使用严格模型进行高精度光刻模拟的现有解决方案在计算上也是昂贵且缓慢的。最近，机器学习为光刻模拟任务提供了替代解决方案，例如粗粒度边缘放置误差回归和完整轮廓预测。然而，由于使用场景的限制或模拟精度较低，这些基于学习的方法的影响受到限制。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种双波段光学启发的神经网络设计，该设计考虑了光刻基础的光学物理。据我们所知，我们的方法首次发布了任何尺寸的通孔/金属层轮廓模拟，分辨率为 1 nm 2 /像素。与之前基于机器学习的解决方案相比，我们证明了我们的框架可以更快地训练，并在模型尺寸缩小 20 倍的情况下显着提高效率和图像质量。与传统光刻模拟器相比，我们还实现了 85 倍的模拟加速，但精度损失约为 1%。

papers.title: GENERIC: highly efficient learning engine on edge using hyperdimensional computing.
papers.abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) mimics the brain's basic principles in performing cognitive tasks by encoding the data to high-dimensional vectors and employing non-complex learning techniques. Conventional processing platforms such as CPUs and GPUs are incapable of taking full advantage of the highly-parallel bit-level operations of HDC. On the other hand, existing HDC encoding techniques do not cover a broad range of applications to make a custom design plausible. In this paper, we first propose a novel encoding that achieves high accuracy for diverse applications. Thereafter, we leverage the proposed encoding and design a highly efficient and flexible ASIC accelerator, dubbed GENERIC, suited for the edge domain. GENERIC supports both classification (train and inference) and clustering for unsupervised learning on edge. Our design is flexible in the input size (hence it can run various applications) and hypervectors dimensionality, allowing it to trade off the accuracy and energy/performance on-demand. We augment GENERIC with application-opportunistic power-gating and voltage over-scaling (thanks to the notable error resiliency of HDC) for further energy reduction. GENERIC encoding improves the prediction accuracy over previous HDC and ML techniques by 3.5% and 6.5%, respectively. At 14 nm technology node, GENERIC occupies an area of 0.30 mm 2 , and consumes 0.09 mW static and 1.97 mW active power. Compared to the previous inference-only accelerator, GENERIC reduces the energy consumption by 4.1×.
papers.abstract_zh: 超维计算 (HDC) 通过将数据编码为高维向量并采用非复杂的学习技术来模仿大脑执行认知任务的基本原理。 CPU和GPU等传统处理平台无法充分利用HDC的高度并行位级操作。另一方面，现有的 HDC 编码技术并未涵盖广泛的应用，无法实现定制设计。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的编码，可以为各种应用实现高精度。此后，我们利用所提出的编码并设计了一个高效且灵活的 ASIC 加速器，称为 GENERIC，适用于边缘域。 GENERIC 支持边缘无监督学习的分类（训练和推理）和聚类。 Our design is flexible in the input size (hence it can run various applications) and hypervectors dimensionality, allowing it to trade off the accuracy and energy/performance on-demand.我们通过应用机会功率门控和电压超标度（得益于 HDC 显着的错误恢复能力）来增强 GENERIC，以进一步降低能耗。与之前的 HDC 和 ML 技术相比，GENERIC 编码的预测精度分别提高了 3.5% 和 6.5%。在14 nm技术节点，GENERIC占用的面积为0.30 mm 2 ，消耗0.09 mW静态功率和1.97 mW有功功率。与之前的仅推理加速器相比，GENERIC 的能耗降低了 4.1 倍。

papers.title: Glimpse: mathematical embedding of hardware specification for neural compilation.
papers.abstract: Success of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) and their computational intensity has heralded Cambrian explosion of DNN hardware. While hardware design has advanced significantly, optimizing the code for them is still an open challenge. Recent research has moved past traditional compilation techniques and taken a stochastic search algorithmic path that blindly generates rather stochastic samples of the binaries for real hardware measurements to guide the search. This paper opens a new dimension by incorporating the mathematical embedding of the hardware specification of the GPU accelerators dubbed Blueprint to better guide the search algorithm and focus on sub-spaces that have higher potential for yielding higher performance binaries. While various sample efficient yet blind hardware-agnostic techniques have been proposed, none of the state-of-the-art compilers have considered hardware specification as hints to improve the sample efficiency and the search. To mathematically embed the hardware specifications into the search, we devise a Bayesian optimization framework called Glimpse with multiple exclusively unique components. We first use the Blueprint as an input to generate prior distributions of different dimensions in the search space. Then, we devise a light-weight neural acquisition function that takes into account the Blueprint to conform to the hardware specification while balancing the exploration-exploitation trade-off. Finally, we generate an ensemble of predictors from the Blueprint that collectively vote to reject invalid binary samples. We compare Glimpse with hardware-agnostic compilers.
