The PATH tool also supports the synthesis of path-based computing systems where the total number of crossbars and the number of inter-crossbar connections are minimized. We evaluate the proposed paradigm using 10 circuits from the RevLib benchmark suite. Compared with state-of-the-art digital in-memory computing paradigms, path-based computing improves energy and latency up to 4.7X and 8.5X, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存中处理打破了基于冯·诺依曼的结构，以加速数据密集型应用程序。值得注意的是，人们致力于使用数字内存计算执行布尔逻辑。最先进范例的局限性在于，它们严重依赖于使用昂贵的写入操作来重复切换非易失性电阻器件的状态。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的内存计算范式，称为基于路径的计算，用于评估布尔逻辑。该范式内的计算是使用一次性昂贵的编译阶段和快速高效的评估阶段来执行的。该范例的关键属性是执行阶段仅涉及廉价的读取操作。此外，还提出了一种称为 PATH 的综合工具来自动将计算映射到单个交叉开关设计。 PATH 工具还支持基于路径的计算系统的综合，其中交叉开关总数和交叉开关间连接的数量被最小化。我们使用 RevLib 基准套件中的 10 个电路来评估所提出的范例。与最先进的数字内存计算范例相比，基于路径的计算将能耗和延迟分别提高了 4.7 倍和 8.5 倍。

papers.title: PathFinder: side channel protection through automatic leaky paths identification and obfuscation.
papers.abstract: Side-channel analysis (SCA) attacks show an enormous threat to cryptographic integrated circuits (ICs). To address this threat, designers try to adopt various countermeasures during the IC development process. However, many existing solutions are costly in terms of area, power and/or performance, and may require full-custom circuit design for proper implementations. In this paper, we propose a tool, namely PathFinder, to automatically identify leaky paths and protect the design, and is compatible with the commercial design flow. The tool first finds out partial logic cells that leak the most information through dynamic correlation analysis. PathFinder then exploits static security checking to construct complete leaky paths based on these cells. After leaky paths are identified, PathFinder will leverage proper hardware countermeasures, including Boolean masking and random precharge, to eliminate information leakage from these paths. The effectiveness of PathFinder is validated both through simulation and physical measurements on FPGA implementations. Results demonstrate more than 1000X improvements on side-channel resistance, with less than 6.53% penalty to the power, area and performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 旁道分析 (SCA) 攻击显示出对加密集成电路 (IC) 的巨大威胁。为了应对这一威胁，设计人员尝试在 IC 开发过程中采取各种对策。然而，许多现有解决方案在面积、功耗和/或性能方面成本高昂，并且可能需要全定制电路设计才能正确实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种工具，即PathFinder，可以自动识别泄漏路径并保护设计，并且与商业设计流程兼容。该工具首先通过动态相关性分析找出泄漏最多信息的部分逻辑单元。然后，PathFinder 利用静态安全检查根据这些单元构建完整的泄漏路径。识别出泄漏路径后，PathFinder 将利用适当的硬件对策，包括布尔掩码和随机预充电，以消除这些路径中的信息泄漏。 PathFinder 的有效性通过 FPGA 实现的仿真和物理测量得到验证。结果表明，侧信道阻力提高了 1000 倍以上，功耗、面积和性能损失不到 6.53%。

papers.title: PatterNet: explore and exploit filter patterns for efficient deep neural networks.
papers.abstract: Weight clustering is an effective technique for compressing deep neural networks (DNNs) memory by using a limited number of unique weights and low-bit weight indexes to store clustering information. In this paper, we propose PatterNet, which enforces shared clustering topologies on filters. Cluster sharing leads to a greater extent of memory reduction by reusing the index information. PatterNet effectively factorizes input activations and post-processes the unique weights, which saves multiplications by several orders of magnitude. Furthermore, PatterNet reduces the add operations by harnessing the fact that filters sharing a clustering pattern have the same factorized terms. We introduce techniques for determining and assigning clustering patterns and training a network to fulfill the target patterns. We also propose and implement an efficient accelerator that builds upon the patterned filters. Experimental results show that PatterNet shrinks the memory and operation count up to 80.2% and 73.1%, respectively, with similar accuracy to the baseline models. PatterNet accelerator improves the energy efficiency by 107x over Nvidia 1080 1080 GTX and 2.2x over state of the art.
papers.abstract_zh: 权重聚类是一种通过使用有限数量的唯一权重和低位权重索引来存储聚类信息来压缩深度神经网络 (DNN) 内存的有效技术。在本文中，我们提出了 PatterNet，它在过滤器上强制执行共享集群拓扑。集群共享通过重用索引信息可以更大程度地减少内存。 PatterNet 有效地分解输入激活并对唯一权重进行后处理，从而将乘法节省几个数量级。此外，PatterNet 通过利用共享聚类模式的过滤器具有相同分解项的事实来减少添加操作。我们介绍了确定和分配聚类模式以及训练网络以满足目标模式的技术。我们还提出并实现了一个基于图案过滤器的高效加速器。实验结果表明，PatterNet 将内存和操作数分别减少了 80.2% 和 73.1%，准确度与基线模型相似。 PatterNet 加速器的能效比 Nvidia 1080 1080 GTX 提高了 107 倍，比现有技术提高了 2.2 倍。

papers.title: PHANES: ReRAM-based photonic accelerator for deep neural networks.
papers.abstract:
Resistive random access memory (ReRAM) has demonstrated great promises of in-situ matrix-vector multiplications to accelerate deep neural networks. However, subject to the intrinsic properties of analog processing, most of the proposed ReRAM-based accelerators require excessive costly ADC/DAC to avoid distortion of electronic analog signals during inter-tile transmission. Moreover, due to bit-shifting before addition, prior works require longer cycles to serially calculate partial sum compared to multiplications, which dramatically restricts the throughput and is more likely to stall the pipeline between layers of deep neural networks.

In this paper, we present a novel ReRAM-based photonic accelerator (PHANES) architecture, which calculates multiplications in ReRAM and parallel weighted accumulations during optical transmission. Such photonic paradigm also serves as high-fidelity analog-analog links to further reduce ADC/DAC. To circumvent the memory wall problem, we further propose a progressive bit-depth technique. Evaluations show that PHANES improves the energy efficiency by 6.09x and throughput density by 14.7x compared to state-of-the-art designs. Our photonic architecture also has great potentials for scalability towards very-large-scale accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh:
电阻式随机存取存储器（ReRAM）已经证明了原位矩阵向量乘法在加速深度神经网络方面的巨大前景。然而，受模拟处理固有特性的影响，大多数提出的基于 ReRAM 的加速器都需要成本过高的 ADC/DAC，以避免在块间传输期间电子模拟信号失真。此外，由于加法之前进行位移位，与乘法相比，先前的工作需要更长的周期来连续计算部分和，这极大地限制了吞吐量，并且更有可能使深度神经网络层之间的管道停滞。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 ReRAM 的光子加速器 (PHANES) 架构，该架构可计算 ReRAM 中的乘法和光传输期间的并行加权累加。这种光子范例还可以用作高保真模拟链路，以进一步减少 ADC/DAC。为了规避内存墙问题，我们进一步提出了渐进位深度技术。评估表明，与最先进的设计相比，PHANES 将能源效率提高了 6.09 倍，吞吐量密度提高了 14.7 倍。我们的光子架构还具有向超大规模加速器扩展的巨大潜力。

papers.title: PIM-DH: ReRAM-based processing-in-memory architecture for deep hashing acceleration.
papers.abstract:
Deep hashing has gained growing momentum in large-scale image retrieval. However, deep hashing is computation- and memory-intensive, which demands hardware acceleration. The unique process of hash sequence computation in deep hashing is non-trivial to accelerate due to the lack of an efficient compute primitive for Hamming distance calculation and ranking.

This paper proposes the first PIM-based scheme for deep hashing accelerator, namely PIM-DH. PIM-DH is supported by an algorithm and architecture co-design. The proposed algorithm seeks to compress the hash sequence to increase the retrieval efficiency by exploiting the hash code sparsity without accuracy loss. Further, we design a lightweight circuit to assist CAM to optimize hash computation efficiency. This design leads to an elegant extension of current PIM-based architectures for adapting to various hashing algorithms and arbitrary size of hash sequence induced by pruning. Compared to the state-of-the-art software framework running on Intel Xeon CPU and NVIDIA RTX2080 GPU, PIM-DH achieves an average 4.75E+03 speedup with 4.64E+05 energy reduction over CPU, 2.30E+02 speedup with 3.38E+04 energy reduction over GPU. Compared with PIM architecture CASCADE, PIM-DH can improve computing efficiency by 17.49× and energy efficiency by 41.38×.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度哈希在大规模图像检索中获得了日益增长的动力。然而，深度哈希是计算和内存密集型的，这需要硬件加速。由于缺乏用于汉明距离计算和排序的有效计算原语，深度哈希中哈希序列计算的独特过程很难加速。

本文提出了第一个基于PIM的深度哈希加速器方案，即PIM-DH。 PIM-DH 由算法和架构协同设计支持。所提出的算法旨在通过利用哈希码稀疏性来压缩哈希序列以提高检索效率而不损失准确性。此外，我们设计了一个轻量级电路来辅助CAM优化哈希计算效率。这种设计对当前基于 PIM 的架构进行了优雅的扩展，以适应各种哈希算法和剪枝引起的任意大小的哈希序列。与在 Intel Xeon CPU 和 NVIDIA RTX2080 GPU 上运行的最先进的软件框架相比，PIM-DH 比 CPU 平均加速 4.75E+03，能耗降低 4.64E+05；与 GPU 相比，平均加速 2.30E+02，能耗降低 3.38E+04。与PIM架构CASCADE相比，PIM-DH可提高计算效率17.49倍，能源效率提高41.38倍。

papers.title: Pipette: efficient fine-grained reads for SSDs.
papers.abstract: Big data applications, such as recommendation system and social network, often generate a huge number of fine-grained reads to the storage. Block-oriented storage devices tend to suffer from these fine-grained read operations in terms of I/O traffic as well as performance. Motivated by this challenge, a fine-grained read framework, Pipette, is proposed in this paper, as an extension to the traditional I/O framework. With an adaptive caching design, Pipette framework offers a tremendous reduction in I/O traffic as well as achieves significant performance gain. A Pipette prototype was implemented with Ext4 file system on an SSD for two real-world applications, where the I/O throughput is improved by 31.6% and 33.5%, and the I/O traffic is reduced by 95.6% and 93.6%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 大数据应用程序，例如推荐系统和社交网络，通常会对存储产生大量细粒度的读取。面向块的存储设备在 I/O 流量和性能方面往往会受到这些细粒度读取操作的影响。受这一挑战的推动，本文提出了一种细粒度的读取框架 Pipette，作为传统 I/O 框架的扩展。通过自适应缓存设计，Pipette 框架极大地减少了 I/O 流量，并实现了显着的性能提升。 Pipette 原型在 SSD 上使用 Ext4 文件系统实现了两个实际应用，其中 I/O 吞吐量分别提高了 31.6% 和 33.5%，I/O 流量分别减少了 95.6% 和 93.6%。

papers.title: PIPF-DRAM: processing in precharge-free DRAM.
papers.abstract: To alleviate costly data communication among processing cores and memory modules, parallel processing-in-memory (PIM) is a promising approach which exploits the huge available internal memory bandwidth. High capacity, wide row size, and maturity of DRAM technology, make DRAM an alluring structure for PIM. However, dense layout, high process variation, and noise vulnerability of DRAMs make it very challenging to apply PIM for DRAMs in practice. This work proposes a PIM structure which eliminates these DRAM limitations, exploiting a precharge-free DRAM (PF-DRAM) structure. The proposed PIM structure, called PIPF-DRAM, performs parallel bitwise operations only by modifying control signal sequences in PF-DRAM, with almost zero structural and circuit modifications. Comparing the state-of-the-art PIM techniques, PIPF-DRAM is 4.2× more robust to process variation, 4.1% faster in average cycle time of operations, and consumes 66.1% less energy.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减轻处理核心和内存模块之间昂贵的数据通信，内存并行处理（PIM）是一种很有前景的方法，它利用了巨大的可用内部内存带宽。高容量、宽行尺寸和 DRAM 技术的成熟，使 DRAM 成为 PIM 的诱人结构。然而，DRAM 的密集布局、高工艺变化和噪声脆弱性使得在实践中将 PIM 应用到 DRAM 中非常具有挑战性。这项工作提出了一种 PIM 结构，利用免预充电 DRAM (PF-DRAM) 结构消除了这些 DRAM 限制。所提出的PIM结构称为PIPF-DRAM，仅通过修改PF-DRAM中的控制信号序列来执行并行按位操作，结构和电路修改几乎为零。与最先进的 PIM 技术相比，PIPF-DRAM 对工艺变化的鲁棒性提高了 4.2 倍，平均操作周期时间提高了 4.1%，能耗降低了 66.1%。

papers.title: Placement initialization via a projected eigenvector algorithm: late breaking results.
papers.abstract: Canonical methods for analytical placement of VLSI designs rely on solving nonlinear programs to minimize wirelength and cell overlap. We focus on producing initial layouts such that a global analytical placer performs better compared to existing heuristics for initialization. We reduce the problem of initialization to a quadratically constrained quadratic program. Our formulation is aware of fixed macros. We propose an efficient algorithm which can quickly generate initializations for testcases with millions of cells. We show that the our method for parameter initialization results in superior performance with respect to post-detailed placement wirelength.
papers.abstract_zh: VLSI 设计分析布局的规范方法依赖于求解非线性程序来最小化线长和单元重叠。我们专注于生成初始布局，以便与现有的初始化启发式方法相比，全局分析布局器的性能更好。我们将初始化问题简化为二次约束二次规划。我们的公式知道固定宏。我们提出了一种有效的算法，可以快速生成具有数百万个单元的测试用例的初始化。我们表明，我们的参数初始化方法在详细放置线长方面具有优越的性能。

papers.title: Power-aware pruning for ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate optical neural network design.
papers.abstract: With the rapid progress of the integrated nanophotonics technology, the optical neural network (ONN) architecture has been widely investigated. Although the ONN inference is fast, conventional densely connected network structures consume large amounts of power in laser sources. We propose a novel ONN design method that finds an ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate ONN structure. The key idea is power-aware edge pruning that derives the near-optimal numbers of edges in the entire network. Optoelectronic circuit simulation demonstrates the correct functional behavior of the ONN. Furthermore, experimental evaluations using tensor-flow show the proposed methods achieved 98.28% power reduction without significant loss of accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着集成纳米光子技术的快速进步，光学神经网络（ONN）架构得到了广泛的研究。尽管 ONN 推理速度很快，但传统的密集连接网络结构会消耗大量激光源功率。我们提出了一种新颖的 ONN 设计方法，可以找到超快、节能且准确的 ONN 结构。关键思想是功率感知的边缘修剪，它可以得出整个网络中接近最佳的边缘数量。光电电路仿真演示了 ONN 的正确功能行为。此外，使用张量流的实验评估表明，所提出的方法实现了 98.28% 的功耗降低，而精度没有显着损失。

papers.title: PPATuner: pareto-driven tool parameter auto-tuning in physical design via gaussian process transfer learning.
papers.abstract: Thanks to the amazing semiconductor scaling, incredible design complexity makes the synthesis-centric very large-scale integration (VLSI) design flow increasingly rely on electronic design automation (EDA) tools. However, invoking EDA tools especially the physical synthesis tool may require several hours or even days for only one possible parameters combination. Even worse, for a new design, oceans of attempts to navigate high quality-of-results (QoR) after physical synthesis have to be made via multiple tool runs with numerous combinations of tunable tool parameters. Additionally, designers often puzzle over simultaneously considering multiple QoR metrics of interest (e.g., delay, power, and area). To tackle the dilemma within finite resource budget, designing a multi-objective parameter auto-tuning framework of the physical design tool which can learn from historical tool configurations and transfer the associated knowledge to new tasks is in demand. In this paper, we propose PPATuner, a Pareto-driven physical design tool parameter tuning methodology, to achieve a good trade-off among multiple QoR metrics of interest (e.g., power, area, delay) at the physical design stage. By incorporating the transfer Gaussian process (GP) model, it can autonomously learn the transfer knowledge from the existing tool parameter combinations. The experimental results on industrial benchmarks under the 7nm technology node demonstrate the merits of our framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于令人惊叹的半导体缩放比例，令人难以置信的设计复杂性使得以综合为中心的超大规模集成（VLSI）设计流程越来越依赖电子设计自动化（EDA）工具。然而，对于一种可能的参数组合，调用EDA工具尤其是物理综合工具可能需要几个小时甚至几天的时间。更糟糕的是，对于新设计来说，必须通过使用多种可调工具参数组合的多个工具运行来进行大量尝试，以在物理综合后获得高质量的结果 (QoR)。此外，设计人员常常对同时考虑多个感兴趣的 QoR 指标（例如延迟、功耗和面积）感到困惑。为了解决有限资源预算内的困境，需要设计一个物理设计工具的多目标参数自动调整框架，该框架可以从历史工具配置中学习并将相关知识转移到新任务中。在本文中，我们提出了 PPATuner，一种 Pareto 驱动的物理设计工具参数调整方法，以在物理设计阶段实现多个感兴趣的 QoR 指标（例如功率、面积、延迟）之间的良好权衡。通过结合传递高斯过程（GP）模型，它可以从现有的工具参数组合中自主学习传递知识。 7nm技术节点下工业基准的实验结果证明了我们框架的优点。

papers.title: Precise and scalable shared cache contention analysis for WCET estimation.
papers.abstract: Worst-Case Execution Time (WCET) analysis for real-time tasks must precisely predict cache hit/miss of memory accesses. While bringing great performance benefits, multi-core processors significantly complicate the cache analysis problem due to the shared cache contentions among different cores. Existing methods pessimistically consider that memory references of parallel executing tasks will contend with each other as long as they are mapped to the same cache line. However, in reality, numerous shared cache contentions are mutually exclusive, due to the partial orders among the programs executed in parallel. The presence of shared cache contentions greatly exacerbates the computational complexity of the WCET computation, as finding the longest path needs exploring an exponentially large partial ordering space. In this paper, we propose a quantitative method with O( n 2 ) time complexity to precisely estimate the worst-case extra execution time (WCEET) caused by shared cache contentions. The proposed method can be easily integrated into the abstract-interpretation based WCET estimation framework. Experiments with MRTC benchmarks show that our method can averagely tighten the WCET estimation by 13% without sacrificing the analysis efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 实时任务的最坏情况执行时间 (WCET) 分析必须精确预测内存访问的缓存命中/未命中。在带来巨大性能优势的同时，多核处理器由于不同内核之间的共享缓存争用而使缓存分析问题变得非常复杂。现有的方法悲观地认为，并行执行任务的内存引用只要映射到同一缓存线就会相互竞争。然而，实际上，由于并行执行的程序之间存在偏序，因此许多共享缓存争用是互斥的。共享缓存争用的存在极大地加剧了 WCET 计算的计算复杂性，因为找到最长路径需要探索指数级大的部分排序空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间复杂度为 O( n 2 ) 的定量方法来精确估计由共享缓存争用引起的最坏情况额外执行时间（WCEET）。所提出的方法可以很容易地集成到基于抽象解释的 WCET 估计框架中。 MRTC 基准​​测试表明，我们的方法可以在不牺牲分析效率的情况下将 WCET 估计平均收紧 13%。

papers.title: Predictable sharing of last-level cache partitions for multi-core safety-critical systems.
papers.abstract: Last-level cache (LLC) partitioning is a technique to provide temporal isolation and low worst-case latency (WCL) bounds when cores access the shared LLC in multicore safety-critical systems. A typical approach to cache partitioning involves allocating a separate partition to a distinct core. A central criticism of this approach is its poor utilization of cache storage. Today's trend of integrating a larger number of cores exacerbates this issue such that we are forced to consider shared LLC partitions for effective deployments. This work presents an approach to share LLC partitions among multiple cores while being able to provide low WCL bounds.
papers.abstract_zh: 最后一级缓存 (LLC) 分区是一种在多核安全关键系统中的内核访问共享 LLC 时提供时间隔离和低最坏情况延迟 (WCL) 界限的技术。缓存分区的典型方法是将单独的分区分配给不同的核心。这种方法的一个主要批评是其对缓存存储的利用率不佳。如今集成更多核心的趋势加剧了这个问题，因此我们被迫考虑共享 LLC 分区以实现有效部署。这项工作提出了一种在多个内核之间共享 LLC 分区的方法，同时能够提供较低的 WCL 界限。

papers.title: Pref-X: a framework to reveal data prefetching in commercial in-order cores.
papers.abstract:
Computer system simulators are major tools used by architecture researchers to develop and evaluate new ideas. Clearly, such evaluations are more conclusive when compared to commercial state-of-the-art architectures. However, the behavior of key components in existing processors is often not disclosed, complicating the construction of faithful reference models. The data prefetching engine is one of such obscured components that can have a significant impact on key metrics such as performance and energy.

In this paper, we propose Pref-X, a framework to analyze functional characteristics of data prefetching in commercial in-order cores. Our framework reveals data prefetches by X-raying into the cache memory at the request granularity, which allows linking memory access patterns with changes in the cache content. To demonstrate the power and accuracy of our methodology, we use Pref-X to replicate the data prefetching mechanisms of two representative processors, namely the Arm Cortex-A7 and the Arm Cortex-A53, with a 99.8% and 96.9% average accuracy, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
计算机系统模拟器是建筑研究人员用来开发和评估新想法的主要工具。显然，与商业最先进的架构相比，此类评估更具决定性。然而，现有处理器中关键组件的行为通常不会被公开，这使得忠实参考模型的构建变得复杂。数据预取引擎是此类模糊组件之一，它可能对性能和能源等关键指标产生重大影响。

在本文中，我们提出了 Pref-X，一个用于分析商业有序核心中数据预取功能特征的框架。我们的框架通过按请求粒度将数据预取到高速缓存中来揭示数据预取，这允许将内存访问模式与高速缓存内容的变化联系起来。为了证明我们方法的强大功能和准确性，我们使用 Pref-X 复制两个代表性处理器（即 Arm Cortex-A7 和 Arm Cortex-A53）的数据预取机制，平均准确度分别为 99.8% 和 96.9%。

papers.title: PriMax: maximizing DSL application performance with selective primitive acceleration.
papers.abstract: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) improve developer productivity by abstracting away low-level details of an algorithm's implementation within a specialized domain. These languages often provide powerful primitives to describe complex operations, potentially granting flexibility during compilation to target hardware acceleration. This work proposes PriMax, a novel methodology to effectively map DSL applications to hardware accelerators. It builds decision trees based on benchmark results, which select between distinct implementations of accelerated primitives to maximize a target performance metric. In our graph analytics case study with two accelerators, PriMax produces a geometric mean speedup of 1.57x over a multicore CPU, higher than either target accelerator alone, and approaching the maximum 1.58x speedup attainable with these target accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 领域特定语言 (DSL) 通过抽象出专门领域内算法实现的低级细节来提高开发人员的工作效率。这些语言通常提供强大的原语来描述复杂的操作，从而可能在编译过程中为目标硬件加速提供灵活性。这项工作提出了 PriMax，这是一种有效地将 DSL 应用映射到硬件加速器的新颖方法。它根据基准测试结果构建决策树，在加速原语的不同实现之间进行选择，以最大化目标性能指标。在我们使用两个加速器的图形分析案例研究中，PriMax 比多核 CPU 产生了 1.57 倍的几何平均加速比，高于单独使用任一目标加速器的速度，并且接近这些目标加速器可实现的最大 1.58 倍加速比。

papers.title: Processing-in-SRAM acceleration for ultra-low power visual 3D perception.
papers.abstract: Real-time ego-motion tracking and 3D structural estimation are the fundamental tasks for the ubiquitous cyper-physical systems, and they can be conducted via the state-of-the-art Edge-Based Visual Odometry (EBVO) algorithm. However, the intrinsic data-intensive process of EBVO emplaces a memory-wall hurdle in practical deployment on conventional von-Neumann-style computing systems. In this work, we attempt to leverage SRAM based processing-in-memory (PIM) technique to alleviate such memory-wall bottleneck, so as to optimize the EBVO systematically from the perspectives of the algorithm layer and physical layer. In the algorithm layer, we first investigate the data reuse patterns of the essential computing kernels required for the feature detection and pose estimation steps in EBVO, and propose PIM friendly data layout and computing scheme for each kernel accordingly. We distill the basic logical and arithmetical operations required in the algorithm layer, and in the physical layer, we propose a novel bit-parallel and reconfigurable SRAM-PIM architecture to realize the operations with high computing precision and throughput. Our experimental result shows that the proposed multi-layer optimization allows for high tracking accuracy of EBVO, and it can improve 11x processing speed and reduce 20x energy consumption compared to the CPU implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 实时自我运动跟踪和 3D 结构估计是无处不在的信息物理系统的基本任务，它们可以通过最先进的基于边缘的视觉里程计 (EBVO) 算法来执行。然而，EBVO 固有的数据密集型过程在传统冯诺依曼式计算系统的实际部署中设置了内存墙障碍。在这项工作中，我们尝试利用基于SRAM的内存处理（PIM）技术来缓解这种内存墙瓶颈，从而从算法层和物理层的角度系统地优化EBVO。在算法层，我们首先研究EBVO中特征检测和姿态估计步骤所需的基本计算内核的数据重用模式，并相应地为每个内核提出PIM友好的数据布局和计算方案。我们提炼了算法层所需的基本逻辑和算术运算，在物理层，我们提出了一种新颖的位并行和可重构的SRAM-PIM架构，以实现高计算精度和吞吐量的运算。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的多层优化可以实现 EBVO 的高跟踪精度，并且与 CPU 实现相比，它可以提高 11 倍的处理速度并降低 20 倍的能耗。

papers.title: Pursuing more effective graph spectral sparsifiers via approximate trace reduction.
papers.abstract: Spectral graph sparsification aims to find ultra-sparse subgraphs which can preserve spectral properties of original graphs. In this paper, a new spectral criticality metric based on trace reduction is first introduced for identifying spectrally important off-subgraph edges. Then, a physics-inspired truncation strategy and an approach using approximate inverse of Cholesky factor are proposed to compute the approximate trace reduction efficiently. Combining them with the iterative densification scheme in [8] and the strategy of excluding spectrally similar off-subgraph edges in [13], we develop a highly effective graph sparsification algorithm. The proposed method has been validated with various kinds of graphs. Experimental results show that it always produces sparsifiers with remarkably better quality than the state-of-the-art GRASS [8] in same computational cost, enabling more than 40% time reduction for preconditioned iterative equation solver on average. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and spectral graph partitioning, the derived iterative solver shows 3.3X or more advantages on runtime and memory cost, over the approach based on direct sparse solver.
papers.abstract_zh: 谱图稀疏化旨在找到可以保留原始图谱特性的超稀疏子图。在本文中，首先引入了一种基于迹缩减的新光谱关键性度量，用于识别光谱上重要的子图外边缘。然后，提出了一种受物理启发的截断策略和一种使用 Cholesky 因子的近似逆的方法来有效地计算近似迹缩减。将它们与[8]中的迭代致密化方案和[13]中排除光谱相似的子图外边缘的策略相结合，我们开发了一种高效的图稀疏化算法。所提出的方法已通过各种类型的图进行了验证。实验结果表明，在相同的计算成本下，它总是能产生比最先进的 GRASS [8] 质量明显更好的稀疏器，使预处理迭代方程求解器的时间平均减少 40% 以上。在电网瞬态分析和频谱图划分的应用中，与基于直接稀疏求解器的方法相比，派生的迭代求解器在运行时间和内存成本方面显示出 3.3 倍或更多的优势。

papers.title: QOC: quantum on-chip training with parameter shift and gradient pruning.
papers.abstract: Parameterized Quantum Circuits (PQC) are drawing increasing research interest thanks to its potential to achieve quantum advantages on near-term Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) hardware. In order to achieve scalable PQC learning, the training process needs to be offloaded to real quantum machines instead of using exponential-cost classical simulators. One common approach to obtain PQC gradients is parameter shift whose cost scales linearly with the number of qubits. We present QOC, the first experimental demonstration of practical on-chip PQC training with parameter shift. Nevertheless, we find that due to the significant quantum errors (noises) on real machines, gradients obtained from naïve parameter shift have low fidelity and thus degrading the training accuracy. To this end, we further propose probabilistic gradient pruning to firstly identify gradients with potentially large errors and then remove them. Specifically, small gradients have larger relative errors than large ones, thus having a higher probability to be pruned. We perform extensive experiments with the Quantum Neural Network (QNN) benchmarks on 5 classification tasks using 5 real quantum machines. The results demonstrate that our on-chip training achieves over 90% and 60% accuracy for 2-class and 4-class image classification tasks. The probabilistic gradient pruning brings up to 7% PQC accuracy improvements over no pruning. Overall, we successfully obtain similar on-chip training accuracy compared with noise-free simulation but have much better training scalability. The QOC code is available in the TorchQuantum library.
papers.abstract_zh: 参数化量子电路 (PQC) 因其在近期噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 硬件上实现量子优势的潜力而引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。为了实现可扩展的 PQC 学习，训练过程需要卸载到真正的量子机器上，而不是使用指数成本的经典模拟器。获得 PQC 梯度的一种常见方法是参数移位，其成本与量子位的数量成线性比例。我们推出了 QOC，这是带有参数转换的实用片上 PQC 训练的第一个实验演示。然而，我们发现，由于真实机器上存在显着的量子误差（噪声），从朴素参数移位获得的梯度保真度较低，从而降低了训练精度。为此，我们进一步提出概率梯度剪枝，首先识别具有潜在大误差的梯度，然后将其删除。具体来说，小梯度比大梯度具有更大的相对误差，因此被剪枝的概率更高。我们使用 5 台真实量子机器，针对 5 个分类任务，对量子神经网络 (QNN) 基准进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的片上训练对于 2 类和 4 类图像分类任务的准确率分别达到 90% 和 60% 以上。与不进行剪枝相比，概率梯度剪枝可将 PQC 精度提高高达 7%。总体而言，与无噪声仿真相比，我们成功获得了类似的片上训练精度，但具有更好的训练可扩展性。 QOC 代码可在 TorchQuantum 库中找到。

papers.title: QuantumNAT: quantum noise-aware training with noise injection, quantization and normalization.
papers.abstract: Parameterized Quantum Circuits (PQC) are promising towards quantum advantage on near-term quantum hardware. However, due to the large quantum noises (errors), the performance of PQC models has a severe degradation on real quantum devices. Take Quantum Neural Network (QNN) as an example, the accuracy gap between noise-free simulation and noisy results on IBMQ-Yorktown for MNIST-4 classification is over 60%. Existing noise mitigation methods are general ones without leveraging unique characteristics of PQC; on the other hand, existing PQC work does not consider noise effect. To this end, we present QuantumNAT, a PQC-specific framework to perform noise-aware optimizations in both training and inference stages to improve robustness. We experimentally observe that the effect of quantum noise to PQC measurement outcome is a linear map from noise-free outcome with a scaling and a shift factor. Motivated by that, we propose post-measurement normalization to mitigate the feature distribution differences between noise-free and noisy scenarios. Furthermore, to improve the robustness against noise, we propose noise injection to the training process by inserting quantum error gates to PQC according to realistic noise models of quantum hardware. Finally, post-measurement quantization is introduced to quantize the measurement outcomes to discrete values, achieving the denoising effect. Extensive experiments on 8 classification tasks using 6 quantum devices demonstrate that QuantumNAT improves accuracy by up to 43%, and achieves over 94% 2-class, 80% 4-class, and 34% 10-class classification accuracy measured on real quantum computers. The code for construction and noise-aware training of PQC is available in the TorchQuantum library.
papers.abstract_zh: 参数化量子电路（PQC）有望在近期量子硬件上发挥量子优势。然而，由于较大的量子噪声（误差），PQC模型的性能在实际量子器件上严重退化。以量子神经网络（QNN）为例，IBMQ-Yorktown 上 MNIST-4 分类的无噪声模拟与噪声结果之间的准确度差距超过 60%。现有的噪声抑制方法都是通用的，没有利用PQC的独特特性；另一方面，现有的PQC工作没有考虑噪声影响。为此，我们提出了 QuantumNAT，这是一个 PQC 特定框架，用于在训练和推理阶段执行噪声感知优化，以提高鲁棒性。我们通过实验观察到，量子噪声对 PQC 测量结果的影响是无噪声结果与缩放因子和移位因子的线性映射。受此启发，我们提出测量后归一化，以减轻无噪声和噪声场景之间的特征分布差异。此外，为了提高对噪声的鲁棒性，我们建议根据量子硬件的真实噪声模型，通过将量子误差门插入到 PQC 中，将噪声注入到训练过程中。最后引入测量后量化，将测量结果量化为离散值，达到去噪效果。使用 6 个量子设备对 8 个分类任务进行的大量实验表明，QuantumNAT 将准确率提高了高达 43%，在真实量子计算机上测得的 2 类分类准确率超过 94%，4 类分类准确率超过 80%，10 类分类准确率超过 34%。用于 PQC 构建和噪声感知培训的代码可在 TorchQuantum 库中找到。

papers.title: QuiltNet: efficient deep learning inference on multi-chip accelerators using model partitioning.
papers.abstract: We have seen many successful deployments of deep learning accelerator designs on different platforms and technologies, e.g., FPGA, ASIC, and Processing In-Memory platforms. However, the size of the deep learning models keeps increasing, making computations a burden on the accelerators. A naive approach to resolve this issue is to design larger accelerators; however, it is not scalable due to high resource requirements, e.g., power consumption and off-chip memory sizes. A promising solution is to utilize multiple accelerators and use them as needed, similar to conventional multiprocessing. For example, for smaller networks, we may use a single accelerator, while we may use multiple accelerators with proper network partitioning for larger networks. However, partitioning DNN models into multiple parts leads to large communication overheads due to inter-layer communications. In this paper, we propose a scalable solution to accelerate DNN models on multiple devices by devising a new model partitioning technique. Our technique transforms a DNN model into layer-wise partitioned models using an autoencoder. Since the autoencoder encodes a tensor output into a smaller dimension, we can split the neural network model into multiple pieces while significantly reducing the communication overhead to pipeline them. Our evaluation results conducted on state-of-the-art deep learning models show that the proposed technique significantly improves performance and energy efficiency. Our solution increases performance and energy efficiency by up to 30.5% and 28.4% with minimal accuracy loss as compared to running the same model on pipelined multi-block accelerators without the autoencoder.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们已经看到许多深度学习加速器设计在不同平台和技术上的成功部署，例如 FPGA、ASIC 和内存处理平台。然而，深度学习模型的规模不断增加，使得计算成为加速器的负担。解决这个问题的一个简单方法是设计更大的加速器；然而，由于资源要求高，例如功耗和片外存储器大小，它不可扩展。一个有前途的解决方案是利用多个加速器并根据需要使用它们，类似于传统的多处理。例如，对于较小的网络，我们可以使用单个加速器，而对于较大的网络，我们可以使用多个加速器并进行适当的网络分区。然而，将 DNN 模型划分为多个部分会因层间通信而导致大量通信开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过设计新的模型分区技术来加速多个设备上的 DNN 模型。我们的技术使用自动编码器将 DNN 模型转换为分层分区模型。由于自动编码器将张量输出编码为更小的维度，因此我们可以将神经网络模型分成多个部分，同时显着减少管道传输的通信开销。我们对最先进的深度学习模型进行的评估结果表明，所提出的技术显着提高了性能和能源效率。与在没有自动编码器的流水线多块加速器上运行相同的模型相比，我们的解决方案将性能和能源效率提高了 30.5% 和 28.4%，并且精度损失最小。

papers.title: R2B: high-efficiency and fair I/O scheduling for multi-tenant with differentiated demands.
papers.abstract:
Big data applications have differentiated requirements for I/O resources in cloud environments. For instance, data analytic and AI/ML applications usually have periodical burst I/O traffic, and data stream processing and database applications often introduce fluctuating I/O loads based on a guaranteed I/O bandwidth. However, the existing resource isolation model (i.e., RLW) and methods (e.g., Token-bucket, mClock, and cgroup) cannot support the fluctuating I/O load and differentiated I/O demands well, and thus cannot achieve fairness, high resource utilization, and high performance for applications at the same time. In this paper, we propose a novel efficient and fair I/O resource isolation model and method called R2B, which can adapt to the differentiated I/O characteristics and requirements of different applications in a shared resource environment. R2B can simultaneously satisfy the fairness and achieve both high application efficiency and high bandwidth utilization.

This work aims to help the cloud provider achieve higher utilization by shifting the burden to the cloud customers to specify their type of workload.
papers.abstract_zh:
大数据应用对云环境中的I/O资源有差异化的需求。例如，数据分析和 AI/ML 应用程序通常具有周期性突发 I/O 流量，而数据流处理和数据库应用程序通常会在保证 I/O 带宽的基础上引入波动的 I/O 负载。然而，现有的资源隔离模型（RLW）和方法（如Token-bucket、mClock、cgroup等）无法很好地支持波动的I/O负载和差异化的I/O需求，无法同时实现应用程序的公平性、高资源利用率和高性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的高效、公平的I/O资源隔离模型和方法，称为R2B，它可以适应共享资源环境中不同应用程序的差异化I/O特性和需求。 R2B可以同时满足公平性，同时实现高应用效率和高带宽利用率。

这项工作旨在通过将指定工作负载类型的负担转移给云客户来帮助云提供商实现更高的利用率。

papers.title: Raven: a novel kernel debugging tool on RISC-V.
papers.abstract: Debugging is an essential part of kernel development. However, debugging features are not available on RISC-V without the use of external hardware. In this paper, we leverage a security feature called Physical Memory Protection (PMP) as a debugging primitive to address this issue. Based on this debugging primitive, we design Raven, a novel kernel debugging tool with the standard functionalities (breakpoints, watchpoints, stepping, introspection). A prototype of Raven is implemented on a SiFive Unmatched development board. Our experiments show that Raven imposes a moderate but acceptable overhead to the kernel. Moreover, a real-world debugging scenario is set up to test its effectiveness.
papers.abstract_zh: 调试是内核开发的重要组成部分。然而，如果不使用外部硬件，RISC-V 上就无法使用调试功能。在本文中，我们利用称为物理内存保护（PMP）的安全功能作为调试原语来解决此问题。基于这个调试原语，我们设计了Raven，一种具有标准功能（断点、观察点、单步执行、自省）的新型内核调试工具。 Raven 的原型是在 SiFive Unmatched 开发板上实现的。我们的实验表明，Raven 给内核带来了适度但可接受的开销。此外，还设置了真实的调试场景来测试其有效性。

papers.title: REACT: a heterogeneous reconfigurable neural network accelerator with software-configurable NoCs for training and inference on wearables.
papers.abstract: On-chip training improves model accuracy on personalised user data and preserves privacy. This work proposes REACT, an AI accelerator for wearables that has heterogeneous cores supporting both training and inference. REACT's architecture is NoC-centric, with weights, features and gradients distributed across cores, accessed and computed efficiently through software-configurable NoCs. Unlike conventional dynamic NoCs, REACT's NoCs have no buffer queues, flow control or routing, as they are entirely configured by software for each neural network. REACT's online learning realises upto 75% accuracy improvement, and is upto 25× faster and 520× more energy-efficient than state-of-the-art accelerators with similar memory and computation footprint.
papers.abstract_zh: 片上训练提高了个性化用户数据的模型准确性并保护隐私。这项工作提出了 REACT，这是一种用于可穿戴设备的人工智能加速器，具有支持训练和推理的异构核心。 REACT 的架构以 NoC 为中心，权重、特征和梯度分布在多个核心上，通过软件可配置的 NoC 进行高效访问和计算。与传统的动态 NoC 不同，REACT 的 NoC 没有缓冲队列、流量控制或路由，因为它们完全由软件为每个神经网络配置。 REACT 的在线学习实现了高达 75% 的准确率提升，并且与具有相似内存和计算占用空间的最先进加速器相比，速度提高了 25 倍，能效提高了 520 倍。

papers.title: ReGNN: a ReRAM-based heterogeneous architecture for general graph neural networks.
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have both graph processing and neural network computational features. Traditional graph accelerators and NN accelerators cannot meet these dual characteristics of GNN applications simultaneously. In this work, we propose a ReRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture called ReGNN for GNN acceleration. ReGNN is composed of analog PIM (APIM) modules for accelerating matrix vector multiplication (MVM) operations, and digital PIM (DPIM) modules for accelerating non-MVM aggregation operations. To improve data parallelism, ReGNN maps data to aggregation sub-engines based on the degree of vertices and the dimension of feature vectors. Experimental results show that ReGNN speeds up GNN inference by 228x and 8.4x, and reduces energy consumption by 305.2x and 10.5x, compared with GPU and the ReRAM-based GNN accelerator ReGraphX, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）同时具有图处理和神经网络计算功能。传统的图加速器和神经网络加速器无法同时满足GNN应用的这些双重特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 ReRAM 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构，称为 ReGNN，用于 GNN 加速。 ReGNN 由用于加速矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 操作的模拟 PIM (APIM) 模块和用于加速非 MVM 聚合操作的数字 PIM (DPIM) 模块组成。为了提高数据并行性，ReGNN 根据顶点的度数和特征向量的维度将数据映射到聚合子引擎。实验结果表明，与 GPU 和基于 ReRAM 的 GNN 加速器 ReGraphX 相比，ReGNN 分别将 GNN 推理速度提高了 228 倍和 8.4 倍，能耗降低了 305.2 倍和 10.5 倍。

papers.title: RegVault: hardware assisted selective data randomization for operating system kernels.
papers.abstract: This paper presents RegVault, a hardware-assisted lightweight data randomization scheme for OS kernels. RegVault introduces novel cryptographically strong hardware primitives to protect both the confidentiality and integrity of register-grained data. RegVault leverages annotations to mark sensitive data and instruments their loads and stores automatically. Moreover, RegVault also introduces new techniques to protect the interrupt context and safeguard the sensitive data spilling. We implement a prototype of RegVault by extending RISC-V architecture to protect six types of sensitive data in Linux kernel. Our evaluations show that RegVault can defend against the kernel data attacks effectively with a minimal performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 RegVault，一种用于操作系统内核的硬件辅助轻量级数据随机化方案。 RegVault 引入了新颖的加密功能强大的硬件原语，以保护寄存器粒度数据的机密性和完整性。 RegVault 利用注释来标记敏感数据并自动检测其加载和存储。此外，RegVault还引入了新技术来保护中断上下文并防止敏感数据溢出。我们通过扩展 RISC-V 架构来实现 RegVault 原型，以保护 Linux 内核中的六种敏感数据。我们的评估表明，RegVault 可以以最小的性能开销有效防御内核数据攻击。

papers.title: ReSMA: accelerating approximate string matching using ReRAM-based content addressable memory.
papers.abstract: Approximate string matching (ASM) functions as the basic operation kernel for a large number of string processing applications. Existing Von-Neumann-based ASM accelerators suffer from huge intermediate data with the ever-increasing string data, leading to massive off-chip data transmissions. This paper presents a novel ASM processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerator, namely ReSMA, based on ReCAM- and ReRAM-arrays to eliminate the off-chip data transmissions in ASM. We develop a novel ReCAM-friendly filter-and-filtering algorithm to process the q -grams filtering in ReCAM memory. We also design a new data mapping strategy and a new verification algorithm, which enables computing the edit distances totally in ReRAM crossbars for energy saving. Experimental results show that ReSMA outperforms the CPU-, GPU-, FPGA-, ASIC-, and PIM-based solutions by 268.7×, 38.6×, 20.9×, 707.8×, and 14.7× in terms of performance, and 153.8×, 42.2×, 31.6×, 18.3×, and 5.3× in terms of energy-saving, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似字符串匹配（ASM）作为大量字符串处理应用的基本运算内核。现有的基于冯诺依曼的ASM加速器面临着巨大的中间数据和不断增加的字符串数据，导致大量的片外数据传输。本文提出了一种新型 ASM 内存处理 (PIM) 加速器，即 ReSMA，它基于 ReCAM 和 ReRAM 阵列，以消除 ASM 中的片外数据传输。我们开发了一种新颖的 ReCAM 友好的过滤和过滤算法来处理 ReCAM 内存中的 q 元过滤。我们还设计了一种新的数据映射策略和一种新的验证算法，可以完全在 ReRAM 交叉开关中计算编辑距离以节省能源。实验结果表明，ReSMA在性能方面优于基于CPU、GPU、FPGA、ASIC和PIM的解决方案268.7×、38.6×、20.9×、707.8×和14.7×，在性能方面优于基于CPU、GPU、FPGA、ASIC和PIM的解决方案153.8×、42.2×、31.6×、18.3×和5.3×。分别节能。

papers.title: Response time analysis for dynamic priority scheduling in ROS2.
papers.abstract: Robot Operating System (ROS) is the most popular framework for developing robotics software. Typically, robotics software is safety-critical and employed in real-time systems requiring timing guarantees. Since the first generation of ROS provides no timing guarantee, the recent release of its second generation, ROS2, is necessary and timely, and has since received immense attention from practitioners and researchers. Unfortunately, the existing analysis of ROS2 showed the peculiar scheduling strategy of ROS2 executor , which severely affects the response time of ROS2 applications. This paper proposes a deadline-based scheduling strategy for the ROS2 executor. It further presents an analysis for an end-to-end response time of ROS2 workload (processing chain) and an evaluation of the proposed scheduling strategy for real workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器人操作系统（ROS）是用于开发机器人软件的最流行的框架。通常，机器人软件对于安全至关重要，并用于需要定时保证的实时系统中。由于第一代ROS没有时间保证，近期第二代ROS2的发布是必要且及时的，受到了从业者和研究人员的极大关注。不幸的是，现有的ROS2分析表明ROS2执行器特有的调度策略，严重影响了ROS2应用程序的响应时间。本文提出了一种基于截止日期的 ROS2 执行器调度策略。它还进一步分析了 ROS2 工作负载（处理链）的端到端响应时间，并对所提出的实际工作负载调度策略进行了评估。

papers.title: Rethinking key-value store for byte-addressable optane persistent memory.
papers.abstract: Optane Persistent Memory (PM) is a pioneering solution to byte-addressable PM for commodity systems. However, the performance of Optane PM is highly workload-sensitive, rendering many prior designs of Key-Value (KV) store inefficient. To cope with this reality, we advocate rethinking KV store design for Optane PM. Our design follows a principle of Single-stream Writing with managed Multi-stream Reading (SWMR): Incoming KV pairs are written to PM through a single write stream and managed by an ordered index in DRAM. Through asynchronously sorting and rewriting large sets of KV pairs, range queries are handled with a managed number of concurrent streams. YCSB results show that our design improved upon existing ones by 116% and 21% for write-only throughput and read-write throughput, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: Optane 持久内存 (PM) 是商用系统字节可寻址 PM 的开创性解决方案。然而，Optane PM 的性能对工作负载高度敏感，导致许多先前的键值 (KV) 存储设计效率低下。为了应对这一现实，我们主张重新思考 Optane PM 的 KV 商店设计。我们的设计遵循单流写入和托管多流读取（SWMR）的原则：传入的 KV 对通过单个写入流写入 PM，并由 DRAM 中的有序索引管理。通过异步排序和重写大量 KV 对，范围查询可通过托管数量的并发流进行处理。 YCSB 结果表明，我们的设计在只写吞吐量和读写吞吐量方面分别比现有设计提高了 116% 和 21%。

papers.title: SALO: an efficient spatial accelerator enabling hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences.
papers.abstract: The attention mechanisms of transformers effectively extract pertinent information from the input sequence. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention w.r.t the sequence length incurs heavy computational and memory burdens, especially for tasks with long sequences. Existing accelerators face performance degradation in these tasks. To this end, we propose SALO to enable hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences. SALO contains a data scheduler to map hybrid sparse attention patterns onto hardware and a spatial accelerator to perform the efficient attention computation. We show that SALO achieves 17.66x and 89.33x speedup on average compared to GPU and CPU implementations, respectively, on typical workloads, i.e., Longformer and ViL.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 的注意力机制有效地从输入序列中提取相关信息。然而，自注意力相对于序列长度的二次复杂度会带来沉重的计算和内存负担，特别是对于长序列的任务。现有加速器在这些任务中面临着性能下降的问题。为此，我们提出 SALO 来为长序列启用混合稀疏注意力机制。 SALO 包含一个数据调度器，用于将混合稀疏注意力模式映射到硬件上，以及一个空间加速器来执行高效的注意力计算。我们表明，在典型工作负载（即 Longformer 和 ViL）上，SALO 与 GPU 和 CPU 实现相比平均分别实现了 17.66 倍和 89.33 倍的加速。

papers.title: SAPredictor: a simple and accurate self-adaptive predictor for hierarchical hybrid memory system.
papers.abstract: In a hybrid memory system using DRAM as the NVM cache, DRAM and NVM can be accessed in serial or parallel mode. However, we found that using either mode alone will bring access latency and bandwidth problems. In this paper, we integrate these two access modes and design a simple but accurate predictor (called SAPredictor) to help choose the appropriate access mode, thereby avoiding long access latency and bandwidth problems to improve memory performance. Our experiments show that SAPredictor achieves an accuracy rate of up to 97.1% and helps reduce access latency by up to 35.6% at fairly low costs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在使用DRAM作为NVM缓存的混合存储系统中，DRAM和NVM可以以串行或并行模式访问。但我们发现单独使用任何一种模式都会带来访问延迟和带宽问题。在本文中，我们整合了这两种访问模式，并设计了一个简单但准确的预测器（称为 SAPredictor）来帮助选择合适的访问模式，从而避免较长的访问延迟和带宽问题，从而提高内存性能。我们的实验表明，SAPredictor 的准确率高达 97.1%，并以相当低的成本帮助降低高达 35.6% 的访问延迟。

papers.title: SATO: spiking neural network acceleration via temporal-oriented dataflow and architecture.
papers.abstract:
Event-driven spiking neural networks (SNNs) have shown great promise for being strikingly energy-efficient. SNN neurons integrate the spikes, accumulate the membrane potential, and fire output spike when the potential exceeds a threshold. Existing SNN accelerators, however, have to carry out such accumulation-comparison operation in serial. Repetitive spike generation at each time step not only increases latency as well as overall energy budget, but also incurs memory access overhead of fetching membrane potentials, both of which lessen the efficiency of SNN accelerators. Meanwhile, inherent highly sparse spikes of SNNs lead to imbalanced workloads among neurons that hurdle the utilization of processing elements (PEs).

This paper proposes SATO, a temporal-parallel SNN accelerator that accumulates the membrane potential for all time steps in parallel. SATO architecture contains a novel binary adder-search tree to generate the output spike train, which decouples the chronological dependence in the accumulation-comparison operation. Moreover, SATO can evenly dispatch the compressed workloads to all PEs with maximized data locality of input spike trains based on a bucket-sort-based method. Our evaluations show that SATO outperforms the previous ANN accelerator 8-bit version of "Eyeriss" by 30.9× in terms of speedup and 12.3×, in terms of energy-saving. Compared with the state-of-the-art SNN accelerator "SpinalFlow", SATO can also achieve 6.4× performance gain and 4.8× energy reduction, which is quite impressive for inference.
papers.abstract_zh:
事件驱动的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 已显示出惊人的节能潜力。 SNN 神经元整合尖峰，累积膜电位，并在电位超过阈值时发出输出尖峰。然而，现有的 SNN 加速器必须串行执行这种累加比较操作。每个时间步重复生成尖峰不仅会增加延迟和总体能量预算，还会产生获取膜电位的内存访问开销，这两者都会降低 SNN 加速器的效率。同时，SNN 固有的高度稀疏尖峰会导致神经元之间的工作负载不平衡，从而阻碍处理元件 (PE) 的利用。

本文提出了 SATO，一种时间并行的 SNN 加速器，可以并行累积所有时间步长的膜电位。 SATO 架构包含一种新颖的二元加法器搜索树来生成输出尖峰序列，从而解耦累加比较操作中的时间依赖性。此外，SATO 可以根据基于桶排序的方法，将输入峰值序列的数据局部性最大化，将压缩的工作负载均匀地分配给所有 PE。我们的评估表明，SATO 在加速比方面比之前的 ANN 加速器 8 位版本“Eyeriss”高出 30.9 倍，在节能方面比之前的 ANN 加速器 8 位版本高出 12.3 倍。与最先进的SNN加速器“SpinalFlow”相比，SATO还可以实现6.4倍的性能增益和4.8倍的能量降低，这对于推理来说是相当令人印象深刻的。

papers.title: SCAIE-V: an open-source SCAlable interface for ISA extensions for RISC-V processors.
papers.abstract: Custom instructions extending a base ISA are often used to increase performance. However, only few cores provide open interfaces for integrating such ISA Extensions (ISAX). In addition, the degree to which a core's capabilities are exposed for extension varies wildly between interfaces. Thus, even when using open-source cores, the lack of standardized ISAX interfaces typically causes high engineering effort when implementing or porting ISAXes. We present SCAIE-V , a highly portable and feature-rich ISAX interface that supports custom control flow, decoupled execution, multi-cycle-instructions , and memory transactions. The cost of the interface itself scales with the complexity of the ISAXes actually used.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩展基本 ISA 的自定义指令通常用于提高性能。然而，只有少数内核提供用于集成此类 ISA 扩展 (ISAX) 的开放接口。此外，核心功能用于扩展的程度在接口之间存在很大差异。因此，即使使用开源内核，标准化 ISAX 接口的缺乏通常也会导致在实现或移植 ISAX 时需要大量工程工作。我们推出 SCAIE-V，这是一种高度可移植且功能丰富的 ISAX 接口，支持自定义控制流、解耦执行、多周期指令和内存事务。接口本身的成本随着实际使用的 ISAX 的复杂性而变化。

papers.title: Scalable crash consistency for secure persistent memory.
papers.abstract: Persistent memory (PM) suffers from data security and crash consistency issues due to non-volatility. Counter-mode encryption (CME) and bonsai merkle tree (BMT) have been adopted to ensure data security by using security metadata. The data and its security metadata need to be atomically persisted for correct recovery. To ensure crash consistency, durable transactions have been widely employed. However, the long-time BMT update increases the transaction latency, and the security metadata incur heavy write traffic. This paper presents Secon to ensure SEcurity and crash CONsistency for PM with high performance. Secon leverages a scalable write-through metadata cache to ensure the atomicity of data and its security metadata. To reduce the transaction latency, Secon proposes a transaction-specific epoch persistency model to minimize the ordering constraints. To reduce the amount of PM writes, Secon co-locates counters with log entries and coalesces BMT blocks. Experimental results demonstrate that Secon significantly improves the transaction performance and decreases the write traffic.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存（PM）由于非易失性而面临数据安全和崩溃一致性问题。采用计数器模式加密（CME）和盆景默克尔树（BMT），利用安全元数据确保数据安全。数据及其安全元数据需要以原子方式持久保存才能正确恢复。为了保证崩溃一致性，持久事务被广泛采用。然而，长时间的BMT更新会增加事务延迟，并且安全元数据会产生大量写入流量。本文提出了 Secon，以确保高性能 PM 的安全性和崩溃一致性。 Secon 利用可扩展的直写元数据缓存来确保数据及其安全元数据的原子性。为了减少事务延迟，Secon 提出了一种特定于事务的纪元持久性模型，以最小化排序约束。为了减少 PM 写入量，Secon 将计数器与日志条目放在同一位置，并合并 BMT 块。实验结果表明Secon显着提高了事务性能并降低了写入流量。

papers.title: Scaled-CBSC: scaled counting-based stochastic computing multiplication for improved accuracy.
papers.abstract: Stochastic computing (SC) can lead area-efficient implementation of logic designs. Existing SC multiplication, however, suffers a long-standing problem: large multiplication error with small inputs due to its intrinsic nature of bit-stream based computing. In this article, we propose a new scaled counting-based SC multiplication approach, called Scaled-CBSC , to mitigate this issue by introducing scaling bits to ensure the bit '1' density of the stochastic number is sufficiently large. The idea is to convert the "small" inputs to "large" inputs, thus improve the accuracy of SC multiplication. But different from an existing stream-bit based approach, the new method uses the binary format and does not require stochastic addition as the SC multiplication always starts with binary numbers. Furthermore, Scaled-CBSC only requires all the numbers to be larger than 0.5 instead of arbitrary defined threshold, which leads to integer numbers only for the scaling term. The experimental results show that the 8-bit Scaled-CBSC multiplication with 3 scaling bits can achieve up to 46.6% and 30.4% improvements in mean error and standard deviation, respectively; reduce the peak relative error from 100% to 1.8%; and improve 12.6%, 51.5%, 57.6%, 58.4% in delay, area, area-delay product, energy consumption, respectively, over the state of art work. Furthermore, we evaluate the proposed multiplication approach in a discrete cosine transformation (DCT) application. The results show that with 3 scaling bits, 8-bit scaled counting-based SC multiplication can improve the image quality with 5.9dB upon the state of art work in average.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机计算 (SC) 可以实现逻辑设计的面积高效实现。然而，现有的 SC 乘法存在一个长期存在的问题：由于其基于比特流的计算的本质，小输入时会出现较大的乘法误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于缩放计数的 SC 乘法方法，称为 Scaled-CBSC，通过引入缩放位以确保随机数的位“1”密度足够大来缓解此问题。这个想法是将“小”输入转换为“大”输入，从而提高 SC 乘法的精度。但与现有的基于流位的方法不同，新方法使用二进制格式，并且不需要随机加法，因为 SC 乘法始终以二进制数开始。此外，Scaled-CBSC仅要求所有数字大于0.5，而不是任意定义的阈值，这导致缩放项仅是整数。实验结果表明，具有3个缩放位的8位Scaled-CBSC乘法可以在平均误差和标准差方面分别实现高达46.6%和30.4%的改进；将峰值相对误差从 100% 降低至 1.8%；与现有技术相比，延迟、面积、面积延迟乘积、能耗分别提高了 12.6%、51.5%、57.6%、58.4%。此外，我们在离散余弦变换（DCT）应用中评估了所提出的乘法方法。结果表明，在 3 个缩放位的情况下，8 位缩放的基于计数的 SC 乘法可以将图像质量平均提高 5.9dB。

papers.title: ScaleHLS: a scalable high-level synthesis framework with multi-level transformations and optimizations: invited.
papers.abstract: This paper presents an enhanced version of a scalable HLS (High-Level Synthesis) framework named ScaleHLS, which can compile HLS C/C++ programs and PyTorch models to highly-efficient and synthesizable C++ designs. The original version of ScaleHLS achieved significant speedup on both C/C++ kernels and PyTorch models [14]. In this paper, we first highlight the key features of ScaleHLS on tackling the challenges present in the representation, optimization, and exploration of large-scale HLS designs. To further improve the scalability of ScaleHLS, we then propose an enhanced HLS transform and analysis library supported in both C++ and Python, and a new design space exploration algorithm to handle HLS designs with hierarchical structures more effectively. Comparing to the original ScaleHLS, our enhanced version improves the speedup by up to 60.9× on FPGAs. ScaleHLS is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/hanchenye/scalehls.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个名为 ScaleHLS 的可扩展 HLS（高级综合）框架的增强版本，它可以将 HLS C/C++ 程序和 PyTorch 模型编译为高效且可综合的 C++ 设计。 ScaleHLS 的原始版本在 C/C++ 内核和 PyTorch 模型上都实现了显着的加速 [14]。在本文中，我们首先强调 ScaleHLS 在解决大规模 HLS 设计的表示、优化和探索中存在的挑战方面的关键特性。为了进一步提高 ScaleHLS 的可扩展性，我们提出了一个支持 C++ 和 Python 的增强型 HLS 转换和分析库，以及一种新的设计空间探索算法，以更有效地处理具有分层结构的 HLS 设计。与原始 ScaleHLS 相比，我们的增强版本在 FPGA 上的加速比提高了 60.9 倍。 ScaleHLS 在 https://github.com/hanchenye/scalehls 上完全开源。

papers.title: Scheduling and analysis of real-time tasks with parallel critical sections.
papers.abstract:
Locks are the most widely used mechanisms to coordinate simultaneous accesses to exclusive shared resources. While locking protocols and associated schedulability analysis techniques have been extensively studied for sequential real-time tasks, work for parallel tasks largely lags behind. In the limited existing work on this topic, a common assumption is that a critical section must execute sequentially. However, this is not necessarily the case with parallel programming languages. In this paper, we study the analysis of parallel heavy real-time tasks (the density of which is greater than 1) with critical sections in parallel structures. We show that applying existing analysis techniques directly could be unsafe or much pessimistic for the considered model, and develop new techniques to address these problems. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our method.

This work was partially supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC 62102072) and Research Grants Council of Hong Kong (GRF 15206221).
papers.abstract_zh:
锁是协调对独占共享资源的同时访问的最广泛使用的机制。虽然锁定协议和相关的可调度性分析技术已经针对顺序实时任务进行了广泛的研究，但并行任务的工作很大程度上落后了。在该主题的有限现有工作中，一个常见的假设是关键部分必须顺序执行。然而，并行编程语言不一定是这种情况。在本文中，我们研究了并行结构中具有关键部分的并行重型实时任务（其密度大于1）的分析。我们表明，直接应用现有的分析技术对于所考虑的模型可能不安全或非常悲观，并开发新技术来解决这些问题。进行了全面的实验来评估我们方法的性能。

这项工作得到了中国国家自然科学基金委员会 (NSFC 62102072) 和香港研究资助局 (GRF 15206221) 的部分支持。

papers.title: SEALS: sensitivity-driven efficient approximate logic synthesis.
papers.abstract: Approximate computing is an emerging computing paradigm to design energy-efficient systems. Many greedy approximate logic synthesis (ALS) methods have been proposed to automatically synthesize approximate circuits. They typically need to consider all local approximate changes (LACs) in each iteration of the ALS flow to select the best one, which is time-consuming. In this paper, we propose SEALS, a Sensitivity-driven Efficient ALS method to speed up a greedy ALS flow. SEALS centers around a newly proposed concept called sensitivity, which enables a fast and accurate error estimation method and an efficient method to filter out unpromising LACs. SEALS can handle any statistical error metric. The experimental results show that it outperforms a state-of-the-art ALS method in runtime by 12X to 15X without reducing circuit quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种用于设计节能系统的新兴计算范例。已经提出了许多贪婪近似逻辑综合（ALS）方法来自动综合近似电路。他们通常需要在 ALS 流程的每次迭代中考虑所有局部近似变化 (LAC)，以选择最佳的一个，这非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了 SEALS，一种灵敏度驱动的高效 ALS 方法，用于加速贪婪的 ALS 流程。 SEALS 围绕一个新提出的概念，即灵敏度，它能够实现快速准确的误差估计方法以及过滤掉没有希望的 LAC 的有效方法。 SEALS 可以处理任何统计错误指标。实验结果表明，它的运行时间比最先进的 ALS 方法高出 12 至 15 倍，且不会降低电路质量。

papers.title: Search space characterization for approximate logic synthesis.
papers.abstract:
Approximate logic synthesis aims at trading off a circuit's quality to improve a target metric. Corresponding methods explore a search space by approximating circuit components and verifying the resulting quality of the overall circuit, which is costly.

We propose a methodology that determines reasonable values for the component's local error bounds prior to search space exploration. Utilizing formal verification on a novel approximation miter guarantees the circuit's quality for such local error bounds, independent of employed approximation methods, resulting in reduced runtimes due to omitted verifications. Experiments show speed-ups of up to 3.7 x for approximate logic synthesis using our method.
papers.abstract_zh:
近似逻辑综合旨在权衡电路质量以提高目标指标。相应的方法通过近似电路元件并验证整个电路的最终质量来探索搜索空间，这是昂贵的。

我们提出了一种在搜索空间探索之前确定组件局部误差界限的合理值的方法。在新颖的近似斜接上使用形式验证可以保证电路在此类局部误差范围内的质量，而与所采用的近似方法无关，从而由于省略验证而减少运行时间。实验表明，使用我们的方法，近似逻辑综合的速度可提高高达 3.7 倍。

papers.title: Secure by construction: addressing security vulnerabilities introduced during high-level synthesis: invited.
papers.abstract: Working towards a higher level of abstraction (C/C++) facilitates designers to execute and validate complex designs faster in response to highly demanding time-to-market requirements. High-Level Synthesis (HLS) is an automatic process that translates the high-level description of the design behaviors into the corresponding hardware description language (HDL) modules. However, HLS translation steps/optimizations can cause security vulnerabilities since they have not been designed with security in mind. It is very important that HLS generates functionally correct RTL in a secure manner in the first place since it is not easy to read the automatically generated codes and trace them back to the source of vulnerabilities. Even if one manages to identify and fix the security vulnerabilities in one design, the core of the HLS engine remains vulnerable. Therefore, the same vulnerabilities will appear in all other HLS generated RTL codes. This paper shows a systematic approach for identifying the source of security vulnerabilities introduced during HLS and mitigating them.
papers.abstract_zh: 致力于更高层次的抽象 (C/C++) 有助于设计人员更快地执行和验证复杂的设计，以满足严格的上市时间要求。高级综合（HLS）是一个自动过程，它将设计行为的高级描述转换为相应的硬件描述语言（HDL）模块。然而，HLS 转换步骤/优化可能会导致安全漏洞，因为它们在设计时并未考虑到安全性。 HLS 首先以安全的方式生成功能正确的 RTL 非常重要，因为读取自动生成的代码并将其追溯到漏洞来源并不容易。即使人们设法识别并修复一种设计中的安全漏洞，HLS 引擎的核心仍然容易受到攻击。因此，相同的漏洞将出现在所有其他 HLS 生成的 RTL 代码中。本文展示了一种系统方法，用于识别 HLS 期间引入的安全漏洞的来源并减轻这些漏洞。

papers.title: Self adaptive reconfigurable arrays (SARA): learning flexible GEMM accelerator configuration and mapping-space using ML.
papers.abstract: This work demonstrates a scalable reconfigurable accelerator (RA) architecture designed to extract maximum performance and energy efficiency for GEMM workloads. We also present a self-adaptive (SA) unit, which runs a learnt model for one-shot configuration optimization in hardware offloading the software stack thus easing the deployment of the proposed design. We evaluate an instance of the proposed methodology with a 32.768 TOPS reference implementation called SAGAR, that can provide the same mapping flexibility as a compute equivalent distributed system while achieving 3.5X more power efficiency and 3.2X higher compute density demonstrated via architectural and post-layout simulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作展示了一种可扩展的可重构加速器 (RA) 架构，旨在为 GEMM 工作负载获取最大性能和能源效率。我们还提出了一种自适应（SA）单元，它运行一个学习模型，用于硬件卸载软件堆栈中的一次性配置优化，从而简化了所提出设计的部署。我们使用名为 SAGAR 的 32.768 TOPS 参考实现来评估所提出方法的实例，它可以提供与计算等效分布式系统相同的映射灵活性，同时通过架构和布局后仿真证明，能效提高 3.5 倍，计算密度提高 3.2 倍。

papers.title: SEM-latch: a lost-cost and high-performance latch design for mitigating soft errors in nanoscale CMOS process.
papers.abstract: Soft errors (primarily single-event transients (SET) and single-event upsets (SEU)) are receiving increased attention due to the increasing prevalence of automotive and biomedical electronics. In recent years, several latch designs have been developed for SEU/SET protection, but each has its own issues regarding timing, area, and power. Therefore, we propose a novel soft-error mitigating latch design, called SEM-Latch , which extends QUATRO and incorporates a speed path whereas embedding a reference voltage generator (RVG) for simultaneously improving timing, area, and power in 45nm CMOS process. SEM-Latch effectively reduces the power, area, and PDAP (product of delay, area, and power) by an average of 1.4%, 12.5%, and 8.7%, respectively, in comparison to a previous latch (HPST) with equivalent SEU protection. Furthermore, in comparison to AMSER-Latch, SEM-Latch reduces area, timing overhead and PDAP by 27.2%, 48.2%, and 60.2%, respectively, to provide 99.9999% particle rejection rate for SET protection.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于汽车和生物医学电子产品的日益普及，软错误（主要是单粒子瞬态 (SET) 和单粒子翻转 (SEU)）受到越来越多的关注。近年来，已经开发了多种用于 SEU/SET 保护的锁存器设计，但每种设计在时序、面积和功耗方面都有自己的问题。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的软错误缓解锁存器设计，称为 SEM-Latch，它扩展了 QUATRO 并结合了速度路径，同时嵌入了参考电压发生器 (RVG)，以同时改善 45nm CMOS 工艺中的时序、面积和功耗。与具有同等 SEU 保护的先前锁存器 (HPST) 相比，SEM-Latch 有效地将功耗、面积和 PDAP（延迟、面积和功耗的乘积）分别平均降低了 1.4%、12.5% 和 8.7%。此外，与 AMSER-Latch 相比，SEM-Latch 的面积、时序开销和 PDAP 分别减少了 27.2%、48.2% 和 60.2%，为 SET 保护提供 99.9999% 的颗粒抑制率。

papers.title: Serpens: a high bandwidth memory based accelerator for general-purpose sparse matrix-vector multiplication.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) multiplies a sparse matrix with a dense vector. SpMV plays a crucial role in many applications, from graph analytics to deep learning. The random memory accesses of the sparse matrix make accelerator design challenging. However, high bandwidth memory (HBM) based FPGAs are a good fit for designing accelerators for SpMV. In this paper, we present Serpens, an HBM based accelerator for general-purpose SpMV, which features memory-centric processing engines and index coalescing to support the efficient processing of arbitrary SpMVs. From the evaluation of twelve large-size matrices, Serpens is 1.91x and 1.76x better in terms of geomean throughput than the latest accelerators GraphLiLy and Sextans, respectively. We also evaluate 2,519 SuiteSparse matrices, and Serpens achieves 2.10x higher throughput than a K80 GPU. For the energy/bandwidth efficiency, Serpens is 1.71x/1.99x, 1.90x/2.69x, and 6.25x/4.06x better compared with GraphLily, Sextans, and K80, respectively. After scaling up to 24 HBM channels, Serpens achieves up to 60.55 GFLOP/s (30,204 MTEPS) and up to 3.79x over GraphLily. The code is available at https://github.com/UCLA-VAST/Serpens.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 将稀疏矩阵与稠密向量相乘。 SpMV 在从图形分析到深度学习的许多应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。稀疏矩阵的随机存储器访问使加速器设计具有挑战性。然而，基于高带宽内存 (HBM) 的 FPGA 非常适合设计 SpMV 加速器。在本文中，我们提出了 Serpens，这是一种基于 HBM 的通用 SpMV 加速器，它具有以内存为中心的处理引擎和索引合并功能，支持任意 SpMV 的高效处理。从对 12 个大尺寸矩阵的评估来看，Serpens 在几何平均吞吐量方面分别比最新的加速器 GraphLiLy 和 Sextans 好 1.91 倍和 1.76 倍。我们还评估了 2,519 个 SuiteSparse 矩阵，Serpens 的吞吐量比 K80 GPU 高 2.10 倍。对于能量/带宽效率，Serpens 分别比 GraphLily、Sextans 和 K80 好 1.71x/1.99x、1.90x/2.69x 和 6.25x/4.06x。在扩展到 24 个 HBM 通道后，Serpens 的速度高达 60.55 GFLOP/s (30,204 MTEPS)，是 GraphLily 的 3.79 倍。该代码可在 https://github.com/UCLA-VAST/Serpens 获取。

papers.title: Shfl-BW: accelerating deep neural network inference with tensor-core aware weight pruning.
papers.abstract:
Weight pruning in deep neural networks (DNNs) can reduce storage and computation cost, but struggles to bring practical speedup to the model inference time. Tensor-cores can significantly boost the throughput of GPUs on dense computation, but exploiting tensor-cores for sparse DNNs is very challenging. Compared to existing CUDA-cores, tensor-cores require higher data reuse and matrix-shaped instruction granularity, both difficult to yield from sparse DNN kernels. Existing pruning approaches fail to balance the demands of accuracy and efficiency: random sparsity preserves the model quality well but prohibits tensor-core acceleration, while highly-structured block-wise sparsity can exploit tensor-cores but suffers from severe accuracy loss.

In this work, we propose a novel sparse pattern, Shuffled Blockwise sparsity (Shfl-BW) , designed to efficiently utilize tensor-cores while minimizing the constraints on the weight structure. Our insight is that row- and column-wise permutation provides abundant flexibility for the weight structure, while introduces negligible overheads using our GPU kernel designs. We optimize the GPU kernels for Shfl-BW in linear and convolution layers. Evaluations show that our techniques can achieve the state-of-the-art speed-accuracy trade-offs on GPUs. For example, with small accuracy loss, we can accelerate the computation-intensive layers of Transformer [1] by 1.81, 4.18 and 1.90 × on NVIDIA V100, T4 and A100 GPUs respectively at 75% sparsity.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 中的权重剪枝可以降低存储和计算成本，但难以实际加速模型推理时间。张量核可以显着提高 GPU 在密集计算上的吞吐量，但将张量核用于稀疏 DNN 非常具有挑战性。与现有的 CUDA 核心相比，张量核心需要更高的数据重用和矩阵形状的指令粒度，而这两者都很难从稀疏 DNN 内核中获得。现有的剪枝方法无法平衡精度和效率的要求：随机稀疏性可以很好地保持模型质量，但会阻碍张量核加速，而高度结构化的分块稀疏性可以利用张量核，但会遭受严重的精度损失。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏模式，即随机块稀疏（Shfl-BW），旨在有效利用张量核心，同时最大限度地减少对权重结构的约束。我们的见解是，行和列的排列为权重结构提供了丰富的灵活性，同时使用我们的 GPU 内核设计引入的开销可以忽略不计。我们在线性层和卷积层中针对 Shfl-BW 优化了 GPU 内核。评估表明，我们的技术可以在 GPU 上实现最先进的速度与精度权衡。例如，在精度损失较小的情况下，我们可以在 NVIDIA V100、T4 和 A100 GPU 上以 75% 的稀疏度将 Transformer [1] 的计算密集型层分别加速 1.81、4.18 和 1.90 倍。

papers.title: Sign bit is enough: a learning synchronization framework for multi-hop all-reduce with ultimate compression.
papers.abstract: Traditional one-bit compressed stochastic gradient descent can not be directly employed in multi-hop all-reduce, a widely adopted distributed training paradigm in network-intensive high-performance computing systems such as public clouds. According to our theoretical findings, due to the cascading compression, the training process has considerable deterioration on the convergence performance. To overcome this limitation, we implement a sign-bit compression-based learning synchronization framework, Marsit. It prevents cascading compression via an elaborate bit-wise operation for unbiased sign aggregation and its specific global compensation mechanism for mitigating compression deviation. The proposed framework retains the same theoretical convergence rate as non-compression mechanisms. Experimental results demonstrate that Marsit reduces up to 35% training time while preserving the same accuracy as training without compression.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的一位压缩随机梯度下降不能直接应用于多跳全归约，多跳全归约是公共云等网络密集型高性能计算系统中广泛采用的分布式训练范例。根据我们的理论发现，由于级联压缩，训练过程的收敛性能有相当大的恶化。为了克服这个限制，我们实现了一个基于符号位压缩的学习同步框架，Marsit。它通过用于无偏符号聚合的复杂按位操作及其用于减轻压缩偏差的特定全局补偿机制来防止级联压缩。所提出的框架保留了与非压缩机制相同的理论收敛速度。实验结果表明，Marsit 减少了高达 35% 的训练时间，同时保持与无压缩训练相同的精度。

papers.title: Silicon validation of LUT-based logic-locked IP cores.
papers.abstract: Modern semiconductor manufacturing often leverages a fabless model in which design and fabrication are partitioned. This has led to a large body of work attempting to secure designs sent to an untrusted third party through obfuscation methods. On the other hand, efficient de-obfuscation attacks have been proposed, such as Boolean Satisfiability attacks (SAT attacks). However, there is a lack of frameworks to validate the security and functionality of obfuscated designs. Additionally, unconventional obfuscated design flows, which vary from one obfuscation to another, have been key impending factors in realizing logic locking as a mainstream approach for securing designs. In this work, we address these two issues for Lookup Table-based obfuscation. We study both Volatile and Non-volatile versions of LUT-based obfuscation and develop a framework to validate SAT runtime using machine learning. We can achieve unparallel SAT-resiliency using LUT-based obfuscation while incurring 7% area and less than 1% power overheads. Following this, we discuss and implement a validation flow for obfuscated designs. We then fabricate a chip consisting of several benchmark designs and a RISC-V CPU in TSMC 65nm for post functionality validation. We show that the design flow and SAT-runtime validation can easily integrate LUT-based obfuscation into existing CAD tools while adding minimal verification overhead. Finally, we justify SAT-resilient LUT-based obfuscation as a promising candidate for securing designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代半导体制造通常采用无晶圆厂模型，其中设计和制造是分开的。这导致大量工作试图通过混淆方法来保护发送给不受信任的第三方的设计。另一方面，已经提出了有效的反混淆攻击，例如布尔可满足性攻击（SAT 攻击）。然而，缺乏框架来验证混淆设计的安全性和功能。此外，非常规的混淆设计流程（从一种混淆到另一种混淆）一直是实现逻辑锁定作为保护设计的主流方法的关键迫在眉睫的因素。在这项工作中，我们解决了基于查找表的混淆的这两个问题。我们研究基于 LUT 的混淆的易失性和非易失性版本，并开发一个框架来使用机器学习来验证 SAT 运行时。我们可以使用基于 LUT 的混淆实现无与伦比的 SAT 弹性，同时减少 7% 的面积和不到 1% 的功率开销。接下来，我们讨论并实现混淆设计的验证流程。然后，我们在 TSMC 65nm 中制造由多个基准设计和 RISC-V CPU 组成的芯片，以进行后期功能验证。我们表明，设计流程和 SAT 运行时验证可以轻松地将基于 LUT 的混淆集成到现有 CAD 工具中，同时增加最小的验证开销。最后，我们证明基于 LUT 的 SAT 弹性混淆是保护设计安全的有希望的候选者。

papers.title: SMART: on simultaneously marching racetracks to improve the performance of racetrack-based main memory.
papers.abstract: RaceTrack Memory (RTM) is a promising media for modern Main Memory subsystems. However, the "shift-before-access" principle, as the nature of RTM, introduces considerable overheads to the access latency. To obtain more insights for the mitigation of shift overheads, this work characterizes and observes that the access patterns, exhibited by the state-of-the-art RTM-based Main Memory, mismatches with the granularity of shift commands (i.e., a group of RaceTracks called Domain Block Cluster (DBC)). Based on the characterization, we propose a novel mechanism called SMART, which simultaneously and proactively marches all DBCs within a subarray, so that subsequent accesses to other DBCs can be served without additional shift commands. Evaluation results show that, averaged across 15 real-world workloads, SMART significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art proposals of RTM-based Main Memory by at least 1.53X in terms of the total execution time, on two different generations of RTM technologies.
papers.abstract_zh: RaceTrack 内存 (RTM) 是现代主内存子系统的一种有前途的介质。然而，由于RTM的本质，“先移后接”的原则给访问延迟带来了相当大的开销。为了获得更多关于减轻轮班开销的见解，这项工作描述并观察了最先进的基于 RTM 的主内存所表现出的访问模式与轮班命令的粒度（即一组称为域块集群 (DBC) 的 RaceTrack）不匹配。基于该特征，我们提出了一种称为 SMART 的新颖机制，它同时主动地行进子阵列内的所有 DBC，以便后续对其他 DBC 的访问无需额外的移位命令即可完成。评估结果表明，在 15 个实际工作负载的平均情况下，在两代不同的 RTM 技术上，就总执行时间而言，SMART 显着优于基于 RTM 主存的其他最先进的方案，至少高出 1.53 倍。

papers.title: Sniper: cloud-edge collaborative inference scheduling with neural network similarity modeling.
papers.abstract: The cloud-edge collaborative inference demands scheduling the artificial intelligence (AI) tasks efficiently to the appropriate edge smart device. However, the continuously iterative deep neural networks (DNNs) and heterogeneous devices pose great challenges for inference tasks scheduling. In this paper, we propose a self-update cloud-edge collaborative inference scheduling system (Sniper) with time awareness. At first, considering that similar networks exhibit similar behaviors, we develop a non-invasive performance characterization network (PCN) based on neural network similarity (NNS) to accurately predict the inference time of DNNs. Moreover, PCN and time-based scheduling algorithms can be flexibly combined into the scheduling module of Sniper. Experimental results show that the average relative error of network inference time prediction is about 8.06%. Compared with the traditional method without time awareness, Sniper can reduce the waiting time by 52% on average while achieving a stable increase in throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 云边协同推理需要将人工智能（AI）任务高效地调度到合适的边缘智能设备上。然而，不断迭代的深度神经网络（DNN）和异构设备给推理任务调度带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有时间意识的自更新云边协同推理调度系统（Sniper）。首先，考虑到相似的网络表现出相似的行为，我们开发了一种基于神经网络相似性（NNS）的非侵入性性能表征网络（PCN），以准确预测DNN的推理时间。而且，PCN和基于时间的调度算法可以灵活地组合到Sniper的调度模块中。实验结果表明，网络推理时间预测的平均相对误差约为8.06%。与没有时间感知的传统方法相比，Sniper 可以平均减少 52% 的等待时间，同时实现吞吐量的稳定增长。

papers.title: SoftSNN: low-cost fault tolerance for spiking neural network accelerators under soft errors.
papers.abstract: Specialized hardware accelerators have been designed and employed to maximize the performance efficiency of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). However, such accelerators are vulnerable to transient faults (i.e., soft errors), which occur due to high-energy particle strikes, and manifest as bit flips at the hardware layer. These errors can change the weight values and neuron operations in the compute engine of SNN accelerators, thereby leading to incorrect outputs and accuracy degradation. However, the impact of soft errors in the compute engine and the respective mitigation techniques have not been thoroughly studied yet for SNNs. A potential solution is employing redundant executions (re-execution) for ensuring correct outputs, but it leads to huge latency and energy overheads. Toward this, we propose SoftSNN , a novel methodology to mitigate soft errors in the weight registers (synapses) and neurons of SNN accelerators without re-execution , thereby maintaining the accuracy with low latency and energy overheads. Our SoftSNN methodology employs the following key steps: (1) analyzing the SNN characteristics under soft errors to identify faulty weights and neuron operations, which are required for recognizing faulty SNN behavior; (2) a Bound-and-Protect technique that leverages this analysis to improve the SNN fault tolerance by bounding the weight values and protecting the neurons from faulty operations; and (3) devising lightweight hardware enhancements for the neural hardware accelerator to efficiently support the proposed technique. The experimental results show that, for a 900-neuron network with even a high fault rate, our SoftSNN maintains the accuracy degradation below 3%, while reducing latency and energy by up to 3x and 2.3x respectively, as compared to the re-execution technique.
papers.abstract_zh: 专门的硬件加速器的设计和使用是为了最大限度地提高尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的性能效率。然而，此类加速器很容易受到瞬态故障（即软错误）的影响，这种故障是由于高能粒子撞击而发生的，并表现为硬件层的位翻转。这些错误可能会改变 SNN 加速器计算引擎中的权重值和神经元操作，从而导致不正确的输出和准确性下降。然而，对于 SNN，计算引擎中软错误的影响以及相应的缓解技术尚未得到彻底研究。一个潜在的解决方案是采用冗余执行（重新执行）来确保正确的输出，但这会导致巨大的延迟和能源开销。为此，我们提出了 SoftSNN，这是一种新颖的方法，可以减轻 SNN 加速器的权重寄存器（突触）和神经元中的软错误，而无需重新执行，从而保持低延迟和低能量开销的准确性。我们的 SoftSNN 方法采用以下关键步骤：（1）分析软错误下的 SNN 特征，以识别错误的权重和神经元操作，这是识别错误的 SNN 行为所必需的； (2) 绑定和保护技术，利用此分析通过限制权重值并保护神经元免受错误操作的影响来提高 SNN 容错能力； (3)为神经硬件加速器设计轻量级硬件增强功能，以有效支持所提出的技术。实验结果表明，对于具有高故障率的 900 个神经元网络，我们的 SoftSNN 仍将精度下降保持在 3% 以下，同时与重新执行技术相比，延迟和能量分别降低了 3 倍和 2.3 倍。

papers.title: Solving traveling salesman problems via a parallel fully connected ising machine.
papers.abstract: Annealing-based Ising machines have shown promising results in solving combinatorial optimization problems. As a typical class of these problems, however, traveling salesman problems (TSPs) are very challenging to solve due to the constraints imposed on the solution. This article proposes a parallel annealing algorithm for a fully connected Ising machine that significantly improves the accuracy and performance in solving constrained combinatorial optimization problems such as the TSP. Unlike previous parallel annealing algorithms, this improved parallel annealing (IPA) algorithm efficiently solves TSPs using an exponential temperature function with a dynamic offset. Compared with digital annealing (DA) and momentum annealing (MA), the IPA reduces the run time by 44.4 times and 19.9 times for a 14-city TSP, respectively. Large scale TSPs can be more efficiently solved by taking a k -medoids clustering approach that decreases the average travel distance of a 22-city TSP by 51.8% compared with DA and by 42.0% compared with MA. This approach groups neighboring cities into clusters to form a reduced TSP, which is then solved in a hierarchical manner by using the IPA algorithm.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于退火的伊辛机在解决组合优化问题方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，作为此类问题的典型一类，旅行商问题（TSP）由于解决方案受到限制，解决起来非常具有挑战性。本文提出了一种用于全连接 Ising 机的并行退火算法，该算法显着提高了求解 TSP 等约束组合优化问题的精度和性能。与之前的并行退火算法不同，这种改进的并行退火 (IPA) 算法使用具有动态偏移的指数温度函数有效地求解 TSP。与数字退火（DA）和动量退火（MA）相比，IPA 对于 14 个城市的 TSP 分别减少了 44.4 倍和 19.9 倍的运行时间。通过采用 k 中心点聚类方法可以更有效地解决大规模 TSP，该方法将 22 个城市的 TSP 的平均行驶距离与 DA 相比减少了 51.8%，与 MA 相比减少了 42.0%。该方法将邻近城市划分为簇，形成简化的 TSP，然后使用 IPA 算法以分层方式进行求解。

papers.title: SRA: a secure ReRAM-based DNN accelerator.
papers.abstract:
Deep Neural Network (DNN) accelerators are increasingly developed to pursue high efficiency in DNN computing. However, the IP protection of the DNNs deployed on such accelerators is an important topic that has been less addressed. Although there are previous works that targeted this problem for CMOS-based designs, there is still no solution for ReRAM-based accelerators which pose new security challenges due to their crossbar structure and non-volatility. ReRAM's non-volatility retains data even after the system is powered off, making the stored DNN model vulnerable to attacks by simply reading out the ReRAM content. Because the crossbar structure can only compute on plaintext data, encrypting the ReRAM content is no longer a feasible solution in this scenario.

In this paper, we propose SRA - a secure ReRAM-based DNN accelerator that stores DNN weights on crossbars in an encrypted format while still maintaining ReRAM's in-memory computing capability. The proposed encryption scheme also supports sharing bits among multiple weights, significantly reducing the storage overhead. In addition, SRA uses a novel high-bandwidth SC conversion scheme to protect each layer's intermediate results, which also contain sensitive information of the model. Our experimental results show that SRA can effectively prevent pirating the deployed DNN weights as well as the intermediate results with negligible accuracy loss, and achieves 1.14X performance speedup and 9% energy reduction compared to ISAAC - a non-secure ReRAM-based baseline.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络（DNN）加速器的不断发展是为了追求 DNN 计算的高效率。然而，部署在此类加速器上的 DNN 的 IP 保护是一个重要的话题，但却很少被提及。尽管之前有针对基于 CMOS 设计的这一问题的研究，但基于 ReRAM 的加速器仍然没有解决方案，因为其交叉结构和非易失性带来了新的安全挑战。 ReRAM 的非易失性即使在系统断电后也能保留数据，使得存储的 DNN 模型很容易通过读取 ReRAM 内容而受到攻击。由于 crossbar 结构只能对明文数据进行计算，因此在这种情况下加密 ReRAM 内容不再是可行的解决方案。

在本文中，我们提出了 SRA——一种基于 ReRAM 的安全 DNN 加速器，它以加密格式将 DNN 权重存储在交叉开关上，同时仍然保持 ReRAM 的内存计算能力。所提出的加密方案还支持在多个权重之间共享比特，从而显着减少存储开销。此外，SRA采用新颖的高带宽SC转换方案来保护每一层的中间结果，其中也包含模型的敏感信息。我们的实验结果表明，SRA 可以有效防止盗用已部署的 DNN 权重以及中间结果，且精度损失可以忽略不计，与基于非安全 ReRAM 的基线 ISAAC 相比，实现了 1.14 倍的性能加速和 9% 的能耗降低。

papers.title: SS-LRU: a smart segmented LRU caching.
papers.abstract: Many caching policies use machine learning to predict data reuse, but they ignore the impact of incorrect prediction on cache performance, especially for large-size objects. In this paper, we propose a smart segmented LRU (SS-LRU) replacement policy, which adopts a size-aware classifier designed for cache scenarios and considers the cache cost caused by misprediction. Besides, SS-LRU enhances the migration rules of segmented LRU (SLRU) and implements a smart caching with unequal priorities and segment sizes based on prediction and multiple access patterns. We conducted Extensive experiments under the real-world workloads to demonstrate the superiority of our approach over state-of-the-art caching policies.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多缓存策略使用机器学习来预测数据重用，但它们忽略了错误预测对缓存性能的影响，尤其是对于大尺寸对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能分段LRU（SS-LRU）替换策略，该策略采用针对缓存场景设计的大小感知分类器，并考虑错误预测导致的缓存成本。此外，SS-LRU增强了分段LRU（SLRU）的迁移规则，并基于预测和多访问模式实现了具有不等优先级和段大小的智能缓存。我们在现实世界的工作负载下进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的方法相对于最先进的缓存策略的优越性。

papers.title: Statistical computing framework and demonstration for in-memory computing systems.
papers.abstract: With the increasing importance of data-intensive workloads, such as AI, in-memory computing (IMC) has demonstrated substantial energy/throughput benefits by addressing both compute and data-movement/accessing costs, and holds significant further promise by its ability to leverage emerging forms of highly-scaled memory technologies. However, IMC fundamentally derives its advantages through parallelism, which poses a trade-off with SNR, whereby variations and noise in nanoscaled devices directly limit possible gains. In this work, we propose novel training approaches to improve model tolerance to noise via a contrastive loss function and a progressive training procedure. We further propose a methodology for modeling and calibrating hardware noise, efficiently at the level of a macro operation and through a limited number of hardware measurements. The approaches are demonstrated on a fabricated MRAM-based IMC prototype in 22nm FD-SOI, together with a neural network training framework implemented in PyTorch. For CIFAR-10/100 classifications, model performance is restored to the level of ideal noise-free execution, and generalized performance of the trained model deployed across different chips is demonstrated.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 AI 等数据密集型工作负载的重要性日益增加，内存计算 (IMC) 通过解决计算和数据移动/访问成本，展现了巨大的能源/吞吐量优势，并因其利用新兴形式的高度扩展内存技术的能力而前景广阔。然而，IMC 从根本上通过并行性获得其优势，这会与 SNR 进行权衡，纳米级器件中的变化和噪声直接限制了可能的增益。在这项工作中，我们提出了新颖的训练方法，通过对比损失函数和渐进式训练过程来提高模型对噪声的容忍度。我们进一步提出了一种在宏观操作层面上并通过有限数量的硬件测量有效地建模和校准硬件噪声的方法。这些方法在 22nm FD-SOI 中制造的基于 MRAM 的 IMC 原型上以及在 PyTorch 中实现的神经网络训练框架上进行了演示。对于 CIFAR-10/100 分类，模型性能恢复到理想的无噪声执行水平，并展示了跨不同芯片部署的训练模型的通用性能。

papers.title: Subgraph matching based reference placement for PCB designs: late breaking results.
